  • 提出场景平衡和类别感知的少样本采样策略，增强生成三元组的场景和类别多样性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖文本提示的质量和多样性。
  • 框架复杂度较高，训练和推理成本可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

RGB-T semantic segmentation requires strictly aligned VIS-IR-Label triplets; however, such aligned triplet data are often scarce in real-world scenarios. Existing generative augmentation methods usually adopt cascaded generation paradigms, decomposing joint triplet generation into local conditional processes. As a result, consistency among VIS, IR, and Label in spatial structure, semantic content, and cross-modal details cannot be reliably maintained. To address this issue, we propose UniTriGen, a unified triplet generation framework that directly generates spatially aligned, semantically consistent, and modality complementary VIS-IR-Label triplets under the guidance of text prompts. UniTriGen first introduces a unified triplet generation mechanism, where VIS, IR, and Label are jointly encoded into a shared latent space and modeled with a diffusion process to enforce global cross-modal consistency. Lightweight modality-specific residual adapters are further integrated into this mechanism to accommodate modality-specific imaging characteristics and output formats. To mitigate generation bias caused by imbalanced scene and class distributions in limited paired triplets, UniTriGen also employs a scene-balanced and class-aware few-shot sampling strategy, which induces a more balanced sampling distribution and enhances the scene and class diversity of generated triplets. Experiments show that UniTriGen generates high-quality aligned triplets from limited real paired data, thereby achieving consistent performance improvements across various RGB-T semantic segmentation models.

StyleTextGen: Style-Conditioned Multilingual Scene Text Generation

Medium 2605.14708
Zeyu Chen, Fangmin Zhao, Yan Shu, Yichao Liu, Liu Yu, Yu Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 StyleTextGen 框架，通过双分支风格编码器和一致性损失实现多语言场景文本的风格化生成。
🎯研究动机

现有场景文本生成方法难以从复杂背景中提取精确文本风格，且跨字符、跨语言保持细粒度风格一致性面临挑战。

❓解决问题

多语言场景文本的风格条件生成，特别是风格提取和跨语言风格一致性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

双分支风格编码器、文本风格一致性损失、掩码引导推理策略。

📊实验结果

在构建的双语场景文本风格基准 StyleText-CE 上评估，涵盖单语和跨语言设置，实验表明方法在风格一致性和跨语言泛化上显著优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出双分支风格编码器，用于鲁棒的多语言文本风格表示。
  • 设计文本风格一致性损失，增强风格连贯性和视觉质量。
  • 开发掩码引导推理策略，确保生成文本与参考文本的风格精确对齐。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端复杂背景或罕见文字系统效果有限。
  • 基准仅覆盖双语，多语言泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Style-conditioned scene text generation faces unique challenges in extracting precise text styles from complex backgrounds and maintaining fine-grained style consistency across characters, especially for multilingual scripts. We propose StyleTextGen, a novel framework that learns to perceive and replicate visual text styles across different languages and writing systems. Our approach features three key contributions: First, we introduce a dual-branch style encoder dedicated to style modeling, yielding robust multilingual text style representations in complex real-world scenes. Second, we design a text style consistency loss that enhances style coherence and improves overall visual quality. Third, we develop a mask-guided inference strategy that ensures precise style alignment between generated and reference text. To facilitate systematic evaluation, we construct StyleText-CE, a bilingual scene text style benchmark covering both monolingual and cross-lingual settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StyleTextGen significantly outperforms existing methods in style consistency and cross-lingual generalization, establishing new state-of-the-art performance in multilingual style-conditioned text generation.

Road Maps as Free Geometric Priors: Weather-Invariant Drone Geo-Localization with GeoFuse

Medium 2605.14925
Yunsong Fang (1), Tingyu Wang (2), Zhedong Zheng (1) ((1) University of Macau, (2) Hangzhou Dianzi University)
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：GeoFuse 通过融合道路地图与卫星图像，实现天气不变的无人机地理定位。
🎯研究动机

无人机地理定位在恶劣天气下性能严重下降，现有方法依赖天气专用架构或数据增强，但忽略了道路地图这一低成本、天气不变的几何先验。

❓解决问题

解决无人机视图在恶劣天气下与卫星图像之间的跨视图域差距问题。

🔎现象分析

天气退化（噪声、能见度降低、部分遮挡）加剧了无人机与卫星视图之间的域差距；道路地图提供天气不变的几何布局线索。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GeoFuse 框架，包括：1) 为现有基准添加地理对齐的道路地图；2) 融合模块通过 token 级和通道级交互以及动态门控机制自适应融合卫星和道路地图特征；3) 类别级跨视图对比学习对齐天气退化无人机特征与融合表示。

📊实验结果

在 University-1652 和 DenseUAV 基准上，模拟多种天气条件进行实验，GeoFuse 一致优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将道路地图作为几何先验用于天气不变的无人机地理定位。
  • 提出 GeoFuse 跨模态融合框架，包含动态门控和对比学习。
  • 在 University-1652 和 DenseUAV 基准上分别提升 Recall@1 达 3.46% 和 23.18%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖道路地图数据的可用性和对齐精度。
  • 未在真实恶劣天气数据上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Drone-view geo-localization aims to match a query drone image, often captured under adverse weather conditions (e.g., rain, snow, fog), against a gallery of geo-tagged satellite images. Weather-induced degradations in the drone view, such as noise, reduced visibility, and partial occlusions, severely exacerbate the intrinsic cross-view domain gap. While prior methods predominantly rely on weather-specific architectures or data augmentations, they have largely overlooked road map data, a readily available modality that provides strong, inherently weather-invariant geometric layout cues (e.g., road networks and building footprints) at negligible additional cost. We introduce GeoFuse, a cross-modal fusion framework that integrates precisely aligned road map tiles with satellite imagery to yield more discriminative and weather-resilient representations. We first augment the existing University-1652 and DenseUAV benchmarks with geo-aligned road maps, supplying structural priors robust to meteorological variations. Building on this, we propose a flexible fusion module that combines satellite and road map features via token-level and channel-level interactions, with a lightweight dynamic gating mechanism that adaptively weights modality contributions per instance. Finally, we employ class-level cross-view contrastive learning to promote robust alignment between weather-degraded drone features and the fused satellite-roadmap representations. Extensive experiments under diverse weather conditions show that GeoFuse consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving +3.46% and +23.18% Recall@1 accuracy on the University-1652 and DenseUAV benchmarks, respectively.

Does Synthetic Layered Design Data Benefit Layered Design Decomposition?

Medium 2605.15167
Kam Man Wu, Haolin Yang, Qingyu Chen, Yihu Tang, Jingye Chen, Qifeng Chen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：纯合成数据可有效替代稀缺的真实分层设计数据，用于图形设计分解任务。
🎯研究动机

现有图像生成输出是扁平化的，难以灵活编辑，而分层设计数据稀缺且难以规模化，亟需可扩展的替代方案。

❓解决问题

研究纯合成分层数据能否有效提升图形设计分解的性能，并替代真实数据。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现：(1)纯合成数据训练可超越真实数据集 PrismLayersPro；(2)性能随数据量增加而提升，约 50K 样本后饱和；(3)合成数据可避免真实数据中图层数量分布不均的问题。

🛠️主要方法

基于 CLD 基线框架，构建纯合成数据集 SynLayers，使用视觉语言模型生成文本监督，并用 VLM 预测的边界框自动化推理输入。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及基于 CLD 基线进行数据为中心的研究。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明纯合成数据在图形设计分解中可作为可扩展且有效的替代方案，超越现有真实数据集。
  • 揭示性能随合成数据规模提升的规律，并指出 50K 样本后增益饱和。
  • 展示合成数据能平衡图层数量分布，避免真实数据中的不平衡问题。
⚠️方法局限
  • 研究仅基于 CLD 基线，可能不适用于其他分解框架。
  • 合成数据与真实数据之间的域差异可能影响泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in image generation have made it easy to produce high-quality images. However, these outputs are inherently flattened, entangling foreground elements, background, and text within a fixed canvas. As a result, flexible post-generation editing remains challenging, revealing a clear last-mile gap toward practical usability. Existing approaches either rely on scarce proprietary layered assets or construct partially synthetic data from limited structural priors. However, both strategies face fundamental challenges in scalability. In this work, we investigate whether pure synthetic layered data can improve graphic design decomposition. We make the assumption that, in graphic design, effective decomposition does not require modeling inter-layer dependencies as precisely as in natural-image composition, since design elements are often intentionally arranged as modular and semantically separable components. Concretely, we conduct a data-centric study based on CLD baseline, which is a state-of-the-art layer decomposition framework. Based on the baseline, we construct our own synthetic dataset, SynLayers, generate textual supervision using vision language models, and automate inference inputs with VLM-predicted bounding boxes. Our study reveals three key findings: (1) even training with purely synthetic data can outperform non-scalable alternatives such as the widely used PrismLayersPro dataset, demonstrating its viability as a scalable and effective substitute; (2) performance consistently improves with increased training data scale, while gains begin to saturate at around 50K samples; and (3) synthetic data enables balanced control over layer-count distributions, avoiding the layer-count imbalance commonly observed in real-world datasets. We hope this data-centric study encourages broader adoption of synthetic data as a practical foundation for layered design editing systems.

MoZoo:Unleashing Video Diffusion power in animal fur and muscle simulation

Medium 2605.13857
Dongxia Liu, Jie Ma, Xiaochen Yang, Jiancheng Zhang, Bin Xia, Zhehan Kan, Nisha Huang, Jun Liang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：MoZoo 利用视频扩散模型从粗糙网格生成高保真动物毛皮与肌肉模拟视频。
🎯研究动机

传统动物特效制作中毛皮和肌肉动力学建模既耗时又计算昂贵，而现有生成扩散模型尚未充分探索高保真动物模拟。

❓解决问题

如何从粗糙网格生成高保真、时序一致的动物视频，并解决运动对齐、特征干扰及训练数据稀缺的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MoZoo 生成式动力学求解器，包含 Role-Aware RoPE 实现运动对齐与参考信息解耦，非对称解耦注意力防止特征干扰，以及合成到真实数据管道 MoZoo-Data 和基准 MoZooBench。

📊实验结果

在 MoZooBench 上评估，实现高保真毛皮模拟，保持时序和结构一致性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MoZoo 框架，从粗糙网格生成高保真动物视频。
  • 设计 Role-Aware RoPE 和非对称解耦注意力机制。
  • 构建大规模配对数据集 MoZoo-Data 和基准 MoZooBench。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖合成数据，真实场景泛化性可能受限。
  • 计算开销可能仍较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The creation of cinematic-quality animal effects necessitates the precise modeling of muscle and fur dynamics, a process that remains both labor-intensive and computationally expensive within traditional production workflows. While generative diffusion models have shown promise in diverse artistic workflows, their capacity for high-fidelity animal simulation remains largely unexploited. We present MoZoo, a generative dynamics solver that bypasses conventional refinement to synthesize high-fidelity animal videos from coarse meshes under multimodal guidance. We propose Role-Aware RoPE (RAR-RoPE) which employs role-based index remapping to synchronize motion alignment while decoupling reference information via fixed temporal offsets. Complementing this, Asymmetric Decoupled Attention partitions the latent sequence to enforce a unidirectional information flow, effectively preventing feature interference and improving computational efficiency. To address the scarcity of high-quality training data, we introduce MoZoo-Data, a synthetic-to-real pipeline that leverages a rendering engine and an inverse mapping approach to construct a large-scale dataset of paired sequences. Furthermore, we establish MoZooBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 120 mesh-video pairs. Experimental results demonstrate that MoZoo achieves high-fidelity fur simulation across diverse animal skeletons and layouts, preserving superior temporal and structural consistency.

FaceParts: Segmentation and Editing of Gaussian Splatting

Medium 2605.13853
Tymoteusz Zapała, Julia Farganus, Dominik Galus, Mikołaj Czachorowski, Piotr Syga, Przemysław Spurek
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：提出 FaceParts，在 3D 高斯泼溅中无监督分割面部部件并实现跨角色编辑。
🎯研究动机

现有面部编辑多依赖 2D 生成模型或手动 3D 编辑，缺乏直接操作 3D 高斯泼溅的自动化方法。

❓解决问题

如何在无监督条件下对 3D 高斯泼溅面部模型进行语义部件分割和编辑。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合特征解缠、密度聚类和 FLAME 锚定的部件迁移，直接在高斯域分解面部部件。

📊实验结果

在 NeRSemble 数据集上对 11 个主体进行实验，定量评估显示身份一致性 ID=0.943，平均表情距离 AED=0.021，平均姿态距离 APD=0.004。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个无监督 3D 高斯泼溅面部部件分割框架
  • 实现跨角色部件交换和编辑，保持身份一致性和表情姿态适应性
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 FLAME 模型先验，对非典型面部结构泛化性有限
  • 仅评估了有限的面部部件类型
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Facial editing is an important task with applications in entertainment, virtual reality, and digital avatars. Most existing approaches rely on generative models in the 2D image domain, while in 3D the task is typically performed through labor-intensive manual editing. We propose FaceParts, a framework for unsupervised segmentation and editing of Gaussian Splatting avatars. Unlike existing 2D or mesh-assisted methods, our approach operates directly in the Gaussian domain, decomposing avatars into semantically coherent facial parts without supervision. The method integrates feature disentanglement, density-based clustering, and FLAME-anchored part transfer, enabling precise editing and cross-avatar part swapping. Experiments on the NeRSemble dataset with 11 subjects demonstrate robust isolation of features such as beards, eyebrows, eyes and mustaches. Quantitative evaluation confirms that transferred segments adapt to pose and expression, while maintaining identity consistency (ID = 0.943), low Average Expression Distance (AED = 0.021) and low Average Pose Distance (APD = 0.004).

视觉理解 35 篇

Reduce the Artifacts Bias for More Generalizable AI-Generated Image Detection

High 2605.14486
Yiheng Li, Yang Yang, Zichang Tan, Gao Li, Zhen Lei, Wenhao Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 GAN 上采样与分离专家融合框架，减少伪影偏差，提升 AI 生成图像检测的泛化性。
🎯研究动机

现有基于重建的检测方法（如 VAE、DDIM）引入的伪影类型有限且同质，无法覆盖 GAN 等多样生成模式，导致泛化性不足。

❓解决问题

如何生成对齐且多样化的伪影模式，并有效融合不同伪影域的特征，以提升 AI 生成图像检测的泛化能力。

🔎现象分析

重建伪影与上采样伪影之间存在域偏移，直接混合训练会导致一个域干扰另一个域的特征学习，造成次优结果。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GAN-based 上采样方法生成对齐的 GAN 风格伪影，并设计分离专家融合（SEF）框架：先通过 LoRA 在冻结基础模型上训练域特定专家，再用门控网络进行解耦融合，自适应组合专家特征。

📊实验结果

在 13 个不同基准上进行了广泛实验，方法取得了强结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GAN-based 上采样方法，生成与重建伪影对齐但多样化的伪影模式，弥补重建方法对 GAN 生成模式覆盖不足的问题。
  • 提出分离专家融合（SEF）框架，通过域特定专家和门控融合减少域间干扰，学习更鲁棒的决策边界。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练基础模型的质量和 LoRA 适配的稳定性。
  • 门控融合机制可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As the misuse of AI-generated images grows, generalizable image detection techniques are urgently needed. Recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods adopt aligned training datasets to reduce content, size, and format biases, empowering models to capture robust forgery cues. A common strategy is to employ reconstruction techniques, e.g., VAE and DDIM, which show remarkable results in diffusion-based methods. However, such reconstruction-based approaches typically introduce limited and homogeneous artifacts, which cannot fully capture diverse generative patterns, such as GAN-based methods. To complement reconstruction-based fake images with aligned yet diverse artifact patterns, we propose a GAN-based upsampling approach that mimics GAN-generated fake patterns while preserving content, size, and format alignment. This naturally results in two aligned but distinct types of fake images. However, due to the domain shift between reconstruction-based and upsampling-based fake images, direct mixed training causes suboptimal results, where one domain disrupts feature learning of the other. Accordingly, we propose a Separate Expert Fusion (SEF) framework to extract complementary artifact information and reduce inter-domain interference. We first train domain-specific experts via LoRA adaptation on a frozen foundational model, then conduct decoupled fusion with a gating network to adaptively combine expert features while retaining their specialized knowledge. Rather than merely benefiting GAN-generated image detection, this design introduces diverse and complementary artifact patterns that enable SEF to learn a more robust decision boundary and improve generalization across broader generative methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method yields strong results across 13 diverse benchmarks. Codes are released at: this https URL .

CalibAnyView: Beyond Single-View Camera Calibration in the Wild

High 2605.14615
Boying Li, Cheng Zhang, Weirong Chen, Daniel Cremers, Ian Reid, Hamid Rezatofighi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出统一多视图相机标定框架 CalibAnyView，通过显式建模跨视图几何一致性，在任意数量视图下均优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

传统相机标定依赖受控采集环境，不适用于野外图像；现有学习方法仅支持单视图，忽略多视图几何一致性。

❓解决问题

解决任意数量输入视图（N≥1）下的相机内参和重力方向联合估计问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建大规模多视图视频数据集，开发多视图 Transformer 预测密集透视场，结合几何优化框架联合估计相机内参和重力方向。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上实验，CalibAnyView 一致优于现有方法，单视图下鲁棒性强，多视图推理进一步提升性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一的多视图标定框架 CalibAnyView，支持任意数量输入视图并显式建模跨视图几何一致性。
  • 构建大规模多视图视频数据集，覆盖多种相机模型、动态场景、真实运动轨迹和异构镜头畸变。
  • 在单视图和多视图设置下均达到 SOTA 性能，为下游任务提供可靠基础。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模多视图数据集，数据收集成本高。
  • 几何优化框架的计算复杂度可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Camera calibration is a fundamental prerequisite for reliable geometric perception, yet classical approaches rely on controlled acquisition setups that are impractical for in-the-wild imagery. Recent learning-based methods have shown promising results for single-view calibration, but inherently neglect geometric consistency across multiple views. We introduce CalibAnyView, a unified formulation that supports an arbitrary number of input views ($N \geq 1$) by explicitly modeling cross-view geometric consistency. To facilitate this, we construct a large-scale multi-view video dataset covering diverse real-world scenarios, including multiple camera models, dynamic scenes, realistic motion trajectories, and heterogeneous lens distortions. Building on this dataset, we develop a multi-view transformer that predicts dense perspective fields, which are further integrated into a geometric optimization framework to jointly estimate camera intrinsics and gravity direction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CalibAnyView consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieves strong robustness under single-view settings, and further improves with multi-view inference, providing a reliable foundation for downstream tasks such as 3D reconstruction and robotic perception in the wild.

EponaV2: Driving World Model with Comprehensive Future Reasoning

High 2605.14696
Jiawei Xu, Zhizhou Zhong, Zhijian Shu, Mingkai Jia, Mingxiao Li, Jia-Wang Bian, Qian Zhang, Kaicheng Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：EponaV2 通过预测未来 3D 几何和语义地图，实现无感知输入的自动驾驶世界模型的高质量轨迹规划。
🎯研究动机

现有自动驾驶感知 - 规划范式依赖昂贵人工标注，扩展性差；而无感知世界模型仅基于下一帧图像预测，缺乏全面场景理解，导致规划效果不佳。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖感知输入和昂贵标注的情况下，提升自动驾驶世界模型的场景理解与轨迹规划能力。

🔎现象分析

无感知世界模型仅预测下一帧图像，缺乏对 3D 几何和语义的深层理解，限制了规划性能。

🛠️主要方法

提出 EponaV2，训练模型预测未来综合表征（包括 3D 几何和语义地图），并引入流匹配组相对策略优化机制提升规划精度。

📊实验结果

在 NAVSIM 三个基准上达到无感知模型中的 SOTA 性能（+1.3 PDMS，+5.5 EPDMS）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种新的无感知驾驶世界模型范式，通过预测未来 3D 几何和语义地图增强场景理解与推理能力。
  • 引入流匹配组相对策略优化机制，进一步提升轨迹规划准确性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高精度 3D 和语义标注进行训练。
  • 未来预测的长期准确性可能有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Data scaling plays a pivotal role in the pursuit of general intelligence. However, the prevailing perception-planning paradigm in autonomous driving relies heavily on expensive manual annotations to supervise trajectory planning, which severely limits its scalability. Conversely, although existing perception-free driving world models achieve impressive driving performance, their real-world reasoning ability for planning is solely built on next frame image forecasting. Due to the lack of enough supervision, these models often struggle with comprehensive scene understanding, resulting in unsatisfactory trajectory planning. In this paper, we propose EponaV2, a novel paradigm of driving world models, which achieves high-quality planning with comprehensive future reasoning. Inspired by how human drivers anticipate 3D geometry and semantics, we train our model to forecast more comprehensive future representations, which can be additionally decoded to future geometry and semantic maps. Extracting the 3D and semantic modalities enables our model to deeply understand the surrounding environment, and the future prediction task significantly enhances the real-world reasoning capabilities of EponaV2, ultimately leading to improved trajectory planning. Moreover, inspired by the training recipe of Large Language Models (LLMs), we introduce a flow matching group relative policy optimization mechanism to further improve planning accuracy. The state-of-the-art (SOTA) performances of EponaV2 among perception-free models on three NAVSIM benchmarks (+1.3PDMS, +5.5EPDMS) demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods.

SurgicalMamba: Dual-Path SSD with State Regramming for Online Surgical Phase Recognition

High 2605.14889
Sukju Oh, Sukkyu Sun
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 SurgicalMamba，基于 Mamba2 的 SSD 架构，通过双路径状态、强度调制步进和状态重编程实现高效在线手术阶段识别。
🎯研究动机

在线手术阶段识别需要从过去上下文逐帧预测，但手术视频具有超长帧数、非均匀时间流和窄视觉域导致通道强相关三个挑战，现有方法无法同时解决。

❓解决问题

设计一个因果模型，在保持每帧计算成本恒定的同时，处理手术视频的长序列、非均匀时间动态和通道间强相关性。

🔎现象分析

手术视频中长时间常规操作被短暂阶段定义转换打断，时间流非均匀；视觉域窄导致骨干特征通道间强相关。

🛠️主要方法

基于 Mamba2 的 SSD 架构，引入双路径 SSD 块（分离长短时状态）、强度调制步进（自适应时间扭曲）和状态重编程（每块 Cayley 旋转实现跨通道混合）。

📊实验结果

在七个公开手术阶段识别基准上评估，包括 Cholec80 和 AutoLaparo，达到 SOTA 准确率和 Jaccard 指标，并进行了消融实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SurgicalMamba，首个利用 Mamba2 SSD 架构实现高效在线手术阶段识别的模型。
  • 设计三个 SSD 兼容组件：双路径 SSD、强度调制步进和状态重编程，分别解决长序列、非均匀时间和通道相关性问题。
  • 在七个公开基准上达到 SOTA，Cholec80 准确率 94.6%/Jaccard 82.7%，AutoLaparo 89.5%/68.9%，速度 119 fps。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极长视频序列的泛化能力需进一步验证。
  • 状态重编程的旋转平面可解释性仅在手术领域验证，通用性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Online surgical phase recognition (SPR) underpins context-aware operating-room systems and requires committing to a prediction at every frame from past context alone. Surgical video poses three demands that natural-video recognizers do not jointly address: procedures span tens of thousands of frames, time flows non-uniformly as long routine stretches are punctuated by brief phase-defining transitions, and the visual domain is narrow so backbone features are strongly correlated across channels. Existing recognizers either let per-frame cost grow with elapsed length, or hold cost bounded but advance state at a uniform rate with channel-independent dynamics, leaving the latter two demands unaddressed. We present SurgicalMamba, a causal SPR model built on Mamba2's structured state-space duality (SSD) that holds per-frame cost at O(d). It introduces three SSD-compatible components, each targeting one demand: a dual-path SSD block that separates long- and short-term regimes at the level of recurrent state; intensity-modulated stepping, a continuous-time time-warp that adapts the slow path's effective rate to phase-relevant information; and state regramming, a per-chunk Cayley rotation that opens cross-channel mixing in the otherwise axis-aligned SSM recurrence. The learned rotation planes inherit a phase-aligned structure without any direct supervision, offering an interpretable internal signature of surgical workflow. Across seven public SPR benchmarks, SurgicalMamba reaches state-of-the-art accuracy and phase-level Jaccard under strict online evaluation: 94.6%/82.7% on Cholec80 (+0.7 pp/+2.2 pp over the strongest prior) and 89.5%/68.9% on AutoLaparo (+1.7 pp/+2.0 pp), at 119 fps on a single GPU. Ablations isolate the contribution of each component. The code is publicly available at this https URL .

Representative Attention For Vision Transformers

High 2605.14913
Yuntong Li, Hainuo Wang, Hengxing Liu, Mingjia Li, Xiaojie Guo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Representative Attention，通过表示空间中的动态令牌压缩实现线性全局注意力，提升视觉 Transformer 效率。
🎯研究动机

线性注意力通过压缩空间令牌为中间代理来降低自注意力的二次复杂度，但现有方法依赖预定义空间布局，导致令牌压缩锚定于图像坐标而非语义组织，限制了全局上下文建模的灵活性。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种线性全局注意力机制，使令牌压缩在表示空间中进行，从而自适应地对齐令牌通信与视觉内容的语义结构。

🔎现象分析

现有方法从固定空间分区构建中间令牌，使得令牌压缩受限于图像坐标，无法根据语义内容动态调整。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RPAttention，采用 Gather-Interact-Distribute 范式：首先通过基于相似性的竞争路由将空间令牌软聚集到一组可学习的代表令牌中；然后在紧凑的潜在空间中进行全局交互；最后通过查询驱动的交叉注意力将精炼信息广播回所有空间令牌。

📊实验结果

在多种视觉 Transformer 骨干网络上进行图像分类、目标检测和语义分割的广泛实验，验证了方法的有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Representative Attention，一种在表示空间中进行令牌压缩的线性全局注意力机制，克服了空间坐标锚定的限制。
  • 通过 Gather-Interact-Distribute 范式，实现了从二次到线性的复杂度降低，同时保持全局感受野和表达性上下文建模。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对代表令牌的数量敏感，需要调参。
  • 在极长序列或高分辨率图像上的性能尚未明确。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Linear attention has emerged as a promising direction for scaling Vision Transformers beyond the quadratic cost of dense self-attention. A prevalent strategy is to compress spatial tokens into a compact set of intermediate proxies that mediate global information exchange. However, existing methods typically derive these proxy tokens from predefined spatial layouts, causing token compression to remain anchored to image coordinates rather than the semantic organization of visual content. To overcome this limitation, we propose Representative Attention (RPAttention), a linear global attention mechanism that performs token compression directly in representation space. Instead of constructing intermediate tokens from fixed spatial partitions, it dynamically forms a compact set of learned representative tokens to enable semantically related regions to communicate regardless of their spatial distance, by following a lightweight Gather-Interact-Distribute paradigm. Spatial tokens are first softly gathered into representative tokens through competitive similarity-based routing. The representatives then perform global interaction within a compact latent space, before broadcasting the refined information back to all spatial tokens via query-driven cross-attention. Via replacing coordinate-driven aggregation with representation-driven compression, RPAttention preserves global receptive fields while adaptively aligning token communication with the content structure of each this http URL reduces the dominant token interaction complexity from quadratic to linear scaling with respect to the number of spatial tokens, while maintaining expressive global context modeling. Extensive experiments across diverse vision transformer backbones on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation demonstrate the effectiveness of our design.

LATERN: Test-Time Context-Aware Explainable Video Anomaly Detection

High 2605.15054
Mitchell Piehl, Muchao Ye
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 LATERN 框架，通过上下文感知的时间证据聚合提升冻结 VLM 在视频异常检测中的准确性和解释一致性。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLM 用于视频异常检测时受限于 token 约束，只能独立进行片段级推理，缺乏结构化时间上下文，导致预测碎片化且解释不一致。

❓解决问题

如何让 VLM 在测试时利用时间上下文进行视频异常检测，生成连贯的片段级异常分数和事件级解释。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LATERN 框架，包含上下文感知异常评分（CEA）和递归证据聚合（REA）两个模块：CEA 通过图像记忆机制选择历史内容作为扩展上下文生成异常分数；REA 递归聚合时间信息识别连贯异常区间并生成事件级决策和解释。

📊实验结果

在 UCF-Crime 和 XD-Violence 基准上实验，LATERN 提升了冻结 VLM 的检测精度和解释一致性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LATERN 框架，将 VAD 重新定义为时间证据聚合过程，提升冻结 VLM 的检测精度和解释一致性。
  • 设计 CEA 模块，通过图像记忆机制选择历史上下文生成可靠异常分数。
  • 设计 REA 模块，递归聚合时间信息生成连贯的事件级异常区间和解释。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 VLM 的视觉推理能力，对弱 VLM 效果有限。
  • 递归聚合可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for video anomaly detection (VAD) due to their strong visual reasoning ability and natural language-based explainability. In this paper, we aim to address a key limitation of such pipelines, which perform segment-level inference independently owing to token constraints and reason without structured temporal context, allowing VLMs to interpret anomalies as deviations from evolving video dynamics rather than producing fragmented predictions and explanations. To specify, we propose a context-aware framework named LATERN, which reformulates VAD as a temporal evidence aggregation process. LATERN consists of two complementary modules: Context-Aware Anomaly Scoring (CEA) and Recursive Evidence Aggregation (REA). CEA introduces a novel image-grounded memory mechanism, which selectively chooses historical content via frame diversity and visual-textual alignment as expanded context to help generate reliable anomaly scores. Building upon these scores, REA performs recursive temporal aggregation to identify coherent anomaly intervals and produce event-level decisions and explanations grounded in visual-textual evidence. Extensive experiments on challenging benchmarks, including UCF-Crime and XD-Violence, show that LATERN enhances detection accuracy and explanation consistency for frozen VLMs during test time, while generating temporally coherent and semantically grounded event-level explanations.

Venus-DeFakerOne: Unified Fake Image Detection & Localization

High 2605.14091
GuangJian Team
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出统一伪造图像检测与定位基础模型 DeFakerOne，集成 InternVL2 和 SAM2，在 39 个检测和 9 个定位基准上达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

生成式 AI 的快速发展使图像伪造机制趋于统一，但现有伪造检测与定位研究仍碎片化，导致域特定检测范式与统一伪造生成机制不匹配。

❓解决问题

解决跨域伪造痕迹迁移与干扰的理解问题，以及构建高容量统一基础模型以同时实现图像级检测和像素级定位。

🔎现象分析

摘要分析了数据缩放规律、跨域伪影迁移 - 干扰模式、细粒度监督的必要性以及原始分辨率伪影保留等设计原则。

🛠️主要方法

数据驱动的统一 FIDL 基础模型，集成 InternVL2 和 SAM2，实现图像级检测和像素级定位。

📊实验结果

在 39 个伪造检测基准和 9 个定位基准上评估，优于基线，并展现出对真实世界扰动和 GPT-Image-2 等最新生成器的鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DeFakerOne，首个统一伪造图像检测与定位基础模型，在 39 个检测和 9 个定位基准上达到 SOTA。
  • 系统分析了数据缩放规律、跨域伪影迁移 - 干扰模式、细粒度监督必要性和原始分辨率伪影保留等设计原则。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定预训练模型（InternVL2 和 SAM2），泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未提及模型计算开销和推理速度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In recent years, the rapid evolution of generative AI has fundamentally reshaped the paradigm of image forgery, breaking the traditional boundaries between document editing, natural image manipulation, DeepFake generation, and full-image AIGC synthesis. Despite this shift toward unified forgery generation, existing research in Fake Image Detection and Localization (FIDL) remains fragmented. This creates a mismatch between increasingly unified forgery generation mechanisms and the domain-specific detection paradigm. Bridging this mismatch poses two key challenges for FIDL: understanding cross-domain artifacts transfer and interference, and building a high-capacity unified foundation model for joint detection and localization. To address these challenges, we propose DeFakerOne, a data-centric, unified FIDL foundation model integrating InternVL2 and SAM2. DeFakerOne enables simultaneous image-level detection and pixel-level forgery localization across diverse scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeFakerOne achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming baselines on 39 forgery detection benchmarks and 9 localization benchmarks. Furthermore, the model exhibits superior robustness against real-world perturbations and state-of-the-art generators such as GPT-Image-2. Finally, we provide a systematic analysis of data scaling laws, cross-domain artifacts transfer-interference patterns, the necessity of fine-grained supervision, and the original resolution artifacts preservation, highlighting the design principles for scalable, robust, and unified FIDL.

SToRe3D: Sparse Token Relevance in ViTs for Efficient Multi-View 3D Object Detection

High 2605.14110
Sandro Papais, Lezhou Feng, Charles Cossette, Lingting Ge
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：SToRe3D 通过联合稀疏化 2D 图像 token 和 3D 查询，实现 ViT 多视图 3D 检测的 3 倍加速，精度损失极小。
🎯研究动机

ViT 在多视图 3D 检测中性能强，但密集的 token 和查询处理导致高推理延迟，限制了实时应用。

❓解决问题

如何在不显著损失精度的情况下，加速 ViT 多视图 3D 检测的推理速度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SToRe3D，一种相关性对齐的稀疏框架，通过互 2D-3D 相关性头联合选择 2D 图像 token 和 3D 对象查询，并存储过滤特征用于重新激活。

📊实验结果

在 nuScenes 和 nuScenes-Relevance 基准上评估，实现 3 倍加速，精度损失可忽略。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个联合稀疏化 2D token 和 3D 查询的框架，实现全模型稀疏性。
  • 在 nuScenes 和新基准上实现高达 3 倍加速，精度损失极小。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定 ViT 架构。
  • 新基准 nuScenes-Relevance 的通用性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision Transformers (ViTs) enable strong multi-view 3D detection but are limited by high inference latency from dense token and query processing across multiple views and large 3D regions. Existing sparsity methods, designed mainly for 2D vision, prune or merge image tokens but do not extend to full-model sparsity or address 3D object queries. We introduce SToRe3D, a relevance-aligned sparsity framework that jointly selects 2D image tokens and 3D object queries while storing filtered features for reactivation. Mutual 2D-3D relevance heads allocate compute to driving-critical content and preserve other embeddings. Evaluated on nuScenes and our new nuScenes-Relevance benchmark, SToRe3D achieves up to 3x faster inference with marginal accuracy loss, establishing real-time large-scale ViT-based 3D detection while maintaining accuracy on planning-critical agents.

Not All Timesteps Matter Equally: Selective Alignment Knowledge Distillation for Spiking Neural Networks

Medium 2605.14252
Kai Sun, Peibo Duan, Yongsheng Huang, Guowei Zhang, Benjamin Smith, Nanxu Gong, Levin Kuhlmann
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出选择性对齐知识蒸馏（SeAl-KD），仅对 SNN 中错误时间步进行校正，保留有用时序动态，提升性能。
🎯研究动机

SNN 性能与 ANN 存在差距，现有知识蒸馏方法对所有时间步强制统一对齐，忽略了中间时间步预测的演化特性，可能破坏有用时序动态。

❓解决问题

如何设计知识蒸馏策略，使其仅对 SNN 中错误时间步提供校正指导，同时保留正确时间步的时序信息。

🔎现象分析

SNN 预测随时间演化，中间时间步不必全部正确，最终聚合输出可能正确；统一对齐所有时间步会强制错误时间步学习不合适的监督信号，损害性能。

🛠️主要方法

选择性对齐知识蒸馏（SeAl-KD），通过均衡错误时间步的竞争 logits，并基于置信度和时间步间相似性重新加权时序对齐，实现类别级和时间级的选择性对齐。

📊实验结果

在静态图像和神经形态事件数据集上进行实验，与现有蒸馏方法比较，显示一致改进。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了 SNN 知识蒸馏中统一对齐所有时间步的问题，并提出选择性对齐策略。
  • 设计了 SeAl-KD 方法，在静态图像和神经形态事件数据集上均优于现有蒸馏方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖超参数（如置信度阈值）的调节。
  • 未在更大规模 SNN 或更复杂任务上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are brain-inspired and spike-driven, achieve high energy efficiency. However, a performance gap between SNNs and artificial neural networks (ANNs) still remains. Knowledge distillation (KD) is commonly adopted to improve SNN performance, but existing methods typically enforce uniform alignment across all timesteps, either from a teacher network or through inter-temporal self-distillation, implicitly assuming that per-timestep predictions should be treated equally. In practice, SNN predictions vary and evolve over time, and intermediate timesteps need not all be individually correct even when the final aggregated output is correct. Under such conditions, effective distillation should not force every timestep toward the same supervision target, but instead provide corrective guidance to erroneous timesteps while preserving useful temporal dynamics. To address this issue, we propose Selective Alignment Knowledge Distillation (SeAl-KD), which selectively aligns class-level and temporal knowledge by equalizing competing logits at erroneous timesteps and reweighting temporal alignment based on confidence and inter-timestep similarity. Extensive experiments on static image and neuromorphic event-based datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over existing distillation methods. The code is available at this https URL

Architecture-Aware Explanation Auditing for Industrial Visual Inspection

Medium 2605.14255
Sibo Jia, Zihang Zhao, Kunrong Li
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出架构感知的解释审计协议，发现解释方法的忠实度受其与模型原生决策机制的结构距离约束。
🎯研究动机

工业视觉检测中深度分类器的热力图解释可能视觉上合理但未识别真正驱动决策的区域，缺乏系统审计方法。

❓解决问题

如何量化解释方法对模型决策的忠实度，并揭示其与模型架构的关系。

🔎现象分析

解释方法的忠实度受其与模型原生决策机制的结构距离约束；ViT-Tiny+Attention Rollout 在删除 AUC 上优于 Swin-Tiny/ResNet18/DenseNet121+Grad-CAM；模型无关方法 RISE 优于所有原生方法，表明原生读取是兼容性原则而非最优性保证；忠实度排名是(模型, 解释器, 扰动算子)三元组的联合属性。

🛠️主要方法

基于原生读取假设的架构感知解释审计协议，使用零填充扰动协议和多种解释方法（Attention Rollout, Grad-CAM, RISE）在 WM-811K 和 MVTec AD 数据集上评估。

📊实验结果

在 WM-811K 晶圆图数据集（9 类，172k 图像）上使用三种子零填充扰动协议，比较 ViT-Tiny+Attention Rollout、Swin-Tiny、ResNet18+CBAM、DenseNet121+Grad-CAM 及 RISE 的 Deletion AUC；在 MVTec AD 上探索边界条件。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出架构感知的解释审计协议，基于原生读取假设量化解释忠实度
  • 揭示解释忠实度受解释器与模型原生决策机制的结构距离约束，且为三元组联合属性
⚠️方法局限
  • 审计结果依赖于扰动算子选择，不同基线可能导致排名反转
  • 数据集 / 任务依赖性，需进一步验证泛化性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Industrial visual inspection systems increasingly rely on deep classifiers whose heatmap explanations may appear visually plausible while failing to identify the image regions that actually drive model decisions. This paper operationalizes an architecture-aware explanation audit protocol grounded in the native-readout hypothesis: the perturbation-based faithfulness of an explanation method is bounded by its structural distance from the model's native decision mechanism. On WM-811K wafer maps (9 classes, 172k images) under a three-seed zero-fill perturbation protocol, ViT-Tiny + Attention Rollout attains Deletion AUC 0.211 against 0.432-0.525 for Swin-Tiny / ResNet18+CBAM / DenseNet121 + Grad-CAM (abs(Cohen's d) > 1.1), despite lower classification accuracy. Swin-Tiny disentangles architecture family from readout structure: despite being a Transformer, its spatial feature-map hierarchy makes it Grad-CAM compatible, showing that the operative factor is readout structure rather than architecture family. A model-agnostic control (RISE) compresses all families to Deletion AUC about 0.1, indicating the gap arises from the explainer pathway; notably, RISE outperforms all native methods, so native readout is a compatibility principle rather than an optimality guarantee. A blur-fill sensitivity analysis shows that the family ordering reverses under a different perturbation baseline, reinforcing that faithfulness rankings are joint properties of (model, explainer, perturbation operator) triples. An exploratory boundary-condition study on MVTec AD (pretrained models) indicates that audit results are dataset/task dependent and identifies conditions requiring qualification. The protocol yields actionable guidance: explanation pathways should be co-designed with model architectures based on readout structure, and deployed heatmaps should be accompanied by quantitative faithfulness metrics.

IG-Diff: Complex Night Scene Restoration with Illumination-Guided Diffusion Model

Medium 2605.14337
Yifan Chen, Fei Yin, Chunle Guo, Chongyi Li, Yujiu Yang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出光照引导扩散模型 IG-Diff，解决夜间复杂场景下多种退化同时存在的图像恢复问题。
🎯研究动机

夜间环境下人和机器感知困难，现有方法只能处理单一退化，无法应对低光照与天气等退化同时存在的复杂场景，且缺乏配对数据。

❓解决问题

夜间复杂场景中多种退化（如低光照与天气）同时存在时的图像恢复。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在扩散模型中嵌入光照引导模块，指导光照恢复过程，同时保持纹理保真度。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了模拟光照退化与其他退化共存的复杂夜间场景数据集。
  • 提出光照引导扩散模型 IG-Diff，能处理多种退化并保持纹理保真度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖合成数据集，真实场景泛化性待验证。
  • 计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In nighttime circumstances, it is challenging for individuals and machines to perceive their surroundings. While prevailing image restoration methods adeptly handle singular forms of degradation, they falter when confronted with intricate nocturnal scenes, such as the concurrent presence of weather and low-light conditions. Compounding this challenge, the lack of paired data that encapsulates the coexistence of low-light situations and other forms of degradation hinders the development of a comprehensive end-to-end solution. In this work, we contribute complex nighttime scene datasets that simulate both illumination degradation and other forms of deterioration. To address the complexity of night degradation, we propose an integration of an illumination-guided module embedded in the diffusion model to guide the illumination restoration process. Our model can preserve texture fidelity while contending with the adversities posed by various degradation in low-light scenarios.

Learning with Semantic Priors: Stabilizing Point-Supervised Infrared Small Target Detection via Hierarchical Knowledge Distillation

Medium 2605.14346
Yuanhang Yao, Ping Qian, Zhu Liu, Long Ma, Weimin Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用冻结视觉基础模型的分层知识蒸馏，稳定点监督红外小目标检测中的伪标签噪声与训练不稳定问题。
🎯研究动机

红外小目标检测中密集像素标注成本高，点监督虽降低标注成本，但轻量 CNN 检测器语义不足，导致伪标签噪声大、优化不稳定。

❓解决问题

点监督红外小目标检测中，轻量 CNN 因缺乏语义信息产生噪声伪标签，导致训练不稳定和检测精度下降。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出轻量 CNN 检测器缺乏足够语义，导致伪标签噪声和优化不稳定。

🛠️主要方法

提出分层 VFM 驱动知识蒸馏框架，将点监督学习建模为双层优化：内循环在重加权样本上适应 VFM 嵌入教师，外循环传递验证引导知识给学生；引入语义条件仿射调制（SCAM）注入 VFM 语义；动态协作学习与聚类级样本重加权增强鲁棒性。

📊实验结果

在多个 ISTD 骨干网络上的多样挑战性实验中，检测精度和训练稳定性均有一致提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出分层 VFM 驱动知识蒸馏框架，将点监督学习建模为双层优化以缓解伪标签噪声和训练集偏差。
  • 引入语义条件仿射调制（SCAM）将 VFM 语义注入 CNN 多层特征。
  • 设计动态协作学习策略与聚类级样本重加权，提升对不完美伪标签的鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖冻结 VFM，可能限制对特定场景的适应性。
  • 双层优化计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Single-frame Infrared Small Target Detection (ISTD) aims to localize weak targets under heavy background clutter, yet dense pixel-wise annotations are expensive. Point supervision with online label evolution reduces annotation cost; however, lightweight CNN detectors often lack sufficient semantics, leading to noisy pseudo-masks and unstable optimization. To address this, we propose a hierarchical VFM-driven knowledge distillation framework that uses a frozen Vision Foundation Model (VFM) during training. We formulate point-supervised learning as a bilevel optimization process: the inner loop adapts a VFM-embedded teacher on reweighted training samples, while the outer loop transfers validation-guided knowledge to a lightweight student to mitigate pseudo-label noise and training-set bias. We further introduce Semantic-Conditioned Affine Modulation (SCAM) to inject VFM semantics into CNN features at multiple layers. In addition, a dynamic collaborative learning strategy with cluster-level sample reweighting enhances robustness to imperfect pseudo-masks. Experiments on diverse challenging cases across multiple ISTD backbones demonstrate consistent improvements in detection accuracy and training stability. Our code is available at this https URL .

Dual-Latent Collaborative Decoding for Fidelity-Perception Balanced Image Compression

Medium 2605.14391
Qi Mao, Zijian Wang, Zhengxue Cheng, Lingyu Zhu, Siwei Ma
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出双潜码协作解码框架 MoDE，通过分离保真度与感知专家实现率失真 - 感知平衡的图像压缩。
🎯研究动机

现有学习图像压缩方法依赖单一潜码同时承载结构、语义和感知信息，导致不同比特率下保真度与感知质量难以平衡。

❓解决问题

如何设计双潜码协作机制，使 SQ 连续潜码（保真度导向）与 VQ 离散潜码（感知导向）互补，实现宽比特率范围的保真度 - 感知平衡。

🔎现象分析

SQ 连续潜码在低比特率下丢失感知细节，VQ 离散潜码结构保真度有限且比特率可扩展性差。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MoDE 框架，包含保真度导向的 SQ 专家和感知导向的 VQ 专家，通过专家特定增强（ESE）保留分支参考，跨专家调制（CEM）实现选择性互补传输，支持共享双流码流下的保真度锚定或感知锚定解码。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上与失真导向、感知导向、生成式和双潜码基线对比，MoDE 在宽比特率范围内取得更优的保真度 - 感知平衡。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出双潜码协作解码框架 MoDE，首次将解码器端专家协作用于保真度 - 感知平衡图像压缩。
  • 设计 ESE 和 CEM 模块，分别保留分支专家参考和实现跨专家选择性互补。
  • 在宽比特率范围内优于多种代表性基线，验证了解码器端专家协作的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 双流码流可能增加存储和传输开销。
  • 专家协作的泛化性可能受限于特定 SQ/VQ 组合。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Learned image compression (LIC) increasingly requires reconstructions that balance distortion fidelity and perceptual realism across a wide range of bitrates. However, most existing methods still rely on a single compressed latent representation to simultaneously carry structural details, semantic cues, and perceptual priors, requiring the same latent representation to serve multiple, potentially conflicting roles. This tension becomes evident across different latent paradigms: scalar-quantized (SQ) continuous latents provide rate-scalable fidelity but tend to lose perceptual details at low rates, while vector-quantized (VQ) discrete tokens preserve compact semantic cues but suffer from limited structural fidelity and bitrate scalability. To address this issue, we propose Mixture of Decoder Experts (MoDE), a dual-latent collaborative decoding framework that decomposes reconstruction responsibilities across complementary latent paradigms. Specifically, MoDE treats the SQ branch as a fidelity-oriented expert and the VQ branch as a perception-oriented expert, and coordinates them through two decoder-side modules: Expert-Specific Enhancement (ESE), which preserves branch-specific expert references, and Cross-Expert Modulation (CEM), which enables selective complementary transfer during reconstruction. The resulting framework supports selective cross-latent collaboration under a shared dual-stream bitstream and enables both fidelity-anchored and perception-anchored decoding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoDE achieves a more favorable fidelity-perception balance than representative distortion-oriented, perception-oriented, generative, and dual-latent baselines across a wide bitrate range, highlighting decoder-side expert collaboration as an effective design for wide-range fidelity-perception balanced LIC.

From Sparse to Dense: Spatio-Temporal Fusion for Multi-View 3D Human Pose Estimation with DenseWarper

Medium 2605.14525
Ling Li, Changjie Chen, Yuyan Wang, Jiaqing Lyu, Kenglun Chang, Yiyun Chen, Zhidong Deng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出稀疏交错输入和 DenseWarper 模型，利用极线几何实现时空热图融合，在稀疏输入下超越传统密集多视图方法。
🎯研究动机

传统多视图 3D 人体姿态估计依赖同时刻多视角图像，忽略了相邻帧的时间依赖，且受限于单视角帧率，数据冗余高。

❓解决问题

如何利用不同时间点的稀疏多视图图像，融合时空信息以提升 3D 人体姿态估计的精度和时间分辨率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出稀疏交错输入方法，使用不同时间点的多视图图像；设计 DenseWarper 模型，基于极线几何进行高效的时空热图交换与融合。

📊实验结果

在 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP 数据集上实验，稀疏交错输入优于传统密集多视图输入，达到 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出稀疏交错输入方法，利用不同时间点的多视图图像捕获时空信息，可理论提升输出帧率 N 倍。
  • 设计 DenseWarper 模型，通过极线几何实现高效时空热图融合，在稀疏输入下达到 SOTA 性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对相机同步精度要求较高。
  • 时间偏移δ的选择可能影响性能，未讨论自适应策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In multi-view 3D human pose estimation, models typically rely on images captured simultaneously from different camera views to predict a pose at a specific moment. While providing accurate spatial information, this traditional approach often overlooks the rich temporal dependencies between adjacent frames. We propose a novel 3D human pose estimation input method: the sparse interleaved input to address this. This method leverages images captured from different camera views at various time points (e.g., View 1 at time $t$ and View 2 at time $t+\delta$), allowing our model to capture rich spatio-temporal information and effectively boost performance. More importantly, this approach offers two key advantages: First, it can theoretically increase the output pose frame rate by N times with N cameras, thereby breaking through single-view frame rate limitations and enhancing the temporal resolution of the production. Second, using a sparse subset of available frames, our method can reduce data redundancy and simultaneously achieve better performance. We introduce the DenseWarper model, which leverages epipolar geometry for efficient spatio-temporal heatmap exchange. We conducted extensive experiments on the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets. Results demonstrate that our method, utilizing only sparse interleaved images as input, outperforms traditional dense multi-view input approaches and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The source code for this work is available at: this https URL

PROVE: A Perceptual RemOVal cohErence Benchmark for Visual Media

Medium 2605.14534
Fuhao Li, Shaofeng You, Jiagao Hu, Yu Liu, Yuxuan Chen, Zepeng Wang, Fei Wang, Daiguo Zhou et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出感知一致的视觉媒体移除一致性评估指标 RC 和基准 PROVE-Bench。
🎯研究动机

现有图像 / 视频物体移除评估指标与人类感知不一致，全参考指标鼓励复制粘贴而非真实擦除，无参考指标有系统偏差，全局时序指标对局部伪影不敏感。

❓解决问题

缺乏与人类感知对齐的视觉媒体移除一致性评估指标和基准。

🔎现象分析

全参考指标奖励复制粘贴行为；无参考指标偏向模糊结果；全局时序指标对编辑区域内的局部伪影不敏感。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RC-S（空间一致性）和 RC-T（时序一致性）两个感知对齐指标，以及包含 PROVE-M 和 PROVE-H 的 PROVE-Bench 基准。

📊实验结果

在多种图像和视频基准上，RC 指标与人类判断的一致性显著优于现有评估协议。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RC-S 和 RC-T 指标，通过滑动窗口特征比较和分布跟踪实现感知对齐。
  • 构建 PROVE-Bench 基准，包含 80 个视频的配对数据集和 100 个视频的无 GT 挑战子集。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对特定类型的编辑（如大区域移除）鲁棒性不足。
  • 基准规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Evaluating object removal in images and videos remains challenging because the task is inherently one-to-many, yet existing metrics frequently disagree with human perception. Full-reference metrics reward copy-paste behaviors over genuine erasure; no-reference metrics suffer from systematic biases such as favoring blurry results; and global temporal metrics are insensitive to localized artifacts within edited regions. To address these limitations, we propose RC (Removal Coherence), a pair of perception-aligned metrics: RC-S, which measures spatial coherence via sliding-window feature comparison between masked and background regions, and RC-T, which measures temporal consistency via distribution tracking within shared restored regions across adjacent frames. To validate RC and support community benchmarking, we further introduce PROVE-Bench, a two-tier real-world benchmark comprising PROVE-M, an 80-video paired dataset with motion augmentation, and PROVE-H, a 100-video challenging subset without ground truth. Together, RC metrics and PROVE-Bench form the PROVE (Perceptual RemOVal cohErence) evaluation framework for visual media. Experiments across diverse image and video benchmarks demonstrate that RC achieves substantially stronger alignment with human judgments than existing evaluation protocols. The code for RC metrics and PROVE-Bench are publicly available at: this https URL .

Local Spatiotemporal Convolutional Network for Robust Gait Recognition

Medium 2605.14548
Xiaoyun Wang, Cunrong Li, Wu Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出局部时空卷积网络（LSTCN），通过全局双向空间池化将时空特征分解为条带表示，使标准 2D CNN 能高效提取步态时序信息。
🎯研究动机

步态识别作为生物特征技术具有非侵入、远距离、抗伪装等优势，但视频数据复杂且受视角、衣着、携带物等协变量干扰，现有方法依赖静态外观或复杂时序模型（如 LSTM、3D 卷积），计算成本高且训练复杂。

❓解决问题

如何用简单高效的 2D CNN 架构有效提取步态视频中的内在运动模式，同时降低计算开销。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出局部时空卷积网络（LSTCN），包含全局双向空间池化（GBSP）将步态张量分解为水平和垂直条带局部表示，使时序维度参与标准 2D 卷积；设计局部时空卷积（LSTC）层联合处理时空维度，并引入非对称卷积核分别关注时间、空间及联合时空域。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GBSP 机制，将步态特征分解为条带表示，使 2D CNN 能处理时序信息。
  • 设计 LSTC 层及非对称卷积核，自适应学习条带级步态运动模式。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端视角或遮挡鲁棒性有限。
  • 条带分解可能丢失全局空间结构信息。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Gait recognition, as a promising biometric technology, identifies individuals through their unique walking patterns and offers distinctive advantages including non-invasiveness, long-range applicability, and resistance to deliberate disguise. Despite these merits, capturing the intrinsic motion patterns concealed within consecutive video frames remains challenging due to the complexity of video data and the interference of external covariates such as viewpoint changes, clothing variations, and carrying conditions. Existing approaches predominantly rely on either static appearance features extracted from individual silhouette frames or employ complex sequential models (\eg, LSTM, 3D convolutions) that demand substantial computational resources and sophisticated training strategies. To address these limitations, we propose a Local Spatiotemporal Convolutional Network (LSTCN), a structurally simple yet highly effective dual-branch architecture that endows standard two-dimensional convolutional networks with the capacity to extract temporal information. Specifically, we introduce a Global Bidirectional Spatial Pooling (GBSP) mechanism that reduces the dimensionality of gait tensors by decomposing spatial features into horizontal and vertical strip-based local representations, enabling the temporal dimension to participate in standard 2D convolution operations. Building upon this, we design a Local Spatiotemporal Convolutional (LSTC) layer that jointly processes temporal and spatial dimensions, allowing the network to adaptively learn strip-based gait motion patterns. We further extend this formulation with asymmetric convolution kernels that independently attend to the temporal, spatial, and joint spatiotemporal domains, thereby enriching the extracted feature representations.

LiWi: Layering in the Wild

Medium 2605.14552
Yu He, Fang Li, Haoyang Tong, Lichen Ma, Xinyuan Shan, Jingling Fu, Dong Chen, Luohang Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 LiWi 框架，通过智能体驱动的数据合成和联合光度 / 边界优化，实现野外图像的高保真分层分解。
🎯研究动机

现有分层图像生成主要局限于图形设计领域，野外图像的分层分解因缺乏可扩展数据和自然图像中物体交互建模（如光照、结构边界）而未被充分探索，限制了真实场景下的细粒度编辑应用。

❓解决问题

如何实现野外自然图像的高保真分层分解，解决光照效应和结构边界等物体交互建模难题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LiWi 框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 智能体驱动的数据分解（ADD）流水线，自动合成分层数据并构建 LiWi-100k 数据集；2) 联合优化光度保真度和 Alpha 边界准确性的框架，通过阴影引导学习建模光照效应，并通过退化 - 恢复目标提供边界校正监督。

📊实验结果

在自然图像分解任务上，与现有模型相比，在 RGB L1 和 Alpha IoU 指标上达到 SoTA 性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ADD 流水线，无需人工干预即可合成大规模高质量分层野外图像数据。
  • 构建 LiWi-100k 数据集，包含超过 10 万张高质量分层野外图像。
  • 提出联合优化光度保真度和 Alpha 边界准确性的框架，在 RGB L1 和 Alpha IoU 指标上达到 SoTA 性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集 LiWi-100k 可能仍存在特定场景或物体类型的覆盖不足。
  • 方法依赖预定义的阴影和退化模型，可能无法泛化到所有光照和边界情况。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in generative models have empowered impressive layered image generation, yet their success is largely confined to graphic design domains. The layering of in-the-wild images remains an underexplored problem, limiting fine-grained editing and applications of images in real-world scenarios. Specifically, challenges remain in scalable layered data and the modeling of object interaction in natural images, such as illumination effects and structural boundary. To address these bottlenecks, we propose a novel framework for high-fidelity natural image decomposition. First, we introduce an Agent-driven Data Decomposition (ADD) pipeline that orchestrates agents and tools to synthesize layered data without manual intervention. Utilizing this pipeline, we construct a large-scale dataset, named LiWi-100k, with over 100,000 high-quality layered in-the-wild images. Second, we present a novel framework that jointly improves photometric fidelity and alpha boundary accuracy. Specifically, shadow-guided learning explicitly models the illumination effects, and degradation-restoration objective provides boundary-correction supervision by recovering clean foreground image from degraded one. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance in natural image decomposition, outperforming existing models in RGB L1 and Alpha IoU metrics. We will soon release our code and dataset.

Deep Image Segmentation via Discriminant Feature Learning

Medium 2605.14609
Adam Dawid Sztamborski, Raül Pérez-Gonzalo, Antonio Agudo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出可微判别损失 DDA，提升分割边界清晰度与模型置信度。
🎯研究动机

现有分割损失函数（如交叉熵、Dice）忽视特征判别结构，导致边界不准确。

❓解决问题

如何通过损失函数设计增强特征判别性，提升分割边界质量。

🔎现象分析

标准损失函数导致特征分布混杂，边界模糊。

🛠️主要方法

提出可微判别分析（DDA）损失，最大化类间方差、最小化类内方差，且不增加推理成本。

📊实验结果

在 DIS5K 基准上评估多种架构，显示一致改进。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出架构无关的判别损失函数 DDA
  • 在 DIS5K 上验证了分割精度、边界锐度和模型置信度的提升
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在单一基准上验证
  • 未讨论对多类分割的扩展性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate image segmentation remains challenging, particularly in generating sharp, confident boundaries. While modern architectures have advanced the field, many of them still rely on standard loss functions like Cross-Entropy and Dice, which often neglect the discriminative structure of learned features, leading to inaccurate boundaries. This work introduces Deep Discriminant Analysis (DDA), a differentiable, architecture-agnostic loss function that embeds classical discriminant principles for network training. DDA explicitly maximizes between-class variance while minimizing within-class one, promoting compact and separable feature distributions without increasing inference cost. Evaluations on the DIS5K benchmark demonstrate that DDA consistently improves segmentation accuracy, boundary sharpness, and model confidence across various architectures. Our results show that integrating discriminant analysis offers a simple, effective path for building more robust segmentation models.

AnchorRoute: Human Motion Synthesis with Interval-Routed Sparse Contro

Medium 2605.14716
Pengcheng Fang, Tengjiao Sun, Dongjie Fu, Xiaoyu Zhan, Yanwen Guo, Hansung Kim, Xiaohao Cai
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：提出 AnchorRoute 框架，利用稀疏锚点作为生成和精炼的共享支架，实现高质量人体运动合成。
🎯研究动机

稀疏锚点提供紧凑的人体运动创作接口，但现有方法在保持预训练文本到运动模型生成质量的同时学习稀疏空间控制存在挑战，且生成后锚点一致性不足。

❓解决问题

如何利用稀疏锚点（如根位置、平面轨迹、身体点目标）作为共享支架，同时实现高质量运动生成和可控的锚点精炼。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

AnchorRoute 框架：生成阶段将稀疏锚点转换为锚点条件特征，通过 AnchorKV 和双上下文条件注入冻结的 Transition Masked Diffusion 先验；精炼阶段 RouteSolver 利用锚点定义残差区间，通过软令牌更新投影到分段仿射区间基上进行精炼。

📊实验结果

在基准评估中，AnchorRoute 在稀疏关键点协议下优于先前稀疏控制方法，并在控制族中持续改善锚点一致性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AnchorRoute 框架，统一支持根 -3D、平面根和身体点控制。
  • 设计 AnchorKV 和双上下文条件机制，在冻结预训练先验下学习稀疏空间控制。
  • 提出 RouteSolver 精炼方法，利用锚点残差进行可控精炼。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练文本到运动模型的质量。
  • 精炼过程可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Sparse anchors provide a compact interface for human motion authoring: users specify a few root positions, planar trajectory samples, or body-point targets, while the system synthesizes the full-body motion that completes the under-specified intent. We present AnchorRoute, a sparse-anchor motion synthesis framework that uses anchors as a shared scaffold for both generation and refinement. Before generation, AnchorRoute converts sparse anchors into anchor-condition features and injects the resulting condition memory into a frozen Transition Masked Diffusion prior through AnchorKV and dual-context conditioning. This preserves the generation quality of the pretrained text-to-motion prior while learning sparse spatial control. After generation, the same anchors are evaluated as residuals: their timestamps define refinement intervals, and their residuals determine where correction should be concentrated. RouteSolver then refines the motion by projecting soft-token updates onto anchor-defined piecewise-affine interval bases. This couples generation-time anchor conditioning with residual-routed refinement under one anchor scaffold. AnchorRoute supports root-3D, planar-root, and body-point control within the same formulation. In benchmark evaluations, AnchorRoute outperforms prior sparse-control methods under the sparse keyjoint protocol and consistently improves anchor adherence across control families. The results show that the learned anchor-conditioned generator and RouteSolver refinement are complementary: the generator preserves text-motion quality, while RouteSolver provides a controllable path toward stronger anchor adherence.

CHASM: Cross-frequency Harmonized Axis-Separable Mixing for Spectral Token Operators

Medium 2605.14727
Pengcheng Fang, Hongli Chen, Yuxia Chen, Tengjiao Sun, Jiaxin Liu, Xiaohao Cai
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出跨频率谐波轴可分离混合器 CHASM，通过共享通道特征基与频率特定增益提升频谱 token 混合性能。
🎯研究动机

现有频谱 token 混合器要么沿固定通道轴应用滤波器级频谱响应，要么学习自适应频率索引通道混合，但未显式对齐不同频率使用的通道方向，导致跨频率信息利用不足。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种频谱 token 混合器，既能保持频率特定的局部适应性，又能使通道方向在频谱上可比，从而提升视觉特征建模效果。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

CHASM：所有频率共享一个学习的通道特征基，每个频率保留自己的正频谱增益；该算子沿高度和宽度轴可分离地应用，作为即插即用混合器替换现有骨干网络中的混合器。

📊实验结果

在加速 MRI 重建、欠采样 MRI 分割和自然图像重建任务上，与同骨干网络的频谱混合器基线相比，CHASM 持续改进。消融实验表明移除共享基约束会降低性能，随机化相干采样几何会大幅减少增益。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出跨频率谐波轴可分离混合器 CHASM，通过共享基与频率特定增益实现结构化折中。
  • 提供共享基算子族的结构化表征，并通过加速 MRI 重建、欠采样 MRI 分割和自然图像重建任务验证有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于基于傅里叶变换的频谱混合器架构。
  • 共享基的维度选择可能影响性能，需要进一步调优。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Spectral token mixers based on Fourier transforms provide an efficient way to model global interactions in visual feature maps. Existing designs often either apply filter-wise spectral responses along fixed channel axes, or learn adaptive frequency-indexed channel mixing without explicitly aligning the channel directions used across frequencies. We propose CHASM, a Cross-frequency Harmonized Axis-Separable Mixer, as a structured middle ground. CHASM separates what should be shared from what should remain frequency-specific: all frequencies share a learned channel eigenbasis, while each frequency retains its own positive spectral gains. The shared basis makes channel directions comparable across the spectrum, whereas the positive gains preserve local spectral adaptivity. CHASM applies this structured operator separably along the height and width axes and is used as a drop-in replacement mixer inside existing backbones. We provide a structural characterization of the shared-basis operator family and evaluate CHASM through controlled same-backbone comparisons. Across accelerated MRI reconstruction, undersampled MRI segmentation, and natural-image reconstruction, CHASM consistently improves over same-backbone spectral-mixer baselines. Ablations show that removing the shared-basis constraint weakens performance, and randomizing coherent sampling geometry substantially reduces the gain, supporting cross-frequency harmonization as a useful inductive bias for spectral token operators.

BioHuman: Learning Biomechanical Human Representations from Video

Medium 2605.14772
Yujun Huo, He Zhang, Chentao Song, Honglin Song, Zongyu Zuo, Tao Yu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：从视频中学习人体生物力学表征，实现运动与肌肉激活联合预测。
🎯研究动机

现有方法无法从视觉观测直接推断内部生物力学状态，且缺乏大规模带生物力学标注的数据集，限制了运动分析、康复和损伤风险评估等领域的发展。

❓解决问题

如何从单目视频中同时预测人体运动（运动学）和肌肉激活（内部生物力学状态）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出仿真框架从现有运动捕捉数据集估计肌肉激活，构建大规模数据集 BioHuman10M（含同步视频、运动和激活）；在此基础上提出端到端模型 BioHuman，以单目视频为输入联合预测人体运动和肌肉激活。

📊实验结果

摘要提到在多种主体和运动上进行了广泛实验，验证了准确性和泛化性，但未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了大规模数据集 BioHuman10M，包含同步视频、运动和肌肉激活标注。
  • 提出 BioHuman 模型，实现从单目视频到运动与肌肉激活的联合预测。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖仿真生成的肌肉激活标注，与真实生理数据存在差距。
  • 模型可能对复杂或罕见运动泛化能力有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Understanding human motion beyond surface kinematics is crucial for motion analysis, rehabilitation, and injury risk assessment. However, progress in this domain is limited by the lack of large-scale datasets with biomechanical annotations, and by existing approaches that cannot directly infer internal biomechanical states from visual observations. In this paper, we introduce a simulation-based framework for estimating muscle activations from existing motion capture datasets, resulting in BioHuman10M, a large-scale dataset with synchronized video, motion, and activations. Building on BioHuman10M, we propose BioHuman, an end-to-end model that takes monocular video as input and jointly predicts human motion and muscle activations, effectively bridging visual observations and internal biomechanical states. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BioHuman enables accurate reconstruction of both kinematic motion and muscle activity, and generalizes across diverse subjects and motions. We believe our approach establishes a new benchmark for video-based biomechanical understanding and opens up new possibilities for physically grounded human modeling.

MonoPRIO: Adaptive Prior Conditioning for Unified Monocular 3D Object Detection

Medium 2605.14781
Leon Davies, Qinggang Meng, Mohamad Saada, Baihua Li, Simon Sølvsten
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出自适应先验条件方法 MonoPRIO，通过类感知尺寸原型和软混合先验路由提升单目 3D 检测的尺寸稳定性，在 KITTI 上取得统一多类最优结果。
🎯研究动机

单目 3D 检测中，度量尺寸和深度因单视图证据不足而难以确定，尤其在遮挡、截断和尺度 - 深度模糊下，现有方法在统一多类设置中尺寸预测不稳定。

❓解决问题

解决统一多类单目 3D 检测中因类别变异和部分可见性导致的尺寸预测不稳定问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，自适应先验在图像证据不足以确定度量尺寸时最有效，但非典型几何或极端可见性损失仍可能导致路由先验与真实实例几何不匹配。

🛠️主要方法

构建类感知尺寸原型，对每个解码器查询路由到软混合先验，应用不确定性感知的对数空间条件化，并在训练中使用聚类对齐先验正则化。

📊实验结果

在 KITTI 官方测试服务器上评估，报告了统一多类和仅汽车设置的指标，并进行了消融和诊断实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MonoPRIO，一种通过自适应先验条件提升单目 3D 检测尺寸稳定性的统一检测器。
  • 在 KITTI 测试集上取得统一多类设置下最强结果，并在仅汽车设置中以更少计算量达到最优 AP。
⚠️方法局限
  • 非典型几何或极端可见性损失仍可能导致路由先验与真实实例几何不匹配。
  • 方法依赖离线构建的类感知尺寸原型，可能对罕见类别适应性有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Monocular 3D object detection remains challenging because metric size and depth are underdetermined by single-view evidence, particularly under occlusion, truncation, and projection-induced scale-depth ambiguity. Although recent methods improve depth and geometric reasoning, metric size remains unstable in unified multi-class settings, where class variability and partial visibility broaden plausible size modes. We propose MonoPRIO, a unified monocular 3D detector that targets this bottleneck through adaptive prior conditioning in the size pathway. MonoPRIO constructs class-aware size prototypes offline, routes each decoder query to a soft mixture prior, applies uncertainty-aware log-space conditioning, and uses Cluster-Aligned Prior (CAP) regularisation on matched positives during training. On the official KITTI test server, MonoPRIO achieves the strongest fully reported unified multi-class result among methods reporting complete Car, Pedestrian, and Cyclist metrics. In the car-only setting, it also achieves the strongest 3D bounding-box AP across Easy/Moderate/Hard categories among compared methods without extra data, while using substantially less compute than MonoCLUE. Ablations and diagnostics show complementary gains from routed injection and CAP, with the largest benefits in ambiguity-prone, partially occluded, and low-data regimes. These findings indicate that adaptive priors are most effective when image evidence underdetermines metric size, while atypical geometry or extreme visibility loss can still cause mismatch between routed priors and true instance geometry. Code, trained models, result logs, and reproducibility material are available at this https URL .

Can Visual Mamba Improve AI-Generated Image Detection? An In-Depth Investigation

Medium 2605.14799
Mamadou Keita, Wassim Hamidouche, Hessen Bougueffa Eutamene, Abdelmalik Taleb-Ahmed, Xianxun Zhu, Abdenour Hadid
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：系统评估 Vision Mamba 在 AI 生成图像检测中的潜力与局限。
🎯研究动机

AI 生成图像技术快速发展带来滥用风险，现有检测方法（CNN、ViT、VLM）已有研究，但 Mamba 架构在此任务上的潜力尚未被系统探索。

❓解决问题

评估 Vision Mamba 模型在 AI 生成图像检测任务中的性能、效率与泛化能力，并与主流方法进行对比。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

对多种 Vision Mamba 变体进行基准测试，与代表性 CNN、ViT 和 VLM 检测器在多个数据集和生成源上比较，关注准确率、效率和跨生成模型泛化性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统评估 Vision Mamba 在 AI 生成图像检测中的表现
  • 提供与 CNN、ViT、VLM 检测器的全面对比分析
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定数据集或生成模型上有效
  • Mamba 架构的检测性能可能不如现有最优方法
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In recent years, computer vision has witnessed remarkable progress, fueled by the development of innovative architectures such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), diffusion-based architectures, Vision Transformers (ViTs), and, more recently, Vision-Language Models (VLMs). This progress has undeniably contributed to creating increasingly realistic and diverse visual content. However, such advancements in image generation also raise concerns about potential misuse in areas such as misinformation, identity theft, and threats to privacy and security. In parallel, Mamba-based architectures have emerged as versatile tools for a range of image analysis tasks, including classification, segmentation, medical imaging, object detection, and image restoration, in this rapidly evolving field. However, their potential for identifying AI-generated images remains relatively unexplored compared to established techniques. This study provides a systematic evaluation and comparative analysis of Vision Mamba models for AI-generated image detection. We benchmark multiple Vision Mamba variants against representative CNNs, ViTs, and VLM-based detectors across diverse datasets and synthetic image sources, focusing on key metrics such as accuracy, efficiency, and generalizability across diverse image types and generative models. Through this comprehensive analysis, we aim to elucidate Vision Mamba's strengths and limitations relative to established methodologies in terms of applicability, accuracy, and efficiency in detecting AI-generated images. Overall, our findings highlight both the promise and current limitations of Vision Mamba as a component in systems designed to distinguish authentic from AI-generated visual content. This research is crucial for enhancing detection in an age where distinguishing between real and AI-generated content is a major challenge.

SuperADD: Training-free Class-agnostic Anomaly Segmentation -- CVPR 2026 VAND 4.0 Workshop Challenge Industrial Track

Medium 2605.14808
Lukas Roming, Felix Lehnerer, Jonas V. Funk, Andreas Michel, Georg Maier, Thomas Längle, Jürgen Beyerer
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种无需训练、类别无关的异常分割方法 SuperADD，通过改进 DINOv3 骨干、重叠补丁处理等增强分布偏移鲁棒性，在 MVTec AD 2 上超越现有方法。
🎯研究动机

工业视觉异常检测中，训练与部署数据因采集条件变化（如光照）导致分布偏移，现有方法依赖类别特定架构或超参数调优，难以适应产品变体，亟需鲁棒且通用的解决方案。

❓解决问题

解决工业异常检测中分布偏移下的鲁棒分割问题，要求无需训练、类别无关且适应多种产品变体。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 SuperAD 的无需训练、类别无关异常检测流程，采用 DINOv3 骨干、重叠补丁处理、强度增强、改进内存库子采样和迭代形态学闭合。

📊实验结果

在 MVTec AD 2 数据集上评估，测试公开、私有和私有混合子集，F1 分数分别为 62.61%、57.42%、54.35%，优于 SuperAD 等现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出训练无关、类别无关的异常分割方法，仅用单一架构和共享超参数配置。
  • 通过多项改进（DINOv3 骨干、重叠补丁、强度增强、内存库子采样、形态学闭合）增强分布偏移鲁棒性。
  • 在 MVTec AD 2 数据集上取得 SOTA 性能，F1 分数分别为 62.61%、57.42%、54.35%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端分布偏移或未见异常类型泛化能力有限。
  • 依赖 DINOv3 骨干，计算资源需求可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Visual anomaly detection (AD) for industrial inspection is a highly relevant task in modern production environments. The problem becomes particularly challenging when training and deployment data differ due to changes in acquisition conditions during production. In the VAND 4.0 Industrial Track, models must remain robust under distribution shifts such as varying illumination and their performance is assessed on the MVTec AD 2 dataset. To address this setting, we propose a training-free and class-agnostic anomaly detection pipeline based on the work of SuperAD. Our approach improves generalization through several modifications designed to enhance robustness under distribution shifts. These adaptations include using a DINOv3 backbone, overlapping patch-wise processing, intensity-based augmentations, improved memory-bank subsampling for better coverage of the data distribution, and iterative morphological closing for cleaner and more spatially consistent anomaly maps. Unlike methods that rely on class-specific architectures or per-class hyperparameter tuning, our method uses a single architecture and one shared hyperparameter configuration across all object classes. This makes the approach well suited for industrial deployment, where product variants and appearance changes must be handled with minimal adaptation effort. We achieve segmentation F1 scores of $62.61\%$, $57.42\%$, and $54.35\%$ on test public, private, and private mixed of MVTec AD 2 respectively, thereby outperforming SuperAD and other state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at this https URL .

HDRFace: Rethinking Face Restoration with High-Dimensional Representation

Medium 2605.14821
Zirui Wang, Xianhui Lin, Yi Dong, Bo Wei, Gangjian Zhang, Siteng Ma, Zebiao Zheng, Xing Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出高维表示条件注入框架 HDRFace，在不修改生成骨干网络的情况下提升人脸修复的身份细节恢复能力。
🎯研究动机

复杂退化下的人脸修复因信息严重丢失而高度病态，现有扩散模型仅依赖低质量输入条件，难以恢复身份关键细节。

❓解决问题

如何在重度退化条件下，不修改生成骨干网络，向扩散模型注入语义丰富的先验以恢复身份关键细节。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

先通过现成修复器获得结构可靠的中间结果，再用预训练高维特征编码器从低质量输入和中间结果中提取细粒度面部表示，并作为额外条件注入生成过程；同时提出结构 - 细节自适应融合机制 SDFM，在结构建模时强调全局约束，在细节合成时增强表示引导。

📊实验结果

在 SD V2.1-base 和 Qwen-Image 两种生成模型上实现框架，观察到稳定且一致的性能增益。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 HDRFace，一种高维表示条件人脸修复框架，无需修改生成骨干网络即可注入语义丰富先验。
  • 提出 SDFM 结构 - 细节自适应融合机制，平衡结构一致性与细节保真度。
  • 在 SD V2.1-base 和 Qwen-Image 两种生成模型上验证了方法的泛化能力，均获得稳定且一致的性能提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖现成修复器的中间结果质量，可能引入误差。
  • 高维特征编码器的预训练过程未在摘要中说明，可能影响可复现性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Face restoration under complex degradations still remains an ill-posed inverse problem due to severe information loss. Although diffusion models benefit from strong generative priors, most methods still condition only on low-quality inputs, making it difficult to recover identity-critical details under heavy degradations. In this work, we propose HDRFace, a High-Dimensional Representation conditioned Face restoration framework that injects semantically rich priors into the conditional flow without modifying the generative backbone. Our pipeline first obtains a structurally reliable intermediate restoration with an off-the-shelf restorer, then uses a pretrained high-dimensional feature encoder to extract fine-grained facial representations from both the low-quality input and the intermediate result, and injects them as additional conditions for generation. We further introduce SDFM, a Structure-Detail aware adaptive Fusion Mechanism that emphasizes global constraints during structure modeling and strengthens representation guidance during detail synthesis, balancing structural consistency and detail fidelity. To validate the generalization ability of our method, we implement the proposed framework on two generative models, SD V2.1-base and Qwen-Image, and consistently observe stable and coherent performance gains across different architectures.

Multi-proposal Collaboration and Multi-task Training for Weakly-supervised Video Moment Retrieval

Medium 2605.14838
Bolin Zhang, Chao Yang, Bin Jiang, Takahiro Komamizu, Ichiro Ide
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出多提案协作与多任务训练方法，提升弱监督视频时刻检索的提案质量和稳定性。
🎯研究动机

弱监督视频时刻检索（VMR）无需时序标注，但现有方法生成的时序提案质量低，难以区分同一视频中的错配时刻，且依赖单一辅助任务导致不稳定。

❓解决问题

如何在不使用时序标注的情况下，生成高质量时序提案并实现鲁棒的弱监督视频时刻检索。

🔎现象分析

现有方法生成的时序提案质量低，难以区分同一视频中的错配时刻，且单一辅助任务导致训练不稳定。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MCMT 方法：首先生成多个提案并从中推导可学习的高斯掩码，组合成高质量正样本掩码；将同一视频中其他片段作为易负样本，整个视频作为难负样本；引入前向和反向掩码查询重构任务进行多任务训练。

📊实验结果

在两个标准基准数据集上进行实验，验证了方法的有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多提案协作策略，通过组合多个提案的高斯掩码生成高质量正样本掩码。
  • 引入前向和反向掩码查询重构任务，增强网络约束，提升检索稳定性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖提案生成的质量，若初始提案较差则影响后续协作。
  • 多任务训练可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This study focuses on weakly-supervised Video Moment Retrieval (VMR), aiming to identify a moment semantically similar to the given query within an untrimmed video using only video-level correspondences, without relying on temporal annotations during training. Previous methods either aggregate predictions for all instances in the video, or indirectly address the task by proposing reconstructions for the query. However, these methods often produce low-quality temporal proposals, struggle with distinguishing misaligned moments in the same video, or lack stability due to a reliance on a single auxiliary task. To address these limitations, we present a novel weakly-supervised method called Multi-proposal Collaboration and Multi-task Training (MCMT). Initially, we generate multiple proposals and derive corresponding learnable Gaussian masks from them. These masks are then combined to create a high-quality positive sample mask, highlighting video clips most relevant to the query. Concurrently, we classify other clips in the same video as the easy negative sample and the entire video as the hard negative sample. During training, we introduce forward and inverse masked query reconstruction tasks to impose more substantial constraints on the network, promoting more robust and stable retrieval performance. Extensive experiments on two standard benchmarks affirm the effectiveness of the proposed method in VMR.

SR-Prominence: A Crowdsourced Protocol and Dataset Suite for Perceptually-Weighted Super-Resolution Artifact Evaluation

Medium 2605.14847
Ivan Molodetskikh, Kirill Malyshev, Mark Mirgaleev, Nikita Zagainov, Evgeney Bogatyrev, Dmitriy Vatolin
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于众包感知权重的超分伪影显著性评估协议与数据集，推动超分伪影评估从二值缺陷检测转向感知影响度量。
🎯研究动机

现有超分辨率方法生成的图像虽细节丰富，但常引入视觉伪影，且不同伪影的感知影响差异巨大，而现有检测方法对所有伪影一视同仁，缺乏基于感知权重的评估。

❓解决问题

如何定义和量化超分伪影的感知显著性，并构建相应的评估协议与数据集。

🔎现象分析

重新标注 DeSRA 数据集发现，48.2% 的实验室二值伪影实际上不被多数观看者注意到，表明现有二值标注与真实感知存在显著偏差。

🛠️主要方法

提出伪影显著性（artifact prominence）概念，定义为认为高亮区域包含明显伪影的观看者比例；设计众包标注协议，构建包含 3,935 个伪影掩码的数据集套件，并提供客观评分协议以便新指标无需额外众包即可基准测试。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出伪影显著性作为超分伪影评估的新目标，并设计众包标注协议。
  • 构建 SR-Prominence 数据集套件，涵盖多个数据集和真实无参考场景。
  • 系统审计现有 SR 伪影检测器、图像质量指标和 SR 方法，发现全参考指标（SSIM、DISTS）提供强局部显著性信号，而无参考方法和专用检测器泛化能力差。
⚠️方法局限
  • 众包标注可能受观看者个体差异影响，显著性分数可能存在噪声。
  • 数据集规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有类型的超分伪影。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Modern image super-resolution methods generate detailed, visually appealing results, but they often introduce visual artifacts: unnatural patterns and texture distortions that degrade perceived quality. These defects vary widely in perceptual impact--some are barely noticeable, while others are highly disturbing--yet existing detection methods treat them equally. We propose artifact prominence as an evaluative target, defined as the fraction of viewers who judge a highlighted region to contain a noticeable artifact. We design a crowdsourced annotation protocol and construct SR-Prominence, a dataset suite containing 3,935 artifact masks from DeSRA, Open Images, Urban100, and a realistic no-ground-truth Urban100-HR setting, annotated with prominence. Re-annotating DeSRA reveals that 48.2% of its in-lab binary artifacts are not noticed by a majority of viewers. Across the suite, we audit SR artifact detectors, image-quality metrics, and SR methods. We find that classical full-reference metrics, especially SSIM and DISTS, provide surprisingly strong localized prominence signals, whereas no-reference IQA methods and specialized artifact detectors often fail to generalize across datasets and reference settings. SR-Prominence is released with an objective scoring protocol that allows new metrics to be benchmarked on our suite without further crowdsourcing. Together, the data and protocols enable SR artifact evaluation to move from binary defect presence toward perceptual impact. SR-Prominence is available at this https URL .

FactorizedHMR: A Hybrid Framework for Video Human Mesh Recovery

Medium 2605.14854
Patrick Kwon, Chen Chen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 FactorizedHMR，将人体网格恢复分解为确定性躯干回归和概率流匹配补全，提升遮挡下的恢复质量。
🎯研究动机

人体网格恢复存在固有的模糊性，尤其在遮挡或弱深度线索下，不同身体部位的不确定性不同，现有方法未充分利用这一结构差异。

❓解决问题

如何针对人体不同部位的不确定性差异，设计混合框架以提升视频人体网格恢复的准确性和鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

躯干姿态和根结构相对确定，而四肢等远端关节更不确定，需要分别处理。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段框架：第一阶段用确定性回归模块恢复稳定的躯干 - 根锚点；第二阶段用概率流匹配模块补全非躯干关节，结合复合目标表示、几何感知监督和特征感知无分类器引导。

📊实验结果

在相机空间和世界空间基准上与强基线竞争，在遮挡严重和世界空间漂移指标上增益最明显。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FactorizedHMR，将 HMR 分解为确定性躯干回归和概率流匹配补全。
  • 引入合成数据流水线，提供多样视角下的配对图像 - 相机 - 运动监督。
  • 在遮挡严重和世界空间漂移指标上取得显著提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖合成数据质量。
  • 流匹配模块的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Human Mesh Recovery (HMR) is fundamentally ambiguous: under occlusion or weak depth cues, multiple 3D bodies can explain the same image evidence. This ambiguity is not uniform across the body, as torso pose and root structure are often relatively well constrained, whereas distal articulations such as the arms and legs are more uncertain. Building on this observation, we propose FactorizedHMR, a two-stage framework that treats these two regimes differently. A deterministic regression module first recovers a stable torso-root anchor, and a probabilistic flow-matching module then completes the remaining non-torso articulation. To make this completion reliable, we combine a composite target representation with geometry-aware supervision and feature-aware classifier-free guidance, preserving the torso-root anchor while improving single-reference recovery of ambiguity-prone articulation. We also introduce a synthetic data pipeline that provides the paired image-camera-motion supervision under diverse viewpoints. Across camera-space and world-space benchmarks, FactorizedHMR remains competitive with strong baselines, with the clearest gains in occlusion-heavy recovery and drift-sensitive world-space metrics.

SCRWKV: Ultra-Compact Structure-Calibrated Vision-RWKV for Topological Crack Segmentation

Medium 2605.14926
Hanxu Zhang, Chen Jia, Hui Liu, Xu Cheng, Fan Shi, Shengyong Chen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出仅 1.22M 参数的 SCRWKV 网络，通过结构场编码器和线性复杂度 RWKV 实现高精度拓扑裂缝分割。
🎯研究动机

现有裂缝分割方法在拓扑建模与计算效率之间存在瓶颈，难以兼顾高分割质量与低资源需求。

❓解决问题

实现跨场景像素级精确的裂缝分割，同时平衡拓扑结构建模与计算效率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Ultra-Compact Structure-Calibrated Vision RWKV (SCRWKV)，包含 Structure-Field Encoder (SFE)主干（集成 Adaptive Multi-scale Cascaded Modulator (AMCM)和 Structure-Calibrated Insight Unit (SCIU)），其中 SCIU 利用 Geometry-guided Bidirectional Structure Transformation (GBST)捕获拓扑相关性，并集成 Dynamic Self-Calibrating Decay (DSCD)抑制噪声；以及轻量级 Cross-Scale Harmonic Fusion (CSHF)解码器。

📊实验结果

在多个复杂纹理和严重干扰的基准上评估，在 TUT 数据集上 F1=0.8428，mIoU=0.8512，显著优于 SOTA 方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SCRWKV 网络，以 1.22M 超小参数量实现高精度裂缝分割。
  • 设计 SFE 主干和 CSHF 解码器，有效建模拓扑结构并保持线性复杂度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在裂缝分割领域验证，泛化性未知。
  • 摘要未提及与其他轻量级方法的详细对比。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Achieving pixel-level accurate segmentation of structural cracks across diverse scenarios remains a formidable challenge. Existing methods face significant bottlenecks in balancing crack topology modeling with computational efficiency, often failing to reconcile high segmentation quality with low resource demands. To address these limitations, we propose the Ultra-Compact Structure-Calibrated Vision RWKV (SCRWKV), a network that achieves high-precision modeling via a novel Structure-Field Encoder (SFE) backbone while maintaining linear complexity. The SFE integrates the Adaptive Multi-scale Cascaded Modulator (AMCM) to enhance texture representation and utilizes the Structure-Calibrated Insight Unit (SCIU) as its core engine. Specifically, the SCIU employs the Geometry-guided Bidirectional Structure Transformation (GBST) to capture topological correlations and integrates the Dynamic Self-Calibrating Decay (DSCD) into Dy-WKV to suppress noise propagation. Furthermore, we introduce a lightweight Cross-Scale Harmonic Fusion (CSHF) decoder to achieve precise feature aggregation. Systematic evaluations on multiple benchmarks characterized by complex textures and severe interference demonstrate that SCRWKV, with only 1.22M parameters, significantly outperforms SOTA methods. Achieving an F1 score of 0.8428 and mIoU of 0.8512 on the TUT dataset, the model confirms its robust potential for efficient real-world deployment. The code is available at this https URL .

Vision-Based Runtime Monitoring under Varying Specifications using Semantic Latent Representations

Medium 2605.13923
Bardh Hoxha, Oliver Schön, Hideki Okamoto, Lars Lindemann, Georgios Fainekos
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出基于语义潜表征的视觉运行时监控方法，可在不同规范下复用，无需针对每个公式重新训练。
🎯研究动机

视觉监控系统需要在部分可观测条件下从图像中推断安全相关量并提供有限样本保证，但现有方法通常针对特定规范训练，缺乏可复用性，导致部署成本高。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个可复用的视觉运行时监控器，使其在无需针对每个公式重新训练的情况下，能够认证任意过去时间信号时序逻辑（ptSTL）公式。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出语义基（semantic basis）作为最小预测目标，即时间原子鲁棒性分数的向量；通过解析树推导确定性解码器评估任意公式，并利用单次共形校准认证整个片段。同时引入滚动预测监控器，仅预测当前谓词值并在线重构时序历史。

📊实验结果

在行人交叉路口基准上，滚动监控器在短时域上获得更紧的认证界，语义基监控器在长时域上紧 4 倍；在 Waymo 数据上，两种监控器均经验证满足共形覆盖保证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明了语义基是单调、1-Lipschitz 可复用接口类中的最小预测目标。
  • 提出滚动预测监控器，在短时域上更紧，而语义基监控器在长时域上更紧。
  • 在行人交叉路口基准和真实 Waymo 驾驶数据上验证了监控器的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 滚动预测监控器在长时域上保守性增加。
  • 方法依赖于有限时间原子字典，可能限制可表达的规范范围。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study certified runtime monitoring of past-time signal temporal logic (ptSTL) from visual observations under partial observability.
