Our method achieves superior performance on our carefully established benchmarks for real-world disease screening, yielding notably higher specificity at clinical-level recall. Code is publicly available at this https URL .

CineMesh4D: Personalized 4D Whole Heart Reconstruction from Sparse Cine MRI

High 2605.13994
Xiaoyue Liu, Xiaohan Yuan, Mark Y Chan, Ching-Hui Sia, Lei Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 CineMesh4D，从稀疏 2D 电影 MRI 端到端重建个性化 4D 全心网格。
🎯研究动机

临床需要准确的 3D+t 全心网格重建，但现有方法受限于稀疏采样和心脏形状与运动的耦合，通常只重建部分腔室或单相位。

❓解决问题

从稀疏多视角 2D 电影 MRI 直接重建患者特定的 4D 全心网格。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

端到端 4D 管道，通过可微渲染损失从多视角稀疏轮廓监督 3D+t 网格，并设计双上下文时间块融合全局和局部心脏时间信息。

📊实验结果

在定量和定性评估中，CineMesh4D 在重建质量和运动一致性上优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个端到端 4D 全心网格重建管道 CineMesh4D。
  • 引入可微渲染损失实现从稀疏轮廓的跨域监督。
  • 设计双上下文时间块捕捉高维时序模式。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖多视角输入，单视角场景未验证。
  • 可微渲染损失的计算效率可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate 3D+t whole-heart mesh reconstruction from cine MRI is a clinically crucial yet technically challenging task. The difficulty of this task arises from two coupled factors: inherently sparse sampling of 3D cardiac anatomy by 2D image slices and the tight coupling between cardiac shape and motion. Current cardiac image-to-mesh approaches typically reconstruct only a subset of cardiac chambers or a single phase of the cardiac cycle. In this work, we propose CineMesh4D, a novel end-to-end 4D (3D+t) pipeline that directly reconstructs patient-specific whole-heart mesh from multi-view 2D cine MRI via cross-domain mapping. Specifically, we introduce a differentiable rendering loss that enables supervision of 3D+t whole-heart mesh from multi-view sparse contours of cine MRI. Furthermore, we develop a dual-context temporal block that fuses global and local cardiac temporal information to capture high-dimensional sequential patterns. In quantitative and qualitative evaluations, CineMesh4D outperforms existing approaches in terms of reconstruction quality and motion consistency, providing a practical pathway for personalized real-time cardiac assessment. The code will be publicly released once the manuscript is accepted.

DUET: Dual-Paradigm Adaptive Expert Triage with Single-cell Inductive Prior for Spatial Transcriptomics Prediction

High 2605.14104
Junchao Zhu, Ruining Deng, Junlin Guo, Tianyuan Yao, Chongyu Qu, Juming Xiong, Zhengyi Lu, Yanfan Zhu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出双范式框架 DUET，结合参数预测与记忆检索，利用单细胞先验提升空间转录组预测性能。
🎯研究动机

现有方法将空间转录组预测简化为形态到表达的映射，视觉相似性无法保证分子一致性；单细胞数据资源丰富但未被充分利用；当前单一范式方法存在瓶颈，无法平衡表达灵活性与生物保真度。

❓解决问题

如何从组织学图像准确推断空间分辨基因表达，克服视觉模糊性并利用单细胞先验知识。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DUET 框架，包含参数化回归和基于记忆的检索双路径，通过轻量级适配器动态分配分支偏好，并利用大规模单细胞参考作为生物约束。

📊实验结果

在三个公共数据集上进行了广泛实验，涵盖不同基因尺度，DUET 达到 SOTA 性能，每个组件均有贡献。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出双范式框架，协同参数预测与记忆检索，自适应平衡表达灵活性与生物保真度。
  • 引入单细胞归纳先验作为生物约束，缓解视觉模糊性。
  • 设计轻量级适配器，根据空间上下文动态调整分支权重。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量单细胞参考数据。
  • 双范式框架计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Inferring spatially resolved gene expression from histology images offers a cost-effective complement to spatial transcriptomics (ST). However, existing methods reduce this task to a simple morphology-to-expression mapping, where visual similarity does not guarantee molecular consistency. Meanwhile, single-cell data has amassed rich resources far surpassing the scale of ST data, yet it remains underexplored in vision-omics modeling. Furthermore, current approaches commit to a monolithic paradigm with bottlenecks, unable to balance expressive flexibility with biological fidelity. To bridge these gaps, we propose DUET, a novel dual-paradigm framework that synergizes parametric prediction and memory-based retrieval under cellular inductive priors. DUET implements a parallel regression-retrieval paradigm, adaptively reconciling the outputs of its complementary pathways. To mitigate aleatoric vision ambiguity, we incorporate large-scale single-cell references to impose molecular states as biological constraints for faithful learning. Building upon structural refinement, we further design a lightweight adapter to dynamically assign branch preference across spatial contexts to achieve optimal performance. Extensive experiments on three public datasets across varied gene scales demonstrate that DUET achieves SOTA performance, with consistent gains contributed by each proposed component. Code is available at this https URL

Automatic Landmark-Based Segmentation of Human Subcortical Structures in MRI

Medium 2605.14221
Ahmed Rekik, R. Jarrett Rushmore, Sylvain Bouix, Linda Marrakchi-Kacem
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于地标的 3D 脑分割方法，通过检测解剖地标并后处理提升边界准确性。
🎯研究动机

现有体素级深度模型在 MRI 脑结构分割中常产生解剖不一致的结果，偏离专家定义的边界，需要更符合手动分割协议的方法。

❓解决问题

如何实现与专家手动分割协议一致的精确脑亚皮层结构分割。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出地标引导的 3D 分割方法：全局到局部网络检测 16 个地标，语义分割模型生成 12 个标签的粗分割，再通过地标驱动的后处理将 12 个标签分离为 26 个结构。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种模仿手动分割协议的地标引导分割框架。
  • 通过地标后处理提升边界准确性，使分割更符合解剖约束。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖地标检测的准确性。
  • 后处理步骤可能增加计算复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Precise segmentation of brain structures in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is essential for reliable neuroimaging analysis, yet voxel-wise deep models often yield anatomically inconsistent results that diverge from expert-defined boundaries. In this research, we propose a landmark-guided 3D brain segmentation approach that explicitly mimics the manual segmentation protocol of the Harvard--Oxford Atlas. A Global-to-Local network automatically detects 16 landmarks representing key subcortical reference points. Then, a semantic segmentation model produces a coarse segmentation of 12 anatomical labels, each grouping multiple subcortical regions. Finally, a landmark-driven post-processing step separates these 12 labels into 26 distinct structures by enforcing local anatomical constraints. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvements in boundary accuracy. Overall, integrating learned landmarks aligns segmentations more closely with manual protocols.

Artificial Intelligence-Assistant Cardiotocography: Unified Model for Signal Reconstruction, Fetal Heart Rate Analysis, and Variability Assessment

Medium 2605.14242
Xiaohua Wang, Kai Yu, XuXiao Liang, Liang Wang, Chao Han
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 AI 辅助胎心宫缩图模型 FHrCTG，实现信号重建、胎心率分析和变异性评估。
🎯研究动机

传统胎心率监测受设备性能、数据传输和医生主观评估限制，需要更客观、精准的 AI 辅助方法。

❓解决问题

解决胎心率监测中的噪声干扰、信号重建不准确以及变异性评估主观性强的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于大规模无标签数据预训练（558,412 条）和专家标注数据微调（7,266 条），引入交叠标签（IOL）方法将率分析转化为分类判断。

📊实验结果

在检测关键 FHR 减速和加速时，模型灵敏度分别为 89.13% 和 62.5%，特异度分别为 87.78% 和 92.04%；基于 Fischer 标准，验证 FHR 周期性和幅度变化的 AUC 分别为 0.7214 和 0.9643。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出针对 FHR 监测的 AI 模型 FHrCTG，有效抑制噪声并精确重建信号。
  • 引入交叠标签（IOL）方法，将率分析转化为分类判断，提升检测性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 模型在加速检测上的灵敏度较低（62.5%），可能需进一步优化。
  • 摘要未提及模型在不同临床场景或人群中的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The monitoring of fetal heart rate (FHR) and the assessment of its variability are crucial for preventing fetal compromise and adverse outcomes. However, traditional methods encounter limitations arising from equipment performance, data transmission, and subjective assessments by doctors. We have developed a tailored AI-based FHrCTG model specifically for FHR monitoring, which effectively mitigates noise interference and precisely reconstructs signals. Our model was pre-trained on a massive dataset consisting of 558,412 unlabeled data points and further refined using 7,266 expert-reviewed entries. To validate FHR, we introduced the Intersection Overlapping Labels (IOL) approach, which transforms rate analysis into categorical judgments. Testing revealed that our model demonstrates high sensitivity and specificity in detecting critical FHR decelerations (89.13% and 87.78%, respectively) and accelerations (62.5% and 92.04%, respectively). Furthermore, based on Fischer's criteria for clinical application, our model achieved impressive AUC scores of 0.7214 and 0.9643 for verifying FHR periodicity and amplitude variation, respectively.

Generative Deep Learning for Computational Destaining and Restaining of Unregistered Digital Pathology Images

Medium 2605.14251
Aarushi Kulkarni, Alarice Lowe, Pratik Shah
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：基于 cGAN 的计算染色 / 脱色模型在未配准的外部病理 WSI 上通过预处理适应取得可行效果，但恶性腺体形态保留不足。
🎯研究动机

数字病理学中，计算染色 / 脱色模型在不同机构间的泛化能力尚未充分表征，实际部署中图像配准难以保证，需要评估无重训练适应策略的可行性。

❓解决问题

评估基于 cGAN 的 H&E 计算脱色和再染色模型在未配准、跨机构 WSI 上的泛化性能，并开发无需重训练的预处理适应方法。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用基于直方图的染色归一化（H&E）和通道强度校准（未染色）的预处理流程，对未配准的外部 WSI 进行域适应，然后应用预训练的 cGAN 模型进行虚拟脱色和再染色。

📊实验结果

在 82 张斯坦福大学未配准的前列腺穿刺 WSI 上评估，使用 PCC、SSIM、PSNR 指标，并进行了病理学定性审查。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统评估 cGAN 计算染色 / 脱色模型在未配准跨机构 WSI 上的泛化能力，并给出保守性能下界。
  • 提出仅基于预处理的域适应方法，无需重训练即可应用于外部数据集。
  • 发现预处理质量比模型容量更关键，且恶性腺体形态保留存在局限。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未配准导致定量结果为保守下界，可能低估真实性能。
  • 恶性腺体常呈现血管样形态，形态保留不足。
  • 仅针对前列腺癌 H&E 染色，泛化到其他组织类型和染色方法需验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Conditional generative adversarial networks (cGANs) have enabled high-fidelity computational staining and destaining of hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) in digital pathology whole-slide images (WSI). However, their ability to generalize to out-of-distribution WSI across institutions without retraining remains insufficiently characterized. Previously developed cGAN models trained on 102 registered prostate core biopsy WSIs from Brigham and Women's Hospital were evaluated on 82 spatially unregistered WSIs acquired at Stanford University. To mitigate domain shift without retraining, a preprocessing pipeline consisting of histogram-based stain normalization for H&E-stained WSIs and channel-wise intensity calibration for unstained WSIs was developed. Because image registration was intentionally omitted for real-world deployment conditions, the reported quantitative results are conservative lower bounds reflecting both model performance and limited spatial alignment. Under these conditions, virtual destaining achieved a Pearson correlation coefficient (PCC) of 0.854, structural similarity index measure (SSIM) of 0.699, and peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 18.41 dB. H&E restaining from computationally destained outputs outperformed direct staining from ground-truth unstained inputs across all metrics (PCC: 0.798 vs. 0.715; SSIM: 0.756 vs. 0.718; PSNR: 20.08 vs. 18.51 dB), suggesting that preprocessing quality may be more limiting than model capacity. Qualitative pathological review indicated preservation of benign glandular structures while showing that malignant glands were often rendered with vessel-like morphologies. These findings support the feasibility of applying cGAN-based computational H&E staining and destaining generative models to external WSI datasets using preprocessing-based adaptation alone while defining specific morphological targets for future domain adaptation.

Towards Real-Time Autonomous Navigation: Transformer-Based Catheter Tip Tracking in Fluoroscopy

Medium 2605.14253
Harry Robertshaw, Yanghe Hao, Weiyuan Deng, Benjamin Jackson, S.M.Hadi Sadati, Nikola Fischer, Tom Vercauteren, Alejandro Granados et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于 Transformer 的导管尖端实时跟踪管道，用于荧光透视下的自主导航，SegFormer 模型在中等复杂度数据上达到 4.44mm 误差。
🎯研究动机

机械取栓（MT）可改善卒中预后，但受限于本地治疗可及性；基于强化学习（RL）的机器人系统有望通过自主导航缓解此问题，但当前 RL 方法需要实时设备尖端坐标跟踪，而荧光透视图像存在低对比度、噪声和器械遮挡等挑战。

❓解决问题

开发并评估一种在荧光透视下实时跟踪导管尖端的管道，以支持 RL 自主导航。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

设计多线程管道，包括帧读取、预处理、推理和后处理；训练并比较 U-Net、U-Net+Transformer 和 SegFormer 等深度学习分割模型，采用二类和三类公式；后处理包括两步组件过滤、单像素骨架化和贪心弧长路径跟踪与轮廓回退。

📊实验结果

在手动标注的中等复杂度荧光透视视频数据上评估，SegFormer 二类模型平均绝对误差 4.44mm，优于其他模型；分割基准上 Dice 分数提升高达 5%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种多线程实时导管尖端跟踪管道，在荧光透视下稳定工作。
  • SegFormer 二类模型在中等复杂度数据上达到 4.44mm 平均绝对误差，优于 U-Net 和 U-Net+Transformer。
  • 在分割基准上超越 CathAction 最新结果，Dice 分数提升高达 5%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在中等复杂度数据上验证，未在高复杂度或真实临床场景中测试。
  • 未讨论管道在极端遮挡或低帧率下的性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Purpose: Mechanical thrombectomy (MT) improves stroke outcomes, but is limited by a lack of local treatment access. Widespread distribution of reinforcement learning (RL)-based robotic systems can be used to alleviate this challenge through autonomous navigation, but current RL methods require live device tip coordinate tracking to function. This paper aims to develop and evaluate a real-time catheter tip tracking pipeline under fluoroscopy, addressing challenges such as low contrast, noise, and device occlusion. Methods: A multi-threaded pipeline was designed, incorporating frame reading, preprocessing, inference, and post-processing. Deep learning segmentation models, including U-Net, U-Net+Transformer, and SegFormer, were trained and benchmarked using two-class and three-class formulations. Post-processing involved two-step component filtering, one-pixel medial skeletonization, and greedy arc-length path following with contour fall-back. Results: On manually-labeled moderate complexity fluoroscopic video data, the two-class SegFormer achieved a mean absolute error of 4.44 mm, outperforming U-Net (4.60 mm), U-Net+Transformer (6.20 mm) and all three-class models (5.19-7.74 mm). On segmentation benchmarks, the system exceeded state-of-the-art CathAction results with improvements of up to +5% in Dice scores for three-segmentation. Conclusion: The results demonstrate that the proposed multi-threaded tracking framework maintains stable performance under challenging imaging conditions, outperforming prior benchmarks, while providing a reliable and efficient foundation for RL-based autonomous MT navigation.

How Sensitive Are Radiomic AI Models to Acquisition Parameters?

Medium 2605.14667
D. Gil, I. Sanchez, C. Sanchez
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出量化 CT 采集参数对放射组学 AI 模型性能影响的框架，并找到提升跨数据集鲁棒性的最优参数配置。
🎯研究动机

放射组学 AI 模型在临床部署时面临多中心采集协议异质性导致的性能下降问题，现有研究缺乏量化扫描参数敏感性的性能导向框架。

❓解决问题

如何量化 CT 采集参数对放射组学 AI 模型性能的影响，并识别能提升跨数据集鲁棒性的关键参数区域。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出混合效应框架，量化临床相关采集参数对模型性能的影响，同时考虑受试者级随机效应。

📊实验结果

使用两个独立多中心 CT 数据集（公开数据库和自收集数据）及多种 SOTA 架构进行肺癌诊断实验，通过调整 CT 参数评估跨数据库可重复性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出性能导向的放射组学 AI 模型扫描参数敏感性量化框架
  • 通过两个独立多中心 CT 数据集验证，找到最优参数配置（管电流≥200mA、螺距≤1.5、层厚≤1.25mm），将低质量扫描的灵敏度从 0.79 提升至 0.90，特异性从 0.47 提升至 0.79
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对肺癌 CT 诊断，可能不适用于其他疾病或模态
  • 最优参数配置可能因具体任务和模型架构而异
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A main barrier for the deployment of AI radiomic systems in clinical routine is their drop in performance under heterogeneous multicentre acquisition protocols. This work presents a performance-oriented framework for quantifying scan parameter sensitivity of radiomic AI models, while identifying clinically significant parameter regions associated with improved cross-dataset robustness. We formulate a mixed-effects framework for quantifying the influence that clinically relevant acquisition parameters have on models performance, while accounting for subject-level random effects. We have applied our framework to lung cancer diagnosis in CT scans using two independent multicentre datasets (a public database and own-collected data) and several SoA architectures. To evaluate across-database reproducibility, CT parameters have been adjusted using the data collected and tested on the public set. The optimal configuration selected is the current of the X-ray tube >= 200 mA, spiral pitch <= 1.5, slice thickness <= 1.25 mm, which balances diagnostic quality with low radiation dose. These configuration push metrics from 0.79+-0.04 sensitivity, 0.47+-0.10 specificity in low quality scans to 0.90+-0.10 sensitivity, 0.79 +- 0.13 specificity in high quality ones.

Towards Label-Free Single-Cell Phenotyping Using Multi-Task Learning

Medium 2605.14717
Saqib Nazir, Ardhendu Behera
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出多任务学习框架，从无标记 DPC 图像同时进行白细胞分类和蛋白质表达回归。
🎯研究动机

无标记单细胞成像可替代荧光细胞术，但直接从明场形态推断分子表型具有挑战性。

❓解决问题

如何从无标记差分相位对比图像中同时进行白细胞分类和连续蛋白质表达回归。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

混合架构：融合卷积细粒度纹理特征与 Transformer 全局表示，通过可学习的跨分支门控模块，并集成 LLM 生成生物学解释。

📊实验结果

在 BSCCM 和 Blood Cells Image 基准上，WBC 分类准确率 91.3%，CD16 表达回归 Pearson 相关系数 0.72。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一的多任务深度学习框架，同时进行白细胞分类和蛋白质表达回归。
  • 设计混合架构和跨分支门控模块，有效融合局部和全局特征。
  • 引入 LLM 生成可解释的细胞状态摘要。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定成像模态（DPC），泛化性需验证。
  • LLM 生成的摘要可能不够精确。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Label-free single-cell imaging offers a scalable, non-invasive alternative to fluorescence-based cytometry, yet inferring molecular phenotypes directly from bright-field morphology remains challenging. We present a unified Deep Learning (DL) framework that jointly performs White Blood Cell (WBC) classification and continuous protein-expression regression from label-free Differential Phase Contrast (DPC) images. Our model employs a Hybrid architecture that fuses convolutional fine-grained texture features with transformer-based global representations through a learnable cross-branch gating module, enabling robust morpho-molecular inference from DPC images. To support downstream interpretability, we further incorporate a Large Language Model (LLM) that generates concise, biologically grounded summaries of the predicted cell states. Experiments on the Berkeley Single Cell Computational Microscopy (BSCCM) and Blood Cells Image benchmarks demonstrate strong performance, achieving a 91.3% WBC classification accuracy and a 0.72 Pearson correlation for CD16 expression regression on BSCCM. These results underscore the promise of label-free single-cell imaging for cost-effective hematological profiling, enabling simultaneous phenotype identification and quantitative biomarker estimation without fluorescent staining. The source code is available at this https URL .

A CUBS-Compatible Ultrasound Morphology and Uncertainty-Aware Baseline for Carotid Intima-Media Segmentation and Preliminary Risk Prediction

Medium 2605.14949
Aueaphum Aueawatthanaphisut
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 AtheroFlow-XNet，一种兼容 CUBS 数据集的超声形态与不确定性感知基线模型，用于颈动脉内膜 - 中膜分割和初步风险预测。
🎯研究动机

传统超声评估依赖内膜 - 中膜厚度、斑块外观等形态和速度指标，可能无法充分捕捉患者特异性血管风险，需要更全面的自动化分析方法。

❓解决问题

实现颈动脉内膜 - 中膜分割和初步风险预测，并引入不确定性感知以提升可解释性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 CUBS 数据集，将手动标注转换为密集内膜 - 中膜掩膜进行监督分割；引入临床变量作为辅助风险预测分支；使用蒙特卡洛 dropout 实现不确定性感知推理。

📊实验结果

使用 CUBS 数据集，按患者级别划分训练 / 验证 / 测试集（1522/326/328 张图像），分割 Dice 系数 0.7930，损失 0.2359，风险预测 AUC 为 0.6910。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了 AtheroFlow-XNet，一个兼容 CUBS 的超声形态与不确定性感知基线模型。
  • 在分割和风险预测任务上进行了定量评估，并展示了不确定性图对模糊边界的指示作用。
⚠️方法局限
  • CUBS 数据集不包含多普勒波形或 CFD 血流动力学生物标志物，结果仅作为形态驱动基线。
  • 风险预测 AUC 较低（0.6910），可能需结合更多临床特征。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Carotid atherosclerosis is a major contributor to ischemic stroke and transient ischemic attack. Conventional ultrasound assessment is commonly based on intima-media thickness, plaque appearance, stenosis degree, and peak systolic velocity, but these morphology- and velocity-based indicators may not fully capture patient-specific vascular risk. This study presents AtheroFlow-XNet, a CUBS-compatible ultrasound morphology and uncertainty-aware learning baseline for carotid intima-media segmentation and preliminary risk prediction. Using the Carotid Ultrasound Boundary Study dataset, manual lumen-intima and media-adventitia boundary annotations were converted into dense intima-media masks for supervised segmentation. Clinical variables were incorporated into an auxiliary risk-prediction branch, and Monte Carlo dropout was used for uncertainty-aware inference. The model was evaluated using a patient-level train-validation-test split with 1,522 training images, 326 validation images, and 328 testing images. The proposed model achieved a Dice coefficient of 0.7930 for LI-MA mask segmentation, a segmentation loss of 0.2359, and an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve of 0.6910 for preliminary risk prediction. Qualitative results showed that predicted masks were generally aligned with manual annotations, while uncertainty maps highlighted ambiguous wall-boundary regions. These results suggest that ultrasound-derived carotid morphology can support automated wall analysis and uncertainty-aware interpretation. Since CUBS does not provide Doppler waveforms or CFD-derived hemodynamic biomarkers, this work should be interpreted as a reproducible morphology-driven baseline. Future work will incorporate Doppler-derived flow profiles, patient-specific vascular reconstruction, and CFD-based wall shear biomarkers.

Predicting Response to Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy in Ovarian Cancer from CT Baseline Using Multi-Loss Deep Learning

Medium 2605.14991
Francesco Pastori, Francesca Fati, Marina Rosanu, Luigi De Vitis, Lucia Ribero, Gabriella Schivardi, Giovanni Damiano Aletti, Nicoletta Colombo et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出多损失深度学习框架，从 CT 预测卵巢癌新辅助化疗反应，AUC 达 0.73。
🎯研究动机

卵巢癌致死率高，约 60% 患者确诊时已晚期，早期识别化疗无反应者能避免无效治疗和手术延误，但现有方法缺乏非侵入性预测工具。

❓解决问题

从治疗前增强 CT 预测卵巢癌对新辅助化疗的反应（响应者 vs 非响应者）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

利用自动提取的 3D 病灶掩膜，用部分微调的预训练图像编码器编码轴向切片，通过注意力模块聚合切片级表示为体积嵌入；训练结合分类损失、监督对比正则化和难负样本挖掘。

📊实验结果

在单中心回顾性队列（280 例患者，147 响应者 /133 非响应者）上测试，ROC-AUC 为 0.73（95% CI: 0.58-0.86），F1-score 为 0.70（95% CI: 0.56-0.82）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种非侵入性深度学习框架，利用自动 3D 病灶掩膜预测化疗反应。
  • 引入多损失训练策略（分类损失 + 对比正则化 + 难负样本挖掘）提升响应者与非响应者的区分度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 单中心回顾性数据，可能缺乏泛化性。
  • AUC 0.73，临床实用性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Ovarian cancer is the most lethal gynecologic malignancy: around 60% of patients are diagnosed at an advanced stage, with an associated 5-year survival rate of about 30%. Early identification of non-responders to neoadjuvant chemotherapy remains a key unmet need, as it could prevent ineffective therapy and avoid delays in optimal surgical management. This work proposes a non-invasive deep learning framework to predict neoadjuvant chemotherapy response from pre-treatment contrast-enhanced CT by leveraging automatically derived 3D lesion masks. The approach encodes axial slices with a partially fine-tuned pretrained image encoder and aggregates slice-level representations into a volumetric embedding through an attention-based module. Training combines classification loss with supervised contrastive regularization and hard-negative mining to improve separation between ambiguous responders and non-responders. The method was developed on a retrospective single-center cohort from the European Institute of Oncology (Milan, IT), including 280 eligible patients (147 responder, 133 non-responder). On the test cohort, the model achieved a ROC-AUC of 0.73 (95% CI: 0.58-0.86) and an F1-score of 0.70 (95% CI: 0.56-0.82). Overall, these results suggest that the proposed architecture learns clinically relevant predictive patterns and provides a robust foundation for an imaging-based stratification tool.

Computational Imaging Priors for Wireless Capsule Endoscopy: Monte Carlo-Guided Hemoglobin Mapping for Rare-Anomaly Detection

Medium 2605.15062
Chengshuai Yang, Lei Xing, Gregory Entin, Roopa Vemulapalli, Lisa Casey, Raiyan Tripti Zaman
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：将蒙特卡洛启发的血红蛋白先验融合到胶囊内镜分类器中，在 Kvasir-Capsule 上获得微小但方向一致的宏观 AUC 提升。
🎯研究动机

RGB 训练的胶囊内镜分类器在小血管病变检测中表现不佳，因为血红蛋白对比度与胆汁和光照衰减混淆，需要一种物理先验来解耦。

❓解决问题

如何从 RGB 信号中计算血红蛋白图，并将其作为先验信息融入分类器，以提高罕见血管异常的检测性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出两种配置：(i) 将蒙特卡洛启发的分析模型计算的血红蛋白先验 P_blood 作为两个零初始化辅助通道与 RGB 融合；(ii) 蒸馏头训练 3 通道 RGB 骨干预测 P_blood。

📊实验结果

在 Kvasir-Capsule 数据集（47,238 帧，视频级 70/15/15 划分，11 个可评估类别）上，使用 6 个随机种子评估，与 RGB-only EfficientNet-B0 对比。输入融合方案宏观 AUC 从 0.760 提升至 0.783，蒸馏方案为 0.773。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种蒙特卡洛启发的分析模型，从 RGB 信号计算血红蛋白图。
  • 展示了两种融合先验的软件方案，在 Kvasir-Capsule 上获得微小但方向一致的宏观 AUC 提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 宏观 AUC 提升微小（+0.023），且对罕见血管类别的效果存在高方差。
  • 仅在一个数据集上评估，泛化性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Background. RGB-trained capsule-endoscopy classifiers underperform on small-vessel vascular findings by conflating hemoglobin contrast with bile and illumination falloff. Thus, here we test whether a Monte Carlo-inspired analytic model can compute hemoglobin from RGB signal built upon extracted classifier. Methods. On Kvasir-Capsule (47,238 frames, video-level 70/15/15 split, 11 evaluable classes) we evaluate two software-only configurations against RGB-only EfficientNet-B0 across 6 seeds: (i) a prior P_blood = sigma(alpha * (H_norm - 0.5)) * Phi(r) fused as 2 zero-init auxiliary channels; (ii) a distillation head training a 3-channel RGB backbone to predict P_blood. Significance: paired DeLong, McNemar, bootstrap CIs with Bonferroni correction. Results. Across 6 seeds (n=6,423), the analytic prior provides a small but direction-consistent macro-AUC improvement: RGB-only 0.760 +/- 0.027, input-fusion 0.783 +/- 0.024 (paired Delta = +0.023, sign-positive on 5/6 seeds), distillation 0.773 +/- 0.028. The largest robust per-class lift is on Lymphangiectasia, where AUC rises from RGB 0.238 +/- 0.057 to input-fusion 0.337 +/- 0.019, sign-consistent across all 6 seeds. On rare focal-vascular classes (Angiectasia, Blood - fresh) the prior's per-seed effects are bimodal: seed=42 reaches Angiectasia AUC 0.528 -> 0.916, but the cross-seed mean is 0.646 -> 0.608 with sigma_PI = 0.23 - reported as a high-variance per-seed exemplar. Conclusion. A Monte Carlo-inspired analytic prior provides a small, direction-consistent macro-AUC improvement on Kvasir-Capsule across 6 seeds with the largest robust per-class lift on Lymphangiectasia; the distillation variant runs on plain 3-channel RGB and yields a free interpretability heatmap.

Bridging the Rural Healthcare Gap: A Cascaded Edge-Cloud Architecture for Automated Retinal Screening

Medium 2605.14108
Nishi Doshi, Shrey Shah
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出边缘 - 云级联架构，在保持高灵敏度的同时减少约 50% 的云端调用，用于糖尿病视网膜病变自动筛查。
🎯研究动机

农村地区缺乏专家和基础设施进行糖尿病视网膜病变早期检测，而纯云端深度学习系统存在高延迟、带宽有限和数据传输成本高等问题。

❓解决问题

如何在资源受限的农村医疗场景中实现高效、低成本的自动化视网膜筛查。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

两级边缘 - 云级联架构：第一级在本地设备运行轻量级 MobileNetV3-small 模型进行二分类分诊（可转诊 vs 不可转诊）；第二级在云端运行 RETFound-DINOv2 模型对第一级标记为可转诊的图像进行严重程度分级。

📊实验结果

在 APTOS 2019 数据集上进行了实验，使用 733 张图像的测试集，报告了灵敏度、特异性、准确率和二次加权 kappa 等指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种边缘 - 云级联架构，平衡了准确性和资源效率
  • 在 APTOS 数据集上验证了该架构可减少约 50% 的云端调用，同时保持与纯云端模型相当的诊断性能
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步评估
  • 未讨论边缘设备部署的实际约束（如计算能力、功耗）
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is one of the leading causes of preventable blindness, yet rural regions often lack the specialists and infrastructure needed for early detection. Although cloud-based deep learning systems offer high accuracy, they face significant challenges in these settings due to high latency, limited bandwidth, and high data transmission costs. To address these challenges, we propose a two-tier edge-cloud cascade on the public APTOS 2019 Blindness Detection dataset. Tier 1 runs a lightweight MobileNetV3-small model on a local clinic device to perform a binary triage between Referable DR (Classes 2-4) and Non-referable DR (Classes 0-1). Tier 2 runs a RETFoundDINOv2 model in the cloud for ordinal severity grading, but only on the subset of images flagged as referable by Tier 1. On a stratified APTOS test split of 733 images, Tier 1 reaches 98.99% sensitivity and 84.37% specificity at a validation-tuned high-sensitivity threshold. The default cascade forwards 49.52% of test images to Tier 2, reducing cloud calls by 50.48% relative to using a cloud-based model for all images. In the deployed 4-class output space (Class 0-1 / Class 2 / Class 3 / Class 4), the cascade obtains 80.49% accuracy and 0.8167 quadratic weighted kappa; the cloud-only baseline obtains 80.76% accuracy and 0.8184 quadratic weighted kappa. On APTOS, the cascade cuts cloud use by about half with a modest drop in grading performance. Index Terms: Diabetic Retinopathy, Edge-Cloud Cascade, MobileNetV3-small, RETFound-DINOv2, Retinal Screening, tele-ophthalmology

Physics-Grounded Adversarial Stain Augmentation with Calibrated Coverage Guarantees

Medium 2605.13889
Mingi Hong
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：提出一种基于物理染色参数空间的对抗性增强方法，通过 DKW 不等式校准增强预算，在域泛化上超越现有方法。
🎯研究动机

医院间染色差异导致病理模型部署时性能下降，现有增强方法依赖任意超参数，缺乏原则性预算和覆盖保证。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖未见中心数据的情况下，提供有覆盖保证的染色增强以提升模型域泛化能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在 Macenko 染色参数空间中进行对抗性增强，利用多中心统计量和 DKW 不等式校准增强预算。

📊实验结果

在 Camelyon17-WILDS 数据集上，CASA 达到 93.9%±1.6% 的 slide-level 准确率，优于 HED-strong、RandStainNA 和 ERM，并在最差组准确率上领先所有 10 种对比方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CASA 方法，将对抗性增强限制在物理染色参数空间，增强可解释性。
  • 利用 DKW 不等式提供校准的覆盖保证，无需未见中心数据。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖多中心统计量的代表性。
  • 对抗性增强的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Stain variation across hospitals degrades histopathology models at deployment. Existing augmentation methods perturb color spaces with arbitrary hyperparameters, lacking both a principled budget and coverage guarantees for unseen centers. We propose \textbf{C}alibrated \textbf{A}dversarial \textbf{S}tain \textbf{A}ugmentation (\textbf{CASA}), which performs adversarial augmentation in the Macenko stain parameter space with a budget calibrated from multi-center statistics via the DKW inequality. On Camelyon17-WILDS (5 seeds), CASA achieves $93.9\% \pm 1.6\%$ slide-level accuracy -- outperforming HED-strong ($88.4\% \pm 7.3\%$), RandStainNA ($85.2\% \pm 6.7\%$), and ERM ($63.9\% \pm 11.3\%$) -- with the highest worst-group accuracy ($84.9\% \pm 0.9\%$) among all 10 compared methods.

3D 视觉与场景 13 篇

TurboVGGT: Fast Visual Geometry Reconstruction with Adaptive Alternating Attention

High 2605.14315
David Huang, Guile Wu, Chengjie Huang, Bingbing Liu, Dongfeng Bai
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 TurboVGGT，通过自适应交替注意力机制实现快速高质量的多视图 3D 重建。
🎯研究动机

现有前馈 3D 重建方法在质量和效率之间难以平衡，且缺乏自适应学习代表性 token 的机制。

❓解决问题

如何设计高效的视觉几何 Transformer，在保持重建质量的同时提升计算效率。

🔎现象分析

现有方法使用固定稀疏率，无法自适应捕获全局关系，导致性能次优。

🛠️主要方法

采用端到端可训练框架，包含自适应稀疏全局注意力（根据 token 重要性自适应选择稀疏级别）和帧注意力（聚合局部细节）。

📊实验结果

在多个 3D 重建基准上，TurboVGGT 在保持竞争性重建质量的同时实现快速重建。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TurboVGGT，一种高效视觉几何 Transformer，实现快速多视图 3D 重建。
  • 设计自适应交替注意力机制，包括自适应稀疏全局注意力和帧注意力，平衡全局与局部信息。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端稀疏视图或大尺度场景的泛化能力有限。
  • 自适应稀疏机制可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent feed-forward 3D reconstruction methods, such as visual geometry transformers, have substantially advanced the traditional per-scene optimization paradigm by enabling effective multi-view reconstruction in a single forward pass. However, most existing methods struggle to achieve a balance between reconstruction quality and computational efficiency, which limits their scalability and efficiency. Although some efficient visual geometry transformers have recently emerged, they typically use the same sparsity ratio across layers and frames and lack mechanisms to adaptively learn representative tokens to capture global relationships, leading to suboptimal performance. In this work, we propose TurboVGGT, a novel approach that employs an efficient visual geometry transformer with adaptive alternating attention for fast multi-view 3D reconstruction. Specifically, TurboVGGT employs an end-to-end trainable framework with adaptive sparse global attention guided by adaptive sparsity selection to capture global relationships across frames and frame attention to aggregate local details within each frame. In the adaptive sparse global attention, TurboVGGT adaptively learns representative tokens with varying sparsity levels for global geometry modeling, considering that token importance varies across frames, attention layers operate tokens at different levels of abstraction, and global dependencies rely on structurally informative regions. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D reconstruction benchmarks demonstrate that TurboVGGT achieves fast multi-view reconstruction while maintaining competitive reconstruction quality compared with state-of-the-art methods. Project page: this https URL .

TOPOS: High-Fidelity and Efficient Industry-Grade 3D Head Generation

High 2605.14594
Bojun Xiong, Zoubin Bi, Xinghui Peng, Yunmu Wang, Junchen Deng, Jun Liang, Jing Li, Bowen Cai et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 TOPOS 框架，从单张图像生成具有固定工业标准拓扑的高保真 3D 头部模型，包含几何、外观和可重光照纹理。
🎯研究动机

电影、动画和游戏行业需要具有固定参考拓扑的 3D 头部资产，以便进行生产级的绑定、蒙皮和动画，但现有生成模型产生的网格拓扑不一致，阻碍了语义对应和资产复用。

❓解决问题

如何从单张图像生成具有固定工业标准拓扑的高保真 3D 头部几何和外观，并生成与几何对齐的可重光照纹理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TOPOS 框架，包含 TOPOS-VAE（利用 Perceiver Resampler 将不同拓扑的头部点云转换为目标参考拓扑）和 TOPOS-DiT（基于流匹配的 Transformer 生成高保真网格），以及 TOPOS-Texture（微调多模态图像生成模型生成可重光照 UV 纹理）。

📊实验结果

在 3D 头部生成任务上，TOPOS 超越了经典人脸重建方法和通用 3D 物体生成模型，达到最先进性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TOPOS 框架，首次实现从单张图像生成具有固定工业标准拓扑的 3D 头部几何和外观。
  • 提出 TOPOS-VAE，利用 Perceiver Resampler 实现不同拓扑到统一拓扑的转换。
  • 提出 TOPOS-DiT，基于流匹配 Transformer 高效生成高保真头部网格。
  • 提出 TOPOS-Texture，生成与几何对齐的可重光照 UV 纹理。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量训练数据，对极端姿态或遮挡的鲁棒性未知。
  • 纹理生成模块可能受限于微调的多模态模型能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

High-fidelity 3D head generation plays a crucial role in the film, animation and video game industries. In industrial pipelines, studios typically enforce a fixed reference topology across all head assets, as such a clean and uniform topology is a prerequisite for production-level rigging, skinning and animation. In this paper, we present TOPOS, a framework tailored for single image conditioned 3D head generation that jointly recovers geometry and appearance under such an industry-standard topology. In contrast to general 3D generative models which produce triangle meshes with inconsistent topology and numerous vertices, hindering semantic correspondence and asset-level reuse, TOPOS generates head meshes with a fixed, studio-style topology, enabling consistent vertex-level correspondence across all generated heads. To model heads under this unified topology, we proposed a novel variational autoencoder structure, termed TOPOS-VAE. Inspired by multi-model large language models (MLLMs), our TOPOS-VAE leverages the Perceiver Resampler to convert input pointclouds sampled from head meshes of diverse topologies into the target reference topology. Building upon TOPOS-VAE's structured latent space, we train a rectified flow transformer, TOPOS-DiT, to efficiently generate high-fidelity head meshes from a single image. We further present TOPOS-Texture, an end-to-end module that produces relightable UV texture maps from the same portrait image via fine-tuning a multimodal image generative model. The generated textures are spatially aligned with the underlying mesh geometry and faithfully preserve high-frequency appearance details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TOPOS achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3D head generation, surpassing both classical face reconstruction methods and general 3D object generative models, highlighting its effectiveness for digital human creation.

Efficient Dense Matching for Enhanced Gaussian Splatting Using AV1 Motion Vectors

High 2605.14629
Julien Zouein, Vibhoothi Vibhoothi, François Pitié, Anil Kokaram
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：利用 AV1 视频编码的运动向量实现高效密集匹配，提升 3D 高斯泼溅的初始化质量与训练效率。
🎯研究动机

3DGS 依赖初始点云质量，传统 SfM（如 COLMAP）计算成本高且在无纹理区域稀疏，影响重建精度和收敛速度。

❓解决问题

如何高效生成密集且鲁棒的初始点云以提升 3DGS 的重建质量与训练速度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 AV1 视频编码的运动向量进行特征检测与匹配，替代传统 SfM 中的穷举匹配，生成更密集的点云（点数提升 8 倍）。

📊实验结果

在 3DGS 任务上评估，VMAF 提升 9 点，训练时间减少 63%，点云密度提升 8 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种利用 AV1 运动向量的高效密集匹配流水线，显著降低 SfM 处理开销。
  • 验证了密集初始点云对 3DGS 性能的提升：VMAF 提高 9 点，训练时间平均减少 63%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 AV1 编码的视频输入，可能不适用于静态图像或非 AV1 格式。
  • 未讨论在极端纹理缺失或动态场景下的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a prominent framework for real-time, photorealistic scene reconstruction, offering significant speed-ups over Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF). However, the fidelity of 3DGS representations remains heavily dependent on the quality of the initial point cloud. While standard Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipelines using COLMAP provide adequate initialisation, they often suffer from high computational costs and sparsity in textureless regions, which degrades subsequent reconstruction accuracy and convergence speed. In this work, we introduce an AV1-based feature detection and matching pipeline that significantly reduces SfM processing overhead. By leveraging motion vectors inherent to the AV1 video codec, we bypass computationally expensive exhaustive matching while maintaining geometric robustness. Our pipeline produces substantially denser point clouds, with up to eight times as many points as classical SfM. We demonstrate that this enhanced initialisation directly improves 3DGS performance, yielding an 9-point increase in VMAF and a 63% average reduction in training time required to reach baseline quality. The project page: this https URL

Denoising-GS: Gaussian Splatting with Spatial-aware Denoising

High 2605.14880
Qingyuan Zhou, Xinyi Liu, Weidong Yang, Ning Wang, Shuquan Ye, Ben Fei, Ying He, Wanli Ouyang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：将 3D 高斯泼溅优化视为原始去噪过程，提出空间感知去噪框架提升新视角合成质量。
🎯研究动机

3D 高斯泼溅在优化中因 SfM 点云稀疏不完整而引入噪声原始，现有方法仅调整位置忽略空间结构，限制了合成质量。

❓解决问题

如何同时考虑高斯原始的位置和空间结构，实现去噪式优化以提升新视角合成保真度和紧凑性。

🔎现象分析

优化过程中噪声原始的存在源于稀疏初始化，且现有方法缺乏对空间结构的利用。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Denoising-GS 框架，包含空间优化流保持、空间梯度去噪、不确定性剪枝和空间一致性细化四个模块。

📊实验结果

在三个基准数据集上实验，达到 SOTA 性能，代码和模型将开源。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将 3DGS 优化重新定义为原始去噪过程，引入空间感知视角。
  • 设计空间梯度去噪策略和不确定性剪枝模块，联合优化位置与结构。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 SfM 初始化质量，极端稀疏场景效果待验证。
  • 不确定性估计的阈值需手动调整。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have achieved remarkable success in high-fidelity Novel View Synthesis (NVS), yet the optimization process inevitably introduces noisy Gaussian primitives due to the sparse and incomplete initialization from Structure-from-Motion (SfM) point clouds. Most existing methods focus solely on adjusting the positions of primitives during optimization, while neglecting the underlying spatial structure. To this end, we introduce a new perspective by formulating the optimization of 3DGS as a primitive denoising process and propose Denoising-GS, a spatial-aware denoising framework for Gaussian primitives by taking both the positions and spatial structure into consideration. Specifically, we design an optimizer that preserves the spatial optimization flow of primitives, facilitating coherent and directed denoising rather than random perturbations. Building upon this, the Spatial Gradient-based Denoising strategy jointly considers the spatial supports of primitives to ensure gradient-consistent updates. Furthermore, the Uncertainty-based Denoising module estimates primitive-wise uncertainty to prune redundant or noisy primitives, while the Spatial Coherence Refinement strategy selectively splits primitives in sparse regions to maintain structural completeness. Experiments conducted on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that Denoising-GS consistently enhances NVS fidelity while maintaining representation compactness, achieving state-of-the-art performance across all benchmarks. Source code and models will be made publicly available.

Sat3DGen: Comprehensive Street-Level 3D Scene Generation from Single Satellite Image

High 2605.14984
Ming Qian, Zimin Xia, Changkun Liu, Shuailei Ma, Wen Wang, Zeran Ke, Bin Tan, Hang Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：从单张卫星图像生成高质量街景级 3D 场景，通过几何优先方法显著提升几何精度与真实感。
🎯研究动机

从单张卫星图像生成街景级 3D 场景在遥感与计算机视觉中具有重要应用价值，但现有方法存在几何精度与内容丰富度不可兼得的痛点：几何 - 着色模型几何精度高但缺乏语义多样性，而代理模型生成内容丰富但几何粗糙不稳定。

❓解决问题

解决卫星到街景视角转换中极端视角差异和稀疏不一致监督导致的几何误差问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出几何失败源于极端视角差异和稀疏不一致监督，现有代理模型生成的内容几何粗糙且不稳定。

🛠️主要方法

提出几何优先方法 Sat3DGen，在前馈图像到 3D 框架中集成新颖几何约束和视角训练策略，显式对抗几何误差来源。

📊实验结果

在 VIGOR-OOD 测试集与高分辨率 DSM 数据配对的基准上，几何 RMSE 从 6.76m 降至 5.20m，FID 从约 40 降至 19（对比 Sat2Density++），且未使用额外图像质量模块。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出几何优先的 Sat3DGen 方法，通过新颖几何约束和视角训练策略显著提升 3D 几何精度和真实感。
  • 构建了 VIGOR-OOD 与高分辨率 DSM 配对的基准，并验证方法在几何 RMSE 和 FID 上的大幅改进。
  • 展示了高质量 3D 资产在语义图到 3D 合成、多相机视频生成、大规模网格化和无监督 DSM 估计等下游任务中的多样性应用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定卫星图像数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 几何优先方法可能增加计算复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generating a street-level 3D scene from a single satellite image is a crucial yet challenging task. Current methods present a stark trade-off: geometry-colorization models achieve high geometric fidelity but are typically building-focused and lack semantic diversity. In contrast, proxy-based models use feed-forward image-to-3D frameworks to generate holistic scenes by jointly learning geometry and texture, a process that yields rich content but coarse and unstable geometry. We attribute these geometric failures to the extreme viewpoint gap and sparse, inconsistent supervision inherent in satellite-to-street data. We introduce Sat3DGen to address these fundamental challenges, which embodies a geometry-first methodology. This methodology enhances the feed-forward paradigm by integrating novel geometric constraints with a perspective-view training strategy, explicitly countering the primary sources of geometric error. This geometry-centric strategy yields a dramatic leap in both 3D accuracy and photorealism. For validation, we first constructed a new benchmark by pairing the VIGOR-OOD test set with high-resolution DSM data. On this benchmark, our method improves geometric RMSE from 6.76m to 5.20m. Crucially, this geometric leap also boosts photorealism, reducing the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) from $\sim$40 to 19 against the leading method, Sat2Density++, despite using no extra tailored image-quality modules. We demonstrate the versatility of our high-quality 3D assets through diverse downstream applications, including semantic-map-to-3D synthesis, multi-camera video generation, large-scale meshing, and unsupervised single-image Digital Surface Model (DSM) estimation. The code has been released on this https URL .

3D Skew-Normal Splatting

High 2605.15010
Xiangru Wu, Ke Fan, Yanwei Fu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Skew-Normal Splatting，用偏斜正态分布替代高斯分布作为 3D 场景表示基元，以更紧凑地建模非对称结构。
🎯研究动机

3D Gaussian Splatting 在有限基元预算下，对称的高斯基元难以紧凑表示非对称结构（如物体边界、单侧表面），而现有非高斯方法要么限于椭圆族，要么依赖硬截断导致分布不连续。

❓解决问题

如何在保持解析可处理性的同时，用更灵活的基元分布提升 3D 场景表示的紧凑性和重建质量。

🔎现象分析

对称高斯基元在有限数量下对非对称结构（如边界、薄结构）表示效率低；现有非高斯方法（如椭圆分布或硬截断）在连续形状控制或分布连续性上存在局限。

🛠️主要方法

采用 Azzalini Skew-Normal 分布作为基元，引入可学习有界偏斜参数，实现从对称高斯到半高斯形状的连续插值；提出解耦参数化和分块优化策略解决尺度、旋转与偏斜参数的强耦合问题。

📊实验结果

在标准新视角合成基准上，SNS 相比高斯和近期非高斯核方法一致提升重建质量，尤其在尖锐边界和薄 / 单侧结构上优势明显。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 Skew-Normal 分布引入 3D 场景表示，实现连续形状控制且保持仿射变换和边缘化的解析可处理性。
  • 提出解耦参数化和分块优化策略，解决偏斜参数与尺度、旋转的耦合问题，提升训练稳定性与精度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 偏斜参数的有界性可能限制极端非对称形状的表达。
  • 分块优化策略可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a leading representation for real-time novel view synthesis and been widely adopted in various downstream applications. The core strength of 3DGS lies in its efficient kernel-based scene representation, where Gaussian primitives provide favorable mathematical and computational properties. However, under a finite primitive budget, the symmetric shape of each primitive directly affects representation compactness, especially near asymmetric structures such as object boundaries and one-sided surfaces. Recent works have explored more complex kernel distributions, yet they either remain within the elliptical family or rely on hard truncation, which limits continuous shape control and introduces distributional discontinuities. In this paper, we propose Skew-Normal Splatting (SNS), which adopts the Azzalini Skew-Normal distribution as the fundamental primitive. By introducing a learnable and bounded skewness parameter, SNS can continuously interpolate between symmetric Gaussians and Half-Gaussian-like shapes, enabling flexible modeling of both sharp boundaries and interior regions. Moremover, SNS preserves analytical tractability under affine transformations and marginalization. This property allows seamless integration into existing Gaussian Splatting rasterization this http URL , to address the strong coupling between scale, rotation, and skewness parameters, we introduce a decoupled parameterization and a block-wise optimization strategy to enhance training stability and accuracy. Extensive experiments on standard novel-view synthesis benchmarks show that SNS consistently improves reconstruction quality over Gaussian and recent non-Gaussian kernels, with clearer benefits on sharp boundaries and thin or one-sided structures.

VGGT-Edit: Feed-forward Native 3D Scene Editing with Residual Field Prediction

High 2605.15186
Kaixin Zhu, Yiwen Tang, Yifan Yang, Renrui Zhang, Bohan Zeng, Ziyu Guo, Ruichuan An, Zhou Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：VGGT-Edit 提出前馈式原生 3D 场景编辑框架，通过残差场预测实现文本驱动的快速、多视图一致的场景变形。
🎯研究动机

现有前馈式 3D 重建模型在静态场景感知上表现优异，但无法响应动态指令，限制了交互应用；而基于 2D 提升的编辑方法因缺乏空间感知导致纹理模糊和几何不一致。

❓解决问题

如何实现文本驱动的、前馈式的原生 3D 场景编辑，同时保证几何精度和多视图一致性。

🔎现象分析

2D 提升编辑方法因独立编辑各视图再提升回 3D 空间，导致纹理模糊和几何不一致，根源在于 2D 编辑器缺乏跨视图空间感知。

🛠️主要方法

提出 VGGT-Edit 框架，包含深度同步文本注入以对齐语义与空间姿态，残差变换头直接预测 3D 几何位移以变形场景，并采用多目标损失函数监督几何精度和跨视图一致性。

📊实验结果

实验表明 VGGT-Edit 显著优于 2D 提升基线，产生更清晰的物体细节、更强的多视图一致性，且推理速度接近实时。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个前馈式原生 3D 场景编辑框架 VGGT-Edit，实现文本驱动的快速编辑。
  • 引入深度同步文本注入和残差场预测机制，确保语义对齐和背景稳定。
  • 构建 DeltaScene 数据集，通过自动管道和 3D 一致性过滤保证真值质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定前馈重建架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 文本指令的复杂语义理解能力可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

High-quality 3D scene reconstruction has recently advanced toward generalizable feed-forward architectures, enabling the generation of complex environments in a single forward pass. However, despite their strong performance in static scene perception, these models remain limited in responding to dynamic human instructions, which restricts their use in interactive applications. Existing editing methods typically rely on a 2D-lifting strategy, where individual views are edited independently and then lifted back into 3D space. This indirect pipeline often leads to blurry textures and inconsistent geometry, as 2D editors lack the spatial awareness required to preserve structure across viewpoints. To address these limitations, we propose VGGT-Edit, a feed-forward framework for text-conditioned native 3D scene editing. VGGT-Edit introduces depth-synchronized text injection to align semantic guidance with the backbone's spatial poses, ensuring stable instruction grounding. This semantic signal is then processed by a residual transformation head, which directly predicts 3D geometric displacements to deform the scene while preserving background stability. To ensure high-fidelity results, we supervise the framework with a multi-term objective function that enforces geometric accuracy and cross-view consistency. We also construct the DeltaScene Dataset, a large-scale dataset generated through an automated pipeline with 3D agreement filtering to ensure ground-truth quality. Experiments show that VGGT-Edit substantially outperforms 2D-lifting baselines, producing sharper object details, stronger multi-view consistency, and near-instant inference speed.

Articraft: An Agentic System for Scalable Articulated 3D Asset Generation

High 2605.15187
Matt Zhou, Ruining Li, Xiaoyang Lyu, Zhaomou Song, Zhening Huang, Chuanxia Zheng, Christian Rupprecht, Andrea Vedaldi et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用 LLM 自动生成可扩展的高质量铰接 3D 资产数据集。
🎯研究动机

学习理解铰接 3D 物体的瓶颈在于缺乏大规模、多样化的数据集，现有方法难以高效生成此类资产。

❓解决问题

如何利用 LLM 自动生成大规模、高质量的铰接 3D 资产。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Articraft 系统，将铰接 3D 资产生成问题转化为编写程序，LLM 通过领域专用 SDK 定义部件、组合几何、指定关节并编写测试，系统提供受限工作区和结构化反馈以辅助生成。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Articraft 系统，利用 LLM 自动生成铰接 3D 资产。
  • 构建 Articraft-10K 数据集，包含超过 10K 个铰接资产，覆盖 245 个类别。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 LLM 的代码生成能力，可能对复杂关节或罕见类别生成质量有限。
  • 数据集规模虽大，但可能仍存在类别分布不均或资产多样性不足的问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A bottleneck in learning to understand articulated 3D objects is the lack of large and diverse datasets. In this paper, we propose to leverage large language models (LLMs) to close this gap and generate articulated assets at scale. We reduce the problem of generating an articulated 3D asset to that of writing a program that builds it. We then introduce a new agentic system, Articraft, that writes such programs automatically. We design a programmatic interface and harness to help the LLM do so effectively. The LLM writes code against a domain-specific SDK for defining parts, composing geometry, specifying joints, and writing tests to validate the resulting assets. The harness exposes a restricted workspace and interface to the LLM, validates the resulting assets, and returns structured feedback. In this way, the LLM is not distracted by details such as authoring a URDF file or managing a complex software environment. We show that this produces higher-quality assets than both state-of-the-art articulated-asset generators and general-purpose coding agents. Using Articraft, we build Articraft-10K, a curated dataset of over 10K articulated assets spanning 245 categories, and show its utility both for training models of articulated assets and in downstream applications such as robotics simulation and virtual reality.

Contrastive Multi-Modal Hypergraph Reasoning for 3D Crowd Mesh Recovery

High 2605.13854
Minghao Sun, Chongyang Xu, Yitao Xie, Buzhen Huang, Kun Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出对比多模态超图推理方法，融合语义、几何和姿态线索实现 3D 人群网格恢复，在 Panoptic 和 GigaCrowd 基准上达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

多人 3D 重建在真实交互分析中至关重要，但严重遮挡和深度模糊使现有单模态方法缺乏几何指导，且孤立重建个体忽略群体上下文，难以解决拥挤场景的歧义。

❓解决问题

如何融合多模态信息并建模高阶人群动态，以在严重遮挡下准确恢复 3D 人群网格。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出对比多模态超图推理方法：首先结合 RGB 特征、几何先验和遮挡感知的不完整姿态初始化鲁棒节点表示，并引入骨盆深度指示器作为全局空间锚点；然后构建共享拓扑超图建模高阶人群动态；最后设计基于超图的对比学习方案，联合增强模态内判别性和跨模态正交性，实现全局上下文传播。

📊实验结果

在 Panoptic 和 GigaCrowd 基准上进行实验，达到新 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多模态超图推理框架，融合语义、几何和姿态线索进行 3D 人群网格恢复。
  • 设计超图对比学习机制，增强特征融合和全局上下文传播，有效处理严重遮挡。
  • 在 Panoptic 和 GigaCrowd 基准上取得新 SOTA 性能，并开源代码和预训练模型。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量几何先验和遮挡感知姿态初始化。
  • 超图构建和对比学习的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-person 3D reconstruction is pivotal for real-world interaction analysis, yet remains challenging due to severe occlusions and depth ambiguity. Current approaches typically rely on single-modality inputs, which inherently lack geometric guidance. Furthermore, these methods often reconstruct subjects in isolation, neglecting the collective group context essential for resolving ambiguities in crowded scenes. To address these limitations, we propose Contrastive Multi-modal Hypergraph Reasoning to synergize semantic, geometric, and pose cues for crowd reconstruction. We first initialize robust node representations by combining RGB features, geometric priors, and occlusion-aware incomplete poses. Additionally, we introduce a pelvis depth indicator as a global spatial anchor, aligning visual features with a metric-scale-agnostic depth ordering. Subsequently, we construct a shared-topology hypergraph that moves beyond pairwise constraints to model higher-order crowd dynamics. To improve feature fusion, we design a hypergraph-based contrastive learning scheme that jointly enhances intra-modal discriminability and enforces cross-modal orthogonality. This mechanism enables the network to propagate global context effectively, allowing it to infer missing information even under severe occlusion. Extensive experiments on the Panoptic and GigaCrowd benchmarks confirm that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance. Code and pre-trained models are available at this https URL .

Towards Accurate Single Panoramic 3D Detection: A Semantic Gaussian Centric Approach

Medium 2605.14601
Kanglin Ning, Yiran Zhao, Wenrui Li, Shaoru Sun, Xingtao Wang, Xiaopeng Fan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 PanoGSDet，利用连续语义 3D 高斯表示实现全景图像中的精确 3D 目标检测。
🎯研究动机

全景图像 3D 检测对场景理解至关重要，但现有方法将 2D 特征投影到离散 3D 网格会破坏几何连续性并限制表示效率。

❓解决问题

如何从单目全景图像中准确地将 2D 特征映射到 3D 空间，实现高精度的 3D 目标检测。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PanoGSDet 框架，包含全景深度估计组件和语义高斯组件。深度估计组件提取等距柱状语义和深度特征；语义高斯组件包括语义高斯提升模块（将球面特征投影为 3D 语义高斯）、语义高斯优化模块（优化高斯表示）和高斯引导预测头（生成 3D 边界框）。

📊实验结果

在 Structured3D 数据集上进行实验，结果显著优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于连续语义 3D 高斯表示的全景 3D 检测框架 PanoGSDet，克服了离散网格的局限性。
  • 在 Structured3D 数据集上显著优于现有方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量深度估计，在复杂场景中深度估计误差可能影响检测精度。
  • 方法在 Structured3D 数据集上验证，泛化到其他全景数据集的能力未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Three-dimensional object detection in panoramic imagery is crucial for comprehensive scene understanding, yet accurately mapping 2D features to 3D remains a significant challenge. Prevailing methods often project 2D features onto discrete 3D grids, which break geometric continuity and limit representation efficiency. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes PanoGSDet, a monocular panoramic 3D detection framework built upon continuous semantic 3D Gaussian representations. The proposed framework comprises a panoramic depth estimation component and a semantic Gaussian component. The panoramic depth estimation component extracts the equirectangular semantic and depth features from the monocular panorama input. The semantic Gaussian component includes a semantic Gaussian lifting module that projects spherical features into 3D semantic Gaussians, a semantic Gaussian optimization module that refines these semantic Gaussians, and a Gaussian guided prediction head that generates 3D bounding boxes from optimized Gaussian representations. Extensive experiments on the Structured3D dataset demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing methods.

H-OmniStereo: Zero-Shot Omnidirectional Stereo Matching with Heading-Aligned Normal Priors

Medium 2605.14963
Chenxing Jiang, Zhe Tong, Pusen Gao, Peize Liu, Yang Xu, Chuan Fang, Ping Tan, Shaojie Shen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出零样本全景立体匹配框架 H-OmniStereo，通过构建大规模合成数据集和航向对齐法线先验，实现跨域高精度匹配。
🎯研究动机

全景立体匹配在上下等距柱面图像上利用垂直对齐极线可复用透视立体架构，但受限于全景数据集稀缺和球面畸变下透视单目先验退化。

❓解决问题

解决零样本场景下全景立体匹配精度低、泛化差的问题，克服数据不足和畸变导致的先验失效。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：1) 全景立体数据集稀缺；2) 透视单目先验在球面畸变下性能严重下降。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 280 万对上下等距柱面立体图像的合成数据集，并设计航向对齐坐标系下的等距柱面法线估计器，提供畸变鲁棒且跨视图一致的几何先验。

📊实验结果

在域外数据集上比现有方法精度更高，且单一模型可泛化到真实消费级相机设置。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了超过 280 万对的高质量合成全景立体数据集
  • 提出航向对齐法线先验，提升训练效率并适应不同视场角
  • 在跨域数据集上达到更高精度，并成功泛化到真实消费级相机
⚠️方法局限
  • 合成数据与真实场景可能存在域差异
  • 零样本性能可能受限于法线估计器的泛化能力
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Stereo matching on top-bottom equirectangular images provides an effective framework for full-surround perception, as vertically aligned epipolar lines enable the use of advanced perspective stereo architectures that are largely driven by large-scale datasets and monocular priors. However, the performance of such adaptations is severely limited by the scarcity of omnidirectional stereo datasets and the degradation of perspective monocular priors under spherical this http URL address these challenges, we propose H-OmniStereo, a zero-shot omnidirectional stereo matching framework. First, we construct high-quality synthetic dataset comprising over 2.8 million top-bottom equirectangular stereo pairs to scale up training. Second, we introduce an equirectangular monocular normal estimator, specifically operating in a heading-aligned coordinate system. Beyond providing distortion-robust and cross-view-consistent geometric priors for establishing reliable correspondences in stereo matching, this design boosts training efficiency and accommodates train-test FoV this http URL experiments show that our approach achieves higher accuracy than existing methods on out-of-domain datasets and successfully generalizes to real-world consumer camera setups using a single model. Both the model and the dataset will be open-sourced.

SAGE3D: Soft-guided attention and graph excitation for 3D point cloud corner detection

Medium 2605.15088
Batuhan Arda Bekar, Can Sarı, Hüseyin Can Gülkan, Barış Özcan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出混合 Transformer 模型 SAGE3D，通过软引导注意力和激励图神经网络提升 3D 点云角点检测的精度与召回率。
🎯研究动机

机载 LiDAR 点云中的角点检测对于三维场景理解至关重要，但现有方法在多尺度特征提取中容易丢失角点信号，导致精度和召回率不足。

❓解决问题

如何在高分辨率点云中准确检测角点，同时保持高精度和高召回率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于层次化编码器 - 解码器架构，引入软引导注意力（利用真实角点标签作为对数先验注入注意力 logits）和激励图神经网络（在关键分辨率层进行正消息传递，增强高置信角点预测）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出软引导注意力机制，通过注入真实标签先验提升角点检测精度。
  • 设计激励图神经网络，通过正消息传递优化召回率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的真实角点标签作为先验。
  • 多阶段架构可能增加计算复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present SAGE3D, a hybrid Transformer-based model for corner detection in airborne LiDAR point clouds. We propose a multi-stage solution built on a hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture that progressively downsamples point clouds through Set Abstraction layers and recovers per-point predictions via Feature Propagation. We introduce two innovations: Soft-Guided Attention, which injects ground-truth corner labels as a log-prior into attention logits during training to improve precision; then an Excitatory Graph Neural Network positioned at strategic resolutions in the hierarchy, employing positive-only message passing where high-confidence corners reinforce predictions through learned boosting, optimizing for recall. The hierarchical design enables multi-scale feature extraction while our guided attention and excitatory modules ensure corner signals are amplified rather than diluted across scales.

SparseOIT: Improving Order-Independent Transparency 3DGS via Active Set Method

Medium 2605.13855
Wentao Yang, Fanzhen Kong, Zejian Kang, Xiangru Huang
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：利用主动集方法加速基于 OIT 的 3DGS 渲染与重建，实现稀疏依赖下的高效优化。
🎯研究动机

3DGS 在非朗伯或透明材质物体上表现不佳，现有 OIT 方法虽能解决深度排序问题，但其潜力未被充分挖掘，且优化效率低。

❓解决问题

如何利用 OIT 渲染方程中高斯溅射间的稀疏依赖关系，设计高效的 3DGS 重建算法。

🔎现象分析

OIT 修改渲染方程后，高斯溅射间的变量依赖变得非常稀疏，可利用主动集方法加速优化。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SparseOIT，维护一个活跃高斯溅射集合，通过主动集方法实现与潜在稀疏度成比例的加速，并联合考虑 OIT 渲染方程、重建算法和几何正则化。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 观察到 OIT 渲染方程导致高斯溅射间稀疏依赖，并利用主动集方法加速优化。
  • 提出 SparseOIT 算法，在 OIT 系列方法中大幅领先，且与基于体渲染的 SOTA 方法性能相当。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于 OIT 类方法，对非 OIT 场景不适用。
  • 主动集方法可能引入额外超参数或收敛性依赖。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has received tremendous popularity over the past few years due to its photorealistic visual appearance. However, 3DGS uses volumetric rendering that is not suitable for objects with non-lambertian or transparent materials. To remedy this issue, a family of Order-Independent Transparency (OIT) rendering methods propose to remove or modify the depth sorting step in the 3DGS rendering equation. However, the potential of OIT-based method is still underexplored. In this paper, we observe that the OIT modifications to the rendering equation significantly reduce the inter-independence among individual gaussian splats, resulting in very sparse variable dependencies that can be harnessed by specific optimization techniques such as active set method. To this end, we propose SparseOIT, an OIT-based 3DGS reconstruction algorithm that maintains an active set of gaussian splats and enjoys an acceleration ratio that is proportional to the potential sparsity. SparseOIT is designed by jointly considering the OIT rendering equation, the reconstruction algorithm and the geometric regularization. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that SparseOIT outperforms existing methods in the OIT-family by a large margin and also achieves comparable performance to the state-of-the-art 3DGS reconstruction methods based on volumetric rendering. Project page:

其他应用 12 篇

Semantic Feature Segmentation for Interpretable Predictive Maintenance in Complex Systems

Medium 2605.14318
Emilio Mastriani, Alessandro Costa, Federico Incardona, Kevin Munari, Sebastiano Spinello
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出语义特征分割框架，将监测特征分解为规范成分和残差成分，在保持可解释性的同时实现与全特征空间相当的预测性能。
🎯研究动机

复杂系统中的预测性维护常因监测变量的异质性和冗余性而难以提取故障相关信息，且模型可解释性不足。

❓解决问题

如何对高维、异构的监测特征进行可解释的分解，以保留任务相关信息并提升模型可解释性。

🔎现象分析

规范空间在多个时间配置下预测风险始终低于残差空间，且规范段内一致性显著强于段间依赖性，该结构在冗余缩减后仍保持稳定。

🛠️主要方法

基于领域知识定义语义分割标准，将特征空间分解为规范成分（保留主要预测信息）和残差成分（外围信号），并采用预测风险作为任务相关信息的代理。

📊实验结果

在复杂系统监测数据上使用时序感知交叉验证，比较规范空间、残差空间、全特征空间和 PCA 的预测风险及段内 / 段间一致性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种语义特征分割框架，将监测变量按功能分组，实现可解释的特征分解。
  • 通过预测风险验证了规范空间集中了故障预测的最相关信息，且与全特征空间和 PCA 相比性能相当且保持语义。
⚠️方法局限
  • 分割标准依赖领域知识，可能难以推广到缺乏先验的系统。
  • 仅从预测风险角度评估信息相关性，未考虑其他任务（如故障诊断）的适用性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Predictive maintenance in complex systems is often complicated by the heterogeneity and redundancy of monitored variables,which can obscure fault-relevant information and reduce model interpretability. This work proposes a semantic feature segmentation framework that decomposes the monitored feature space into a canonical component,expected to retain the dominant predictive information, and a residual component containing structurally peripheral signals. The segmentation is defined through domain informed criteria and sets up monitoring variables into functional groups reflecting operational mechanisms such as throughput,latency,pressure,network activity,and structural state. To evaluate the effectiveness of this decomposition, we adopt a predictive perspective in which expected predictive risk is used as an operational proxy for task-relevant information. Experimental results obtained through time-aware cross-validation show that the canonical space consistently achieves lower predictive risk than the residual space across multiple temporal configurations, indicating that the semantic segmentation concentrates the most relevant information for fault anticipation. In addition, the canonical segments exhibit significantly stronger intra-segment coherence than inter-segment dependence, and this structural organization remains stable after redundancy reduction. When compared with the full feature space and with a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) representation, the canonical space carries out comparable predictive performance and furthermore preserves the semantic meaning of the original variables. These findings suggest that semantic feature segmentation provides an interpretable and information-preserving decomposition of monitoring signals, enabling competitive predictive performance without sacrificing the operational interpretability required in predictive maintenance applications.

Analog RF Computing: A New Paradigm for Energy-Efficient Edge AI Over MU-MIMO Systems

Medium 2605.14331
Wentao Yu, Vincent W.S. Wong
arXiv PDF eess.SP
TL;DR：提出模拟 RF 计算新范式，通过无线信道直接执行矩阵向量乘法，实现边缘 AI 推理的极低能耗。
🎯研究动机

传统数字计算边缘推理能耗高，而模拟 RF 计算利用无线信号天然乘法特性可大幅降低能耗，但缺乏面向计算的物理层设计。

❓解决问题

如何在 MU-MIMO 无线系统中设计面向模拟 RF 计算的物理层，以同时控制计算精度和推理能耗。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出联合基站波束赋形与客户端缩放的低复杂度算法，在计算精度、发射功率和硬件约束下优化，支持均匀和混合精度推理。

📊实验结果

基于 3GPP 规范的仿真表明，模拟 RF 计算相比数字计算降低客户端能耗近两个数量级，混合精度推理能耗低于均匀精度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出模拟 RF 计算在 MU-MIMO 系统中的物理层设计框架，推导计算精度与能耗的可处理模型。
  • 开发低复杂度算法求解非凸优化问题，实现客户端和层特定的精度控制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅考虑 MU-MIMO 场景，未扩展到其他无线系统。
  • 未讨论模拟硬件非理想性（如噪声、非线性）的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Modern edge devices increasingly rely on neural networks for intelligent applications. However, conventional digital computing-based edge inference requires substantial memory and energy consumption. In analog radio frequency (RF) computing, a base station (BS) encodes the weights of the neural networks and broadcasts the RF waveforms to the clients. Each client reuses its passive mixer to multiply the received weight-encoded waveform with a locally generated input-encoded waveform. This enables wireless receivers to perform the matrix-vector multiplications (MVMs) that account for most of the computation burden in edge inference with ultra-low energy consumption. Unlike conventional downlink transmissions which are optimized for communications, analog RF computing requires a computing-centric physical layer that controls both the analog MVM accuracy and the energy consumption for inference. Motivated by this, in this paper, we propose a physical layer design framework for analog RF computing in MU-MIMO wireless systems. We derive tractable models for computing accuracy and energy consumption for inference, formulate a joint BS beamforming and client-side scaling problem subject to computing accuracy, transmit power, and hardware constraints, and develop a low-complexity algorithm to solve the non-convex problem. The proposed design provides client- and layer-specific accuracy control for both uniform- and mixed-precision inference. Simulations under 3GPP specifications show that analog RF computing can significantly reduce client-side energy consumption by nearly two orders of magnitude compared to digital computing, while mixed-precision inference requires even lower energy consumption than uniform-precision inference. Overall, these results establish analog RF computing over wireless networks as a promising paradigm for energy-efficient edge inference.

VMU-Diff: A Coarse-to-fine Multi-source Data Fusion Framework for Precipitation Nowcasting

Medium 2605.14597
Chunlei Shi, Hao Li, Yufeng Zhu, Boyu Liu, Yongchao Feng, Zengliang Zang, Hongbin Wang, Yanlan Yang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 VMU-Diff 框架，结合确定性模型与扩散模型，通过粗到精两阶段融合雷达与卫星数据实现降水临近预报。
🎯研究动机

降水临近预报对气象应用至关重要，但降水系统的混沌特性使得现有方法存在模糊或伪影问题，且计算效率低。

❓解决问题

现有单源雷达数据方法中，确定性模型因 MSE 收敛导致预测模糊，概率模型（如扩散模型）虽能生成细节但易产生伪影且计算低效。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出单确定性模型存在模糊问题，单概率模型存在伪影和计算低效问题。

🛠️主要方法

提出粗到精两阶段框架：粗阶段使用确定性模型（含时空注意力与 Vision Mamba 状态空间块）融合雷达与多波段卫星数据预测全局运动趋势；精阶段基于残差条件扩散模型，利用粗预测与真值提取时空残差特征，通过条件 Mamba 模块重建残差以生成精细细节。

📊实验结果

在江苏 SWAN 数据集上进行了实验，结果表明方法优于现有技术，尤其在短期预报中。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出粗到精多源数据融合框架，结合确定性模型与扩散模型的优势。
  • 引入 Vision Mamba 状态空间块实现多源数据融合与时空建模。
  • 在江苏 SWAN 数据集上验证了方法在短期预报中的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定区域数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 两阶段流程可能增加整体计算复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Precipitation nowcasting is a vital spatio-temporal prediction task for meteorological applications but faces challenges due to the chaotic property of precipitation systems. Existing methods predominantly rely on single-source radar data to build either deterministic or probabilistic models for extrapolation. However, the single deterministic model suffers from blurring due to MSE convergence. The single probabilistic model, typically represented by diffusion models, can generate fine details but suffers from spurious artifacts that compromise accuracy and computational inefficiency. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel coarse-to-fine Vision Mamba Unet and residual Diffusion (VMU-Diff) based precipitation nowcasting framework. It realizes precipitation nowcasting through a two-stage process, i.e., a deterministic model-based coarse stage to predict global motion trends and a probabilistic model-based fine stage to generate fine prediction details. In the coarse prediction stage, rather than single-source radar data, both radar and multi-band satellite data are taken as input. A spatial-temporal attention block and several Vision mamba state-space blocks realize multi-source data fusion, and predict the future echo global dynamics. The fine-grained stage is realized by a spatio-temporal refine generator based on residual conditional diffusion models. It first obtains spatio-temporal residual features based on coarse prediction and ground truth, and further reconstructs the residual via conditional Mamba state-space module. Experiments on Jiangsu SWAN datasets demonstrate the improvements of our method over state-of-the-art methods, particularly in short-term forecasts.

MambaRain: Multi-Scale Mamba-Attention Framework for 0-3 Hour Precipitation Nowcasting

Medium 2605.14606
Chunlei Shi, Cui Wu, Xiang Xu, Hao Li, Ni Fan, Xue Han, Yongchao Feng, Yufeng Zhu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 MambaRain 混合架构，结合 Mamba 的长时序建模与自注意力空间建模，实现 0-3 小时降水临近预报。
🎯研究动机

现有确定性方法在 0-2 小时短时预报后性能急剧下降，难以捕捉长程时空依赖，亟需能处理 0-3 小时扩展时段的精准预报方法。

❓解决问题

解决 0-3 小时降水临近预报中长程时空依赖建模困难及 90 分钟后性能退化的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出现有方法在 90 分钟后性能严重退化，主要源于难以从雷达观测中捕获长程时空依赖；混沌降水系统导致模糊伪影。

🛠️主要方法

提出多尺度编码器 - 解码器架构 MambaRain，核心是混合设计：Mamba 块利用选择性状态空间机制高效建模全局时间动态，自注意力模块显式捕获空间相关性；并引入频谱损失减少模糊伪影。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MambaRain 混合架构，首次将 Mamba 与自注意力协同用于降水临近预报，实现 0-3 小时有效预测。
  • 引入频谱损失函数，缓解混沌降水系统的模糊伪影，保留细粒度运动细节。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量雷达数据，泛化性待验证。
  • 混合架构计算复杂度可能高于纯 Mamba 或纯注意力方法。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate precipitation nowcasting over extended horizons (0-3 hours) is essential for disaster mitigation and operational decision-making, yet remains a critical challenge in the field. Existing deterministic approaches are predominantly constrained to shorter prediction windows (0-2 hours), exhibiting severe performance degradation beyond 90 minutes owing to their inherent difficulty in capturing long-range spatiotemporal dependencies from radar-derived observations. To address these fundamental limitations, we propose MambaRain, a novel multi-scale encoder-decoder architecture that synergistically integrates Mamba's linear-complexity long-range temporal modeling with self-attention mechanisms for explicit spatial correlation capture. The core innovation lies in a hybrid design paradigm wherein Mamba blocks leverage selective state space mechanisms to model global temporal dynamics across extended sequences with computational efficiency, while self-attention modules explicitly characterize spatial correlations within precipitation fields - a capability inherently absent in Mamba's sequential processing paradigm. This complementary synergy enables comprehensive spatiotemporal representation learning, effectively extending the viable forecasting horizon to 2-3 hours with substantial accuracy improvements. Furthermore, we introduce a spectral loss formulation to mitigate blurring artifacts characteristic of chaotic precipitation systems, thereby preserving fine-scale motion details critical for nowcasting accuracy. Experimental validation demonstrates that MambaRain substantially outperforms existing deterministic methodologies in 0-3 hour nowcasting tasks, with particularly pronounced performance gains in the challenging 2-3 hour prediction range.

Vision-Based Water Level and Flow Estimation

Medium 2605.14645
ZhiXin Sun
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一个融合视觉模型与统计建模的框架，利用物理先验和鲁棒滤波提升水位与流速估计精度。
🎯研究动机

传统水位流速传感方法存在成本高、维护难等问题，而纯视觉方法虽具可解释性和自动化优势，但仍面临环境敏感、精度有限和现场标定复杂等挑战。

❓解决问题

如何利用计算机视觉技术，在复杂环境下实现高精度、鲁棒的水位检测与流量估计。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

集成 SOTA 视觉模型与统计建模，结合物理先验和鲁棒滤波策略，提升水位检测与流量估计的准确性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个融合视觉模型与统计建模的集成框架，用于水位和流速估计。
  • 利用物理先验和鲁棒滤波策略，提高了估计精度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对环境光照、天气等条件敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未提及与其他方法的定量对比，实际性能提升幅度未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

With the rapid evolution of computer vision, vision-based methodologies for water level and river surface velocity estimation have reached significant maturity. Compared to traditional sensing, these techniques offer superior interpretability, automated data archiving, and enhanced system robustness. However, challenges such as environmental sensitivity, limited precision, and complex site calibration persist. This work proposes an integrated framework that synergizes state-of-the-art (SOTA) vision models with statistical modeling. By leveraging physical priors and robust filtering strategies, we improve the accuracy of water level detection and flow estimation. Code will be available at this https URL

Towards In-Depth Root Cause Localization for Microservices with Multi-Agent Recursion-of-Thought

Medium 2605.14866
Lingzhe Zhang, Tong Jia, Kangjin Wang, Chiming Duan, Minghua He, Rongqian Wang, Xi Peng, Meiling Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出多智能体递归思维框架 RCLAgent，通过并行推理和证据图合成提升微服务根因定位的准确性与效率。
🎯研究动机

微服务系统动态复杂，故障频发，现有方法（传统 ML/DL 可解释性差、迁移性弱；LLM 方法存在上下文爆炸和串行推理限制）难以实现高效准确的根因定位。

❓解决问题

解决 LLM-based 根因定位方法中上下文爆炸导致关键证据稀释、串行推理阻碍深度因果探索和推理效率低的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：1）传统方法可解释性和迁移性差；2）LLM 方法存在上下文爆炸和串行推理结构两大局限；3）人类 SRE 的实践表明需要并行和递归的推理方式。

🛠️主要方法

RCLAgent 框架：沿 trace 图将每个 span 分配给专用智能体，根据图拓扑递归并行组织智能体，通过合成根级诊断报告和全局证据图得到最终诊断。

📊实验结果

在多个公开基准上进行实验，RCLAgent 在定位精度和推理效率上一致优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多智能体递归思维框架 RCLAgent，实现并行推理以缓解上下文爆炸和串行推理限制
  • 在多个公开基准上验证了 RCLAgent 在定位精度和推理效率上均优于现有方法
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 trace 图的质量和完整性
  • 多智能体协作的通信开销可能成为瓶颈
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As modern microservice systems grow increasingly complex due to dynamic interactions and evolving runtime environments, they experience failures with rising frequency. Ensuring system reliability therefore critically depends on accurate root cause localization (RCL). While numerous traditional machine learning and deep learning approaches have been explored for this task, they often suffer from limited interpretability and poor transferability across deployments. More recently, large language model (LLM)-based methods have been proposed to address these issues. However, existing LLM-based approaches still face two fundamental limitations: context explosion, which dilutes critical evidence and degrades localization accuracy, and serial reasoning structures, which hinder deep causal exploration and impair inference efficiency. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive study of both how human SREs perform root cause localization in practice and why existing LLM-based methods fall short. Motivated by these findings, we introduce RCLAgent, an in-depth root cause localization framework for microservice systems that realizes multi-agent recursion-of-thought with parallel reasoning. RCLAgent decomposes the diagnostic process along the trace graph by assigning each span to a Dedicated Agent and organizing agents recursively and in parallel according to the graph topology, with the final diagnosis obtained by synthesizing the Root-Level Diagnosis Report and the Global Evidence Graph. Extensive experiments on multiple public benchmarks demonstrate that RCLAgent consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both localization accuracy and inference efficiency.

BiFedKD: Bidirectional Federated Knowledge Distillation Framework for Non-IID and Long-Tailed ECG Monitoring

Medium 2605.14886
Zixuan Shu, Tiancheng Cao, Hen-Wei Huang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出双向联邦知识蒸馏框架 BiFedKD，解决非独立同分布和长尾标签下的心电图监测性能退化问题。
🎯研究动机

IoMT 网络中的 ECG 监测受数据共享法规和隐私限制，联邦学习虽能保护隐私但高维模型更新传输开销大，联邦蒸馏虽能降低通信量但在非独立同分布和长尾标签分布下性能下降。

❓解决问题

非独立同分布和长尾标签分布下联邦蒸馏性能退化问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出联邦蒸馏在非独立同分布和长尾标签分布下性能会退化。

🛠️主要方法

提出双向联邦知识蒸馏框架 BiFedKD，采用聚合 - 蒸馏流水线结合温度缩放，产生稳定的全局蒸馏信号用于跨客户端对齐。

📊实验结果

在 MIT-BIH 心律失常数据集上进行实验，BiFedKD 相比基线提升准确率 3.52% 和 Macro-F1 9.93%，通信开销降低 40%，计算成本降低 71.7%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 BiFedKD 框架，通过聚合 - 蒸馏流水线和温度缩放解决非独立同分布和长尾标签问题。
  • 在 MIT-BIH 心律失常数据集上，BiFedKD 相比基线提升准确率 3.52% 和 Macro-F1 9.93%，同时通信开销降低 40%，计算成本降低 71.7%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步测试。
  • 未讨论温度缩放超参数的影响及调优策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Electrocardiogram (ECG) monitoring in Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) networks is constrained by strict data-sharing regulations and privacy concerns. Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative learning by keeping raw ECG data on devices, but frequent transmissions of high-dimensional model updates incur heavy per-round traffic over bandwidth-limited links. To alleviate this bottleneck, federated distillation (FD) replaces parameter exchange with logit-based knowledge transfer. However, the performance of FD often degrades under the non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) and long-tailed label distributions in ECG deployments. To address these challenges, we propose a bidirectional federated knowledge distillation (BiFedKD) framework that employs an aggregation-by-distillation pipeline with temperature scaling to produce a stable global distillation signal for cross-client alignment. Experiments on the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia dataset show that BiFedKD improves accuracy and Macro-F1 over the baseline by $3.52\%$ and $9.93\%$, respectively. Moreover, to reach the same Macro-F1, BiFedKD reduces communication overhead by $40\%$ and computation cost by $71.7\%$ compared with the baseline.

Not All Symbols Are Equal: Importance-Aware Constellation Design for Semantic Communication

Medium 2605.14940
Albert Shaju, Christo Kurisummoottil Thomas, Mayukh Roy Chowdhury
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出语义感知星座设计，通过强化学习动态选择传输子集，实现近 100% 语义保护概率。
🎯研究动机

现有语义通信系统将星座设计与语义编码解耦，导致关键符号与无关符号以相同速率暴露于信道错误，缺乏对任务相关信息的差异化保护。

❓解决问题

如何联合优化语义编码与物理层星座映射，使关键语义符号获得更高保护，提升目标导向传输效率。

🔎现象分析

标准 Gray 编码星座在语义重要性非均匀且存在共现统计时，在 SCI 加权 SSV 指标上严格次优。

🛠️主要方法

提出联合语义 - 物理层框架：VQ-VAE 提取离散潜在概念，语义关键性指标(SCI)评分，深度强化学习根据信道条件动态选择传输子集，语义感知 M-QAM 星座根据共现统计和 SCI 分配符号位置。

📊实验结果

在 MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、FSDD 数据集上，从 4-QAM 到 1024-QAM 调制阶数下，所提星座实现近 100% SPP，标准星座仅 50%；压缩比 21:1 时语义质量>0.9。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语义感知星座设计，联合优化语义编码与物理层映射
  • 引入语义符号脆弱性(SSV)和语义保护概率(SPP)量化关键符号暴露
  • 证明 Gray 编码星座在非均匀语义重要性下严格次优
  • 实现高压缩比(21:1)且语义质量>0.9，跨数据集泛化
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定任务和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证
  • 强化学习训练复杂度较高，实时性可能受限
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Semantic communication systems for goal-oriented transmission must protect task-relevant information not only through source compression but also via physical layer mapping. Existing approaches decouple constellation design and semantic encoding, exposing critical symbols to channel errors at the same rate as irrelevant ones. Contrary to this, in this paper, a joint semantic-physical layer framework is proposed, which is composed of a vector quantized-variational autoencoder that extracts discrete latent concepts, a semantic criticality indicator (SCI) that scores each concept by task relevance, and a deep reinforcement learning agent that dynamically selects the transmission subset based on instantaneous channel conditions. At the physical layer, a learned semantic-aware M -QAM constellation assigns symbol positions according to joint co-occurrence statistics and SCI scores, departing from the uniform spacing and Gray coding of standard M -QAM which minimizes average BER without regard for semantic content. We introduce a novel semantic symbol vulnerability (SSV) metric and a semantic protection probability (SPP) to quantify the exposure of task-critical symbols to decoding errors, and prove that any Gray-coded constellation is strictly suboptimal in SCI-Weighted SSV whenever the source exhibits non-uniform semantic importance and co-occurrence statistics. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed constellation achieves near 100% SPP across modulation orders from 4-QAM to 1024-QAM versus 50% for standard constellations at high spectral efficiency, a 21:1 compression ratio with semantic quality above 0.9, generalizing across MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and FSDD without modification.

MicroscopyMatching: Towards a Ready-to-use Framework for Microscopy Image Analysis in Diverse Conditions

Medium 2605.14980
Xiaofei Hui, Haoxuan Qu, Hossein Rahmani, Shuohong Wang, Jeff W. Lichtman, Jun Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出首个即用型显微镜图像分析框架 MicroscopyMatching，将多样分析任务统一为匹配问题，利用预训练潜在扩散模型实现跨场景可靠分析。
🎯研究动机

手动分析显微镜图像成本高、耗时长；现有深度学习方法因实际分析场景多样性（生物对象类型、处理协议、成像设备、分析任务等差异）而效果不佳，需要大量适配，实验室难以持续负担，导致生物医学研究进展受阻。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个可靠且广泛适用的显微镜图像分析工具，能应对不同分析设置下的关键任务（分割、追踪、计数）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将多样显微镜图像分析任务统一为匹配问题，利用预训练潜在扩散模型的鲁棒匹配能力来解决该问题。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个即用型显微镜图像分析框架 MicroscopyMatching，可在多样条件下可靠执行分割、追踪和计数任务。
  • 将不同分析任务重新表述为统一匹配问题，并利用预训练潜在扩散模型的匹配能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的泛化能力，在极端未见场景下性能未知。
  • 框架的实时性和计算资源需求未提及。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Analyzing microscopy images to extract biological object properties (e.g., their morphological organization, temporal dynamics, and population density) is fundamental to various biomedical research. Yet conducting this manually is costly and time-consuming. Though deep learning-based approaches have been explored to automate this process, the substantial diversity of microscopy analysis settings in practice (including variations of biological object types, sample processing protocols, imaging equipment, and analysis tasks, etc.) often renders them ineffective. As a result, these approaches typically require extensive adaptation for different settings, which, however, can impose burdens that are often practically unsustainable for laboratories, forcing biomedical researchers to still commonly rely on manual analysis, thereby severely bottlenecking the pace of biomedical research progress. This situation has created a pressing and long-standing need for a reliable and broadly applicable microscopy image analysis tool, yet such a tool is still missing. To address this gap, we present the first ready-to-use microscopy image analysis framework, MicroscopyMatching, that can reliably perform key analysis tasks (including segmentation, tracking, and counting) across diverse microscopy analysis settings. From a fundamentally different perspective, MicroscopyMatching reformulates diverse microscopy image analysis tasks as a unified matching problem, effectively handling this problem by exploiting the robust matching capability from pre-trained latent diffusion models.

Dywave: Event-Aligned Dynamic Tokenization for Heterogeneous IoT Sensing Signal

Medium 2605.14014
Tomoyoshi Kimura, Denizhan Kara, Jinyang Li, Hongjue Zhao, Yigong Hu, Yizhuo Chen, Xiaomin Ouyang, Shengzhong Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出事件对齐的动态分词框架 Dywave，利用小波分解压缩 IoT 传感信号，精度提升 12%，输入长度减少 75%。
🎯研究动机

IoT 系统持续收集非平稳、多尺度的异构传感信号，标准分词技术难以有效处理其内在的时间结构和物理事件，导致模型效率低、鲁棒性差。

❓解决问题

如何为 IoT 传感信号构建紧凑、事件对齐的输入表示，以提升下游任务精度和计算效率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

Dywave 框架：基于小波的层次分解，识别与语义事件对应的时间边界，自适应压缩冗余区间，同时保持时间连贯性。

📊实验结果

在五个真实 IoT 传感数据集上评估，涵盖活动识别、压力评估和附近物体检测，与 SOTA 方法对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出事件对齐的动态分词方法 Dywave，利用小波分解实现紧凑表示。
  • 在五个真实 IoT 数据集上，精度提升 12%，输入长度减少 75%，并展现出对域偏移和变长序列的鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖小波基的选择，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未讨论对极长序列或实时场景的适用性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Internet of Things (IoT) systems continuously collect heterogeneous sensing signals from ubiquitous sensors to support intelligent applications such as human activity analysis, emotion monitoring, and environmental perception. These signals are inherently non-stationary and multi-scale, posing unique challenges for standard tokenization techniques.
