This paper proposes Dywave, a dynamic tokenization framework for IoT sensing signals that constructs compact input representations aligned with intrinsic temporal structures and underlying physical events. Dywave leverages wavelet-based hierarchical decomposition, identifies meaningful temporal boundaries corresponding to underlying semantic events, and adaptively compresses redundant intervals while preserving temporal coherence. Extensive evaluations on five real-world IoT sensing datasets across activity recognition, stress assessment, and nearby object detection demonstrate that Dywave outperforms state-of-the-art methods by up to 12% in accuracy, while improving computational efficiency by reducing input token lengths by up to 75% across mainstream sequence models. Moreover, Dywave exhibits improved robustness to domain shifts and varying sequence lengths.

AttnGen: Attention-Guided Saliency Learning for Interpretable Genomic Sequence Classification

Medium 2605.14073
Rayhaneh Shabani Nia, Ali Karkehabadi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：AttnGen 通过注意力引导的掩码训练，在提升基因组序列分类精度的同时实现可解释性。
🎯研究动机

深度神经网络在基因组序列分类中表现优异，但难以将预测与有生物学意义的序列模式关联起来，缺乏可解释性。

❓解决问题

如何在训练过程中嵌入可解释性，使模型聚焦于信息丰富的序列区域，同时提升分类性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AttnGen 框架，利用注意力机制计算核苷酸重要性分数，在训练中逐步抑制低贡献位置，引导模型关注紧凑的信息区域。

📊实验结果

在 demo_human_or_worm 基准上，AttnGen 达到 96.73% 验证准确率，优于 CNN 基线的 95.83%；扰动分析显示移除高重要性核苷酸使准确率从 96.9% 降至接近随机水平。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种注意力引导的训练框架，将可解释性直接融入优化过程。
  • 在 demo_human_or_worm 基准上验证了方法在提升分类精度和训练稳定性方面的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 当前仅针对短基因组序列（200 核苷酸）进行验证。
  • 未在更复杂的长序列或真实生物数据集上测试。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep neural networks have achieved strong performance in genomic sequence classification; however, relating their predictions to biologically meaningful sequence patterns remains challenging. In this work, we present AttnGen, an attention-guided training framework that embeds interpretability directly into the optimization process. AttnGen computes nucleotide-level importance scores using an attention mechanism and progressively suppresses low-contribution positions during training. This encourages the model to focus its predictions on a compact set of informative regions while reducing reliance on noisy sequence elements. We evaluate AttnGen on the standardized demo_human_or_worm benchmark, a binary classification task over 200-nucleotide sequences. With moderate masking, AttnGen achieves a validation accuracy of 96.73%, outperforming a conventional CNN baseline with 95.83% accuracy, while also exhibiting faster convergence and improved training stability. To assess whether the learned importance scores reflect functionally relevant signal, we conduct perturbation-based analysis by removing high-saliency nucleotides. This causes accuracy to drop from 96.9% to near chance level on a 3,000-sequence evaluation set, indicating that the model relies on a relatively small subset of informative positions. Our analysis shows that masking 10--20% of positions provides the most favorable trade-off between predictive performance and interpretability. These results suggest that attention-guided masking not only improves classification performance but also reshapes how models distribute importance across sequence positions. Although this study focuses on short genomic sequences, the proposed approach may extend to more complex interpretable sequence modeling settings.

Meschers: Geometry Processing of Impossible Objects

Low 2605.14960
Ana Dodik, Isabella Yu, Kartik Chandra, Jonathan Ragan-Kelley, Joshua Tenenbaum, Vincent Sitzmann, Justin Solomon
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：提出 Meschers 网格表示，用于在离散外微分基础上对不可能物体进行几何处理。
🎯研究动机

不可能物体在视觉艺术和图形学中具有吸引力，但现有表示（切割或弯曲）会破坏局部几何或影响光照、距离计算等下游应用，缺乏一种既能忠实表示又能支持标准几何操作的计算机表示。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种计算机表示，能够在不破坏局部几何的前提下，表示和操作不可能物体，并支持平滑、重光照、距离计算等几何处理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Meschers 网格表示，基于离散外微分理论，使得不可能物体可以像普通网格一样进行几何处理，并支持逆渲染。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Meschers 网格表示，能够表示类似埃舍尔木刻中的不可能构造。
  • 基于离散外微分提供理论支撑，支持平滑、重光照、距离计算等几何操作。
  • 通过逆渲染示例展示了表示的应用，并与切割和弯曲表示进行了比较。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的不可能物体。
  • 实际计算效率或数值稳定性未在摘要中讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Impossible objects, geometric constructions that humans can perceive but that cannot exist in real life, have been a topic of intrigue in visual arts, perception, and graphics, yet no satisfying computer representation of such objects exists. Previous work embeds impossible objects in 3D, cutting them or twisting/bending them in the depth axis. Cutting an impossible object changes its local geometry at the cut, which can hamper downstream graphics applications, such as smoothing, while bending makes it difficult to relight the object. Both of these can invalidate geometry operations, such as distance computation. As an alternative, we introduce Meschers, meshes capable of representing impossible constructions akin to those found in M.C. Escher's woodcuts. Our representation has a theoretical foundation in discrete exterior calculus and supports the use-cases above, as we demonstrate in a number of example applications. Moreover, because we can do discrete geometry processing on our representation, we can inverse-render impossible objects. We also compare our representation to cut and bend representations of impossible objects.

遥感与科学图像 7 篇

GeoVista: Visually Grounded Active Perception for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Understanding

High 2605.14475
Jiashun Zhu, Ronghao Fu, Jiasen Hu, Nachuan Xing, Xu Na, Xiao Yang, Zhiwen Lin, Weipeng Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：GeoVista 通过全局规划与分支验证实现超高分遥感图像的主动感知，在多个基准上达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有遥感视觉 - 语言模型在超高分图像中采用单路径探索（单次聚焦或单序列轨迹），容易丢失全局上下文、遗漏分散区域或重复计数相同证据，难以高效定位稀疏微小的视觉证据。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种规划驱动的主动感知框架，使模型能够全局规划、分支验证并去重聚合证据，从而准确理解超高分遥感图像。

🔎现象分析

单路径探索策略在超高分遥感场景中会导致全局上下文丢失、区域遗漏和证据重复计数。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GeoVista 框架，包含：1) 全局探索计划构建；2) 分支局部验证多个候选区域；3) 显式证据状态用于跨区域聚合与去重。引入 APEX-GRO 语料库将任务统一为 Global-Region-Object 交互推理，设计 Observe-Plan-Track 机制，并使用 GRPO 策略以逐步奖励对齐模型。

📊实验结果

在 RSHR-Bench、XLRS-Bench 和 LRS-VQA 三个基准上评估，GeoVista 达到 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出规划驱动的主动感知框架 GeoVista，实现全局规划与分支验证的遥感图像理解。
  • 构建 APEX-GRO 冷启动监督轨迹语料库，统一超高分遥感任务为 Global-Region-Object 交互推理。
  • 设计 Observe-Plan-Track 机制与 GRPO 对齐策略，在多个基准上取得 SOTA 性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量轨迹语料库 APEX-GRO 的构建，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 分支验证的计算开销可能较大，实时性有待评估。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Interpreting ultra-high-resolution (UHR) remote sensing images requires models to search for sparse and tiny visual evidence across large-scale scenes. Existing remote sensing vision-language models can inspect local regions with zooming and cropping tools, but most exploration strategies follow either a one-shot focus or a single sequential trajectory. Such single-path exploration can lose global context, leave scattered regions unvisited, and revisit or count the same evidence multiple times. To this end, we propose GeoVista, a planning-driven active perception framework for UHR remote sensing interpretation. Instead of committing to one zooming path, GeoVista first builds a global exploration plan, then verifies multiple candidate regions through branch-wise local inspection, while maintaining an explicit evidence state for cross-region aggregation and de-duplication. To enable this behavior, we introduce APEX-GRO, a cold-start supervised trajectory corpus that reformulates diverse UHR tasks as Global-Region-Object interactive reasoning processes with a unified, scale-invariant spatial representation. We further design an Observe-Plan-Track mechanism for global observation, adaptive region inspection, and evidence tracking, and align the model with a GRPO-based strategy using step-wise rewards for planning, localization, and final answer correctness. Experiments on RSHR-Bench, XLRS-Bench, and LRS-VQA show that GeoVista achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code and dataset are available at this https URL

Implicit spatial-frequency fusion of hyperspectral and lidar data via kolmogorov-arnold networks

Medium 2605.14239
Zekun Long, Judy X. Yang, Jing Wang, Ali Zia, Guanyiman Fu, Jun Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 IFGNet，利用 KAN 网络和 LiDAR 引导的隐式空间 - 频率融合提升高光谱图像分类性能。
🎯研究动机

高光谱图像分类在复杂场景中面临光谱模糊、空间异质性以及材料属性与几何结构强耦合等挑战，现有基于 CNN 或 MLP 的融合方法难以建模 LiDAR 数据的结构不连续性、HSI 的精细光谱特征及其交互。

❓解决问题

如何有效融合高光谱和 LiDAR 数据，在空间和频率域中利用 LiDAR 引导实现几何感知的隐式聚合。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出隐式频率 - 几何融合网络（IFGNet），使用 KAN 网络（可学习样条函数）自适应捕获 HSI 与 LiDAR 特征间的非线性关系，并引入 LiDAR 引导的隐式聚合模块在空间和频率域增强几何感知表示。

📊实验结果

在 Houston 2013 和 MUUFL 基准上，IFGNet 在总体精度、平均精度和 Cohen's Kappa 上持续优于现有融合方法，且架构高效。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 KAN 网络应用于 HSI-LiDAR 融合分类，利用可学习样条函数建模非线性交互。
  • 提出 LiDAR 引导的隐式空间 - 频率聚合模块，同时捕获几何结构和全局模式。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定数据集和传感器配置，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • KAN 网络的计算开销和训练稳定性未在摘要中讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is challenging in complex scenes due to spectral ambiguity, spatial heterogeneity, and the strong coupling between material properties and geometric structures. Although LiDAR provides complementary elevation information, most HSI-LiDAR fusion methods rely on CNNs or MLPs with fixed activation functions and linear weights. These methods struggle to model structural discontinuities in LiDAR data, intricate spectral features of HSI, and their interactions. In addition, fusion of the two modalities in both spatial and frequency domains with LiDAR guidance remains underexplored. To address these issues, we propose the Implicit Frequency-Geometry Fusion Network (IFGNet), which leverages Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) with learnable spline-based functions to adaptively capture highly nonlinear relationships between hyperspectral and LiDAR features. Furthermore, IFGNet introduces a LiDAR-guided implicit aggregation module in both spatial and frequency domains, enhancing geometry-aware spatial representations while capturing global structural patterns. Experiments on the Houston 2013 and MUUFL benchmarks demonstrate that IFGNet consistently outperforms existing fusion methods in overall accuracy, average accuracy, and Cohen's Kappa, while maintaining an efficient architecture.

D2-CDIG: Controlled Diffusion Remote Sensing Image Generation with Dual Priors of DEM and Cloud-Fog

Medium 2605.14326
Zuopeng Zhao, Ying Liu, Kanyaphakphachsorn Pharksuwan, Su Luo, Xiaoyu Li, Maocai Ning
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 D2-CDIG 框架，利用 DEM 和云雾双先验控制扩散模型生成高保真遥感图像。
🎯研究动机

现有可控遥感图像生成方法依赖分割或边缘检测等传统技术，未充分利用地形或大气条件，导致复杂地形和大气现象下生成图像缺乏准确性和自然性。

❓解决问题

如何利用地形（DEM）和大气（云雾）双先验知识，精确控制遥感图像中的地面特征和大气现象，提升生成图像的质量、细节丰富度和真实感。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 D2-CDIG 框架，集成扩散模型与双先验控制机制：通过地面和大气分支独立控制地形与大气生成过程，引入云雾滑块灵活调整云雾厚度和分布，并在训练中分层注入控制信号确保图像无缝过渡。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出融合 DEM 和云雾双先验的遥感图像生成框架，实现地形和大气现象的精确控制。
  • 设计地面与大气分支解耦生成及云雾滑块机制，提升生成图像的灵活性和真实感。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量 DEM 和云雾先验数据，数据获取成本高。
  • 云雾滑块调节范围有限，极端天气条件生成效果可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Remote sensing image generation provides a reliable data foundation for remote sensing large models and downstream tasks. However, existing controllable remote sensing image generation methods typically rely on traditional techniques such as segmentation and edge detection, which do not fully leverage terrain or atmospheric conditions. As a result, the generated images often lack accuracy and naturalness when dealing with complex terrains and atmospheric phenomena. In this paper, we propose a novel remote sensing image generation framework, D2-CDIG, which integrates diffusion models with a dual-prior control mechanism. By incorporating both Digital Elevation Model (DEM) and cloud-fog information as dual prior knowledge, D2-CDIG precisely controls ground features and atmospheric phenomena within the generated images. Specifically, D2-CDIG decouples the terrain and atmospheric generation processes through independent control of ground and atmospheric branches. Additionally, a refined cloud-fog slider is introduced to flexibly adjust cloud thickness and distribution. During training, ground and atmospheric control signals are injected in layers to ensure a seamless transition within the images. Compared to traditional methods based on segmentation or edge detection, D2-CDIG shows significant improvements in image quality, detail richness, and realism. D2-CDIG offers a flexible and precise solution for remote sensing image generation, providing high-quality data for training large remote sensing models and downstream tasks.

AnyBand-Diff: A Unified Remote Sensing Image Generation and Band Repair Framework with Spectral Priors

Medium 2605.14341
Zuopeng Zhao, Ying Liu, Xiaoyu Li, Su Luo, Lu Li, Wenwen Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：AnyBand-Diff 提出一种光谱先验引导的扩散框架，用于遥感图像生成与波段修复，解决光谱失真问题。
🎯研究动机

现有扩散模型直接应用于遥感图像时忽略物理规律，导致光谱失真和辐射不一致，限制了生成数据的科学用途。

❓解决问题

如何生成物理上合理的遥感图像，并实现从任意波段子集恢复完整光谱信息。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

设计掩码条件扩散主干与双随机掩码策略，结合物理引导采样和多尺度物理损失，利用可微物理模型梯度引导去噪轨迹。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AnyBand-Diff，一种光谱先验引导的扩散框架，用于遥感图像生成与波段修复。
  • 设计双随机掩码策略和物理引导采样机制，确保辐射保真度。
  • 引入多尺度物理损失，在像素、区域和全局层面施加联合约束。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖物理模型的准确性和可微性。
  • 双随机掩码策略可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing diffusion models have made significant progress in generating realistic images. However, their direct adaptation to remote sensing imagery often disregards intrinsic physical laws. This oversight frequently leads to spectral distortion and radiometric inconsistency, severely limiting the scientific utility of generated data. To address this issue, this paper introduces AnyBand-Diff, a novel spectral-prior-guided diffusion framework tailored for robust spectral reconstruction. Specifically, we design a Masked Conditional Diffusion backbone integrated with a dual stochastic masking strategy, empowering the model to recover complete spectral information from arbitrary band subsets. Subsequently, to ensure radiometric fidelity, a Physics-Guided Sampling mechanism is proposed, leveraging gradients from a differentiable physical model to explicitly steer the denoising trajectory toward the manifold of physically plausible solutions. Furthermore, a Multi-Scale Physical Loss is formulated to enforce rigorous constraints across pixel, region, and global levels in a joint manner. Extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of AnyBand-Diff in generating reliable imagery and achieving accurate spectral reconstruction, contributing to the advancement of physics-aware generative methods for Earth observation.

ArcGate: Adaptive Arctangent Gated Activation

Medium 2605.14518
Avik Bhattacharya, Siddhant Dnyanesh Gole, Subhasis Chaudhuri, Alejandro C. Frery, Biplab Banerjee
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出自适应反正切门控激活函数 ArcGate，通过每层七个可学习参数实现非线性形状自适应，在遥感图像分类中优于 ReLU/GELU/SiLU，并在噪声环境下保持鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

传统固定形状激活函数（如 ReLU、GELU、SiLU）无法根据数据分布和特征层级自适应调整非线性，限制了深度网络的表达能力和鲁棒性，尤其在遥感等噪声敏感任务中表现不足。

❓解决问题

设计一种可学习的激活函数，使其能够根据每层特征层次和数据分布自动优化非线性形状，提升模型性能和对噪声的鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

实验发现 ArcGate 在深层网络中学习到的门控强度增加，表明模型通过增强信号传播来适应深度依赖的功能演化；在噪声环境下，ArcGate 相比 ReLU 保持显著性能优势（中等高斯噪声下领先 26.65%）。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ArcGate 激活函数，通过三层非线性变换（线性缩放、反正切变换、门控调制）生成灵活的形状，每层使用七个可学习参数，网络可自主优化非线性。

📊实验结果

在 PatternNet、UC Merced Land Use 和 13 波段 EuroSAT MSI 三个遥感数据集上，使用 ResNet-50 和 ViT-B/16 架构进行图像分类实验，并与 ReLU、GELU、SiLU 等基线比较。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ArcGate，一种具有每层七个可学习参数的自适应激活函数，能生成多种非线性形状。
  • 在三个遥感基准数据集上，ArcGate 在 ResNet-50 和 ViT-B/16 上均超越标准基线，PatternNet 上达到 99.67% 准确率。
  • 揭示 ArcGate 在噪声环境下的强鲁棒性（中等高斯噪声下领先 ReLU 26.65%），并发现深层门控强度增强的深度依赖演化规律。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在高分辨率遥感图像上验证，未在自然图像或更大规模数据集上测试。
  • 每层七个额外参数可能增加模型复杂度和过拟合风险，尤其在小型数据集上。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Activation functions are central to deep networks, influencing non-linearity, feature learning, convergence, and robustness. This paper proposes the Adaptive Arctangent Gated Activation (ArcGate) function, a flexible formulation that generates a broad spectrum of activation shapes via a three-stage non-linear transformation. Unlike conventional fixed-shape activations such as ReLU, GELU, or SiLU, ArcGate uses seven learnable parameters per layer, allowing the neural network to autonomously optimize its non-linearity to the specific requirements of the feature hierarchy and data distribution. We evaluate ArcGate using ResNet-50 and Vision Transformer (ViT-B/16) architectures on three widely used remote sensing benchmarks: PatternNet, UC Merced Land Use, and the 13-band EuroSAT MSI multispectral dataset. Experimental results show that ArcGate consistently outperforms standard baselines, achieving a peak overall accuracy of 99.67% on PatternNet. Most notably, ArcGate exhibits superior structural resilience in noisy environments, maintaining a 26.65% performance lead over ReLU under moderate Gaussian noise (standard deviation 0.1). Analysis of the learned parameters reveals a depth-dependent functional evolution, where the model increases gating strength in deeper layers to enhance signal propagation. These findings suggest that ArcGate is a robust and adaptive general node activation function for high-resolution earth observation tasks.

HiSem: Hierarchical Semantic Disentangling for Remote Sensing Image Change Captioning

Medium 2605.15024
Man Wang, Chenyang Liu, Wenjun Li, Feng Ni, Bing Jia, Baoqi Huang, Riting Xia, Zhenwei Shi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出层次化语义解耦网络 HiSem，通过双向差分注意力调制和层次化自适应语义解耦模块，显式分离遥感图像变化描述中的粗粒度与细粒度语义，在 WHU-CDC 数据集上 BLEU-4 提升 7.52%。
🎯研究动机

现有遥感图像变化描述方法将变化与未变化图像对统一建模，忽略了二者语义粒度的本质差异，导致粗粒度变化判断与细粒度语义描述相互纠缠，限制了模型性能。

❓解决问题

解决遥感图像变化描述中变化与未变化图像对语义粒度不一致导致的语义纠缠问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出变化与未变化图像对具有内在不同的语义粒度，现有统一建模策略导致语义纠缠，但未提供具体失败模式分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HiSem 网络，包含双向差分注意力调制（BDAM）模块增强跨时间交互并放大真实变化信号，以及层次化自适应语义解耦（HASD）模块，通过粗粒度图像级路由区分变化 / 未变化对，细粒度 token 级 MoE 建模变化样本的多样语义。

📊实验结果

在两个基准数据集上实验，HiSem 在 WHU-CDC 数据集上 BLEU-4 提升 7.52%，超越先前方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出层次化语义解耦框架，显式对齐模型设计与双时相场景的语义异质性。
  • 设计 BDAM 模块利用差异感知注意力增强跨时间交互，抑制无关变化。
  • 设计 HASD 模块实现粗粒度图像级路由与细粒度 token 级 MoE 的联合解耦。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定遥感数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 层次化路由可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Remote sensing image change captioning (RSICC) aims to achieve high-level semantic understanding of genuine changes occurring between bi-temporal images. Despite notable progress, existing methods are fundamentally limited by a shared modeling assumption: changed and unchanged image pairs, which have intrinsically different semantic granularities, are processed under a unified modeling strategy. This modeling inconsistency leads to semantic entanglement between coarse-grained change existence judgment and fine-grained semantic this http URL address the above limitation, we propose a novel hierarchical semantic disentangling network (HiSem) that explicitly disentangles semantic representations of different granularities. Specifically, we first introduce the Bidirectional Differential Attention Modulation (BDAM) module that leverages discrepancy-aware attention to enhance cross-temporal interactions, thereby amplifying true change signals while suppressing irrelevant variations. Building upon this, we design a Hierarchical Adaptive Semantic Disentanglement (HASD) module that performs adaptive routing at two hierarchical levels: a coarse-grained image-level routing mechanism distinguishes changed and unchanged image pairs, while a fine-grained token-level Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) block models diverse and heterogeneous change semantics for changed samples. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that HiSem outperfoms previous methods, achieving a significant improvement of +7.52\% BLEU-4 on the WHU-CDC dataset. More importantly, our approach provides a structured perspective for RSICC by explicitly aligning model design with the intrinsic semantic heterogeneity of bi-temporal scenes. The code will be available at this https URL

CoralLite: μCT Reconstruction of Coral Colonies from Individual Corallites

Medium 2605.15093
Jess Jones, Leonardo Bertini, Kenneth Johnson, Erica Hendy, Tilo Burghardt
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 CoralLite 数据集和混合 V-Trans-UNet 架构，首次用深度学习从μCT 扫描中重建珊瑚个体珊瑚杯的 3D 模型。
🎯研究动机

珊瑚骨骼记录了个体生命史，但追踪每个珊瑚虫周围的珊瑚杯结构对理解珊瑚生长至关重要，现有方法缺乏自动化工具。

❓解决问题

从μCT 扫描中分割并重建珊瑚群体中每个珊瑚杯的 3D 模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出混合 V-Trans-UNet 架构，在弱标注数据上预训练，然后在完全标注的切片上进行拓扑感知微调。

📊实验结果

在相同群体切片上测试，拓扑准确率 0.94，平均 Dice 0.77；在生物学无关标本上平均 Dice 0.63。摘要未提供更多实验细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发布 CoralLite 数据集，包含 697 张μCT 切片、37 个部分或完整切片标注及网络权重和源代码。
  • 提出首个用于珊瑚杯分割的深度学习基线，在相同群体上达到 0.94 拓扑准确率和 0.77 平均 Dice 分数。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验规模和上下文有限。
  • 跨标本泛化性能较低（Dice 0.63）。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The life history of an individual coral is archived within the accreting skeleton of the colony. While reef-forming coral colonies (e.g. massive \emph{Porites} sp.) may live for hundreds of years and deposit calcareous structures many metres in height and width, their living tissue is a thin outer surface layer comprised of asexually-dividing polyps that only survive a few years. To understand the rate and timing of polyp division and the consequences for colony skeletal growth, scientists need to track the skeletal corallite deposited around each polyp. Here we propose CoralLite, an annotated {\mu}CT scan dataset of entire calcareous skeletons and an associated, first corallite deep learning reconstruction baseline. CoralLite combines fully quantified volumetric segmentations with cross-slice linking for visualisations of 3D models for each corallite up to colony scale. For segmentation, we propose and evaluate in detail a hybrid V-Trans-UNet architecture applicable to segmenting tiled {\mu}CT virtual slabs of \emph{Porites} sp. colonies. The model is pre-trained on weakly annotated data and topology-aware fine-tuned using fully annotated slice sections with 8k+ manual corallite region annotations. On unseen slices of the same colony, the resulting model reaches 0.94 topological accuracy at mean Dice scores of 0.77 on the same colony and projection axis, and 0.63 mean Dice scores on a different, biologically unrelated specimen. Whilst our experiments are limited in scale and context, our results show for the first time that visual machine learning can effectively support full 3D individual corallite modelling from {\mu}CT scans of coral skeletons alone. For reproducibility and as a baseline for future research we publish our full dataset of 697 {\mu}CT slices, 37 partial or full slice annotations, and all network weights and source code with this paper.

语音与音频 4 篇

SpeakerLLM: A Speaker-Specialized Audio-LLM for Speaker Understanding and Verification Reasoning

High 2605.15044
KiHyun Nam, Jungwoo Heo, Siu Bae, Ha-Jin Yu, Joon Son Chung
arXiv PDF cs.SD
TL;DR：SpeakerLLM 将说话人理解与验证推理统一到自然语言接口中，通过分层说话人分词器和结构化决策追踪提升可解释性。
🎯研究动机

现有说话人验证系统仅提供标量分数而缺乏语言证据，当前音频 -LLM 和说话人感知语言模型在组织说话人信息时能力有限，难以支持用户授权、个性化和上下文感知交互。

❓解决问题

如何让音频大语言模型具备说话人特定理解能力，包括单句说话人画像、录音条件理解、句对说话人比较以及基于证据的验证推理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SpeakerLLM 框架，包含分层说话人分词器（捕获多粒度说话人证据：句级嵌入总结身份和画像线索，帧级特征保留细粒度声学描述）和验证推理目标与决策组合策略（将画像级证据与最终同 / 不同决策分离，并将录音条件、画像证据和决策组织成结构化追踪）。

📊实验结果

实验表明 SpeakerLLM-Base 在说话人画像和录音条件理解上优于通用音频 -LLM，SpeakerLLM-VR 保持强生成判决准确性并产生基于监督验证推理模式的决策追踪。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SpeakerLLM，一个将说话人理解与验证推理统一到自然语言接口的框架。
  • 设计分层说话人分词器，同时捕获句级和帧级说话人证据。
  • 构建验证推理目标和决策组合策略，生成结构化决策追踪。
  • 将发布元数据增强的监督数据集和目标构建代码。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定数据集和任务设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 分层分词器的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As audio-first agents become increasingly common in physical AI, conversational robots, and screenless wearables, audio large language models (audio-LLMs) must integrate speaker-specific understanding to support user authorization, personalization, and context-aware interaction. This requires modeling who is speaking, how the voice sounds, and how recording conditions affect speaker cues. Conventional speaker verification systems provide strong scalar scores but little linguistic evidence, while current audio-LLMs and speaker-aware language models have limited ability to organize speaker information beyond binary labels or descriptive profiles. We present SpeakerLLM, a speaker-specialized audio-LLM framework that unifies single-utterance speaker profiling, recording-condition understanding, utterance-pair speaker comparison, and evidence-organized verification reasoning within a natural-language interface. We construct verification-reasoning targets and a decision-composition policy that separate profile-level evidence from the final same-or-different decision and organize recording condition, profile evidence, and the decision into a structured trace. At its core, SpeakerLLM uses a hierarchical speaker tokenizer designed to capture multiple granularities of speaker evidence. Utterance-level speaker embeddings summarize identity and profile-level cues, whereas frame-level speaker features preserve fine-grained acoustic descriptors. Experiments show that SpeakerLLM-Base improves speaker-profile and recording-condition understanding over general audio-LLMs, while SpeakerLLM-VR preserves strong generated-verdict accuracy and produces decision traces grounded in the supervised verification reasoning schema. We will release the metadata-enriched supervision dataset and target-construction code for reproducibility.

AudioMosaic: Contrastive Masked Audio Representation Learning

Medium 2605.14231
Hanxun Huang, Qizhou Wang, Xingjun Ma, Cihang Xie, Christopher Leckie, Sarah Erfani
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出对比掩码音频表征学习框架 AudioMosaic，通过结构化时频掩码构建正样本对，实现高效大规模对比预训练。
🎯研究动机

音频自监督学习主要依赖生成式重建目标，对比方法因数据增强设计困难和批量大小需求大而探索不足。

❓解决问题

如何设计高效的对比学习框架用于通用音频表征学习，克服生成式方法在判别性表征上的不足。

🔎现象分析

生成式方法学习到的表征判别性不足，对比方法受限于数据增强和内存需求。

🛠️主要方法

在预训练时对声谱图块应用结构化时频掩码构建正样本对，降低内存使用并支持大批量训练。

📊实验结果

在多个标准音频基准上进行了线性探测和微调实验，达到最先进性能；集成到音频 - 语言模型中提升音频 - 语言任务表现。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AudioMosaic，一种基于对比学习的音频编码器，通过结构化时频掩码构建正样本对。
  • 在多个音频基准上达到最先进性能，并提升音频 - 语言模型在下游任务上的表现。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对特定音频类型或噪声环境敏感。
  • 对比学习仍需较大批量，可能对资源有限场景不友好。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Audio self-supervised learning (SSL) aims to learn general-purpose representations from large-scale unlabeled audio data. While recent advances have been driven mainly by generative reconstruction objectives, contrastive approaches remain less explored, partly due to the difficulty of designing effective audio augmentations and the large batch sizes required for contrastive pre-training. We introduce \textbf{AudioMosaic}, a contrastive learning-based audio encoder for general audio understanding. During pre-training, AudioMosaic constructs positive pairs by applying structured time-frequency masking to spectrogram patches, which reduces memory usage and enables efficient large-batch training. Compared with generative approaches, the AudioMosaic encoder learns more discriminative utterance-level representations that demonstrate strong transferability across datasets, domains, and acoustic conditions. Extensive experiments show that AudioMosaic achieves state-of-the-art performance on several standard audio benchmarks under both linear probing and fine-tuning. We further show that integrating the pretrained AudioMosaic encoder into audio-language models improves performance on audio-language tasks. The code is publicly available in our \href{ this https URL }{GitHub repository}.

Break-the-Beat! Controllable MIDI-to-Drum Audio Synthesis

Medium 2605.14555
Shuyang Cui, Zhi Zhong, Qiyu Wu, Zachary Novack, Woosung Choi, Keisuke Toyama, Kin Wai Cheuk, Junghyun Koo et al.
arXiv PDF cs.SD
TL;DR：通过微调预训练文本到音频模型，实现可控的 MIDI 到鼓音频合成，支持参考音色和节奏对齐。
🎯研究动机

数字音乐制作中创建鼓循环音频的传统方法（如单次采样或重采样）需要大量人工努力，而现有生成模型虽能生成高保真音频但缺乏对鼓合成所需的精细控制，且现有符号到音频研究多聚焦于单音调乐器，未解决多音打击乐鼓合成问题。

❓解决问题

如何实现从鼓 MIDI 到高质量鼓音频的可控合成，同时支持参考音频的音色迁移和精确节奏对齐。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

通过微调预训练的文本到音频模型，引入内容编码器和混合条件机制，并构建配对的目标 - 参考鼓音频数据集。

📊实验结果

实验表明模型能生成高质量鼓音频，遵循高分辨率鼓 MIDI，在音频质量、节奏对齐和节拍连续性指标上表现强劲。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Break-the-Beat!模型，实现从鼓 MIDI 到鼓音频的可控合成，支持参考音色和节奏对齐。
  • 构建了配对的鼓音频数据集，用于训练内容编码器和混合条件机制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练文本到音频模型的质量和泛化能力。
  • 数据集规模或多样性可能限制对罕见鼓音色的合成效果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Current methods for creating drum loop audio in digital music production, such as using one-shot samples or resampling, often demand non-trivial efforts of creators. While recent generative models achieve high fidelity and adhere to text, they lack the specific control needed for such a task. Existing symbolic-to-audio research often focuses on single, tonal instruments, leaving the challenge of polyphonic, percussive drum synthesis unaddressed. We address this gap by introducing ``Break-the-Beat!,'' a model capable of rendering a drum MIDI with the timbre of a reference audio. It is built by fine-tuning a pre-trained text-to-audio model with our proposed content encoder and a effective hybrid conditioning mechanism. To enable this, we construct a new dataset of paired target-reference drum audio from existing drum audio datasets. Experiments demonstrate that our model generates high-quality drum audio that follows high-resolution drum MIDI, achieving strong performance across metrics of audio quality, rhythmic alignment, and beat continuity. This offer producers a new, controllable tool for creative production. Demo page: this https URL

Masked Autoencoders with Limited Data: Does It Work? A Fine-Grained Bioacoustics Case Study

Medium 2605.14031
Wuao Liu, Mustafa Chasmai, Subhransu Maji, Grant Van Horn
arXiv PDF cs.SD
TL;DR：在细粒度生物声学数据有限时，MAE 预训练效果受限于数据规模，领域特定预训练收益甚微。
🎯研究动机

生物声学识别需要细粒度音频理解，但大规模数据仓库（如 iNaturalist）标注弱，监督学习困难；自监督学习（如 MAE）在大型音频语料库上表现良好，但在数据有限的生物声学场景中效果未知。

❓解决问题

探究掩码自编码器（MAE）在有限数据下的细粒度生物声学分类中是否有效，以及预训练数据规模、领域特异性、数据筛选和迁移策略的影响。

🔎现象分析

与大规模音频基准的观察相反，发现：(1) 在领域特定数据上额外进行掩码重建预训练收益有限，甚至可能降低性能；(2) 当整体数据规模有限时，选择性数据筛选优势可忽略。

🛠️主要方法

系统研究 MAE 预训练在 iNatSounds 物种分类上的表现，分析预训练数据规模、领域特异性、数据筛选和迁移策略的影响。

📊实验结果

在 iNatSounds 数据集上进行物种分类实验，对比不同预训练数据规模、领域特异性、数据筛选和迁移策略。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了在中等规模细粒度生物声学场景中，预训练规模主导目标设计，领域特定预训练收益有限。
  • 为有限监督下模型选择提供了实用指导，明确了 MAE 预训练有效的条件。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对生物声学领域，结论可能不适用于其他细粒度音频任务。
  • 未探索更大规模领域特定数据或更复杂的筛选策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Bioacoustic recognition requires fine-grained acoustic understanding to distinguish similar-sounding species. However, many large-scale data repositories such as iNaturalist are weakly annotated, often with only a single positive species label per recording, making supervised learning particularly challenging. Inspired by advances in computer vision, recent approaches have shifted toward self-supervised learning to capture the underlying structure of audio without relying on exhaustive annotations. In particular, masked autoencoders (MAE) have shown strong transferability on massive audio corpora, yet their effectiveness in more modest bioacoustic settings remains underexplored. In this work, we conduct a systematic study of MAE pretraining for species classification on iNatSounds, analyzing the impacts of pretraining data scale, domain specificity, data curation, and transfer strategies. Consistent with prior work, we find that models pretrained on diverse general audio data achieve the best transfer performance on iNatSounds. Contrary to observations from large-scale audio benchmarks, we find that (1) additional masked reconstruction pretraining on domain-specific data provides limited benefits and may even degrade performance relative to off-the-shelf models, and (2) selective data filtering offers a negligible advantage when the overall data scale is limited. Our results indicate that, in moderate-sized fine-grained bioacoustic settings, pretraining scale dominates objective design. These findings further clarify when MAE-based pretraining is effective and provide practical guidance for model selection under limited supervision.

视频理解 3 篇

KVPO: ODE-Native GRPO for Autoregressive Video Alignment via KV Semantic Exploration

High 2605.14278
Ruicheng Zhang, Kaixi Cong, Jun Zhou, Zhizhou Zhong, Zunnan Xu, Shuiyang Mao, Wei Liu, Xiu Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 ODE-native GRPO 框架 KVPO，通过 KV 缓存语义探索实现自回归视频生成器的偏好对齐。
🎯研究动机

现有强化学习方法依赖噪声探索和 SDE 代理策略，与蒸馏 AR 模型的确定性 ODE 动力学不匹配，且倾向于扰动低级外观而非高级语义故事线，难以保证长程连贯性。

❓解决问题

如何实现自回归视频生成器与人类偏好的有效对齐，同时保持 ODE 原生一致性并探索语义级多样性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 KVPO 框架，包含因果语义探索范式（通过随机路由历史 KV 条目构建语义多样生成分支）和基于轨迹速度能量（TVE）的速度场代理策略，实现与 ODE 一致的奖励加权对比学习。

📊实验结果

在多个蒸馏 AR 视频生成器上实验，在单提示短视频和多提示长视频设置中均取得视觉质量、运动质量和文本 - 视频对齐的一致提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ODE-native GRPO 框架 KVPO，首次将 KV 缓存语义探索用于视频对齐。
  • 设计因果语义探索范式，通过随机路由历史 KV 条目实现语义级多样性。
  • 引入基于轨迹速度能量（TVE）的速度场代理策略，确保与 ODE 动力学一致。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定蒸馏 AR 模型架构。
  • 长视频场景下的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Aligning streaming autoregressive (AR) video generators with human preferences is challenging. Existing reinforcement learning methods predominantly rely on noise-based exploration and SDE-based surrogate policies that are mismatched to the deterministic ODE dynamics of distilled AR models, and tend to perturb low-level appearance rather than the high-level semantic storyline progression critical for long-horizon coherence. To address these limitations, we present KVPO, an ODE-native online Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) framework for aligning streaming video generators. For diversity exploration, KVPO introduces a causal-semantic exploration paradigm that relocates the source of variation from stochastic noise to the historical KV cache. By stochastically routing historical KV entries, it constructs semantically diverse generation branches that remain strictly on the data manifold. For policy modeling, KVPO introduces a velocity-field surrogate policy based on Trajectory Velocity Energy (TVE), which quantifies branch likelihood in flow-matching velocity space and yields a reward-weighted contrastive objective fully consistent with the native ODE formulation. Experiments on multiple distilled AR video generators demonstrate consistent gains in visual quality, motion quality, and text-video alignment across both single-prompt short-video and multi-prompt long-video settings.

SEDiT: Mask-Free Video Subtitle Erasure via One-step Diffusion Transformer

High 2605.14894
Zheng Hui, Yunlong Bai
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：SEDiT 提出一种无需掩码的单步扩散 Transformer 方法，用于高效擦除视频字幕。
🎯研究动机

现有视频编辑方法依赖掩码输入，需要预先提取目标掩码，分割精度直接影响完成质量，且两阶段处理存在次优性。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖掩码的情况下，高效且高质量地擦除视频中的字幕。

🔎现象分析

字幕移除是局部编辑任务，大部分像素不变，分布偏移小，适合单步生成；条件最优传输映射和整流流速度场关于潜变量是 Lipschitz 连续的，保证了单步采样的理论可行性。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SEDiT，一种基于单步扩散 Transformer 的无掩码视频字幕擦除方法，采用混合训练策略（偶尔以干净首帧为条件）保证时间一致性，并通过直接输入原始视频和分块流式推理处理长视频。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个无需掩码的单步视频字幕擦除框架，避免了两阶段处理的次优性。
  • 从理论上证明了在局部编辑结构下单步采样的可行性。
  • 采用混合训练策略和分块流式推理，实现了高效处理无限长度原生 1440p 视频。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对大幅运动场景下的拼接痕迹处理仍有挑战。
  • 单步生成可能在某些复杂字幕场景下质量受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent breakthroughs in video diffusion models have significantly accelerated the development of video editing techniques. However, existing methods often rely on inpainting video frames based on masked input, which requires extracting the target video mask in advance, and the precision of the segmentation directly affects the quality of the completion. In this paper, we present SEDiT, a novel one-stage video Subtitle Erasure approach via One-step Diffusion Transformer. We introduce a mask-free inference approach that enables direct erasure of the targeted subtitle. The proposed one-stage framework mitigates the sub-optimality inherent in the two-stage processing of prior models. Since subtitle removal is a localized editing task in which most pixels remain unchanged, the underlying distribution shift is minimal, making it well-suited to one-step generation under rectified flow. We empirically validate the reliability of one-step denoising and further provide a formal theoretical justification. Under the localized-editing structure of subtitle removal, the conditional optimal transport (OT) map and its induced rectified flow velocity field are Lipschitz continuous with respect to the latent variable, which underpins the theoretical feasibility of one-step sampling. To address the challenge of long-term temporal consistency, we adopt a hybrid training strategy by occasionally conditioning the model with a clean first-frame latent. This facilitates temporal continuity, allowing each segment during inference to leverage the output of its predecessor. To avoid visible seams caused by cropping and reinserting processed targets, particularly in scenarios involving substantial motion, we feed the original video directly into SEDiT. Thanks to one-step and chunk-wise streaming inference, our method can efficiently handle native 1440p video with infinite length.

Quantitative Video World Model Evaluation for Geometric-Consistency

High 2605.15185
Jiaxin Wu, Yihao Pi, Yinling Zhang, Yuheng Li, Xueyan Zou
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 PDI-Bench 定量框架，通过 3D 几何一致性评估视频生成模型的世界模型能力。
🎯研究动机

现有视频评估依赖人工或学习评分器，主观且难以诊断几何失败，缺乏定量几何一致性指标。

❓解决问题

如何定量评估生成视频的 3D 几何一致性（尺度 - 深度对齐、3D 运动一致性、3D 结构刚性）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

通过分割和点跟踪获取物体中心观测，经单目重建提升至 3D 世界坐标，计算投影几何残差，覆盖三个失败维度。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PDI-Bench，首个定量评估生成视频几何一致性的框架。
  • 构建 PDI-Dataset，涵盖多种几何约束场景。
  • 揭示现有视频生成模型在几何一致性上的特定失败模式，未被常见感知指标捕获。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖单目重建和点跟踪的精度，可能引入误差。
  • 仅评估几何一致性，未覆盖其他物理合理性维度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generative video models are increasingly studied as implicit world models, yet evaluating whether they produce physically plausible 3D structure and motion remains challenging. Most existing video evaluation pipelines rely heavily on human judgment or learned graders, which can be subjective and weakly diagnostic for geometric failures. We introduce PDI-Bench (Perspective Distortion Index), a quantitative framework for auditing geometric coherence in generated videos. Given a generated clip, we obtain object-centric observations via segmentation and point tracking (e.g., SAM 2, MegaSaM, and CoTracker3), lift them to 3D world-space coordinates via monocular reconstruction, and compute a set of projective-geometry residuals capturing three failure dimensions: scale-depth alignment, 3D motion consistency, and 3D structural rigidity. To support systematic evaluation, we build PDI-Dataset, covering diverse scenarios designed to stress these geometric constraints. Across state-of-the-art video generators, PDI reveals consistent geometry-specific failure modes that are not captured by common perceptual metrics, and provides a diagnostic signal for progress toward physically grounded video generation and physical world model. Our code and dataset can be found at this https URL .

文档/OCR/图表 1 篇

A Picture is Worth a Thousand Words? An Empirical Study of Aggregation Strategies for Visual Financial Document Retrieval

Medium 2605.14581
Ho Hung Lim, Yi Yang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：单向量聚合会丢失金融文档中的关键语义信息，导致不同文档的向量几乎相同。
🎯研究动机

Visual RAG 将文档作为图像处理，但每张文档产生数百个视觉 patch token，在向量数据库中检索和存储成本高，实际部署需要聚合为单向量，但聚合是否丢失关键信息尚不清楚。

❓解决问题

研究单向量聚合策略在金融文档视觉检索中是否会导致信息丢失，特别是当文档中单个数字变化引起语义显著变化时。

🔎现象分析

实验发现单向量聚合会使不同文档的向量几乎相同，无法区分语义变化；而 patch 级别能检测到变化。根本原因是全局纹理主导。

🛠️主要方法

构建诊断基准，使用金融文档（单个数字变化导致语义显著变化），比较单向量聚合与 patch 级别检索的性能。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到使用金融文档诊断基准，并进行了模型规模、检索优化嵌入和多种缓解策略的实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了单向量聚合在金融文档视觉检索中会丢失关键语义信息，导致向量几乎相同。
  • 识别了全局纹理主导作为根本原因，并验证了该问题在模型规模、检索优化嵌入和多种缓解策略下的一致性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对金融文档，可能不适用于其他类型文档。
  • 未提出有效的缓解方法，仅指出问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Visual RAG has offered an alternative to traditional RAG. It treats documents as images and uses vision encoders to obtain vision patch tokens. However, hundreds of patch tokens per document create retrieval and storage challenges in a vector database. Practical deployment requires aggregating them into a single vector. This raises a critical question: does single-vector aggregation lose key information in financial documents? We develop a diagnostic benchmark using financial documents where changes in single digits can lead to significant semantic shifts. Our experiments show that single-vector aggregation collapses different documents with almost identical vectors. Metrics show that the patch level detects semantic changes, and confirm that aggregation obscures these details. We identify global texture dominance as the root cause. Our findings are consistent across model scales, retrieval-optimized embeddings, and multiple mitigation strategies, highlighting significant risks for single-vector visual document retrieval in financial applications.

基础/前沿模型 (含LLM) 73 篇 · 9 个细分

Agent 与工具使用 25 篇

MetaAgent-X : Breaking the Ceiling of Automatic Multi-Agent Systems via End-to-End Reinforcement Learning

High 2605.14212
Yaolun Zhang, Yujie Zhao, Nan Wang, Yiran Wu, Jiayu Chang, Yizhao Chen, Qingyun Wu, Jishen Zhao et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出端到端强化学习框架 MetaAgent-X，联合优化多智能体系统的自动设计与执行，突破现有方法的冻结执行器上限。
🎯研究动机

现有自动多智能体系统仅部分自适应，要么进行无训练测试时搜索，要么优化元级设计器而冻结下游执行智能体，导致冻结执行器上限，无法实现自设计与自执行模型的端到端训练。

❓解决问题

如何实现自动多智能体系统的端到端联合优化，使设计器和执行器都能在训练中共同进化。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MetaAgent-X 框架，包含脚本化 MAS 生成、执行轨迹收集、设计器和执行器轨迹的信用分配，以及执行器 - 设计器分层展开和分阶段协同进化策略。

📊实验结果

在自动 MAS 基准上，MetaAgent-X 一致优于现有方法，最高提升 21.7%。消融实验表明设计器和执行器在训练中均持续改进，有效学习遵循分阶段协同进化过程。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个端到端强化学习框架 MetaAgent-X，联合优化自动 MAS 的设计与执行。
  • 设计执行器 - 设计器分层展开和分阶段协同进化策略，提升训练稳定性并揭示协同进化动态。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定脚本化 MAS 生成格式，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 端到端训练的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Automatic multi-agent systems aim to instantiate agent workflows without relying on manually designed or fixed orchestration. However, existing automatic MAS approaches remain only partially adaptive: they either perform training-free test-time search or optimize the meta-level designer while keeping downstream execution agents frozen, which creating a frozen-executor ceiling and leaving the end-to-end training of self-designing and self-executing agentic models unexplored. To address this, we introduce MetaAgent-X, an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes automatic MAS design and execution. MetaAgent-X enables script-based MAS generation, execution rollout collection, and credit assignment for both designer and executor trajectories. To support stable and scalable optimization, we propose Executor Designer Hierarchical Rollout and Stagewise Co-evolution to improve training stability and expose the dynamics of designer-executor co-evolution. MetaAgent-X consistently outperforms existing automatic MAS baselines, achieving up to 21.7% gains. Comprehensive ablations show that both designer and executor improve throughout training, and that effective automatic MAS learning follows a stagewise co-evolution process. These results establish end-to-end trainable automatic MAS as a practical paradigm for building self-designing and self-executing agentic models.

Good to Go: The LOOP Skill Engine That Hits 99% Success and Slashes Token Usage by 99% via One-Shot Recording and Deterministic Replay

High 2605.14237
Xiaohua Wang, Kai Yu, XuXiao Liang, Liang Wang, Chao Han
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 LOOP 技能引擎，通过一次性录制和确定性重放实现周期性 Agent 任务 99% 成功率和 99% 令牌节省。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在周期性任务中灵活但随机性导致不可预测失败，且重复调用令牌成本高昂。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲灵活性的前提下，消除 LLM 在周期性任务中的随机性并大幅降低令牌消耗。

🔎现象分析

LLM 的随机性导致周期性任务执行不稳定，重复推理产生大量冗余令牌。

🛠️主要方法

一次性录制完整工具调用轨迹，通过贪心长度降序模板提取算法生成参数化无分支的 Loop Skill，后续执行绕过 LLM 直接确定性重放。

📊实验结果

在周期从 5 分钟到 24 小时的基准任务上，月度令牌消耗减少 93.3%-99.98%，执行延迟降低 8.7 倍，消除输出非确定性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LOOP 技能引擎，实现 99% 成功率和 99% 令牌减少。
  • 证明重放确定性和写安全性的两个定理。
  • 开源引擎作为 buddyMe 框架的一部分。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于周期性任务，非周期性任务需重新录制。
  • 模板提取算法可能无法处理高度动态的变量依赖。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deploying AI agents for repetitive periodic tasks exposes a critical tension: Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unmatched flexibility in tool orchestration, yet their inherent stochasticity causes unpredictable failures, and repeated invocations incur prohibitive token costs. We present the LOOP SKILL ENGINE, a system that achieves a combined 99% success rate and 99% token reduction for periodic agent tasks through a one-shot recording, deterministic replay paradigm. On its first run, the agent executes the task with full LLM reasoning while the system transparently intercepts and records the complete tool-call trajectory. A greedy length-descending template extraction algorithm then converts this recording into a parameterized, branch-free Loop Skill -- a deterministic execution plan that captures the task's functional intent while parameterizing time-dependent and result-dependent variables. All subsequent executions bypass the LLM entirely: the engine resolves template variables against real-time values and replays the tool sequence deterministically. We prove two theorems: (1) Replay Determinism -- the step sequence of a validated Loop Skill is invariant across all future executions; (2) Write Safety -- concurrent access to persistent configuration is serialized through reentrant locks and atomic file replacement. Across a benchmark of periodic agent tasks spanning intervals from 5 minutes to 24 hours, the Loop Skill Engine reduces monthly token consumption by 93.3%--99.98% and cuts execution latency by 8.7x while eliminating output non-determinism. A multi-layer degradation strategy guarantees that tasks never stall. We release the engine as part of the buddyMe open-source agent framework.

Web Agents Should Adopt the Plan-Then-Execute Paradigm

High 2605.14290
Julien Piet, Annabella Chow, Yiwei Hou, Muxi Lyu, Sylvie Venuto, Jinhao Zhu, Raluca Ada Popa, David Wagner
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出 Web 智能体应采用先规划后执行范式替代 ReAct，以消除提示注入风险。
🎯研究动机

ReAct 范式下，Web 内容（含广告、评论等不可信数据）直接流入模型决策流，导致提示注入攻击可劫持智能体控制流，威胁任务安全。

❓解决问题

如何设计 Web 智能体架构，使其在利用 Web 内容时避免不可信数据影响任务定义和动作生成。

🔎现象分析

WebArena 中所有任务均兼容先规划后执行，80% 可纯程序化完成无需运行时 LLM 子程序；但当前浏览器工具（点击、输入等）语义依赖页面上下文，无法支持高层规划。

🛠️主要方法

采用先规划后执行范式：在观察运行时 Web 内容前，先提交任务特定程序，然后执行该程序；不可信数据仅影响预定义执行图内的值或分支，不能重新定义任务或合成新动作。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 论证 ReAct 不是 Web 智能体的默认架构，先规划后执行更安全且与现有基准兼容。
  • 识别采用先规划后执行的主要障碍：浏览器工具缺乏类型化接口，需将网站交互从点击 / 按键提升为任务级操作。
⚠️方法局限
  • 需要网站提供类型化 API，当前 Web 基础设施不支持。
  • 纯程序化计划可能无法处理所有动态页面变化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

ReAct has become the default architecture across LLM agents, and many existing web agents follow this paradigm. We argue that it is the wrong default for web agents. Instead, web agents should default to plan-then-execute: commit to a task-specific program before observing runtime web content, then execute it. The reason is that web content mixes inputs from many parties. An e-commerce product page may combine a seller's listing, customer reviews and sponsored advertisements. Under ReAct, all of this content flows into the model when deciding on the next action, creating a direct path for prompt injections to steer the agent's control flow. Plan-then-execute changes this boundary: untrusted data may influence values or branches inside a predefined execution graph, but it cannot redefine the user task or cause the model to synthesize new actions at runtime. We analyze WebArena, a popular web agent benchmark, and find that all tasks are compatible with plan-then-execute, while 80% can be completed with a purely programmatic plan, without any runtime LLM subroutine. We identify the main barrier to adopting plan-then-execute on the web: For it to work well, tools must map cleanly to semantic actions, with effects known before execution, so agents have enough information to plan. The web does not naturally expose that interface. Browser tools such as click, type, and scroll have page-dependent meanings. Planning at this layer is near-sighted: the agent can only see actions on the current page, and later actions appear only after it acts. Closing this gap requires typed interfaces that turn website interactions from clicks and keystrokes to task-level operations. This is an infrastructure problem, not a modeling problem. Web tasks do not need reactivity by default; they need typed, complete, auditable website APIs.

Nexus : An Agentic Framework for Time Series Forecasting

High 2605.14389
Sarkar Snigdha Sarathi Das, Palash Goyal, Mihir Parmar, Nanyun Peng, Vishy Tirumalashetty, Chun-Liang Li, Rui Zhang, Jinsung Yoon et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：Nexus 是一个多智能体框架，通过分解预测阶段并整合文本上下文，显著提升了时间序列预测的准确性和可解释性。
🎯研究动机

时间序列预测不仅需要数值外推，还常需结合新闻或事件等非结构化上下文数据，但现有时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）无法感知文本信号，而 LLM 作为零样本预测器性能不稳定。

❓解决问题

如何有效融合数值模式与文本上下文信息，提升时间序列预测在事件驱动场景下的准确性和鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

当前 LLM 具有比先前认知更强的内在预测能力，但严重依赖于数值和上下文推理的组织方式。

🛠️主要方法

提出多智能体框架 Nexus，将预测分解为宏观与微观波动分离、上下文信息整合等专门阶段，最终合成预测。

📊实验结果

在 Zillow 房地产指标和股票市场数据上评估，数据严格晚于 LLM 知识截止日期，Nexus 匹配或超越 SOTA TSFMs 和强 LLM 基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Nexus，一种将时间序列预测分解为专门阶段的多智能体框架，能自适应季节性信号和事件驱动信息。
  • 实验表明 LLM 的内在预测能力比先前认知更强，且 Nexus 在 Zillow 房地产和股票市场数据上匹配或超越 SOTA TSFMs 和 LLM 基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架依赖 LLM 的推理能力，可能受限于 LLM 的上下文长度和计算成本。
  • 未在更多领域（如能源、交通）验证泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Time series forecasting is not just numerical extrapolation, but often requires reasoning with unstructured contextual data such as news or events. While specialized Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) excel at forecasting based on numerical patterns, they remain unaware to real-world textual signals. Conversely, while LLMs are emerging as zero-shot forecasters, their performance remains uneven across domains and contextual grounding. To bridge this gap, we introduce Nexus, a multi-agent forecasting framework that decomposes prediction into specialized stages: isolating macro-level and micro-level temporal fluctuations, and integrating contextual information when available before synthesizing a final forecast. This decomposition enables Nexus to adapt from seasonal signals to volatile, event-driven information without relying on external statistical anchors or monolithic prompting. We show that current-generation LLMs possess substantially stronger intrinsic forecasting ability than previously recognized, depending critically on how numerical and contextual reasoning are organized. Evaluated on data strictly succeeding LLM knowledge cutoffs spanning Zillow real estate metrics and volatile stock market equities, Nexus consistently matches or outperforms state-of-the-art TSFMs and strong LLM baselines. Beyond numerical accuracy, Nexus produces high-quality reasoning traces that explicitly show the fundamental drivers behind each forecast. Our results establish that real-world forecasting is an agentic reasoning problem extending well beyond only sequence modeling.

Agentic Recommender System with Hierarchical Belief-State Memory

High 2605.14401
Xiang Shen, Yuhang Zhou, Yifan Wu, Zhuokai Zhao, Siyu Lin, Lei Huang, Qianqian Zhong, Lizhu Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出分层信念状态记忆的智能推荐系统，通过六阶段生命周期管理实现 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有记忆增强 LLM 智能体采用扁平记忆表示，混淆了瞬时信号与稳定偏好，且缺乏完整的记忆演化生命周期管理。

❓解决问题

如何构建结构化、可演化的记忆系统以准确建模用户偏好并提升推荐性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MARS 框架，将推荐视为部分可观测问题，维护分层信念状态：事件记忆（原始信号）、偏好记忆（细粒度可变更块，含强度和证据追踪）、轮廓记忆（自然语言叙事）。由 LLM 规划器自适应调度提取、强化、弱化、合并、遗忘、再合成六种操作。

📊实验结果

在 InstructRec 四个基准域上进行实验，与最强基线相比 HR@1 平均提升 26.4%，NDCG@10 提升 10.3%，且智能调度在演化场景中带来额外增益。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出分层信念状态记忆结构，区分瞬时信号与稳定偏好。
  • 设计完整的六阶段记忆生命周期管理，由 LLM 规划器自适应调度。
  • 在四个 InstructRec 基准域上取得 SOTA，HR@1 平均提升 26.4%，NDCG@10 提升 10.3%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 规划器的推理能力，计算开销较大。
  • 未在真实在线推荐系统中验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Memory-augmented LLM agents have advanced personalized recommendation, yet existing approaches universally adopt flat memory representations that conflate ephemeral signals with stable preferences, and none provides a complete lifecycle governing how memory should evolve. We propose MARS (Memory-Augmented Agentic Recommender System), a framework that treats recommendation as a partially observable problem and maintains a structured belief state that progressively abstracts noisy behavioral observations into a compact estimate of user preferences. MARS organizes this belief state into three tiers: event memory buffers raw signals, preference memory maintains fine-grained mutable chunks with explicit strength and evidence tracking, and profile memory distills all preferences into a coherent natural language narrative. A complete lifecycle of six operations -- extraction, reinforcement, weakening, consolidation, forgetting, and resynthesis -- is adaptively scheduled by an LLM-based planner rather than fixed-interval heuristics. Experiments on four InstructRec benchmark domains show that \ours achieves state-of-the-art performance with average improvements of 26.4% in HR@1 and 10.3% in NDCG@10 over the strongest baselines with further gains from agentic scheduling in evolving settings.

LEMON: Learning Executable Multi-Agent Orchestration via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning

High 2605.14483
Xudong Chen, Yixin Liu, Hua Wei, Kaize Ding
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 LEMON 框架，通过反事实强化学习自动生成可执行的多智能体编排方案，在六个推理和编码基准上达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

多智能体系统的性能高度依赖编排设计（角色、能力、依赖关系），但现有方法优化不全面且依赖执行级反馈，难以对局部编排决策进行有效信用分配。

❓解决问题

如何自动生成集成角色、职责、能力级别和依赖结构的可执行多智能体编排方案，并实现高效的局部信用分配。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 LLM 的编排器 LEMON，生成可执行编排规范；训练时在 GRPO 目标基础上增加局部反事实信号，通过编辑角色、能力或依赖字段并仅对编辑跨度应用奖励对比来优化。

📊实验结果

在 MMLU、GSM8K、AQuA、MultiArith、SVAMP 和 HumanEval 六个基准上评估，LEMON 达到 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LEMON 框架，能生成集成角色、职责、能力级别和依赖结构的可执行多智能体编排方案。
  • 引入反事实强化学习方法，通过局部编辑和奖励对比实现更精细的信用分配。
  • 在六个推理和编码基准上取得 SOTA 性能，并开源代码。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 的生成质量，对复杂任务编排的泛化性有待验证。
  • 反事实信号编辑策略可能引入偏差，需进一步分析。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) have become a strong foundation for multi-agent systems, but their effectiveness depends heavily on orchestration design. Across different tasks, role design, capacity assignment, and dependency construction jointly affect both solution quality and execution efficiency. Existing approaches automate parts of this design process, yet they often optimize these decisions partially or sequentially, and rely on execution-level feedback that provides limited credit assignment for local orchestration decisions. We propose LEMON (\textbf{L}earning \textbf{E}xecutable \textbf{M}ulti-agent \textbf{O}rchestratio\textbf{N} via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning), an LLM-based orchestrator that generates an executable orchestration specification. The specification integrates task-specific roles, customized duties, capacity levels, and dependency structure into a single deployable system. To train the orchestrator, we augment the orchestration-level GRPO objective with a localized counterfactual signal that edits role, capacity, or dependency fields and applies the resulting reward contrast only to the edited spans. Experiments on six reasoning and coding benchmarks, including MMLU, GSM8K, AQuA, MultiArith, SVAMP, and HumanEval, show that LEMON achieves state-of-the-art performance among the evaluated multi-agent orchestration methods. Our code is available at this https URL .

Beyond Individual Intelligence: Surveying Collaboration, Failure Attribution, and Self-Evolution in LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems

High 2605.14892
Shihao Qi, Jie Ma, Rui Xing, Wei Guo, Xiao Huang, Zhitao Gao, Jianhao Deng, Jun Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：综述 LLM 多智能体系统中协作、失败归因与自我进化的因果依赖关系，提出 LIFE 框架。
🎯研究动机

现有综述分别覆盖个体能力、多智能体协作或自我进化，但缺乏对三者间因果依赖关系的统一分析，导致错误传播和系统自我改进困难。

❓解决问题

多智能体系统中错误跨智能体和交互轮次传播，难以诊断且难以转化为结构性自我改进。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验现象。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LIFE 框架，包含四个因果关联阶段：奠定能力基础、通过协作整合智能体、通过归因发现故障、通过自主自我改进进化，并形式化相邻阶段间的依赖关系。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次统一综述 LLM 多智能体系统中协作、失败归因与自我进化三个主题的因果依赖关系。
  • 提出 LIFE 框架和跨阶段研究议程，为闭环自改进多智能体系统提供概念路线图。
⚠️方法局限
  • 作为综述，未提出具体算法或实验验证。
  • 跨阶段依赖的形式化描述可能过于简化实际复杂性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM-based autonomous agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in reasoning, planning, and tool use, yet remain limited when tasks require sustained coordination across roles, tools, and environments. Multi-agent systems address this through structured collaboration among specialized agents, but tighter coordination also amplifies a less explored risk: errors can propagate across agents and interaction rounds, producing failures that are difficult to diagnose and rarely translate into structural self-improvement. Existing surveys cover individual agent capabilities, multi-agent collaboration, or agent self-evolution separately, leaving the causal dependencies among them unexamined. This survey provides a unified review organized around four causally linked stages, which we term the LIFE progression: Lay the capability foundation, Integrate agents through collaboration, Find faults through attribution, and Evolve through autonomous self-improvement. For each stage, we provide systematic taxonomies and formally characterize the dependencies between adjacent stages, revealing how each stage both depends on and constrains the next. Beyond synthesizing existing work, we identify open challenges at stage boundaries and propose a cross-stage research agenda for closed-loop multi-agent systems capable of continuously diagnosing failures, reorganizing structures, and refining agent behaviors, extending current coordination frameworks toward more self-organizing forms of collective intelligence. By bridging these previously fragmented research threads, this survey aims to offer both a systematic reference and a conceptual roadmap toward autonomous, self-improving multi-agent intelligence.

Orchard: An Open-Source Agentic Modeling Framework

High 2605.15040
Baolin Peng, Wenlin Yao, Qianhui Wu, Hao Cheng, Xiao Yu, Rui Yang, Tao Ge, Alessandrio Sordoni et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：Orchard 是一个开源智能体建模框架，通过轻量环境服务和三种训练方案在代码、GUI 和助手智能体上达到开源 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有智能体系统多依赖专有代码库或模型，开源框架侧重编排与评估而非可扩展训练，限制了开放研究。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个开源、可扩展的智能体建模框架，支持跨领域的训练数据、训练方案和评估。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Orchard 框架，核心是轻量环境服务 Orchard Env，提供沙箱生命周期管理原语；在此基础上构建三种训练方案：Orchard-SWE（代码智能体，使用蒸馏轨迹、信用分配 SFT 和平衡自适应 rollout RL）、Orchard-GUI（视觉语言计算机使用智能体，使用少量蒸馏轨迹和开放任务）、Orchard-Claw（个人助手智能体，使用合成任务）。

📊实验结果

在 SWE-bench Verified 上 Orchard-SWE 达到 64.3%（SFT）和 67.5%（SFT+RL）；Orchard-GUI 在 WebVoyager、Online-Mind2Web、DeepShop 上分别达到 74.1%、67.0%、64.0%；Orchard-Claw 在 Claw-Eval 上达到 59.6% pass@3。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出开源框架 Orchard，包含轻量环境服务和三种智能体训练方案。
  • 在 SWE-bench Verified、WebVoyager 等基准上达到开源 SOTA，与专有系统竞争。
⚠️方法局限
  • 蒸馏轨迹依赖高性能教师模型，可能引入偏差。
  • GUI 和 Claw 方案仅使用少量任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Agentic modeling aims to transform LLMs into autonomous agents capable of solving complex tasks through planning, reasoning, tool use, and multi-turn interaction with environments. Despite major investment, open research remains constrained by infrastructure and training gaps. Many high-performing systems rely on proprietary codebases, models, or services, while most open-source frameworks focus on orchestration and evaluation rather than scalable agent training. We present Orchard, an open-source framework for scalable agentic modeling. At its core is Orchard Env, a lightweight environment service providing reusable primitives for sandbox lifecycle management across task domains, agent harnesses, and pipeline stages. On top of Orchard Env, we build three agentic modeling recipes. Orchard-SWE targets coding agents. We distill 107K trajectories from MiniMax-M2.5 and Qwen3.5-397B, introduce credit-assignment SFT to learn from productive segments of unresolved trajectories, and apply Balanced Adaptive Rollout for RL. Starting from Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking, Orchard-SWE achieves 64.3% on SWE-bench Verified after SFT and 67.5% after SFT+RL, setting a new state of the art among open-source models of comparable size. Orchard-GUI trains a 4B vision-language computer-use agent using only 0.4K distilled trajectories and 2.2K open-ended tasks. It achieves 74.1%, 67.0%, and 64.0% success rates on WebVoyager, Online-Mind2Web, and DeepShop, respectively, making it the strongest open-source model while remaining competitive with proprietary systems. Orchard-Claw targets personal assistant agents. Trained with only 0.2K synthetic tasks, it achieves 59.6% pass@3 on Claw-Eval and 73.9% when paired with a stronger ZeroClaw harness. Collectively, these results show that a lightweight, open, harness-agnostic environment layer enables reusable agentic data, training recipes, and evaluations across domains.

Case-Based Calibration of Adaptive Reasoning and Execution for LLM Tool Use

High 2605.15041
Renning Pang, Tian Lan, Leyuan Liu, Piao Tong, Sheng Cao, Xiaosong Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：CAST 通过案例驱动的自适应推理与执行校准，提升 LLM 工具使用的准确性和效率。
🎯研究动机

LLM 工具使用需要平衡推理深度与结构有效性，现有方法缺乏对历史执行轨迹的系统化利用。

❓解决问题

如何利用历史执行案例自适应地校准 LLM 的推理策略和执行结构，以提高工具使用的可靠性和效率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CAST 框架，从历史执行轨迹中提取复杂度画像和失败画像，用于奖励设计和自适应推理，并通过强化学习内化案例策略。

📊实验结果

在 BFCLv2 和 ToolBench 上评估，显示执行准确率提升和推理长度减少。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出案例驱动的框架 CAST，利用历史执行轨迹进行自适应推理和结构校准。
  • 在 BFCLv2 和 ToolBench 上实现执行准确率提升 5.85 个百分点，推理长度减少 26%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的历史执行案例。
  • 跨领域泛化性未在摘要中讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Tool use extends large language models beyond parametric knowledge, but reliable execution requires balancing appropriate reasoning depth with strict structural validity. We approach this problem from a case-based perspective to present CAST, a case-driven framework that treats historical execution trajectories as structured cases. Instead of reusing raw exemplar outputs, CAST extracts case-derived signals to identify complexity profiles for estimating optimal reasoning strategies, alongside failure profiles to map likely structural breakdowns. The framework translates this knowledge into a fine-grained reward design and adaptive reasoning, enabling the model to autonomously internalize case-based strategies during reinforcement learning. Experiments on BFCLv2 and ToolBench demonstrate that CAST improves both schema-faithful execution and task-level tool-use success while reducing unnecessary deliberation. The approach achieves up to 5.85 percentage points gain in overall execution accuracy and reduces average reasoning length by 26%, significantly mitigating high-impact structural errors. Ultimately, this demonstrates how historical execution cases can provide reusable adaptation knowledge for calibrated tool use.

Concurrency without Model Changes: Future-based Asynchronous Function Calling for LLMs

High 2605.15077
Guangyu Feng, Huanzhi Mao, Prabal Dutta, Joseph E. Gonzalez
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：AsyncFC 通过纯执行层框架实现 LLM 解码与函数执行的异步重叠，无需模型修改即可降低端到端延迟。
🎯研究动机

当前 LLM 函数调用采用同步执行语义，解码过程被阻塞直到函数调用完成，导致端到端延迟增加，限制了 LLM Agent 的效率。

❓解决问题

如何在不修改模型或函数实现的前提下，实现 LLM 解码与函数执行的异步并行，以减少端到端任务完成时间。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AsyncFC，一个纯执行层框架，通过解耦 LLM 解码与函数执行，允许解码与函数执行重叠以及函数间并行，且无需微调或更改标准同步函数调用协议。

📊实验结果

在标准函数调用基准和改编的软件工程基准上评估，结果显示显著降低端到端时间并保持准确性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AsyncFC 框架，实现 LLM 解码与函数执行的异步重叠，无需模型修改。
  • 在标准函数调用基准和软件工程基准上，显著降低端到端任务完成时间，同时保持任务准确性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖函数间的依赖关系，并行度受限于依赖图。
  • 未讨论异步执行带来的资源管理或错误处理复杂性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Function calling, also known as tool use, is a core capability of modern LLM agents but is typically constrained by synchronous execution semantics. Under these semantics, LLM decoding is blocked until each function call completes, resulting in increasing end-to-end latency. In this work, we introduce AsyncFC, a pure execution-layer framework that decouples LLM decoding from function execution, enabling overlap between model decoding and function execution as well as inter-function parallelism when dependencies permit. AsyncFC layers over existing models and unmodified function implementations, requiring no fine-tuning or changes to the standard synchronous function-calling protocol. Across standard function-calling benchmarks and adapted software engineering benchmarks, AsyncFC significantly reduces end-to-end task completion time while preserving task accuracy. Furthermore, these results reveal that LLMs possess a native capability to reason over symbolic futures that represent unresolved execution results, enabling an asynchronous paradigm for model-tool interaction.

Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning

High 2605.15155
Zhengxi Lu, Zhiyuan Yao, Zhuowen Han, Zi-Han Wang, Jinyang Wu, Qi Gu, Xunliang Cai, Weiming Lu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：SDAR 通过门控自蒸馏辅助目标，解决了多轮智能体强化学习中 OPSD 的不稳定性问题。
🎯研究动机

强化学习为 LLM 智能体后训练提供轨迹级奖励，但长程交互中监督信号粗糙；OPSD 引入稠密 token 级指导，但多轮场景下不稳定且负教师拒绝难以处理。

❓解决问题

如何将 OPSD 稳定地迁移到多轮智能体强化学习中，避免不稳定性和负教师拒绝的负面影响。

🔎现象分析

多轮交互的复合不稳定性会破坏 OPSD 的监督信号；技能条件特权指导需要非对称处理，因为负教师拒绝可能源于不完美的技能检索或利用。

🛠️主要方法

SDAR 将 OPSD 作为门控辅助目标，RL 为主优化骨干；通过 sigmoid 门控映射解耦的 token 级信号，增强教师认可的正差距 token，柔和衰减负教师拒绝。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen2.5 和 Qwen3 系列上，ALFWorld、WebShop、Search-QA 任务中评估，SDAR 相比 GRPO 提升 +9.4% (ALFWorld)、+7.0% (Search-QA)、+10.2% (WebShop-Acc)，避免 GRPO+OPSD 的不稳定性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SDAR 框架，将 OPSD 作为门控辅助目标稳定多轮智能体强化学习
  • 在 Qwen2.5 和 Qwen3 系列上，ALFWorld、WebShop、Search-QA 中显著优于 GRPO 和混合 RL-OPSD 基线
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖教师分支的质量和技能检索的准确性
  • 门控机制引入额外超参数，调优成本可能增加
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a central paradigm for post-training LLM agents, yet its trajectory-level reward signal provides only coarse supervision for long-horizon interaction. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) complements RL by introducing dense token-level guidance from a teacher branch augmented with privileged context. However, transferring OPSD to multi-turn agents proves problematic: compounding multi-turn instability destabilizes supervision, while skill-conditioned privileged guidance requires asymmetric treatment for negative teacher rejections may arise from imperfect skills retrieval or utilization. We introduce SDAR (Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning), which treats OPSD as a gated auxiliary objective while keeping RL as the primary optimization backbone. SDAR maps detached token-level signals into a sigmoid gate, strengthening distillation on teacher-endorsed positive-gap tokens and softly attenuating negative teacher rejections. Across the Qwen2.5 and Qwen3 families on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-QA, SDAR substantially improves over GRPO (+9.4% on ALFWorld, +7.0% on Search-QA, +10.2% on WebShop-Acc), avoids the instability of naive GRPO+OPSD, and consistently outperforms hybrid RL--OPSD baselines across model scales.

TERMS-Bench: Diagnosing LLM Negotiation Agents Beyond Deal Rate

High 2605.13909
Erica Zhang, Fangzhao Zhang, Aneesh Pappu, Batu El, Jose Blanchet, Susan Athey, Jiashuo Liu, James Zou
arXiv PDF cs.GT
TL;DR：提出 Terms-Bench 框架，通过贝叶斯博弈将谈判环境本身变为验证器，实现 LLM 谈判智能体的可诊断评估。
🎯研究动机

谈判是经济交换的核心机制，也是智能体语言模型的经典测试床，但现有评估依赖 LLM 间交互或聚合指标（如成交率），无法揭示失败原因。

❓解决问题

现有 LLM 谈判评估方法无法进行细粒度、可归因的失败分析，缺乏诊断性。

🔎现象分析

前沿模型在成交率上饱和，但在剩余提取、线索使用、信念校准和合规性上存在差异，揭示了被先前基准掩盖的特定智能体谈判瓶颈。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Terms-Bench，一个贝叶斯博弈框架，通过指定对手的潜在类型、策略和收益结构，使环境本身成为验证器，将对手从黑箱转变为诊断工具，支持智能体可归因的失败分析和最优性差距计算。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Terms-Bench 框架，将谈判评估从聚合排名转变为可操作的诊断。
  • 通过评估 13 个 LLM 智能体，揭示了前沿模型在成交率之外的关键性能差异和瓶颈。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于双边价格谈判场景，泛化性待验证。
  • 诊断框架的构建依赖于对手策略和收益结构的先验设定。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Negotiation is a central mechanism of economic exchange, shaping markets, procurement, labor agreements, and resource allocation. It is also a canonical testbed for agentic language models, requiring multi-turn interaction under hidden preferences, strategic communication, and binding constraints. These properties make negotiation hard to evaluate: unlike math or code, it has no intrinsic verifier. Existing LLM negotiation evaluations rely on LLM-vs.-LLM interaction or aggregate outcomes such as deal rate, leaving failures opaque. We introduce Terms-Bench, short for Testbed for Economic Reasoning in Multi-turn Strategy, a Bayesian-game framework that makes the environment itself the verifier by specifying the counterpart's latent type, policy, and payoff structure. We instantiate it in bilateral price negotiation, where the counterpart's private state and simulator policy are hidden from the agent but observable to the evaluator. This turns the counterpart from a black-box opponent into a diagnostic instrument, enabling agent-attributable failure analysis and oracle-reference optimality gaps. Evaluating 13 LLM agents spanning frontier systems from major providers, Terms-Bench turns negotiation evaluation from aggregate ranking into actionable diagnosis: where agents fail, why they fail, and what to strengthen. Empirically, frontier models saturate deal rate yet diverge in surplus extraction, cue use, belief calibration, and compliance, revealing agent-specific bargaining bottlenecks masked by prior benchmarks.

EvolveMem:Self-Evolving Memory Architecture via AutoResearch for LLM Agents

High 2605.13941
Jiaqi Liu, Xinyu Ye, Peng Xia, Zeyu Zheng, Cihang Xie, Mingyu Ding, Huaxiu Yao
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：EvolveMem 提出一种自进化记忆架构，让 LLM Agent 的检索机制随存储内容共同进化，在长时记忆任务上显著超越固定配置基线。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM Agent 的长时记忆系统将检索基础设施视为固定不变，仅存储内容可进化，而评分函数、融合策略和答案生成策略在部署后冻结，限制了记忆系统的自适应能力。

❓解决问题

如何让 LLM Agent 的记忆系统在存储内容进化的同时，自动优化检索机制（包括评分、融合、生成策略），实现真正的自适应记忆。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

EvolveMem 将完整检索配置暴露为结构化动作空间，由 LLM 驱动的诊断模块读取失败日志、识别根因并提出配置调整，通过带自动回滚和探索停滞保护的元分析器执行调整，形成闭环自进化（AutoResearch）。

📊实验结果

在 LoCoMo 上，EvolveMem 超越最强基线 25.7%，相对最小基线提升 78.0%；在 MemBench 上超越最强基线 18.9%。进化配置跨基准正迁移。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出自进化记忆架构 EvolveMem，实现检索机制与存储内容的协同进化。
  • 设计 AutoResearch 过程，使系统自主进行迭代研究，无需人工调参。
  • 在 LoCoMo 和 MemBench 上显著超越最强基线，且进化配置可跨基准正迁移。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 LLM 诊断模块的质量，可能受限于基础 LLM 的推理能力。
  • 自进化过程可能收敛到局部最优，探索策略需进一步优化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Long-term memory is essential for LLM agents that operate across multiple sessions, yet existing memory systems treat retrieval infrastructure as fixed: stored content evolves while scoring functions, fusion strategies, and answer-generation policies remain frozen at deployment. We argue that truly adaptive memory requires co-evolution at two levels: the stored knowledge and the retrieval mechanism that queries it. We present EvolveMem, a self-evolving memory architecture that exposes its full retrieval configuration as a structured action space optimized by an LLM-powered diagnosis module. In each evolution round, the module reads per-question failure logs, identifies root causes, and proposes targeted configuration adjustments; a guarded meta-analyzer applies them with automatic revert-on-regression and explore-on-stagnation safeguards. This closed-loop self-evolution realizes an AutoResearch process: the system autonomously conducts iterative research cycles on its own architecture, replacing manual configuration tuning. Starting from a minimal baseline, the process converges autonomously, discovering effective retrieval strategies including entirely new configuration dimensions not present in the original action space. On LoCoMo, EvolveMem outperforms the strongest baseline by 25.7% relative and achieves a 78.0% relative improvement over the minimal baseline. On MemBench, EvolveMem exceeds the strongest baseline by 18.9% relative. Evolved configurations transfer across benchmarks with positive rather than catastrophic transfer, indicating that the self-evolution process captures universal retrieval principles rather than benchmark-specific heuristics. Code is available at this https URL .

Model-Adaptive Tool Necessity Reveals the Knowing-Doing Gap in LLM Tool Use

High 2605.14038
Yize Cheng, Chenrui Fan, Mahdi JafariRaviz, Keivan Rezaei, Soheil Feiz
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：LLM 工具使用中存在“知 - 行差距”：模型虽能识别工具需求，但难以将认知转化为行动。
🎯研究动机

现有研究将工具必要性视为模型无关属性，忽略了不同模型能力边界差异，导致工具使用策略不准确。

❓解决问题

如何定义模型自适应的工具必要性，并诊断 LLM 在工具使用中认知与行动不一致的问题。

🔎现象分析

在算术和事实 QA 数据集上，模型实际工具调用行为与模型自适应必要性之间存在 26.5-54.0% 和 30.8-41.8% 的显著不匹配。

🛠️主要方法

提出模型自适应的工具必要性定义（基于模型实证表现），将工具使用分解为内部认知阶段和执行阶段，通过探针分析隐藏状态并追踪样本轨迹。

📊实验结果

在算术和事实 QA 数据集上对四个模型进行实验，报告了不匹配比例和探针分析结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入模型自适应的工具必要性定义，揭示不同模型能力边界差异。
  • 发现 LLM 工具使用中的“知 - 行差距”：认知与行动信号在后期层几乎正交，多数不匹配源于认知到行动的转换。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅覆盖算术和事实 QA 任务，未涉及更复杂场景。
  • 探针分析依赖线性可解码假设，可能忽略非线性关系。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) increasingly act as autonomous agents that must decide when to answer directly vs. when to invoke external tools. Prior work studying adaptive tool use has largely treated tool necessity as a model-agnostic property, annotated by human or LLM judge, and mostly cover cases where the answer is obvious (e.g., fetching the weather vs. paraphrasing text). However, tool necessity in the wild is more nuanced due to the divergence of capability boundaries across models: a problem solvable by a strong model on its own may still require tools for a weaker one. In this work, we introduce a model-adaptive definition of tool-necessity, grounded in each model's empirical performance. Following this definition, we compare the necessity against observed tool-call behavior across four models on arithmetic and factual QA dataset, and find substantial mismatches of 26.5-54.0% and 30.8-41.8%, respectively. To diagnose the failure, we decompose tool use into two stages: an internal cognition stage that reflects whether a model believes a tool is necessary, and an execution stage that determines whether the model actually makes a tool-call action. By probing the LLM hidden states, we find that both signals are often linearly decodable, yet their probe directions become nearly orthogonal in the late-layer, last-token regime that drives the next-token action. By tracing the trajectory of samples in the two-stage process, we further discover that the majority of mismatch is concentrated in the cognition-to-action transition, not in cognition itself. These results reveal a knowing-doing gap in LLM tool-use: improving tool-use reliability requires not only better recognition of when tools are needed, but also better translation of that recognition into action.

SkillFlow: Flow-Driven Recursive Skill Evolution for Agentic Orchestration

High 2605.14089
Mingda Zhang, Tiesunlong Shen, Haoran Luo, Wenjin Liu, Zikai Xiao, Erik Cambria, Xiaoying Tang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：SkillFlow 提出基于流匹配的递归技能进化框架，通过 Tempered Trajectory Balance 损失实现多样化策略与透明信用分配，显著提升 LLM Agent 任务编排性能。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM Agent 编排方法面临策略崩溃、梯度方差高、技能进化缺乏原则性训练信号等问题，亟需一种能保持策略多样性、提供透明信用分配并实现自主技能进化的框架。

❓解决问题

解决 LLM Agent 在任务编排中策略单一化、信用分配不透明以及技能进化依赖 LLM 直接判断而非训练信号的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出现有方法存在策略崩溃（奖励最大化下收敛到单一模式）、高梯度方差（信用分配不透明）以及技能进化决策由 LLM 直接提示而非原则性训练信号驱动。

🛠️主要方法

SkillFlow 框架：以可训练 Supervisor 为 Agent，结合动态技能库和冻结执行器；采用 Tempered Trajectory Balance (TTB) 回归式流匹配损失采样与奖励成比例的轨迹，保持策略多样性；联合学习反向策略实现零额外推理成本的逐步骤信用分配；基于流诊断的递归技能进化机制决定何时进化、创建或剪枝技能。

📊实验结果

在 14 个数据集上评估，涵盖问答、数学推理、代码生成和真实世界交互式决策任务，SkillFlow 显著优于基线方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SkillFlow 框架，将流匹配损失（TTB）引入 LLM Agent 编排，实现多样化策略和透明信用分配。
  • 设计递归技能进化机制，利用流诊断信号自主决定技能创建、剪枝和决策缺口填补。
  • 在 14 个数据集上显著优于基线，覆盖问答、数学推理、代码生成和交互式决策任务。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预定义的技能库初始结构，对全新任务领域适应性需进一步验证。
  • TTB 损失的计算开销可能随轨迹长度增加而增长。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In recent years, a variety of powerful LLM-based agentic systems have been applied to automate complex tasks through task orchestration. However, existing orchestration methods still face key challenges, including strategy collapse under reward maximization, high gradient variance with opaque credit assignment, and unguided skill evolution whose decisions are typically made by directly prompting an LLM to judge rather than derived from principled training signals. To address these challenges, we propose SkillFlow, a flow-based framework that takes a trainable Supervisor as the agent and a structured environment with dynamic skill library and frozen executor, automating task orchestration through multi-turn interaction. SkillFlow employs Tempered Trajectory Balance (TTB), a regression-based flow-matching loss that samples trajectories proportional to reward, preserving diverse orchestration strategies rather than collapsing to a single mode. The same flow objective yields a jointly learned backward policy that provides transparent per-step credit assignment at zero additional inference cost. Building on these flow diagnostics, a recursive skill evolution mechanism determines when to evolve, what skills to create or prune, and where decision gaps lie -- closing the loop from training signal to autonomous capability growth. Experimental results on 14 datasets show that SkillFlow significantly outperforms baselines across question answering, mathematical reasoning, code generation, and real-world interactive decision making tasks. Our code is available at this https URL .

Distribution-Aware Algorithm Design with LLM Agents

High 2605.14141
Saharsh Koganti, Priyadarsi Mishra, Pierfrancesco Beneventano, Tomer Galanti
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：用 LLM 智能体从样本中学习分布感知的求解器代码，兼顾正确性与运行时效率。
🎯研究动机

传统学习关注预测器，但许多任务需要可执行的求解器代码；仅正确性不够，运行时效率在部署中至关重要。

❓解决问题

如何从未知任务分布的样本中学习出既正确又高效的求解器代码。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 solver hint 抽象，从样本中推断可复用结构并编译为专用求解器代码；利用 LLM 代码智能体实例化框架。

📊实验结果

在 21 个结构化组合优化目标分布（7 个问题类）上评估，合成求解器平均归一化质量 0.971，比平均启发式池高 0.224，比最高质量启发式高 0.098；速度比质量最佳启发式快 336.9 倍，比 Gurobi 快 342.8 倍，比限时精确求解器快 16.1 倍。在 PACE 2025 Dominating Set 私有实例上，合成求解器在所有 100 个图上有效，速度比顶级竞赛求解器快约两个数量级，质量差距适中。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化证明了从固定库中选择经验最快且样本一致的求解器在正确性和运行时上的泛化性。
  • 证明了统计可识别的 hints 可从多项式样本中恢复并编译。
  • 在 21 个组合优化分布上实验，合成求解器在质量和速度上均显著优于基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架依赖 LLM 代码智能体，可能受限于 LLM 的生成能力。
  • hint 的可识别性假设可能在某些复杂分布上不成立。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study learning when the learned object is executable solver code rather than a predictor. In this setting, correctness is not enough: two solvers may both return valid solutions on the deployment distribution while differing substantially in runtime. Given samples from an unknown task distribution, the learner returns code evaluated on fresh instances by both solution quality and execution time. Our central abstraction is a \emph{solver hint}: reusable structure inferred from samples and compiled into specialized solver code. We prove that the empirically fastest sample-consistent solver from a fixed library generalizes in both correctness and runtime, and that statistically identifiable hints can be recovered and compiled from polynomially many samples. Empirically, we instantiate the framework with LLM code agents on \(21\) structured combinatorial-optimization target distributions across seven problem classes. The synthesized solvers reach mean normalized quality \(0.971\), improve by \(+0.224\) over the average heuristic pool and by \(+0.098\) over the highest-quality heuristic, and are \(336.9\times\), \(342.8\times\), and \(16.1\times\) faster than the quality-best heuristic, Gurobi, and the selected time-limited exact backend, respectively. On released PACE 2025 Dominating Set private instances, the synthesized solver is valid on all \(100\) graphs and runs about two orders of magnitude faster than top competition solvers, with a moderate quality gap. Inspection shows that many gains come from changing the computational scale: replacing ambient exponential search or general-purpose optimization with compiled distribution-specific computation.

ExploitBench: A Capability Ladder Benchmark for LLM Cybersecurity Agents

High 2605.14153
Seunghyun Lee, David Brumley
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出 ExploitBench，将漏洞利用分解为 16 级能力阶梯，评估 LLM 网络安全 Agent 的真实利用能力。
🎯研究动机

现有安全基准将崩溃视为利用成功，忽略了从触发漏洞到完全控制目标的渐进能力获取过程，无法准确衡量 LLM Agent 的真实利用能力。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个细粒度、可验证的基准，来评估 LLM Agent 在漏洞利用中逐步获取不同能力（如代码覆盖、崩溃、沙箱逃逸、任意代码执行等）的表现。

🔎现象分析

公开部署的前沿模型在触发漏洞和崩溃上表现常规，但任意代码执行能力不足；私有模型在约一半的测试中实现了任意代码执行，表明针对加固目标的利用构建是新兴的前沿能力。

🛠️主要方法

将漏洞利用分解为 16 个可测量的能力标志（从覆盖、崩溃到沙箱原语、任意读写、控制流劫持、任意代码执行），每个能力通过确定性预言机验证（随机挑战 - 响应原语、差分执行、信号处理证明），并在 41 个 V8 漏洞上实例化。

📊实验结果

在 41 个 V8 漏洞上测试了 8 个公开部署模型和 1 个私有模型，包含三组实验：主测量（模型 - 环境）、辅助测量（添加自适应指导）、消融（替换为模型原生 CLI）。摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ExploitBench，一个能力分级的漏洞利用基准，将利用过程分解为 16 个可测量标志。
  • 设计了确定性预言机验证机制，包括随机挑战 - 响应、差分执行和信号处理证明。
  • 在 41 个 V8 漏洞上进行了三组实验（模型 - 环境、自适应指导、原生 CLI 消融），揭示了公开与私有模型之间的能力差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 V8 漏洞，可能无法泛化到其他软件或漏洞类型。
  • 基准的 16 个能力标志可能未覆盖所有利用步骤，且预言机设计可能对某些利用技术不适用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Exploitation is not a binary event. It is a ladder of acquiring progressive capabilities, from executing a single buggy line of code to taking full control of the target. However, existing LLM security benchmarks treat a crash as exploitation success. That single binary outcome collapses the hard parts of exploitation: the transition from triggering a bug to constructing reusable primitives and control. We present ExploitBench, a capability-graded benchmark that decomposes exploitation into 16 measurable flags, from coverage and crash through sandbox primitives, arbitrary read/write, control-flow hijack, and arbitrary code execution. Each capability is verified by a deterministic oracle that uses a per-run randomized challenge-response for primitives, differential execution against ground-truth binaries to measure progress, and a signal-handler proof for code execution. We instantiate ExploitBench on 41 V8 bugs because V8 is both widely deployed and exploitation-hardened. We report three arms: <model,env> as the primary measurement of model-environment capability, <model,env, adaptive coaching> as a secondary arm that adds adaptive coaching to test whether targeted feedback shifts outcomes, and <model,env,harness> as an ablation that swaps in the model's native CLI to check whether vendor-side optimizations increase exploitation capabilities.
