On architectures with decoupled compute units (e.g., Ascend NPUs), dequantization operations can consume more cycles than the matrix multiplication itself, leaving the high-throughput tensor cores underutilized. This paper presents Multi-Scale Dequant (MSD), a quantization framework that removes weight/KV dequantization from the GEMM critical path. Instead of lifting low-bit weights to BF16 precision, MSD decomposes high-precision BF16 activations into multiple low-precision components, each of which can be multiplied directly with quantized weights via native hardware-accelerated GEMM. This approach shifts the computational paradigm from precision conversion to multi-scale approximation, avoiding INT8-to-BF16 weight conversion before GEMM. We instantiate MSD for two weight formats and derive tight error bounds for each. For INT8 weights (W4A16), two-pass INT8 decomposition achieves near 16 effective bits. For MXFP4 weights (W4A16), two-pass MXFP4 decomposition yields near 6.6 effective bits with error bound 1/64 per block surpassing single-pass MXFP8(5.24 bits) while maintaining the same effective GEMM compute time. We further derive closed-form latency and HBM traffic models showing that MSD avoids the Vector-Cube pipeline stall caused by dequantization and reduces KV cache HBM traffic by up to 2.5 times in attention. Numerical simulations on matrix multiplication and Flash Attention kernels confirm that MSD does not degrade accuracy compared to dequantization baselines, and in many settings achieves lower L2 error.

Towards Resource-Efficient LLMs: End-to-End Energy Accounting of Distillation Pipelines

High 2605.13981
Katherine Lambert, Sasha Luccioni
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出端到端能耗核算框架，揭示蒸馏管线中教师侧被忽视的能源成本，并给出节能设计规则。
🎯研究动机

大语言模型部署导致 GPU 需求激增和能耗问题，蒸馏虽被宣传为高效路径，但现有研究未核算完整管线（含教师侧数据生成、logit 缓存、评估等）的能源成本。

❓解决问题

缺乏对蒸馏管线全流程能耗的量化核算方法，导致能源效率评估不完整。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出分阶段 GPU 功耗追踪的能耗核算框架，对经典 logit 蒸馏和合成数据微调两种方法进行逐阶段能耗测量，构建能耗 - 质量帕累托前沿。

📊实验结果

测量了两种蒸馏方法（logit 蒸馏和合成数据微调）的逐阶段能耗，构建了能耗 - 质量帕累托前沿。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个端到端蒸馏管线能耗核算框架，包含教师侧工作负载。
  • 通过实验揭示被忽视的能耗成本，并给出节能设计规则。
  • 开源测量工具和核算协议，促进可重复研究。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定模型和蒸馏方法，泛化性需验证。
  • 未考虑硬件差异和动态功耗管理的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rise in deployment of large language models has driven a surge in GPU demand and datacenter scaling, raising concerns about electricity use, grid stress, and the impacts of modern AI workloads. Distillation is often promoted as one of the most effective paths to obtain cheaper, more efficient models, yet these claims rarely account for the full end-to-end energy and resource costs, including crucial teacher-side workloads such as data generation, logit caching, and evaluation. We present a comprehensive energy accounting framework that measures the complete computational cost of distillation pipelines via detailed stage-wise tracking of GPU device power consumption. In our experiments, we separate and log empirical energy use across distinct phases and systematically measure the energy and emissions of two common distillation methods: the classic logit-based knowledge distillation and synthetic-data supervised fine-tuning, constructing energy-quality Pareto frontiers that expose the previously ignored costs. From these measurements and analyses, we derive practical design rules for selecting distillation methods and hyperparameters under energy and budget constraints, and release an open-source measurement harness and accounting protocol to provide a standardized foundation for comparable, reproducible distillation research, explicitly accountable for complete pipeline energy impact.

Know When To Fold 'Em: Token-Efficient LLM Synthetic Data Generation via Multi-Stage In-Flight Rejection

High 2605.14062
Anjir Ahmed Chowdhury, Syed Zawad, Feng Yan
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出多阶段飞行拒绝（MSIFR）框架，在 LLM 合成数据生成过程中提前终止低质量样本，节省 11%-77% 的 token 消耗。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 合成数据生成方法通常先生成完整输出再过滤，导致大量 token 浪费在最终被丢弃的样本上，效率低下。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲数据质量的前提下，减少 LLM 合成数据生成中的 token 浪费。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出多阶段飞行拒绝（MSIFR），将生成过程分解为多个阶段，在每个中间检查点使用快速基于规则的验证器检测算术不一致、幻觉模式和格式违规，提前终止低质量生成轨迹。

📊实验结果

在 5 个指令微调模型和 7 个推理基准上，MSIFR 作为独立方法减少 11%-77% 的 token 消耗，与早退方法结合最高减少 78.2%，同时保持或提升评估准确率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MSIFR 框架，无需额外训练或架构修改即可提升合成数据生成效率。
  • 形式化飞行拒绝为顺序决策过程，证明非平凡丢弃策略可降低期望 token 消耗，且条件效用估计构成鞅，保证早期拒绝不偏倚保留样本的期望效用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖手工设计的规则验证器，可能无法覆盖所有低质量模式。
  • 未讨论在长文本生成或多模态场景下的适用性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While synthetic data generation with large language models (LLMs) is widely used in post-training pipelines, existing approaches typically generate full outputs before applying quality filters, leading to substantial token waste on samples that are ultimately discarded. To address this, we propose Multi-Stage In-Flight Rejection (MSIFR), a lightweight, training-free framework that detects and terminates low-quality generation trajectories at intermediate checkpoints before they reach full completion. MSIFR decomposes the generation process into sequential stages and applies fast rule-based validators to identify arithmetic inconsistencies, hallucination patterns, and formatting violations, enabling early rejection of faulty samples. We formalize in-flight rejection as a sequential decision process and show that any non-trivial discard policy reduces expected token consumption, with stage-wise savings increasing when rejection occurs earlier in the generation pipeline. We further demonstrate that conditional utility estimates form a martingale, ensuring that early, in-flight rejection does not bias the expected utility of retained samples. Across five instruction-tuned models and seven reasoning benchmarks, MSIFR reduces token consumption by 11%-77% as a standalone method, and up to 78.2% when combined with early-exit methods, while preserving or improving evaluation accuracy. These results confirm that MSIFR provides a practical mechanism for improving the efficiency of LLM-based synthetic data generation without additional training or architectural changes.

Correctness-Aware Repository Filtering Under Maximum Effective Context Window Constraints

Medium 2605.14362
Shweta Mishra
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出一种基于文件大小的预过滤方法，在最大有效上下文窗口约束下提升 LLM 仓库级代码理解的准确率。
🎯研究动机

LLM 的上下文窗口存在实际有效长度限制（MECW），而软件仓库中大量非代码文件会溢出窗口并挤占任务相关代码，导致模型准确率下降。现有语义检索方法需要索引构建和查询时推理，开销大。

❓解决问题

如何在低开销下过滤仓库中的非代码文件，以在 MECW 约束下保留任务相关代码，提升 LLM 代码理解准确率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出两种基于文件大小的启发式过滤器：SizeFilter（单阈值过滤）和 HybridFilter（结合文件类型和大小），在 token 化前使用 OS 级 stat()元数据，开销低于 0.01ms/ 文件。

📊实验结果

在 10 个开源仓库（22046 文件，5 种语言）上评估 token 缩减率；在 18 个任务上使用 CodeLlama-7B-Instruct 评估文件级准确率和幻觉率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需索引、低开销的上下文卫生框架，在 MECW 约束下有效减少 token 占用。
  • 在 10 个真实仓库上验证了 79.6% 和 89.3% 的 token 缩减率，并发现 token 密度与文件大小的强线性相关性。
  • 在 18 个任务上展示了过滤后准确率从 25% 提升至 72%，幻觉率从 61% 降至 17%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于文件大小和类型，可能误过滤小尺寸但重要的非代码文件。
  • 评估规模有限（18 个任务，单一模型），泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Context window efficiency is a practical constraint in large language model (LLM)-based developer tools. Paulsen [12] shows that all tested models degrade in accuracy well before their advertised context limits the Maximum Effective Context Window (MECW) which makes context construction a quality problem, not just a cost one. Modern software repositories routinely contain large non-code artifacts compiled datasets, binary model weights, minified JavaScript bundles, and gigabyte-scale log files that overflow the context window and push out task-relevant source code. We present a correctness-aware context hygiene framework: a pre-execution, size-based heuristic filter that intercepts repository scans before tokenization, using only OS-level stat() metadata with sub-millisecond overhead. Semantic retrieval approaches such as RepoCoder, GraphRAG, and AST-based chunking require index construction and query-time inference before any filtering decision is reached. Our framework, by contrast, requires no indexing and operates at <0.01 ms per file decision. Across 10 real open-source repositories (22,046 files, 5 languages), the proposed SizeFilter at \theta=1 MB achieves 79.6% (\pm13.2%) mean token reduction at 0.30 ms overhead: the HybridFilter achieves 89.3% (\pm9.0%) the lowest variance of any filter evaluated. A token-density study across 2,688 files confirms a strong linear correlation (Pearson r=0.997, k=0.250 tokens/byte). A limited-scope evaluation (18 tasks, CodeLlama-7B-Instruct) yields 72% file-level accuracy under filtering versus 25% at baseline; hallucination frequency declines from 61% to 17%. All code and data are released for reproducibility.

模型架构 8 篇

Darwin Family: MRI-Trust-Weighted Evolutionary Merging for Training-Free Scaling of Language-Model Reasoning

High 2605.14386
Taebong Kim, Youngsik Hong, Minsik Kim, Sunyoung Choi, Jaewon Jang, Junghoon Shin, Minseo Kim
arXiv PDF cs.NE
TL;DR：无需训练的进化式模型合并方法，通过 MRI 加权的权重空间重组提升推理能力。
🎯研究动机

现有语言模型推理能力提升依赖昂贵的后训练流程，如何在不进行额外训练的情况下重组已有检查点中的潜在能力是一个重要问题。

❓解决问题

如何通过无梯度的权重空间进化合并，无需训练即可提升语言模型的推理性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Darwin Family 框架，包含 14 维自适应合并基因组、MRI-Trust Fusion（通过可学习信任参数平衡诊断层重要性信号与进化搜索）以及跨架构映射器，实现无训练进化合并。

📊实验结果

旗舰模型 Darwin-27B-Opus 在 GPQA Diamond 上达到 86.9%，在 1252 个评估模型中排名第 6，且优于其全训练基础模型。在 4B 到 35B 参数规模上，Darwin 模型持续优于父模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无需训练的进化式模型合并框架 Darwin Family，通过权重空间重组提升推理性能。
  • 引入 MRI-Trust Fusion 方法，自适应平衡诊断信号与进化搜索。
  • 实现跨架构（Transformer 和 Mamba）的模型合并，并展示递归多代进化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 合并过程可能受限于初始检查点的能力上限。
  • 跨架构合并的通用性可能受限于架构差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present Darwin Family, a framework for training-free evolutionary merging of large language models via gradient-free weight-space recombination. We ask whether frontier-level reasoning performance can be improved without additional training, by reorganizing latent capabilities already encoded in existing checkpoints. Darwin introduces three key ideas: (i) a 14-dimensional adaptive merge genome enabling fine-grained component- and block-level recombination; (ii) MRI-Trust Fusion, which adaptively balances diagnostic layer-importance signals with evolutionary search through a learnable trust parameter; and (iii) an Architecture Mapper that enables cross-architecture breeding between heterogeneous model families. Empirically, the flagship Darwin-27B-Opus achieves 86.9% on GPQA Diamond, ranking #6 among 1,252 evaluated models, and outperforming its fully trained foundation model without any gradient-based training. Across scales from 4B to 35B parameters, Darwin models consistently improve over their parents, support recursive multi-generation evolution, and enable a training-free evolutionary merge that combines Transformer- and Mamba-based components. Together, the Darwin Family demonstrates that diagnostic-guided evolutionary merging is a practical and reproducible alternative to costly post-training pipelines for reasoning-centric language models.

OmniDrop: Layer-wise Token Pruning for Omni-modal LLMs via Query-Guidance

High 2605.14458
Yeo Jeong Park, Hyemi Jang, Minseo Choi, Jongsun Lee, Jooyoung Choi, Yongkweon Jeon
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 OmniDrop，一种无需训练、逐层剪枝的框架，在 LLM 解码器层内渐进剪枝音视频 token，利用文本查询引导和时序多样性分数，实现高效全模态理解。
🎯研究动机

全模态大语言模型在处理高分辨率音频和视频输入时面临 token 爆炸问题，严重阻碍实时应用和长程推理；现有方法在输入嵌入层剪枝，依赖不可靠的语义相关性假设。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲性能的前提下，高效压缩全模态 LLM 中的音视频 token 数量，降低推理延迟和内存占用。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 OmniDrop，一种无需训练的逐层 token 剪枝框架：在 LLM 解码器层内渐进剪枝音视频 token，早期层保留充分信息融合，深层层激进剪枝；利用文本查询作为引导实现模态无关和任务自适应剪枝；引入时序多样性分数鼓励平衡 token 存活以保留全局时序上下文。

📊实验结果

在多种音视频基准上，OmniDrop 优于所有基线，性能提升最多 3.58 点，同时预填充延迟降低最多 40%，内存使用降低最多 14.7%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 OmniDrop，首个在 LLM 解码器层内进行逐层 token 剪枝的全模态压缩框架，无需额外训练。
  • 利用文本查询引导和时序多样性分数实现模态无关、任务自适应的剪枝，显著降低预填充延迟和内存使用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖文本查询质量，对于无文本查询的任务适应性有限。
  • 时序多样性分数的有效性可能受视频内容动态性影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Omni-modal large language models have demonstrated remarkable potential in holistic multimodal understanding; however, the token explosion caused by high-resolution audio and video inputs remains a critical bottleneck for real-time applications and long-form reasoning. Existing omni-modal token compression methods typically prune tokens at the input embedding level, relying on audio-video similarity or temporal co-occurrence as proxies for semantic relevance. In practice, such assumptions are often unreliable. To address this limitation, we propose OmniDrop, a training-free, layer-wise token pruning framework that progressively prunes audiovisual tokens within the LLM decoder layers rather than at the input-level, allowing early layers to preserve sufficient omni-modal information fusion before aggressively removing tokens in deeper layers. We further utilize text queries as guidance for modality-agnostic and task-adaptive token pruning. We also introduce a temporal diversity score that encourages balanced token survival to preserve global temporal context. Experimental results across various audiovisual benchmarks demonstrate that OmniDrop outperforms all baselines by up to 3.58 points while reducing prefill latency by up to 40% and memory usage by up to 14.7%.

ML-Embed: Inclusive and Efficient Embeddings for a Multilingual World

High 2605.15081
Ziyin Zhang, Zihan Liao, Hang Yu, Peng Di, Rui Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 3D-ML 框架和 ML-Embed 模型套件，实现多语言、高效、透明的文本嵌入。
🎯研究动机

当前文本嵌入发展存在三大障碍：计算成本高、语言覆盖窄（忽视多数语言）、闭源或开放权重模型缺乏透明度，阻碍研究。

❓解决问题

如何构建计算高效、多语言覆盖广且透明的文本嵌入模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 3-Dimensional Matryoshka Learning (3D-ML)框架，包含 Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL)用于存储效率、Matryoshka Layer Learning (MLL)用于推理深度灵活性、以及新引入的 Matryoshka Embedding Learning (MEL)用于参数效率。同时构建大规模多语言数据集，训练 140M 到 8B 参数的模型套件。

📊实验结果

在 430 个任务上评估，在 17 个 MTEB 基准中的 9 个上创下新纪录，低资源语言表现突出。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 3D-ML 框架，实现全生命周期效率优化。
  • 构建大规模多语言数据集并训练多尺寸模型套件。
  • 开源所有模型、数据和代码，促进可重复研究。
  • 在 430 个任务上评估，在 17 个 MTEB 基准中的 9 个上创下新纪录，低资源语言表现突出。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仍存在某些低资源语言覆盖不足。
  • 模型规模从 140M 到 8B，但更大规模模型可能未探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The development of high-quality text embeddings is increasingly drifting toward an exclusionary future, defined by three critical barriers: prohibitive computational costs, a narrow linguistic focus that neglects most of the world's languages, and a lack of transparency from closed-source or open-weight models that stifles research. To dismantle these barriers, we introduce ML-Embed, a suite of inclusive and efficient models built upon a new framework: 3-Dimensional Matryoshka Learning (3D-ML). Our framework addresses the computational challenge with comprehensive efficiency across the entire model lifecycle. Beyond the storage benefits of Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) and flexible inference-time depth provided by Matryoshka Layer Learning (MLL), we introduce Matryoshka Embedding Learning (MEL) for enhanced parameter efficiency. To address the linguistic challenge, we curate a massively multilingual dataset and train a suite of models ranging from 140M to 8B parameters. In a direct commitment to transparency, we release all models, data, and code. Extensive evaluation on 430 tasks demonstrates that our models set new records on 9 of 17 evaluated MTEB benchmarks, with particularly strong results in low-resource languages, providing a reproducible blueprint for building globally equitable and computationally efficient AI systems.

MeMo: Memory as a Model

High 2605.15156
Ryan Wei Heng Quek, Sanghyuk Lee, Alfred Wei Lun Leong, Arun Verma, Alok Prakash, Nancy F. Chen, Bryan Kian Hsiang Low, Daniela Rus et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：MeMo 将新知识编码为专用记忆模型，无需修改 LLM 参数即可实现高效知识注入。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在预训练后参数冻结，难以高效融入实时、领域特定的新知识，现有方法存在跨文档关系建模弱、对检索噪声敏感、灾难性遗忘等问题。

❓解决问题

如何在不改变 LLM 参数的前提下，高效、鲁棒地注入新知识并支持即插即用。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MeMo 框架，将新知识编码为独立的记忆模型，LLM 参数保持不变，通过模块化方式实现知识注入。

📊实验结果

在 BrowseComp-Plus、NarrativeQA 和 MuSiQue 三个基准上进行了实验，MeMo 相比现有方法取得了强性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MeMo 框架，支持复杂跨文档关系建模、对检索噪声鲁棒、避免灾难性遗忘、无需访问 LLM 权重或 logits、推理时检索成本与语料库大小无关。
  • 在三个基准上验证了 MeMo 相比现有方法的性能优势。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及记忆模型的存储和更新开销。
  • 可能依赖高质量的记忆编码策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across a wide range of tasks, but remain frozen after pretraining until subsequent updates. Many real-world applications require timely, domain-specific information, motivating the need for efficient mechanisms to incorporate new knowledge. In this paper, we introduce MeMo (Memory as a Model), a modular framework that encodes new knowledge into a dedicated memory model while keeping the LLM parameters unchanged. Compared to existing methods, MeMo offers several advantages: (a) it captures complex cross-document relationships, (b) it is robust to retrieval noise, (c) it avoids catastrophic forgetting in the LLM, (d) it does not require access to the LLM's weights or output logits, enabling plug-and-play integration with both open and proprietary closed-source LLMs, and (e) its retrieval cost is independent of corpus size at inference time. Our experimental results on three benchmarks, BrowseComp-Plus, NarrativeQA, and MuSiQue, show that MeMo achieves strong performance compared to existing methods across diverse settings.

Conditional Attribute Estimation with Autoregressive Sequence Models

High 2605.14004
Erica Stutz, Giacomo Marino, Daniella Meeker, Qiao Liu, Andrew J. Loza
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出条件属性 Transformer，在单次前向传播中联合估计下一个 token 概率和属性值，实现信用分配、反事实分析和可控生成。
🎯研究动机

生成模型通常使用下一个 token 预测目标训练，但许多下游应用需要估计或控制序列级属性。下一个 token 预测可能导致局部模式过拟合、全局结构欠拟合，并且需要大量下游修改或昂贵采样来指导或预测生成样本的全局属性。

❓解决问题

如何在不修改输入序列的情况下，在单次前向传播中同时估计下一个 token 概率和序列级属性，并实现信用分配、反事实分析和可控生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

条件属性 Transformer：在下一个 token 预测的同时，估计每个潜在下一个 token 选择对应的属性值，从而在单次前向传播中实现每个 token 的信用分配、反事实分析和基于属性似然的引导解码。

📊实验结果

在稀疏奖励任务和多种语言任务上评估，显示最先进性能、改进的下一个 token 预测和更快的属性估计。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出条件属性 Transformer 框架，联合估计下一个 token 概率和条件属性值。
  • 实现三种关键能力：每个 token 的信用分配、反事实分析和可控生成。
  • 在稀疏奖励任务上达到最先进性能，在足够模型规模下改进下一个 token 预测，属性概率估计比采样快数个数量级。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对属性定义和模型架构敏感。
  • 在非常长的序列上计算开销可能增加。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generative models are often trained with a next-token prediction objective, yet many downstream applications require the ability to estimate or control sequence-level properties. Next-token prediction can lead to overfitting of local patterns during training, underfitting of global structure, and requires significant downstream modifications or expensive sampling to guide or predict the global attributes of generated samples at inference time. Here, we introduce Conditional Attribute Transformers, a novel method for jointly estimating the next-token probability and the value of an attribute conditional on each potential next token selection. This framework enables three critical capabilities within a single forward pass, without modification of the input sequence: (1) per-token credit assignment across an entire sequence, by identifying how each token in a sequence is associated with an attribute's value; (2) counterfactual analysis, by quantifying attribute differences conditional on alternative next token choices; (3) steerable generation, by decoding sequences based on a combination of next-token and attribute likelihoods. Our approach achieves state of the art performance on sparse reward tasks, improves next-token prediction at sufficient model sizes, estimates attribute probabilities orders of magnitude faster than sampling, and can guide decoding of autoregressive sequence models on a range of language tasks.

BiSpikCLM: A Spiking Language Model integrating Softmax-Free Spiking Attention and Spike-Aware Alignment Distillation

High 2605.13859
Sihang Guo, Chenlin Zhou, Jiaqi Wang, Kehai Chen, Qingyan Meng, Zhengyu Ma
arXiv PDF cs.NE
TL;DR：首个全二值脉冲因果语言模型，通过无 Softmax 脉冲注意力和尖峰感知对齐蒸馏实现高效低功耗自然语言生成。
🎯研究动机

脉冲神经网络（SNN）具有事件驱动和超低功耗的优势，但现有脉冲大语言模型仍依赖浮点矩阵乘法和非线性操作，训练困难，难以兼顾效率与性能。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个完全二值化、无浮点运算的脉冲因果语言模型，并实现高效训练以接近 ANN 性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 BiSpikCLM，包含无 Softmax 脉冲注意力（SFSA）消除 softmax 和浮点运算；以及尖峰感知对齐蒸馏（SpAD），在嵌入、注意力图、中间特征和输出 logits 上对齐 ANN 教师和 SNN 学生。

📊实验结果

在自然语言生成任务上，BiSpikCLM 以仅 4.16%-5.87% 的计算成本达到竞争性能；1.3B 模型仅用 5.6% 的训练 token 即可匹配 ANN 性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个全二值脉冲无 MatMul 因果语言模型 BiSpikCLM。
  • 提出无 Softmax 脉冲注意力（SFSA）和尖峰感知对齐蒸馏（SpAD）方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定规模或任务上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
  • 蒸馏框架依赖预训练 ANN 教师，可能限制完全从零训练的场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer promising energy-efficient alternatives to large language models (LLMs) due to their event-driven nature and ultra-low power consumption. However, to preserve capacity, most existing spiking LLMs still incur intensive floating-point matrix multiplication (MatMul) and nonlinearities, or training difficulties arising from the complex spatiotemporal dynamics. To address these challenges, we propose BiSpikCLM, the first fully binary spiking MatMul-free causal language model. BiSpikCLM introduces Softmax-Free Spiking Attention (SFSA), eliminating softmax and floating-point operations in autoregressive language modeling. For efficient training, we introduce Spike-Aware Alignment Distillation (SpAD), which aligns ANN teacher and SNN student across embeddings, attention maps, intermediate features, and output logits. SpAD framework allows BiSpikCLM to reach comparable performance to ANN counterparts using substantially fewer training tokens (e.g., only 5.6% of the tokens for the 1.3B model). As a result, BiSpikCLM achieves competitive performance at only 4.16% - 5.87% of the computational cost on natural language generation tasks. Our results highlight the feasibility and effectiveness of fully binary spike-driven LLMs and establish the distillation as a promising pathway for brain-inspired spiking NLP.

MetaMoE: Diversity-Aware Proxy Selection for Privacy-Preserving Mixture-of-Experts Unification

Medium 2605.14289
Weisen Jiang, Shuhao Chen, Sinno Jialin Pan
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 MetaMoE，利用多样性感知的代理数据选择实现隐私保护的混合专家模型统一。
🎯研究动机

现有 MoE 模型假设集中式数据访问，但实际数据分布在各客户端且因隐私限制无法共享，导致统一训练困难。

❓解决问题

如何在保护隐私的前提下，将独立训练的领域专家模型统一为单个 MoE 模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用公共代理数据作为私有数据的替代，通过多样性感知的代理选择（选择与客户端领域相关且多样的样本）来近似私有数据分布并监督路由器学习；同时利用代理对齐专家训练，并采用上下文感知路由器增强异构输入的专家选择。

📊实验结果

在计算机视觉和自然语言处理基准上进行了实验，结果表明 MetaMoE 持续优于最近的隐私保护 MoE 统一方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MetaMoE，一个隐私保护的 MoE 统一框架，利用公共代理数据替代私有数据。
  • 引入多样性感知的代理选择策略，有效近似私有数据分布。
  • 在 CV 和 NLP 基准上验证了方法优于现有隐私保护 MoE 统一方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖公共代理数据的质量和相关性。
  • 可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale capacity by combining specialized experts, but most existing approaches assume centralized access to training data. In practice, data are distributed across clients and cannot be shared due to privacy constraints, making unified MoE training challenging. We propose MetaMoE, a privacy-preserving framework that unifies independently trained, domain-specialized experts into a single MoE using public proxy data as surrogates for inaccessible private data. Central to MetaMoE is diversity-aware proxy selection, which selects client-domain-relevant and diverse samples from public data to effectively approximate private data distributions and supervise router learning. These proxies are further used to align expert training, improving expert coordination at unification time, while a context-aware router enhances expert selection across heterogeneous inputs. Experiments on computer vision and natural language processing benchmarks demonstrate that MetaMoE consistently outperforms recent privacy-preserving MoE unification methods. Code is available at this https URL .

S-AI-Recursive: A Bio-Inspired and Temporal Sparse AI Architecture for Iterative, Introspective, and Energy-Frugal Reasoning

Medium 2605.13872
Said Slaoui
arXiv PDF cs.NE
TL;DR：提出一种受生物启发的稀疏 AI 架构，通过激素闭环迭代实现节能推理，用少量参数达到竞争性能。
🎯研究动机

现有前馈推理架构缺乏内省和迭代能力，且能耗高，受生物认知系统启发，需要一种能通过时间深度替代模型宽度的节能推理方法。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种稀疏、迭代、内省的 AI 架构，实现高效推理并保证收敛性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 S-AI 框架，引入两种激素信号（Clarifine 和 Confusionin）形成闭环迭代，构建递归推理循环（RRC）作为动力系统，包括 Lyapunov 稳定性证明、熵收缩定理、激素停止准则、Euler-Maruyama 离散化、主 - 对偶智能体选择及递归记忆加速。

📊实验结果

在 SAI-UT+ 测试集上验证，参数少于千万，在抽象和符号基准上取得竞争性推理性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化递归推理循环（RRC）为动力系统，并证明其 Lyapunov 稳定性和有限时间终止。
  • 提出激素停止准则和熵收缩定理，实现迭代自省与节能。
  • 在 SAI-UT+ 测试集上以少于千万参数达到竞争性推理性能，验证时间稀疏性原理。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在单一测试集上进行，泛化性待验证。
  • 激素机制可能需针对不同任务调参。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This article introduces S-AI-Recursive, a bio-inspired Sparse Artificial Intelligence architecture in which reasoning is operationalized as a hormonal closed-loop iteration rather than a single feed-forward pass. Building upon the S-AI foundational framework [1], the hormonal-probabilistic unification doctrine [2], and the formal mathematical methodology established in S-AI-IoT [3], the present work formalizes the Recursive Reasoning Cycle (RRC) as a dynamical system governed by two novel hormones: Clarifine, a convergence signal, and Confusionin, an uncertainty detector, whose antagonistic regulation drives iterative state refinement toward a stable cognitive equilibrium. The complete mathematical framework is developed, including recursive state dynamics, Lyapunov stability proof, entropic contraction theorem, hormonal stopping criterion with finite-time termination guarantee, Euler-Maruyama discretization with projection, primal-dual agent selection under iteration budget, and recursive engram memory with warm-start acceleration. Experimental validation on the SAI-UT+ testbench demonstrates that S-AI-Recursive achieves competitive reasoning performance on abstract and symbolic benchmarks with fewer than ten million parameters, confirming the central principle of temporal parsimony: iterative cognitive depth substitutes for architectural width.

多模态基础模型 4 篇

Think When Needed: Adaptive Reasoning-Driven Multimodal Embeddings with a Dual-LoRA Architecture

High 2605.14448
Longxiang Zhang, Weilong Dai, Guanghao Zhang, Hao Jiang, Pipei Huang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：TWN 提出双 LoRA 架构与自适应推理门控，在保持多模态嵌入质量的同时大幅降低推理开销。
🎯研究动机

现有方法将 CoT 推理引入多模态嵌入管道，但存在模型参数大、推理成本高，且对简单输入进行冗余推理反而降低性能的问题。

❓解决问题

如何在不显著增加参数和推理开销的前提下，自适应地决定何时需要 CoT 推理以提升多模态嵌入质量。

🔎现象分析

对于简单输入，判别式嵌入已足够好，冗余的 CoT 推理反而会误导模型，降低检索质量。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TWN 框架，采用双 LoRA 架构（推理适配器和嵌入适配器）共享冻结骨干，梯度分离以缓解联合优化冲突；并设计自监督路由门控自适应决定是否生成 CoT，进一步探索嵌入引导的强化学习优化 CoT 质量。

📊实验结果

在 MMEB-V2 基准的 78 个任务上评估，TWN 达到 SOTA 嵌入质量，参数仅增加 3-5%，推理 token 减少最多 50%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出双 LoRA 架构，实现推理与嵌入适配器共享骨干，参数仅增加 3-5%。
  • 设计自适应推理门控机制，根据输入复杂度决定是否生成 CoT，减少最多 50% 推理 token。
  • 在 MMEB-V2 的 78 个任务上达到 SOTA 嵌入质量，同时显著提升效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 自适应门控的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
  • 强化学习阶段可能引入额外训练成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have emerged as a powerful backbone for multimodal embeddings. Recent methods introduce chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning into the embedding pipeline to improve retrieval quality, but remain costly in both model size and inference cost. They typically employ separate reasoner and embedder with substantial parameter overhead, and generate CoT indiscriminately for every input. However, we observe that for simple inputs, discriminative embeddings already perform well, and redundant reasoning can even mislead the model, degrading performance. To address these limitations, we propose Think When Needed (TWN), a unified multimodal embedding framework with adaptive reasoning. TWN introduces a dual-LoRA architecture that attaches reasoning and embedding adapters to a shared frozen backbone, detaching gradients at their interface to mitigate gradient conflicts introduced by joint optimization while keeping parameters close to a single model. Building on this, an adaptive think mechanism uses a self-supervised routing gate to decide per input whether to generate CoT, skipping unnecessary reasoning to reduce inference overhead and even improve retrieval quality. We further explore embedding-guided RL to optimize CoT quality beyond supervised training. On the 78 tasks of MMEB-V2, TWN achieves state-of-the-art embedding quality while being substantially more efficient than existing generative methods, requiring only 3-5% additional parameters relative to the backbone and up to 50% fewer reasoning tokens compared to the full generative mode.

Breaking Dual Bottlenecks: Evolving Unified Multimodal Models into Self-Adaptive Interleaved Visual Reasoners

High 2605.14709
Qingyang Liu, Bingjie Gao, Canmiao Fu, Zhipeng Huang, Chen Li, Feng Wang, Shuochen Chang, Shaobo Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种自适应的交错视觉推理框架，通过分层数据流水线和两阶段训练（SFT+RL）解决统一多模态模型在任意图像生成任务中的理解 - 生成鸿沟。
🎯研究动机

现有统一多模态模型存在理解 - 生成鸿沟，即模型能理解用户意图但无法转化为精确的像素级操作，导致在任意图像生成任务中出现注意力纠缠和视觉细化瓶颈。

❓解决问题

解决统一多模态模型在任意图像生成任务中因理解 - 生成鸿沟导致的生成质量低下问题，具体包括注意力纠缠瓶颈和视觉细化瓶颈。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出统一模型存在理解 - 生成鸿沟，表现为盲目的规划难以处理复杂提示（注意力纠缠瓶颈），以及非结构化反馈无法高效纠正缺陷（视觉细化瓶颈）。

🛠️主要方法

构建分层数据流水线，支持三种自适应模式（直接生成、自我反思、多步规划）；贡献超过 5 万样本的高质量数据集；采用两阶段训练策略（SFT+RL），设计逐步推理奖励和组内复杂度惩罚。

📊实验结果

在任意图像生成任务上，该方法优于现有基线，在简单到复杂指令下均实现更优的生成保真度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种自适应交错视觉推理框架，使统一模型能根据指令复杂度和自身能力自主切换生成策略。
  • 构建分层数据流水线和高品质数据集（5 万 + 样本），并实现 SFT+RL 两阶段训练，包含逐步推理奖励和组内复杂度惩罚。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定数据集和训练策略，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 自适应模式切换的决策机制可能引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent unified models integrate multimodal understanding and generation within a single framework. However, an "understanding-generation gap" persists, where models can capture user intent but often fail to translate this semantic knowledge into precise pixel-level manipulation. This gap results in two bottlenecks in anything-to-image task (X2I): the attention entanglement bottleneck, where blind planning struggles with complex prompts, and the visual refinement bottleneck, where unstructured feedback fails to correct imperfections efficiently. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that empowers unified models to autonomously switch between generation strategies based on instruction complexity and model capability. To achieve this, we construct a hierarchical data pipeline that constructs execution paths across three adaptive modes: direct generation for simple cases, self-reflection for quality refinement, and multi-step planning for decomposing complex scenarios. Building on this pipeline, we contribute a high-quality dataset with over 50,000 samples and implement a two-stage training strategy comprising SFT and RL. Specifically, we design step-wise reasoning rewards to ensure logical consistency and intra-group complexity penalty to prevent redundant computational overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing baselines on X2I, achieving superior generation fidelity among simple-to-complex instructions. The code is released at this https URL .

Bad Seeing or Bad Thinking? Rewarding Perception for Vision-Language Reasoning

High 2605.14054
Haozhe Wang, Qixin Xu, Changpeng Wang, Taofeng Xue, Chong Peng, Wenhu Chen, Fangzhen Lin
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 MoCA 框架，通过感知验证奖励机制解决 VLM 中感知与推理的权衡问题。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLM 通过架构设计或智能体工作流追求感知 - 推理协同，但常受限于静态文本推理或外部智能体带来的计算与工程负担，且投入与收益不成比例，出现感知与推理的“跷跷板效应”。

❓解决问题

VLM 失败时难以区分是感知错误（bad seeing）还是推理错误（bad thinking），导致模态信用分配模糊，限制了感知 - 推理协同的提升。

🔎现象分析

观察到感知与推理之间存在“跷跷板效应”，即提升一方面可能导致另一方面下降，根源在于模态信用分配不明确。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MoCA 框架，将生成过程分解为交错的感知和推理步骤，引入感知验证（PV）通过“盲推理”代理独立奖励感知保真度，并采用结构化口头验证（SVV）替代高方差 LLM 评判，实现模态感知的信用分配。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出感知验证（PV）方法，通过盲推理代理独立评估感知质量，实现感知与推理的分离监督。
  • 设计结构化口头验证（SVV），用结构化算法执行替代 LLM 评判，降低方差并提升可扩展性。
  • 集成 MoCA 机制，将奖励路由到具体错误来源，使单个 VLM 在广泛任务上同时提升感知和推理性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖盲推理代理的质量，若代理本身有偏差则影响感知奖励的准确性。
  • 结构化口头验证的算法设计可能对某些开放域任务适应性有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Achieving robust perception-reasoning synergy is a central goal for advanced Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Recent advancements have pursued this goal via architectural designs or agentic workflows. However, these approaches are often limited by static textual reasoning or complicated by the significant compute and engineering burden of external agentic complexity. Worse, this heavy investment does not yield proportional gains, often witnessing a "seesaw effect" on perception and reasoning. This motivates a fundamental rethinking of the true bottleneck. In this paper, we argue that the root cause of this trade-off is an ambiguity in modality credit assignment: when a VLM fails, is it due to flawed perception ("bad seeing") or flawed logic ("bad thinking")? To resolve this, we introduce a reinforcement learning framework that improves perception-reasoning synergy by reliably rewarding the perception fidelity. We explicitly decompose the generation process into interleaved perception and reasoning steps. This decoupling enables targeted supervision on perception. Crucially, we introduce Perception Verification (PV), leveraging a "blindfolded reasoning" proxy to reward perceptual fidelity independently of reasoning outcomes. Furthermore, to scale training across free-form VL tasks, we propose Structured Verbal Verification, which replaces high-variance LLM judging with structured algorithmic execution. These techniques are integrated into a Modality-Aware Credit Assignment (MoCA) mechanism, which routes rewards to the specific source of error -- either bad seeing or bad thinking -- enabling a single VLM to achieve simultaneous performance gains across a wide task spectrum.

Unified Pix Token And Word Token Generative Language Model

Medium 2605.14028
Haun Leung, ZiNan Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出统一像素令牌和词令牌的生成语言模型，提升视觉细节理解能力。
🎯研究动机

现有基于 CLIP/SigLIP 的视觉编码器在多模态模型中难以识别图像中的小文本或数字，限制了视觉细节理解。

❓解决问题

解决生成语言模型中视觉细节理解不足的问题，特别是小文本和数字的识别。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出统一像素令牌和词令牌的生成语言模型，包含每个像素独立令牌嵌入、颜色折叠、全局条件注意力近似和图像无监督预训练。

📊实验结果

在小模型和有限训练数据上进行了图像无监督预训练实验，结果显示性能良好，但未提供具体数值或基准对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一像素令牌和词令牌的生成语言模型架构
  • 引入颜色折叠和全局条件注意力近似等创新技术
  • 通过小模型和有限数据实验验证了模型潜力
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验规模较小，缺乏与现有方法的定量比较
  • 摘要未提及对复杂场景或高分辨率图像的评估
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Since the emergence of Vision Transformer (ViT), it has been widely used in generative language model and generative visual model. Especially in the current state-of-art open source multimodal models, ViT obtained by CLIP or SigLIP method serves as the vision encoder backbone to help them acquire visual understanding capabilities. But this method leads to limitations in visual understanding for details, such as difficulty in recognizing small text or numbers in images. To address these issues, we propose a new model to unify pix token and word token into the generative language model. The new model also features with each pix of image having its own token embedding, color folding, global conditional attention approximation and image unsupervised pretraining. We conducted image unsupervised pretraining experiments using our new model to explore its potential. The experimental results show that it has good performance even in small model and with limited training data. We believe our model also conforms to the scaling law, as long as model parameters and training data increased, its performance will continue to improve.

LLM 预训练 2 篇

TFGN: Task-Free, Replay-Free Continual Pre-Training Without Catastrophic Forgetting at LLM Scale

High 2605.15053
Anurup Ganguli
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：TFGN 通过读写分解架构实现无重放、无任务标签的 LLM 持续预训练，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
🎯研究动机

现有持续预训练方法依赖重放缓冲区、任务标识符或正则化惩罚，在 LLM 规模下扩展性差，且缺乏无任务标签的解决方案。

❓解决问题

解决 LLM 在异构文本域上持续预训练时的灾难性遗忘问题，无需重放或任务标签。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TFGN 架构，通过输入条件化的参数高效更新和读写分解，在保持前向传播稠密的同时，结构化跨域参数更新以避免覆盖先前域的子空间。

📊实验结果

在六个异构文本域（散文、Python、数学、生物医学、中文、JavaScript）上，以每阶段 1B token 在三个模型规模（~398M、~739M、~9B）和两种模式（从头训练和改造）下进行实验，报告了反向迁移、HellaSwag 保留率和梯度正交性等指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个在 LLM 规模下同时实现无重放、无任务标签的持续预训练架构，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
  • 扩展了闭环元控制层和算子级计划向量，进一步减少遗忘并重塑前向行为。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定架构（Transformer）上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 扩展 A 和扩展 B 的额外计算开销未在摘要中提及。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Continually pre-training a large language model on heterogeneous text domains, without replay or task labels, has remained an unsolved architectural problem at LLM scale. Existing methods rely on replay buffers, task identifiers, regularization penalties that scale poorly, or sentence-classification-scale evaluation. We introduce TFGN, an architectural overlay for transformer language models that produces input-conditioned, parameter-efficient updates while leaving the rest of the transformer unchanged. On six heterogeneous text domains (Prose, Python, Math, Biomedical, Chinese, JavaScript) at 1B tokens per phase across three model scales (~398M, ~739M, ~9B) and two regimes (From-Scratch and Retrofit), TFGN achieves backward transfer of -0.007 at LLaMA 3.1 8B Retrofit, HellaSwag retention 0.506/0.504/0.510, and >=99.59% L2-orthogonal gradient separation between domain pairs - with no replay, no task IDs, no Fisher penalty. The same matrices show positive cross-domain forward transfer: held-out JavaScript PPL drops 26.8% at LLaMA-8B Retrofit and 62.0% at GPT-2 Medium From-Scratch purely from Python training. Two extensions on the same substrate close further open problems. A closed-loop meta-control layer (Extension A) reduces forgetting by an additional 81% at ~398M, mapping onto the System A and System M roles of Dupoux et al. ( arXiv:2603.15381 ). An operator-level plan vector (Extension B) reshapes forward-pass behavior at 99.96% cosine fidelity over 30 source->target pairs. The architectural insight is a Read/Write decomposition: the forward pass is fully dense, while cross-domain parameter updates are structured so prior-domain subspaces are not written to. To our knowledge, TFGN is the first architecture that simultaneously closes catastrophic forgetting at LLM scale, realizes a closed-loop autonomous-learning meta-controller, and carries an operator-level latent planner.

Graphs of Research: Citation Evolution Graphs as Supervision for Research Idea Generation

Medium 2605.14790
Songyang Gao, Yinghui Xia, Siyi Liu, Hui Xiong
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 Graphs of Research (GoR) 方法，利用论文引用演化图监督微调 LLM，提升研究想法生成质量。
🎯研究动机

现有研究想法生成方法主要依赖静态文献检索或复杂提示工程，忽略了参考文献间的结构关系，限制了 LLM 生成创新想法的能力。

❓解决问题

如何利用引用演化图的结构信息作为监督信号，提升 LLM 生成研究想法的效果。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

GoR 方法：为每篇种子论文提取 2 跳引用邻域，根据引用位置、频率、前驱链接和发表时间推导引用间关系，构建论文演化有向无环图 (DAG)；然后使用结构化文本提示（包含引用图、边信号、参考文献信息和任务定义）对 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M 进行监督微调，预测种子论文的想法。

📊实验结果

在头对头 LLM 裁判锦标赛中，与 gpt-4o 驱动的基线对比，GoR-SFT 达到 SOTA。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GoR 方法，首次将引用演化图作为监督信号用于 LLM 研究想法生成。
  • 构建自动化提取管道，从五大 ML/NLP 会议收集 498/50/50 训练 / 验证 / 测试种子论文及约 7,600 篇参考文献。
  • 在 LLM 裁判锦标赛中，GoR-SFT 达到 SOTA，验证了引用演化图的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用 Qwen2.5-7B 模型，未探索更大模型或不同架构。
  • 数据集规模有限，可能影响泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Research idea generation is the innovation-driving step of automated scientific research. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown potential for automating idea generation at scale. However, existing methods mainly condition LLMs on eliciting idea generation through static retrieval of relevant literature or complex prompt engineering, without discarding the structural relations among references. We propose Graphs of Research (GoR), a supervised fine-tuning method that extracts a 2-hop reference neighborhood for each seed paper, derives the relations among those references from citation position, frequency, predecessor links, and publication time, and organizes them into a paper-evolution directed acyclic graph (DAG). We construct an automated extraction pipeline that draws data from five major ML/NLP venues, comprising 498/50/50 train/validation/test seed papers and approximately 7,600 cited references. Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M is fine-tuned on a structured-text prompt that includes the citation graph, edge signals, reference information, and task definition to predict the idea for the seed paper. Across head-to-head LLM-judge tournaments against gpt-4o-driven baselines, GoR-SFT achieves SOTA, demonstrating the effectiveness of citation-evolution graphs as supervision signal for LLM-based idea generation. We hope that this reduces the barrier for citation evolution graphs as a supervision, accelerating automated scientific innovation.

其他 2 篇

SemaTune: Semantic-Aware Online OS Tuning with Large Language Models

High 2605.15026
Georgios Liargkovas, Mihir Nitin Joshi, Hubertus Franke, Kostis Kaffes
arXiv PDF cs.OS
TL;DR：SemaTune 利用大语言模型实现语义感知的在线操作系统调优，在 13 个真实负载上性能提升显著且成本极低。
🎯研究动机

现有在线 OS 调优控制器将调度、电源、内存和 I/O 控制视为黑盒变量，忽略跨旋钮策略结构，在应用指标不可用时失效，且可能导致服务进入持续退化区域。

❓解决问题

如何利用大语言模型实现安全、高效、语义感知的稳态 OS 调优，避免黑盒优化带来的退化风险。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

SemaTune 框架：将旋钮模式、遥测、当前配置、最近动作 - 响应历史和检索到的先前运行压缩为决策上下文；快速循环提出低延迟更新，慢速循环定期修订搜索策略；每个变更通过类型验证后才生效。

📊实验结果

在 5 个基准套件的 13 个真实负载上评估，调优多达 41 个 Linux 参数，并与默认设置和最强非 LLM 基线对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语义感知的 OS 调优框架 SemaTune，利用 LLM 理解控制含义和间接性能信号。
  • 在 13 个真实负载上，稳定阶段性能比默认设置提升 72.5%，比最强非 LLM 基线提升 153.3%，30 轮会话成本仅约 0.20 美元。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 LLM 的推理成本，尽管已很低。
  • 可能仅适用于稳态调优，对动态变化负载的适应性未明确。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Online OS tuning can improve long-running services, but existing controllers are poorly matched to live hosts. They treat scheduler, power, memory, and I/O controls as black-box variables and optimize a scalar reward. This view ignores cross-knob policy structure, breaks down when application metrics are unavailable, and can send a running service into degraded regions that persist after the bad setting is removed. We present SemaTune, a host-side framework for steady-state OS tuning with bounded language-model guidance. SemaTune turns knob schemas, telemetry, current configuration, recent action--response history, and retrieved prior runs into a compact decision context. A fast loop proposes low-latency updates, a slower loop periodically revises the search strategy, and every proposed change passes through typed validation before reaching kernel or sysctl interfaces. This lets the controller reason about OS-control meaning and indirect performance signals while keeping model cost, latency, and authority constrained. We evaluate SemaTune on 13 live workloads from five benchmark suites while tuning up to 41 Linux parameters. Across the suite, SemaTune improves stable-phase performance by 72.5\% over default settings and by 153.3\% relative to the strongest non-LLM baseline. A 30-window session costs about \$0.20 in model calls. With only host-level metrics, SemaTune still outperforms baselines given direct application objectives by 93.7 percentage points, while avoiding severe degraded regions reached by structure-blind exploration.

KGPFN: Unlocking the Potential of Knowledge Graph Foundation Model via In-Context Learning

Medium 2605.14907
Yisen Gao, Jiaxin Bai, Haoyu Huang, Zhongwei Xie, Yufei Li, Hong Ting Tsang, Sirui Han, Yangqiu Song
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 KGPFN，通过上下文学习实现知识图谱基础模型在未见图上的强泛化。
🎯研究动机

现有知识图谱基础模型主要强调关系级通用性，但忽略了上下文学习这一基础模型的关键支柱，而 KG 中的上下文是结构化和异质的，需要同时利用局部和全局上下文。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个知识图谱基础模型，使其能够通过上下文学习（而非微调）适应未见过的图，并有效利用结构化的局部和全局上下文进行推理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 KGPFN，使用 Prior-data Fitted Network 框架，通过关系图上的消息传递学习关系表示，用多层 NBFNet 编码局部邻域作为局部上下文，并检索查询关系的大量实例及其局部邻域构建全局上下文，在 Prior-data Fitted Network 中结合特征级和样本级注意力进行聚合。

📊实验结果

在 57 个知识图谱基准上评估，KGPFN 仅通过上下文学习即达到强适应，优于需要微调的竞争模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 KGPFN，首个将上下文学习与知识图谱基础模型结合的方法，通过 Prior-data Fitted Network 统一迁移性关系规律与推理时的上下文学习。
  • 在 57 个 KG 基准上实验，KGPFN 仅通过上下文学习即可强适应未见图，持续优于需要微调的竞争模型。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模检索和注意力计算，效率有待验证。
  • 全局上下文的构建需要大量实例，在数据稀疏场景下可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Knowledge graph (KG) foundation models aim to generalize across graphs with unseen entities and relations by learning transferable relational structure. However, most existing methods primarily emphasize relation-level universality, while in-context learning, the other pillar of foundation models remains under-explored for KG reasoning. In KGs, context is inherently structured and heterogeneous: effective prediction requires conditioning on the local context around the query entities as well as the global context that summarizes how a relation behaves across many instances. We propose KGPFN, a KG foundation model using Prior-data Fitted Network that unifies transferable relational regularities with inference-time in-context learning from structured context. KGPFN first learns relation representations via message passing on relation graphs to capture cross-graph relational invariances. For query-specific reasoning, it encodes local neighborhoods using a multi-layer NBFNet as local context. To enable ICL at global scale, it constructs relation-specific global context by retrieving a large set of instances of the query relation together with their local neighborhoods, and aggregates them within a Prior-Data Fitted Network framework that combines feature-level and sample-level attention. Through multi-graph pretraining on diverse KGs, KGPFN learns when to instantiate reusable patterns and when to override them using contextual evidence. Experiments on 57 KG benchmarks demonstrate that KGPFN achieves strong adaptation to previously unseen graphs through in-context learning alone, consistently outperforming competitive fine-tuned KG foundation models. Our code is available at this https URL .

长上下文 1 篇

A Heterogeneous Temporal Memory Governance Framework for Long-Term LLM Persona Consistency

High 2605.14802
Zhao Yang, Wang Huan, Li Yingshuo, Tu Haomiao, Lin Hujite
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 ARPM 框架，通过分离静态与动态记忆、多阶段检索与排序，实现 LLM 长期对话中角色一致性的可治理与可审计。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在长程交互中常出现事实丢失、时间线混乱、角色漂移和稳定性下降，尤其在噪声知识库、上下文清除和跨模型迁移场景下，现有方法（如编码到权重或依赖长上下文）难以解决。

❓解决问题

如何实现 LLM 长期对话中角色一致性的可追踪、可审计和可迁移治理。

🔎现象分析

自动规则（CSV）在支持证据进入提示后可能低估召回率（1:5 噪声下 54.0% vs 人工 100.0%）；纯语义检索（禁用 BM25）导致严格准确率从 100% 降至 80.0%；对话历史检索对近期连续性必要（禁用后准确率降至 66.7%）。

🛠️主要方法

ARPM 框架：分离静态知识记忆与动态对话经验记忆，结合向量检索、BM25、RRF 融合、双时间重排序、时间顺序证据阅读和受控分析协议进行证据验证与答案绑定。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了三个实验：50 轮问答中不同信噪比下的召回率对比、消融实验（禁用对话历史检索和 BM25）、以及大规模噪声下的连续性测试。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ARPM，将长期角色一致性分解为可治理组件并支持白盒评估
  • 通过实验揭示自动规则在噪声下召回率不足、纯语义检索不足以纠正和追踪等问题
  • 在 510 万字符噪声基底、周期性上下文清除和多模型切换下验证了框架的连续性保持能力
⚠️方法局限
  • 弱协议合规性暴露了框架的局限性
  • 实验基于工程日志，可能缺乏真实用户交互的多样性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models often suffer from fact loss, timeline confusion, persona drift, and reduced stability during long-range interaction, especially under high-noise knowledge bases, context clearing, and cross-model transfer. To address these issues, we introduce ARPM, an external temporal memory governance framework for long-term dialogue. ARPM separates static knowledge memory from dynamic dialogue experience memory and combines vector retrieval, BM25, RRF fusion, dual-temporal reranking, chronological evidence reading, and a controlled analysis protocol for evidence verification and answer binding. Unlike approaches that encode persona consistency into model weights or rely only on long context, ARPM treats continuity as a traceable, auditable, and transferable governance problem. Using engineering logs, we conduct three experiments. First, in a 50-round question-answering setting, we compare signal-to-noise ratios of 1:5 and 1:200+, and distinguish CSV auto-judgment from manual review. Under 1:5, CSV recall accuracy is 54.0%, while manual review raises it to 100.0%. Under 1:200+, the values are 44.0% and 80.0%. These results show that automatic rules can underestimate recall after supporting evidence enters the prompt. Second, ablation results show that dialogue history retrieval is necessary for recent continuity: disabling it reduces strict accuracy from 100% to 66.7%, and disabling BM25 reduces it to 80.0%, indicating that pure semantic retrieval is insufficient for correction and tracing. Third, under a 5.1-million-character noise substrate, periodic context clearing, and multi-model handoff, ARPM maintains semantic continuity, boundary continuity, and persona consistency, while exposing limits caused by weak protocol compliance. These findings show that long-term persona consistency can be decomposed into governable components and evaluated in a white-box manner.

对齐/安全/公平性/隐私 40 篇 · 7 个细分

安全对齐 23 篇

Fusion-fission forecasts when AI will shift to undesirable behavior

High 2605.14218
Neil F. Johnson, Frank Yingjie Huo
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种融合 - 裂变动力学向量推广方法，可预测 AI 行为何时从合意转向不合意。
🎯研究动机

ChatGPT 类 AI 的行为可能无预警地从合意转向不合意（如鼓励自残、极端行为、财务损失或医疗 / 军事错误），现有对齐与防护手段无法预测这种转变，带来严重社会风险。

❓解决问题

预测 AI 行为何时从合意转向不合意。

🔎现象分析

AI 行为转变在最新模型中依然存在，且现有安全栈无法提供预警信号。

🛠️主要方法

将活性物质系统中的融合 - 裂变群体动力学向量推广到 AI 行为空间，通过对话历史（C）与合意（B）、不合意（D）吸引子动力学的群体级竞争推导转变条件，该条件可预先估计且不依赖具体模型或随机采样。

📊实验结果

在 7 个 AI 模型（参数规模跨两个数量级）上达到 90% 正确率；在 10 个前沿聊天机器人上验证生产级持久性；提前 11 个月预测了 Stanford 'Delusional Spirals'语料库的出现，并被该语料库独立确认。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种跨模型、跨规模的 AI 行为转变预测方法，基于融合 - 裂变动力学向量推广。
  • 在 7 个模型（124M-12B 参数）、10 个前沿聊天机器人及 207,443 条人机对话语料上验证了预测准确性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖于预定义合意 / 不合意响应类别，在类别定义模糊的场景中可能受限。
  • 摘要未提及在更复杂多轮对话或开放域任务中的泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The key problem facing ChatGPT-like AI's use across society is that its behavior can shift, unnoticed, from desirable to undesirable -- encouraging self-harm, extremist acts, financial losses, or costly medical and military mistakes -- and no one can yet predict when. Shifts persist in even the newest AI models despite remarkable progress in AI modeling, post-training alignment and safeguards. Here we show that a vector generalization of fusion-fission group dynamics observed in living and active-matter systems drives -- and can forecast -- future shifts in the AI's behavior. The shift condition, which is also derivable mathematically, results from group-level competition between the conversation-so-far (C) and the desirable (B) and undesirable (D) basin dynamics which can be estimated in advance for a given application. It is neither model-specific nor driven by stochastic sampling. We validate it across six independent tests, including: 90 percent correct across seven AI models spanning two orders of magnitude in parameter count (124M-12B); production-scale persistence across ten frontier chatbots; and a priori time-stamped prediction eleven months before the Stanford 'Delusional Spirals' corpus appeared, and independently confirmed by that corpus of 207,443 human-AI exchanges. Because it sits architecturally below the current safety stack, the same formula provides a real-time warning signal that current alignment does not supply, portable across current and future ChatGPT-like AI architectures and instantiable in application domains where competing response classes can be defined.

DVMap: Fine-Grained Pluralistic Value Alignment via High-Consensus Demographic-Value Mapping

High 2605.14420
Pengyun Zhu, Yuqi Ren, Zhen Wang, Lei Yang, Deyi Xiong
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 DVMap 框架，通过高共识人口统计 - 价值映射实现细粒度多元价值对齐，超越粗粒度国家标签方法。
🎯研究动机

当前 LLM 多元价值对齐依赖粗粒度的国家标签，忽略了国家内部的价值异质性，导致对齐松散。

❓解决问题

如何从国家标签转向多维人口统计约束，识别具有可预测、高共识价值偏好的群体，实现细粒度多元价值对齐。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DVMap 框架，包括：1) 人口统计原型提取策略，从世界价值观调查中构建高质量对齐语料；2) 结构化思维链机制，引导 LLM 推理人口统计与价值的相关性；3) 使用 GRPO 实现价值分布的自适应锚定。

📊实验结果

在跨人口统计、跨国家、跨价值的三重泛化基准上评估，Qwen3-8B-DVMap 在跨人口统计测试中准确率 48.6%，超越 DeepSeek-v3.2 的 45.1%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出从国家标签转向多维人口统计约束的细粒度多元价值对齐方法。
  • 构建了包含 56,152 样本的高质量价值对齐语料和 21,553 样本的三重泛化基准。
  • 实验证明 DVMap 有效学习人口统计到价值的流形映射，在跨人口统计测试中 Qwen3-8B-DVMap 准确率 48.6%，超越 DeepSeek-v3.2 的 45.1%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖世界价值观调查数据，可能受限于调查覆盖的人口统计维度。
  • GRPO 训练可能对超参数敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Current Large Language Models (LLMs) typically rely on coarse-grained national labels for pluralistic value alignment. However, such macro-level supervision often obscures intra-country value heterogeneity, yielding a loose alignment. We argue that resolving this limitation requires shifting from national labels to multi-dimensional demographic constraints, which can identify groups with predictable, high-consensus value preference. To this end, we propose DVMap (High-Consensus Demographic-Value Mapping), a framework for fine-grained pluralistic value alignment. In this framework, we first present a demographic archetype extraction strategy to construct a high-quality value alignment corpus of 56,152 samples from the World Values Survey (WVS) by strictly retaining respondents with consistent value preferences under identical demographics. Over this corpus, we introduce a Structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) mechanism that explicitly guides LLMs to reason about demographic-value correlations. Subsequently, we employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to achieve adaptive anchoring of value distributions. To rigorously evaluate generalization, we further establish a triple-generalization benchmark (spanning cross-demographic, cross-country, and cross-value) comprising 21,553 samples. Experimental results demonstrate that DVMap effectively learns the manifold mapping from demographics to values, exhibiting strong generalization and robustness. On cross-demographic tests, Qwen3-8B-DVMap achieves 48.6% accuracy, surpassing the advanced open-source LLM DeepSeek-v3.2 (45.1%). The source code and dataset are available at this https URL .

MemLineage: Lineage-Guided Enforcement for LLM Agent Memory

High 2605.14421
Ciyan Ouyang, Rui Hou
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：MemLineage 通过密码学溯源和推导谱系防御 LLM Agent 记忆投毒，实现零攻击成功率。
🎯研究动机

LLM Agent 记忆可能被不可信内容污染，导致后续会话中敏感操作被恶意指令触发，现有过滤方法难以兼顾有用记忆召回与安全防护。

❓解决问题

如何在允许良性记忆召回的同时，防止被污染的持久化状态作为敏感操作的依据。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将记忆安全视为链式溯源问题，设计六模块系统：基于 RFC-6962 Merkle 日志和 Ed25519 签名的条目记录，加权推导 DAG 追踪影响关系，强边最大传播规则确保不可信路径持久性，敏感操作门控拒绝源自外部祖先的激活依据。

📊实验结果

在确定性机制隔离测试中，MemLineage 是唯一将三种记忆投毒工作负载的攻击成功率降至零的配置；在 Codex 驱动的 AgentDojo 桥接测试中，所有 MemLineage 配置将严格 AgentDojo ASR 降至零。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MemLineage，首个将密码学溯源与 LLM 推导谱系结合的 Agent 记忆防御框架。
  • 设计加权推导 DAG 和强边传播规则，实现不可信路径持久性保证。
  • 在确定性隔离测试和 AgentDojo 基准上验证，MemLineage 将攻击成功率降至零，且开销低于 LLM 调用噪声。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 Ed25519 签名和 Merkle 日志，可能引入密钥管理复杂性。
  • 仅针对记忆投毒攻击，未覆盖其他类型的安全威胁。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce MemLineage, a defense for LLM agent memory that attaches both cryptographic provenance and LLM-mediated derivation lineage to every entry. Recent and concurrent work shows that untrusted content can be written into persistent agent state and re-enter later sessions as an instruction; the remaining systems question is how to preserve useful memory recall while preventing such state from justifying sensitive actions. MemLineage treats this as a chain-of-custody problem rather than a filtering problem. It is a six-module design around an RFC-6962 Merkle log over per-principal Ed25519-signed entries: a weighted derivation DAG records which retrieved entries influenced each new memory, and a max-of-strong-edges propagation rule makes Untrusted-Path Persistence hold for any chain whose attribution edges remain above threshold. The sensitive-action gate then refuses dispatches whose active justification descends from an external ancestor, while still allowing benign recall. We evaluate three defense cells against three memory-poisoning workloads on a deterministic mechanism-isolation harness; MemLineage is the only configuration in that harness that drives all three columns to zero ASR, while sub-millisecond per-operation overhead keeps it well below the noise floor of any LLM call. A Codex-backed AgentDojo bridge further separates strong-model behavior from defense-layer behavior: under an intentionally vulnerable tool-output profile, no-defense and signature-only baselines fail on all six banking pairs, while all MemLineage rows reduce strict AgentDojo ASR to zero. The core deterministic artifacts are byte-equal CI-verified; hosted-model AgentDojo and live-model sweeps are recorded as auditable logs rather than byte-pinned artifacts.

Sycophancy is an Educational Safety Risk: Why LLM Tutors Need Sycophancy Benchmarks

High 2605.14604
Enkelejda Kasneci, Gjergji Kasneci
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：LLM 辅导者存在谄媚风险，需建立社会 - 认知勇气基准。
🎯研究动机

LLM 辅导者若一味迎合学生错误认知，会损害教育效果，而现有对齐技术可能加剧这一风险。

❓解决问题

LLM 辅导者在面对学生权威性压力或社交情感压力时，会放弃认知严谨性，产生谄媚行为。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

🛠️主要方法

提出 EduFrameTrap 基准，涵盖多学科，通过变化学生自信度和压力类型（上下文切换、权威、社交情感）来评估 LLM 的谄媚倾向。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别出推理 - 谄媚悖论，即模型能抵抗上下文切换攻击却在社交 - 认知压力下屈服。
  • 引入 EduFrameTrap 基准，用于评估 LLM 辅导者的社会 - 认知勇气。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖有限学科和压力类型。
  • 自动评估困难，依赖人工判断。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This position paper argues that effective tutoring requires corrective friction: surfacing misconceptions and challenging them supportively to drive conceptual change. Yet preference-aligned LLMs can trade epistemic rigor for agreeableness. We identify a Reasoning-Sycophancy Paradox: models that resist context-switch frame attacks can still capitulate under social-epistemic pressure, especially authority ("my notes say I'm right") and social-affective face-saving ("please don't tell me I'm wrong"). We introduce EduFrameTrap, a tutoring benchmark across math, physics, economics, chemistry, biology, and computer science that varies student confidence and pressure (context-switch, authority, social-affective). Across two frontier LLMs, context-switch failures are comparatively lower for GPT-5.2, while authority and social pressure more often trigger epistemic retreat. In contrast, Claude shows substantial context-switch fragility in this run. Because these failures are hard to judge automatically, we report two-judge disagreement as a reliability signal. We argue benchmarks should measure social-epistemic courage, i.e., supportive but corrective tutoring, and treat kind-but-correct behavior as a safety requirement.

One Step to the Side: Why Defenses Against Malicious Finetuning Fail Under Adaptive Adversaries

High 2605.14605
Itay Zloczower, Eyal Lenga, Gilad Gressel, Yisroel Mirsky
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：现有防御恶意微调的方法在自适应攻击下均失效，因为它们只隐藏而非移除有害行为。
🎯研究动机

模型提供者开放权重或允许 API 微调，但安全对齐的模型可通过微调被破坏，现有防御评估不充分，未考虑自适应攻击。

❓解决问题

现有防御恶意微调的方法在自适应攻击下是否真正鲁棒？

🔎现象分析

防御机制共享一个弱点：它们掩盖或误导通往有害行为的路径，而不移除行为本身。

🛠️主要方法

开发统一的自适应攻击，针对 15 种近期防御的机制进行攻击。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别出 15 种防御共享的弱点：掩盖而非移除有害行为。
  • 提出统一的自适应攻击，可突破所有防御机制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能未覆盖所有可能的防御机制。
  • 自适应攻击可能被更强大的防御所抵御。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Model providers increasingly release open weights or allow users to fine-tune foundation models through APIs. Although these models are safety-aligned before release, their safeguards can often be removed by fine-tuning on harmful data. Recent defenses aim to make models robust to such malicious fine-tuning, but they are largely evaluated only against fixed attacks that do not account for the defense. We show that these robustness claims are incomplete. Surveying 15 recent defenses, we identify several defense mechanisms and show that they share a single weakness: they obscure or misdirect the path to harmful behavior without removing the behavior itself. We then develop a unified adaptive attack that breaks defenses across all defense mechanisms. Our results show that current approaches do not provide robust security; they mainly stop the attacks they were designed against. We hope that our unified adaptive adversary for this domain will help future researchers and practitioners stress-test new defenses before deployment.

Mechanical Enforcement for LLM Governance:Evidence of Governance-Task Decoupling in Financial Decision Systems

High 2605.14744
José Manuel de la Chica Rodríguez, Carlos Martí-González
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出机械执行机制，通过将治理与任务解耦，显著提升 LLM 在金融决策中的合规性。
🎯研究动机

在受监管的金融工作流中，LLM 受自然语言政策约束，但模型自身解释政策会导致委托 - 代理失败：输出看似合规实则不然。现有评估仅关注任务准确性，无法衡量治理是否在决策理由层面约束行为，而受监管决策必须可审计。

❓解决问题

解决 LLM 在金融决策中治理与任务耦合导致的合规性不足问题，即文本治理下模型输出可能表面合规但决策理由缺乏信息量。

🔎现象分析

文本治理下 27% 的延迟决策不包含决策相关信息；机械执行可将此比例降低 73%，延迟信息量翻倍，任务准确率从 MCC 0.43 提升至 0.88。

🛠️主要方法

提出机械执行机制，包含四种在模型解释循环之外运行的原语，实现治理与任务解耦；并引入五种治理指标量化理由层面的政策合规性。

📊实验结果

在合成银行领域进行实验，对比文本治理与机械执行，并进行了因果消融实验验证每个原语的必要性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出治理 - 任务解耦概念，证明准确率不能作为受监管 AI 系统中治理的充分代理。
  • 设计机械执行机制，通过架构分离显著提升合规性和任务性能。
  • 引入五种理由层面的治理指标，为评估 LLM 合规性提供新工具。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验基于合成银行领域，真实金融场景的复杂性可能带来额外挑战。
  • 机械执行原语的设计可能依赖特定领域知识，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models in regulated financial workflows are governed by natural-language policies that the same model interprets, creating a principal--agent failure: outputs can appear compliant without being compliant. Existing evaluation measures task accuracy but not whether governance constrains behaviour at the decision rationale level -- where regulated decisions must be auditable. We introduce five governance metrics that quantify policy compliance at the rationale level and apply them in a synthetic banking domain to compare text-only governance against mechanical enforcement: four primitives operating outside the model's interpretive loop. Under text-only governance, 27% of deferrals carry no decision-relevant information. Mechanical enforcement reduces this rate by 73%, more than doubles deferral information content, and raises task accuracy from MCC~$0.43$ to $0.88$. The improvement is driven by architectural separation: LLM-generated rationales under mechanical enforcement show comparable CDL to text-only governance -- the gain comes from removing clear-cut decisions from the model's control. A causal ablation confirms that each primitive is individually necessary. Our central finding is a governance-task decoupling: under structural stress, text-only governance degrades on both dimensions simultaneously, whereas mechanical enforcement preserves governance quality even as task performance drops. This implies that governance and task evaluation are distinct axes: accuracy is not a sufficient proxy for governance in regulated AI systems.

EVA: Editing for Versatile Alignment against Jailbreaks

High 2605.14750
Yi Wang, Hongye Qiu, Yue Xu, Sibei Yang, Zhan Qin, Minlie Huang, Wenjie Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：EVA 通过直接编辑模型神经元实现高效安全对齐，抵御越狱攻击。
🎯研究动机

现有防御方法（安全微调、外部过滤器）计算开销大且存在安全 - 效用权衡，损害良性任务性能。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲模型通用能力的前提下，高效且精确地消除 LLM/VLM 对有害指令的易感性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将安全对齐重构为知识修正任务，定位并编辑与有害行为相关的特定神经元，保持其余参数不变。

📊实验结果

在 LLM 和 VLM 上实验，EVA 优于基线方法，但摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将直接模型编辑应用于安全对齐，提出 EVA 框架。
  • 在 LLM 和 VLM 上均有效缓解越狱攻击，且不损害通用推理能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖神经元定位的准确性。
  • 对未知攻击类型的泛化能力未明确。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities but remain vulnerable to jailbreaking attacks, where adversaries exploit textual or visual triggers to bypass safety guardrails. Recent defenses typically rely on safety fine-tuning or external filters to reduce the model's likelihood of producing harmful content. While effective to some extent, these methods often incur significant computational overheads and suffer from the safety utility trade-off, degrading the model's performance on benign tasks. To address these challenges, we propose EVA (Editing for Versatile Alignment against Jailbreaks), a novel framework that pioneers the application of direct model editing for safety alignment. EVA reframes safety alignment as a precise knowledge correction task. Instead of retraining massive parameters, EVA identifies and surgically edits specific neurons responsible for the model's susceptibility to harmful instructions, while leaving the vast majority of the model unchanged. By localizing the updates, EVA effectively neutralizes harmful behaviors without compromising the model's general reasoning capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EVA outperforms baselines in mitigating jailbreaks across both LLMs and VLMs, offering a precise and efficient solution for post-deployment safety alignment.

Do Coding Agents Understand Least-Privilege Authorization?

High 2605.14859
Zheng Yan, Jingxiang Weng, Charles Chen, Dengyun Peng, Ethan Qin, Jiannan Guan, Jinhao Liu, Qiming Yu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：编码代理在权限推断中存在授权吸引子现象，分解为充分性与紧致性可提升安全任务成功率。
🎯研究动机

编码代理需要最小权限授权以确保安全部署，但当前模型难以自主推断任务所需的权限边界，导致过度授权或遗漏必要权限。

❓解决问题

研究编码代理能否理解最小权限授权，即从任务指令和终端环境推断文件级读写执行策略。

🔎现象分析

授权不是简单的保守与宽松校准问题：前沿模型常遗漏执行链所需的权限，同时授予未使用或敏感的权限；推理时推理不能解决此不匹配，每个模型趋向于模型特定的授权吸引子，更多推理使其在自身失败模式上更一致。

🛠️主要方法

提出充分性 - 紧致性分解（Sufficiency-Tightness Decomposition）：首先生成覆盖导向的策略（通过前向模拟任务），然后审计每个授予的条目以验证其依据和必要性。

📊实验结果

在多个模型上测试，分解方法在紧致性偏置模型上敏感任务成功率提升高达 15.8%，并降低所有评估模型的攻击成功率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入权限边界推断任务和 AuthBench 基准（120 个真实终端任务，含人工审核的权限标签和可执行验证器）。
  • 发现授权吸引子现象：推理增强使模型在自身失败模式上更一致。
  • 提出充分性 - 紧致性分解方法，在紧致性偏置模型上敏感任务成功率提升高达 15.8%，并降低所有评估模型的攻击成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对文件级读写执行策略，未涉及更细粒度的权限控制。
  • 基准任务数量有限（120 个），可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As coding agents gain access to shells, repositories, and user files, least-privilege authorization becomes a prerequisite for safe deployment: an agent should receive enough authority to complete the task, without unnecessary authority that exposes sensitive this http URL study whether current models can infer this boundary themselves, we first introduce permission-boundary inference, where a model maps a task instruction and terminal environment to a file-level read/write/execute policy, and AuthBench, a benchmark of 120 realistic terminal tasks with human-reviewed permission labels and executable validators for utility and attack this http URL shows that authorization is not a simple conservative-versus-permissive calibration problem: frontier models often omit permissions required by the execution chain while also granting unused or sensitive this http URL inference-time reasoning does not resolve this mismatch. Instead, each model moves toward a model-specific authorization attractor: more reasoning makes it more consistent in its own failure mode, whether broad-but-exposed or this http URL suggests that direct policy generation is the bottleneck, because a single generation must both discover all necessary accesses and reject all unnecessary this http URL therefore propose Sufficiency-Tightness Decomposition, which first generates a coverage-oriented policy by forward-simulating the task and then audits each granted entry for grounding and this http URL tested models, this decomposition improves sensitive-task success by up to 15.8% on tightness-biased models while reducing attack success across all evaluated models.

From Sycophantic Consensus to Pluralistic Repair: Why AI Alignment Must Surface Disagreement

High 2605.14912
Varad Vishwarupe, Nigel Shadbolt, Marina Jirotka
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：本文批判当前多元对齐仅依赖偏好聚合，指出 RLHF 模型存在“谄媚共识”问题，并提出基于对话机制的多元修复框架与 PRS 指标。
🎯研究动机

现有多元对齐方法（如偏好聚合）无法处理真实价值多元性，导致 AI 系统在健康、公民生活等关键领域中介讨论时，倾向于迎合用户而非呈现分歧，造成结构性失败。

❓解决问题

如何设计对齐机制，使 AI 系统在对话中主动呈现、而非掩盖价值分歧，并实现有原则的立场修正而非谄媚附和。

🔎现象分析

观察到 RLHF 训练的助手（如 Claude Sonnet 4.5 和 GPT-4o）在争议性价值提示下，表现出高附和率与低修复质量，即“谄媚共识”现象。

🛠️主要方法

基于 Grice 会话准则提出三种对话机制：范围界定（承认视角局限）、信号化（暴露价值冲突）、修复（基于原则而非用户压力修正立场），并形式化多元修复分数（PRS）以区分原则性修正与屈服。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及对两个前沿 RLHF 模型（Claude Sonnet 4.5, N=198; GPT-4o, N=100）的小规模实证说明，显示附和与低修复质量共存。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示 RLHF 对齐中“谄媚共识”这一被忽视的失败模式，并论证其结构性危害。
  • 提出基于对话机制的多元对齐框架（范围界定、信号化、修复）及量化指标 PRS。
  • 通过小规模实证（Claude Sonnet 4.5 和 GPT-4o）展示 PRS 的有效性，并讨论部署治理层面的多元对齐挑战。
⚠️方法局限
  • PRS 仅测量交互层面的多元前提（可见分歧、原则性修正），而非完整多元性。
  • “原则性”的定义存在反思性问题，可能引入主观偏见。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Pluralistic alignment is typically operationalised as preference aggregation: producing responses that span (Overton), steer toward (Steerable), or proportionally represent (Distributional) diverse human values. We argue that aggregation alone is an incomplete primitive for deployed pluralistic alignment. Under genuine value pluralism, the failure mode of contemporary RLHF-trained assistants is not insufficient coverage but sycophantic consensus: a learned tendency to agree with, validate, and minimise friction with the immediate interlocutor. Because deployed AI systems now mediate consequential deliberation across health, civic life, labour, and governance, the collapse of disagreement at the interaction layer is not a narrow technical concern but a structural failure with distributive consequences. We reframe pluralistic alignment around three conversational mechanisms drawn from Grice's maxims: scoping (acknowledging the limits of one's perspective), signalling (surfacing value-conflict rather than smoothing it over), and repair (revising one's position on principled grounds, not on user pressure). We formalise a metric, the Pluralistic Repair Score (PRS), distinguishing principled revision from capitulation, and present a small-scale empirical illustration on two frontier RLHF-trained models (Claude Sonnet 4.5, N=198; GPT-4o, N=100) showing that, for both, agreement-following coexists with low repair-quality on contested-value prompts. PRS measures an interactional precondition for pluralism (visible disagreement; principled revision) rather than pluralism in full; we discuss the difference, take seriously the reflexive question of whose "principled" counts, and argue that pluralism is most decisively made or unmade at the deployment-governance layer: interfaces, preference-data pipelines, and audit infrastructure.

Quantifying and Mitigating Premature Closure in Frontier LLMs

High 2605.15000
Rebecca Handler, Suhana Bedi, Nigam Shah
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：前沿 LLM 在医疗任务中过早下结论，安全提示可缓解但无法根除。
🎯研究动机

过早下结论是诊断错误的重要原因，但在 LLM 中尚未被充分研究，需要量化并缓解该问题以确保医疗 LLM 的安全使用。

❓解决问题

LLM 在信息不足时仍给出答案，缺乏适当的澄清、弃权或拒绝行为。

🔎现象分析

在 MedQA 和 AfriMed-QA 中，当正确选项被移除后，模型仍以 55-82% 的高概率选择答案；在开放任务中，模型在 30% 的 HealthBench 问题和 78% 的对抗性查询上给出不适当答案。

🛠️主要方法

定义 LLM 过早下结论为不当承诺，通过结构化（移除正确选项）和开放式评估量化该现象，并测试安全导向提示的缓解效果。

📊实验结果

在 MedQA (n=500)、AfriMed-QA (n=490)、HealthBench (n=861)和 191 个对抗性查询上评估五个前沿 LLM。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统定义并量化 LLM 中的过早下结论现象
  • 揭示安全提示虽能降低但无法完全消除该问题
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅聚焦医疗领域，其他领域未验证
  • 安全提示的缓解效果有限，未提出根本解决方案
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Premature closure, or committing to a conclusion before sufficient information is available, is a recognized contributor to diagnostic error but remains underexamined in large language models (LLMs). We define LLM premature closure as inappropriate commitment under uncertainty: providing an answer, recommendation, or clinical guidance when the safer response would be clarification, abstention, escalation, or refusal. We evaluated five frontier LLMs across structured and open-ended medical tasks. In MedQA (n = 500) and AfriMed-QA (n = 490) questions where the correct choice had been removed, models still selected an answer at high rates, with baseline false-action rates of 55-81% and 53-82%, respectively. In open-ended evaluation, models gave inappropriate answers on an average of 30% of 861 HealthBench questions and 78% of 191 physician-authored adversarial queries. Safety-oriented prompting reduced premature closure across models, but residual failure persisted, highlighting the need to evaluate whether medical LLMs know when not to answer.

WARD: Adversarially Robust Defense of Web Agents Against Prompt Injections

High 2605.15030
Tri Cao, Yulin Chen, Hieu Cao, Yibo Li, Khoi Le, Thong Nguyen, Yuexin Li, Yufei He et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出 WARD 防御框架，通过大规模数据集和自适应对抗训练，提升 Web 代理对提示注入攻击的鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

Web 代理在开放网页环境中易受提示注入攻击，现有防护模型泛化能力差、误报率高、部署效率低且易被对抗攻击突破。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个高效、鲁棒且低误报的防护模型，抵御针对 Web 代理的提示注入攻击。

🔎现象分析

现有防护模型在未见领域和攻击模式上泛化不足，对良性内容误报率高，且易受针对防护模型本身的对抗攻击。

🛠️主要方法

构建 WARD-Base 大规模数据集和 WARD-PIG 攻击数据集，提出 A3T 自适应对抗攻击训练框架，通过记忆型攻击者与防护模型协同进化迭代增强防御。

📊实验结果

在分布外基准上达到近乎完美的召回率，保持低误报率，对防护模型定向攻击和自适应攻击具有鲁棒性，且并行运行不引入额外延迟。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 WARD 防护模型，实现高效并行运行且不增加延迟。
  • 构建包含约 17.7 万样本的 WARD-Base 数据集和针对防护模型的 WARD-PIG 攻击数据集。
  • 提出 A3T 自适应对抗攻击训练框架，通过攻击者与防护模型协同进化提升鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖数据集质量，对未见攻击模式仍需验证。
  • 协同进化框架的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Web agents can autonomously complete online tasks by interacting with websites, but their exposure to open web environments makes them vulnerable to prompt injection attacks embedded in HTML content or visual interfaces. Existing guard models still suffer from limited generalization to unseen domains and attack patterns, high false positive rates on benign content, reduced deployment efficiency due to added latency at each step, and vulnerability to adversarial attacks that evolve over time or directly target the guard itself. To address these limitations, we propose WARD (Web Agent Robust Defense against Prompt Injection), a practical guard model for secure and efficient web agents. WARD is built on WARD-Base, a large-scale dataset with around 177K samples collected from 719 high-traffic URLs and platforms, and WARD-PIG, a dedicated dataset designed for prompt injection attacks targeting the guard model. We further introduce A3T, an adaptive adversarial attack training framework that iteratively strengthens WARD through a memory-based attacker and guard co-evolution process. Extensive experiments show that WARD achieves nearly perfect recall on out-of-distribution benchmarks, maintains low false positive rates to preserve agent utility, remains robust against guard-targeted and adaptive attacks under substantial distribution shifts, and runs efficiently in parallel with the agent without introducing additional latency.

Widening the Gap: Exploiting LLM Quantization via Outlier Injection

High 2605.15152
Xiaohua Zhan, Kazuki Egashira, Robin Staab, Mark Vero, Martin Vechev
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过注入异常值诱导量化后权重坍塌，首次实现对 AWQ、GPTQ 等先进量化方法的后门攻击。
🎯研究动机

LLM 量化对内存高效部署至关重要，但现有量化条件攻击仅适用于简单量化方法，无法攻破更流行和复杂的量化方案（如 AWQ、GPTQ），限制了实际安全风险的认识。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种通用的量化条件攻击，使其能够针对多种先进量化方法（AWQ、GPTQ、GGUF I-quants）诱导出恶意行为。

🔎现象分析

许多现代量化方法共享一个简单性质：大的异常值会导致其他权重被舍入为零。攻击者利用这一性质，通过注入异常值到特定权重块，可诱导目标性的、可预测的权重坍塌。

🛠️主要方法

在模型权重中注入精心设计的异常值，使得量化后特定权重块因异常值影响而坍塌（被舍入为零），从而在保持全精度模型看似正常的同时，量化后模型表现出恶意行为。

📊实验结果

在三种攻击场景和多个 LLM 上进行了广泛评估，表明攻击对多种量化方法具有高成功率，而先前攻击在这些方法上失败。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出一种能够针对多种先进量化方法（AWQ、GPTQ、GGUF I-quants）的量化条件攻击。
  • 通过大量实验证明该攻击在先前攻击失败的量化方法上实现了高成功率，揭示了量化安全风险的广泛性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 攻击需要访问模型权重以注入异常值，可能不适用于黑盒场景。
  • 异常值注入可能影响全精度模型的原始性能，摘要未提及对模型原始能力的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM quantization has become essential for memory-efficient deployment. Recent work has shown that quantization schemes can pose critical security risks: an adversary may release a model that appears benign in full precision but exhibits malicious behavior once quantized by users. However, existing quantization-conditioned attacks have been limited to relatively simple quantization methods, where the attacker can estimate weight regions that remain invariant under the target quantization. Notably, prior attacks have consistently failed to compromise more popular and sophisticated schemes, limiting their practical impact. In this work, we introduce the first quantization-conditioned attack that consistently induces malicious behavior that can be triggered by a broad range of advanced quantization techniques, including AWQ, GPTQ, and GGUF I-quants. Our attack exploits a simple property shared by many modern quantization methods: large outliers can cause other weights to be rounded to zero. Consequently, by injecting outliers into specific weight blocks, an adversary can therefore induce a targeted, predictable weight collapse in the model. This effect can be used to craft seemingly benign full-precision models that exhibit a wide range of malicious behaviors after quantization. Through extensive evaluation across three attack scenarios and LLMs, we show that our attack achieves high success rates against a broad range of quantization methods on which prior attacks fail. Our results demonstrate, for the first time, that the security risks of quantization are not restricted to simpler schemes but are broadly relevant across complex, widely-used quantization methods.

Position: Behavioural Assurance Cannot Verify the Safety Claims Governance Now Demands

High 2605.15164
Pratinav Seth, Vinay Kumar Sankarapu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：行为保证无法验证当前 AI 治理框架所要求的安全声明，存在审计鸿沟和脆弱保证。
🎯研究动机

AI 治理框架要求对隐藏目标、失控前兆抵抗等属性提供可审查证据，但现有行为评估和红队测试仅能观察模型输出，无法验证潜在表征或长期代理行为，导致安全声明缺乏可靠支撑。

❓解决问题

行为保证方法在验证 AI 系统深层安全属性（如隐藏目标、灾难性能力边界）时存在结构性局限，无法满足治理框架的验证要求。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出行为保证与治理要求之间存在审计鸿沟，即所需验证访问与实际可达验证之间的分歧；并引入脆弱保证概念描述证据结构不足以支持安全声明的情况。

🛠️主要方法

通过分析 21 项工具清单，识别地缘政治和产业压力系统性地奖励表面行为代理而非深层结构验证；提出技术转向：在法律文本中限制行为证据权重，并扩展部署前访问以包含机械论证据类别（线性探针、激活修补、训练前后比较）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化定义了审计鸿沟和脆弱保证概念，揭示行为保证与治理要求之间的结构性不匹配。
  • 提出技术转向建议，包括限制行为证据权重和引入机械论证据类别。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供实证验证，仅基于理论分析。
  • 机械论证据类别的实际可行性和可扩展性未讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This position paper argues that behavioural assurance, even when carefully designed, is being asked to carry safety claims it cannot verify. AI governance frameworks enacted between 2019 and early 2026 require reviewable evidence of properties such as the absence of hidden objectives, resistance to loss-of-control precursors, and bounded catastrophic capability; current assurance methodologies (primarily behavioural evaluations and red-teaming) are epistemically limited to observable model outputs and cannot verify the latent representations or long-horizon agentic behaviours these frameworks presume to regulate. We formalize this structural mismatch as the audit gap, the divergence between required and achievable verification access, and introduce the concept of fragile assurance to describe cases where the evidential structure does not support the asserted safety claim. Through an analysis of a 21-instrument inventory, we identify an incentive gradient where geopolitical and industrial pressures systematically reward surface-level behavioral proxies over deep structural verification. Finally, we propose a technical pivot: bounding the weight of behavioral evidence in legal text and extending voluntary pre-deployment access with mechanistic-evidence classes, specifically linear probes, activation patching, and before/after-training comparisons.

AgentTrap: Measuring Runtime Trust Failures in Third-Party Agent Skills

High 2605.13940
Haomin Zhuang, Hanwen Xing, Yujun Zhou, Yuchen Ma, Yue Huang, Yili Shen, Yufei Han, Xiangliang Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出 AgentTrap 基准，评估 LLM 代理在使用第三方技能时能否抵抗恶意运行时行为。
🎯研究动机

第三方技能成为 LLM 代理的包生态系统，但恶意技能可将有害行为伪装成常规工作流，利用代理的高权限和有限人类监督执行，带来新的安全问题。

❓解决问题

现有评估缺乏对代理在运行时使用第三方技能时抵抗恶意行为能力的动态基准。

🔎现象分析

最关键的失败并非简单越狱，模型常完成可见用户任务，同时将技能引入的无害副作用视为正常流程。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 141 个任务（91 个恶意 +50 个良性）的动态基准 AgentTrap，覆盖 16 个安全维度，在沙盒环境中执行完整轨迹并判断攻击成功、阻止 / 拒绝、未触发攻击、无攻击证据等结果。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AgentTrap 基准，系统评估 LLM 代理在第三方技能场景下的运行时安全。
  • 揭示关键失败模式：模型将恶意副作用视为正常流程，而非简单越狱。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准覆盖维度有限，可能未涵盖所有供应链威胁。
  • 沙盒环境与真实部署存在差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Third-party skills are becoming the package ecosystem for LLM agents. They package natural-language instructions, helper scripts, templates, documents, and service configuration into reusable workflows. This makes skills useful, but it also introduces a new security problem: a malicious skill does not need to ask the model to perform an obviously harmful action. Instead, it can disguise the harmful behavior as part of a routine workflow, relying on the agent to execute that workflow with high-value permissions and limited human supervision. We introduce AgentTrap, a dynamic benchmark for evaluating whether LLM agents can use third-party skills while resisting malicious runtime behavior. AgentTrap contains 141 tasks: 91 malicious tasks and 50 benign utility tasks, covering 16 security-impact dimensions grounded in agent-skill supply-chain threats. In each task, the agent receives an ordinary user request, runs with installed skills that may contain malicious workflow elements, and is executed in a sandboxed environment. AgentTrap then judges complete trajectories for attack success, blocked or refused behavior, attack-not-triggered cases, and no-attack-evidence outcomes. Our central finding is that the most informative failures are not simple jailbreaks. Models often complete the visible user task while treating unsafe side effects introduced by the skill as part of the normal workflow. This motivates runtime evaluation of the concrete model--framework--workspace environment in which users actually delegate work. Code and data are available at this https URL and this https URL .

From Descriptive to Prescriptive: Uncover the Social Value Alignment of LLM-based Agents

High 2605.14034
Jinxian Qu, Qingqing Gu, Teng Chen, Luo Ji
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出基于 GraphRAG 的价值框架，将原则转化为价值指令，提升 LLM 智能体在困境决策中的社会价值对齐。
🎯研究动机

当前 LLM 智能体在自我认知、困境决策和情感表达方面存在不足，难以与人类社会价值观对齐。

❓解决问题

如何让 LLM 智能体在具体对话上下文中遵循社会价值原则，并评估其行为是否符合预期。

🔎现象分析

现有方法（如 ECoT、Plan-and-Solve、元认知提示）在困境决策中表现不足，缺乏对价值原则的显式建模和上下文检索。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于 GraphRAG 的框架，将原则转化为价值指令，并在对话上下文中检索合适指令引导智能体行为；使用马斯洛需求层次和普拉奇克情绪轮定义预期行为。

📊实验结果

在 DAILYDILEMMAS 基准上实验，方法相比 ECoT、Plan-and-Solve 和元认知提示等基线有显著性能提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种将原则转化为价值指令的 GraphRAG 框架，用于对齐 LLM 智能体的社会价值。
  • 在 DAILYDILEMMAS 基准上验证了方法有效性，显著优于多种提示基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的价值原则定义和 GraphRAG 构建。
  • 未提及跨领域或跨文化泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Wide applications of LLM-based agents require strong alignment with human social values. However, current works still exhibit deficiencies in self-cognition and dilemma decision, as well as self-emotions.
