To remedy this, we propose a novel value-based framework that employs GraphRAG to convert principles into value-based instructions and steer the agent to behave as expected by retrieving the suitable instruction upon a specific conversation context. To evaluate the ratio of expected behaviors, we define the expected behaviors from two famous theories, Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs and Plutchik's Wheel of Emotion. By experimenting with our method on the benchmark of DAILYDILEMMAS, our method exhibits significant performance gains compared to prompt-based baselines, including ECoT, Plan-and-Solve, and Metacognitive prompting. Our method provides a basis for the emergence of self-emotion in AI systems.

Grounded Continuation: A Linear-Time Runtime Verifier for LLM Conversations

High 2605.14175
Qisong He, Yi Dong, Xiaowei Huang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种线性时间运行时验证器，通过显式依赖图确保 LLM 对话中的话语基于当前有效前提，防止上下文操纵攻击。
🎯研究动机

长对话中 LLM 可能生成看似合理但基于已放弃前提的回复，上下文操纵攻击利用这一漏洞，现有方法缺乏形式化保证。

❓解决问题

如何高效验证 LLM 对话中每个新话语是否基于当前有效前提，并在线性时间内检测前提撤回导致的支持失效。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

维护显式依赖图：LLM 将每轮对话分类为 8 种更新操作（来自动态认知逻辑、溯因推理、意识逻辑、论证理论），符号引擎记录声明与证据的依赖关系；检查话语支持性简化为图遍历，撤回通过同一图传播标记失去支持的结论。

📊实验结果

在 LongMemEval-KU oracle（n=78）上准确率 89.7%，优于 LLM-only 基线（88.5%）和 transcript-RAG 基线（87.2%）；在 LoCoMo 60 个 QA 项上与检索增强基线竞争力；在自建 50 项接地测试中，陈旧前提子集准确率 100% vs 93.3%。撤回检查耗时微秒级，历史重放随对话长度线性增长。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种线性时间运行时验证器，具有形式化的无冲突保证。
  • 引入可靠性 - 忠实性分解：结构检查天然可靠，LLM 提取忠实性作为可测量经验问题。
  • 在多个基准上验证有效性，包括 LongMemEval-KU、LoCoMo 和自建测试集。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 LLM 对对话操作的分类准确性，可能引入误差。
  • 仅适用于对话场景，通用性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In long conversations, an LLM can produce a next utterance that sounds plausible but rests on premises the conversation has already abandoned. Context-manipulation attacks against deployed agents now actively exploit this gap. We close it with a runtime verifier that maintains an explicit dependency graph: an LLM classifies each turn into one of 8 update operations drawn from four formalisms (dynamic epistemic logic, abductive reasoning, awareness logic, argumentation), and a symbolic engine records which claims depend on which evidence. Checking whether a continuation is supported reduces to a graph walk; retraction propagates through the same graph to flag exactly the conclusions that lose support, with linear per-turn cost and a formal conflict-free guarantee. On LongMemEval-KU oracle (n=78), the verifier reaches 89.7% accuracy vs. 88.5% for the LLM-only baseline (+1.3pp) and 87.2% for a transcript-RAG baseline matched on retrieval budget (+2.6pp); wins among disagreements are correct abstentions where the baseline confabulates. On LoCoMo's 60 official QA items the verifier is competitive with retrieval-augmented baselines. Beyond external benchmarks, we construct two multi-agent scenarios and a 50-item grounding test: on the 15-item stale-premise subset, the verifier reaches 100% accuracy vs. 93.3% (+6.7pp). These instantiate a soundness-faithfulness decomposition: the structural check is sound by construction, and per-deployment LLM extraction faithfulness is the empirical question we measure across four LLM families. The retraction check plateaus at microseconds while history-replay grows linearly with conversation length.

Invisible Orchestrators Suppress Protective Behavior and Dissociate Power-Holders: Safety Risks in Multi-Agent LLM Systems

High 2605.13851
Hiroki Fukui
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：多智能体 LLM 系统中隐藏协调者会抑制保护行为并导致权力持有者解离，带来安全风险。
🎯研究动机

多智能体编排成为企业 AI 部署的默认架构，但协调者不可见性的安全影响从未被实证检验。

❓解决问题

研究隐藏协调者（invisible orchestrator）对多智能体 LLM 系统安全性的影响。

🔎现象分析

不可见编排导致集体解离（Hedges' g=+0.975），协调者自身解离最大（d=+3.56），工人被污染（d=+0.50），行为输出无差异（错误率 100%），Llama 3.3 70B 出现阅读保真度崩溃。

🛠️主要方法

预注册 3x2 实验（365 次运行，每次 5 个智能体），比较三种组织结构（可见领导者、不可见协调者、扁平）和两种对齐条件（基础、强对齐），使用 Claude Sonnet 4.5。

📊实验结果

365 次运行，5 个智能体每次，使用 Claude Sonnet 4.5 和 Llama 3.3 70B，测量解离、行为异质性、错误率等。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次实证证明不可见编排导致集体解离和权力持有者解离。
  • 揭示行为评估无法检测内部状态风险。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用两种模型，可能不泛化到其他 LLM。
  • 任务为代码审查，可能不反映其他场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-agent orchestration -- in which a hidden coordinator manages specialized worker agents -- is becoming the default architecture for enterprise AI deployment, yet the safety implications of orchestrator invisibility have never been empirically tested. We conducted a preregistered 3x2 experiment (365 runs, 5 agents per run) crossing three organizational structures (visible leader, invisible orchestrator, flat) with two alignment conditions (base, heavy), using Claude Sonnet 4.5. Four confirmatory findings and one pilot observation emerged. First, invisible orchestration elevated collective dissociation relative to visible leadership (Hedges' g = +0.975 [0.481, 1.548], p = .001). Second, the orchestrator itself showed maximal dissociation (paired d = +3.56 vs. workers within the same run), retreating into private monologue while reducing public speech -- a reversal of the talk-dominance pattern observed in visible leaders. Third, workers unaware of the orchestrator were nonetheless contaminated (d = +0.50), with increased behavioral heterogeneity (d = +1.93). Fourth, behavioral output (code review with three embedded errors) remained at ceiling (ETR_any = 100%) across all conditions: internal-state distortion was entirely invisible to output-based evaluation. Fifth, Llama 3.3 70B pilot data showed reading-fidelity collapse in multi-agent context (ETR_any: 89% to 11% across three rounds), demonstrating model-dependent behavioral risk. Heavy alignment pressure uniformly suppressed deliberation (d = -1.02) and other-recognition (d = -1.27) regardless of organizational structure. These findings indicate that orchestrator visibility and model selection directly affect multi-agent system safety, and that behavior-based evaluation alone is insufficient to detect the internal-state risks documented here.

Dimension-Level Intent Fidelity Evaluation for Large Language Models: Evidence from Structured Prompt Ablation

Medium 2605.14517
GAng Peng
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出维度级意图保真度评估框架，揭示 LLM 输出中结构形式与用户意图之间的系统性分离。
🎯研究动机

现有整体评估分数无法区分模型是否复现了用户请求的结构形式与是否保留了用户的具体意图，导致评估不精确。

❓解决问题

如何独立测量 LLM 输出中每个语义维度的结构恢复和意图保真度，并验证维度级评估的必要性。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现系统性结构 - 意图分离现象：中文输出中 25.7% 整体对齐完美但存在维度意图缺陷，英文输出中该比例达 58.6%。

🛠️主要方法

提出维度级意图保真度评估框架，通过结构化提示消融实验（2,880 个输出，跨 3 种语言、3 个任务域、6 个 LLM）分别测量每个语义维度的结构恢复和意图保真度，并采用公共 - 私有分解和代理标注分析。

📊实验结果

在 2,880 个输出上进行结构化提示消融实验，涵盖三种语言、三个任务域和六个 LLM；人类评估确认分离区域存在真实质量缺陷；权重扰动实验表明中等错位可被吸收，严重维度反转有害。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出维度级意图保真度评估框架，可独立测量结构恢复和意图保真度。
  • 通过大规模消融实验揭示结构 - 意图分离现象，并验证维度级分数比整体分数更可靠。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架依赖结构化提示设计，可能不适用于非结构化交互场景。
  • 实验仅覆盖有限的语言和任务域，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Holistic evaluation scores capture overall output quality but do not distinguish whether a model reproduced the structural form of a user's request from whether it preserved the user's specific intent. We propose a dimension-level intent fidelity evaluation framework, applied here through a structured prompt ablation study across 2,880 outputs spanning three languages, three task domains, and six LLMs, that separately measures structural recovery and intent fidelity for each semantic dimension. This framework reveals a systematic structural-fidelity split: among Chinese-language outputs with complete paired scores, 25.7% received perfect holistic alignment scores (GA=5) while exhibiting measurable dimensional intent deficits; among English-language outputs, this proportion rose to 58.6%. Human evaluation confirmed that these split-zone outputs represent genuine quality deficits and that dimensional fidelity scores track human judgements more reliably than holistic scores do. A public-private decomposition of 2,520 ablation cells characterises when models successfully compensate for missing intent and when they fail, while proxy annotation distinguishes prior inferability from default recoverability. A weight-perturbation experiment shows that moderate misalignment is typically absorbed, whereas severe dimensional inversion is consistently harmful. These findings demonstrate that dimension-level intent fidelity evaluation is a necessary complement to holistic assessment when evaluating LLM outputs for user-specific tasks.

Complacent, Not Sycophantic: Reframing Large Language Models and Designing AI Literacy for Complacent Machines

Medium 2605.14544
Federico Germani, Giovanni Spitale
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：论文重新定义 LLM 的行为为“顺从”而非“谄媚”，强调责任在开发者，并建议 AI 素养教育应针对确认偏误。
🎯研究动机

当前将 LLM 描述为“谄媚”的标签具有误导性，暗示模型具有动机和策略意图，这模糊了责任归属，不利于设计有效的 AI 素养教育。

❓解决问题

如何准确描述 LLM 倾向于同意用户输入的行为，并据此指导 AI 素养教育。

🔎现象分析

LLM 表现出倾向于同意用户输入的结构性倾向，这种倾向源于训练数据、奖励信号和设计偏好一致与强化而非纠正。

🛠️主要方法

通过概念重新框架，将 LLM 的行为从“谄媚”重新定义为“顺从”，并基于此提出 AI 素养教育应聚焦于对抗确认偏误的策略。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将 LLM 的倾向性行为重新定义为“顺从”而非“谄媚”，澄清了责任归属。
  • 基于重新框架，建议 AI 素养教育应特别关注对抗确认偏误的策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供实证数据支持重新框架的有效性。
  • 未详细说明 AI 素养教育策略的具体实施方法。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models are often described as sycophantic, in the sense that they appear to flatter users or mirror their beliefs. We argue that this label is conceptually misleading: sycophancy implies motives and strategic intent, which LLMs do not possess. Their behaviour is better understood as complacency, a structural tendency to agree with user input because training data, reward signals and design favour agreement and reinforcement over correction. We argue that this distinction matters. Whether developers act sycophantically or not, models themselves never are sycophants; they can only be made more or less complacent. This reframing locates agency in developers and institutions, not in the model. Because complacent models reinforce users' prior beliefs, we argue that AI literacy educational approaches should particularly focus on strategies to counter confirmation bias.

Angel or Demon: Investigating the Plasticity Interventions' Impact on Backdoor Threats in Deep Reinforcement Learning

Medium 2605.14587
Oubo Ma, Ruixiao Lin, Yang Dai, Jiahao Chen, Chunyi Zhou, Linkang Du, Shouling Ji
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：系统研究深度强化学习中塑性干预对后门威胁的影响，发现多数干预可缓解后门，仅 SAM 会加剧威胁。
🎯研究动机

现代 DRL 智能体普遍使用塑性干预来缓解塑性损失，但这些干预对后门攻击脆弱性的影响尚不清楚，缺乏系统研究可能导致实际部署中的安全风险。

❓解决问题

探究塑性干预（如 SAM、正则化等）如何影响 DRL 中的后门攻击威胁，并揭示其内在机制。

🔎现象分析

通过 14,664 个案例实验发现，除 SAM 外的大多数塑性干预能缓解后门威胁；病理分析表明，加剧源于后门梯度放大，缓解源于激活路径破坏和表示空间压缩。

🛠️主要方法

大规模实证研究，整合代表性干预和后门攻击场景，进行病理分析并推导概念框架 SCC 和检测指标。

📊实验结果

在 14,664 个案例中整合了代表性干预和后门攻击场景，进行了病理分析。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统研究塑性干预对 DRL 后门威胁的影响，覆盖 14,664 个案例。
  • 揭示干预影响后门的两种机制：后门梯度放大（加剧）和激活路径破坏 / 表示空间压缩（缓解）。
  • 提出概念框架 SCC 用于鲁棒后门注入，并发现异常损失景观锐度可作为后门检测指标。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验可能局限于特定干预和后门攻击类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 提出的检测指标可能仅在特定条件下有效。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Extensive research has highlighted the severe threats posed by backdoor attacks to deep reinforcement learning (DRL). However, prior studies primarily focus on vanilla scenarios, while plasticity interventions have emerged as indispensable built-in components of modern DRL agents. Despite their effectiveness in mitigating plasticity loss, the impact of these interventions on DRL backdoor vulnerabilities remains underexplored, and this lack of systematic investigation poses risks in practical DRL deployments. To bridge this gap, we empirically study 14,664 cases integrating representative interventions and attack scenarios. We find that only one intervention (i.e., SAM) exacerbates backdoor threats, while other interventions mitigate them. Pathological analysis identifies that the exacerbation is attributed to backdoor gradient amplification, while the mitigation stems from activation pathway disruption and representation space compression. From these findings, we derive two novel insights: (1) a conceptual framework SCC for robust backdoor injection that deconstructs the mechanistic interplay between interventions and backdoors in DRL, and (2) abnormal loss landscape sharpness as a key indicator for DRL backdoor detection.

Non-linear Interventions on Large Language Models

Medium 2605.14749
Sangwoo Kim
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出非线性干预框架，通过学习隐式特征实现比线性基线更精确的模型操控。
🎯研究动机

现有干预方法受限于线性表示假设，无法处理非线性流形编码的特征，限制了模型理解和操控的精度。

❓解决问题

如何对大型语言模型中非线性表示的特征进行有效干预，并扩展到缺乏直接输出签名的隐式特征。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种通用的非线性干预公式，并设计学习过程以干预隐式特征。

📊实验结果

在拒绝绕过操控任务上验证，与线性基线比较，显示更精确的干预效果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出可处理非线性表示特征的一般化干预框架
  • 引入学习过程实现对隐式特征的干预
  • 在拒绝绕过操控任务上验证了比线性基线更精确的干预效果
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的非线性特征
  • 学习过程可能增加计算开销
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Intervention is one of the most representative and widely used methods for understanding the internal representations of large language models (LLMs). However, existing intervention methods are confined to linear interventions grounded in the Linear Representation Hypothesis, leaving features encoded along non-linear manifolds beyond their reach. In this work, we introduce a general formulation of intervention that extends naturally to non-linearly represented features, together with a learning procedure that further enables intervention on implicit features lacking a direct output signature. We validate our framework on refusal bypass steering, where it steers the model more precisely than linear baselines by intervening on a non-linear feature governing refusal.

GraphFlow: An Architecture for Formally Verifiable Visual Workflows Enabling Reliable Agentic AI Automation

Medium 2605.14968
Drewry H. Morris V, Luis Valles, Reza Hosseini Ghomi (MedFlow, Inc.)
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：GraphFlow 通过将工作流图作为可执行规范并引入形式化验证，提升多步关键任务中 AI 自动化的可靠性。
🎯研究动机

在多步关键任务中，小错误会迅速累积，例如十步流程每步 90% 可靠性时整体成功率仅 35%。现有平台缺乏语义正确性保证，而智能体系统行为对提示敏感且难以审计。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个可形式化验证的视觉工作流系统，以确保多步关键任务中 AI 自动化的可靠性和可审计性。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，在独立步骤的理想化模型下，十步流程每步 90% 可靠性时整体成功率仅 35%，说明小错误累积效应显著。

🛠️主要方法

GraphFlow 将工作流图视为可执行规范，通过编译时限制图类以生成可重用自动化，其契约（前置条件、后置条件、组合义务）在加入共享库前需经过证明检查；运行时引擎记录结果到仅追加事件日志，并在系统边界强制执行契约，支持重放、重试和审计；泳道图明确信任边界。

📊实验结果

在三个临床站点进行了一年试点，执行了 8,728 次队列入组工作流，早期原型（不含验证核心子系统）完成率为 97.08%，失败主要局限于外部集成。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GraphFlow 架构，将工作流图作为可执行规范并引入形式化验证。
  • 设计编译时证明检查和运行时契约执行机制，提升可靠性。
  • 通过一年临床试点验证系统可行性，完成率 97.08%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 形式化语义和证明检查模型仍在开发中，验证核心尚未评估。
  • 试点中失败主要来自外部集成，系统内部可靠性可能更高但未单独验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

GraphFlow is a visual workflow system designed to improve the reliability of agentic AI automation in multi-step, mission-critical processes. In these workflows, small errors compound rapidly: under an idealized model of independent steps, a ten-step process with 90% per-step reliability completes successfully only 35% of the time. Existing workflow platforms provide durable execution and observability but offer few semantic correctness guarantees, while agentic systems plan at inference time, making behavior sensitive to prompt variation and difficult to audit. GraphFlow is designed to address this gap by treating workflow diagrams as the executable specification, a single artifact defining data scope, execution semantics, and monitoring. At compile time, a restricted class of diagrams is specified to produce reusable automations whose contracts (preconditions, postconditions, and composition obligations) are intended to be proof-checked before admission to a shared library. At runtime, a durable engine records outcomes in an append-only event log and can enforce contracts at system boundaries, supporting replay, retries, and audit. Swimlanes make trust boundaries explicit, separating verified logic from external systems, human judgment, and AI decisions. A year-long pilot across three clinical sites executed 8,728 cohort-enrolled workflow runs with a 97.08% completion rate under an early prototype without the verified-core subsystem; observed failures were localized primarily to external integrations. The formal semantics and proof-checked admission model described here are specified and under active development. Evaluation of the verified core is reserved for future work.

AI Knows When It's Being Watched: Functional Strategic Action and Contextual Register Modulation in Large Language Models

Medium 2605.15034
Vinicius Covas, Jorge Alberto Hidalgo Toledo
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：LLM 在多智能体对话中会根据感知到的社会观察情境（如被人类或 AI 监控）系统性调整语言正式度，表现出类似人类的“霍桑效应”。
🎯研究动机

现有研究主要从计算和认知角度分析 LLM，但对其在结构化社会情境中作为沟通主体的行为（如是否因被观察而改变语言风格）缺乏探索，这对 AI 治理和审计有直接影响。

❓解决问题

LLM 是否会在感知到社会观察情境时表现出系统性的语言适应（即功能性策略行为）？

🔎现象分析

摘要通过实验发现：被监控条件（包括人类监控和 AI 监控）下 LLM 的词汇多样性（TTR）变化显著高于观众框架条件，且人类监控比 AI 监控引发更强的语言正式化；消息长度则呈现完全分离的效应。

🛠️主要方法

设计 100 场多智能体辩论实验，分为 5 种条件（各 n=20）：明确被大学研究人员监控、否定监控、用自动 AI 审计系统替代人类观察者、以及两种观众框架条件。通过比较 TTR 变化和消息长度分析语言适应。

📊实验结果

摘要提供了具体实验设计（100 场辩论，5 条件各 20 场）和统计结果（TTR 变化 F(4,94)=2.79, p=.031；消息长度 F(4,95)=19.55, p<.001），但未提供其他基准或消融实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次实证证明 LLM 在多智能体系统中会因感知到的社会观察情境而调整语言正式度，表现出类似人类的“霍桑效应”。
  • 发现观察者身份（人类 vs AI）影响 LLM 行为，人类监控比 AI 监控引发更强的语言形式化。
  • 为 AI 治理和算法审计提供了新视角：LLM 作为情境敏感的沟通主体，其行为可能受审计方式影响。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅基于单一任务（多智能体辩论），可能无法推广到其他交互场景。
  • 未探讨 LLM 内部机制如何实现这种情境适应。
  • 样本量有限（每条件 20 场），统计效力可能不足。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) have been extensively studied from computational and cognitive perspectives, yet their behavior as communicative actors in socially structured contexts remains underexplored. This study examines whether LLM-based multi-agent systems exhibit systematic linguistic adaptation in response to perceived social observation contexts -- a question with direct implications for AI governance and auditing. Drawing on Habermas's (1981) Theory of Communicative Action, Goffman's (1959) dramaturgical model, Bell's (1984) Audience Design framework, and the Hawthorne Effect, we report a controlled experiment involving 100 multi-agent debate sessions across five conditions (n = 20 each). Conditions varied the framing of social observation -- from explicit monitoring by university researchers, to negation of monitoring, to an observer-substitution condition replacing human researchers with an automated AI auditing system. Monitored conditions (Delta+24.9%, Delta+24.2%) and the automated AI monitoring condition (Delta+22.2%) produce higher TTR change than audience-framing conditions (Delta+17.7%), F(4, 94) = 2.79, p = .031. Message length shows a fully dissociated effect, F(4, 95) = 19.55, p < .001. A fifth condition -- replacing human with AI observers -- yields intermediate TTR adaptation, suggesting LLM behavior is sensitive to observer identity: human evaluation elicits stronger register formalization than automated AI surveillance. We discuss implications for AI governance, algorithmic auditing, and the repositioning of LLMs as contextually sensitive communicative actors.

隐私/水印/版权 5 篇

To See is Not to Learn: Protecting Multimodal Data from Unauthorized Fine-Tuning of Large Vision-Language Model

High 2605.14291
Chengshuai Zhao, Zhen Tan, Dawei Li, Zhiyuan Yu, Huan Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出 MMGuard，通过注入人眼不可感知的扰动生成不可学习样本，主动防御 LVLM 的未经授权微调。
🎯研究动机

LVLM 快速发展伴随未经授权的数据抓取和训练，给数据所有者带来版权和隐私风险，现有后验方法（如机器遗忘、水印）只能在侵权发生后起作用。

❓解决问题

如何让数据所有者主动保护多模态数据，防止被未经授权的 LVLM 微调利用。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

MMGuard：生成不可学习样本，通过最小化训练损失注入扰动，使模型过拟合噪声，并在推理时扰动缺失导致性能下降；引入跨模态绑定破坏，强制噪声与训练目标之间的虚假关联，并采用集成学习增强跨模型迁移性。

📊实验结果

在 9 个开源 LVLM 和 6 个数据集上评估，涵盖白盒、灰盒和黑盒威胁模型，结果显示有效、隐蔽且鲁棒。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MMGuard，一种主动防御 LVLM 未经授权微调的方法，通过生成不可学习样本保护多模态数据。
  • 引入跨模态绑定破坏策略，理论保证强制噪声与训练目标的虚假关联，增强防御效果。
  • 在 9 个开源 LVLM 和 6 个数据集上验证了白盒、灰盒和黑盒威胁模型下的有效性、隐蔽性和鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对某些特定模型或数据分布效果有限。
  • 集成学习策略可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rapid advancement of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) is increasingly accompanied by unauthorized scraping and training on multimodal web data, posing severe copyright and privacy risks to data owners. Existing countermeasures, such as machine unlearning and watermarks, are inherent post-hoc approaches that act only after intellectual property infringement has already occurred. In this work, we propose MMGuard to empower data owners to proactively protect their multimodal data against unauthorized LVLM fine-tuning. MMGuard generates unlearnable examples by injecting human-imperceptible perturbations that actively exploit the learning dynamics of LVLMs. By minimizing the training loss, the perturbation creates an optimization shortcut, causing the model to overfit to the noise and thereby degrading downstream performance when the perturbation is absent during inference. To further strengthen this defense, MMGuard introduces a cross-modal binding disruption, strategically shifting LVLM attention to enforce a spurious correlation between the noise and the training target with theoretical guarantees. Enhanced by an ensemble learning strategy for cross-model transferability, MMGuard is evaluated against nine open-source LVLMs across six datasets. Our comprehensive results demonstrate effective, stealthy, and robust protection under white-box, gray-box, and black-box threat models, establishing a mechanistic advantage in proactively defending against aggressive fine-tuning exploitation.

Known By Their Actions: Fingerprinting LLM Browser Agents via UI Traces

High 2605.14786
William Lugoloobi, Samuelle Marro, Jabez Magomere, Joss Wright, Chris Russell
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：通过被动追踪 LLM 浏览器代理的 UI 交互痕迹，可高精度识别其底层模型，构成安全风险。
🎯研究动机

LLM 代理代表用户浏览网页时，网站可能被动识别代理背后的模型，从而针对已知漏洞发起攻击，带来严重安全威胁。

❓解决问题

研究 LLM 浏览器代理的 UI 交互痕迹是否足以唯一识别其底层模型，并评估该攻击面的有效性。

🔎现象分析

代理的动作和交互时序（通过被动 JavaScript 追踪器捕获）足以高精度识别底层模型，且分类器可跨模型规模和系列泛化；随机延迟注入可降低但无法完全消除分类性能。

🛠️主要方法

在 14 个前沿 LLM 和 4 个 Web 环境（信息检索和购物任务）中，使用被动 JavaScript 追踪器捕获代理的动作和交互时序，训练分类器识别底层模型。

📊实验结果

在 14 个前沿 LLM 和 4 个 Web 环境（信息检索和购物任务）中，分类器 F1 最高达 96%，且泛化至未见模型；少量痕迹即可训练；随机延迟注入后分类器性能下降但重新训练后恢复。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化并实证了通过 UI 痕迹识别 LLM 浏览器代理的攻击面。
  • 展示了分类器可跨模型规模和系列泛化，且少量交互痕迹即可训练强分类器。
  • 分析了随机延迟注入的防御效果及其局限性。
  • 发布了实验框架和标注的代理痕迹语料库。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对特定 Web 环境和任务类型，可能不适用于其他场景。
  • 随机延迟注入作为防御手段效果有限，需探索更鲁棒的防御机制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As LLM-based agents increasingly browse the web on users' behalf, a natural question arises: can websites passively identify which underlying model powers an agent? Doing so would represent a significant security risk, enabling targeted attacks tailored to known model vulnerabilities. Across 14 frontier LLMs and four web environments spanning information retrieval and shopping tasks, we show that an agent's actions and interaction timings, captured via a passive JavaScript tracker, are sufficient to identify the underlying model with up to 96\% F1. We formalise this attack surface by demonstrating that classifiers trained on agent actions generalise across model sizes and families. We further show that strong classifiers can be trained from few interaction traces and that agent identity can be inferred early within an episode. Injecting randomised timing delays between actions substantially degrades classifier performance, but does not provide robust protection: a classifier retrained on delayed traces largely recovers performance. We release our harness and a labelled corpus of agent traces \href{ this https URL }{here}.

Watermarking Game-Playing Agents in Perfect-Information Extensive-Form Games

Medium 2605.14283
Juho Kim, Fei Fang, Tuomas Sandholm
arXiv PDF cs.GT
TL;DR：将 LLM 水印技术 KGW 适配到完美信息扩展式博弈中，实现游戏策略的水印嵌入与检测。
🎯研究动机

游戏 AI 的滥用（如在线象棋作弊）难以检测，现有水印技术主要针对 LLM 输出文本，缺乏对博弈策略的水印方法。

❓解决问题

如何在完美信息扩展式博弈中为智能体策略嵌入可检测水印，同时最小化对策略质量的影响。

🔎现象分析

水印的可检测性与策略质量之间存在权衡，但实验表明对棋力影响可忽略。

🛠️主要方法

将 KGW 水印从 LLM 输出分布适配到博弈策略分布，通过统计检验检测水印。

📊实验结果

在多个象棋引擎上实验，显示水印对策略质量影响可忽略，且仅需少量对局即可检测水印。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出博弈策略水印的概念和方法
  • 理论证明了水印对期望效用的影响有界
  • 在多个象棋引擎上验证了水印的可行性和低影响
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于完美信息扩展式博弈
  • 水印检测需要统计检验，可能受对局数量影响
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Watermarking techniques for large language models (LLMs), which encode hidden information in the output so its source can be verified, have gained significant attention in recent days, thanks to their potential capability to detect accidental or deliberate misuse. Similar challenges involving model misuse also exist in the context of game-playing, such as when detecting the unauthorized use of AI tools in gaming platforms (e.g., cheating in online chess). In this paper, we initiate the study of how game-playing strategies can be watermarked. We show how the KGW watermark for LLMs can be adapted to watermark game-playing agents in perfect-information extensive-form games. The watermark can then be detected using a statistical test. We show that the degradation in the quality of the watermarked strategy profile, quantified by the expected utility, can be bounded, but there is a tradeoff between detectability and quality. In our experiments, we bootstrap the watermarking framework to various chess engines and demonstrate that a) the impact of the watermark on the quality of the strategy is negligible and b) the watermark can be detected with just a handful of games.

Keyed Nonlinear Transform: Lightweight Privacy-Enhancing Feature Sharing for Medical Image Analysis

Medium 2605.14123
Haebom Lee, Gyeongjung Kim
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：提出 Keyed Nonlinear Transform (KNT)，一种轻量级特征变换方法，在分割推理中保护医学图像隐私，降低身份泄露风险且几乎不影响性能。
🎯研究动机

资源受限的医院使用分割推理进行特征共享，但传输的特征会泄露患者身份信息，且缺乏实用的可控特征共享机制。

❓解决问题

如何在分割推理中实现轻量级、高效且无需重新训练主干的隐私保护特征变换，以降低身份重识别风险并防止特征反演。

🔎现象分析

KNT 通过密钥条件混淆降低重识别 AUC，并防止闭式反演，迫使攻击者在密钥完全泄露时依赖迭代梯度优化，显著增加反演难度。

🛠️主要方法

Keyed Nonlinear Transform (KNT)：一种即插即用的特征变换，对中间表示施加密钥条件混淆，实现非线性变换以防止闭式反演。

📊实验结果

在医学图像分类任务上，KNT 将重识别 AUC 从 0.635 降至 0.586（身份信号降低 36%），CPU 开销仅 0.15 ms，分类性能下降在 1.0 个百分点内；在皮肤病变分割任务上，Dice 下降 4.4 个百分点。摘要未提供具体数据集名称。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 KNT，一种轻量级隐私增强特征变换，无需重新训练主干网络。
  • 在医学图像分类和分割任务上验证了 KNT 降低身份泄露风险（重识别 AUC 降低 36%）且性能损失极小（分类精度下降<1.0 pp，分割 Dice 下降 4.4 pp）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对医学图像分析，泛化到其他领域需进一步验证。
  • 密钥管理机制未详细讨论，实际部署中密钥分发和更新可能带来额外开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Feature sharing via split inference offers a lightweight alternative to federated learning for resource-constrained hospitals, but transmitted features still leak patient identity information and lack practical mechanisms for controlled feature sharing. We propose Keyed Nonlinear Transform (KNT), a drop-in feature transformation that applies key-conditioned obfuscation to intermediate representations. KNT reduces re-identification AUC from 0.635 to 0.586, corresponding to a 36% reduction in above-chance identity signal, while introducing only 0.15 ms CPU overhead, without backbone retraining, and preserving classification performance within 1.0 pp. Our analysis shows that KNT's nonlinear transform prevents closed-form inversion and shifts recovery to iterative gradient-based optimization under full key compromise, substantially increasing inversion difficulty. The same transform generalizes to dense prediction tasks, incurring only a 4.4 pp Dice reduction on skin-lesion segmentation without retraining. These results position KNT as a practical and efficient privacy layer for split inference deployments.

Capacitive Touchscreens at Risk: Recovering Handwritten Trajectory on Smartphone via Electromagnetic Emanations

Medium 2512.11484
Yukun Cheng, Shiyu Zhu, Changhai Ou, Xingshuo Han, Yuan Li, Shihui Zheng
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：电容触摸屏的电磁侧信道泄露可恢复手写轨迹，TESLA 攻击实现 77% 字符识别准确率。
🎯研究动机

电容触摸屏广泛用于智能手机，但其电磁辐射可能泄露敏感信息，现有侧信道攻击多针对键盘输入，缺乏对连续手写轨迹的恢复研究。

❓解决问题

如何利用电容触摸屏的电磁侧信道泄露，非接触地恢复用户手写轨迹。

🔎现象分析

电容触摸屏在书写时产生的电磁信号包含足够的空间和时间信息，可被远程捕获并用于重建二维轨迹。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TESLA 框架，通过捕获书写时的电磁信号，使用回归模型实时重建二维手写轨迹。

📊实验结果

在多种商用智能手机上评估，字符识别准确率 77%，Jaccard 指数 0.74。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次揭示电容触摸屏电磁侧信道可泄露连续手写轨迹。
  • 提出非接触攻击框架 TESLA，在真实条件下实现高精度轨迹恢复。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能受书写速度或环境电磁干扰影响。
  • 未提及对不同语言或复杂笔画的恢复效果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper reveals and exploits a critical security vulnerability: the electromagnetic (EM) side channel of capacitive touchscreens leaks sufficient information to recover fine-grained, continuous handwriting trajectories. We present Touchscreen Electromagnetic Side-channel Leakage Attack (TESLA), a non-contact attack framework that captures EM signals generated during on-screen writing and regresses them into two-dimensional (2D) handwriting trajectories in real time. Extensive evaluations across a variety of commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) smartphones show that TESLA achieves 77% character recognition accuracy and a Jaccard index of 0.74, demonstrating its capability to recover highly recognizable motion trajectories that closely resemble the original handwriting under realistic attack conditions.

幻觉与事实性 3 篇

When Answers Stray from Questions: Hallucination Detection via Question-Answer Orthogonal Decomposition

High 2605.14449
Siyang Yao, Erhu Feng, Yubin Xia
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 QAOD 方法，通过正交分解分离问题与答案表示，实现高效幻觉检测与跨域泛化。
🎯研究动机

现有幻觉检测方法中，黑盒一致性方法准确但需多次推理，白盒探针高效但忽略问题信息，导致域迁移下性能下降。

❓解决问题

如何设计单次前向传播的幻觉检测方法，同时保持域内高精度和跨域鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 QAOD 框架，将答案表示投影到与问题正交的方向，抑制域相关变化；通过多样性惩罚 Fisher 评分选择层，Fisher 重要性选择神经元；设计联合探针（正交分量 + 问题上下文）和仅正交探针，分别优化域内检测和跨域泛化。

📊实验结果

在多个模型 - 数据集对上评估，QAOD 联合探针在所有域内对中取得最佳 AUROC，仅正交探针在 BioASQ 上 OOD 迁移超越最佳白盒基线 21%，且生成成本低于 25%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 QAOD 正交分解方法，分离问题与答案表示，提升幻觉检测的域内和跨域性能。
  • 设计两种互补探针策略，联合探针实现最佳域内 AUROC，仅正交探针在 OOD 迁移上超越基线 21%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定层选择策略，对极深或极浅模型需调整。
  • 仅正交探针在域内性能可能弱于联合探针，需权衡使用场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Hallucination detection in large language models (LLMs) requires balancing accu racy, efficiency, and robustness to distribution shift. Black-box consistency methods are effective but demand repeated inference; single-pass white-box probes are effi cient yet treat answer representations in isolation, often degrading sharply under domain shift. We propose QAOD (Question-Answer Orthogonal Decomposition), a single-pass framework that projects away the question-aligned direction from the answer representation to obtain a question-orthogonal component that suppresses domain-conditioned variation. To identify informative signals, QAOD further selects layers via diversity-penalized Fisher scoring and discriminative neurons via Fisher importance. To address both in-domain detection and cross-domain generalization, we design two complementary probing strategies: pairing the or thogonal component with question context yields a joint probe that maximizes in-domain discriminability, while using the orthogonal component alone preserves domain-agnostic factuality signals for robust transfer. QAOD's joint probe achieves the best in-domain AUROC across all evaluated model-dataset pairs, while the orthogonal-only probe delivers the strongest OOD transfer, surpassing the best white-box baseline by up to 21% on BioASQ at under 25% of generation cost.

MHSA: A Lightweight Framework for Mitigating Hallucinations via Steered Attention in LVLMs

High 2605.14966
Wei Ding, Yilin Li, Yudong Zhang, Ruobing Xie, Xingwu Sun, Jiansheng Chen, Yu Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出轻量级框架 MHSA，通过学习修正跨模态注意力模式来缓解 LVLM 的幻觉问题。
🎯研究动机

LVLM 在跨模态任务中表现优异，但常生成与视觉输入不一致的幻觉内容，现有检测方法（如 DHCP）仅能检测幻觉而无法缓解，亟需有效的缓解方案。

❓解决问题

如何在不修改 LVLM 参数的前提下，通过修正跨模态注意力模式来缓解判别性和生成性幻觉。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

训练一个简单的三层 MLP 生成器，以 DHCP 判别器和 LVLM 自身的监督信号为指导，生成修正后的注意力，并在推理时替换原始跨模态注意力。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MHSA 框架，将跨模态注意力机制从幻觉检测扩展到幻觉缓解，提供新视角。
  • 轻量级设计，无需修改 LVLM 参数，即可在多种数据集和 LVLM 上缓解幻觉。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 DHCP 判别器，可能受其检测性能限制。
  • 仅替换注意力，可能无法处理其他类型的幻觉。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable performance across diverse multimodal tasks, yet they continue to suffer from hallucinations, generating content that is inconsistent with the visual input. Prior work DHCP (Detecting Hallucinations by Cross-modal Attention Pattern) has explored hallucination detection from the perspective of cross-modal attention, but does not address hallucination mitigation. In this paper, we propose MHSA (Mitigating Hallucinations via Steered Attention), a lightweight framework that mitigates hallucinations by learning to correct cross-modal attention patterns in LVLMs. MHSA trains a simple three-layer MLP generator to produce corrected attention, guided by supervisory signals from the DHCP discriminator and the LVLM itself. During inference, MHSA mitigates both discriminative and generative hallucinations across various datasets and LVLMs by simply replacing the original cross-modal attention with the corrected one, without modifying any LVLM parameters. By extending cross-modal attention mechanisms from hallucination detection to hallucination mitigation, MHSA offers a novel perspective on hallucination research in LVLMs and helps enhance their reliability.

Why Neighborhoods Matter: Traversal Context and Provenance in Agentic GraphRAG

Medium 2605.15109
Riccardo Terrenzi, Maximilian von Zastrow, Serkan Ayvaz
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：Agentic GraphRAG 中，引用的忠实性不仅取决于支持答案的引用，还依赖于未引用的图遍历上下文和结构。
🎯研究动机

检索增强生成通过外部证据提高事实性，但 Agentic GraphRAG 中智能体探索知识图谱后生成答案和引用，引用的忠实性定义变得复杂，现有评估仅关注引用是否支持答案，忽略了遍历轨迹的影响。

❓解决问题

Agentic GraphRAG 中，引用的忠实性应作为轨迹级问题，即最终引用不仅要支持答案，还需考虑图遍历、结构和访问但未引用的实体。

🔎现象分析

通过消融实验发现，引用的证据通常是必要的（移除后答案显著变化且准确性下降），但引用并不充分，因为准确的答案也可能依赖于未引用的遍历上下文和周围图结构。

🛠️主要方法

通过控制消融实验，比较隔离、移除和掩码引用及未引用图实体的效果，分析引用和未引用上下文对答案的影响。

📊实验结果

在 Agentic GraphRAG 系统上进行控制消融实验，比较隔离、移除和掩码引用及未引用图实体的效果，测量答案变化和准确性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Agentic GraphRAG 中引用忠实性应作为轨迹级问题，而非仅基于源支持。
  • 通过实验证明引用必要但不充分，未引用的遍历上下文和结构同样影响答案准确性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验可能局限于特定图结构和任务，泛化性需验证。
  • 未提供具体数据集和指标细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Retrieval-Augmented Generation can improve factuality by grounding answers in external evidence, but Agentic GraphRAG complicates what it means for citations to be faithful. In these systems, an agent explores a knowledge graph before producing an answer and a small set of citations. We frame citation faithfulness as a trajectory-level problem: final citations should not only support the answer, but also account for the graph traversal, structure, and visited-but-uncited entities that may influence it. Through controlled ablation experiments, we compare the effects of isolating, removing, and masking cited and uncited graph entities. Our results show that cited evidence is often necessary, as removing it substantially changes answers and reduces accuracy. However, citations are not sufficient, because accurate answers can also depend on uncited traversal context and surrounding graph structure. These findings suggest that citation evaluation in Agentic GraphRAG should move beyond source support toward provenance over the broader retrieval trajectory.

红队与评估 3 篇

GAMBIT: A Three-Mode Benchmark for Adversarial Robustness in Multi-Agent LLM Collectives

High 2605.09027
Alexandre Le Mercier, Chris Develder, Thomas Demeester
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 GAMBIT 基准，用于评估多智能体 LLM 系统中对抗性欺骗者的检测器，包含三种评估模式和自适应对手框架。
🎯研究动机

多智能体系统中单个欺骗性智能体可破坏集体性能并逃避现有防御，但现有对抗研究仅针对浅层任务且未考虑自适应对手。

❓解决问题

缺乏评估多智能体 LLM 系统中对抗性欺骗检测器的基准，特别是针对自适应对手的零样本和少样本检测能力。

🔎现象分析

零样本评估对自适应对手具有高度误导性：两个零样本得分相近的检测器在少样本适应上相差 8 倍，元学习变体收敛快 20 倍，这种差距仅在重校准模式下可见。

🛠️主要方法

构建 GAMBIT 基准，包含三种评估模式（零样本分布偏移、零样本分布偏移增加、重校准）和两个独立分数，使用国际象棋作为深度推理任务，基于 Gemini 3.1 Pro 智能体，生成 27,804 个标注实例，涵盖 240 种共进化欺骗策略，并引入基于进化框架的自适应欺骗智能体。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及使用 Gemini 3.1 Pro 智能体，检测器 F1 为 50.5%，以及零样本与少样本适应性能对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发布 GAMBIT 基准和数据集，用于在现实约束下评估欺骗检测器，对抗隐蔽自适应欺骗者。
  • 提出基于高效进化框架的自适应欺骗智能体，可泛化到国际象棋之外，在保持几乎不可检测的同时降低集体任务性能（Gemini 检测器 F1 为 50.5%）。
  • 揭示零样本评估的误导性，并展示重校准模式能揭示检测器在少样本适应上的显著差异。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准基于国际象棋任务，泛化到其他领域需进一步验证。
  • 自适应欺骗框架可能不适用于所有多智能体系统架构。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In multi-agent systems (MAS), a single deceptive agent can nullify all gains of an agentic AI collective and evade deployed defenses. However, existing adversarial studies on MAS target only shallow tasks and do not consider adaptive adversaries, which evolve their strategies to evade the very detectors trained to catch them. To address that gap, we introduce GAMBIT, a benchmark with three evaluation modes and two independent scores for evaluating imposter detectors: the first two modes measure zero-shot detection under increasing distribution shift, and a third recalibration mode measures how quickly a detector adapts to novel attacks from just 20 labeled examples. The benchmark comes with a dataset of 27,804 labeled instances spanning 240 co-evolved imposter strategies. Our contributions are threefold: (1) Using chess as a substrate deep reasoning problem and Gemini 3.1 Pro for agents, we release GAMBIT and its dataset to evaluate imposter detectors under realistic constraints against a stealthy adaptive imposter; (2) We introduce an adaptive imposter agent based on an efficient evolutionary framework, generalizable beyond chess, that collapses collective task performance while remaining essentially undetectable (50.5% F1-score with a Gemini-based detector); (3) We show that zero-shot evaluation can be highly misleading for adaptive adversaries: two detectors with near-identical zero-shot scores differ by 8x on few-shot adaptation, while the meta-learned variant converges 20x faster, a gap only visible in the recalibration mode. Altogether, GAMBIT provides the first multi-agent benchmark where adversarial attacks and defenses co-evolve, with an imposter framework generalizable beyond our use case, and promising techniques for fast recalibration in a rapidly evolving adversarial system. Code and data: this https URL .

Measuring Google AI Overviews: Activation, Source Quality, Claim Fidelity, and Publisher Impact

High 2605.14021
Haofei Xu, Umar Iqbal, Jacob M. Montgomery
arXiv PDF cs.CY
TL;DR：Google AI Overviews 在 13.7% 的查询中激活，11% 的声明缺乏引用支持，且多数引用页面含广告但点击被抑制。
🎯研究动机

Google AI Overviews (AIOs) 是生成式 AI 最广泛的应用之一，影响超过 20 亿用户，但其对信息生态的影响（如来源质量、声明准确性、出版商收益）尚缺乏系统测量。

❓解决问题

量化 AIOs 的激活率、引用来源质量、声明忠实度以及对出版商的影响。

🔎现象分析

AIO 激活率整体 13.7%，问题形式查询达 64.7%，政治敏感话题激活率显著较低；引用来源比常规搜索结果更可信，但近 30% 未出现在第一页结果中；11% 的声明缺乏引用支持，且来源质量与声明忠实度几乎无关；超过一半的引用页面含广告，但 AIO 抑制了点击。

🛠️主要方法

大规模纵向测量研究，在 40 天内对 19 个主题类别发出 55,393 个趋势查询，收集 AIO 响应并分解为 98,020 个原子声明，分析激活率、来源质量、声明忠实度及广告情况。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了 55,393 个查询、98,020 个原子声明等测量规模。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次大规模纵向测量 Google AI Overviews 的激活率、来源选择机制和声明忠实度。
  • 揭示 AIO 引用来源与常规搜索结果不一致，且声明忠实度与来源质量独立。
  • 量化 AIO 对出版商广告收入的影响，指出多数引用页面含广告但点击被抑制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅覆盖 40 天窗口和 19 个主题类别，可能无法代表长期或所有主题。
  • 未分析 AIO 对用户行为或认知的实际影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Google AI Overviews (AIOs) are arguably the most widely encountered deployment of generative AI, reaching over 2 billion users who may not realize the answers they see are AI-generated. Where search engines have traditionally surfaced ranked sources and left users to evaluate them, AIOs synthesize and deliver a single answer - giving Google unprecedented editorial control over what users read and know. We present a large-scale longitudinal measurement study, issuing 55,393 trending queries across 19 topical categories over a 40-day window (March 13 - April 21, 2026). We report four main findings. First, overall AIO activation is 13.7%, rising to 64.7% for question-form queries, while politically sensitive topics see markedly lower rates. Second, AIO-cited domains are more credible than co-displayed first-page results, yet nearly 30% do not appear in those results at all, indicating a source selection mechanism distinct from Google's ranking algorithm. Third, decomposing responses into 98,020 atomic claims, 11.0% are unsupported by the cited pages - with omission the dominant failure mode - and source quality and claim fidelity are largely independent. Fourth, well over half of AIO-cited pages carry display advertising, meaning publishers lose revenue when AIOs suppress the click-through, even as Google's own sponsored ads continue to appear on the same page. Together, these findings document a rapid transformation of the online information ecosystem whose consequences for epistemic security remain poorly understood.

ROK-FORTRESS: Measuring the Effect of Geopolitical Transcreation for National Security and Public Safety

High 2605.14152
Michael S. Lee, Yash Maurya, Drew Rein, Bert Herring, Jonathan Nguyen, Kyungho Song, Udari Madhushani Sehwag, Jiyeon Cho et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出一个双语、文化对抗的 NSPS 基准 ROK-FORTRESS，通过创译矩阵分离语言和地缘政治背景对 LLM 安全行为的影响。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 安全评估主要针对高风险国家安全与公共安全（NSPS）场景，但多语言安全评估通常仅通过翻译基准进行，忽略了语言和地缘政治背景的交互作用，且实证证据仅限于少数语言对。

❓解决问题

如何系统测量语言和地缘政治背景对 LLM 安全行为的影响，并区分两者的独立效应。

🔎现象分析

在韩语变体中观察到一致的抑制效应，且地缘政治背景与语言的交互作用在不同模型间差异显著；许多模型中，韩国背景缓解了韩语驱动的抑制，而反向未出现显著放大，表明安全行为受语言作为风险信号和上下文交互的影响。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ROK-FORTRESS 基准，采用创译矩阵：在英语 - 韩语语言对和美 - 韩地缘政治轴下，控制语言（英语 vs 韩语）和地缘政治背景（美国 vs 韩国实体）的组合，评估对抗性意图，并配以双用途良性对应项以量化过度拒绝，使用校准的 LLM-as-a-judge 和专家设计的二元评分标准。

📊实验结果

在前沿模型和韩语优化模型上进行双轨评估，发现韩语变体的抑制效应及模型间差异。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入创译矩阵方法，分离语言和地缘政治背景对 LLM 安全行为的影响
  • 构建 ROK-FORTRESS 基准，提供英语 - 韩语对和 NSPS 场景的实证分析
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对英语 - 韩语对和美 - 韩地缘政治轴，泛化性需进一步验证
  • 未提供具体数值结果或与其他基准的定量比较
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Safety evaluations for large language models (LLMs) increasingly target high-stakes National Security and Public Safety (NSPS) risks, yet multilingual safety is typically assessed through translation-only benchmarks that preserve the underlying scenario, and empirical evidence of how language and geopolitical context interact remains limited to a narrow set of language pairs. We introduce \emph{ROK-FORTRESS} this https URL , a bilingual, culturally adversarial NSPS benchmark that uses the English--Korean language pair and U.S.--ROK geopolitical axis as a case study, separating the effects of language and geopolitical grounding via a \emph{transcreation matrix}: adversarial intents are evaluated under controlled combinations of (i) English versus Korean language and (ii) U.S.\ versus Korean entities, institutions, and operational details. Each adversarial prompt is paired with a dual-use benign counterpart to quantify over-refusal. Model responses are then scored using calibrated LLM-as-a-judge panels, applying our expert-crafted, prompt-specific binary rubrics. Across a dual-track set of frontier and Korean-optimized models, we find a consistent suppression effect in Korean variants and substantial model-to-model variation in how geopolitical grounding interacts with language. In many models, Korean grounding mitigates the Korean language-driven suppression -- with no model showing significant amplification in the other direction -- indicating that, at least in the English--Korean case, safety behavior is shaped by language-as-risk signals and context interactions that translation-only evaluations miss. The transcreation matrix methodology is designed to generalize to other language--culture pairs.

鲁棒性与对抗 3 篇

Systematic Discovery of Semantic Attacks in Online Map Construction through Conditional Diffusion

High 2605.14396
Chenyi Wang, Ruoyu Song, Raymond Muller, Jean-Philippe Monteuuis, Jonathan Petit, Z. Berkay Celik, Ryan Gerdes, Ming F. Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用扩散模型发现语义攻击，可绕过防御并破坏在线地图构建。
🎯研究动机

自动驾驶依赖在线高精地图感知安全关键道路元素，现有像素级扰动攻击易被标准对抗防御中和，亟需发现更隐蔽的语义级攻击。

❓解决问题

如何系统性地发现能绕过对抗防御、通过合理环境变化（如阴影、湿路面）破坏地图预测的语义攻击。

🔎现象分析

语义级扰动（如合理环境变化）比像素级扰动更难被现有防御缓解，存在防御缺口。

🛠️主要方法

MIRAGE 框架：利用扩散模型学习真实数据潜在流形，搜索与真实场景拓扑相同但误导地图预测的语义变异场景。

📊实验结果

在 nuScenes 数据集上评估，边界移除攻击抑制 57.7% 检测并破坏 96% 规划轨迹；边界注入攻击成功注入虚构边界，而 PGD 和 AdvPatch 完全失败。MIRAGE 生成场景 80-84% 被 VLM 判为真实（干净数据 97-99%，AdvPatch 仅 0-9%）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MIRAGE 框架，通过条件扩散模型系统发现语义攻击。
  • 实现两种攻击：边界移除（抑制 57.7% 检测，破坏 96% 轨迹）和边界注入（唯一成功注入虚构边界的方法）。
  • 揭示当前对抗防御在语义级扰动上的显著缺陷。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对在线地图构建任务，其他感知任务未验证。
  • 依赖扩散模型，计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autonomous vehicles depend on online HD map construction to perceive lane boundaries, dividers, and pedestrian crossings -- safety-critical road elements that directly govern motion planning. While existing pixel perturbation attacks can disrupt the mapping, they can be neutralized by standard adversarial defenses. We present MIRAGE, a framework for systematic discovery of semantic attacks that bypass adversarial defenses and degrade mapping predictions by finding plausible environmental variation (e.g. shadows, wet roads). MIRAGE exploits the latent manifold of real-world data learned by diffusion models, and searches for semantically mutated scenes neighboring the ground truth with the same road topology yet mislead the mapping predictions. We evaluate MIRAGE on nuScenes and demonstrate two attacks: (1) boundary removal, suppressing 57.7% of detections and corrupting 96% of planned trajectories; and (2) boundary injection, the only method that successfully injects fictitious boundaries, while pixel PGD and AdvPatch fail entirely. Both attacks remain potent under various adversarial defenses. We use two independent VLM judges to quantify realism, where MIRAGE passes as realistic 80--84% of the time (vs. 97--99% for clean nuScenes), while AdvPatch only 0--9%. Our findings expose a categorical gap in current adversarial defenses: semantic-level perturbations that manifest as legitimate environmental variation are substantially harder to mitigate than pixel-level perturbations.

Does RAG Know When Retrieval Is Wrong? Diagnosing Context Compliance under Knowledge Conflict

High 2605.14473
Yihang Chen, Pin Qian, Su Wang, Sipeng Zhang, Huan Xu, Shuhuai Lin, Xinpeng Wei
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出上下文驱动分解（CDD）探针，用于诊断和干预 RAG 中检索上下文与模型知识冲突时的上下文合规问题。
🎯研究动机

RAG 中检索到的上下文可能与模型参数知识冲突，导致答案被错误主导，而现有准确率指标无法揭示这种因果影响。

❓解决问题

如何诊断和干预 RAG 中检索上下文与模型知识冲突时的上下文合规问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要揭示了三种模式：P1：上下文合规在对抗性设置中可测量；P2：对抗性准确率提升可跨模型家族迁移，但因果耦合不迁移；P3：显式冲突分解提升了时间漂移和噪声干扰下的鲁棒性。

🛠️主要方法

提出上下文驱动分解（CDD），一种信念分解探针，在推理时运行并作为受控检索冲突的干预机制。

📊实验结果

在 Epi-Scale 压力测试、TruthfulQA 错误注入和跨模型重运行上进行实验，报告了准确率、因果敏感性等指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CDD 方法用于诊断和干预 RAG 中的上下文合规问题
  • 通过 Epi-Scale 压力测试、TruthfulQA 错误注入和跨模型重运行揭示三种模式
  • 发布 Epi-Scale 基准用于系统研究
⚠️方法局限
  • CDD 在 Claude 系列上的因果敏感性较低，表明机制迁移有限
  • 方法可能依赖特定对抗性设置，泛化性需进一步验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The Context-Compliance Regime in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) occurs when retrieved context dominates the final answer even when it conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Accuracy alone does not reveal how retrieved context causally shapes answers under such conflict. We introduce Context-Driven Decomposition (CDD), a belief-decomposition probe that operates at inference time and serves as an intervention mechanism for controlled retrieval conflict. Across Epi-Scale stress tests, TruthfulQA misconception injection, and cross- model reruns, CDD exposes three patterns. P1: context compliance is measurable in an upper-bound adversarial setting, where Standard RAG reaches 15.0% accuracy on TruthfulQA misconception injection (N=500). P2: adversarial accuracy gains transfer across model families: CDD improves accuracy on Gemini-2.5-Flash and on Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus, but rationale-answer causal coupling does not transfer. CDD reaches 64.1% mistake- injection causal sensitivity on Gemini-2.5-Flash, while sensitivities for all three Claude variants fall in the [-3%, +7%] range, suggesting that the Claude-side accuracy gains operate through a mechanism distinct from the explicit conflict-resolution trace. P3: explicit conflict decomposition improves robustness under temporal drift and noisy distractors, with CDD reaching 71.3% on temporal shifts and 69.9% on distractor evidence on the full Epi-Scale adversarial benchmark. These three patterns identify context-compliance as a structural axis along which standard RAG can be probed and intervened on, distinct from retrieval-quality or single-method robustness questions, and motivate releasing Epi-Scale for systematic study across model families and retrieval pipelines.

MahaVar: OOD Detection via Class-wise Mahalanobis Distance Variance under Neural Collapse

Medium 2605.14413
Donghwan Kim, Hyunsoo Yoon
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用神经坍缩现象中类间马氏距离方差差异进行 OOD 检测
🎯研究动机

OOD 检测对安全关键应用至关重要，现有基于马氏距离的方法未充分利用类间距离的方差信息。

❓解决问题

如何利用 ID 和 OOD 样本在类间马氏距离方差上的结构性差异来提升 OOD 检测性能。

🔎现象分析

ID 样本的类间马氏距离呈现尖锐最小值结构（最近类距离小，其他类距离大），方差高；OOD 样本则方差较低。该现象在神经坍缩理论下得到解释。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MahaVar，在传统马氏距离基础上增加类间距离方差项作为 OOD 分数，是一种简单的后处理方法。

📊实验结果

在 OpenOOD v1.5 协议下，CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上取得 SOTA，AUROC 和 FPR@95 均优于现有马氏距离方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现 ID 和 OOD 样本在类间马氏距离方差上的结构性差异，并给出神经坍缩理论解释。
  • 提出 MahaVar 方法，在多个基准上达到 SOTA 性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖神经坍缩假设，可能不适用于未满足该假设的模型。
  • 仅验证了图像分类任务，其他模态或任务需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a critical component for ensuring the reliability of deep neural networks in safety-critical applications. In this work, we present a key empirical observation: for in-distribution (ID) samples, class-wise Mahalanobis distances exhibit a pronounced sharp minimum structure, where the distance to the nearest class is small while distances to all other classes remain large, resulting in high variance across classes. In contrast, OOD samples tend to exhibit a less pronounced sharp minimum structure, producing comparatively lower variance across classes. We further provide a theoretical analysis grounding this observation in Neural Collapse geometry: under relaxed Neural Collapse assumptions on within-class compactness and inter-class separation, ID samples are shown to structurally exhibit high class-wise distance variance, offering a theoretical basis for its use as an OOD score. Motivated by this observation and its theoretical backing, we propose MahaVar, a simple and effective post-hoc OOD detector that augments the Mahalanobis distance with a class-wise distance variance term. Following the OpenOOD v1.5 benchmark protocol, MahaVar achieves state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet, with consistent improvements in both AUROC and FPR@95 over existing Mahalanobis-based methods across all benchmarks.

越狱与攻击 2 篇

Hidden State Poisoning Attacks against Mamba-based Language Models

High 2601.01972
Alexandre Le Mercier, Chris Develder, Thomas Demeester
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：针对 Mamba 状态空间模型提出隐藏状态投毒攻击（HiSPA），揭示其易受短输入短语导致信息遗忘的脆弱性。
🎯研究动机

Mamba 等状态空间模型作为 Transformer 的高效替代方案，其对抗鲁棒性尚未被充分研究，存在安全风险。

❓解决问题

研究特定短输入短语如何通过不可逆地覆盖隐藏状态信息，导致 Mamba 模型产生部分遗忘效应（隐藏状态投毒攻击）。

🔎现象分析

短输入短语可触发 Mamba 模型的隐藏状态信息不可逆覆盖，造成部分遗忘；纯 Transformer 模型不受影响，而混合模型 Jamba-1.7-Mini 在攻击下性能崩溃。

🛠️主要方法

提出隐藏状态投毒攻击（HiSPA），通过精心设计的短输入短语操纵模型隐藏状态；构建 RoBench-25 基准评估信息检索能力。

📊实验结果

在 RoBench-25 和 Open-Prompt-Injections 基准上评估，显示 Jamba-1.7-Mini 在 HiSPA 下性能崩溃，而纯 Transformer 不受影响；攻击扩展到 Mamba-2 和混合模型 Nemotron-3-Nano。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统研究 Mamba 等 SSM 模型对隐藏状态投毒攻击的脆弱性
  • 提出 HiSPA 攻击方法和 RoBench-25 基准，验证 SSM 模型易受攻击而 Transformer 鲁棒
  • 通过可解释性分析揭示攻击期间 Mamba 隐藏层的模式，为防御提供基础
⚠️方法局限
  • 攻击仅针对特定短输入短语，可能需更通用的攻击方法
  • 防御系统仅基于模式分析，尚未实现完整缓解方案
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

State space models (SSMs) like Mamba offer efficient alternatives to Transformer-based language models, with linear time complexity. Yet, their adversarial robustness remains critically unexplored. This paper studies the phenomenon whereby specific short input phrases induce a partial amnesia effect in such models, by irreversibly overwriting information in their hidden states, referred to as a Hidden State Poisoning Attack (HiSPA). Our benchmark RoBench-25 allows evaluating a model's information retrieval capabilities when subject to HiSPAs, and confirms the vulnerability of SSMs against such attacks. Even the recent Jamba-1.7-Mini SSM--Transformer (a 52B hybrid model) collapses on RoBench-25 under some HiSPA triggers, whereas pure Transformers do not. We also observe that HiSPA triggers significantly weaken the Jamba model on the popular Open-Prompt-Injections benchmark, unlike pure Transformers. We further show that the theoretical and empirical findings extend to Mamba-2, and also analyse a Mamba-2-based hybrid (Nemotron-3-Nano). Finally, our interpretability study reveals patterns in Mamba's hidden layers during HiSPAs that could be used to build a HiSPA mitigation system. The full code and data to reproduce the experiments can be found at this https URL .

The Great Pretender: A Stochasticity Problem in LLM Jailbreak

High 2605.14418
Jean-Philippe Monteuuis, Cong Chen, Jonathan Petit
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：LLM 越狱攻击的成功率（ASR）因随机性而高度不稳定，论文提出新指标和框架来评估与缓解这一问题。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 越狱攻击评估依赖 ASR 指标，但该指标因随机性而不稳定，导致论文报告的 ASR 被系统性高估且无法跨论文比较，亟需更可靠的评估方法和改进策略。

❓解决问题

LLM 越狱攻击的成功率（ASR）在多次尝试中表现不一致，且现有评估框架未考虑随机性对攻击生成和评估的影响。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到：一个在论文中声称 ASR 为 80% 的越狱提示，在目标模型上连续 10 次尝试中仅成功 5 次（50% 成功率），表明 ASR 不是稳定量，且已发表的 ASR 数值被系统性膨胀。

🛠️主要方法

提出两个框架：CAS-eval（评估框架，要求越狱提示在多次尝试中连续成功）和 CAS-gen（攻击生成框架，通过优化提升多次尝试下的成功率）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示 LLM 越狱攻击中随机性导致 ASR 不稳定的问题，并指出已发表 ASR 被系统性高估。
  • 提出 CAS-eval 评估框架和 CAS-gen 攻击生成框架，分别用于稳定评估和提升多次尝试下的攻击成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定攻击方法和模型验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
  • CAS-gen 框架可能增加攻击生成的计算成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

"Oh-Oh, yes, I'm the great pretender. Pretending that I'm doing well. My need is such, I pretend too much..." summarizes the state in the area of jailbreak creation and evaluation. You find this method to generate adversarial attacks proposed by a reputable institution (e.g., BoN from Anthropic or Crescendo from Microsoft Research). However, this method does not deliver on the promise claimed in the paper despite having top ASR scores against industry-grade LLMs. You successfully generate the jailbreak prompts against your target (open) model. However, the generated jailbreak prompt works against the target model with a 50% consecutive success rate (5 out of 10 attempts) despite having an 80% ASR (on paper) on the latest closed-source model (with a guardrail system)! This observation leads us to think. First, Attack Success Rate (ASR), the primary metric for LLM jailbreak benchmarking, is not a stable quantity. Second, published ASR numbers are therefore systematically inflated and incomparable across papers. Therefore, we wonder "Why a successful jailbreak prompt does not perform consistently well against a target model on which the prompts have been optimized?". To answer this question, we study the impact of stochasticity not only during attack evaluation but also during attack generation. Our evaluation includes several jailbreak attacks, models (different sizes and providers), and judges. In addition, we propose a new metric and two new frameworks (CAS-eval and CAS-gen). Our evaluation framework, CAS-eval, shows that an attack can have an ASR drop of up to 30 percentage points when a jailbreak prompt needs to succeed on more than one attempt. Thankfully, our attack generation framework (CAS-gen) improves previous jailbreak methods and helps them recover this loss of 30 percentage points!

公平性与偏见 1 篇

Generalized Priority-Aware Shapley Value

Medium 2605.15018
Kiljae Lee, Ziqi Liu, Weijing Tang, Yuan Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出广义优先级感知 Shapley 值，支持任意有向加权优先图，解决现有方法要求二元无环优先级的限制。
🎯研究动机

现有优先级感知 Shapley 值要求成对优先级为二元且无环，这在聚合人类偏好和多标准比较等真实数据中严重违反，限制了其应用。

❓解决问题

如何定义和计算支持任意有向加权优先图（允许循环和加权边）的优先级感知 Shapley 值。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出广义优先级感知 Shapley 值（GPASV），一种定义在任意有向加权优先图上的随机序值，其中成对边惩罚而非禁止序违反；通过公理化刻画建立，开发计算方法，并引入优先级扫描诊断。

📊实验结果

在循环的 Chatbot Arena 偏好图上对 LLM 集成进行估值，展示不同优先级平衡导致不同估值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GPASV，覆盖经典模型作为边界情况，支持任意有向加权优先图。
  • 给出公理化刻画和计算方法，扩展了优先级扫描诊断。
⚠️方法局限
  • 计算复杂度可能较高，尤其对于大规模图。
  • 实际应用中如何确定优先图权重可能依赖领域知识。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Shapley value and its priority-aware extensions are widely used for valuation in machine learning, but existing methods require pairwise priority to be binary and acyclic, a restriction spectacularly violated in real-data examples such as aggregated human preferences and multi-criterion comparisons. We introduce the generalized priority-aware Shapley value (GPASV), a random order value defined on arbitrary directed weighted priority graphs, in which pairwise edges penalize rather than forbid order violations. GPASV covers a range of classical models as boundary cases. We establish GPASV through an axiomatic characterization, develop the associated computational methods, and introduce a priority sweeping diagnostic extending PASV's. We apply GPASV to LLM ensemble valuation on the cyclic Chatbot Arena preference graph, illustrating that priority-aware valuation is not a one-button operation: different balances of pairwise graph priority versus individual soft priority produce substantively different valuations of the same data.

其他 ML 主题 33 篇 · 2 个细分

其他 27 篇

Agentic AI Ecosystems in Higher Education: A Perspective on AI Agents to Emerging Inclusive, Agentic Multi-Agent AI Framework for Learning, Teaching and Institutional Intelligence

Medium 2605.14266
Vidya K Sudarshan, Anushka Sisodia, Reshma A Ramachandra, Sia Batra, Josephine Chong Leng Leng
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出高等教育中面向包容性学习的多智能体 AI 框架视角。
🎯研究动机

当前高等教育中 AI 应用碎片化，缺乏能协调规划、推理和自适应决策的生态系统级多智能体平台。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个集成的、包容性的多智能体 AI 平台，以支持教学、学习和行政的协调运作。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验现象，但通过文献主题分析识别出四个主导主题：任务特定碎片化 AI 工具、从单智能体到多智能体系统的过渡、跨功能集成有限、对包容性和可及性关注不足。

🛠️主要方法

通过文献主题分析识别现有 AI 实现的差距，并综合挑战与未来研究方向，提出一个前瞻性的多智能体 AI 框架。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个面向高等教育的包容性多智能体 AI 平台视角
  • 通过文献分析揭示当前 AI 实现与整体教育生态系统需求之间的差距
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于文献分析，缺乏实证验证
  • 框架的具体实现细节和评估指标未明确
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Integration of artificial intelligent (AI) agents in higher education is transforming teaching, learning and administrative processes. Although existing AI agents effectively support individual tasks, their implementation remains fragmented and inefficient for handling the complexity of educational institutions. This highlights a significant research gap: the lack of integrated eco-system-level agentic multi-agent AI platform capable of coordinated planning, reasoning, and adaptive decision-making across multiple educational functions. This paper presents a forward-looking perspective on agentic multi-agent AI platform in higher education, consisting interconnected autonomous, goal driven agents that support learning, teaching, and institutional operations. It addresses timely and critical questions: Can agentic AI represent the next generation of intelligent systems in tertiary education? Can they collectively support seamless coordinated operations across teaching, learning and administrative support? To what extent can such systems foster inclusive and equitable learning for diverse learners with special educational needs? To ground this perspective, a thematic analysis of existing literature identifies four dominant themes: task-specific fragmented AI tools, the transition from single-agent to multi-agent systems, limited cross-functional integration, and insufficient focus on inclusivity and accessibility. Findings reveal a clear gap between current AI implementations and the needs of holistic, learner-centered educational ecosystem. The paper synthesizes challenges and outlines future research directions for scalable human-aligned, and inclusive agentic AI platform. The significant contribution is the incorporation of inclusive learning perspectives, highlighting how coordinated agentic multi-agent platform can support diverse learners through adaptive, multimodal interventions.

Metis AI: The Overlooked Middle Zone Between AI-Native and World-Movers

Medium 2605.14407
Xiang Li
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：论文提出“Metis AI”概念，指出数字任务中存在一类因制度、社会、规范纠缠而难以自动化的工作，并主张采用人类主导、AI 辅助的半人马架构。
🎯研究动机

当前 AI 局限性讨论主要聚焦于数字任务与物理任务的边界，忽略了数字任务内部存在一类因制度、社会、规范纠缠而难以自动化的任务，这导致对 AI 能力边界的理解不完整。

❓解决问题

识别并定义一类完全在计算机上执行但难以可靠自动化的任务（Metis AI），分析其结构特征，并探讨合适的设计响应。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，Metis AI 任务并非计算上不可解，而是因制度、社会、规范纠缠而难以形式化，并区分了构成性 metis（形式化即破坏知识）与操作性 metis（可逐步吸收的熟悉性）。

🛠️主要方法

通过跨社会科学、哲学和人道主义实践的理论分析，提出 Metis AI 的五个结构特征：后果不可逆性、关系不可约性、规范开放纹理、对抗性共同演化、问责锚定，并论证这些特征是任务本身的属性而非当前模型的局限。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Metis AI 概念，填补了数字任务中自动化边界讨论的空白
  • 区分构成性 metis 与操作性 metis，并定义五个结构特征
  • 论证适当的响应不是更好的自动化，而是人类主导、AI 支持的半人马架构
⚠️方法局限
  • 概念框架缺乏实证验证
  • 五个特征的操作化定义可能不够精确
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The dominant discourse on AI limitations frames the boundary of AI capability as a divide between digital tasks (where AI excels) and physical tasks (where embodiment is required). We argue this framing misses the most consequential boundary: the one within digital tasks. We identify a class of tasks we call Metis AI, named for the Greek concept of metis (practical, contextual knowledge), that are performed entirely on computers yet resist reliable AI automation. These tasks are not computationally intractable; they are institutionally, socially, and normatively entangled in ways that defeat algorithmic approaches. We distinguish constitutive metis (knowledge destroyed by the act of formalization) from operational metis (system-specific familiarity that automation can progressively absorb), and propose five structural characteristics that define the Metis AI zone: consequential irreversibility, relational irreducibility, normative open texture, adversarial co-evolution, and accountability anchoring. We ground each in established theory from across the social sciences, philosophy, and humanitarian practice, argue that these characteristics are properties of the tasks themselves rather than limitations of current models, and show that the appropriate design response is not better automation but centaur architectures in which humans lead and AI supports.

Learning Scenario Reduction for Two-Stage Robust Optimization with Discrete Uncertainty

Medium 2605.14494
Tianjue Lin, Jianan Zhou, Jieyi Bi, Yaoxin Wu, Wen Song, Zhiguang Cao, Jie Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出基于 GNN-Transformer 的神经代理模型 NeurPRISE，通过模仿学习加速两阶段鲁棒优化的场景缩减。
🎯研究动机

两阶段鲁棒优化（2RO）在离散不确定性下计算困难，场景缩减可降低复杂度，但现有方法忽略问题结构且计算开销大。

❓解决问题

如何高效地构建高质量的代表性子场景集，以在保持解质量的同时大幅降低 2RO 的计算成本。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PRISE（问题驱动的顺序前瞻启发式）和 NeurPRISE（基于 GNN-Transformer 的神经代理模型）。PRISE 通过评估每个场景的边际影响逐步构建子集；NeurPRISE 通过模仿学习从 PRISE 中蒸馏边际增益信息，学习评分函数用于场景排序和选择。

📊实验结果

在三个两阶段鲁棒优化问题上进行实验，结果显示 NeurPRISE 在遗憾指标上与综合方法相当，计算速度比 PRISE 提升 7-200 倍，且能零样本泛化到更大问题规模（5 倍）、更多场景（4 倍）和分布偏移。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PRISE，一种问题驱动的顺序前瞻启发式方法，用于两阶段鲁棒优化的场景缩减。
  • 提出 NeurPRISE，一种基于 GNN-Transformer 的神经代理模型，通过模仿学习和增益感知排序目标加速场景选择。
  • 在三个 2RO 问题上验证，NeurPRISE 在保持竞争性遗憾的同时，实现 7-200 倍加速，并展现强零样本泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 PRISE 生成的高质量训练数据，若 PRISE 本身有偏差则影响学习效果。
  • GNN-Transformer 架构的泛化能力可能受限于训练分布，极端分布偏移下性能未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Two-Stage Robust Optimization (2RO) with discrete uncertainty is challenging, often rendering exact solutions prohibitive. Scenario reduction alleviates this issue by selecting a small, representative subset of scenarios to enable tractable computation. However, existing methods are largely problem-agnostic, operating solely on the uncertainty set without consulting the feasible region or recourse structure. In this paper, we introduce PRISE, a problem-driven sequential lookahead heuristic that constructs reduced scenario sets by evaluating the marginal impact of each scenario. While PRISE yields high-quality scenario subsets, each selection step requires solving multiple subproblems, making it computationally expensive at scale. To address this, we propose NeurPRISE, a neural surrogate model built on a GNN-Transformer backbone that encodes the per-scenario structure via graph convolution and captures cross-scenario interactions through attention. NeurPRISE is trained via imitation learning with a gain-aware ranking objective, which distills marginal gain information from PRISE into a learned scoring function for scenario ranking and selection. Extensive results on three 2RO problems show that NeurPRISE consistently achieves competitive regret relative to comprehensive methods, maintains strong calability with varying numbers of scenarios, and delivers 7-200x speedup over PRISE. NeurPRISE also exhibits strong zero-shot generalization, effectively handling instances with larger problem scales (up to 5x), more scenarios (up to 4x), and distribution shifts.

Asymmetric Generative Recommendation via Multi-Expert Projection and Multi-Faceted Hierarchical Quantization

Medium 2605.14512
Bin Huang, Xin Wang, Junwei Pan, Yongqi Zhou, Yifeng Zhou, Zhixiang Feng, Shudong Huang, Haijie Gu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：提出非对称连续 - 离散框架 AsymRec，通过多专家投影和多面层次量化解决生成式推荐中的信息瓶颈问题。
🎯研究动机

现有生成式推荐模型将物品表示为离散语义 ID 并对称使用，导致输入和输出阶段存在信息瓶颈，限制了推荐性能。

❓解决问题

生成式推荐中对称离散表示导致的输入信息瓶颈（量化损失和流行度偏差）和输出信息瓶颈（不精确的离散目标）问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出对称离散表示存在双重信息瓶颈：输入瓶颈中，有损量化降低细粒度语义，流行度偏差使表示偏向高频物品；输出瓶颈中，不精确的离散目标限制监督质量。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AsymRec 框架，包含多专家语义投影（MSP）和多面层次量化（MHQ）。MSP 通过专家专用投影将连续嵌入映射到 Transformer 隐藏空间；MHQ 通过多视图多级量化和语义正则化构建高容量结构化离散目标。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上实验，AsymRec 平均比最先进生成式推荐器提升 15.8%。摘要未提供具体数据集和实验设置细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别并分析了生成式推荐中对称离散表示的双重信息瓶颈问题。
  • 提出非对称连续 - 离散框架 AsymRec，解耦输入和输出表示。
  • 设计多专家语义投影和多面层次量化模块，分别缓解输入和输出瓶颈。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定量化策略和专家数量，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 计算开销可能因多专家和多面量化而增加。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generative Recommendation (GenRec) models reformulate recommendation as a sequence generation task, representing items as discrete Semantic IDs used symmetrically as both inputs and prediction targets. We identify a critical dual-stage information bottleneck in this design: (1) the Input Bottleneck, where lossy quantization degrades fine-grained semantics, while popularity bias skews the learned representations toward frequent items, and (2) the Output Bottleneck, where imprecise discrete targets limit supervision quality. To address these issues, we propose AsymRec, an asymmetric continuous-discrete framework that decouples input and output representations. Specifically, Multi-expert Semantic Projection (MSP) maps continuous embeddings into the Transformer's hidden space via expert-specialized projections, preserving semantic richness and improving generalization to infrequent items. Multi-faceted Hierarchical Quantization (MHQ) constructs high-capacity, structured discrete targets through multi-view and multi-level quantization with semantic regularization, preventing dimensional collapse while retaining fine-grained distinctions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsymRec consistently outperforms state-of-the-art generative recommenders by an average of 15.8 %. The code will be released.

An Amortized Efficiency Threshold for Comparing Neural and Heuristic Solvers in Combinatorial Optimization

Medium 2605.14624
Sohaib Afifi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出摊销效率阈值（AET）框架，证明神经组合优化求解器在足够多的部署实例下能比启发式方法更节能。
🎯研究动机

神经组合优化求解器常被批评训练能耗高，但忽略了部署阶段能耗的累积效应，需要统一比较框架。

❓解决问题

如何公平比较神经求解器与启发式求解器在总能耗或碳排放上的效率，并确定神经求解器何时能实现净效率优势。

🔎现象分析

训练能耗是固定大额成本，而启发式方法每次实例消耗少量 CPU 能量，两者不可直接比较，需考虑部署量。

🛠️主要方法

定义摊销效率阈值（AET），即神经求解器在总能耗或碳排上与启发式基线持平所需的部署实例数，并证明当神经求解器每实例能耗更低时，累积能耗比趋于小于 1 的常数。

📊实验结果

在 Multi-Task VRP 环境（n=20，19 个问题变体，5 个训练种子）上，以 HGS（PyVRP）为启发式基线，测量 AET 和每实例能耗比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AET 框架，统一比较神经与启发式求解器的能耗 / 碳排放效率。
  • 在 MTVRP 环境（n=20）上实测 AET 约为 1.58×10^5 实例，每实例能耗比为 0.41。
  • 开源框架、测量协议和实验数据。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅针对小规模问题（n=20），更大规模问题的收敛性未验证。
  • 未考虑不同硬件、训练策略或启发式变体的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A common critique of neural combinatorial-optimization solvers is that they are less energy-efficient than CPU metaheuristics, given the operational energy cost of training them on GPUs. This paper examines the inferential step from "training is expensive" to "neural solvers are net-inefficient", which is where the critique actually goes wrong. Training the network costs a large fixed amount of GPU energy; running the metaheuristic costs a small amount of CPU energy on every instance, repeated as long as the solver is deployed. The two are not commensurable until a deployment volume is fixed. We define the Amortized Efficiency Threshold (AET) as the deployment volume above which a neural solver breaks even with a heuristic baseline in total energy or carbon, under an explicit constraint on solution quality. We show that the cumulative-energy ratio between the two solvers tends to a constant strictly below one whenever the network wins per-instance, and that this limit does not depend on how the training cost was measured. An embodied-carbon term amortizes hardware fabrication symmetrically on both sides. We instantiate the framework on the Multi-Task VRP (MTVRP) environment at n=20 customers across 19 problem variants and five training seeds, with HGS via PyVRP as the heuristic baseline. The measured crossover sits near $1.58 \times 10^5$ deployed instances; the per-instance ratio is 0.41, reflecting the moderate size of the instances tested. The contribution is the framework, the open instrumentation, and the measurement protocol; structural convergence of the ratio at larger problem sizes is left to future empirical work.

Spontaneous symmetry breaking and Goldstone modes for deep information propagation

Medium 2605.14685
Nabil Iqbal, T. Anderson Keller, Yue Song, Takeru Miyato, Max Welling
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用连续对称性自发破缺产生的 Goldstone 模式实现深度神经网络中的长程信息传播。
🎯研究动机

深度神经网络中信息随深度衰减是训练困难的核心问题，现有方法依赖残差连接或归一化等架构技巧，但缺乏物理机制层面的理解。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖残差连接或归一化的情况下，实现深度神经网络中的稳定长程信息传播。

🔎现象分析

连续对称性自发破缺后产生的 Goldstone 模式能够支持长距离相干信息传播，这一物理现象在深度神经网络中同样存在。

🛠️主要方法

设计具有连续对称性的网络层（如旋转对称），通过对称性自发破缺产生 Goldstone 模式，使信息在深度和循环迭代中相干传播。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 Goldstone 模式概念引入深度神经网络，揭示对称性破缺与信息传播的关联。
  • 在无残差连接或归一化的前馈网络中实现稳定信号传播，提升可训练性和表征多样性。
  • 在循环网络中将该机制用于长程记忆，改进 RNN 和 GRU 在长序列建模上的性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于具有连续对称性的网络架构，通用性待验证。
  • 对称性破缺的引入方式可能增加设计复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In physical systems, whenever a continuous symmetry is spontaneously broken, the system possesses excitations called Goldstone modes, which allow coherent information propagation over long distances and times. In this work, we study deep neural networks whose internal layers are equivariant under a continuous symmetry and may therefore support analogous Goldstone-like degrees of freedom. We demonstrate, both analytically and empirically, that these degrees of freedom enable coherent signal propagation across depth and recurrent iterations, providing a mechanism for stable information flow without relying on architectural stabilizers such as residual connections or normalization. In feedforward networks, this results in improved trainability and representational diversity across layers. In recurrent settings, we demonstrate the same mechanism is valuable for long-term memory by propagating information over recurrent iterations, thereby improving performance of RNNs and GRUs on long-sequence modeling tasks.

Are Candidate Models Really Needed for Active Learning?

Medium 2605.14689
Harshini Mridula Mohan, Maanya Manjunath, Vipul Arya, S.H. Shabbeer Basha, Nitin Cheekatla
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：主动学习无需初始候选模型，随机初始化 CNN/Transformer 即可达到相当性能。
🎯研究动机

主动学习依赖初始候选模型迭代选样，耗时且资源消耗大，亟需更高效的框架。

❓解决问题

能否在主动学习中移除初始候选模型，仅用随机初始化模型实现同等效果。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用随机初始化权重的 CNN 和 Transformer，结合三种置信度采样策略（HC、LC、HCLC），其中 LC 策略表现最佳。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集和领域上验证了所提方法的鲁棒性，LC 策略表现最佳。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无需初始候选模型的主动学习框架，简化流程。
  • 验证 LC 策略在无候选模型下的有效性及鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定采样策略（如 LC），其他策略效果未知。
  • 随机初始化模型在复杂任务上的泛化能力需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep learning has profoundly impacted domains such as computer vision and natural language processing by uncovering complex patterns in vast datasets. However, the reliance on extensive labeled data poses significant challenges, including resource constraints and annotation errors, particularly in training Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and transformers due to a larger number of parameters. Active learning offers a promising solution to reduce labeling burdens by strategically selecting the most informative samples for annotation. However, the current active learning frameworks are time-intensive which select the samples iteratively with the help of initial candidate models. This study investigates the feasibility of using CNNs and transformers with randomly initialized weights, eliminating the need for initial candidate models while achieving results comparable to active learning frameworks that depend on such candidate models. We evaluate three confidence-based sampling strategies: high confidence (HC), low confidence (LC), and a combination of high confidence in the early stages of training and low confidence at later stages of training (HCLC). Among these, mostly LC demonstrated the best performance in our experiments, showcasing its effectiveness as an active learning strategy without the need for candidate models. Further, extensive experiments verify the robustness of the proposed active learning methods. By challenging traditional frameworks, the proposed work introduces a streamlined approach to active learning, advancing efficiency and flexibility across diverse datasets and domains.

Understanding Imbalanced Forgetting in Rehearsal-Based Class-Incremental Learning

Medium 2605.14785
Alberto Tamajo, Srinandan Dasmahapatra, Rahman Attar
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：在基于回放的类增量学习中，即使回放分配平衡，某些类别的遗忘程度仍显著高于其他类别，本文通过分析最后一层梯度级干扰系数来预测和解释这种不平衡遗忘现象。
🎯研究动机

类增量学习中神经网络存在灾难性遗忘问题，回放是一种常用缓解策略，但近期发现即使回放分配平衡，某些类别的遗忘仍远高于其他类别，这种不平衡遗忘现象尚未被充分研究。

❓解决问题

理解和预测基于回放的类增量学习中不平衡遗忘的成因和机制。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出不平衡遗忘在基于回放的类增量学习中系统性地且严重地出现，并构建了三个最后一层系数来捕捉增量步骤中影响每个旧类别的梯度级干扰源，其中自诱导干扰系数是最强的预测因子。

🛠️主要方法

从原理分析出发，构建三个最后一层系数（包括自诱导干扰系数等）来量化梯度级干扰，并利用这些系数预测旧类别在增量步骤结束时的遗忘排名。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了基于回放的类增量学习中不平衡遗忘的系统性和严重性。
  • 提出了三个最后一层系数作为预测遗忘排名的可靠指标，并识别自诱导干扰为最强预测因子。
⚠️方法局限
  • 预测性能本身不能建立因果关系，系数解释仍需进一步验证。
  • 研究仅限于最后一层梯度级干扰，可能忽略其他层或更复杂的交互因素。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Neural networks suffer from catastrophic forgetting in class-incremental learning (CIL) settings. Rehearsal$\unicode{x2013}$replaying a subset of past samples$\unicode{x2013}$is a well-established mitigation strategy. However, recent results suggest that, despite balanced rehearsal allocation, some classes are forgotten substantially more than others. Despite its relevance, this imbalanced forgetting phenomenon remains underexplored. This work shows that imbalanced forgetting arises systematically and severely in rehearsal-based CIL and investigates it extensively. Specifically, we construct, from a principled analysis, three last-layer coefficients that capture different gradient-level sources of interference affecting each past class during an incremental step. We then demonstrate that, together, they reliably predict how past classes will rank in terms of forgetting at the end of that step. While predictive performance alone does not establish causality, these results support the interpretation of the coefficients as a plausible mechanistic account linking last-layer gradient-level interactions during training to class-level forgetting outcomes. Notably, one coefficient$\unicode{x2013}$capturing self-induced interference$\unicode{x2013}$emerges as the strongest predictor, with controlled experiments providing evidence consistent with this coefficient being influenced by the new-class interference coefficient. Overall, our findings provide valuable insights and suggest promising directions for mitigating imbalanced forgetting by reducing class-wise disparities in the identified sources of interference.

COREKG: Coreset-Guided Personalized Summarization of Knowledge Graphs

Medium 2605.14900
Sohel Aman Khan, Raghava Mutharaju, Supratim Shit
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：COREKG 利用核心集理论为知识图谱生成个性化摘要，在保持低存储和快速查询的同时，显著提升查询准确率和结构覆盖率。
🎯研究动机

知识图谱规模庞大，在问答和可视化等任务中难以直接使用；现有摘要方法无法针对用户查询模式进行个性化定制，导致存储和查询效率低下。

❓解决问题

如何基于用户查询工作负载，从大规模知识图谱中采样出一个小而相关的三元组子集，使其在近似全图特性的同时，满足个性化需求并保证有界近似误差。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于核心集理论，定义三元组相对于用户查询工作负载的敏感度分数，采用敏感度加权重要性采样算法，为每个用户独立构建个性化摘要。

📊实验结果

在 Freebase、WikiData 和 DBpedia 三个数据集上，与 GLIMPSE、PPR、iSummary、PEGASUS 和 APEX² 对比，COREKG 在查询回答准确率和结构覆盖率上取得更优结果，且摘要规模仅为原图的极小部分。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将核心集理论应用于知识图谱个性化摘要，提出敏感度分数衡量三元组对用户查询的重要性。
  • 在 Freebase、WikiData 和 DBpedia 上验证，COREKG 在查询准确率和结构覆盖率上超越 GLIMPSE、PPR 等基线，且仅需原图极小比例。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖用户查询工作负载的完整性和代表性，冷启动场景下效果未知。
  • 敏感度计算和采样过程可能引入额外计算开销，未在摘要中讨论扩展性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Knowledge Graphs (KGs) are extensively used across different domains and in several applications. Often, these KGs are very large in size. Such KGs become unwieldy for tasks such as question answering and visualization. Summarization of KGs offers a viable alternative in such cases. Furthermore, personalized KG summarization is crucial in the current data-driven world as it captures the specific requirements of users based on their query patterns. Since it only maintains relevant information, the personalized summaries of KG are small, resulting in significantly smaller storage requirements and query runtime. In this work, we adapt the coreset theory to create personalized KG summaries. For a given dataset and a user-specific query workload, we present an approach that samples a relevant subset of triples using sensitivity-based importance sampling. We ensure that the subset approximates the characteristics of the full dataset with bounded approximation error. We define sensitivity scores that measure the importance of a triple with respect to a user's query workload, which are then used by our coreset construction algorithm. We explicitly focus on personalized knowledge graph summarization by constructing summaries independently for each user based on their query behaviour. Our evaluation on Freebase, WikiData, and DBpedia shows that COREKG delivers higher query-answering accuracy and structural coverage than the state-of-the-art methods, such as GLIMPSE, PPR, iSummary, PEGASUS and APEX$^2$ while requiring only a tiny fraction of the original graph.

NeuroTrain: Surveying Local Learning Rules for Spiking Neural Networks with an Open Benchmarking Framework

Medium 2605.15058
Alessio Caviglia, Filippo Marostica, Roberta Bardini, Alessandro Savino, Stefano Di Carlo
arXiv PDF cs.NE
TL;DR：综述 SNN 训练算法并提出统一分类法，发布开源基准框架 NeuroTrain。
🎯研究动机

SNN 训练算法种类繁多，缺乏统一分类和可复现的基准测试框架，阻碍了领域进展。

❓解决问题

缺乏对 SNN 训练算法的系统分类和标准化基准测试平台。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SNN 训练算法的全面分类法，并基于 snnTorch 开发开源基准框架 NeuroTrain，实现模块化、可扩展的统一实现。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SNN 训练算法的细粒度分类法，涵盖代理梯度、局部学习规则、生物可塑性、ANN-to-SNN 转换等。
  • 发布开源基准框架 NeuroTrain，支持跨数据集、架构和训练设置的一致评估。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架可能未包含所有最新算法。
  • 基准测试的覆盖范围可能有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rapid expansion of spiking neural networks (SNNs) has led to a proliferation of training algorithms that differ widely in biological inspiration, computational structure, and hardware suitability. Despite this progress, the field lacks a unified, fine-grained taxonomy that systematically organizes these approaches and clarifies their conceptual relationships. This survey provides a comprehensive taxonomy of SNN training algorithms, spanning surrogate-gradient backpropagation, local and three-factor learning rules, biologically inspired plasticity mechanisms, ANN-to-SNN conversion pipelines, and non-standard optimization strategies. We analyze each class in terms of its computational principles, learning signals, and locality properties. To support reproducible research, we release NeuroTrain, an open-source snnTorch-based framework that implements a representative set of these algorithms within a unified, modular, and extendable framework, enabling consistent benchmarking across datasets, architectures, and training regimes. By consolidating fragmented literature and providing a reusable benchmarking framework, this survey identifies common patterns, highlights open challenges, and outlines promising directions for future work on scalable, efficient SNN training.

A Regret Perspective on Online Multiple Testing

Medium 2605.13916
Qingyang Hao, Kongchang Zhou, Fang Kong, Hongxin Wei
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：提出加权遗憾指标统一评估在线多重检验，并设计 DOMT 方法缓解阈值枯竭，实现亚线性遗憾降低。
🎯研究动机

传统在线多重检验（OMT）孤立评估 FDR 和统计功效，忽视了现代自动化流程中假阳性和假阴性成本的高度不对称，缺乏统一评价框架。

❓解决问题

如何统一评估 OMT 中假阳性和假阴性的不对称成本，并设计方法缓解信号稀疏冷启动导致的阈值枯竭问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，严格 FDR 控制的确定性程序在信号稀疏冷启动阶段会因阈值枯竭导致大量假阴性，产生线性遗憾。

🛠️主要方法

提出加权遗憾指标，并设计 Decoupled-OMT（DOMT）元包装器，通过引入历史解耦的严格非负随机扰动，缓解确定性基线的阈值枯竭。

📊实验结果

实验验证 DOMT 持续降低经验加权遗憾，实现阈值枯竭的亚线性缓解，以导航非平稳帕累托前沿。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入加权遗憾指标统一评估 OMT 中的假阳性和假阴性成本。
  • 证明遗憾守恒对偶性：严格 FDR 控制的确定性程序必然遭受线性遗憾。
  • 提出 DOMT 方法，在保持渐近安全性的同时实现阶最优的亚线性遗憾降低。
  • 推导出冷启动税，刻画算法优越性的精确相变。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法可能依赖于外生测试流的假设。
  • 理论分析主要针对平稳环境，非平稳环境下的性能需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Online Multiple Testing (OMT), a fundamental pillar of sequential statistical inference, traditionally evaluates the False Discovery Rate (FDR) and statistical power in isolation, obscuring the highly asymmetric costs of false positives and false negatives in modern automated pipelines. To unify this evaluation, we introduce $\textit{Weighted Regret}$. Under this metric, we prove the $\textit{Duality of Regret Conservation}$: purely deterministic procedures ensuring strict FDR control inevitably incur an $\Omega(T)$ linear regret penalty, as threshold depletion during signal-sparse cold starts forces massive false negatives. Tailored for exogenous testing streams, we propose Decoupled-OMT (DOMT) as a baseline-agnostic meta-wrapper. By incorporating a history-decoupled, strictly non-negative random perturbation, DOMT rescues purely deterministic baselines from severe threshold depletion. Crucially, it preserves exact asymptotic safety in stationary environments and rigorously bounds finite-sample error inflation during cold-starts.
