Guaranteeing zero additional false negatives, it yields an order-optimal $\Omega(\sqrt{T})$ regret reduction in bursty environments, with a derived ``Cold-Start Tax'' characterizing the exact phase transition of algorithmic superiority. Experiments validate that DOMT consistently curtails empirical weighted regret, achieving an order-optimal sublinear mitigation of threshold depletion to navigate the non-stationary Pareto frontier.

HodgeCover: Higher-Order Topological Coverage Drives Compression of Sparse Mixture-of-Experts

Medium 2605.13997
Tao Zhong, Dongzhe Zheng, Christine Allen-Blanchette
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：HodgeCover 通过高阶拓扑覆盖解决稀疏 MoE 压缩中的不可约三元组循环问题，在激进压缩下达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有无学习稀疏 MoE 压缩方法忽略了三专家间可能形成不可约循环的结构盲点，导致压缩质量受限。

❓解决问题

解决稀疏 MoE 层压缩中因三元组不可约循环导致的专家合并冲突问题。

🔎现象分析

三个专家两两兼容但合并时形成不可约循环，现有基于成对信号的评分无法识别可合并三元组。

🛠️主要方法

利用单纯复形上的调和核与 Hodge 分解，提出 HodgeCover 贪婪覆盖调和关键边和三角形，并混合权重剪枝。

📊实验结果

在三个开源稀疏 MoE 模型上，在激进专家缩减下，HodgeCover 在专家缩减轴匹配 SOTA，在混合轴领先，并平衡所有 Hodge 分量的保留质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示稀疏 MoE 压缩中的高阶拓扑障碍，并形式化为单纯复形上的调和核。
  • 提出 HodgeCover 方法，通过 Hodge 分解选择可合并专家，实现激进压缩下的最优性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖专家间 KL 散度等信号，可能受噪声影响。
  • 仅适用于无学习压缩场景，未探索与微调结合。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers route tokens through a handful of experts, and learning-free compression of these layers reduces inference cost without retraining. A subtle obstruction blocks every existing compressor in this family: three experts can each be pairwise compatible yet form an irreducible cycle when merged together, so any score that ranks experts on pairwise signals is structurally blind to which triples are jointly mergeable. We show the obstruction is a precise mathematical object, the harmonic kernel of the simplicial Laplacian on a 2-complex whose vertices are experts, whose edges carry KL merge barriers, and whose faces carry triplet barriers; Hodge-decomposing the edge-barrier signal isolates the kernel exactly. We turn the diagnostic into a selection objective: HodgeCover greedily covers the harmonic-critical edges and triplet-critical triangles, and a hybrid variant of HodgeCover pairs it with off-the-shelf weight pruning on survivors. On three open-weight Sparse MoE backbones under aggressive expert reduction, HodgeCover matches state-of-the-art learning-free baselines on the expert-reduction axis, leads on the aggressive-compression frontier of the hybrid axis, and uniquely balances retained mass across all four Hodge components. These results show that exposing the harmonic kernel of a learned MoE structure changes which compressor wins at the regime that matters most.

Sheaf-Theoretic Transport and Obstruction for Detecting Scientific Theory Shift in AI Agents

Medium 2605.14033
David N. Olivieri, Roque J. Hernández
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种基于层论的框架，通过传输与阻碍检测 AI 智能体中的科学理论变迁。
🎯研究动机

AI 智能体需要检测现有表征框架是否可迁移到新领域，或是否需要扩展，但现有方法缺乏形式化诊断工具。

❓解决问题

如何形式化检测 AI 智能体中科学理论的变迁，即判断表征传输是否失败并需要扩展。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建有限层论框架，通过源、重叠、目标、验证图表组织上下文，并利用残差拟合、重叠不兼容性、约束违反等指标测量阻碍度，直接对变迁候选进行阻碍排序。

📊实验结果

在受控的过渡卡片基准上评估，结果表明变形或扩展通常是最低阻碍候选，且变迁类型可分离。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于层论的传输与阻碍框架，用于检测科学理论变迁。
  • 设计过渡卡片基准，验证框架能区分变形与扩展，且目标变迁通常具有最低阻碍度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对有限诊断子问题，不涉及历史范式重构或开放式理论发明。
  • 星座核仅作为次要表征相似性探针，可能不是核心贡献。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Scientific theory shift in AI agents requires more than fitting equations to data. An artificial scientific agent must detect whether an existing representational framework remains transportable into a new regime, or whether its language has become locally-to-globally obstructed and must be extended. This paper develops a finite sheaf-theoretic framework for detecting theory-shift candidates through transport and obstruction. Contexts are organized as a local-to-global structure in which source, overlap, target, and validation charts are fitted, restricted, and tested for gluing. Obstruction measures failure of coherence through residual fit, overlap incompatibility, constraint violation, limiting-relation failure, and representational cost. We evaluate the framework on a controlled transition-card benchmark designed to separate deformation within a source language from extension of that language. The main result is direct obstruction ranking: the intended deformation or extension is usually the lowest-obstruction candidate, and transition type is separated in the benchmark. A constellation kernel over the same signatures is included only as a secondary representational-similarity probe. The aim is not to reconstruct historical paradigm shifts or solve open-ended autonomous theory invention, but to isolate a finite diagnostic subproblem for AI agents: detecting when representational transport fails and extension becomes the coherent next move.

The Evaluation Trap: Benchmark Design as Theoretical Commitment

Medium 2605.14167
Theodore J Kalaitzidis
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：论文指出基准设计隐含理论假设，会导致评估陷阱，并提出 Epistematics 方法论用于审计评估标准与能力声称的一致性。
🎯研究动机

当前 AI 基准评估隐含理论假设，这些假设若不加审视会固化主导范式，窄化进步定义，导致评估与目标能力脱节。

❓解决问题

基准评估框架可能因隐含假设而陷入自我强化的陷阱，无法真正衡量声称的能力，需要一种元评估方法来审计评估标准与能力声称的一致性。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出基准评估会通过选择架构和定义来适应评估可读性，导致评估不再追踪独立目标，而是产生由自身操作假设定义的版本，形成自我强化的评估陷阱。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Epistematics 方法论，包括从技术能力声称推导评估标准的程序、审计基准是否能区分声称能力与代理行为的审计程序、失败模式分类法以及评估能力 - 评估一致性的基准设计标准。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅包含一个对 Dupoux 等人(2026)的工作审计演示。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Epistematics 元评估方法论，包含审计程序、失败模式分类法和基准设计标准。
  • 通过对 Dupoux 等人(2026)的审计演示，展示了该方法如何揭示评估中的理论假设冲突。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法论可能依赖对技术能力声称的精确形式化，实际应用中可能面临歧义。
  • 审计过程可能复杂且需要领域专家参与，可扩展性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Every AI benchmark operationalizes theoretical assumptions about the capability it claims to assess. When assumptions function as unexamined commitments, benchmarks stabilize the dominant paradigm by narrowing what counts as progress. Over time, narrow evaluation reorganizes capability concepts: architectures and definitions are selected for benchmark legibility until evaluation ceases to track an independent object and instead produces a version of the target defined by its own operational assumptions. The result is a trap: evaluation frameworks treat self-reinforcing assessments as valid, both creating and obscuring structural limits on what the current paradigm can accomplish. We introduce Epistematics, a methodology for deriving evaluation criteria directly from technical capability claims and auditing whether proposed benchmarks can discriminate the claimed capability from proxy behaviors. The contribution is meta-evaluative: an audit procedure, a failure mode taxonomy, and benchmark-design criteria for evaluating capability-evaluation coherence. We demonstrate the procedure through a worked audit of Dupoux et al. (2026), a proposal that revises the dominant paradigm's theoretical assumptions at the architectural level while reproducing them in its evaluation criteria, thereby entrenching the constraint it seeks to overcome in a form the evaluation cannot detect.

LLM-Based Robustness Testing of Microservice Applications: An Empirical Study

Medium 2605.14202
Hrushitha Goud Tigulla, Marco Vieira
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：LLM 提示策略比模型大小更能影响微服务鲁棒性测试的多样性，结构化提示会完全丧失多样性，而嵌入突变分类学的引导策略能实现高覆盖率。
🎯研究动机

微服务 API 中的畸形、缺失或边界值输入可能级联传播，威胁系统可靠性。鲁棒性测试需要生成多样化的有效测试用例，但现有方法生成能力有限。

❓解决问题

不同 LLM 和提示策略是否会产生多样化的故障集，还是收敛于相同故障？如何设计提示策略以最大化故障模式覆盖率？

🔎现象分析

提示策略对测试多样性的影响远大于模型大小；结构化提示完全丧失多样性；单一模型配合多种提示策略可超越多模型集成；仅靠分类学规则不足，LLM 无法区分键缺失与值空突变。

🛠️主要方法

对 3 个开源 LLM（14B-70B 参数）应用 7 种提示策略，针对两个微服务系统（Java 单语言和多语言）进行鲁棒性测试，引入 Guided 和 GuidedFewShot 策略嵌入突变分类学。

📊实验结果

在 Java 单语言系统（6 个服务，9 种故障模式）和多语言系统（27 个服务，14 种故障模式）上进行 38 次有效运行，生成 663 个测试用例。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统比较了 7 种提示策略和 3 种 LLM 在微服务鲁棒性测试中的效果，发现提示策略比模型大小更关键
  • 提出 Guided 和 GuidedFewShot 策略，通过嵌入突变分类学实现高故障模式覆盖率（5/9 和 8/14）并保持低跨模型相似性
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用开源 LLM，未测试闭源模型如 GPT-4
  • 仅针对两个微服务系统，泛化性需进一步验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Malformed, missing, or boundary-value inputs in microservice APIs can cascade across dependent services, threatening reliability. Robustness testing systematically exercises such inputs to expose server-side failures, but generating diverse, effective tests remains challenging. Large Language Models can generate such tests from API specifications; however, it is unknown whether different models and prompt strategies produce diverse failure sets or converge on the same failures. We report a controlled experiment applying 7 prompt strategies to 3 open-source LLMs (14B-70B parameters) targeting 2 architecturally distinct microservice systems: one Java monolingual (6 services, 9 failure modes) and one polyglot (27 services, 14 failure modes), yielding 38 valid runs and 663 generated tests. We find that prompt strategy explains more variation in diversity than model size: a Structured prompt collapses diversity entirely, while a single model varied across three prompt strategies achieves complete failure-mode coverage on one system, outperforming any multi-model ensemble under a fixed prompt. We introduce two strategies, Guided and GuidedFewShot, that embed a mutation taxonomy from prior robustness testing research as domain context. GuidedFewShot achieves the highest single-run coverage on both systems (5 of 9 and 8 of 14 failure modes) while maintaining low cross-model similarity. A key lesson is that taxonomy rules alone are insufficient: LLMs cannot distinguish key-absent from value-empty mutations without concrete examples. Findings replicate across both systems.

ARES-LSHADE: Autoresearch-Enhanced LSHADE with Memetic Polish for the GNBG Benchmark

Medium 2605.13877
Abdullah Naeem, Md Wasi Ul kabir, Manish Bhatt, Ayon Dey, Anav Katwal, Md Tamjidul Hoque
arXiv PDF cs.NE
TL;DR：提出 ARES-LSHADE 算法，在 GNBG 基准上取得 510/744 胜场，并揭示 LLM 驱动研究循环的收敛平台现象与黑箱规则冲突。
🎯研究动机

LLM 驱动的进化算法设计在优化基准上展现出潜力，但现有方法（如 LLM-LSHADE）仍有改进空间，且 LLM 能力与基准完整性之间存在张力，需要系统研究。

❓解决问题

在 GNBG 基准上设计一种高效的黑箱差分进化变体，同时探索 LLM 驱动研究循环的行为特性。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到两个现象：(i) 仅使用算子编辑面和适应度观测面的 LLM 驱动研究循环会收敛到特征平台；(ii) 若放宽观测空间包含基准组成元数据，算法可轻易解决所有函数但违反黑箱规则。

🛠️主要方法

基于 LLM-LSHADE 2025 优胜者，添加两个新组件：(a) 侦察增强变异算子，结合自适应 CMA-ES，通过约 30 次 LLM 驱动设计实验自动生成；(b) 多起点 L-BFGS-B 精炼阶段，严格遵循黑箱处理。

📊实验结果

在 GECCO 2026 竞赛指定的 GNBG 基准上，按 31 次运行 / 函数、竞赛规定的函数评估预算进行官方评估，获得 510/744 胜场（每函数差距低于 1e-8），18/24 函数达到机器精度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ARES-LSHADE 算法，在 GNBG 基准上取得 510/744 胜场，18/24 函数达到机器精度。
  • 揭示 LLM 驱动研究循环在受限观测空间下的收敛平台现象，并讨论 LLM 能力与基准完整性之间的设计张力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 算法在 6 个函数上呈现平台特征，未能完全解决。
  • LLM 驱动研究循环可能过度依赖特定观测空间，泛化性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present ARES-LSHADE, a memetic differential-evolution variant submitted to the GECCO 2026 competition on LLM-designed evolutionary algorithms for the Generalized Numerical Benchmark Generator (GNBG). The algorithm builds on the LLM-LSHADE 2025 winner, contributing two new components: (a) a scout-augmented mutation operator with adaptive CMA-ES integration, produced by an autonomous research loop across approximately thirty LLM-driven design experiments, and (b) a multi-start L-BFGS-B polish phase that respects strict blackbox treatment of the benchmark. On the official 31-run-per-function evaluation with the competition-specified function-evaluation budgets, ARES-LSHADE obtains 510 of 744 wins (per-function gap below 1e-8), reaching machine precision on 18 of 24 functions. The remaining six functions exhibit characteristic plateau signatures consistent with GNBG's compositional structure, and were independently identified by the autoresearch loop as the hardest of the suite. Beyond the result itself, this report documents two methodological observations: (i) an LLM-driven research loop with operator-only edit surface and fitness-only observation space converges to a characteristic plateau on this benchmark; (ii) when we initially widened the observation space to include the benchmark's compositional metadata, the resulting algorithm trivially solved all 24 functions but violated the competition's blackbox rule, which we identified before submission. We discuss this tension between LLM capability and benchmark integrity as a design consideration for future LLM-driven optimization-algorithm research. Code and reproducibility artifacts are available at this https URL .

Large Language Models for Web Accessibility: A Systematic Literature Review

Medium 2605.13873
Wajdi Aljedaani, Rubel Hassan Mollik
arXiv PDF cs.DL
TL;DR：系统综述了 38 篇研究，分析 LLM 在网页无障碍中的应用现状、任务、模型、评估方法及不足。
🎯研究动机

网页无障碍对残障人士至关重要，但 LLM 在该领域的应用缺乏系统性综述，现有研究分散，难以了解整体进展、方法特点和评估标准。

❓解决问题

缺乏对 LLM 在网页无障碍中应用的系统性梳理，包括所针对的无障碍任务、使用的模型和提示策略、遵循的标准以及评估方法。

🔎现象分析

多数研究聚焦于文本中心和结构明确的无障碍任务，以 WCAG 为主要参考框架，对认知无障碍指南（COGA）考虑有限；主要依赖通用 LLM 和基于提示的交互；评估方法多样但缺乏残障用户直接参与。

🛠️主要方法

系统文献综述方法：通过全面检索科学出版物筛选 38 篇同行评审研究，进行对比分析，考察无障碍任务、LLM 模型与提示策略、系统架构、无障碍问题与指南、评估方法。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统综述 LLM 在网页无障碍中的应用，覆盖 38 篇研究。
  • 揭示了当前研究的趋势：聚焦文本任务、依赖通用 LLM、评估缺乏用户参与。
  • 为未来研究和工具开发提供参考基础。
⚠️方法局限
  • 综述范围限于同行评审研究，可能遗漏灰色文献或最新预印本。
  • 未深入分析不同 LLM 模型的具体性能差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Web accessibility aims to ensure that web content and services are usable by people with diverse abilities. In recent years, Large Language Models (LLMs) have been increasingly explored to support accessibility-related tasks on the web, such as content generation, issue detection, and remediation. However, little is known about the characteristics of these approaches, the accessibility issues they target, the standards they follow, and how they are evaluated. In this paper, we present a systematic literature review of 38 peer-reviewed studies that investigate the use of LLMs in web accessibility contexts. We begin by performing a comprehensive search of scientific publications to identify relevant studies. We then conduct a comparative analysis to examine the accessibility tasks addressed, the LLM models and prompting strategies employed, the system architectures adopted, the accessibility issues and guidelines considered, and the evaluation methods used across studies. Our findings show that most studies apply LLMs to text-centric and structurally explicit accessibility tasks, with WCAG serving as the primary reference framework and limited consideration of cognitive accessibility guidelines (COGA). The reviewed approaches predominantly rely on general-purpose LLMs and prompt-based interactions, while evaluation practices vary widely and often lack direct involvement of users with disabilities. We envision this review as a consolidated reference for researchers and practitioners seeking to understand the current landscape of LLM-supported web accessibility, and as a foundation to guide future research and tool development in this area.

Spectral Analysis of Fake News Propagation

Medium 2605.13861
Weibin Cai, Reza Zafarani
arXiv PDF cs.SI
TL;DR：通过谱分析统一假新闻传播结构，提出谱界表示与结构优化框架。
🎯研究动机

现有基于传播结构的假新闻检测方法依赖特设拓扑特征，缺乏统一的级联模式视角。

❓解决问题

如何从谱视角统一刻画新闻传播结构，并用于假新闻检测与模式解释。

🔎现象分析

真实与假新闻的传播图在谱特征上存在有意义差异。

🛠️主要方法

连接图谱与传播结构属性，通过谱界构建统一表示，并设计离散结构优化框架（含一阶扰动近似）进行解释。

📊实验结果

在真实数据上验证了谱差异、分类性能及优化轨迹的可解释性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多个新谱界并将其与现有界整合为统一谱表示
  • 设计基于谱界的分类与结构优化框架，实现可解释的传播模式学习
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖图结构质量
  • 优化框架的计算开销未详细讨论
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The propagation structure of fake news has been shown to be an important cue for detecting it; yet, existing propagation-based fake news detection methods have mainly relied on ad hoc topological features, and a unified view of cascade patterns is still lacking. To address this, we study news propagation from a spectral view by connecting graph spectra to propagation-related structural properties through rigorous spectral bounds. In particular, we introduce several new bounds and integrate them with existing ones into a unified spectral representation of information propagation. We then use these spectral bounds for downstream classification and design a discrete structural optimization framework to interpret learned propagation patterns. For efficient optimization, we rely on a first-order perturbation approximation and consider both score-guided and bound-guided objectives. Experiments on real-world data reveal meaningful spectral differences between fake and real news, competitive classification performance from spectral bounds, and interpretable evolution trajectories from structural optimization. The findings demonstrate the value of spectral analysis for understanding and modeling news propagation.

Mixed Integer Goal Programming for Personalized Meal Optimization with User-Defined Serving Granularity

Medium 2605.13849
Francisco Aguilera Moreno
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出混合整数目标规划（MIGP）解决膳食优化中分数份量不可行与硬约束无解问题，实现整数份量、软约束与快速求解。
🎯研究动机

现有膳食优化方法存在两个持续局限：连续变量产生不切实际的分数份量（如 1.7 个鸡蛋），硬营养约束在目标冲突时导致无解。系统综述 56 篇论文发现，没有方法同时结合整数规划和目标规划来解决这两个问题。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个既能输出整数份量（如 1 个鸡蛋、1 汤匙油）又能处理多营养目标冲突的个性化膳食优化方法。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到目标规划中的偏差吸收性质：GP 偏差变量缓冲了整数份量要求的成本，使得整数解与连续最优解之间的间隙在结构上小于硬约束 MIP。

🛠️主要方法

提出混合整数目标规划（MIGP），使用整数变量表示实际份量，目标规划偏差变量处理软营养目标，并采用逆目标归一化平衡多营养优化。支持按食物自定义份量粒度。

📊实验结果

在 810 个实例（30 种 USDA 食物，9 种配置，3 种方法）上评估，MIGP 在 66% 情况下找到严格优于后取整 GP 的解，且从未更差；硬约束 IP 仅 48% 可行。求解时间在典型餐食规模下低于 100 毫秒。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将整数规划与目标规划结合，解决膳食优化中分数份量和硬约束无解的双重问题。
  • 理论刻画了目标规划上下文中的整数间隙，并识别出偏差吸收性质。
  • 在 810 个实例上验证，MIGP 在 66% 情况下优于后取整 GP，且 100% 可行，求解时间低于 100 毫秒。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能未考虑食物组合的协同效应或口味偏好。
  • 仅基于营养目标，未纳入成本或可持续性等约束。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Determining what to eat to satisfy nutritional requirements is one of the oldest optimization problems in operations research, yet existing formulations have two persistent limitations: continuous variables produce impractical fractional servings (1.7 eggs, 0.37 bananas), and hard nutrient constraints cause infeasibility when targets conflict. A systematic review of 56 diet optimization papers found that none combine integer programming with goal programming to address both issues. We propose Mixed Integer Goal Programming (MIGP) for personalized meal optimization. The formulation uses integer variables for practical serving counts and goal programming deviations for soft nutrient targets, with inverse-target normalization to balance multi-nutrient optimization. Per-food serving granularity allows natural units (one egg, one tablespoon of oil) without post-hoc rounding. We characterize the integrality gap in the goal programming context and identify a deviation absorption property: GP deviation variables buffer the cost of requiring integer servings, making the gap structurally smaller than in hard-constraint MIP. For meals with 15+ foods, the integer solution matches the continuous optimum in every benchmark instance. A computational evaluation across 810 instances (30 USDA foods, 9 configurations, 3 methods) shows MIGP finds strictly better solutions than GP with post-hoc rounding in 66% of cases (never worse) while maintaining 100% feasibility; hard-constraint IP achieves only 48%. Solve times stay under 100 ms for typical meal sizes using the open-source HiGHS solver. The implementation is available as an open-source Python module integrated into an interactive meal planning application.

Intelligence Impact Quotient (IIQ): A Framework for Measuring Organizational AI Impact

Low 2605.14455
Chandan Rajah, Neha Sengupta, Federico Castanedo, Robin Mills, Amit Bahree, Ramesh Krishnan Muthukrishnan, Larry Murray
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 IIQ 框架，用于量化组织内 AI 集成深度与影响，而非模型能力。
🎯研究动机

现有指标（如访问次数、token 总量）不足以衡量 AI 对组织工作的真实影响，需要更精细的度量框架。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个复合指标，量化 AI 系统在组织工作流中的集成深度和实际影响。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

IIQ 结合新颖性加权、时间衰减的 token 存量、使用频率、宽限期最近门控、组织杠杆、任务复杂度和自主性，生成原始 IAI 和归一化 0-1000 IIQ 指数，并推导亚日更新规则和解释层。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 IIQ 框架，综合多维度量化 AI 集成深度与影响
  • 设计归一化指数和亚日更新规则，支持异构用户和单元比较
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供真实组织数据验证
  • 框架依赖主观参数设定（如权重、衰减因子）
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The Intelligence Impact Quotient (IIQ) is a composite metric intended to quantify the depth to which AI systems are integrated into organizational work and their impact. Rather than treating access counts or aggregate token volume as sufficient evidence of impact, IIQ combines a novelty-weighted, time-decayed token stock with usage frequency, a grace-period recency gate, organizational leverage, task complexity, and autonomy. The formulation produces a raw Intelligence Adoption Index (IAI) and a normalized 0-1000 IIQ index for comparison between heterogeneous users and units. We also derive sub-daily update rules and a bounded interpretation layer for estimated efficiency and financial impact. The paper positions IIQ as a deployment-oriented measurement framework: a formal proposal for tracking AI embedding in workflows, not a direct measure of model capability or a substitute for causal productivity evaluation. Synthetic scenarios illustrate how the revised metric distinguishes between frequent low-leverage use, semantically repetitive prompting, and more autonomous, higher-consequence AI-assisted work.

Quantifying Cyber-Vulnerability in Power Electronics Systems via an Impedance-Based Attack Reachable Domain

Low 2605.14502
Hongwei Zhen, Ze Yu, Xin Xiang, Wuhua Li, Mingyang Sun
arXiv PDF eess.SY
TL;DR：提出基于阻抗的攻击可达域（ARD）框架，量化电力电子系统的网络脆弱性。
🎯研究动机

电力电子系统与数字控制器和通信网络的集成使其面临网络威胁，但缺乏以攻击者为中心的指标来量化在权限受限动作空间内节点被推向不稳定的程度。

❓解决问题

量化电力电子系统中节点在权限受限动作空间内的网络脆弱性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于阻抗的攻击可达域（ARD）框架，通过阻抗重塑将可行的对抗动作映射到关键特征值迁移；定义攻击穿透指数（Attack Penetration Index）来量化节点级网络脆弱性；建立灰盒工作流，集成现有阻抗辨识和可微替代工具。

📊实验结果

在 4 节点系统和修改的 IEEE 39 节点系统上进行案例研究，表明跨层协同操作比孤立单层攻击更具破坏性，且所提指标揭示了电网强度指标无法推断的脆弱性模式。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出阻抗攻击可达域（ARD）框架，量化权限受限动作空间内的节点脆弱性。
  • 定义攻击穿透指数，联合表征标称稳定裕度的穿透和成功失稳攻击的可达性。
  • 建立灰盒评估工作流，使逆变器模型不可用时仍可计算。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖阻抗辨识和可微替代工具的精度。
  • 未考虑更复杂的攻击场景或实时性要求。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Power electronics systems are increasingly exposed to cyber threats due to their integration with digital controllers and communication networks. However, an attacker-oriented metric is still lacking to quantify the extent to which a node can be pushed toward instability within a privilege-constrained action space. This letter proposes an impedance-based Attack Reachable Domain (ARD) framework that maps feasible adversarial actions to critical-eigenvalue migration through impedance reshaping. Based on the ARD, an Attack Penetration Index is defined to quantify node-level cyber-vulnerability by jointly characterizing the penetration of the nominal stability margin and the accessibility of successful destabilizing attacks within a privilege-constrained action space. To make the proposed assessment computable when inverter models are unavailable, a practical gray-box workflow is further established by integrating existing impedance identification and differentiable surrogate tools. Case studies on a 4-bus system and a modified IEEE 39-bus system show that coordinated cross-layer manipulations are markedly more damaging than isolated single-layer attacks, and that the proposed metric reveals vulnerability patterns that cannot be inferred from grid-strength indicators.

PyCSP3-Scheduling: A Scheduling Extension for PyCSP3

Low 2605.14559
Sohaib Afifi
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：为 PyCSP3 添加调度抽象层，编译为标准约束，保持建模与求解分离。
🎯研究动机

PyCSP3 缺乏对调度问题的原生支持，用户需手动编码低层变量和约束，降低了建模效率。

❓解决问题

如何在 PyCSP3 中高效支持调度抽象（如区间变量、序列变量、资源函数），同时保持建模与求解的分离。

🔎现象分析

编译后的约束在部分模型族上性能提升（最高 5.8 倍），但在其他族上因分解开销导致性能下降。

🛠️主要方法

开发 PyCSP3 Scheduling 库，提供 53 个专用约束和 27 个表达式，编译为标准 PyCSP3/XCSP3 约束。

📊实验结果

在 17 个模型族的 261 对实例上（每对 5 次运行）进行实验，所有 72 个双重证明最优对的目标值一致，8/17 模型族编译后结构不变，性能差异从提升 5.8 倍到下降不等。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出调度抽象层，简化调度问题的建模
  • 实现编译机制，保持与 PyCSP3 生态的兼容性
  • 在 261 个实例上验证了正确性和性能差异
⚠️方法局限
  • 编译分解可能引入性能开销，导致部分模型族性能下降
  • 仅支持调度相关抽象，未覆盖其他领域
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

PyCSP$^3$ provides a productive way to build constraint models for solving combinatorial constrained problems and export them to XCSP$^3$, preserving a complete separation between modeling and solving. However, it lacks native support for scheduling abstractions such as interval variables, sequence variables, and resource functions. As a result, scheduling models must be encoded with low-level integer variables and manual channeling constraints, even though PyCSP$^3$ already provides global constraints like NoOverlap and Cumulative on integer arrays. We present PyCSP$^3$ Scheduling, a library that adds scheduling abstractions to PyCSP$^3$ through 53 dedicated constraints and 27 expressions, and compiles them down to standard PyCSP$^3$/XCSP$^3$ constraints, maintaining the modeling/solving separation that underpins the PyCSP$^3$ ecosystem. On 261 paired instances across 17 model families (5 runs each), both formulations produce identical objectives on all 72 doubly-proved optimal pairs and nearly half of the families (8/17) remain structurally unchanged after compilation; however, runtime performance diverges across families, with clear gains on some (up to 5.8x) and regressions on others due to the overhead of compilation decompositions. Code and benchmarks are available at: this https URL

Monitoring Data-aware Temporal Properties (Extended Version)

Low 2605.14666
Alessandro Gianola, Marco Montali, Sarah Winkler
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种结合自动机与 SMT 求解的框架，用于在有限迹上对带 SMT 理论的线性时态逻辑进行前瞻性监控。
🎯研究动机

AI 动态系统通常复杂异构，内部规范不可访问，模型检验等验证技术不适用，监控成为评估系统属性的重要替代方案。

❓解决问题

如何对有限迹上带任意 SMT 理论的线性时态逻辑（LTLfMT）进行前瞻性监控，即监控状态依赖于已见前缀和所有可能的未来延续。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合自动机理论处理时态逻辑，利用自动化推理技术处理一阶维度，提出一个新颖的基础框架，并在合理假设下证明其正确性。

📊实验结果

通过原型实现和初步评估验证了可行性，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出并形式化证明了一个用于监控 LTLfMT 表达性片段的新颖基础框架的正确性。
  • 首次识别出该监控问题中实际可判定的片段，这些片段结合了线性算术与未解释函数，覆盖数据感知业务流程等场景。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架仅适用于 LTLfMT 的特定表达性片段，可能不覆盖所有实际场景。
  • 原型实现仅初步评估，缺乏大规模或复杂系统的性能验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Dynamic systems in AI are often complex and heterogeneous, so that an internal specification is not accessible and verification techniques such as model checking are not applicable. Monitoring is in such cases an attractive alternative, as it evaluates desirable properties along traces generated by an unknown dynamic system. In this work, we consider anticipatory monitoring of linear-time properties enriched with an arbitrary SMT theory over finite traces (LTLfMT). Anticipatory monitoring in this setting is highly challenging, as the monitoring state depends on both the trace prefix seen so far and all its possible finite continuations. Under reasonable assumptions on the background theory, we present and formally prove the correctness of a novel foundational framework for monitoring properties in an expressive fragment of LTLfMT. The framework combines automata-theoretic methods to handle the temporal aspects of the logic, with automated reasoning techniques to address the first-order dimension. Moreover, we identify for the first time decidable fragments of this monitoring problem that are practically relevant as they combine linear arithmetic with uninterpreted functions, which covers e.g. data-aware business processes and dynamic systems operating over a read-only database. Feasibility is witnessed by a prototype implementation and preliminary evaluation.

Interestingness as an Inductive Heuristic for Future Compression Progress

Low 2605.14831
Vincent Herrmann, Jürgen Schmidhuber
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：将有趣性形式化为未来压缩进步的归纳启发式，并证明其可预测性。
🎯研究动机

递归自我改进系统的瓶颈之一是缺乏前瞻性识别有潜力任务或数据的能力，即有趣性。

❓解决问题

如何形式化并预测有趣性，以作为未来压缩进步的归纳启发式。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

利用柯尔莫哥洛夫复杂度和算法统计工具，分析长度先验、算法先验和速度先验下的复杂度 - 运行时间轮廓，证明有趣性的归纳性质。

📊实验结果

在三种不同的通用计算范式上进行了实验验证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化有趣性为未来压缩进步的归纳启发式。
  • 证明预期未来进步指数依赖于最后一次突破的新近性。
  • 证明算法先验比长度先验更乐观，导致预期发现二次增长。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于特定的先验选择。
  • 实际系统中的可扩展性未讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

One of the bottlenecks on the way towards recursively self-improving systems is the challenge of interestingness: the ability to prospectively identify which tasks or data hold the potential for future progress. We formalize interestingness as an inductive heuristic for future compression progress and investigate its predictability using tools from Kolmogorov Complexity and Algorithmic Statistics. By analyzing complexity-runtime profiles under Length, Algorithmic, and Speed priors, we demonstrate that the inductive property of interestingness -- the capacity for past progress to signal future discovery -- is theoretically viable and empirically supported. We prove that expected future progress depends exponentially on the recency of the last observed breakthrough. Furthermore, we show that the Algorithmic Prior is significantly more optimistic than the Length Prior, yielding a quadratic increase in expected discovery for the same observed profile. These findings are experimentally confirmed across three diverse universal computational paradigms.

Agreement, Diversity, and Polarization Indices for Approval Elections

Low 2605.14983
Piotr Faliszewski, Jitka Mertlová, Krzysztof Sornat, Stanisław Szufa, Tomasz Wąs
arXiv PDF cs.GT
TL;DR：为批准选举提出归一化的同意、多样性和极化指数，并用于选举分析。
🎯研究动机

现有选举指数缺乏对饱和度的归一化，难以公平比较不同批准率的选举，且缺乏同时衡量同意、多样性和极化的统一框架。

❓解决问题

设计归一化的指数来量化批准选举中的同意、多样性和极化程度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出多个指数，分析其性质，并利用它们构建选举地图和比较真实选举数据。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一组归一化的同意、多样性和极化指数，考虑饱和度。
  • 基于这些指数推导出批准选举的新地图，并展示真实选举的异同。
⚠️方法局限
  • 指数可能对特定选举结构敏感，需要更多理论验证。
  • 真实选举数据集的覆盖范围有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

An index is a function that given an election outputs a value between 0 and 1, indicating the extent to which this election has a particular feature. We seek indices that capture agreement, diversity, and polarization among voters in approval elections, and that are normalized with respect to saturation. By the latter we mean that if two elections differ by the fraction of candidates approved by an average voter, but otherwise are of similar nature, then they should have similar index values. We propose several indices, analyze their properties, and use them to (a) derive a new map of approval elections, and (b) show similarities and differences between various real-life elections from Pabulib, Preflib and other sources.

Understanding How International Students in the U.S. Are Using Conversational AI to Support Cross-Cultural Adaptation

Low 2605.15127
Laleh Nourian, Anisa Callis, Stephanie Patterson, Jadeline Miao, Jamison Heard, Garreth W. Tigwell
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：国际学生将对话式 AI 视为应对跨文化适应挑战的急救工具，并希望其发展为长期支持伙伴。
🎯研究动机

国际学生面临独特的跨文化适应挑战，但现有支持体系（大学支持系统和非正式社交网络）碎片化，而对话式 AI（如 ChatGPT）虽被广泛使用，其作为支持工具的采用和感知尚不明确。

❓解决问题

缺乏对国际学生如何采用和感知对话式 AI 作为跨文化适应支持工具的系统理解。

🔎现象分析

AI 被视为应对即时挑战的急救工具，但用户希望其从短期帮助转变为长期支持伙伴。

🛠️主要方法

混合方法：先进行 60 人问卷调查以映射挑战与 AI 采用模式的关系，再对 14 名参与者进行访谈以识别使用动机和边界。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了国际学生将 AI 视为急救工具但渴望长期支持的现象
  • 提出了针对国际学生独特需求的 AI 支持系统设计建议
⚠️方法局限
  • 样本量较小（n=60 调查，n=14 访谈），可能不具广泛代表性
  • 未涉及 AI 工具的具体技术细节或性能评估
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Moving to a new culture and adapting to a new life, as an international student, can be a stressful experience. In the US, international students face unique overlapping challenges, yet the current support ecosystem, including university support systems and informal social networks, remains largely fragmented. While conversational AI has emerged as a tool used by many (e.g., generative AI chatbots like ChatGPT and Google Gemini), we do not have a clear understanding of how international students adopt and perceive these technologies as support tools. We conducted a survey study (n=60) to map the relationship between international students' challenges and AI adoption patterns, followed by an interview study with 14 participants to identify the underlying motivations and boundaries of use. Our findings show that AI is perceived as a first-aid tool for immediate challenges, however, there is an interest in transforming AI from a tool for short-term help into a long-term support companion. By identifying where and how AI can provide long-term support, and where it is insufficient, we contribute recommendations for creating AI-powered support tailored to the unique needs of international students.

Consciousness as Uncommon Self-Knowledge: A Synergistic Information Framework

Low 2605.13884
Krti Tallam
arXiv PDF q-bio.NC
TL;DR：提出非共同自我知识（USK）作为意识候选标准，即系统关于自身的协同信息，并基于部分信息分解（PID）给出形式化框架。
🎯研究动机

意识研究缺乏形式化、可操作的标准，现有理论（如 IIT、GWT、HOT）面临反例，且难以区分意识与元认知。

❓解决问题

如何形式化定义意识，使其可操作化并解决现有理论的反例。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出麻醉和阿尔茨海默病会特异性减少协同信息处理，同时保留或增加冗余信息，表明协同信息与意识相关。

🛠️主要方法

基于 Gottwald 的划分格基础的部分信息分解（PID），将冗余对应 Aumann 共同知识，协同对应分离与联合观察的差距，提出自我导向信息的协同成分作为意识的形式化标志。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出非共同自我知识（USK）作为意识候选标准，并给出形式化定义。
  • 提供意识与元认知的清晰区分（协同 vs. 冗余自我知识）。
  • 为 IIT、GWT、HOT 的反例提供原则性解决方案。
  • 通过部分信息率分解（PIRD）实现可操作化，并生成可检验的预测。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架的理论性质，缺乏直接实验验证。
  • 操作化方法 PIRD 的具体实现细节和计算可行性未充分讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We propose uncommon self-knowledge (USK) as a candidate criterion for consciousness: synergistic information a system carries about itself that exists only in the joint of its subsystems and is destroyed by decomposition. Drawing on Gottwald's partition-lattice grounding of Partial Information Decomposition (PID), where redundancy corresponds to Aumann's common knowledge and synergy to the gap between separate and joint observation, we propose the synergistic component of self-directed information as a candidate formal signature for conscious processing. If correct, the framework would (1) offer a clean separation between consciousness and metacognition (synergistic vs. redundant self-knowledge), (2) provide principled resolutions to counterexamples that challenge IIT, GWT, and HOT, (3) be operationalizable via Partial Information Rate Decomposition (PIRD) with self-targeting, and (4) generate distinctive empirical predictions, the strongest being a GWT timing dissociation (consciousness correlates with pre-broadcast synergy formation, not broadcast itself) and a specific dissociation between self-report disruption and task-performance disruption under middle-layer perturbation in LLMs. The proposal is consistent with recent empirical findings that both anaesthesia and Alzheimer's disease specifically reduce synergistic information processing while preserving or increasing redundancy.

新方法/算法 6 篇

RQ-MoE: Residual Quantization via Mixture of Experts for Efficient Input-Dependent Vector Compression

Medium 2605.14359
Zhengjia Zhong, Shuyan Ke, Zaizhou Lin, Jiaqi Song, Hongyi Lan, Hui Li
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：RQ-MoE 通过混合专家实现输入依赖的残差量化，在保持高压缩率的同时大幅提升解码速度。
🎯研究动机

现有向量量化方法如多码本方法依赖静态码本，难以适应异构数据几何结构；动态量化器如 QINCo 虽提升表达能力，但严格顺序依赖导致解码瓶颈。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种既能实现输入依赖的码本自适应，又能支持并行解码的高效向量量化方法。

🔎现象分析

标准残差量化和 QINCo 可视为 RQ-MoE 的约束特例，专家维度设置存在指导原则。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RQ-MoE 框架，结合两级 MoE 与双流量化，实现输入依赖的码本自适应，并解耦指令与量化过程以支持并行解码。

📊实验结果

在重建和检索任务上进行了广泛实验，与多种向量量化方法对比，报告了性能和解码速度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RQ-MoE，首个将混合专家机制用于残差量化，实现动态码本构建与并行解码。
  • 理论证明标准残差量化和 QINCo 是 RQ-MoE 的特例，并给出专家维度设置指导。
  • 实验表明 RQ-MoE 在重建和检索任务上达到 SOTA 或相当性能，解码速度提升 6-14 倍。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对专家数量敏感，需要调参。
  • 理论指导仅针对专家维度，其他超参数仍需经验设置。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vector quantization is a fundamental tool for compressing high-dimensional embeddings, yet existing multi-codebook methods rely on static codebooks that limit expressiveness under heterogeneous data geometry. While recent dynamic quantizers like QINCo adapt codebooks to individual inputs and improve expressiveness, their strict sequential dependencies create decoding bottlenecks. We propose Residual Quantization via Mixture of Experts (RQ-MoE), a framework combining a two-level MoE with dual-stream quantization to enable input-dependent codebook adaptation for efficient vector quantization. RQ-MoE enables dynamic codebook construction and decouples instruction from quantization, facilitating parallel decoding. Theoretically, we show that standard Residual Quantization and QINCo can be recovered as constrained special cases of RQ-MoE, and derive a guideline for setting expert dimensionality in RQ-MoE. Extensive experiments show that RQ-MoE achieves state-of-the-art or on-par performance in reconstruction and retrieval, while providing 6x-14x faster decoding than prior vector quantization methods. The implementation is available at this https URL .

LoMETab: Beyond Rank-1 Ensembles for Tabular Deep Learning

Medium 2605.14365
Changryeol Choi, Hyewon Park, Yujin Kwon, Gowun Jeong
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：LoMETab 通过秩 r 的乘法隐式集成扩展了表格神经网络的集成多样性，提供了可控的预测性能。
🎯研究动机

表格学习基准中领先方法性能接近，需要理解和控制简单神经模型竞争力的机制。

❓解决问题

现有秩 1 乘法隐式集成（如 BatchEnsemble/TabM）的假设类有限，缺乏多样性控制。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LoMETab，将秩 1 乘法隐式集成推广到秩 r 的恒等残差 Hadamard 族，参数化权重为 W_k = W ⊙ (1 + A_k B_k^T)，通过适配器秩 r 和初始化尺度σ_init 控制多样性。

📊实验结果

在代表性分类数据集上，LoMETab 比加性低秩消融保持更高成对 KL 散度，且(r, σ_init)可控制 KL 散度变化几个数量级；预测性能在(r, σ_init)网格上依赖于数据集。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出秩 r 乘法隐式集成 LoMETab，严格扩展了 BatchEnsemble 的假设类。
  • 证明 r≥2 时假设类严格增大，并展示多样性控制轴（r, σ_init）对预测多样性的影响。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未在更大规模或更多样化的表格数据集上验证。
  • 未讨论计算开销与秩 r 的关系。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent tabular learning benchmarks increasingly show a tight performance cluster rather than a clear hierarchy among leading methods, spanning gradient boosted decision trees, attention-based architectures, and implicit ensembles such as TabM. As benchmark gains plateau, a complementary goal is to understand and control the mechanisms that make simple neural tabular models competitive. We propose LoMETab, a rank-$r$ generalization of multiplicative implicit ensembles. LoMETab lifts the rank-1 BatchEnsemble/TabM modulation to a rank-$r$ identity-residual Hadamard family by parameterizing each member weight as $W_k = W \odot (1 + A_kB_k^\top)$, where $W$ is shared and $(A_k, B_k)$ are member-specific low-rank factors. This exposes two practical diversity-control axes: the adapter rank $r$ and the initialization scale $\sigma_{\mathrm{init}}$, and we prove that for $r \ge 2$ this generalization strictly enlarges BatchEnsemble's hypothesis class. Empirically, we show that this added capacity manifests as measurable predictive diversity after training: on representative classification datasets, LoMETab sustains higher pairwise KL than an additive low-rank ablation, and $(r, \sigma_{\mathrm{init}})$ provides broad control over pairwise KL, varying by up to several orders of magnitude across configurations. The induced diversity is reflected in task-appropriate output-level measures: argmax disagreement for classification and ambiguity for regression, indicating that the control extends beyond pairwise KL to decision- and output-level member variation. Finally, experiments sweeping over adapter rank $r$ and initialization scale $\sigma_{\mathrm{init}}$ reveal that predictive performance is dataset-dependent over the $(r, \sigma_{\mathrm{init}})$ grid, supporting LoMETab as a controllable family of implicit ensembles rather than a fixed rank-1 construction.

Optimal Pattern Detection Tree for Symbolic Rule-Based Classification

Medium 2605.14374
Young-Chae Hong, Yangho Chen
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出基于混合整数规划的最优模式检测树（OPDT），用于符号规则分类中的可解释模式发现。
🎯研究动机

黑盒深度学习模型缺乏可解释性，而符号规则发现能提供透明且可解释的规则，在医疗、风险评估等领域至关重要。

❓解决问题

如何通过优化方法发现数据中隐藏的单一最优模式，同时最大化覆盖率和最小化误报率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出最优模式检测树（OPDT），基于混合整数规划进行二分类，并引入分支结构约束（BSC）框架以编码领域知识。

📊实验结果

在中等规模数据集上，OPDT 能在合理时间内发现具有最优性保证的模式。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 OPDT 模型，通过混合整数规划发现最优模式。
  • 引入 BSC 框架，允许将领域知识和约束直接编码到模型中。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于中等规模数据集，大规模数据可能计算开销大。
  • 仅处理二分类问题，多类或回归任务未涉及。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Pattern discovery in data plays a crucial role across diverse domains, including healthcare, risk assessment, and machinery maintenance. In contrast to black-box deep learning models, symbolic rule discovery emerges as a key data mining task, generating human-interpretable rules that offer both transparency and intuitive explainability. This paper introduces the Optimal Pattern Detection Tree (OPDT), a rule-based machine learning model based on novel mixed-integer programming to discover a single optimal pattern in data through binary classification. To incorporate prior knowledge and compliance requirements, we further introduce the Branching Structure Constraints (BSC) framework, which enables decision makers to encode domain knowledge and constraints directly into the model. This optimization-based approach discovers a hidden underlying pattern in datasets, when it exists, by identifying an optimal rule that maximizes coverage while minimizing the false positive rate due to misclassification. Our computational experiments show that OPDT discovers a pattern with optimality guarantees on moderately sized datasets within reasonable runtime.

Compositional Sparsity as an Inductive Bias for Neural Architecture Design

Medium 2605.14764
Hongyu Lin, Antonio Briola, Yuanrong Wang, Tomaso Aste
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过组合稀疏性作为归纳偏置，设计出极稀疏且性能优异的神经网络架构。
🎯研究动机

深度神经网络在高维学习中面临维度灾难，现有理论认为组合稀疏性是有效学习的关键，但缺乏将其直接转化为架构设计的系统方法。

❓解决问题

如何将组合稀疏性作为归纳偏置，设计出稀疏、可解释且性能不降的神经网络架构。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合信息过滤网络（IFN）提取稀疏依赖结构，再通过同调神经网络（HNN）将推断的拓扑映射为固定连接的稀疏神经图，形成可解释的分层组合管道。

📊实验结果

在合成任务（已知稀疏层次）和多个真实世界数据集上评估，HNN 恢复组合结构，性能匹配或超越密集基线，且参数少、方差低。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化了基于组合稀疏性的神经网络设计原则，提出可解释的层次组合管道。
  • HNN 在合成和真实数据集上以极稀疏结构匹配或超越密集基线，且参数少、方差低、超参数敏感度低。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于具有固有稀疏层次的任务。
  • IFN 和 HNN 的联合训练或扩展性未在摘要中讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Identifying the structural priors that enable Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to overcome the curse of dimensionality is a fundamental challenge in machine learning theory. Existing literature suggests that effective high-dimensional learning is driven by compositional sparsity, where target functions decompose into constituents supported on low-dimensional variable subsets. To investigate this hypothesis, we combine Information Filtering Networks (IFNs), which extract sparse dependency structures via constrained information maximisation, with Homological Neural Networks (HNNs), which map the inferred topology into fixed-wiring sparse neural graphs. We formalise the design principles underlying this construction and present an interpretable pipeline in which abstraction emerges through hierarchical composition. HNNs are orders of magnitude sparser than standard DNNs and require only minimal hyperparameter tuning. On synthetic tasks with known sparse hierarchies, HNNs recover the underlying compositional structure and remain stable in regimes where dense alternatives degrade as dimensionality increases. Across a broad suite of real-world datasets, HNNs consistently match or outperform dense baselines while using far fewer parameters, exhibiting lower variance and showing reduced sensitivity to hyperparameters.

Beyond What to Select: A Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-Volume Scheduling for Efficient Model Training

Medium 2605.14773
Suorong Yang, Hanqi Zhu, Hai Gan, Fangjian Su, Guang Li, Furao Shen, Soujanya Poria
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种即插即用的振荡数据量调度方法 PODS，通过动态调整每轮选择的数据量来提升训练效率与泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

现有数据选择方法主要关注样本重要性标准（选什么），但固定选择比例，忽略了选择比例对训练动态的影响，导致效率与泛化之间的权衡受限。

❓解决问题

如何在不引入新评分指标的前提下，通过动态调度每轮选择的数据量来优化训练效率与泛化性能。

🔎现象分析

从优化视角发现，选择数据训练会引入隐式正则化效应，其强度由瞬时选择比例调节：低比例放大正则化，高比例保持数据覆盖和优化保真度。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PODS，一种即插即用的振荡数据量调度框架，在目标选择比例下交替进行低比例正则化阶段和高比例恢复阶段，以利用选择诱导的正则化而不牺牲优化稳定性。

📊实验结果

在 ImageNet-1k、LLM 指令微调等多种任务上实验，显示 PODS 能显著提升训练效率与泛化性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 从优化角度揭示数据选择比例对训练动态的隐式正则化效应，并指出低比例与高比例之间的权衡。
  • 提出 PODS，一种轻量级、比例级、任务无关的振荡调度方法，兼容现有静态和动态选择方法。
  • 在多个数据集、架构和任务上验证 PODS 能一致提升效率 - 泛化权衡，如 ImageNet-1k 训练成本降低 50% 且精度提升，LLM 指令微调加速 2 倍以上且性能无损。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未讨论 PODS 在极端低比例或高比例下的鲁棒性。
  • 可能需要对不同任务调整振荡幅度和频率等超参数。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Data selection accelerates training by identifying representative training data while preserving model performance. However, existing methods mainly focus on designing sample-importance criteria, i.e., deciding what to select, while typically fixing the selected data volume as the target ratio throughout training. Thus, they are often dynamic in sample identity but static in data volume. In this work, we revisit data selection from an optimization perspective and show that selected-data training induces an implicit regularization effect modulated by the instantaneous selection ratio. This reveals a key trade-off: lower ratios amplify selection-induced regularization, whereas higher ratios preserve data coverage and optimization fidelity. Motivated by this insight, we propose PODS, a Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-volume Scheduling framework. Rather than introducing another sample-scoring metric, PODS serves as a lightweight module that dynamically schedules how much data to select over training. Under the target selection ratio, PODS alternates between low-ratio regularization phases and high-ratio recovery phases to exploit selection-induced regularization without sacrificing optimization stability. With its lightweight, ratio-level, and task-agnostic design, PODS is compatible with existing static and dynamic selection methods and broadly applicable across training paradigms. Experiments across various datasets, architectures, and tasks show that PODS consistently improves the efficiency-generalization trade-off, e.g., reducing ImageNet-1k training cost by 50% with improved accuracy and accelerating LLM instruction tuning by over 2x without performance degradation.

Learning Developmental Scaffoldings to Guide Self-Organisation

Medium 2605.14998
Milton L. Montero, Elias Najarro, Jakob Schauser, Sebastian Risi
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：通过联合学习自组织规则和初始预模式，揭示了信息在两者间的分配机制，并提升了鲁棒性与编码容量。
🎯研究动机

自然系统中自组织现象普遍存在，但大量信息实际上被卸载到初始条件中（如生物发育中的母体预模式），这种信息卸载机制尚未被系统研究。

❓解决问题

如何建模并量化自组织规则与初始预模式之间的信息分配，以及联合学习两者能否带来性能提升。

🔎现象分析

有效的预模式并非简单近似目标，而是以非平凡方式偏置发育动力学以促进收敛。

🛠️主要方法

提出联合学习模型：神经细胞自动机（NCA）作为自组织规则，SIREN 作为基于坐标的预模式生成器，两者同时训练以生成一组模式。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出联合学习自组织规则与预模式的框架，并展示了其在鲁棒性、编码容量和对称破缺上的改进。
  • 通过信息论分析揭示了信息在预模式与自组织过程之间的分布规律。
⚠️方法局限
  • 模型仅在简单模式生成任务上验证，未涉及更复杂的生物发育场景。
  • 信息论分析可能依赖于特定假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

From subcellular structures to entire organisms, many natural systems generate complex organisation through self-organisation: local interactions that collectively give rise to global structure without any blueprint of the outcome. Yet a significant portion of the information driving such processes is not produced by self-organisation itself, instead, it is often offloaded to initial conditions of the system. Biological development is a prime example, where maternal pre-patterns encode positional and symmetry-breaking information that scaffolds the self-organising process. From maternal morphogen gradients in early embryogenesis to tissue-level morphogenetic pre-patterns guiding organ formation, this transfer of information to initial conditions, analogous to a memory-compute trade-off in computational systems, is a fundamental part of developmental processes. In this work, we study this offloading phenomenon by introducing a model that jointly learns both the self-organisation rules and the pre-patterns, allowing their interplay to be varied and measured under controlled conditions: a Neural Cellular Automaton (NCA) paired with a learned coordinate-based pattern generator (SIREN), both trained simultaneously to generate a set of patterns. We provide information-theoretic analyses of how information is distributed between pre-patterns and the self-organising process, and show that jointly learning both components yields improvements in robustness, encoding capacity, and symmetry breaking over purely self-organising alternatives. Our analysis further suggests that effective pre-patterns do not simply approximate their targets; rather, they bias the developmental dynamics in ways that facilitate convergence, pointing to a non-trivial relationship between the structure of initial conditions and the dynamics of self-organisation.

生成模型 30 篇 · 7 个细分

扩散模型 9 篇

Image Restoration via Diffusion Models with Dynamic Resolution

High 2605.14267
Yang Zheng, Wen Li, Zhaoqiang Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出动态分辨率扩散模型，通过投影到低维子空间加速图像修复，SubDAPS++ 在效率和保真度上优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

现有扩散模型在像素空间计算开销大，潜在空间方法需重复编码 - 解码导致运行时性能甚至更差，亟需高效推理方案。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲重建质量的前提下，显著降低扩散模型在图像修复任务中的计算成本。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

微调预训练扩散模型以支持动态分辨率先验，将像素空间方法 DPS 和 DAPS 适配到低维子空间，提出 SubDPS 和 SubDAPS，并进一步改进为 SubDAPS++。

📊实验结果

在多种图像数据集和修复任务上评估，与近期基于扩散模型的方法对比，所提方法在多数实验场景中表现更优。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出动态分辨率扩散模型框架，通过低维子空间投影加速图像修复推理。
  • 将 DPS 和 DAPS 适配到子空间，提出 SubDPS 和 SubDAPS，并开发增强版 SubDAPS++。
  • 实验表明所提方法在多数场景下优于近期基于扩散模型的方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 动态分辨率策略的适用范围未明确讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion models (DMs) have exhibited remarkable efficacy in various image restoration tasks. However, existing approaches typically operate within the high-dimensional pixel space, resulting in high computational overhead. While methods based on latent DMs seek to alleviate this issue by utilizing the compressed latent space of a variational autoencoder, they require repeated encoder-decoder inference. This introduces significant additional computational burdens, often resulting in runtime performance that is even inferior to that of their pixel-space counterparts. To mitigate the computational inefficiency, this work proposes projecting data into lower-dimensional subspaces using dynamic resolution DMs to accelerate the inference process. We first fine-tune pre-trained DMs for dynamic resolution priors and adapt DPS and DAPS, which are two widely used pixel-space methods for general image restoration tasks, into the proposed framework, yielding methods we refer to as SubDPS and SubDAPS, respectively. Given the favorable inference speed and reconstruction fidelity of SubDAPS, we introduce an enhanced variant termed SubDAPS++ to further boost both reconstruction efficiency and quality. Empirical evaluations across diverse image datasets and various restoration tasks demonstrate that the proposed methods outperform recent DM-based approaches in the majority of experimental scenarios. The code is available at this https URL .

HASTE: Training-Free Video Diffusion Acceleration via Head-Wise Adaptive Sparse Attention

High 2605.14513
Xuzhe Zheng, Yuexiao Ma, Jing Xu, Xiawu Zheng, Rongrong Ji, Fei Chao
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出头自适应稀疏注意力机制，无需训练即可加速视频扩散模型，通过时间掩码复用和误差引导预算校准提升速度 - 质量权衡。
🎯研究动机

视频扩散模型因全注意力的二次复杂度而部署受限，现有训练无关稀疏注意力虽无需重训，但掩码预测开销大且忽略头级异质性，限制了实际加速效果。

❓解决问题

如何在不重训练的前提下，通过头自适应稀疏注意力机制降低视频扩散模型中全注意力的计算开销，同时保持生成质量。

🔎现象分析

观察到现有在线 top-p 稀疏注意力存在两个被忽视的因素：掩码预测开销不可忽略，以及共享阈值忽略了头级异质性，导致实际速度 - 质量权衡受限。

🛠️主要方法

提出头自适应框架，包含两个即插即用组件：时间掩码复用（Temporal Mask Reuse）根据查询 - 键漂移跳过不必要的掩码预测；误差引导预算校准（Error-guided Budgeted Calibration）通过最小化模型输出误差为每个头分配 top-p 阈值，满足全局稀疏预算。

📊实验结果

在 Wan2.1-1.3B 和 Wan2.1-14B 模型上评估，与 XAttention 和 SVG2 对比，实现最高 1.93 倍加速（720P），视频质量和相似度指标保持竞争力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了现有训练无关稀疏注意力在视频扩散模型中因掩码预测开销和头级异质性导致的性能瓶颈。
  • 提出头自适应稀疏注意力框架，包含时间掩码复用和误差引导预算校准两个即插即用组件。
  • 在 Wan2.1-1.3B 和 Wan2.1-14B 上验证，实现高达 1.93 倍加速（720P），同时保持竞争性视频质量和相似度指标。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖预训练模型，可能不适用于其他架构或任务。
  • 时间掩码复用策略在快速运动场景下可能失效。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion-based video generation has advanced substantially in visual fidelity and temporal coherence, but practical deployment remains limited by the quadratic complexity of full attention. Training-free sparse attention is attractive because it accelerates pretrained models without retraining, yet existing online top-$p$ sparse attention still spends non-negligible cost on mask prediction and applies shared thresholds despite strong head-level heterogeneity. We show that these two overlooked factors limit the practical speed-quality trade-off of training-free sparse attention in Video DiTs. To address them, we introduce a head-wise adaptive framework with two plug-in components: Temporal Mask Reuse, which skips unnecessary mask prediction based on query-key drift, and Error-guided Budgeted Calibration, which assigns per-head top-$p$ thresholds by minimizing measured model-output error under a global sparsity budget. On Wan2.1-1.3B and Wan2.1-14B, our method consistently improves XAttention and SVG2, achieving up to 1.93 times speedup at 720P while maintaining competitive video quality and similarity metrics.

The Velocity Deficit: Initial Energy Injection for Flow Matching

High 2605.14819
Linze Li, Zong-Wei Hong, Shen Zhang, Bo Lin, Jinglun Li, Yao Tang, Jiajun Liang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：发现流匹配中速度欠估计导致生成失败，提出初始能量注入方法显著提升效率与质量。
🎯研究动机

流匹配理论上保证恒定速度轨迹，但在高维实践中出现速度欠估计问题，导致生成样本无法到达数据流形，影响生成质量与效率。

❓解决问题

流匹配中 MSE 目标函数系统性低估速度幅度，造成积分滞后，使生成轨迹无法有效到达数据流形。

🔎现象分析

发现速度收缩在轨迹起始阶段导致有害的动能停滞，而在末端则起到有益的去噪作用，存在关键不对称性。

🛠️主要方法

提出初始能量注入，包括基于训练的幅度感知流匹配（MAFM）和无需训练的尺度调度校正器（SSC），后者仅需一行代码即可实现零重训练的效率提升。

📊实验结果

在 ImageNet-1k (256x256)上，SSC 将 FID 从 13.68 降至 7.58（提升 44.6%），实现 5 倍加速，50 步生成器（FID 7.58）优于 250 步基线（FID 8.65）；在 MS-COCO 文本到图像任务上 FID 提升约 22%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别并形式化流匹配中的速度欠估计问题（速度赤字）及其导致的积分滞后现象。
  • 提出两种互补的初始能量注入方法（MAFM 和 SSC），有效缓解速度赤字，提升生成质量与采样效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法在更高分辨率或更复杂场景下的泛化性有待进一步验证。
  • MAFM 需要额外训练，可能增加计算成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While Flow Matching theoretically guarantees constant-velocity trajectories, we identify a critical breakdown in high-dimensional practice: the Velocity Deficit. We show that the MSE objective systematically underestimates velocity magnitude, causing generated samples to fail to reach the data manifold-a phenomenon we term Integration Lag. To rectify this, we propose Initial Energy Injection, instantiated via two complementary methods: the training-based Magnitude-Aware Flow Matching (MAFM) and the training-free Scale Schedule Corrector (SSC). Both are grounded in our discovery of a crucial asymmetry: velocity contraction causes harmful kinetic stagnation at the trajectory's start, yet acts as a beneficial denoising mechanism at its end. Empirically, SSC yields significant efficiency gains with zero retraining and just one line of code. On ImageNet-1k (256x256), it improves FID by 44.6% (from 13.68 to 7.58) and achieves a 5x speedup, enabling a 50-step generator (FID 7.58) to beat a 250-step baseline (FID 8.65). Furthermore, our methods generalize to Text-to-Image tasks and high-resolution generation, improving FID on MS-COCO by ~22%.

DiffusionOPD: A Unified Perspective of On-Policy Distillation in Diffusion Models

High 2605.15055
Quanhao Li, Junqiu Yu, Kaixun Jiang, Yujie Wei, Zhen Xing, Pandeng Li, Ruihang Chu, Shiwei Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出统一在线策略蒸馏框架 DiffusionOPD，将多任务强化学习扩展到扩散模型，通过解耦单任务探索与多任务集成提升训练效率与性能。
🎯研究动机

现有强化学习方法在扩散模型上主要针对单任务优化，扩展到多任务时面临交叉干扰、不平衡和灾难性遗忘等问题，缺乏高效统一的多任务训练范式。

❓解决问题

如何高效地将强化学习扩展到扩散模型的多任务训练，避免联合优化中的干扰和级联训练中的遗忘。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DiffusionOPD，先独立训练任务专用教师模型，再通过在线策略蒸馏将教师能力蒸馏到统一学生模型，沿学生自身轨迹进行；理论上将 OPD 从离散令牌扩展到连续状态马尔可夫过程，推导出闭式每步 KL 目标，统一 SDE 和 ODE 细化。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上，DiffusionOPD 在训练效率和最终性能上一致超越多奖励 RL 和级联 RL 基线，达到最先进结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于在线策略蒸馏的多任务扩散模型训练范式 DiffusionOPD，解耦单任务探索与多任务集成。
  • 将 OPD 框架从离散令牌扩展到连续状态马尔可夫过程，推导出闭式 KL 目标，证明其比 PPO 策略梯度方差更低、泛化性更好。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖教师模型的质量和多样性。
  • 蒸馏过程可能引入教师偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning has emerged as a powerful tool for improving diffusion-based text-to-image models, but existing methods are largely limited to single-task optimization. Extending RL to multiple tasks is challenging: joint optimization suffers from cross-task interference and imbalance, while cascade RL is cumbersome and prone to catastrophic forgetting. We propose DiffusionOPD, a new multi-task training paradigm for diffusion models based on Online Policy Distillation (OPD). DiffusionOPD first trains task-specific teachers independently, then distills their capabilities into a unified student along the student own rollout trajectories. This decouples single-task exploration from multi-task integration and avoids the optimization burden of solving all tasks jointly from scratch. Theoretically, we lift the OPD framework from discrete tokens to continuous-state Markov processes, deriving a closed-form per-step KL objective that unifies both stochastic SDE and deterministic ODE refinement via mean-matching. We formally and empirically demonstrate that this analytic gradient provides lower variance and better generality compared to conventional PPO-style policy gradients. Extensive experiments show that DiffusionOPD consistently surpasses both multi-reward RL and cascade RL baselines in training efficiency and final performance, while achieving state-of-the-art results on all evaluated benchmarks.

Causal Forcing++: Scalable Few-Step Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation for Real-Time Interactive Video Generation

High 2605.15141
Min Zhao, Hongzhou Zhu, Kaiwen Zheng, Zihan Zhou, Bokai Yan, Xinyuan Li, Xiao Yang, Chongxuan Li et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Causal Forcing++，通过因果一致性蒸馏实现帧级 1-2 步自回归扩散蒸馏，显著提升实时交互视频生成的效率与质量。
🎯研究动机

实时交互视频生成需要低延迟、流式可控生成，现有自回归扩散蒸馏方法在块级 4 步设定下表现良好，但响应粒度粗、采样延迟仍不可忽略，亟需更高效的帧级少步生成方案。

❓解决问题

现有自回归扩散蒸馏的初始化策略在帧级 1-2 步设定下存在目标不对齐、无法少步生成或扩展成本过高的问题，导致生成质量与效率受限。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，在帧级 1-2 步自回归设定下，少步自回归学生的初始化是关键瓶颈：现有策略要么与目标不对齐，要么无法支持少步生成，要么扩展成本过高。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Causal Forcing++，核心是因果一致性蒸馏（causal CD），通过单个在线教师 ODE 步骤在相邻时间步间提供监督，学习与因果 ODE 蒸馏相同的 AR 条件流映射，避免预计算和存储完整 PF-ODE 轨迹，实现高效且易优化的初始化。

📊实验结果

摘要提供了定量实验结果：在帧级 2 步设定下，Causal Forcing++ 在 VBench Total、VBench Quality 和 VisionReward 上分别超越 SOTA 块级 4 步 Causal Forcing 0.1、0.3 和 0.335，首帧延迟降低 50%，Stage 2 训练成本降低约 4 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Causal Forcing++，一种可扩展的帧级 1-2 步自回归扩散蒸馏流水线，用于实时交互视频生成。
  • 引入因果一致性蒸馏（causal CD）作为少步 AR 初始化的新策略，比现有方法更高效且更易优化。
  • 在帧级 2 步设定下超越 SOTA 块级 4 步 Causal Forcing，VBench Total 提升 0.1，VBench Quality 提升 0.3，VisionReward 提升 0.335，首帧延迟降低 50%，Stage 2 训练成本降低约 4 倍。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未讨论泛化到更长视频或更复杂动作条件场景的性能。
  • 可能依赖于特定的教师模型架构，迁移性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Real-time interactive video generation requires low-latency, streaming, and controllable rollout. Existing autoregressive (AR) diffusion distillation methods have achieved strong results in the chunk-wise 4-step regime by distilling bidirectional base models into few-step AR students, but they remain limited by coarse response granularity and non-negligible sampling latency. In this paper, we study a more aggressive setting: frame-wise autoregression with only 1--2 sampling steps. In this regime, we identify the initialization of a few-step AR student as the key bottleneck: existing strategies are either target-misaligned, incapable of few-step generation, or too costly to scale. We propose \textbf{Causal Forcing++}, a principled and scalable pipeline that uses \emph{causal consistency distillation} (causal CD) for few-step AR initialization. The core idea is that causal CD learns the same AR-conditional flow map as causal ODE distillation, but obtains supervision from a single online teacher ODE step between adjacent timesteps, avoiding the need to precompute and store full PF-ODE trajectories. This makes the initialization both more efficient and easier to optimize. The resulting pipeline, \ours, surpasses the SOTA 4-step chunk-wise Causal Forcing under the \textit{\textbf{frame-wise 2-step setting}} by 0.1 in VBench Total, 0.3 in VBench Quality, and 0.335 in VisionReward, while reducing first-frame latency by 50\% and Stage 2 training cost by $\sim$$4\times$. We further extend the pipeline to action-conditioned world model generation in the spirit of Genie3. Project Page: this https URL and this https URL .

Covariance-aware sampling for Diffusion Models

High 2605.13910
Andrea Schioppa, Tim Salimans
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：提出协方差感知采样器，通过显式建模反向过程协方差提升扩散模型少步采样质量。
🎯研究动机

现有扩散模型采样器在少步（few-step）场景下质量下降，因为仅依赖反向分布的预测均值而忽略了协方差信息。

❓解决问题

如何通过建模反向过程的协方差来改进扩散模型在少步采样时的生成质量。

🔎现象分析

少步采样时，仅使用预测均值的采样器失败，而显式建模协方差可以提升质量。

🛠️主要方法

利用 Tweedie 公式估计协方差，并通过结构化傅里叶空间分解实现高效计算；作为 DDIM 的扩展，每步仅增加一次 Jacobian-Vector Product。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在像素空间扩散模型上一致优于现有二阶采样器。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出协方差感知采样器，显式建模反向过程协方差。
  • 在像素空间扩散模型上，以相同 NFE 超越 Heun、DPM-Solver++ 和 aDDIM 等二阶采样器。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于像素空间扩散模型，未验证潜在空间模型。
  • 额外 JVP 计算可能带来轻微开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present a covariance-aware sampler that improves the quality of pixel-space Diffusion Model (DM) sampling in the few-step regime. We hypothesize that in the few-step regime samplers fail because they rely solely on the predicted mean of the reverse distribution, while our solution explicitly models the reverse-process covariance. Our method combines Tweedie's formula to estimate the covariance with an efficient, structured Fourier-space decomposition of the covariance matrix. Implemented as an extension of DDIM, our method requires only a minimal overhead: one extra Jacobian-Vector Product (JVP) per step. We demonstrate that for pixel-based DMs, our method consistently produces superior samples compared to state-of-the-art second order samplers (Heun, DPM-Solver++) and the recent aDDIM sampler, at an identical number of function evaluations (NFE).

CoReDiT: Spatial Coherence-Guided Token Pruning and Reconstruction for Efficient Diffusion Transformers

High 2605.14191
Zhuojin Li, Hsin-Pai Cheng, Hong Cai, Shizhong Han, Fatih Porikli
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：CoReDiT 通过空间连贯性引导的令牌剪枝与重建，高效加速扩散 Transformer 的图像与视频生成。
🎯研究动机

扩散 Transformer（DiT）在图像和视频生成中质量优异，但计算成本高，限制了可扩展性和设备端部署。

❓解决问题

如何在不显著降低视觉质量的前提下，减少 DiT 中自注意力机制的计算开销。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CoReDiT 框架，包括：1）线性时间空间连贯性分数估计令牌冗余；2）剪枝高连贯性令牌并跳过其自注意力计算；3）通过连贯性引导的邻近保留令牌聚合重建被跳过的注意力输出；4）渐进式、块自适应的剪枝调度，逐步增加剪枝率并分配更多预算给冗余高的块和去噪步。

📊实验结果

在 PixArt-α和 MagicDrive-V2 等扩散骨干网络上评估，报告了 FLOPs 减少、推理加速和视觉质量保持情况。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CoReDiT，一种基于空间连贯性的结构化令牌剪枝框架，适用于多种扩散 Transformer。
  • 设计连贯性引导的注意力输出重建方法，避免视觉不连续。
  • 引入渐进式块自适应剪枝调度，平衡效率与质量。
  • 在 PixArt-α和 MagicDrive-V2 等骨干网络上实现高达 55% 的自注意力 FLOPs 减少，云 GPU 加速 1.33 倍，移动 NPU 加速 1.72 倍，并支持更高分辨率生成。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于基于自注意力的 DiT 架构，对其他生成模型泛化性未知。
  • 剪枝调度依赖冗余估计，可能在不同任务或数据分布下需要调整。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) deliver remarkable image and video generation quality but incur high computational cost, limiting scalability and on-device deployment. We introduce CoReDiT, a structured token pruning framework for DiTs across vision tasks. CoReDiT uses a linear-time spatial coherence score to estimate local redundancy in the latent token lattice and skips high coherence (redundant) tokens in self-attention. To maintain a dense representation and avoid visual discontinuities, we reconstruct skipped attention outputs via coherence-guided aggregation of spatially neighboring retained tokens. We further introduce a progressive, block-adaptive pruning schedule that increases pruning gradually and allocates larger budgets to blocks and denoising steps with higher redundancy. Across state-of-the-art diffusion backbones including PixArt-{\alpha} and MagicDrive-V2, CoReDiT achieves up to 55% self-attention FLOPs reduction and inference speedups of 1.33x on cloud GPUs and 1.72x on mobile NPUs, while maintaining high visual quality. Notably, CoReDiT also increases on-device memory head-room, enabling higher-resolution generation.

Where Should Diffusion Enter a Language Model? Geometry-Guided Hidden-State Replacement

Medium 2605.14368
Injin Kong, Hyoungjoon Lee, Yohan Jo
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 DiHAL，通过几何引导选择扩散层位置，在预训练 LM 中替换低层为扩散桥，实现隐藏状态恢复而非直接 token 生成。
🎯研究动机

连续扩散语言模型在语言去噪和 token 恢复方面表现不如自回归 Transformer，部分原因是扩散应用在不适合语言建模的空间中。

❓解决问题

如何确定在预训练语言模型中插入扩散模块的最佳位置，以提升扩散语言模型的性能。

🔎现象分析

几何分数可以预测有效的浅层插入层，隐藏状态恢复优于直接连续到离散的 token 恢复。

🛠️主要方法

DiHAL 使用几何引导的代理分数对层进行评分，选择适合扩散的隐藏状态接口，将低层 Transformer 替换为扩散桥，保留高层和原始 LM 头，通过重建选定层的隐藏状态而非 token 来避免直接连续到离散恢复。

📊实验结果

在 8B 规模骨干网络上进行实验，使用固定桥训练协议，比较几何分数预测的插入层效果，并在匹配扩散 / 恢复训练预算的诊断比较中评估隐藏状态恢复。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出几何引导的扩散 -Transformer 混合架构 DiHAL，通过选择扩散插入位置提升性能。
  • 实验证明隐藏状态恢复优于连续扩散基线，且几何分数能有效预测合适的插入层。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在 8B 规模模型上进行，可能不适用于更小或更大的模型。
  • 几何引导方法可能依赖于特定预训练模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Continuous diffusion language models lag behind autoregressive transformers, partly because diffusion is applied in spaces poorly suited to language denoising and token recovery. We propose DiHAL, a geometry-guided diffusion-transformer hybrid that asks where diffusion should enter a pretrained transformer. DiHAL scores layers with geometry-based proxies, selects a diffusion-friendly hidden-state interface, and replaces the lower transformer prefix with a diffusion bridge while retaining the upper layers and original LM head. By reconstructing the selected-layer hidden state rather than tokens, DiHAL avoids direct continuous-to-discrete recovery. Experiments on 8B-scale backbones show that the geometry score predicts effective shallow insertion layers under a fixed bridge-training protocol and that hidden-state recovery improves over continuous diffusion baselines in a diagnostic comparison matching the diffusion/recovery training budget. These results suggest that hidden-state geometry helps identify where diffusion-based replacement is feasible inside pretrained language models.

Action-Inspired Generative Models

Medium 2605.14631
Eshwar R. A., Debnath Pal
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出动作启发生成模型（AGMs），通过轻量级学习势函数对桥匹配中的过渡路径加权，提升生成质量。
🎯研究动机

现有桥匹配方法对所有随机过渡赋予均匀回归权重，忽略了结构连贯与退化轨迹的差异，导致生成质量受限。

❓解决问题

如何区分桥匹配中信息丰富的过渡路径与退化路径，并据此调整训练目标以提升生成质量。

🔎现象分析

桥匹配中不同过渡路径对生成质量贡献不均，均匀加权会引入噪声。

🛠️主要方法

引入轻量级学习势函数 V_phi（参数仅为主网络的 1.4%），在线评分桥样本，通过停止梯度屏障生成重要性权重，调制漂移目标；推理时丢弃 V_phi，仅使用 EMA 漂移进行欧拉 - 丸山积分。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AGMs 框架，通过可学习势函数选择性惩罚非信息性传输路径。
  • V_phi 轻量且即插即用，不增加推理开销，无需迭代半桥拟合或辅助 SDE 求解器。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖桥匹配初始设置，泛化性需验证。
  • 势函数设计可能对特定数据分布敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce Action-Inspired Generative Models (AGMs), a dual-network generative framework motivated by the observation that existing bridge-matching methods assign uniform regression weight to every stochastic transition in the transport landscape, regardless of whether a given bridge sample lies along a structurally coherent trajectory or a degenerate one. We address this by introducing a lightweight learned scalar potential $V_\phi$ that scores bridge samples online and modulates the drift objective via importance weights derived through a stop-gradient barrier -- preventing adversarial feedback between the two networks whilst preserving $V_\phi$'s guiding signal. Crucially, $V_\phi$ comprises only $\sim$1.4% of the primary drift network's parameter count, adds no overhead to the inference graph, and requires no iterative half-bridge fitting or auxiliary stochastic differential equation (SDE) solvers: it is a plug-and-play enhancement to any bridge-matching training loop. At inference, $V_\phi$ is discarded entirely, leaving standard Euler-Maruyama integration of the exponential moving average (EMA) drift. We demonstrate that selectively penalising uninformative transport paths through the learned potential yields consistent improvements in generation quality across fidelity and coverage metrics.

文本到视频 (T2V) 7 篇

Delta Forcing: Trust Region Steering for Interactive Autoregressive Video Generation

High 2605.14382
Yuheng Wu, Xiangbo Gao, Tianhao Chen, Xinghao Chen, Qing Yin, Zhengzhong Tu, Dongman Lee
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Delta Forcing 框架，通过自适应信任区域约束教师模型监督，提升交互式自回归视频生成的稳定性与一致性。
🎯研究动机

交互式实时自回归视频生成在内容创作和世界建模中至关重要，但现有方法在条件变化后常出现漂移，难以平衡反应性与稳定性。

❓解决问题

解决自回归视频生成中教师模型的条件偏差导致的全局不一致问题。

🔎现象分析

识别出条件偏差：教师模型提供条件对齐但轨迹无关的指导，使生成偏向局部有效但全局不一致的模式。

🛠️主要方法

Delta Forcing 框架：估计教师与生成器轨迹之间的潜在差值（latent delta）以衡量过渡一致性，并基于此在自适应信任区域内平衡教师监督与单调连续性目标。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别并形式化了交互式自回归视频生成中的条件偏差问题。
  • 提出 Delta Forcing 框架，通过信任区域约束提升长期一致性。
  • 实验证明该方法在保持事件反应性的同时显著改善一致性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖教师模型质量，若教师本身有偏则效果受限。
  • 信任区域的自适应阈值可能需要额外调参。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Interactive real-time autoregressive video generation is essential for applications such as content creation and world modeling, where visual content must adapt to dynamically evolving event conditions. A fundamental challenge lies in balancing reactivity and stability: models must respond promptly to new events while maintaining temporal coherence over long horizons. Existing approaches distill bidirectional models into autoregressive generators and further adapt them via streaming long tuning, yet often exhibit persistent drift after condition changes. We identify the cause as conditional bias, where the teacher may provide condition-aligned but trajectory-agnostic guidance, biasing generation toward locally valid yet globally inconsistent modes. Inspired by Trust Region Policy Optimization, we propose Delta Forcing, a simple yet effective framework that constrains unreliable teacher supervision within an adaptive trust region. Specifically, Delta Forcing estimates transition consistency from the latent delta between teacher and generator trajectories, and uses it to balance teacher supervision with a monotonic continuity objective. This suppress unreliable teacher-induced shifts while preserving responsiveness to new events. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta Forcing significantly improves consistency while maintaining event reactivity.

Compositional Video Generation via Inference-Time Guidance

High 2605.14988
Ariel Shaulov, Eitan Shaar, Amit Edenzon, Gal Chechik, Lior Wolf
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过推理时引导提升文本到视频扩散模型的组合生成能力。
🎯研究动机

文本到视频扩散模型在需要细粒度组合理解的提示（如实体关系、属性、动作和运动方向）上经常失败，而现有方法通常需要重新训练或额外控制。

❓解决问题

如何在不修改模型架构、不微调生成器、不依赖用户提供布局或框的情况下，提升冻结文本到视频模型的组合生成忠实度。

🔎现象分析

交叉注意力图已经编码了提示概念在空间和时间上的基础信息，但模型在组合理解上存在失败模式。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CVG，一种推理时引导方法：在冻结的 VLM 骨干上训练轻量级组合分类器，利用早期去噪步骤中交叉注意力特征的梯度来引导潜在轨迹朝向期望的组合。

📊实验结果

在组合文本到视频基准上实验，显示提示忠实度提升，同时保持底层生成器的视觉质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需重新训练或修改架构的推理时引导方法，提升组合视频生成忠实度。
  • 利用冻结 VLM 的交叉注意力图训练可迁移的组合分类器，无需用户提供布局或框。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预训练 VLM 的交叉注意力质量，可能在某些场景下不准确。
  • 仅适用于冻结模型，可能无法处理超出分类器训练范围的组合。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text-to-video diffusion models generate realistic videos, but often fail on prompts requiring fine-grained compositional understanding, such as relations between entities, attributes, actions, and motion directions. We hypothesize that these failures need not be addressed by retraining the generator, but can instead be mitigated by steering the denoising process using the model's own internal grounding signals. We propose \textbf{CVG}, an inference-time guidance method for improving compositional faithfulness in frozen text-to-video models. Our key observation is that cross-attention maps already encode how prompt concepts are grounded across space and time. We train a lightweight compositional classifier on these attention features and use its gradients during early denoising steps to steer the latent trajectory toward the desired composition. Built on a frozen VLM backbone, the classifier transfers across semantically related composition labels rather than relying only on narrow category-specific features. CVG improves compositional generation without modifying the model architecture, fine-tuning the generator, or requiring layouts, boxes, or other user-supplied controls. Experiments on compositional text-to-video benchmarks show improved prompt faithfulness while preserving the visual quality of the underlying generator.

EverAnimate: Minute-Scale Human Animation via Latent Flow Restoration

High 2605.15042
Wuyang Li, Yang Gao, Mariam Hassan, Lan Feng, Wentao Pan, Po-Chien Luan, Alexandre Alahi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 EverAnimate，通过潜在流恢复实现分钟级高质量人物动画生成。
🎯研究动机

长时动画生成中，高度动态的人物运动与相对静态的环境结合，导致分块生成时出现累积漂移，包括背景退化（低质漂移）和角色身份不一致（语义漂移），现有方法难以同时保证视觉质量和身份保持。

❓解决问题

解决长时人物动画生成中的累积漂移问题，包括低质漂移（背景退化）和高层语义漂移（角色身份不一致）。

🔎现象分析

长时动画生成中，分块生成会导致两种累积漂移：低质漂移（如静态背景逐渐退化）和高层语义漂移（如角色身份和视角相关属性不一致）。

🛠️主要方法

提出 EverAnimate，包含两个互补机制：持久潜在传播（Persistent Latent Propagation）跨块维护上下文记忆以传播身份和运动，缓解时间遗忘；恢复性流匹配（Restorative Flow Matching）在采样中通过速度调整引入隐式恢复目标，提高块内保真度。仅需轻量 LoRA 微调。

📊实验结果

在 10 秒设置下，PSNR/SSIM 提升 8%/7%，LPIPS/FID 降低 22%/11%；在 90 秒设置下，增益分别增至 15%/15% 和 32%/27%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 EverAnimate，一种高效的后训练方法，用于长时动画视频生成，保持视觉质量和角色身份。
  • 设计持久潜在传播和恢复性流匹配两种机制，分别解决跨块漂移和块内保真度问题。
  • 在 10 秒和 90 秒设置下均超越现有方法，且仅需轻量 LoRA 微调。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖预训练模型，可能受限于基础模型能力。
  • 仅针对人物动画，未验证对其他动态场景的泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We propose EverAnimate, an efficient post-training method for long-horizon animated video generation that preserves visual quality and character identity. Long-form animation remains challenging because highly dynamic human motion must be synthesized against relatively static environments, making chunk-based generation prone to accumulated drift: (i) low-level quality drift, such as progressive degradation of static backgrounds, and (ii) high-level semantic drift, such as inconsistent character identity and view-dependent attributes. To address this issue, EverAnimate restores drifted flow trajectories by anchoring generation to a persistent latent context memory, consisting of two complementary mechanisms. (i) Persistent Latent Propagation maintains a context memory across chunks to propagate identity and motion in latent space while mitigating temporal forgetting. (ii) Restorative Flow Matching introduces an implicit restoration objective during sampling through velocity adjustment, improving within-chunk fidelity. With only lightweight LoRA tuning, EverAnimate outperforms state-of-the-art long-animation methods in both short- and long-horizon settings: at 10 seconds, it improves PSNR/SSIM by 8%/7% and reduces LPIPS/FID by 22%/11%; at 90 seconds, the gains increase to 15%/15% and 32%/27%, respectively.

SANA-WM: Efficient Minute-Scale World Modeling with Hybrid Linear Diffusion Transformer

High 2605.15178
Haoyi Zhu, Haozhe Liu, Yuyang Zhao, Tian Ye, Junsong Chen, Jincheng Yu, Tong He, Song Han et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：SANA-WM 是一个高效的开源世界模型，通过混合线性扩散 Transformer 实现分钟级、高保真、720p 视频生成，并支持精确相机控制。
🎯研究动机

现有世界模型在生成分钟级长视频时面临效率低、计算成本高、缺乏精确相机控制等问题，且开源模型较少，限制了其在机器人、自动驾驶等领域的应用。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个高效、开源的世界模型，能够生成长达一分钟的高质量视频，同时支持精确的 6-DoF 相机轨迹控制。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出混合线性注意力（帧级 Gated DeltaNet + softmax 注意力）、双分支相机控制、两阶段生成流水线（长视频精炼器）和鲁棒标注流水线，基于扩散 Transformer 架构。

📊实验结果

在自建的一分钟世界模型基准上，SANA-WM 在动作跟随精度上优于现有开源基线，视觉质量与大规模工业基线相当，吞吐量提升 36 倍。训练仅需 213K 公开视频片段，15 天在 64 块 H100 上完成，推理可在单 GPU 上生成 60 秒视频。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SANA-WM，一个 2.6B 参数的开源世界模型，原生支持一分钟视频生成。
  • 设计混合线性注意力机制，实现高效长上下文建模。
  • 引入双分支相机控制，确保精确的 6-DoF 轨迹跟随。
  • 提出两阶段生成流水线和鲁棒标注流水线，提升视频质量和一致性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定相机标注流水线，泛化到其他场景需额外适配。
  • 模型规模 2.6B 参数，对部署硬件仍有要求。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce SANA-WM, an efficient 2.6B-parameter open-source world model natively trained for one-minute generation, synthesizing high-fidelity, 720p, minute-scale videos with precise camera control. SANA-WM achieves visual quality comparable to large-scale industrial baselines such as LingBot-World and HY-WorldPlay, while significantly improving efficiency. Four core designs drive our architecture: (1) Hybrid Linear Attention combines frame-wise Gated DeltaNet (GDN) with softmax attention for memory-efficient long-context modeling. (2) Dual-Branch Camera Control ensures precise 6-DoF trajectory adherence. (3) Two-Stage Generation Pipeline applies a long-video refiner to stage-1 outputs, improving quality and consistency across sequences. (4) Robust Annotation Pipeline extracts accurate metric-scale 6-DoF camera poses from public videos to yield high-quality, spatiotemporally consistent action labels. Driven by these designs, SANA-WMdemonstrates remarkable efficiency across data, training compute, and inference hardware: it uses only $\sim$213K public video clips with metric-scale pose supervision, completes training in 15 days on 64 H100s, and generates each 60s clip on a single GPU; its distilled variant can be deployed on a single RTX 5090 with NVFP4 quantization to denoise a 60s 720p clip in 34s. On our one-minute world-model benchmark, SANA-WM demonstrates stronger action-following accuracy than prior open-source baselines and achieves comparable visual quality at $36\times$ higher throughput for scalable world modeling.

Warp-as-History: Generalizable Camera-Controlled Video Generation from One Training Video

High 2605.15182
Yifan Wang, Tong He
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：无需训练，仅通过相机扭曲的伪历史帧和位置对齐，实现零样本相机可控视频生成。
🎯研究动机

现有相机可控视频生成方法通常需要在大规模相机标注视频上训练或测试时优化，成本高且泛化性差。

❓解决问题

如何在不进行后训练、架构修改或测试时优化的情况下，让冻结的视频生成模型遵循相机轨迹。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Warp-as-History 接口，将相机扭曲的伪历史帧通过视觉历史路径输入模型，并对齐目标帧的位置编码，移除无效 token。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了方法的有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无需训练、架构修改或测试时优化的零样本相机可控视频生成方法。
  • 仅需单个相机标注视频的轻量级 LoRA 微调即可提升性能并泛化到未见视频。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂相机轨迹的跟随能力有限。
  • 依赖预训练视频生成模型的质量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Camera-controlled video generation has made substantial progress, enabling generated videos to follow prescribed viewpoint trajectories. However, existing methods usually learn camera-specific conditioning through camera encoders, control branches, or attention and positional-encoding modifications, which often require post-training on large-scale camera-annotated videos. Training-free alternatives avoid such post-training, but often shift the cost to test-time optimization or extra denoising-time guidance. We propose Warp-as-History, a simple interface that turns camera-induced warps into camera-warped pseudo-history with target-frame positional alignment and visible-token selection. Given a target camera trajectory, we construct camera-warped pseudo-history from past observations and feed it through the model's visual-history pathway. Crucially, we align its positional encoding with the target frames being denoised and remove warped-history tokens without valid source observations. Without any training, architectural modification, or test-time optimization, this interface reveals a non-trivial zero-shot capability of a frozen video generation model to follow camera trajectories. Moreover, lightweight offline LoRA finetuning on only one camera-annotated video further improves this capability and generalizes to unseen videos, improving camera adherence, visual quality, and motion dynamics without test-time optimization or target-video adaptation. Extensive experiments on diverse datasets confirm the effectiveness of our method.

EntityBench: Towards Entity-Consistent Long-Range Multi-Shot Video Generation

High 2605.15199
Ruozhen He, Meng Wei, Ziyan Yang, Vicente Ordonez
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 EntityBench 基准和 EntityMem 记忆增强系统，解决多镜头视频生成中跨镜头实体一致性问题。
🎯研究动机

多镜头视频生成需要保持角色、物体和地点的一致性，但现有评估方法实体覆盖有限、一致性指标简单，难以标准化比较。

❓解决问题

长序列多镜头视频生成中跨镜头实体一致性退化问题，以及缺乏全面、标准化的评估基准。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，现有方法中跨镜头实体一致性随镜头间隔距离急剧下降。

🛠️主要方法

EntityBench 基准包含 140 个剧集（2491 个镜头），源自真实叙事媒体，提供每镜头实体调度表，并配套三支柱评估套件；EntityMem 是记忆增强生成系统，在生成前将验证过的实体视觉参考存入持久记忆库。

📊实验结果

实验表明，现有方法中跨镜头实体一致性随镜头间隔距离急剧下降，EntityMem 在角色保真度（Cohen's d = +2.33）和存在性上达到最高。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了 EntityBench 基准，覆盖长距离、多实体的跨镜头一致性评估。
  • 提出 EntityMem 记忆增强生成系统，显著提升跨镜头实体一致性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅基于叙事媒体，可能不覆盖所有视频生成场景。
  • EntityMem 依赖预验证的实体参考，可能增加预处理开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-shot video generation extends single-shot generation to coherent visual narratives, yet maintaining consistent characters, objects, and locations across shots remains a challenge over long sequences. Existing evaluations typically use independently generated prompt sets with limited entity coverage and simple consistency metrics, making standardized comparison difficult. We introduce EntityBench, a benchmark of 140 episodes (2,491 shots) derived from real narrative media, with explicit per-shot entity schedules tracking characters, objects, and locations simultaneously across easy / medium / hard tiers of up to 50 shots, 13 cross-shot characters, 8 cross-shot locations, 22 cross-shot objects, and recurrence gaps spanning up to 48 shots. It is paired with a three-pillar evaluation suite that disentangles intra-shot quality, prompt-following alignment, and cross-shot consistency, with a fidelity gate that admits only accurate entity appearances into cross-shot scoring. As a baseline, we propose EntityMem, a memory-augmented generation system that stores verified per-entity visual references in a persistent memory bank before generation begins. Experiments show that cross-shot entity consistency degrades sharply with recurrence distance in existing methods, and that explicit per-entity memory yields the highest character fidelity (Cohen's d = +2.33) and presence among methods evaluated. Code and data are available at this https URL .

TeDiO: Temporal Diagonal Optimization for Training-Free Coherent Video Diffusion

High 2605.14136
Nurislam Tursynbek, Zhiqiang Lao, Heather Yu, Gedas Bertasius, Marc Niethammer
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：TeDiO 通过正则化自注意力图中的时间对角线模式，无需训练即可提升视频扩散模型的时间一致性。
🎯研究动机

现有文本到视频扩散模型生成的帧在视觉上令人满意，但常出现闪烁、漂移或不稳定运动，时间连贯性不足，限制了动态真实感。

❓解决问题

如何在不修改模型权重或使用外部运动监督的情况下，提升视频扩散模型的时间一致性。

🔎现象分析

不连贯视频在中间自注意力图中表现出不规则、碎片化的时间对角线，而稳定运动对应平滑的带状对角线模式。

🛠️主要方法

TeDiO：一种无需训练的推理时方法，通过估计对角线平滑度、识别不稳定区域并执行轻量级潜在更新来正则化内部注意力模式，从而增强时间一致性。

📊实验结果

在多个视频扩散模型（如 Wan2.1、CogVideoX）上验证，TeDiO 能显著提升运动平滑度，同时保持每帧视觉质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现视频扩散模型中时间连贯性与自注意力图对角线模式之间的关联。
  • 提出 TeDiO，一种无需训练、即插即用的推理时方法，有效提升时间一致性而不牺牲帧质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端动态场景的改善有限。
  • 轻量级潜在更新可能无法完全消除复杂伪影。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent text-to-video diffusion transformers generate visually compelling frames, yet still struggle with temporal coherence, often producing flickering, drifting, or unstable motion.
