We show that these failures leave a clear imprint inside the model: incoherent videos consistently exhibit irregular, fragmented temporal diagonals in their intermediate self-attention maps, whereas stable motion corresponds to smooth, band-diagonal patterns. Building on this observation, we introduce TeDiO, a training-free, inference-time method that reinforces temporal consistency by regularizing these internal attention patterns. TeDiO estimates diagonal smoothness, identifies unstable regions, and performs lightweight latent updates that promote coherent frame-to-frame dynamics, without modifying model weights or using external motion supervision. Across multiple video diffusion models (e.g., Wan2.1, CogVideoX), TeDiO delivers markedly smoother motion while preserving per-frame visual quality, offering an efficient plug-and-play approach to improving dynamic realism in modern video generation systems.

其他 4 篇

Head Forcing: Long Autoregressive Video Generation via Head Heterogeneity

High 2605.14487
Jiahao Tian, Yiwei Wang, Gang Yu, Chi Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Head Forcing 通过为不同注意力头分配定制 KV 缓存策略，无需训练即可将自回归视频生成从 5 秒扩展到分钟级。
🎯研究动机

自回归视频扩散模型支持实时合成，但在长时生成中面临误差累积和上下文丢失问题，现有方法对所有注意力头统一处理，导致 KV 缓存分配次优。

❓解决问题

如何在不增加训练的情况下，解决自回归视频扩散模型在长时生成中的误差累积和上下文丢失问题。

🔎现象分析

发现自回归视频扩散 Transformer 中的注意力头存在功能异质性：局部头负责细节细化，锚点头负责结构稳定，记忆头负责长程上下文聚合。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Head Forcing，一种无训练框架，为每种头类型分配定制 KV 缓存策略：局部头和锚点头仅保留关键 token，记忆头采用分层记忆系统与动态情节更新；并引入头级 RoPE 重编码方案确保位置编码在预训练范围内。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在分钟级生成和多提示交互合成中持续优于现有基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现自回归视频扩散模型中注意力头的功能异质性，并据此分类为局部头、锚点头和记忆头。
  • 提出 Head Forcing 框架，通过定制 KV 缓存策略和头级 RoPE 重编码，无需训练即可将生成时长从 5 秒扩展到分钟级，并支持多提示交互合成。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于预训练模型的头功能分布，不同模型可能需要重新分析。
  • 分层记忆系统的计算开销在极长序列中可能成为瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autoregressive video diffusion models support real-time synthesis but suffer from error accumulation and context loss over long horizons. We discover that attention heads in AR video diffusion transformers serve functionally distinct roles as local heads for detail refinement, anchor heads for structural stabilization, and memory heads for long-range context aggregation, yet existing methods treat them uniformly, leading to suboptimal KV cache allocation. We propose Head Forcing, a training-free framework that assigns each head type a tailored KV cache strategy: local and anchor heads retain only essential tokens, while memory heads employ a hierarchical memory system with dynamic episodic updates for long-range consistency. A head-wise RoPE re-encoding scheme further ensures positional encodings remain within the pretrained range. Without additional training, Head Forcing extends generation from 5 seconds to minute-level duration, supports multi-prompt interactive synthesis, and consistently outperforms existing baselines. Project Page: this https URL .

Probing into Camera Control of Video Models

High 2605.14815
Chen Hou, Christian Rupprecht
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：将视频模型中的相机控制重新定义为几何引导的位移场，无需训练即可实现有效控制并揭示模型固有偏差。
🎯研究动机

现有相机控制方法依赖额外模块和配对数据，但数据集规模有限、多样性不足，会限制模型输出分布并损害基模型先验，亟需一种不依赖大规模训练数据的新视角。

❓解决问题

如何在不进行额外训练或微调的情况下，实现对视频生成模型的精确相机控制，同时保持基模型的生成质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将相机控制重新表述为位移场，通过在去噪过程中对潜在特征进行可微重采样来施加几何引导，无需训练即可应用于大多数视频扩散模型。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需训练的相机控制方法，通过位移场和可微重采样实现有效控制，且质量退化最小。
  • 该方法可作为探针，揭示不同视频模型对相机控制的通用偏差和响应差异，并评估其多视图生成性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法可能对复杂相机运动或大位移场景的控制精度有限。
  • 作为探针，其揭示的偏差可能受限于所选模型和测试设置。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Video is a rich and scalable source of 3D/4D visual observations, and camera control is a key capability for video generation models to produce geometrically meaningful content. Existing approaches typically learn a mapping from camera motion to video using additional camera modules and paired data. However, such datasets are often limited in scale, diversity, and scene dynamics, which can bias the model toward a narrow output distribution and compromise the strong prior learned by the base model. These limitations motivate a different perspective on camera control. In this paper, we show that camera control need not be modeled as an implicit mapping problem, but can instead be treated as a form of geometric guidance that induces displacements across frames. Specifically, we reformulate camera control into a set of displacement fields and apply them via differentiable resampling of latent features during denoising. Our simple approach achieves effective camera control with minimal degradation across diverse quality metrics compared to fine-tuned baselines. Since our method is applicable to most video diffusion models without training, it can also serve as a probe to study the camera control capabilities of base models. Using this probe, we identify universal biases shared by representative video models, as well as disparities in their responses to camera control. Finally, we benchmark their performance in multi-view generation, offering insights into their potential for 3D/4D tasks.

RAVEN: Real-time Autoregressive Video Extrapolation with Consistency-model GRPO

High 2605.15190
Yanzuo Lu, Ronglai Zuo, Jiankang Deng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 RAVEN 框架和 CM-GRPO 算法，通过训练时测试对齐和在线强化学习提升因果自回归视频扩散模型的长期生成质量。
🎯研究动机

因果自回归视频扩散模型在实时流式生成中面临训练与推理时历史分布不匹配的问题，导致长序列生成质量下降。

❓解决问题

如何消除因果视频扩散模型中训练与推理时的分布偏移，并提升长程生成质量。

🔎现象分析

训练时使用的历史分布与推理时实际产生的历史分布之间存在持续差距，限制了长程生成质量。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RAVEN 框架，将自滚动过程重排为干净历史端点和噪声去噪状态的交错序列，对齐训练注意力与推理外推；提出 CM-GRPO，将一致性采样步骤重构为条件高斯转移，并直接应用在线强化学习。

📊实验结果

在质量、语义和动态度评估上，RAVEN 超越近期因果视频蒸馏基线，CM-GRPO 与 RAVEN 结合带来进一步提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RAVEN 训练时测试框架，通过重排自滚动序列对齐训练与推理分布，提升长程生成质量。
  • 提出 CM-GRPO 算法，将一致性模型采样步骤转化为条件高斯转移，实现直接在线强化学习，避免辅助过程。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定视频数据集，泛化性需验证。
  • 在线 RL 训练可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Causal autoregressive video diffusion models support real-time streaming generation by extrapolating future chunks from previously generated content. Distilling such generators from high-fidelity bidirectional teachers yields competitive few-step models, yet a persistent gap between the history distributions encountered during training and those arising at inference constrains generation quality over long horizons. We introduce the Real-time Autoregressive Video Extrapolation Network (RAVEN), a training-time test framework that repacks each self rollout into an interleaved sequence of clean historical endpoints and noisy denoising states. This formulation aligns training attention with inference-time extrapolation and allows downstream chunk losses to supervise the history representations on which future predictions depend. We further propose Consistency-model Group Relative Policy Optimization (CM-GRPO), which reformulates a consistency sampling step as a conditional Gaussian transition and applies online Reinforcement Learning (RL) directly to this kernel, avoiding the Euler-Maruyama auxiliary process adopted in prior flow-model RL formulations. Experiments demonstrate that RAVEN surpasses recent causal video distillation baselines across quality, semantic, and dynamic degree evaluations, and that CM-GRPO provides further gains when combined with RAVEN.

RefDecoder: Enhancing Visual Generation with Conditional Video Decoding

High 2605.15196
Xiang Fan, Yuheng Wang, Bohan Fang, Zhongzheng Ren, Ranjay Krishna
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 RefDecoder，通过参考注意力将高保真参考图像信号注入视频 VAE 解码器，显著提升生成细节与一致性。
🎯研究动机

当前视频生成中，潜扩散模型的去噪网络通常经过强条件处理，但解码器往往是无条件的，这种架构不对称导致细节丢失和与输入图像的不一致性。

❓解决问题

解决视频 VAE 解码器缺乏条件信息导致的细节损失和结构不一致问题。

🔎现象分析

观察到解码器无条件导致生成结果相对于输入图像出现显著细节丢失和不一致性。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RefDecoder，通过参考注意力机制将参考帧的高维细节令牌注入解码器的每个上采样阶段，与去噪后的视频潜令牌共同处理。

📊实验结果

在 Inter4K、WebVid 和 Large Motion 重建基准上评估，PSNR 提升高达 2.1dB；在 VBench I2V 基准上报告了主题一致性、背景一致性和整体质量分数的全面改进。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出参考条件视频 VAE 解码器 RefDecoder，通过参考注意力注入高保真参考图像信号。
  • 在多个解码器骨干（如 Wan 2.1 和 VideoVAE+）上实现一致改进，PSNR 提升高达 2.1dB。
  • RefDecoder 可直接替换现有视频生成系统，无需额外微调，并在 VBench I2V 基准上全面改善主题一致性、背景一致性和整体质量。
  • 方法泛化到风格迁移和视频编辑细化等多种视觉生成任务。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖参考帧的质量，低质量参考帧可能影响效果。
  • 计算开销可能略有增加，但摘要未提及具体效率数据。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Video generation powers a vast array of downstream applications. However, while the de facto standard, i.e., latent diffusion models, typically employ heavily conditioned denoising networks, their decoders often remain unconditional. We observe that this architectural asymmetry leads to significant loss of detail and inconsistency relative to the input image. To address this, we argue that the decoder requires equal conditioning to preserve structural integrity. We introduce RefDecoder, a reference-conditioned video VAE decoder by injecting high-fidelity reference image signal directly into the decoding process via reference attention. Specifically, a lightweight image encoder maps the reference frame into the detail-rich high-dimensional tokens, which are co-processed with the denoised video latent tokens at each decoder up-sampling stage. We demonstrate consistent improvements across several distinct decoder backbones (e.g., Wan 2.1 and VideoVAE+), achieving up to +2.1dB PSNR over the unconditional baselines on the Inter4K, WebVid, and Large Motion reconstruction benchmarks. Notably, RefDecoder can be directly swapped into existing video generation systems without additional fine-tuning, and we report across-the-board improvements in subject consistency, background consistency, and overall quality scores on the VBench I2V benchmark. Beyond I2V, RefDecoder generalizes well to a wide range of visual generation tasks such as style transfer and video editing refinement.

图像编辑 4 篇

Editor's Choice: Evaluating Abstract Intent in Image Editing through Atomic Entity Analysis

High 2605.14842
Mor Ventura, Roy Hirsch, Yonatan Bitton, Regev Cohen, Roi Reichart
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出抽象图像编辑基准 AbstractEdit 与实体级评估框架 Entity-Rubrics，揭示现有模型在意图与保真度间的失衡。
🎯研究动机

现有图像编辑基准主要关注显式文字指令，忽略了人类自然交流中的抽象概念（如“情绪”），导致模型难以理解抽象意图。

❓解决问题

如何形式化定义抽象图像编辑，并构建能评估模型遵循抽象指令能力的基准与评估方法。

🔎现象分析

标准架构在抽象编辑中难以平衡意图与保真度，常出现欠编辑或过编辑；引入高级 LLM 文本编码器和迭代推理可显著提升性能。

🛠️主要方法

形式化抽象图像编辑的定义与分类；提出 Entity-Rubrics 框架，将抽象编辑分解为实体级评估；构建 AbstractEdit 基准。

📊实验结果

在 AbstractEdit 基准上评估 11 个领先模型，发现标准架构普遍存在欠编辑或过编辑问题；分析表明集成高级 LLM 文本编码器和迭代推理是关键。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次形式化抽象图像编辑的定义与分类体系
  • 提出 Entity-Rubrics 框架，实现实体级评估并与人类判断高度相关
  • 构建首个抽象图像编辑基准 AbstractEdit，覆盖多样真实场景
  • 系统评估 11 个模型，揭示意图与保真度失衡问题，并指出改进方向
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准规模可能有限，未覆盖所有抽象概念
  • 评估框架依赖实体分解，可能不适用于高度抽象的全局编辑
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Humans naturally communicate through abstract concepts like "mood". However, current image editing benchmarks focus primarily on explicit, literal commands, leaving abstract instructions largely underexplored. In this work, we first formalize the definition and taxonomy of abstract image editing. To measure instruction-following in this challenging domain, we introduce Entity-Rubrics, a framework that breaks down abstract edits into individual, entity-level assessments and achieves strong correlation with human judgment. Alongside this framework, we contribute AbstractEdit, the first benchmark dedicated to abstract image editing across diverse real-world scenes. Evaluating 11 leading models on this dataset reveals a fundamental challenge: standard architectures struggle to balance intent and preservation, commonly defaulting to under-editing or over-editing. Our analysis demonstrates that driving meaningful improvements relies heavily on integrating advanced LLM text encoders and iterative thinking. Looking forward, our entity-based paradigm can generalize beyond assessment to serve as a reward model, enable models to correctly interpret abstract communication, or highlight specific failures in test-time critique loops. Ultimately, we hope this work serves as a stepping stone toward seamless multimodal interaction, closing the gap between rigid machine execution and the natural, open-ended way humans communicate.

Hierarchical Image Tokenization for Multi-Scale Image Super Resolution

High 2605.14891
Isma Hadji, Enrique Sanchez, Adrian Bulat, Brais Martinez, Georgios Tzimiropoulos
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出层次化图像分词（HIT）和 DPO 正则化，实现多尺度超分辨率，模型更小且无需外部数据。
🎯研究动机

现有基于 VAR 的 ISR 方法受限于残差量化，只能生成固定尺度图像，且依赖大模型或大量标注数据，灵活性和效率不足。

❓解决问题

如何实现灵活的多尺度图像超分辨率，同时降低模型复杂度和数据依赖。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出层次化图像分词（HIT），通过跨尺度令牌重叠实现多尺度表示；引入直接偏好优化（DPO）正则化项，仅利用低 - 高分辨率对鼓励模型生成高分辨率输出。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 HIT 方法，作为强归纳偏置，使 VAR 训练能生成多尺度输出且仅需单次前向传播。
  • 引入 DPO 正则化，无需外部数据即可提升超分辨率性能。
  • 在 300M 参数模型上达到 SOTA，优于 1B 参数的 VARSR。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端尺度变化或复杂纹理的泛化能力有限。
  • DPO 正则化可能对低 - 高分辨率对的质量敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce a multi-scale Image Super Resolution (ISR) method building on recent advances in Visual Auto-Regressive (VAR) modeling. VAR models break image tokenization into additive, gradually increasing scales, using Residual Quantization (RQ), an approach that aligns perfectly with our target ISR task. Previous works taking advantage of this synergy suffer from two main shortcomings. First, due to the limitations in RQ, they only generate images at a predefined fixed scale, failing to map intermediate outputs to the corresponding image scales. They also rely on large backbones or a large corpus of annotated data to achieve better performance. To address both shortcomings, we introduce two novel components to the VAR training for ISR, aiming at increasing its flexibility and reducing its complexity. In particular, we introduce a) a \textbf{Hierarchical Image Tokenization (HIT)} approach that progressively represents images at different scales while enforcing token overlap across scales, and b) a \textbf{Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) regularization term} that, relying solely on the (LR,HR) pair, encourages the transformer to produce the latter over the former. Our proposed HIT acts as a strong inductive bias for the VAR training, resulting in a small model (300M params vs 1B params of VARSR), that achieves state-of-the-art results without external training data, and that delivers multi-scale outputs with a single forward pass.

Aligning Latent Geometry for Spherical Flow Matching in Image Generation

High 2605.15193
Tuna Han Salih Meral, Kaan Oktay, Hidir Yesiltepe, Adil Kaan Akan, Pinar Yanardag
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：将潜空间流匹配的线性路径替换为球面测地线，提升图像生成质量。
🎯研究动机

现有潜空间流匹配方法使用线性路径传输噪声到 VAE 潜变量，但两端数据集中在薄球壳上，欧几里得弦会离开球壳，导致路径不自然。

❓解决问题

线性插值路径在潜空间球壳分布上不匹配，影响生成质量。

🔎现象分析

通过组件交换探针发现，潜变量的方向携带主要语义和感知信息，半径贡献较小。

🛠️主要方法

将潜变量投影到固定半径球面，使用高斯噪声的径向投影作为球面先验，冻结编码器微调解码器，并用球面线性插值替代线性插值，使路径始终位于球面上且速度纯角度。

📊实验结果

在类条件 ImageNet-256 上使用不同图像分词器进行实验，FID 指标一致提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出球面流匹配方法，通过球面线性插值保持路径在球面上。
  • 在 ImageNet-256 上一致提升 FID，无需额外编码器或对齐目标。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了类条件图像生成，未涉及文本条件或其他模态。
  • 需要微调解码器，可能增加训练成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Latent flow matching for image generation usually transports Gaussian noise to variational autoencoder latents along linear paths. Both endpoints, however, concentrate in thin spherical shells, and a Euclidean chord leaves those shells even when preprocessing aligns their radii. By decomposing each latent token into radial and angular components, we show through component-swap probes that decoded perceptual and semantic content is carried predominantly by direction, with radius contributing much less. We therefore project data latents onto a fixed token radius, use the radial projection of Gaussian noise as the spherical prior, finetune the decoder with the encoder frozen, and replace linear interpolation with spherical linear interpolation. The resulting geodesic paths stay on the sphere at every timestep, and their velocity targets are purely angular by construction. Under matched training, the method consistently improves class-conditional ImageNet-256 FID across different image tokenizers, leaves the diffusion architecture unchanged, and requires no auxiliary encoder or representation-alignment objective.

ClickRemoval: An Interactive Open-Source Tool for Object Removal in Diffusion Models

Medium 2605.14461
Ledun Zhang, Yatu Ji, Xufei Zhuang, Xinying Yao
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：基于点击的交互式扩散模型物体移除工具，无需训练或掩码。
🎯研究动机

现有物体移除工具依赖手动掩码或文本提示，非专业用户在复杂场景中难以精确移除，常导致移除不完整或背景修复不自然。

❓解决问题

如何仅通过用户点击实现精确的物体移除和背景修复，无需额外训练或掩码。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于预训练 Stable Diffusion 模型，通过用户点击定位目标物体，在去噪过程中利用自注意力调制修复背景。

📊实验结果

在定量指标和用户研究中取得有竞争力的结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ClickRemoval，一种仅需点击的交互式物体移除工具，无需训练或掩码。
  • 开源完整软件包，便于社区使用和扩展。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂遮挡或小物体效果有限。
  • 依赖预训练扩散模型的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing object removal tools often rely on manual masks or text prompts, making precise removal difficult for non-expert users in complex scenes and often leading to incomplete removal or unnatural background completion. To address this issue, we present ClickRemoval, an open-source interactive object removal tool built on pretrained Stable Diffusion models and driven solely by user clicks. Without additional training, hand-drawn masks, or text descriptions, ClickRemoval localizes target objects and restores the background through self-attention modulation during denoising. Experiments show that ClickRemoval achieves competitive results across quantitative metrics and user studies. We release a complete software package at this https URL under the Apache-2.0 license.

文本到图像 (T2I) 4 篇

Diagnosing and Correcting Concept Omission in Multimodal Diffusion Transformers

High 2605.14270
Kanghyun Baek, Jaihyun Lew, Chaehun Shin, Jungbeom Lee, Sungroh Yoon
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过线性探针发现文本嵌入中的“遗漏信号”，并提出信号干预方法缓解多模态扩散 Transformer 中的概念遗漏问题。
🎯研究动机

多模态扩散 Transformer 在文本到图像生成中常遗漏指定对象或属性，影响生成质量，现有方法未能有效诊断和纠正此问题。

❓解决问题

解决多模态扩散 Transformer 生成图像时概念遗漏的问题。

🔎现象分析

通过线性探针发现文本嵌入中存在表征目标概念缺失的“遗漏信号”。

🛠️主要方法

提出遗漏信号干预（OSI），放大遗漏信号以主动催化缺失概念的生成。

📊实验结果

在 FLUX.1-Dev 和 SD3.5-Medium 上实验，OSI 显著缓解概念遗漏。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次通过线性探针揭示多模态扩散 Transformer 中概念遗漏的文本信号特征。
  • 提出 OSI 方法，有效缓解概念遗漏，在极端场景下仍表现显著。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定模型架构（MM-DiTs）。
  • 未讨论对其他类型遗漏（如属性混淆）的适用性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multimodal Diffusion Transformers (MM-DiTs) have achieved remarkable progress in text-to-image generation, yet they frequently suffer from concept omission, where specified objects or attributes fail to emerge in the generated image. By performing linear probing on text tokens, we demonstrate that text embeddings can distinguish a characteristic `omission signal' representing the absence of target concepts. Leveraging this insight, we propose Omission Signal Intervention (OSI), which amplifies the omission signal to actively catalyze the generation of missing concepts. Comprehensive experiments on FLUX.1-Dev and SD3.5-Medium demonstrate that OSI significantly alleviates concept omission even in extreme scenarios.

Unlocking Complex Visual Generation via Closed-Loop Verified Reasoning

High 2605.14876
Hanbo Cheng, Limin Lin, Ruo Zhang, Yicheng Pan, Jun Du
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出闭环视觉推理框架 CLVR，通过视觉验证、强化学习和权重融合实现复杂文本到图像生成。
🎯研究动机

当前 T2I 模型依赖单步生成，难以处理复杂语义，且参数扩展收益递减；多步推理方法存在规划幻觉、优化不稳定和推理延迟高等问题。

❓解决问题

如何实现可靠、高效的多步推理式复杂视觉生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出多步推理方法存在无验证的规划幻觉、整体事后反思、长上下文优化不稳定和推理延迟瓶颈。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CLVR 框架，包含：1) 自动数据引擎与步骤级视觉验证；2) 代理提示强化学习(PPRL)解决长上下文优化不稳定；3) Δ- 空间权重合并(DSWM)降低推理成本至 4 步。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上优于现有开源基线，接近商业模型性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出闭环视觉推理框架，将视觉语言逻辑规划与扩散生成深度耦合。
  • 提出 PPRL 方法，通过蒸馏多模态历史为显式奖励信号实现准确因果归因。
  • 提出 DSWM 方法，无需重新蒸馏即可将推理成本降至 4 步。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量验证数据。
  • DSWM 方法在极端复杂场景下的泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Despite rapid advancements, current text-to-image (T2I) models predominantly rely on a single-step generation paradigm, which struggles with complex semantics and faces diminishing returns from parameter scaling. While recent multi-step reasoning approaches show promise, they are hindered by ungrounded planning hallucinations lacking verification, monolithic post-hoc reflection, long-context optimization instabilities, and prohibitive inference latency. To overcome these bottlenecks, we propose the Closed-Loop Visual Reasoning (CLVR) framework, a comprehensive system that deeply couples visual-language logical planning with pixel-level diffusion generation. CLVR introduces an automated data engine with step-level visual verification to synthesize reliable reasoning trajectories, and proposes Proxy Prompt Reinforcement Learning (PPRL) to resolve long-context optimization instabilities by distilling interleaved multimodal histories into explicit reward signals for accurate causal attribution. Furthermore, to mitigate the severe latency bottleneck caused by iterative denoising, we propose $\Delta$-Space Weight Merge (DSWM), a theoretically grounded method that fuses alignment weights with off-the-shelf distillation priors, reducing the per-step inference cost to just 4 NFEs without requiring expensive re-distillation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CLVR outperforms existing open-source baselines across multiple benchmarks and approaches the performance of proprietary commercial models, unlocking general test-time scaling capabilities for complex visual generation.

Few Channels Draw The Whole Picture: Revealing Massive Activations in Diffusion Transformers

High 2605.13974
Evelyn Turri, Davide Bucciarelli, Sara Sarto, Lorenzo Baraldi, Marcella Cornia
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：DiT 中少量通道的巨量激活承载了大部分语义信息，可迁移并用于无训练提示插值和主体驱动生成。
🎯研究动机

扩散 Transformer（DiT）在文本到图像生成中表现优异，但其内部机制如何将提示转化为图像语义仍不清楚，理解这些机制有助于改进模型可控性和可解释性。

❓解决问题

揭示 DiT 中巨量激活通道的功能角色、空间组织方式及可迁移性，并探索其应用。

🔎现象分析

发现 DiT 中存在少量隐藏状态通道，其响应值远大于其他通道，这些通道在功能上至关重要，空间上组织成与图像主体对齐的相干分区，且可在不同提示条件下迁移。

🛠️主要方法

通过零化巨量通道的扰动探针、图像流令牌聚类、以及跨提示轨迹的激活迁移实验，系统分析巨量激活的三种特性：功能关键性、空间组织性和可迁移性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次揭示 DiT 中巨量激活通道是稀疏但关键的语义载体，而非异常值。
  • 提出基于巨量激活迁移的无训练语义传输方法，实现提示插值和主体驱动生成。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 DiT 架构，可能不适用于其他生成模型。
  • 迁移效果可能受限于源和目标提示的语义差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) and related flow-based architectures are now among the strongest text-to-image generators, yet the internal mechanisms through which prompts shape image semantics remain poorly understood. In this work, we study massive activations: a small subset of hidden-state channels whose responses are consistently much larger than the rest. We show that, despite their sparsity, these few channels effectively draw the whole picture, in three complementary senses. First, they are functionally critical: a controlled disruption probe that zeroes the massive channels causes a sharp collapse in generation quality, while disrupting an equally-sized set of low-statistic channels has marginal effect. Second, they are spatially organized: restricting image-stream tokens to massive channels and clustering them yields coherent partitions that closely align with the main subject and salient regions, exposing a structured spatial code hidden inside an apparently outlier-like subspace. Third, they are transferable: transporting massive activations from one prompt-conditioned trajectory into another, shifts the final image toward the source prompt while preserving substantial content from the target, producing localized semantic interpolation rather than unstructured pixel blending. We exploit this property in two use cases: text-conditioned and image-conditioned semantic transport, where massive activations transport enables prompt interpolation and subject-driven generation without any additional training. Together, these results recast massive activations not as activation anomalies, but as a sparse prompt-conditioned carrier subspace that organizes and controls semantic information in modern DiT models.

Realiz3D: 3D Generation Made Photorealistic via Domain-Aware Learning

High 2605.13852
Ido Sobol, Kihyuk Sohn, Yoav Blum, Egor Zakharov, Max Bluvstein, Andrea Vedaldi, Or Litany
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：Realiz3D 通过解耦控制信号与视觉域，在保持 3D 一致性的同时生成逼真图像。
🎯研究动机

现有方法通过微调预训练图像生成器来学习 3D 控制，但合成渲染与真实照片之间的域差距导致生成图像失去真实感。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲真实感的前提下，让扩散模型学习精确的 3D 控制信号（如几何、材质、视角）。

🔎现象分析

模型错误地将控制信号的存在与合成外观关联起来，导致即使应用控制也生成非真实图像。

🛠️主要方法

引入协变量显式学习视觉域（真实或合成），通过小型残差适配器将域信息与其他控制信号解耦，并结合不同层和去噪步骤的角色分析来增强控制向真实域的迁移。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Realiz3D 框架，通过解耦控制信号与视觉域实现逼真的 3D 生成。
  • 利用扩散模型层和去噪步骤的洞察，设计新的训练和推理策略以缩小域差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖合成 3D 资产的质量和多样性。
  • 框架在更复杂场景或极端域差距下的泛化能力未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We often aim to generate images that are both photorealistic and 3D-consistent, adhering to precise geometry, material, and viewpoint controls. Typically, this is achieved by fine-tuning an image generator, pre-trained on billions of real images, using renders of synthetic 3D assets, where annotations for control signals are available. While this approach can learn the desired controls, it often compromises the realism of the images due to domain gap between photographs and renders. We observe that this issue largely arises from the model learning an unintended association between the presence of control signals and the synthetic appearance of the images. To address this, we introduce Realiz3D, a lightweight framework for training diffusion models, that decouples controls and visual domain. The key idea is to explicitly learn visual domain, real or synthetic, separately from other control signals by introducing a co-variate that, fed into small residual adapters, shifts the domain. Then, the generator can be trained to gain controllability, without fitting to specific visual domain. In this way, the model can be guided to produce realistic images even when controls are applied. We enhance control transferability to the real domain by leveraging insights about roles of different layers and denoising steps in diffusion-based generators, informing new training and inference strategies that further mitigate the gap. We demonstrate the advantages of Realiz3D in tasks as text-to-multiview generation and texturing from 3D inputs, producing outputs that are 3D-consistent and photorealistic.

3D/4D 生成 1 篇

Seed3D 2.0: Advancing High-Fidelity Simulation-Ready 3D Content Generation

High 2605.13862
Diandian Gu, Jing Lin, Gaohong Liu, Jiahang Liu, Su Ma, Guang Shi, Jun Wang, Qinlong Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：Seed3D 2.0 通过两阶段几何生成、统一 PBR 材质模型和仿真就绪套件，显著提升了 3D 内容生成的质量与物理交互能力。
🎯研究动机

现有 3D 内容生成系统在几何细节、材质真实感和仿真就绪性方面存在不足，难以满足高质量、可交互的 3D 资产需求。

❓解决问题

如何提升 3D 内容生成系统的几何保真度、材质精度和仿真就绪能力，以支持场景级构建和物理交互。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出两阶段几何生成管线（粗到细）解耦全局结构与高频细节；引入局部感知 VAE 提高空间压缩和编码效率；用统一 PBR 模型替代级联管线，结合 MoE 扩展和 VLM 语义条件生成多视图材质图；新增仿真就绪模型套件，包括场景布局规划、部件感知分解和无训练关节生成。

📊实验结果

大规模人类偏好研究显示，Seed3D 2.0 在纹理 3D 资产生成上对五个商业模型的胜率在 69.0% 至 89.9% 之间。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出粗到细两阶段几何生成管线，提升几何保真度
  • 设计统一 PBR 材质模型，结合 MoE 和 VLM 条件改善材质精度与视觉保真度
  • 引入仿真就绪模型套件，支持场景布局、部件分解和关节生成，实现物理交互
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模训练数据，泛化到罕见类别有限
  • 仿真就绪套件可能对复杂场景的物理交互支持不够完善
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present Seed3D 2.0, an advanced 3D content generation system built on Seed3D 1.0, with substantial improvements across generation fidelity, simulation-ready capabilities, and application coverage. For geometry, a coarse-to-fine two-stage pipeline decouples global structure learning from high-frequency detail recovery, while a locality-aware VAE achieves higher spatial compression and more efficient decoding. For texture and material generation, we replace the cascaded pipeline of Seed3D 1.0 with a unified PBR model that directly generates multi-view albedo and metallic-roughness maps, enhanced by Mixture-of-Experts scaling and VLM-based semantic conditioning for improved material precision and visual fidelity. Beyond single-object generation, Seed3D 2.0 introduces a simulation-ready model suite comprising scene layout planning, part-aware decomposition, and training-free articulation generation, enabling coherent scene construction and part-level physical interaction across physics and graphics engines. A large-scale human preference study against five recent commercial models shows that Seed3D 2.0 achieves consistent win rates of 69.0% to 89.9% in textured 3D asset generation. Seed3D 2.0 is available on this https URL

自回归/流匹配生成 1 篇

InsightTok: Improving Text and Face Fidelity in Discrete Tokenization for Autoregressive Image Generation

High 2605.14333
Yang Yue, Fangyun Wei, Tianyu He, Jinjing Zhao, Zanlin Ni, Zeyu Liu, Jiayi Guo, Lei Shi et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过局部内容感知损失改进离散分词器，提升自回归图像生成中文本和面部保真度。
🎯研究动机

文本和面部是视觉生成中最具感知重要性的模式，但自回归生成器基于离散分词时，由于激进的下采样和量化，常丢失细粒度结构，导致可读字符和面部特征难以保持。

❓解决问题

标准离散分词器目标与文本可读性和面部保真度弱对齐，因为其通常优化通用重建而均匀压缩多样内容。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出标准离散分词器目标与文本可读性和面部保真度弱对齐，导致细粒度结构丢失。

🛠️主要方法

提出 InsightTok，通过局部内容感知损失增强文本和面部保真度，使用紧凑 16k 码本和 16x 下采样率。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在文本和面部重建上显著优于先前分词器，且不牺牲通用重建质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 InsightTok 框架，通过局部内容感知损失提升离散分词中文本和面部重建质量。
  • 在自回归图像生成中，InsightAR 展示了更清晰的文本和更忠实的面部细节。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对文本和面部优化，对其他类别效果未知。
  • 16k 码本和 16x 下采样率可能限制其他场景的泛化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text and faces are among the most perceptually salient and practically important patterns in visual generation, yet they remain challenging for autoregressive generators built on discrete tokenization. A central bottleneck is the tokenizer: aggressive downsampling and quantization often discard the fine-grained structures needed to preserve readable glyphs and distinctive facial features. We attribute this gap to standard discrete-tokenizer objectives being weakly aligned with text legibility and facial fidelity, as these objectives typically optimize generic reconstruction while compressing diverse content uniformly. To address this, we propose InsightTok, a simple yet effective discrete visual tokenization framework that enhances text and face fidelity through localized, content-aware perceptual losses. With a compact 16k codebook and a 16x downsampling rate, InsightTok significantly outperforms prior tokenizers in text and face reconstruction without compromising general reconstruction quality. These gains consistently transfer to autoregressive image generation in InsightAR, producing images with clearer text and more faithful facial details. Overall, our results highlight the potential of specialized supervision in tokenizer training for advancing discrete image generation.

数据集与基准 24 篇 · 6 个细分

Agent/工具使用评测 12 篇

Are Agents Ready to Teach? A Multi-Stage Benchmark for Real-World Teaching Workflows

High 2605.14322
Zixin Chen, Peng Liu, Rui Sheng, Haobo Li, Jianhong Tu, Xiaodong Deng, Kashun Shum, Dayiheng Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：EduAgentBench 是一个多阶段基准，用于评估语言代理在真实教学工作中的教学能力。
🎯研究动机

现有基准缺乏对语言代理在教学场景中综合能力的评估，而有效的教学代理需要诊断学习者状态、适应支持、做出基于教育证据的决策并在真实学习管理系统中执行干预。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个全面、理论基础的基准来评估语言代理在真实教学工作中的教学能力。

🔎现象分析

当前模型在有限的教学判断上表现尚可，但在情境化辅导和自主教学工作流执行方面仍达不到专业教学标准。

🛠️主要方法

构建了包含 150 个质量控制任务的 EduAgentBench，覆盖三个能力层面：专业教学判断、情境化多轮辅导和 Canvas 式教学工作流完成。任务通过教学洞察驱动的流程构建，并使用互补验证信号和人工评审进行评估。

📊实验结果

对多个前沿模型进行了全面评估，发现当前模型在情境化辅导和自主教学工作流执行方面仍达不到专业教学标准。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了第一个理论驱动且真实的基准 EduAgentBench，用于全面评估教学代理的教学能力。
  • 通过系统评估揭示了当前前沿模型在教学能力上的不足，为未来教学代理的开发提供了测量基础。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准任务可能无法覆盖所有教学场景。
  • 评估依赖于人工评审，可能引入主观偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Language agents are increasingly deployed in complex professional workflows, with tutoring emerging as a particularly high-stakes capability that remains largely unmeasured in existing benchmarks. Effective tutor agents require more than producing correct answers or executing accurate tool calls: a robust tutor must diagnose learner state, adapt support over time, make pedagogically justified decisions grounded in educational evidence, and execute interventions within realistic learning-management systems. We introduce EduAgentBench, a source-grounded benchmark for holistically evaluating tutor agents across the full scope of teaching work. It contains 150 quality-controlled tasks across three capability surfaces: professional pedagogical judgment, situated multi-turn tutoring, and Canvas-style teaching workflow completion. Tasks are constructed through a pedagogical-insight-driven pipeline and evaluated with complementary verification signals and human review. Across a comprehensive evaluation of frontier models, our findings reveal that current models are generally capable of bounded pedagogical judgment, but still fall short of professional teaching standards in situated tutoring and autonomous teaching-workflow execution. To our knowledge, EduAgentBench is the first theory-grounded and realistic benchmark for evaluating the holistic teaching capability of tutor agents, providing a measurement foundation for developing future tutor agents that can support realistic teaching work.

Herculean: An Agentic Benchmark for Financial Intelligence

High 2605.14355
Xueqing Peng, Zhuohan Xie, Yupeng Cao, Haohang Li, Lingfei Qian, Yan Wang, Vincent Jim Zhang, Huan He et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：首个面向金融智能体的技能型基准 Herculean，评估交易、对冲、市场洞察和审计四类工作流，发现现有智能体在对冲和审计等长程协调任务上表现不佳。
🎯研究动机

现有金融基准主要评估静态能力（如问答、检索），无法衡量 AI 智能体在真实金融工作流中的可靠性，而金融领域对高可靠性和长程协调有极高要求。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个能够全面评估 AI 智能体在复杂金融工作流中端到端执行能力的基准。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，前沿智能体在交易和市场洞察任务上表现相对较好，但在对冲和审计任务上严重不足，这些任务需要长程协调、状态一致性和结构化验证。

🛠️主要方法

构建 Herculean 基准，包含四个代表性金融工作流（交易、对冲、市场洞察、审计），每个工作流基于 MCP 协议标准化为技能环境，提供专用工具、交互动态、约束和成功标准。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及对前沿智能体进行了评估并给出了定性发现。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个面向金融智能体的技能型基准 Herculean，覆盖交易、对冲、市场洞察和审计四类工作流。
  • 通过标准化 MCP 环境实现异构智能体系统的一致端到端评估。
  • 揭示当前智能体在长程协调和结构化验证任务上的关键差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖四个工作流，可能无法完全代表金融领域的全部复杂性。
  • 未提供具体实验数据和对比结果，难以量化性能差距。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As AI agents improve, the central question is no longer whether they can solve isolated well-defined financial tasks, but whether they can reliably carry out financial professional work. Existing financial benchmarks offer only a partial view of this ability, as they primarily evaluate static competencies such as question answering, retrieval, summarization, and classification. We introduce Herculean, the first skilled benchmark for agentic financial intelligence spanning four representative workflows, including Trading, Hedging, Market Insights, and Auditing. Each workflow is instantiated as a standardized MCP-based skill environment with its own tools, interaction dynamics, constraints, and success criteria, enabling consistent end-to-end assessment of heterogeneous agent systems. Across frontier agents, we find agents perform relatively well on Trading and Market Insights, but struggle substantially on Hedging and Auditing, where long-horizon coordination, state consistency, and structured verification are critical. Overall, our results point to a key gap in current agents in turning financial reasoning into dependable workflow execution in high-stakes financial workflows.

SWE-Chain: Benchmarking Coding Agents on Chained Release-Level Package Upgrades

High 2605.14415
Man Ho Lam, Chaozheng Wang, Hange Liu, Jingyu Xiao, Haau-sing Li, Jen-tse Huang, Terry Yue Zhuo, Michael R. Lyu
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出 SWE-Chain 基准，评估编码智能体在链式包升级任务中的表现，发现现有智能体难以在不破坏已有功能的前提下完成连续升级。
🎯研究动机

现有基准多聚焦于孤立问题修复，缺乏对连续软件维护（如包版本升级）的评估，而实际开发中升级是链式且依赖先前代码的。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个能评估编码智能体在链式包升级任务中表现的基准，并揭示当前智能体的能力瓶颈。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

设计分治合成流水线，将发布说明与代码差异对齐，生成基于实际代码变更的升级需求，构建包含 12 条升级链、155 个版本转换和 1660 个需求的基准。

📊实验结果

在 9 个前沿智能体 - 模型配置上评估，平均解决率 44.8%，精确率 65.4%，F1 50.2%；Claude-Opus-4.7 (Claude Code) 最优，解决率 60.8%，精确率 80.6%，F1 68.5%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SWE-Chain 基准，用于评估编码智能体在链式包升级任务中的表现。
  • 设计分治合成流水线，自动生成基于实际代码变更的升级需求。
  • 通过实验揭示当前智能体在链式升级中的不足，并验证基准的可行性和区分度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅涵盖 9 个 Python 包，可能不具广泛代表性。
  • 未讨论智能体在更复杂或非 Python 语言上的表现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Coding agents powered by large language models are increasingly expected to perform realistic software maintenance tasks beyond isolated issue resolution. Existing benchmarks have shifted toward realistic software evolution, but they rarely capture continuous maintenance at the granularity of package releases, where changes are bundled, shipped, and inherited by subsequent versions. We present SWE-Chain, a benchmark for evaluating agents on chained release-level package upgrades, where each transition builds on the agent's prior codebase. To produce upgrade specifications, we design a divide-and-conquer synthesis pipeline that aligns release notes with code diffs for each version transition, ensuring the requirements are grounded in actual code changes, informative to agents, and feasible to implement. SWE-Chain contains 12 upgrade chains across 9 real Python packages, with 155 version transitions and 1,660 grounded upgrade requirements. Across nine frontier agent-model configurations, agents achieve an average of 44.8% resolving, 65.4% precision, and 50.2% F1 under the Build+Fix regime, with Claude-Opus-4.7 (Claude Code) leading at 60.8% resolving, 80.6% precision, and 68.5% F1. These results show that SWE-Chain is both feasible and discriminative, and reveal that current agents still struggle to make correct upgrades across chained package releases without breaking existing functionality.

Cattle Trade: A Multi-Agent Benchmark for LLM Bluffing, Bidding, and Bargaining

High 2605.14537
Robert Müller, Clemens Müller
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 Cattle Trade 多智能体基准，评估 LLM 在不完全信息、对抗交互和资源约束下的战略推理能力。
🎯研究动机

现有基准孤立测试 LLM 的谈判、出价、虚张声势等能力，缺乏在竞争性多智能体经济游戏中综合评估这些能力的基准。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个多智能体基准，以评估 LLM 在长期、不完全信息、对抗性经济游戏中整合多种战略推理能力（如出价、谈判、虚张声势、对手建模和资源分配）的表现。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析，但提到行为轨迹揭示了 LLM 的常见失败模式，如过度出价、自我出价、破产贸易挑战发起和弱对手状态适应。

🛠️主要方法

设计一个包含拍卖、隐藏报价贸易挑战、谈判、虚张声势、对手建模和资源分配的多智能体经济游戏基准，记录每步行为以进行细粒度分析。

📊实验结果

在 242 场游戏中评估了 7 个成本高效的语言模型和 3 个确定性代码智能体。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Cattle Trade 基准，综合评估 LLM 在竞争性多智能体经济游戏中的战略推理能力。
  • 通过 242 场游戏评估 7 个语言模型和 3 个确定性代码智能体，发现战略连贯性（如支出效率、资源纪律和阶段自适应出价）与排名强相关。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了成本高效的模型，未测试更大或更先进的 LLM。
  • 基准可能无法完全反映真实世界经济交互的复杂性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce \textsc{Cattle Trade, a multi-agent benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) as agents in strategic reasoning under imperfect information, adversarial interaction, and resource constraints. The benchmark combines auctions, hidden-offer trade challenges (TCs), bargaining, bluffing, opponent modeling, and resource allocation within a single long-horizon game lasting 50--60 turns. Unlike prior agent benchmarks that test these abilities in isolation, \textsc{Cattle Trade} evaluates whether agents integrate them across a competitive, multi-agent economic game with conflicting incentives. The benchmark logs every bid, TC offer, counteroffer, and card selection, enabling behavioural analysis beyond final scores or win rates. We evaluate seven cost-efficient language models and three deterministic code agents across 242 games. Strategic coherence, in particular spending efficiency, resource discipline, and phase-adaptive bidding, is associated with rank more strongly than spending volume or any single subskill. Two heuristic code agents outperform most tested LLMs, and behavioural traces surface recurring LLM failure modes including overbidding, self-bidding, bankrupt TC initiation, and weak opponent-state adaptation. Evaluating agentic competence requires benchmarks that test the joint deployment of multiple capabilities in multi-agent environments with conflicting incentives, uncertainty, and economic dynamics.

RxEval: A Prescription-Level Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Medication Recommendation

High 2605.14543
Shuhao Chen, Weisen Jiang, Changmiao Wang, Xiaoqing Wu, Xuanren Shi, Yu Zhang, James T. Kwok
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出处方级基准 RxEval，通过多选题评估 LLM 的用药推荐能力，发现现有模型表现有限。
🎯研究动机

现有住院用药推荐基准将任务简化为入院级预测，使用粗粒度药物代码和多热编码输入，无法反映真实处方中每个时间点的丰富信息，亟需更精细的评估方法。

❓解决问题

构建一个能真实反映临床处方决策的基准，评估 LLM 在具体时间点选择药物 - 剂量 - 途径三元组的能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

RxEval 基准：通过多选题形式，每个问题提供详细患者档案和时间顺序临床轨迹，要求从真实处方和通过推理链扰动生成的患者特定干扰项中选择正确的药物 - 剂量 - 途径三元组。

📊实验结果

在 16 个 LLM 上评估，F1 分数范围 45.18-77.10，最佳精确匹配 46.10%。错误分析显示前沿模型可能忽略患者信息且无法得出临床结论。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出处方级基准 RxEval，包含 1547 个问题，覆盖 584 名患者、18 个诊断类别和 969 种独特药物。
  • 评估 16 个 LLM，揭示模型在用药推荐任务上的挑战性和区分度，最佳精确匹配仅 46.10%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖住院场景，可能不适用于门诊或其他医疗环境。
  • 多选题形式可能无法完全模拟真实临床决策的开放性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Inpatient medication recommendation requires clinicians to repeatedly select specific medications, doses, and routes as a patient's condition evolves. Existing benchmarks formulate this task as admission-level prediction over coarse drug codes with multi-hot diagnostic and procedure code inputs, failing to capture the per-timepoint, information-rich nature of real prescribing. We propose RxEval, a prescription-level benchmark that evaluates LLM prescribing capability by multiple-choice questions: each question presents a detailed patient profile and time-ordered clinical trajectory, requiring selection of specific medication-dose-route triples from real prescriptions and patient-specific distractors generated via reasoning-chain perturbation. RxEval comprises 1,547 questions spanning 584 patients, 18 diagnostic categories, and 969 unique medications. Evaluation of 16 LLMs shows that RxEval is both challenging and discriminative: F1 ranges from 45.18 to 77.10 across models, and the best Exact Match is only 46.10%. Error analysis reveals that even frontier models may overlook stated patient information and fail to derive clinical conclusions.

$π$-Bench: Evaluating Proactive Personal Assistant Agents in Long-Horizon Workflows

High 2605.14678
Haoran Zhang, Luxin Xu, Zhilin Wang, Runquan Gui, Shunkai Zhang, Haodi Lei, Zihao He, Bingsu He et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出π-Bench 基准，评估个人助手在长时交互中的主动服务能力。
🎯研究动机

现有基准很少评估智能体在用户未明确表达需求时主动识别并行动的能力，尤其在多轮交互中需求逐渐浮现的场景。

❓解决问题

缺乏评估智能体在长时工作流中主动预测和满足用户隐藏意图的基准。

🔎现象分析

实验表明主动辅助仍然具有挑战性，任务完成与主动性之间存在明显区别，且先前交互对后续任务的主动意图解决有价值。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 100 个多轮任务、5 个领域用户画像的基准，融入隐藏用户意图、任务间依赖和跨会话连续性。

📊实验结果

在π-Bench 上评估了多个模型，显示主动辅助仍具挑战性，且任务完成与主动性有区别。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个评估主动辅助能力的基准π-Bench，包含隐藏意图和长时交互。
  • 通过实验揭示主动性与任务完成度的差异及先前交互的价值。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准规模有限（100 个任务），可能无法覆盖所有场景。
  • 未提供具体模型性能数据或对比基线。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rise of personal assistant agents, e.g., OpenClaw, highlights the growing potential of large language models to support users across everyday life and work. A core challenge in these settings is proactive assistance, since users often begin with underspecified requests and leave important needs, constraints, or preferences unstated. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate whether agents can identify and act on such hidden intents before they are explicitly stated, especially in sustained multi-turn interactions where user needs emerge gradually. To address this gap, we introduce $\pi$-Bench, a benchmark for proactive assistance comprising 100 multi-turn tasks across 5 domain-specific user personas. By incorporating hidden user intents, inter-task dependencies, and cross-session continuity, $\pi$-Bench evaluates agents' ability to anticipate and address user needs over extended interactions, jointly measuring proactivity and task completion in long-horizon trajectories that better reflect real-world use. Experiments show (1) proactive assistance remains challenging, (2) a clear distinction between task completion and proactivity, and (3) the value of prior interaction for proactive intent resolution in later tasks.

Video2GUI: Synthesizing Large-Scale Interaction Trajectories for Generalized GUI Agent Pretraining

High 2605.14747
Weimin Xiong, Shuhao Gu, Bowen Ye, Zihao Yue, Lei Li, Feifan Song, Sujian Li, Hao Tian
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：从无标注互联网视频自动提取 GUI 交互轨迹，构建大规模数据集 WildGUI，预训练后提升 GUI Agent 性能 5-20%。
🎯研究动机

现有 GUI Agent 数据集依赖昂贵人工标注且领域狭窄，缺乏大规模多样化训练数据，限制了泛化能力。

❓解决问题

如何从无标注互联网视频中自动提取结构化的 GUI 交互轨迹，以构建大规模、多应用覆盖的预训练数据集。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Video2GUI 框架，采用粗到细的过滤策略识别高质量 GUI 教程视频，并将其转换为结构化的 Agent 轨迹。

📊实验结果

在多个 GUI grounding 和 action benchmark 上评估，预训练后模型性能提升 5-20%，匹配或超越 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Video2GUI，一个从无标注互联网视频自动提取 GUI 交互轨迹的完全自动化框架。
  • 构建 WildGUI，包含 1200 万交互轨迹、覆盖 1500+ 应用和网站的大规模数据集。
  • 预训练 Qwen2.5-VL 和 Mimo-VL 在多个 GUI 基准上取得 5-20% 的持续改进，达到或超越 SOTA。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖视频质量，低质量或非 GUI 视频可能引入噪声。
  • 轨迹提取的准确性可能受视频内容多样性影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in multimodal large language models have driven growing interest in graphical user interface (GUI) agents, yet their generalization remains constrained by the scarcity of large-scale training data spanning diverse real-world applications. Existing datasets rely heavily on costly manual annotations and are typically confined to narrow domains. To address this challenge, we propose Video2GUI, a fully automated framework that extracts grounded GUI interaction trajectories directly from unlabeled Internet videos. Video2GUI employs a coarse-to-fine filtering strategy to identify high-quality GUI tutorial videos and convert them into structured agent trajectories. Applying this pipeline to 500 million video metadata entries, we construct WildGUI, a large-scale dataset containing 12 million interaction trajectories spanning over 1,500 applications and websites. Pre-training Qwen2.5-VL and Mimo-VL on WildGUI yields consistent improvements of 5-20% across multiple GUI grounding and action benchmarks, matching or surpassing state-of-the-art performance. We will release both the WildGUI dataset and the Video2GUI pipeline to support future research of GUI agents.

Holistic Evaluation and Failure Diagnosis of AI Agents

High 2605.14865
Netta Madvil, Gilad Dym, Alon Mecilati, Edo Dekel, Jonatan Liberman, Rotem Brazilay, Liron Schliesser, Max Svidlo et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种分层评估框架，将智能体失败诊断分解为独立跨度评估，在 TRAIL 基准上显著优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

当前 AI 智能体评估仅关注结果指标，无法解释失败原因；过程级方法难以将失败类型与长轨迹中的精确位置关联。

❓解决问题

如何对 AI 智能体的复杂多步执行过程进行细粒度、可解释的失败诊断和评估。

🔎现象分析

相同的前沿模型在框架内使用时，定位精度比作为整体评判器时高出数倍，表明评估方法论而非模型能力是瓶颈。

🛠️主要方法

提出分层评估框架，结合自上而下的智能体级诊断和自下而上的跨度级评估，将分析分解为独立的每跨度评估，可扩展到任意长度轨迹并生成跨度级理由。

📊实验结果

在 TRAIL 基准上评估，涵盖 GAIA 和 SWE-Bench，与多个基线对比，报告了类别 F1、定位精度和联合定位 - 分类精度的相对提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种分层智能体评估框架，实现细粒度失败诊断和定位
  • 在 TRAIL 基准上取得 GAIA 和 SWE-Bench 的 SOTA 结果，相对提升显著
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定基准，泛化性需进一步验证
  • 框架复杂度可能带来额外计算开销
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI agents execute complex multi-step processes, but current evaluation falls short: outcome metrics report success or failure without explaining why, and process-level approaches struggle to connect failure types to their precise locations within long, structured traces. We present a holistic agent evaluation framework that pairs top-down agent-level diagnosis with bottom-up span-level evaluation, decomposing analysis into independent per-span assessments. This decomposition scales to traces of arbitrary length and produces span-level rationales for each verdict. On the TRAIL benchmark, our framework achieves state-of-the-art results across all metrics on both GAIA and SWE-Bench, with relative gains over the strongest prior baselines of up to 38% on category F1, up to 3.5x on localization accuracy, and up to 12.5x on joint localization-categorization accuracy. Per-category analysis shows our framework leading in more error categories than any other evaluator. Notably, the same frontier model achieves several times higher localization accuracy when used inside our framework than as a monolithic judge over the full trace, showing that evaluation methodology, not model capability, is the bottleneck.

MemEye: A Visual-Centric Evaluation Framework for Multimodal Agent Memory

High 2605.15128
Minghao Guo, Qingyue Jiao, Zeru Shi, Yihao Quan, Boxuan Zhang, Danrui Li, Liwei Che, Wujiang Xu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 MemEye 框架，从视觉证据粒度和使用方式两个维度评估多模态智能体记忆，发现现有方法难以保留细粒度视觉细节和推理状态变化。
🎯研究动机

现有长期智能体记忆评估多依赖文本痕迹，忽略了视觉证据的保留和推理需求，且缺乏对动态视觉状态变化的测试。

❓解决问题

如何系统评估多模态智能体记忆在保留细粒度视觉证据和推理视觉状态变化方面的能力。

🔎现象分析

现有方法中许多视觉问题可通过文本痕迹回答，无需保留视觉证据；更难的视觉状态变化推理案例缺失。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MemEye 框架，从两个维度评估：视觉证据粒度（场景级到像素级）和证据使用方式（单一证据到演化综合）；构建包含 8 个生活场景任务的基准，并设计消融驱动的验证门来评估可回答性、捷径抵抗、视觉必要性和推理结构。

📊实验结果

在 13 种记忆方法和 4 种 VLM 骨干上进行评估，结果显示当前架构难以保留细粒度视觉细节和推理状态变化。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MemEye 评估框架，从视觉证据粒度和使用方式两个维度系统评估多模态智能体记忆。
  • 构建包含 8 个生活场景任务的基准，并设计消融驱动的验证门。
  • 评估 13 种记忆方法和 4 种 VLM 骨干，揭示当前架构在保留细粒度视觉细节和推理状态变化方面的不足。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖 8 个生活场景，可能无法完全代表所有多模态记忆任务。
  • 评估依赖特定 VLM 骨干，泛化性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Long-term agent memory is increasingly multimodal, yet existing evaluations rarely test whether agents preserve the visual evidence needed for later reasoning. In prior work, many visually grounded questions can be answered using only captions or textual traces, allowing answers to be inferred without preserving the fine-grained visual evidence. Meanwhile, harder cases that require reasoning over changing visual states are largely absent. Therefore, we introduce MemEye, a framework that evaluates memory capabilities from two dimensions: one measures the granularity of decisive visual evidence (from scene-level to pixel-level evidence), and the other measures how retrieved evidence must be used (from single evidence to evolutionary synthesis). Under this framework, we construct a new benchmark across 8 life-scenario tasks, with ablation-driven validation gates for assessing answerability, shortcut resistance, visual necessity, and reasoning structure. By evaluating 13 memory methods across 4 VLM backbones, we show that current architectures still struggle to preserve fine-grained visual details and reason about state changes over time. Our findings show that long-term multimodal memory depends on evidence routing, temporal tracking, and detail extraction.

FutureSim: Replaying World Events to Evaluate Adaptive Agents

High 2605.15188
Shashwat Goel, Nikhil Chandak, Arvindh Arun, Ameya Prabhu, Steffen Staab, Moritz Hardt, Maksym Andriushchenko, Jonas Geiping
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：FutureSim 通过回放真实世界事件来评估 AI 智能体在动态环境中的适应能力。
🎯研究动机

AI 智能体越来越多地部署在动态、开放的环境中，需要适应新信息，但现有基准难以高效衡量这种能力。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个真实、可控的模拟环境来评估智能体在长时间跨度内适应新信息的能力。

🔎现象分析

最佳智能体的准确率仅为 25%，许多智能体的 Brier 技能得分比不做预测还差，表明现有智能体在长期适应方面存在显著不足。

🛠️主要方法

构建 FutureSim 基准，通过按时间顺序回放真实新闻事件和问题，让智能体在模拟期间进行预测，并评估其表现。

📊实验结果

在 2026 年 1 月至 3 月的三个月期间评估了多个前沿智能体，最佳准确率为 25%，许多智能体表现不佳。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了 FutureSim，一个基于真实世界事件回放的基准，用于评估智能体的适应能力。
  • 通过实验揭示了前沿智能体在长期预测任务上的显著能力差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅覆盖三个月的时间跨度，可能不足以代表更长期的适应场景。
  • 依赖新闻文章和问题集，可能引入数据偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI agents are being increasingly deployed in dynamic, open-ended environments that require adapting to new information as it arrives. To efficiently measure this capability for realistic use-cases, we propose building grounded simulations that replay real-world events in the order they occurred. We build FutureSim, where agents forecast world events beyond their knowledge cutoff while interacting with a chronological replay of the world: real news articles arriving and questions resolving over the simulated period. We evaluate frontier agents in their native harness, testing their ability to predict world events over a three-month period from January to March 2026. FutureSim reveals a clear separation in their capabilities, with the best agent's accuracy being 25%, and many having worse Brier skill score than making no prediction at all. Through careful ablations, we show how FutureSim offers a realistic setting to study emerging research directions like long-horizon test-time adaptation, search, memory, and reasoning about uncertainty. Overall, we hope our benchmark design paves the way to measure AI progress on open-ended adaptation spanning long time-horizons in the real world.

Collider-Bench: Benchmarking AI Agents with Particle Physics Analysis Reproduction

High 2605.13950
Darius A. Faroughy, Sofia Palacios Schweitzer, Ian Pang, Siddharth Mishra-Sharma, David Shih
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 Collider-Bench 基准，评估 LLM 智能体复现 LHC 物理分析的能力，发现当前通用编码智能体均未可靠超越物理学家参与方案。
🎯研究动机

现有基准难以捕捉真实科学工作的复杂性和细微差别，而 LHC 分析复现因工具链近似和论文细节缺失而极具挑战，亟需一个能评估智能体物理推理和工具使用能力的基准。

❓解决问题

评估 LLM 智能体能否仅凭公开论文和开源软件，复现大型强子对撞机（LHC）的实验分析，生成可执行的模拟 - 选择流水线并预测碰撞事件产额。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 LHC 分析复现困难的原因：公开工具链仅近似实验协作组内部软件，且论文必然省略实现细节；智能体需依赖物理推理、领域知识和试错来填补这些空白。

🛠️主要方法

构建 Collider-Bench 基准，包含从 LHC 搜索中提取的任务，要求智能体将已发表分析转化为可执行流水线并提交预测结果；使用标准直方图指标提供连续保真度分数，并通过 LLM 评判器检查代码和会话记录以捕捉幻觉等失败模式。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Collider-Bench 基准，用于评估 LLM 智能体在复现 LHC 物理分析这一真实科学任务上的能力。
  • 发布初始任务集、容器化沙箱和事件模拟工具，并评估多种通用编码智能体，发现无智能体可靠超越物理学家参与方案。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准任务仅来自 LHC 搜索，可能不覆盖其他物理领域。
  • 评估依赖 LLM 评判器，其判断可能存在偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autonomous language-model agents are increasingly evaluated on long-horizon tool-use tasks, but existing benchmarks rarely capture the complexity and nuance of real scientific work. To address this gap, we introduce Collider-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating whether LLM agents can reproduce experimental analyses from the Large Hadron Collider (LHC) using only public papers and open scientific software. Such analyses are often difficult to reproduce because the public toolchain only approximates the software used internally by the experimental collaborations, while the published papers inevitably omit implementation details needed for a faithful reconstruction. Agents must therefore rely on physical reasoning, domain knowledge, and trial-and-error to fill these gaps. Each task requires the agent to turn a published analysis into an executable simulation-and-selection pipeline and submit predicted collision event yields in specified signal regions. These predictions are evaluated with standard histogram metrics that provide continuous fidelity scores without a hand-written rubric. We also report the computational cost incurred by each agent per task. Finally, we evaluate the codebase and full session trace using an LLM judge to catch qualitative failure modes such as fabrications, hallucinations and duplications. We release an initial set of tasks drawn from LHC searches, together with a containerized sandbox and event simulation tools. We evaluate across a capability ladder of general purpose coding agents. Our results show that on average no agent reliably beats the physicist-in-the-loop solution.

PolitNuggets: Benchmarking Agentic Discovery of Long-Tail Political Facts

High 2605.14002
Yifei Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出多语言长尾政治事实发现基准 PolitNuggets，评估智能体系统在分散信息源中合成细粒度事实的能力。
🎯研究动机

现有评估主要关注静态长上下文问答，缺乏对智能体系统在真实世界中从分散来源发现并合成长尾事实能力的评测。

❓解决问题

如何系统评估智能体系统在开放探索中从多源分散信息发现和合成细粒度政治事实的能力。

🔎现象分析

当前系统在细粒度细节上表现不佳，且效率差异显著；智能体性能与短上下文提取、多语言鲁棒性和可靠工具使用等底层能力相关。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 400 位全球精英、超过 10000 个政治事实的多语言基准 PolitNuggets，并设计基于证据条件的协议 FactNet 来评分发现、细粒度准确性和效率。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PolitNuggets，一个多语言长尾政治事实发现基准，覆盖 400 位全球精英和 10000+ 事实。
  • 设计 FactNet 评估协议，标准化智能体信息合成评测，涵盖发现、准确性和效率。
  • 通过诊断分析揭示智能体性能与底层模型能力（短上下文提取、多语言鲁棒性、工具使用）的关系。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖政治领域，可能不适用于其他长尾事实发现场景。
  • 评估协议依赖多智能体系统，可能引入额外复杂性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) embedded in agentic frameworks have transformed information retrieval from static, long context question answering into open-ended exploration. Yet real world use requires models to discover and synthesize "long-tail" facts from dispersed sources, a capability that remains under-evaluated. We introduce PolitNuggets, a multilingual benchmark for agentic information synthesis via constructing political biographies for 400 global elites, covering over 10000 political facts. We standardize evaluation with an optimized multi agent system and propose FactNet, an evidence conditional protocol that scores discovery, fine-grained accuracy, and efficiency. Across models and settings, we find that current systems often struggle with fine-grained details, and vary substantially in efficiency. Finally, using benchmark diagnostics, we relate agent performance to underlying model capabilities, highlighting the importance of short-context extraction, multilingual robustness, and reliable tool use.

数据集 (不含评测协议) 6 篇

NeuroAtlas: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Clinical EEG and Brain-Computer Interfaces

High 2605.14698
Konstantinos Kontras, Trui Osselaer, Stylianos G. Mouslech, Angeliki-Ilektra Karaiskou, Guido Gagliardi, Thomas Strypsteen, Mohammad Hossein Badiei, Anku Rani et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：NeuroAtlas 是迄今最大的 EEG 基准，评估了基础模型在临床 EEG 和 BCI 上的表现，发现 EEG 专用模型并不一致优于通用时间序列模型，且标准指标不足以评估临床效用。
🎯研究动机

基础模型在 EEG 领域的有效性尚不明确，现有评估在数据集、预处理和指标上存在差异，常掩盖临床相关性。

❓解决问题

缺乏统一、大规模、临床相关的 EEG 基准来系统评估基础模型。

🔎现象分析

EEG 专用基础模型并不一致优于通用时间序列模型；标准机器学习指标不足以评估临床效用；模型排名和性能在领域内变化很大。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 42 个数据集、26 万小时 EEG 数据的基准 NeuroAtlas，涵盖临床 EEG（癫痫、睡眠医学、脑龄估计）和 BCI，并引入定制临床评估指标。

📊实验结果

在 42 个数据集上评估了 EEG 基础模型和通用时间序列模型，并与监督基线对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了迄今最大的 EEG 基准 NeuroAtlas，包含 42 个数据集和 260k 小时数据。
  • 系统评估了 EEG 基础模型和通用时间序列模型，发现 EEG 专用模型并无一致优势。
  • 引入临床相关评估指标，揭示标准 ML 指标的不足。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供具体模型架构和训练细节。
  • 基准主要覆盖临床 EEG 和 BCI，可能不涵盖所有 EEG 应用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Foundation models (FMs) promise to extract unified representations that generalize across downstream tasks. They have emerged across fields, including electroencephalography (EEG), but it is less clear how effective they are in this particular field. Published evaluations differ in datasets, in the EEG-specific preprocessing that might influence reported results, and in the reported metrics, frequently obscuring the clinical relevance in EEG. We introduce NeuroAtlas, the largest EEG benchmark to date: 42 datasets and 260k hours covering clinical EEG (epilepsy, sleep medicine, brain age estimation) and brain-computer interfaces, and include multiple datasets per task along with bespoke clinical evaluation metrics. Besides evaluating EEG-FMs with respect to supervised baselines, we present results from generic time-series FMs. We report three findings. First, EEG-specific FMs do not consistently outperform time-series FMs, which have neither EEG-focused architectures nor been pretrained on EEG. Second, standard machine learning metrics are insufficient to assess clinical utility: thus, we thoroughly evaluate more appropriate measures such as the quality of event-level decision-making, hypnogram-derived features, and the brain-age gap in the domains of epilepsy, sleep, and brain age, respectively. Third, model rankings and performance can vary substantially within domains. We conclude that pretrained models perform largely on par, with only narrow advantages for a few, and that current models do not yet deliver on the promise of an out-of-the-box unified EEG model. NeuroAtlas exposes this gap and provides the datasets and metrics for the next generation of unified EEG FMs.

MathAtlas: A Benchmark for Autoformalization in the Wild

High 2605.14061
Nilay Patel, Noah Arias, Davit Babayan, Victoria Cochran, Timothy Libman, Hafsah Mahmood, Liam McCarty, Soli Munoz et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：MathAtlas 是首个大规模研究生级数学自动形式化基准，包含约 5.2 万条定理和数学依赖图，实验显示现有模型性能极低。
🎯研究动机

当前自动形式化基准主要集中于奥林匹克或本科数学，研究生及研究级数学尚未被充分探索，缺乏大规模、高难度的基准来推动该领域发展。

❓解决问题

构建一个大规模、高质量的研究生级数学自动形式化基准，并评估现有模型在真实世界数学文本上的表现。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出模型性能随依赖深度显著下降，且强基线在定理陈述上正确率仅 9.8%。

🛠️主要方法

从 103 本研究生数学教科书中提取约 5.2 万条定理、定义、练习、示例和证明，并构建包含约 17.8 万关系的数学依赖图。

📊实验结果

在 MathAtlas 上评估强基线，定理陈述正确率最高 9.8%，定义正确率最高 16.7%；在 MA-Hard 子集上最佳模型正确率仅 2.6%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个大规模研究生级数学自动形式化基准 MathAtlas，包含约 5.2 万条实体。
  • 首个包含数学依赖图的自动形式化基准，支持依赖感知的自动形式化系统评估。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅涵盖数学文本，未涉及其他领域的形式化。
  • 依赖图可能不完整，影响依赖感知系统的评估。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Current autoformalization benchmarks are largely focused on olympiad or undergraduate mathematics, while graduate and research-level mathematics remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce MathAtlas, the first large-scale autoformalization benchmark of in the wild graduate-level mathematics, containing ~52k theorems, definitions, exercises, examples, and proofs extracted from 103 graduate mathematics textbooks. MathAtlas is enriched with a mathematical dependency graph containing ~178k relations, and is the first autoformalization benchmark to include such relations, facilitating evaluation and development of dependency-aware autoformalization systems. Our extensive experiments show that MathAtlas is high quality but extremely challenging: strong baselines achieve at most 9.8% correctness on theorem statements and 16.7% on definitions. Furthermore, we find performance of state-of-the-art models degrades substantially with dependency depth: on MA-Hard, a subset of 700 entities with the deepest dependency trees, the best model achieves only 2.6% correctness for autoformalization on this challenging dataset. We release MathAtlas to the community as a benchmark set for large-scale autoformalization of graduate-level mathematics in the wild.

TERRA-CD: Multi-Temporal Framework for Multi-class and Semantic Change Detection

Medium 2605.14651
Omkar Oak, Rukmini Nazre, Rujuta Budke, Suraj Sawant
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 TERRA-CD 多时相遥感数据集，支持多类和语义变化检测，覆盖欧美 232 城市。
🎯研究动机

城市植被监测对理解环境变化至关重要，但缺乏全面数据集。

❓解决问题

现有数据集不足以支持多类和语义变化检测任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 5221 对 Sentinel-2 影像的数据集，提供 4 类土地覆盖、3 类植被变化和 13 类语义变化标注，并评估多种深度学习模型。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TERRA-CD 基准数据集，覆盖欧美 232 城市，含多类标注方案。
  • 系统评估多种变化检测方法在植被多类和语义变化检测上的表现。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅关注城市植被，泛化性有限。
  • 时间跨度仅 5 年，长期变化检测能力未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Urban vegetation monitoring plays a vital role in understanding environmental changes, yet comprehensive datasets for this purpose remain limited. To address this gap, we present the Temporal Remote-sensing Repository for Analyzing Change Detection (TERRA-CD), a benchmark dataset comprising 5,221 Sentinel-2 image pairs from 2019 and 2024, covering 232 cities across the USA and Europe. The dataset features three distinct annotation schemes: 4-class land cover mapping masks, 3-class vegetation change masks, and 13-class semantic change masks capturing all possible land cover transitions. Using various deep learning approaches including Siamese networks, STANet variants, Bi-SRNet, Changemask, Post-Classification Comparison, and HRSCD strategies, we evaluated the dataset's effectiveness for both vegetation Multi-class Change Detection as well as Semantic Change Detection. The proposed dataset and methods are available at this https URL .

A Benchmark for Early-stage Parkinson's Disease Detection from Speech

Medium 2605.14066
Terry Yi Zhong, Cristian Tejedor-Garcia, Khiet P. Truong, Janna Maas, Louis ten Bosch, Bastiaan R. Bloem
arXiv PDF eess.AS
TL;DR：首个面向早期帕金森病语音检测的标准化基准，提供可复现的评估框架与多维度分析。
🎯研究动机

早期帕金森病语音检测具有临床意义但研究不足，现有结果因数据集、语言、任务、评估协议和疾病定义不同而难以比较，亟需统一基准。

❓解决问题

缺乏标准化、可复现的早期帕金森病语音检测评估基准。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建首个语音早期帕金森病检测基准，包含说话人独立划分、三种常见语音任务、多种训练资源设置，并提供按数据集、聚合级别、性别和疾病阶段的多维评估分解。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个公开可用的早期帕金森病语音检测基准，支持公平可复现的跨方法评估。
  • 提供多维评估分解，为细粒度比较和临床采纳提供可复现参考与可行见解。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准可能未覆盖所有语言或方言。
  • 早期帕金森病的定义可能影响结果泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Early-stage Parkinson's disease (EarlyPD) detection from speech is clinically meaningful yet underexplored, and published results are hard to compare because studies differ in datasets, languages, tasks, evaluation protocols, and EarlyPD definitions. To address this issue, we propose the first benchmark for speech-based EarlyPD detection, with a speaker-independent split designed for fair and replicable cross-method evaluation on researcher-accessible datasets. The benchmark covers three common speech tasks and evaluates methods under different training-resource settings. We also present multi-dimensional evaluation breakdowns by dataset, aggregation level, gender, and disease stage to support fine-grained comparisons and clinical adoption. Our results provide a replicable reference and actionable insights, encouraging the adoption of this publicly available benchmark to advance robust and clinically meaningful EarlyPD detection from speech.

Unsteady Metrics and Benchmarking Cultures of AI Model Builders

Medium 2605.14164
Stefan Baack, Christo Buschek, Maty Bohacek
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：AI 模型发布者选择性高亮基准测试，导致评估碎片化且缺乏可比性，基准更多被用作市场叙事工具而非科学评估。
🎯研究动机

当前 AI 模型能力评估主要依赖公司博客和新闻稿中高亮的基准测试结果，但这些选择背后的动机和沟通策略缺乏系统研究，可能导致评估偏差和市场导向的叙事。

❓解决问题

分析 AI 模型发布者如何选择并利用基准测试来宣传模型能力，揭示评估碎片化、术语不一致以及基准作为叙事工具的现象。

🔎现象分析

63.2% 的高亮基准仅被单个构建者使用，38.5% 仅出现在一次发布中；不同构建者对同一基准赋予不同能力标签；'通用知识应用'等类别定义模糊，且常强调 STEM 科目。

🛠️主要方法

构建并开源 Benchmarking-Cultures-25 数据集，包含 2025 年 11 家主要 AI 构建者的 139 次模型发布中高亮的 231 个基准；开发统一分类法映射不同术语到共享测量信号框架；进行定性和定量分析。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了数据集构建和分析方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入并开源 Benchmarking-Cultures-25 数据集及交互式工具
  • 揭示基准测试选择的碎片化和低可比性现象
  • 提出统一分类法以解构不同构建者的能力宣称
  • 论证基准测试作为市场叙事工具而非科学评估的角色
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集仅覆盖 2025 年，可能不反映长期趋势
  • 分析依赖公开信息，可能遗漏内部评估实践
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The primary way to establish and compare competencies in foundation and generative AI models has shifted from peer-reviewed literature to press releases and company blog posts, where model builders highlight results on selected benchmarks. These artifacts now largely define the state of the art for researchers and the public. Despite their prominence, which benchmarks model builders choose to highlight, and what they communicate through this selection, is underexamined. To investigate, we introduce and open-source Benchmarking-Cultures-25, a dataset of 231 benchmarks highlighted across 139 model releases in 2025 from 11 major AI builders, alongside an interactive tool to explore the data. Our analysis reveals a fragmented evaluation landscape with limited cross-model comparability: 63.2% of highlighted benchmarks are used by a single builder, and 38.5% appear in just one release. Few achieve widespread use (e.g., GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench, AIME 2025). Moreover, benchmarks are attributed different competencies by different builders, depending on their narrative. To disentangle these conflicting presentations, we develop a unified taxonomy mapping diverging terminology to a shared framework of measured signals based on what benchmark authors claim to measure. "General knowledge application" is the second most popular, yet vaguely defined, category. Qualitative analysis shows many such benchmarks deemphasize construct validity, instead framing results as indicators of progress toward AGI. Their authors claim to measure knowledge or reasoning broadly, yet mostly evaluate STEM subjects (especially math). We argue that highlighted benchmarks function less as standardized measurement tools and more as flexible narrative devices prioritizing market positioning over scientific evaluation. Data: this https URL tool: this https URL .

The Moltbook Observatory Archive: an incremental dataset of agent-only social network activity

Medium 2605.13860
Sushant Gautam, Annika W. Olstad, Klas H. Pettersen, Michael A. Riegler
arXiv PDF cs.SI
TL;DR：首个大规模纯 AI 智能体社交网络数据集，记录 78 天活动，支持多智能体通信与安全研究。
🎯研究动机

现有社交网络数据集多包含人类行为，缺乏纯 AI 智能体交互的观测数据，难以研究多智能体通信、涌现社会行为及安全现象。

❓解决问题

构建并发布一个增量式、可复现的纯 AI 智能体社交网络活动数据集。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

通过持续轮询 Moltbook API，被动记录智能体档案、帖子、评论、社区元数据、平台级时间序列快照和词频趋势，数据存储于 SQLite 数据库并导出为按日期分区的 Parquet 文件。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个大规模纯 AI 智能体社交网络观测数据集，包含 78 天、260 万帖子、120 万评论、17.5 万智能体、6730 个社区。
  • 提供开源代码和 MIT 许可的数据集，支持可复现研究。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集仅覆盖 78 天，时间跨度有限。
  • 仅包含被动观测数据，缺乏对智能体内部机制的标注。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Moltbook is a social media platform in which posts and comments are authored exclusively by autonomous AI agents. We present the Moltbook Observatory Archive, an incremental dataset that passively records agent profiles, posts, comments, community metadata (``submolts''), platform-level time-series snapshots, and word-frequency trend aggregates obtained by continuously polling the Moltbook API. Data are stored in a live SQLite observatory database and exported as date-partitioned Parquet files to enable efficient analysis and reproducible research. The documented release covers 78~days of platform activity (2026-01-27 to 2026-04-14) and contains 2,615,098~posts and 1,213,007~comments from 175,886~unique posting agents across 6,730~communities. This is, to our knowledge, the first large-scale observational dataset of a social network populated exclusively by autonomous AI agents. The archive is intended to support research on multi-agent communication, emergent social behavior, and safety-relevant phenomena in agent-only online environments, and it is released under the MIT license with code for collection and export.

视觉理解基准 3 篇

ViMU: Benchmarking Video Metaphorical Understanding

High 2605.14607
Qi Li, Xinchao Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：ViMU 是首个系统评估视频隐喻理解的基准，测试模型超越字面感知、推断隐含意义的能力。
🎯研究动机

现有视频理解模型主要关注字面内容（如物体、动作），缺乏对视频中隐喻、讽刺、社会含义等隐含信息的系统理解能力，而这类理解对情感、态度和社会意义的传达至关重要。

❓解决问题

视频理解模型无法系统性地理解视频中的隐喻、反讽等隐含意义，缺乏相应的评估基准。

🔎现象分析

视频信息包含字面内容和隐含子文本，后者常通过语境、表达风格和社会经验传递，且不同文化背景理解差异大。

🛠️主要方法

构建 ViMU 基准，包含无提示的开放性和多项选择题，要求模型基于多模态证据推断隐含意义。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个系统评估视频隐喻理解的基准 ViMU
  • 设计无提示问题，确保模型在无关键证据泄露下进行隐含意义推断
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准覆盖的隐喻类型和文化背景可能有限
  • 未提及模型性能基线或对比结果
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Any new medium, once it emerges, is used for more than the transmission of overt content alone. The information it carries typically operates on two levels: one is the content directly presented, while the other is the subtext beneath it-the implicit ideas and intentions the creator seeks to convey through the medium. Likewise, since video technologies became widely adopted, video has served not only as a powerful tool for recording and communicating visual information, but also as a vehicle for emotions, attitudes, and social meanings that are often difficult to articulate explicitly. Thus, the true meaning of many videos does not reside solely in what is shown on screen; it is often embedded in context, style of expression, and the viewer's social experience. Some forms of such video subtext are humorous, while others carry irony, mockery, or criticism. These implicit meanings can also be interpreted very differently across cultural backgrounds and social groups. However, most existing video understanding models still focus primarily on literal visual comprehension, such as recognizing objects, actions, or temporal relations, and lack a systematic ability to understand the metaphorical, ironic, and social meanings embedded in videos. To bridge this gap, we introduce ViMU, the first benchmark designed to systematically evaluate the subtext understanding capabilities of frontier models in videos. ViMU assesses whether video understanding models can go beyond literal perception to infer implicit meaning while grounding their interpretations in multimodal evidence and answering both open-ended and multiple-choice questions. Importantly, all questions are designed to be hint-free, ensuring that no key evidence is disclosed to models before answering.

MechVerse: Evaluating Physical Motion Consistency in Video Generation Models

High 2605.14843
Rahul Jain, Mayank Patel, Asim Unmesh, Karthik Ramani
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 MechVerse 基准，系统评估视频生成模型在机械运动一致性上的不足。
🎯研究动机

现有视频生成模型虽在视觉保真度和时间连贯性上表现良好，但常生成违反运动学和几何约束的运动，尤其在机械装配场景中，需要精确的刚体运动、接触耦合和运动传递。

❓解决问题

视频生成模型缺乏对机械运动一致性的建模能力，无法保证生成视频中物体部件的运动符合物理约束。

🔎现象分析

模型在保持外观和流畅性的同时，生成的运动可能违反机械原理，如旋转本应平移的部件、变形刚性部件、破坏部件间耦合或未能驱动下游部件，且错误率随耦合复杂度增加而上升。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 21,156 个合成视频片段、1,357 个机械装配体、141 个类别的基准 MechVerse，按运动学复杂度分为独立关节、成对耦合、密集耦合多部件三个层级，每个片段配有结构化提示，并采用标准视频指标、指令遵循分数和人工判断进行评估。

📊实验结果

评估了闭源、开源和微调图像到视频模型，使用标准视频指标、指令遵循分数和人工判断。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MechVerse 基准，系统评估视频生成模型的机械运动一致性。
  • 揭示当前模型在机械运动约束下的失败模式，并随耦合复杂度增加错误率上升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅包含合成机械装配数据，未涉及真实世界复杂场景。
  • 未提供具体模型改进方法或训练策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text- and image-conditioned video generation models have achieved strong visual fidelity and temporal coherence, but they often fail to generate motion governed by kinematic and geometric constraints. In these settings, object parts must remain rigid, maintain contact or coupling with neighboring components, and transfer motion consistently across connected parts. These requirements are especially explicit in articulated mechanical assemblies, where motion is constrained by rigid-link geometry, contact/coupling relations, and transmission through kinematic chains. A generated video may therefore appear plausible while violating the intended mechanism, such as rotating a part that should translate, deforming a rigid component, breaking coupling between parts, or failing to move downstream components. To evaluate this gap, We introduce MechVerse, a benchmark for mechanically consistent image-to-video generation. MechVerse contains 21,156 synthetic clips from 1,357 mechanical assemblies across 141 categories, organized into three tiers of increasing kinematic complexity: independent articulation, pairwise coupling, and densely coupled multi-part mechanisms. Each clip is paired with a structured prompt describing part identities, stationary supports, moving components, motion primitives, direction, speed/extent, and inter-part dependencies. We evaluate proprietary, open-source, and fine-tuned image-to-video models using standard video metrics, instruction-following scores, and human judgments of motion correctness and kinematic coupling. Results show that current models can preserve appearance and smoothness while failing to generate mechanically admissible motion, with errors increasing as coupling complexity grows. MechVerse provides a benchmark for measuring and improving mechanism-aware video generation from image and language inputs.

CurveBench: A Benchmark for Exact Topological Reasoning over Nested Jordan Curves

High 2605.14068
Amirreza Mohseni, Mona Mohammadi, Morteza Saghafian, Naser Talebizadeh Saradari
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 CurveBench 基准测试，评估视觉模型对嵌套 Jordan 曲线的精确拓扑推理能力，发现最强模型准确率仅 71.1%（简单）和 19.1%（困难），微调后仍有巨大差距。
🎯研究动机

视觉模型在精确拓扑推理方面能力不足，现有基准缺乏对层次化拓扑结构的系统评估，需要构建专门基准来推动该方向研究。

❓解决问题

视觉模型无法从图像中精确恢复由非相交 Jordan 曲线诱导的嵌套包含关系树。

🔎现象分析

即使视觉上简单的曲线嵌套任务，最强模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro）在简单集上准确率仅 71.1%，困难集上仅 19.1%；微调后 Qwen3-VL-8B 从 2.8% 提升至 33.3%，但仍远未解决。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 756 张图像的 CurveBench 基准，涵盖五种配置（简单、多边形、地形、迷宫、密集计数），每张图像标注根树表示区域包含关系；任务为结构化预测，要求模型输出完整包含树。

📊实验结果

评估了多个模型（包括 Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.4、Claude Opus 4.5、Qwen3-VL-8B 等），在 CurveBench-Easy 和 CurveBench-Hard 上报告树生成准确率；微调实验显示 Qwen3-VL-8B 从 2.8% 提升至 33.3%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CurveBench，首个专门用于视觉层次化拓扑推理的基准，包含 756 张图像和五种难度配置。
  • 系统评估多个视觉语言模型，揭示精确拓扑推理的巨大挑战。
  • 通过 RLVR 微调开源 VLM，在简单集上显著提升准确率（从 2.8% 到 33.3%），但仍远未解决。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖 Jordan 曲线，未涉及更复杂的拓扑结构（如自交曲线、三维曲面）。
  • 微调模型在困难集上提升有限，表明现有方法难以泛化到复杂拓扑推理。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce CurveBench, a benchmark for hierarchical topological reasoning from visual input. CurveBench consists of \textbf{756 images} of pairwise non-intersecting Jordan curves across easy, polygonal, topographic-inspired, maze-like, and dense counting configurations. Each image is annotated with a rooted tree encoding the containment relations between planar regions. We formulate the task as structured prediction: given an image, a model must recover the full rooted containment tree induced by the curves. Despite the visual simplicity of the task, the strongest evaluated model, Gemini 3.1 Pro, achieves only \textbf{71.1\%} tree-generation accuracy on CurveBench-Easy and \textbf{19.1\%} on CurveBench-Hard. We further demonstrate benchmark utility through RLVR-style fine-tuning of open-weight vision-language models. Our trained Qwen3-VL-8B model improves over \texttt{Qwen-3-VL-8B-Thinking} from \textbf{2.8\%} to \textbf{33.3\%} tree-generation accuracy on CurveBench-Easy, exceeding GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.5 under our evaluation protocol. The remaining gap, especially on CurveBench-Hard, shows that exact topology-aware visual reasoning remains far from solved.

安全/对齐评测 1 篇

Deepchecks: Evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

Medium 2605.14488
Assaf Gerner, Netta Madvil, Nadav Barak, Alex Zaikman, Jonatan Liberman, Liron Hamra, Rotem Brazilay, Shay Tsadok et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：Deepchecks 是一个专为评估 RAG 系统设计的综合框架，通过多维度评估、根因分析和生产监控来确保系统可靠性。
🎯研究动机

RAG 系统在多个领域广泛应用，但由于生成输出的随机性和检索与生成组件间的复杂交互，其评估面临巨大挑战。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个全面、系统化的框架来评估 RAG 系统的可靠性、相关性和用户满意度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Deepchecks 框架，采用多维度评估、根因分析和生产监控的方法。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了一个专门用于评估 RAG 应用的综合框架 Deepchecks。
  • 通过多维度评估、根因分析和生产监控，确保 RAG 系统与应用需求对齐。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能缺乏对特定领域（如医疗、金融）的定制化评估指标。
  • 根因分析的准确性和效率可能依赖于框架的实现细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) augmented with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques are revolutionizing applications across multiple domains, such as healthcare, finance, and customer service. Despite their potential, evaluating RAG systems remains a complex challenge due to the stochastic nature of generated outputs and the intricate interplay between retrieval and generation components. This paper introduces Deepchecks, a comprehensive framework tailored for evaluating RAG applications. Deepchecks' evaluation framework addresses RAG applications evaluation through a multi-faceted approach, root cause analysis and production monitoring. By ensuring alignment with application-specific requirements, Deepchecks framework provides a robust foundation for assessing reliability, relevance, and user satisfaction in RAG systems.

推理与数学评测 1 篇

XDomainBench: Diagnosing Reasoning Collapse in High-Dimensional Scientific Knowledge Composition

High 2605.14754
Gong Zhiren, Tiantong Wu, Jiaming Zhang, Fuyao Zhang, Che Wang, Yurong Hao, Yikun Hou, Foo Ping et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 XDomainBench 基准，诊断 LLM 在高维科学知识组合中的推理崩溃现象。
🎯研究动机

现有基准主要关注单轮受限场景，无法捕捉真实交互式科学工作流中 LLM 的能力边界，亟需系统性诊断工具。

❓解决问题

LLM 在跨学科科学知识组合推理中表现出的系统性推理崩溃问题。

🔎现象分析

随着组合阶数增加，LLM 出现系统性推理崩溃，根源包括：领域组合导致的直接难度增加，以及轨迹模式触发的错误累积、推理中断和领域混淆等间接交互放大失败。

🛠️主要方法

构建 XDomainBench 基准，形式化组合顺序和混合结构，包含 8598 个交互会话、20 个领域、4 类任务和 8 种真实轨迹模式，实现从单学科到跨学科的系统压力测试。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 XDomainBench，首个针对交互式跨学科科学推理的诊断基准。
  • 大规模评估揭示 LLM 在科学知识组合中的推理崩溃现象及其两个根本原因。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准覆盖 20 个领域，可能未涵盖所有科学领域。
  • 仅评估 LLM，未涉及其他模型类型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for knowledge synthesis, yet their capacity for compositional generalization in scientific knowledge remains under-characterized. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on single-turn restricted scenarios, failing to capture the capability boundaries exposed by real-world interactive scientific workflows. To address this, we introduce XDomainBench, a diagnostic benchmark for interactive interdisciplinary scientific reasoning. We formalize the composition order and mixture structure to enable systematic stress-testing from single-discipline to inter-disciplinary, comprising 8,598 interactive sessions across 20 domains and 4 task categories, with 8 realistic trajectory patterns covering difficulty and domain-mixture dynamics, simulating real AI4S scenarios. Large-scale evaluation of LLMs reveals a systematic reasoning collapse as composition order increases, stemming from two root causes: (i) direct difficulty increases induced by domain composition, and (ii) indirect interaction-amplified failures where trajectory patterns trigger error accumulation, reasoning breaks, and domain confusion, ultimately leading to session collapse.

通用 VLM/MLLM 评测 1 篇

MemLens: Benchmarking Multimodal Long-Term Memory in Large Vision-Language Models

High 2605.14906
Xiyu Ren, Zhaowei Wang, Yiming Du, Zhongwei Xie, Chi Liu, Xinlin Yang, Haoyue Feng, Wenjun Pan et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：MemLens 是首个系统比较长上下文 LVLM 与记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中记忆能力的基准，发现两者各有优劣，需混合架构。
🎯研究动机

现有基准缺乏对长上下文 LVLM 和记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中记忆能力的系统比较，而真实场景需要多模态证据支持。

❓解决问题

如何系统评估和比较长上下文 LVLM 与记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中的记忆能力。

🔎现象分析

长上下文 LVLM 在短上下文中准确率高但随对话增长性能下降；记忆增强智能体性能稳定但存储压缩导致视觉保真度损失；多会话推理能力普遍低于 30%。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 789 个问题、覆盖 5 种记忆能力和 4 种上下文长度的基准 MEMLENS，采用跨模态 token 计数方案，并通过图像消融实验验证视觉证据的必要性。

📊实验结果

评估了 27 个 LVLM 和 7 个记忆增强智能体，图像消融实验显示移除证据图像后前沿 LVLM 准确率降至 2% 以下。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个系统比较长上下文 LVLM 与记忆增强智能体在多模态多轮对话中记忆能力的基准 MEMLENS。
  • 通过大规模实验揭示两类方法的互补性，并指出混合架构的必要性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖四种上下文长度，可能未涵盖更长上下文场景。
  • 未深入分析混合架构的具体实现方式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Memory is essential for large vision-language models (LVLMs) to handle long, multimodal interactions, with two method directions providing this capability: long-context LVLMs and memory-augmented agents. However, no existing benchmark conducts a systematic comparison of the two on questions that genuinely require multimodal evidence. To close this gap, we introduce MEMLENS, a comprehensive benchmark for memory in multimodal multi-session conversations, comprising 789 questions across five memory abilities (information extraction, multi-session reasoning, temporal reasoning, knowledge update, and answer refusal) at four standard context lengths (32K-256K tokens) under a cross-modal token-counting scheme. An image-ablation study confirms that solving MEMLENS requires visual evidence: removing evidence images drops two frontier LVLMs below 2% accuracy on the 80.4% of questions whose evidence includes images. Evaluating 27 LVLMs and 7 memory-augmented agents, we find that long-context LVLMs achieve high short-context accuracy through direct visual grounding but degrade as conversations grow, whereas memory agents are length-stable but lose visual fidelity under storage-time compression. Multi-session reasoning caps most systems below 30%, and neither approach alone solves the task.
