These results motivate hybrid architectures that combine long-context attention with structured multimodal retrieval. Our code is available at this https URL .

强化学习 23 篇 · 6 个细分

应用型 RL 13 篇

AIS: Adaptive Importance Sampling for Quantized RL

High 2605.13907
Jiajun Zhou, Wei Shao, Lingchao Zheng, Yuwei Fan, Ngai Wong
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：提出自适应重要性采样（AIS）来修正量化 RL 中低精度 rollout 与高精度训练之间的非平稳偏差，在保持 FP8 加速的同时匹配 BF16 基线性能。
🎯研究动机

LLM 的 RL 训练中，rollout 生成成本高昂，低精度（如 FP8）rollout 可提升吞吐量并降低内存压力，但会引入 rollout- 训练不匹配，导致策略梯度有偏，甚至训练崩溃。

❓解决问题

量化 RL 中低精度 rollout 与高精度训练之间的非平稳偏差，该偏差早期提供探索红利但后期变为不稳定偏置源。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出不匹配是非平稳的，早期作为随机探索奖励，暴露梯度给训练器欠采样的轨迹，但策略集中后转变为不稳定偏置源。

🛠️主要方法

提出自适应重要性采样（AIS），结合权重可靠性、散度严重性和方差放大三个实时诊断，生成混合系数在未校正和完全重要性加权梯度之间插值，抑制不稳定偏置同时保留探索收益。

📊实验结果

在 GRPO 框架中集成 AIS，在扩散模型 LLaDA-8B-Instruct 和自回归模型 Qwen3-8B、Qwen3.5-9B 上评估数学推理和规划基准，AIS 在大多数任务上匹配 BF16 基线，同时保持 FP8 的 1.5-2.76 倍 rollout 加速。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别并分析了量化 RL 中 rollout- 训练不匹配的非平稳双刃剑特性
  • 提出 AIS 框架，通过自适应混合系数动态校正偏差，无需额外训练开销
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了 FP8 量化，其他低精度格式未测试
  • AIS 的混合系数计算可能引入额外计算开销，摘要未提及效率对比
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models (LLMs) is dominated by the cost of rollout generation, which has motivated the use of low-precision rollouts (e.g., FP8) paired with a BF16 trainer to improve throughput and reduce memory pressure. This introduces a rollout-training mismatch that biases the policy gradient and can cause training to collapse outright on reasoning benchmarks. We show that the mismatch is non-stationary and acts as a double-edged sword: early in training it provides a stochastic exploration bonus, exposing the gradient to trajectories the trainer would otherwise under-sample, but the same perturbation transitions into a destabilizing source of bias as the policy concentrates. To solve this, we propose Adaptive Importance Sampling (AIS), a correction framework that adjusts the strength of its intervention on a per-batch basis. AIS combines three real-time diagnostics, namely weight reliability, divergence severity, and variance amplification, into a single mixing coefficient that interpolates between the uncorrected and fully importance-weighted gradients, suppressing the destabilizing component of the mismatch while preserving its exploratory benefit. We integrate AIS into GRPO and evaluate it on the diffusion-based LLaDA-8B-Instruct and the autoregressive Qwen3-8B and Qwen3.5-9B across mathematical reasoning and planning benchmarks. AIS matches the BF16 baseline on most tasks while retaining the 1.5 to 2.76x rollout speedup of FP8.

Action-Conditioned Risk Gating for Safety-Critical Control under Partial Observability

Medium 2605.14246
Yushen Liu, Yin-Jen Chen, Ziyi Chen, Tao Wang, Heng Huang, Xugui Zhou, Yanfu Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出动作条件风险门控方法，在部分可观测下实现轻量级风险敏感控制。
🎯研究动机

安全关键控制问题常建模为风险敏感 POMDP，但信念空间规划计算成本高且对模型规范敏感，实际应用中难以部署。

❓解决问题

如何在部分可观测环境中高效近似风险敏感 POMDP 控制，平衡任务性能与安全风险。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建紧凑有限历史代理状态，学习动作条件的短期安全违规预测器；将预测风险作为价值学习中的惩罚项，并在决策时作为门控机制，在乐观与保守的集成价值估计之间插值。

📊实验结果

在自动血糖调节（成人和青少年队列）和安全导航（Safety-Gym）基准上评估，与信念空间规划基线和标准安全 RL 基线对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出动作条件风险门控的轻量级强化学习近似方法，用于部分可观测下的风险敏感控制。
  • 在自动血糖调节和安全导航两个安全关键领域验证了方法有效性，改善了血糖控制权衡并大幅降低运行时，同时实现了更优的奖励 - 成本平衡。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖有限历史代理状态，可能无法捕捉长期依赖。
  • 风险预测器的准确性可能影响门控效果，在复杂环境中需要更多调参。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Many safety-critical control problems are modeled as risk-sensitive partially observable Markov decision processes, where the controller must make decisions from incomplete observations while balancing task performance against safety risk. Although belief-space planning provides a principled solution, maintaining and planning over beliefs can be computationally costly and sensitive to model specification in practical domains. We propose a lightweight risk-gated reinforcement learning approximation for risk-sensitive control under partial observability. The method constructs a compact finite-history proxy state and learns an action-conditioned predictor of near-term safety violation. This predicted candidate-action risk is used in two complementary ways: as a risk penalty during value learning, and as a decision-time gate that interpolates between optimistic and conservative ensemble value estimates. As a result, low-risk actions are evaluated closer to reward-seeking estimates, while high-risk actions are evaluated more conservatively. We evaluate the approach in two safety-critical partially observable domains: automated glucose regulation and safety-constrained navigation. Across adult and adolescent glucose-control cohorts, the method improves overall glycemic tradeoffs and substantially reduces runtime relative to a belief-space planning baseline. On Safety-Gym navigation benchmarks, it achieves a more favorable reward-cost balance than unconstrained RL and several standard safe-RL baselines. These results suggest that action-conditioned near-term risk can provide an effective local signal for approximate risk-sensitive POMDP control when full belief-space planning is impractical.

Heuristic Pathologies and Further Variance Reduction via Uncertainty Propagation in the AIVAT Family of Techniques

Medium 2605.14261
Juho Kim, Tuomas Sandholm
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：AIVAT 族方差缩减技术中启发式价值函数的选择可能导致病态低方差或 p-hacking，通过不确定性传播可进一步减少所需样本量。
🎯研究动机

在多智能体环境中评估智能体性能时，样本有限或试验成本高，需要低方差无偏估计器；现有 AIVAT 技术缺乏对启发式价值函数选择的约束和不确定性处理指南。

❓解决问题

AIVAT 族技术中启发式价值函数的选择可能被操纵（如梯度下降导致病态低方差或 p-hacking），且其不确定性未被量化。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：a) 对样本方差直接应用梯度下降可导致病态低方差；b) 通过梯度上升 / 下降测试统计量可进行 p-hacking。

🛠️主要方法

参数化启发式价值函数以暴露漏洞，并传播启发式不确定性以量化 AIVAT 估计的不确定性，进而通过逆方差加权平均进一步降方差。

📊实验结果

使用 10,000 手扑克牌数据集，不确定性传播方法使所需样本量减少 43.0%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了 AIVAT 中启发式价值函数可能被操纵导致病态低方差或 p-hacking，强调应在评估数据前固定启发式函数。
  • 提出通过不确定性传播量化 AIVAT 估计的不确定性，并利用逆方差加权平均进一步减少方差（以牺牲无偏性为代价）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 逆方差加权平均可能牺牲 AIVAT 的无偏性保证。
  • 实验仅基于扑克牌数据集，泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

How should an agent's performance in a multiagent environment be evaluated when there is a limited sample size or a high cost of running a trial? The AIVAT family of variance reduction techniques was proposed to address this challenge by introducing unbiased low-variance estimators of agents' expected payoffs. An important component of AIVAT is a heuristic value function that discriminates between potentially low- and high-value counterfactual histories. A notable gap in the literature is that there is little to no constraint or guideline on how the heuristic value function should be chosen or how uncertainty in its output should be handled. In our first contribution, we parameterize the heuristic value function to highlight AIVAT's potential vulnerabilities: a) the sample variance can be set pathologically low by directly applying gradient descent on the sample variance, and b) one can p-hack to draw a desired statistical conclusion via gradient descent/ascent on the test statistic. The main takeaway is that the heuristic value function should be fixed prior to observing the evaluation data! In our second contribution, we show how the heuristic uncertainty can be propagated to quantify the uncertainty of AIVAT estimates. It is then possible to further reduce the variance using inverse-variance weighted averaging, but AIVAT's unbiasedness guarantee may have to be sacrificed. In our experiments, we use a dataset of 10,000 poker hands to demonstrate our heuristic pathology and uncertainty results, with the latter yielding a 43.0% reduction in the number of samples (poker hands) needed to draw statistical conclusions.

Policy Optimization in Hybrid Discrete-Continuous Action Spaces via Mixed Gradients

Medium 2605.14297
Matias Alvo, Daniel Russo, Yash Kanoria
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出混合梯度策略优化方法 HPO，结合路径梯度和得分函数梯度，解决混合离散 - 连续动作空间中的信用分配问题。
🎯研究动机

混合离散 - 连续动作空间在机器人、控制和运筹学中普遍存在，但标准无模型策略梯度方法在高维连续动作下存在严重的信用分配问题，而可微模拟器在离散动作或非光滑动力学下会产生有偏或信息量不足的梯度。

❓解决问题

如何在高维混合离散 - 连续动作空间中实现高效、无偏的策略优化。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出混合策略优化（HPO），通过混合梯度估计器结合路径梯度（通过可微模拟器反向传播）和得分函数梯度，在平滑区域保持无偏性；同时将动作不连续问题重新表述为混合形式以扩展适用性。

📊实验结果

在库存控制和切换线性二次调节器问题上，HPO 显著优于 PPO，且性能差距随连续动作维度增加而扩大。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 HPO 算法，在混合离散 - 连续动作空间中结合路径梯度和得分函数梯度，实现无偏且高效的策略优化。
  • 理论分析表明混合梯度的交叉项在离散最优响应附近可忽略，从而允许近似解耦更新，降低方差。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖可微模拟器，在完全不可微的环境中可能受限。
  • 理论分析仅针对离散最优响应附近，一般情况下的收敛性未充分讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study reinforcement learning in hybrid discrete-continuous action spaces, such as settings where the discrete component selects a regime (or index) and the continuous component optimizes within it -- a structure common in robotics, control, and operations problems. Standard model-free policy gradient methods rely on score-function (SF) estimators and suffer from severe credit-assignment issues in high-dimensional settings, leading to poor gradient quality. On the other hand, differentiable simulation largely sidesteps these issues by backpropagating through a simulator, but the presence of discrete actions or non-smooth dynamics yields biased or uninformative gradients. To address this, we propose Hybrid Policy Optimization (HPO), which backpropagates through the simulator wherever smoothness permits, using a mixed gradient estimator that combines pathwise and SF gradients while maintaining unbiasedness. We also show how problems with action discontinuities can be reformulated in hybrid form, further broadening its applicability. Empirically, HPO substantially outperforms PPO on inventory control and switched linear-quadratic regulator problems, with performance gaps increasing as the continuous action dimension grows. Finally, we characterize the structure of the mixed gradient, showing that its cross term -- which captures how continuous actions influence future discrete decisions -- becomes negligible near a discrete best response, thereby enabling approximate decentralized updates of the continuous and discrete components and reducing variance near optimality. All resources are available at this http URL .

A Unified Knowledge Embedded Reinforcement Learning-based Framework for Generalized Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problems

Medium 2605.14416
Wen Wang, Xiangchen Wu, Liang Wang, Hao Hu, Xianping Tao
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出知识嵌入的强化学习框架，通过分解 CVRP 为路径优先 - 聚类次优子问题并利用动态规划引导 RL 求解，显著提升解质量和泛化性。
🎯研究动机

现实 CVRP 常涉及多样目标和复杂约束，现有 RL 方法依赖端到端学习，缺乏显式问题求解知识，解质量有限。

❓解决问题

如何将领域知识有效嵌入 RL 框架，以统一求解多种带约束的 CVRP 变体并提升解质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

受 Route-First Cluster-Second 启发，将 CVRP 分解为路径优先和聚类次优子问题；用 RL 求解路径优先子问题，动态规划求解聚类次优子问题并反馈引导 RL；引入统一的历史增强上下文处理模块缓解部分可观测性。

📊实验结果

在多种 CVRP 变体上对比 SOTA 学习方法，解质量更优且与经典启发式差距更小。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出知识嵌入的 RL 框架，通过两级知识分解和动态规划引导提升 CVRP 求解质量。
  • 设计历史增强上下文处理模块，缓解问题分解导致的部分可观测性。
  • 实验表明框架在多种 CVRP 变体上优于现有学习方法，泛化性强。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖动态规划子问题的精确求解效率。
  • 框架复杂度较高，大规模实例下计算开销需进一步评估。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) is a fundamental NP-hard problem with broad applications in logistics and transportation. Real-world CVRPs often involve diverse objectives and complex constraints, such as time windows or backhaul requirements, motivating the development of a unified solution framework. Recent reinforcement learning (RL) approaches have shown promise in combinatorial optimization, yet they rely on end-to-end learning and lack explicit problem-solving knowledge, limiting solution quality. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-embedded framework inspired by the Route-First Cluster-Second heuristics. It incorporates knowledge at two levels: (1) decomposing CVRPs into the route-first and cluster-second subproblems, and (2) leveraging dynamic programming to solve the second subproblem, whose results guide the RL-based constructive solver to solve the first problem. To mitigate partial observability caused by problem decomposition, we introduce a unified history-enhanced context processing module. Extensive experiments show that this framework achieves superior solution quality compared with state-of-the-art learning-based methods, with a smaller gap to classical heuristics, demonstrating strong generalization across diverse CVRP variants.

Collaborative Yet Personalized Policy Training: Single-Timescale Federated Actor-Critic

Medium 2605.14423
Leo Muxing Wang, Pengkun Yang, Lili Su
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种单时间尺度联邦演员 - 评论员算法，在异构环境中实现个性化策略训练并证明线性加速收敛。
🎯研究动机

现有联邦强化学习方法要么忽略环境异构性，要么放弃个性化训练单一共享策略，无法兼顾协作与个性化需求。

❓解决问题

如何在异构环境中通过联邦学习协作训练个性化策略，同时保证收敛速度和理论保证。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出联邦演员 - 评论员框架，代理共享线性子空间表示但保留个性化策略组件，采用单时间尺度更新和马尔可夫采样，通过联合线性近似框架分析收敛性。

📊实验结果

在 Hopper-v5 动作映射异构性环境下进行实验，显示所提框架优于 Single PPO 和 FedAvg PPO，并展示从学习到的共享主干的下游迁移能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在单时间尺度联邦演员 - 评论员算法中建立有限时间收敛保证，证明评论员误差和策略梯度范数收敛速率，并实现关于代理数量的线性加速。
  • 开发了针对投影子空间更新和 QR 分解步骤的扰动分析，以及异构马尔可夫噪声的条件混合论证。
  • 通过 PPO 实例化框架，在 Hopper-v5 动作映射异构性上展示优于 Single PPO 和 FedAvg PPO 的性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析依赖于线性子空间假设，可能不适用于高度非线性的策略表示。
  • 实验仅在单一环境（Hopper-v5）上验证，泛化性有待进一步评估。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Despite the popularity of the actor-critic method and the practical needs of collaborative policy training, existing works typically either overlook environmental heterogeneity or give up personalization altogether by training a single shared policy across all agents. We consider a federated actor-critic framework in which agents share a common linear subspace representation while maintaining personalized local policy components, and agents iteratively estimate the common subspace, local critic heads, and local policies (i.e., actors). Under canonical single-timescale updates with Markovian sampling, we establish finite-time convergence via a novel joint linear approximation framework. Specifically, we show that the critic error converges to zero at the rate of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/((1-\gamma)^4\sqrt{TK}))$, and the policy gradient norm converges to zero at the rate of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/((1-\gamma)^6\sqrt{TK}))$, where $T$ is the number of rounds, $K$ is the number of agents, and $\gamma\in (0,1)$ is the discount factor. These results demonstrate linear speedup with respect to the number of agents $K$, despite heterogeneous Markovian trajectories under distinct transition kernels and coupled learning dynamics. To address these challenges, we develop a new perturbation analysis for the projected subspace updates and QR decomposition steps, together with conditional mixing arguments for heterogeneous Markovian noise. Furthermore, to handle the additional complications induced by policy updates and temporal dependence, we establish fine-grained characterizations of the discrepancies between function evaluations under Markovian sampling and under temporally frozen policies. Experiments instantiate the framework within PPO on federated \texttt{Hopper-v5} action-map heterogeneity, showing gains over Single PPO and FedAvg PPO and downstream transfer from the learned shared trunk.

Synthesizing POMDP Policies: Sampling Meets Model-checking via Learning

Medium 2605.14440
Debraj Chakraborty, Anirban Majumdar, Prince Mathew, Sayan Mukherjee, Jean-François Raskin
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种结合采样、自动机学习和模型检验的 POMDP 策略综合框架，在保持可扩展性的同时提供形式化保证。
🎯研究动机

POMDP 是决策制定的标准框架，但采样方法缺乏形式化保证，不适合安全关键应用；而形式化综合方法可扩展性差，且一般 POMDP 综合不可判定。需要一种兼顾可扩展性和形式化保证的方法。

❓解决问题

如何为 POMDP 综合出具有形式化正确性保证的有限状态控制器，同时保持可扩展性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

受 Angluin 的 L*算法启发，将采样作为成员查询，模型检验作为等价查询，通过自动机学习迭代合成有限状态控制器。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个集成采样、自动机学习和模型检验的 POMDP 策略综合框架。
  • 证明了该框架的相对完备性：当采样诱导的策略是正则时，可综合出具有形式化保证的控制器。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖采样诱导策略的正则性假设。
  • 原型实现可能仅适用于特定规模的问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) are the standard framework for decision-making under uncertainty. While sampling-based methods scale well, they lack formal correctness guarantees, making them unsuitable for safety-critical applications. Conversely, formal synthesis techniques provide correctness-by-construction but often struggle with scalability, as general POMDP synthesis is undecidable. To bridge this gap, we propose a synthesis framework that integrates sampling, automata learning, and model-checking. Inspired by Angluin's $L^*$ algorithm, our approach utilizes sampling as a membership oracle and model-checking as an equivalence oracle. This enables the synthesis of finite-state controllers with formal guarantees, provided the sampling-induced policy is regular. We establish a relative completeness result for this framework. Experimental results from our prototypical implementation demonstrate that this method successfully solves threshold-safety problems that remain challenging for existing formal synthesis tools. We believe our algorithm serves as a valuable component in a portfolio approach to tackling the inherent difficulty of POMDP synthesis problems.

Fully Dynamic Rebalancing in Dockless Bike-Sharing Systems via Deep Reinforcement Learning

Medium 2605.14501
Edoardo Scarpel, Alberto Pettena, Matteo Cederle, Federico Chiariotti, Marco Fabris, Gian Antonio Susto
arXiv PDF eess.SY
TL;DR：用深度强化学习实现无桩共享单车系统的全动态再平衡，显著减少可用性故障。
🎯研究动机

传统周期性、全系统干预的再平衡方法效率低、成本高，难以适应无桩共享单车系统的动态需求。

❓解决问题

如何通过单辆卡车实时执行局部取放和充电操作，最小化可用性故障并控制空间不平等。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将服务建模为图模拟器，再平衡问题转化为马尔可夫决策过程，DRL 智能体根据时空关键性分数实时引导卡车执行局部取放和充电动作。

📊实验结果

在真实世界数据上进行实验，显示可用性故障显著减少。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种基于 DRL 的完全动态再平衡方法，克服了周期性干预的局限。
  • 在真实数据上验证了该方法能以最小车队规模显著降低可用性故障，同时限制空间不平等和移动荒漠。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅考虑单辆卡车，多车协同可能更优。
  • 未讨论充电基础设施的约束。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper proposes a fully dynamic Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) method for rebalancing dockless bike-sharing systems, overcoming the limitations of periodic, system-wide interventions. We model the service through a graph-based simulator and cast rebalancing as a Markov decision process. A DRL agent routes a single truck in real time, executing localized pick-up, drop-off, and charging actions guided by spatiotemporal criticality scores. Experiments on real-world data show significant reductions in availability failures with a minimal fleet size, while limiting spatial inequality and mobility deserts. Our approach demonstrates the value of learning-based rebalancing for efficient and reliable shared micromobility.

Addressing Terminal Constraints in Data-Driven Demand Response Scheduling

Medium 2605.14741
Maximilian Bloor, Martha White, Ehecatl Antonio del Rio Chanona, Calvin Tsay
arXiv PDF eess.SY
TL;DR：将目标空间规划与 DDPG 结合，解决数据驱动需求响应调度中的终端约束问题。
🎯研究动机

电气化化学过程在参与需求响应方案时需满足长时域终端约束以保持动态稳定性，但基于模型的优化方法计算成本高，而数据驱动的强化学习面临严重的信用分配挑战。

❓解决问题

在数据驱动的需求响应调度中，如何高效地满足长时域终端约束并缓解短视控制行为。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将目标空间规划（GSP）与深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）结合，利用学习到的离散子目标上的时间抽象模型在扩展时域上传播价值。

📊实验结果

在模拟空分基准上进行实验，结果表明所提方法相比标准 DDPG 提高了样本效率并满足终端存储约束。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种集成 GSP 与 DDPG 的方法，用于处理需求响应调度中的终端约束。
  • 在模拟空分基准上验证了该方法相比标准 DDPG 提高了样本效率并满足终端存储约束。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在模拟环境中验证，未在真实化学过程中测试。
  • 方法依赖离散子目标的设计，可能不适用于所有终端约束场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Electrified chemical processes are incentivized by exposure to time-varying electricity markets to operate flexibly, but participating in demand response schemes can require satisfying terminal constraints over long horizons. Specifically, terminal constraints may be required when computing optimal schedules in order to preserve dynamic stability. Model-based optimization methods are computationally costly, and data-driven scheduling via reinforcement learning (RL) faces severe credit-assignment challenges. We integrate Goal-Space Planning (GSP) with Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG), using learned temporally abstract models over discrete subgoals to propagate value across extended horizons. Using a simulated air separation benchmark, we demonstrate the proposed approach improves sample efficiency over standard DDPG while satisfying terminal storage constraints, mitigating myopic control behavior.

Critic-Driven Voronoi-Quantization for Distilling Deep RL Policies to Explainable Models

Medium 2605.14897
Senne Deproost, Denis Steckelmacher, Ann Nowé
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用评论家网络进行 Voronoi 状态分区，将深度强化学习策略蒸馏为可解释的线性模型。
🎯研究动机

深度强化学习策略的可解释性蒸馏面临性能 - 可解释性权衡难题，且传统蒸馏忽略动作价值等强化学习特有组件。

❓解决问题

如何将黑盒深度强化学习策略蒸馏为可解释模型，同时保持性能并利用强化学习特有信息。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Critic-Driven Voronoi State Partitioning 方法，利用原始策略的评论家价值网络迭代地在价值不足区域引入子策略，通过 Voronoi 量化器将状态空间划分为细胞状区域，每个区域分配一个线性函数。

📊实验结果

在多个知名基准上验证，摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种模型无关的蒸馏方法，利用评论家网络指导状态分区。
  • 证明该方法可以用合理大小的线性函数集逼近原始策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖评论家网络的准确性。
  • 线性函数集的大小可能随任务复杂度增长。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Despite many successful attempts at explaining Deep Reinforcement Learning policies using distillation, it remains difficult to balance the performance-interpretability trade-off and select a fitting surrogate model. In addition to this, traditional distillation only minimizes the distance between the behavior of the original and the surrogate policy while other RL-specific components such as action value are disregarded. To solve this, we introduce a new model-agnostic method called Critic-Driven Voronoi State Partitioning, which partitions a black box control policy into regions where a simple class of model can be optimized using gradient descent. By exploiting the critic value network of the original policy, we iteratively introduce new subpolicies in regions with insufficient value, standing in for a measure of policy complexity. The partitioning, a Voronoi quantizer, uses nearest neighbor lookups to assign a linear function to each point in the state space resulting in a cell-like diagram. We validate our approach on several well known benchmarks and proof that this distillation approaches the original policy using a reasonable sized set of linear functions.

R2R2: Robust Representation for Intensive Experience Reuse via Redundancy Reduction in Self-Predictive Learning

Medium 2605.14026
Sanghyeob Song, Donghyeok Lee, Jinsik Kim, Sungroh Yoon
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 R2R2 正则化方法，通过冗余减少缓解自预测强化学习在高数据重用下的过拟合问题。
🎯研究动机

在数据稀缺的强化学习场景（如真实机器人）中，密集数据重用虽提升效率但易导致过拟合。现有工作主要关注评论家偏差，而自预测学习在高更新 - 数据比下的表征级不稳定性尚未被充分研究。

❓解决问题

解决自预测强化学习在高 UTD 比率下因表征冗余导致的过拟合问题。

🔎现象分析

标准零中心化操作与自预测学习的谱特性冲突，导致表征不稳定和过拟合。

🛠️主要方法

提出 R2R2，一种基于冗余减少的正则化方法，设计非中心化目标以适配自预测学习的谱特性。

📊实验结果

在 11 个连续控制任务上，UTD=20 时 R2R2 提升 TD7 约 22%，并在 SimbaV2-SPL 上带来额外增益，后者达到新 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 理论识别标准零中心化与自预测学习谱特性的冲突，并设计非中心化目标。
  • 在 TD7 等 SPL 原生算法上验证 R2R2 有效性，并扩展 SimbaV2 集成 SPL 模块（SimbaV2-SPL），证明其正交性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在连续控制任务上验证，离散动作空间或更复杂环境未测试。
  • R2R2 的超参数（如冗余减少强度）可能需针对不同任务调整。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

For reinforcement learning in data-scarce domains like real-world robotics, intensive data reuse enhances efficiency but induces overfitting. While prior works focus on critic bias, representation-level instability in Self-Predictive Learning (SPL) under high Update-to-Data (UTD) regimes remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose Robust Representation via Redundancy Reduction (R2R2), a regularization method within SPL. We theoretically identify that standard zero-centering conflicts with SPL's spectral properties and design a non-centered objective accordingly. We verify R2R2 on SPL-native algorithms like TD7. Furthermore, to demonstrate its orthogonality to prior advancements, we extend the state-of-the-art SimbaV2, which originally lacks SPL, by integrating a tailored SPL module, termed SimbaV2-SPL. Experiments across 11 continuous control tasks confirm that R2R2 effectively mitigates overfitting; specifically, at a UTD ratio of 20, it improves TD7 by ~22% and provides additional gains on top of SimbaV2-SPL, which itself establishes a new state-of-the-art. The code can be found at: this https URL

Reinforcement Learning for Tool-Calling Agents in Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR)

Medium 2605.14126
Marius S. Knorr, Robert Müller, Jan P. Bremer, Nils Schweingruber
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：用强化学习后训练提升 FHIR 医疗数据问答中工具调用智能体的多步推理能力。
🎯研究动机

FHIR 是医疗数据互操作标准，但回答临床问题需要多步推理和资源遍历，现有 LLM 智能体常选错资源或违反约束，亟需提升其结构化图上的推理可靠性。

❓解决问题

如何让工具增强的 LLM 智能体在 FHIR 结构化图上进行准确的多步推理，避免资源选择错误和遍历约束违反。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将 FHIR 推理建模为序列决策问题，实现多轮 CodeAct 智能体，并用强化学习后训练，LLM Judge 提供执行奖励，同时强制数据完整性约束。

📊实验结果

在 FHIR-AgentBench 基准上评估，对比 o4-mini 等基线，RL 后训练将正确率从 50% 提升至 77%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将 FHIR 推理作为序列决策问题，并用强化学习后训练工具调用智能体。
  • 在 FHIR-AgentBench 上，使用更小的 Qwen3-8B 模型将正确率从 50% 提升至 77%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在一个基准上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 依赖 LLM Judge 提供奖励，可能引入偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR) is the dominant standard for interoperable exchange of healthcare data. In FHIR, electronic health records form a directed graph of resources. Answering clinically meaningful questions over FHIR requires agents to perform multi-step reasoning, filtering, and aggregation across multiple resource types. Prior work shows that even tool-augmented LLM agents (retrieval, code execution, multi-turn planning) often select the wrong resources or violate traversal constraints. We study this problem in the context of FHIR-AgentBench, a benchmark for realistic question answering over real-world hospital data, and frame reasoning on FHIR as a sequential decision-making problem over a queryable structured graph. We implement a multi-turn CodeAct agent and post-train it with reinforcement learning using a custom harness and tools. A LLM Judge provides execution-grounded rewards. Compared to prompt-based, closed-model baselines, RL post-training improves performance while enforcing data-integrity constraints. Empirically, our approach improves answer correctness from 50% (o4-mini) to 77% on FHIR-AgentBench using a smaller and cheaper Qwen3-8B model. We present an end-to-end post-training pipeline (environment building, harness construction, model training and custom evaluation) that reliably improves multi-turn reasoning over structured clinical graphs.

Identifying Culprits Through Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient Deep Learning Investigation

Low 2605.14774
Lata B T, Savitha N J
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：使用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习算法从复杂犯罪数据中识别罪犯，准确率达 95%。
🎯研究动机

传统刑事调查依赖有限数据分析，效率低且易产生误报和漏报，需要更优的自动化方法。

❓解决问题

如何从包含犯罪现场材料、证人陈述和嫌疑人档案的复杂数据集中高效识别罪犯，同时最小化噪声和无关数据的影响。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习算法，以犯罪数据集（犯罪现场材料、证人陈述、嫌疑人档案）训练模型，通过特征提取最大化识别罪犯的可能性，同时抑制噪声和无关数据。

📊实验结果

摘要提到在犯罪数据集上训练和测试，DDPG 达到 95% 准确率，优于其他方法，但未提供具体数据集规模、对比方法细节或实验设置。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将 DDPG 应用于刑事调查中罪犯识别的新颖方法。
  • 实验表明该方法在准确率上优于现有方法，达到 95%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未说明数据集规模、来源及多样性，可能影响泛化性。
  • 未讨论误报和漏报的具体降低程度，仅报告准确率。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In the world of AI and advanced technologies investigation aspects identification of a crime or criminal plays a major problem. In this research we focus on a Conventional ways of implicating criminal investigations usually rely on limited data analysis. Finding an optimal and efficient method that will effectively identify criminals from complex datasets and minimise false positives and false negatives is the considered as a challenge. The main novelty approach of this work is based on the deep learning algorithm Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) is presented in this paper. We train the DDPG model with a dataset of crime scene material, witness statements and suspect profiles. The algorithm uses features to maximise the likelihood of identifying the offender while minimising the noise impact and irrelevant data. We show the efficacy of the proposed method, where DDPG identified criminals with an amazing accuracy of 95% than other several existing methods.

RL 理论 3 篇

Fast Rates for Inverse Reinforcement Learning

Medium 2605.14599
Andreas Schlaginhaufen, Maryam Kamgarpour
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：逆强化学习在熵正则化 Min-Max 框架下实现 O(n^{-1})快速收敛率。
🎯研究动机

逆强化学习（IRL）从专家演示中推断奖励函数，但现有方法的统计收敛率较慢或依赖强假设，限制了其实际应用。

❓解决问题

在线性奖励类、有限时域 MDP 中，建立熵正则化 Min-Max-IRL 的结构等价性和快速统计收敛率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

利用伪自和谐性分析 Min-Max-IRL 损失，证明 MLE 与 Min-Max-IRL 在总体和确定性动力学下等价，并推导轨迹级 KL 散度和参数误差的 O(n^{-1})收敛率。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明 MLE 与 Min-Max-IRL 在总体和确定性动力学下的等价性。
  • 建立轨迹级 KL 散度和 Hessian 范数下参数误差的 O(n^{-1})快速收敛率，允许模型误设且无需探索假设。
  • 将奖励可识别性结果推广到一般 Borel 空间，并推导软最优值函数对奖励参数的导数新结果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论结果限于线性奖励类和有限时域 MDP。
  • 未讨论实际算法实现或大规模实验验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We establish novel structural and statistical results for entropy-regularized min-max inverse reinforcement learning (Min-Max-IRL) with linear reward classes in finite-horizon MDPs with Borel state and action spaces. On the structural side, we show that maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) and Min-Max-IRL are equivalent at the population level, and at the empirical level under deterministic dynamics. On the statistical side, exploiting pseudo-self-concordance of the Min-Max-IRL loss, we prove that both the trajectory-level KL divergence and the squared parameter error in the Hessian norm decay at the fast rate $\mathcal{O}(n^{-1})$, where $n$ is the number of expert trajectories. Our guarantees apply under misspecification and require no exploration assumptions. We further extend reward-identifiability results to general Borel spaces and derive novel results on the derivatives of the soft-optimal value function with respect to reward parameters.

Probabilistic Verification of Recurrent Neural Networks for Single and Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning

Medium 2605.14758
Luca Marzari, Enrico Marchesini
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 RNN-ProVe 框架，通过策略驱动采样和统计误差界，为部分可观测强化学习中的 RNN 策略提供概率验证。
🎯研究动机

现有 RNN 验证工具依赖严格假设或粗糙过近似，导致结果过于保守或不确定，亟需一种能处理部分可观测 RL 中 RNN 策略概率验证的方法。

❓解决问题

如何高效且准确地估计基于 RNN 的策略在部分可观测单智能体和多智能体强化学习中产生不良行为的概率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RNN-ProVe 框架，使用策略驱动采样近似训练策略下可行的隐藏状态集，并推导统计误差界以产生有界误差、高置信度的行为违规概率估计。

📊实验结果

在部分可观测单智能体和协作多智能体任务上实验，显示 RNN-ProVe 比现有工具提供更定量、可行性感知的概率保证，并扩展到循环和多智能体设置。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个概率验证框架 RNN-ProVe，用于估计 RNN 策略中不良行为的可能性。
  • 通过策略驱动采样和统计误差界提供定量、可行性感知的概率保证，并扩展到循环和多智能体设置。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖策略驱动采样的质量，极端情况下采样偏差影响估计。
  • 统计误差界可能对高维隐藏状态空间不够紧致。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

History-dependent policies induced by recurrent neural networks (RNNs) rely on latent hidden state dynamics, making verification in partially observable reinforcement learning (RL) challenging. Existing RNN verification tools typically rely on restrictive modeling assumptions or coarse over-approximations of the hidden state space, which can lead to overly conservative or inconclusive results. We propose $\textbf{RNN}$ $\textbf{Pro}$babilistic $\textbf{Ve}$rification ($\texttt{RNN-ProVe}$), a probabilistic framework that $\textit{estimates the likelihood}$ of undesired behaviors in RNN-based policies. $\texttt{RNN-ProVe}$ uses policy-driven sampling to approximate the set of hidden states that are feasible under a trained policy, and derives statistical error bounds to produce bounded-error, high-confidence estimates of behavioral violations. Experiments on partially observable single-agent and cooperative multi-agent tasks show that $\texttt{RNN-ProVe}$ yields more quantitative, feasibility-aware probabilistic guarantees than existing tools, while scaling to recurrent and multi-agent settings.

Second-Order Actor-Critic Methods for Discounted MDPs via Policy Hessian Decomposition

Medium 2605.14982
Sanjeev Manivannan, Shuban V
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种利用 Hessian- 向量积实现高效二阶更新的 Actor-Critic 方法，用于折扣奖励强化学习。
🎯研究动机

一阶策略梯度方法收敛慢，而二阶优化虽能加速但 Hessian 估计计算复杂，限制了其在 RL 中的应用。

❓解决问题

如何设计计算高效且稳定的二阶 Actor-Critic 更新方法，以利用目标函数的完整曲率信息。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在双时间尺度 Actor-Critic 框架下，利用批评者快速演化可视为准静态的特性，将动作值函数近似为局部常数，从而合理近似策略 Hessian，并通过 Hessian- 向量积实现高效二阶更新。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 分析了二阶近似在策略梯度中的稳定性条件，并证明在双时间尺度框架下该近似是合理的。
  • 提出了一种计算高效且稳定的二阶 Actor-Critic 方法，利用 Hessian- 向量积实现曲率感知更新。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在双时间尺度假设下有效，实际中批评者更新速度可能不够快。
  • Hessian- 向量积计算仍可能带来额外开销，在大规模问题中效率需验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We address the discounted reward setting in reinforcement learning (RL). To mitigate the value approximation challenges in policy gradient methods, actor-critic approaches have been developed and are known to converge to stationary points under suitable assumptions. However, these methods rely on first-order updates. In contrast, second-order optimization provides principled curvature-aware updates that are proven to accelerate convergence, but its application in RL is limited by the computational complexity of Hessian estimation. In this work, we analyze second-order approximations for the actor update that leverage the full curvature information of the objective as much as possible. A stable approximation requires treating the action-value function as locally constant with respect to policy parameters, which does not generally hold in policy gradient methods. We show that this approximation becomes well-justified under a two-timescale actor-critic framework, where the critic evolves on a faster timescale and can be treated as quasi-stationary during actor updates. Building on this insight, we formulate a second-order actor-critic method for the discounted reward setting that leverages Hessian-vector product (HVP) computations, resulting in a computationally efficient and stable second-order update.

其他 3 篇

Parallelizing Counterfactual Regret Minimization

Medium 2605.14277
Juho Kim, Tuomas Sandholm
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：将反事实遗憾最小化算法并行化，利用线性代数操作在 GPU 上实现高达四个数量级的加速。
🎯研究动机

并行化在 AI 领域显著加速了模型训练和评估，但在博弈求解中应用较少，而 CFR 算法在不完美信息博弈中至关重要，现有实现速度慢，亟需加速。

❓解决问题

如何高效并行化 CFR 算法族，以利用 GPU 等并行硬件加速大规模不完美信息博弈求解。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出通用并行化框架，将 CFR 重新表述为一系列线性代数操作，从而应用现有并行线性代数技术加速 CFR，并扩展到 CFR+、折扣 CFR 和预测变体等。

📊实验结果

在 GPU 上对比 Google DeepMind OpenSpiel 的 CPU 实现，速度提升高达四个数量级。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将 CFR 算法族并行化的通用框架，通过线性代数操作实现。
  • 在 GPU 上实现 CFR，实验表明比 OpenSpiel 的 CPU 实现快四个数量级。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于表格型 CFR 变体，不涵盖函数逼近或深度 CFR。
  • 实验仅对比了 OpenSpiel 的 CPU 实现，未与其他 GPU 基线比较。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Parallelization has played an instrumental role in the field of artificial intelligence (AI), drastically reducing the time taken to train and evaluate large AI models. In contrast to its impact in the broader field of AI, applying parallelization to computational game solving is relatively unexplored, despite its great potential. In this paper, we parallelize the family of counterfactual regret minimization (CFR) algorithms, which were central to important breakthroughs for solving large imperfect-information games. We present a generalized parallelization framework, reframing CFR as a series of linear algebra operations. Then, existing techniques for parallelizing linear algebra operations can be applied to accelerate CFR. We also describe how our technique can be applied to other tabular members of the CFR family of algorithms, including the state-of-the-art, such as CFR+, discounted CFR, and predictive variants of CFR. Experimentally, we show that our CFR implementation on a GPU is up to four orders of magnitude faster than Google DeepMind OpenSpiel's CFR implementations on a CPU.

Matrix-Space Reinforcement Learning for Reusing Local Transition Geometry

Medium 2605.14304
Zuyuan Zhang, Carlee Joe-Wong, Tian Lan
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出矩阵空间强化学习（MSRL），通过正半定矩阵描述子重用局部转移几何，实现序列决策中的组合泛化。
🎯研究动机

现有方法在序列决策中重用技能或预测模型时，忽略了丰富的局部转移几何和动力学，导致组合泛化能力不足。

❓解决问题

如何有效捕获和重用轨迹中的局部转移几何结构，以提升强化学习在组合泛化任务中的性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

MSRL：将轨迹段表示为聚合一阶和二阶统计量的正半定矩阵描述子，支持代数组合，并利用矩阵到值的映射引导新任务学习。

📊实验结果

在组合泛化任务上，MSRL 达到最佳平均有限预算目标 AUC 0.73，优于从头训练的 MSRL（0.65）、TD-MPC-PT+FT（0.63）和 TD-MPC（0.57）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出矩阵空间强化学习框架，通过正半定矩阵描述子捕获局部转移几何。
  • 证明描述子的完备性、可加性和最小充分性，并展示其与标准强化学习方法的兼容性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对高维状态空间的计算开销较大。
  • 描述子的可加性假设可能限制某些复杂组合场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Compositional generalization in sequential decision-making requires identifying which parts of prior rollouts remain useful for new tasks. Existing methods reuse skills or predictive models, but often overlook rich local transition geometry and dynamics. We propose Matrix-Space Reinforcement Learning (MSRL), a geometric abstraction that represents trajectory segments through positive semidefinite matrix descriptors aggregating first- and second-order statistics of lifted one-step transitions. These descriptors expose shared hidden structure, support algebraic composition in an abstract matrix space, and reveal opportunities for transfer. We prove that the descriptor is well defined up to coordinate gauge, complete for the induced low-order additive signal class, additive under valid segment composition, and minimally sufficient among admissible additive descriptors. We further show that conditioning value functions on the trajectory-segment matrix yields a first-order smooth approximation of action values, enabling source-learned matrix-to-value mappings to bootstrap learning in new tasks. MSRL is plug-in compatible with standard model-free and model-based methods, while obstruction filtering rejects implausible compositions. Empirically, MSRL achieves the best average finite-budget target AUC of 0.73, outperforming MSRL from scratch (0.65), TD-MPC-PT+FT (0.63), and TD-MPC (0.57).

Dynamic Latent Routing

Medium 2605.14323
Fangyuan Yu, Xin Su, Amir Abdullah
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出动态潜在路由（DLR），一种基于动态搜索的语言模型后训练方法，在低数据微调中平均提升 6.6 个百分点。
🎯研究动机

现有离散潜在变量方法在低数据微调中表现不如监督微调，需要更有效的后训练方法。

❓解决问题

如何在低数据微调场景下通过动态搜索学习离散潜在码、路由策略和模型参数，以提升语言模型性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 General Dijkstra Search (GDS)证明最优子策略的时间组合可恢复全局最优策略，并基于其“搜索 - 选择 - 更新”原则设计 DLR，在单训练阶段联合学习离散潜在码、路由策略和模型参数。

📊实验结果

在四个数据集和六个模型上进行实验，DLR 匹配或超越监督微调，平均增益 +6.6 个百分点，而先前离散潜在基线持续低于 SFT。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 General Dijkstra Search (GDS)并证明其最优性
  • 提出 Dynamic Latent Routing (DLR)方法，在低数据微调中平均提升 6.6 个百分点
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于低数据微调场景
  • 未在更大规模模型或更多任务上验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We investigate the temporal concatenation of sub-policies in Markov Decision Processes (MDP) with time-varying reward functions. We introduce General Dijkstra Search (GDS), and prove that globally optimal goal-reaching policies can be recovered through temporal composition of intermediate optimal sub-policies. Motivated by the "search, select, update" principle underlying GDS, we propose Dynamic Latent Routing (DLR), a language-model post-training method that jointly learns discrete latent codes, routing policies, and model parameters through dynamic search in a single training stage. In low-data fine-tuning settings, DLR matches or outperforms supervised fine-tuning across four datasets and six models, achieving a mean gain of +6.6 percentage points, while prior discrete-latent baselines consistently underperform SFT. Mechanistic analyses and targeted code ablations show that DLR learns structured routing behaviors with distinct causal roles.

离线 RL 2 篇

ROAD: Adaptive Data Mixing for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning via Bi-Level Optimization

Medium 2605.14497
Letian Yang (1), Xu Liu (1), Yiqiang Lu (2), Jian Liu (2), Weiqiang Wang (2), Shuai Li (1) ((1) Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Shanghai, China et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 ROAD 框架，通过双层优化自动调整离线到在线强化学习中的数据混合策略，无需手动调整。
🎯研究动机

离线到在线强化学习面临离线数据集与在线策略之间的非平稳分布偏移，现有方法依赖静态混合比例或启发式回放策略，缺乏适应性，导致稳定性和渐近性能之间的权衡次优。

❓解决问题

如何自动且自适应地调整离线到在线强化学习中的数据回放混合策略，以在保持离线先验的同时防止价值高估，并适应不同环境和训练动态。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将数据选择问题建模为双层优化，外层优化数据混合策略以最大化策略性能，内层进行标准 Q 学习更新；使用多臂老虎机机制和近似双层梯度的替代目标实现实用算法。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上，ROAD 一致优于现有数据回放方法，实现更好的稳定性和渐近性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别出现有离线到在线强化学习方法中目标不一致的根本问题。
  • 提出 ROAD 框架，通过双层优化自动调整数据混合策略，无需手动调整。
  • 设计基于多臂老虎机的实用算法，并引入替代目标近似双层梯度，同时保持离线先验和防止价值高估。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对多臂老虎机超参数敏感。
  • 双层优化的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Offline-to-online reinforcement learning harnesses the stability of offline pretraining and the flexibility of online fine-tuning. A key challenge lies in the non-stationary distribution shift between offline datasets and the evolving online policy. Common approaches often rely on static mixing ratios or heuristic-based replay strategies, which lack adaptability to different environments and varying training dynamics, resulting in suboptimal tradeoff between stability and asymptotic performance. In this work, we propose Reinforcement Learning with Optimized Adaptive Data-mixing (ROAD), a dynamic plug-and-play framework that automates the data replay process. We identify a fundamental objective misalignment in existing approaches. To tackle this, we formulate the data selection problem as a bi-level optimization process, interpreting the data mixing strategy as a meta-decision governing the policy performance (outer-level) during online fine-tuning, while the conventional Q-learning updates operate at the inner level. To make it tractable, we propose a practical algorithm using a multi-armed bandit mechanism. This is guided by a surrogate objective approximating the bi-level gradient, which simultaneously maintains offline priors and prevents value overestimation. Our empirical results demonstrate that this approach consistently outperforms existing data replay methods across various datasets, eliminating the need for manual, context-specific adjustments while achieving superior stability and asymptotic performance.

Logging Policy Design for Off-Policy Evaluation

Medium 2605.15108
Connor Douglas, Joel Persson, Foster Provost
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：研究如何设计日志策略以最小化离线策略评估误差，揭示奖励 - 覆盖权衡并给出最优设计原则。
🎯研究动机

离线策略评估（OPE）依赖日志策略收集的数据，但日志策略的设计对评估精度影响显著，现有研究缺乏系统性的设计指导。

❓解决问题

如何设计日志策略以最小化给定目标策略的 OPE 误差。

🔎现象分析

存在奖励 - 覆盖权衡：将概率集中在高奖励动作上可降低方差，但可能遗漏目标策略可能采取的动作的信号。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个统一的日志策略设计框架，在目标策略和奖励分布已知、未知、部分已知三种信息体制下推导最优日志策略。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 刻画了日志策略设计中的奖励 - 覆盖权衡。
  • 在三种信息体制下推导出最优日志策略的解析形式。
  • 提供了可操作的设计原则，并讨论了实际约束下的近似方案。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论最优策略可能因操作约束无法直接实施。
  • 分析假设了特定的信息体制，实际场景可能更复杂。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Off-policy evaluation (OPE) estimates the value of a target treatment policy (e.g., a recommender system) using data collected by a different logging policy. It enables high-stakes experimentation without live deployment, yet in practice accuracy depends heavily on the logging policy used to collect data for computing the estimate. We study how to design logging policies that minimize OPE error for given target policies. We characterize a fundamental reward-coverage tradeoff: concentrating probability mass on high-reward actions reduces variance but risks missing signal on actions the target policy may take. We propose a unifying framework for logging policy design and derive optimal policies in canonical informational regimes where the target policy and reward distribution are (i) known, (ii) unknown, and (iii) partially known through priors or noisy estimates at logging time. Our results provide actionable guidance for firms choosing among multiple candidate recommendation systems. We demonstrate the importance of treatment selection when gathering data for OPE, and describe theoretically optimal approaches when this is a firm's primary objective. We also distill practical design principles for selecting logging policies when operational constraints prevent implementing the theoretical optimum.

基于偏好/反馈的 RL 1 篇

Resolving Action Bottleneck: Agentic Reinforcement Learning Informed by Token-Level Energy

High 2605.14558
Langzhou He, Junyou Zhu, Yue Zhou, Zhengyao Gu, Junhua Liu, Wei-Chieh Huang, Henry Peng Zou, David Wipf et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 ActFocus 方法，通过 token 级能量重加权解决强化学习中动作令牌的瓶颈问题，显著提升策略梯度方法性能。
🎯研究动机

现有策略梯度方法（如 PPO、GRPO）在智能体强化学习中对轨迹中所有令牌平等分配信用，导致训练信号在推理令牌和动作令牌之间分配不均，限制了学习效率。

❓解决问题

解决多轮轨迹中令牌级训练信号分配不均的问题，特别是动作令牌（仅占轨迹小部分）承担了大部分与奖励方差相关的信号，而推理令牌被过度加权。

🔎现象分析

从能量建模视角发现，令牌级训练信号与不同轨迹奖励方差的相关性高度集中在动作令牌上，形成“动作瓶颈”现象。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ActFocus 方法，包含两个组件：1）对推理令牌梯度进行降权；2）基于能量的重分配机制，对不确定性更高的动作令牌增加权重。

📊实验结果

在四个环境和不同模型规模上，ActFocus 一致优于 PPO 和 GRPO，最终步数提升分别高达 65.2 和 63.7 个百分点。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次从能量建模角度揭示动作瓶颈现象，证明令牌级训练信号集中在动作令牌上。
  • 提出 ActFocus 方法，一种简单有效的令牌重加权策略，无需额外运行时或内存成本。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖于奖励方差计算，可能对噪声敏感。
  • 未在更复杂或长轨迹场景中验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Agentic reinforcement learning trains large language models using multi-turn trajectories that interleave long reasoning traces with short environment-facing actions. Common policy-gradient methods, such as PPO and GRPO, treat each token in a trajectory equally, leading to uniform credit assignment. In this paper, we critically demonstrate that such uniform credit assignment largely misallocates token-level training signals. From an energy-based modeling perspective, we show that token-level training signals, quantified by their correlations with reward variance of different rollouts sampled from a given prompt, concentrate sharply on action tokens rather than reasoning tokens, even though action tokens account for only a small fraction of the trajectory. We refer to this phenomenon as the Action Bottleneck. Motivated by this observation, we propose an embarrassingly simple token reweighting approach, ActFocus, that downweights gradients on reasoning tokens, along with an additional energy-based redistribution mechanism that further increases the weights on action tokens with higher uncertainty. Across four environments and different model sizes, ActFocus consistently outperforms PPO and GRPO, yielding final-step gains of up to 65.2 and 63.7 percentage points, respectively, without any additional runtime or memory cost.

探索与奖励设计 1 篇

Data-Augmented Game Starts for Accelerating Self-Play Exploration in Imperfect Information Games

Medium 2605.14379
JB Lanier, Nathan Monette, Pierre Baldi, Roy Fox
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出数据增强游戏起始状态采样方法，加速不完全信息博弈中的自对弈探索。
🎯研究动机

大规模不完全信息博弈（如星际争霸、Dota）因奖励稀疏和长程探索而计算困难，现有方法效率低。

❓解决问题

如何利用离线演示数据加速在线探索，以在固定计算预算下找到近似均衡。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出数据增强游戏起始状态（DAGS）方法，从离线数据中采样中间状态初始化强化学习数据收集，并引入多任务观测标志缓解偏差。

📊实验结果

在合成数据集和可解析的长期控制变体（Kuhn Poker、Goofspiel、反例游戏）上实验，DAGS 在固定计算预算下使正则化策略梯度方法在更具挑战的探索游戏中实现更低的可利用性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DAGS 采样策略，利用离线演示加速自对弈探索。
  • 揭示起始状态分布增强可能导致有偏均衡，并提供多任务观测标志作为缓解方案。
  • 发布一组新的基准环境，增加探索难度和状态数量，同时保持可分析的可利用性度量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖离线演示的质量和覆盖范围。
  • 多任务观测标志可能增加实现复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Finding approximate equilibria for large-scale imperfect-information competitive games such as StarCraft, Dota, and CounterStrike remains computationally infeasible due to sparse rewards and challenging exploration over long horizons. In this paper, we propose a multi-agent starting-state sampling strategy designed to substantially accelerate online exploration in regularized policy-gradient game methods for two-player zero-sum (2p0s) games. Motivated by an assumption that offline demonstrations from skilled humans can provide good coverage of high-level strategies relevant to equilibrium play, we propose the initialization of reinforcement learning data collection at intermediate states sampled from offline data to facilitate exploration of strategically relevant subgames. Referring to this method as Data-Augmented Game Starts (DAGS), we perform experiments using synthetic datasets and analytically tractable, long-horizon control variants of two-player Kuhn Poker, Goofspiel, and a counterexample game designed to penalize biased beliefs over hidden information. Under fixed computational budgets, DAGS enables regularized policy gradient methods to achieve lower exploitability in games with significantly more challenging exploration. We show that augmenting starting state distributions when solving imperfect information games can lead to biased equilibria, and we provide a straightforward mitigation to this in the form of multi-task observation flags. Finally, we release a new set of benchmark environments that drastically increase exploration challenges and state counts in existing OpenSpiel games while keeping exploitability measurements analytically tractable.

应用: 机器人/自动化/规划 19 篇 · 7 个细分

其他 5 篇

ASH: Agents that Self-Hone via Embodied Learning

High 2605.14211
Benjamin Schneider, Xavier Schneider, Victor Zhong, Sun Sun
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：ASH 通过无标签互联网视频和自改进循环实现长时域具身任务学习，无需奖励工程或专家标注。
🎯研究动机

长时域具身任务依赖手工奖励或动作标注演示，难以规模化，亟需无需人工标注的可扩展学习方法。

❓解决问题

如何从无标签、有噪声的互联网视频中学习具身策略，以解决需要多步规划的长时域任务。

🔎现象分析

行为克隆、检索增强和零样本基础模型基线在长时域任务中性能停滞，而 ASH 通过自改进循环持续进步。

🛠️主要方法

ASH 采用自改进循环：当智能体卡住时，从其自身轨迹学习逆动力学模型（IDM），并利用 IDM 从相关互联网视频中提取监督信号；同时使用无监督学习从大规模互联网视频中识别关键时刻并存储为长期记忆。

📊实验结果

在 Pokemon Emerald 和 The Legend of Zelda: The Minish Cap 两个游戏环境中进行 8 小时评估，ASH 分别达到平均 11.2/12 和 9.9/12 里程碑，而最强基线分别为 6.5/12 和 6.0/12。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需奖励工程或专家标注的具身学习系统 ASH，利用无标签互联网视频进行自改进。
  • 在两种长时域游戏环境中验证 ASH 显著优于基线，达到平均 11.2/12 和 9.9/12 里程碑。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定环境（游戏）的视觉和交互特性，泛化到真实机器人场景需进一步验证。
  • 长期记忆的存储和检索机制可能在大规模视频数据上存在效率问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Long-horizon embodied tasks remain a fundamental challenge in AI, as current methods rely on hand-engineered rewards or action-labeled demonstrations, neither of which scales. We introduce ASH, an agentic system that learns an embodied policy from unlabeled, noisy internet video, without reward shaping or expert annotation. ASH follows a self-improvement loop; when it gets stuck, ASH learns an Inverse Dynamics Model (IDM) from its own trajectories, and uses its IDM to extract supervision from relevant internet video. ASH uses unsupervised learning to identify key moments from large-scale internet video and retains them as long-term memory -- allowing it to tackle long-horizon problems. We evaluate ASH on two complementary environments demanding multi-hour planning: Pokemon Emerald, a turn-based RPG, and The Legend of Zelda: The Minish Cap, a real-time action-adventure game. In both games, behavioral cloning, retrieval-augmented and zero-shot foundation-model baselines plateau, while ASH sustains progression across our 8-hour evaluation. ASH reaches an average of $11.2/12$ milestones in Pokemon Emerald and $9.9/12$ in Legend of Zelda, while the strongest baseline gets stuck in both environments at an average of $6.5/12$ and $6.0/12$ milestones, respectively. We demonstrate that self-improving agents are a scalable recipe for long-horizon embodied learning.

CLOVER: Closed-Loop Value Estimation \& Ranking for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Planning

High 2605.15120
Sining Ang, Yuguang Yang, Canyu Chen, Yan Wang
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：CLOVER 通过闭环价值估计与排序框架，解决端到端自动驾驶规划中训练与评估不匹配的问题，实现 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

端到端自动驾驶规划器通常通过模仿单一记录轨迹进行训练，但评估时使用基于规则的规划指标，导致训练与评估不匹配：接近记录轨迹的路径可能违反规则，而偏离的路径可能更优。这种不匹配在候选 - 选择规划器中尤为突出，其性能依赖于候选集覆盖率和评分器排序质量。

❓解决问题

解决端到端自动驾驶规划中训练与评估不匹配的问题，提升候选轨迹的覆盖率和评分排序质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出训练与评估不匹配现象：模仿单一轨迹的规划器在规则评估下表现不佳，而偏离的轨迹可能更优。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CLOVER 框架，包含生成器 - 评分器结构：生成器生成多样候选轨迹，评分器预测规划指标子分数进行排序。通过评估器过滤的伪专家轨迹和集合级覆盖监督扩展候选支持，并采用保守闭环自蒸馏：评分器拟合真实评估器子分数，生成器向教师选择的 top-k 和向量帕累托目标优化，辅以稳定性正则化。

📊实验结果

在 NAVSIM 上，CLOVER 达到 94.5 PDMS 和 90.4 EPDMS，创下新 SOTA；在更具挑战的 NavHard 上获得 48.3 EPDMS，匹配最强结果；在 nuScenes 开环评估中取得最低 L2 误差和碰撞率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CLOVER 框架，通过闭环价值估计与排序解决训练 - 评估不匹配问题。
  • 设计保守闭环自蒸馏方法，分析不完美评分器改进生成器的条件。
  • 在 NAVSIM 和 nuScenes 上取得 SOTA 结果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖评估器质量，伪专家轨迹构造需进一步验证。
  • 闭环自蒸馏的保守性可能限制探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

End-to-end autonomous driving planners are commonly trained by imitating a single logged trajectory, yet evaluated by rule-based planning metrics that measure safety, feasibility, progress, and comfort. This creates a training--evaluation mismatch: trajectories close to the logged path may violate planning rules, while alternatives farther from the demonstration can remain valid and high-scoring. The mismatch is especially limiting for proposal-selection planners, whose performance depends on candidate-set coverage and scorer ranking quality. We propose CLOVER, a Closed-LOop Value Estimation and Ranking framework for end-to-end autonomous driving planning. CLOVER follows a lightweight generator--scorer formulation: a generator produces diverse candidate trajectories, and a scorer predicts planning-metric sub-scores to rank them at inference time. To expand proposal support beyond single-trajectory imitation, CLOVER constructs evaluator-filtered pseudo-expert trajectories and trains the generator with set-level coverage supervision. It then performs conservative closed-loop self-distillation: the scorer is fitted to true evaluator sub-scores on generated proposals, while the generator is refined toward teacher-selected top-$k$ and vector-Pareto targets with stability regularization. We analyze when an imperfect scorer can improve the generator, showing that scorer-mediated refinement is reliable when scorer-selected targets are enriched under the true evaluator and updates remain conservative. On NAVSIM, CLOVER achieves 94.5 PDMS and 90.4 EPDMS, establishing a new state of the art. On the more challenging NavHard split, it obtains 48.3 EPDMS, matching the strongest reported result. On supplementary nuScenes open-loop evaluation, CLOVER achieves the lowest L2 error and collision rate among compared methods. Code data will be released at this https URL .

Analogical Trajectory Transfer

Medium 2605.14393
Junho Kim, Eun Sun Lee, Gwangtak Bae, Seunggu Kang, Young Min Kim
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出无需训练的类比轨迹迁移方法，通过场景分解与层次化映射实现跨场景语义一致的轨迹迁移。
🎯研究动机

现有方法难以处理语义相似但布局、尺度不同的场景间的轨迹迁移，直接语义匹配会导致碰撞或几何畸变，且搜索空间大。

❓解决问题

如何将 3D 环境中的运动轨迹迁移到另一个语义相似但几何布局不同的场景中的对应位置，同时保持语义一致性和空间连贯性。

🔎现象分析

语义相似的场景在物体放置、尺度和布局上差异显著，直接语义匹配会导致碰撞或几何畸变；轨迹迁移的搜索空间大，映射需保持语义和功能而不撕裂轨迹或引起碰撞。

🛠️主要方法

将场景分解为以物体为中心的聚类，利用 3D 基础模型特征估计跨场景的层次化平滑映射，组合各聚类映射得到初始迁移，再通过后处理去除碰撞和畸变。

📊实验结果

在多个场景中与基于 LLM、VLM 和场景图匹配的基线方法比较，方法运行时间约 0.6 秒，性能优于基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出类比轨迹迁移问题并给出无需训练的解决方案
  • 设计场景分解与层次化映射方法，实现语义一致且空间连贯的轨迹迁移
  • 在多个应用场景中展示有效性，包括虚拟共现、多轨迹迁移、相机迁移和人到机器人运动迁移
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 3D 基础模型特征的质量
  • 可能不适用于高度动态或非刚性场景
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study analogical trajectory transfer, where the goal is to translate motion trajectories in one 3D environment to a semantically analogous location in another. Such a capacity would enable machines to perform analogical spatial reasoning, with applications in AR/VR co-presence, content creation, and robotics. However, even semantically similar scenes can still differ substantially in object placement, scale, and layout, so naively matching semantics leads to collisions or geometric distortions. Furthermore, finding where each trajectory point should transfer to has a large search space, as the mapping must preserve semantics and functionality without tearing the trajectory apart or causing collisions. Our key insight is to decompose the problem into spatially segregated subproblems and merge their solutions to produce semantically consistent and spatially coherent transfers. Specifically, we partition scenes into object-centric clusters and estimate cross-scene mappings via hierarchical smooth map prediction, using 3D foundation model features that encode contextual information from object and open-space arrangements. We then combinatorially assemble the per-cluster maps into an initial transfer and refine the result to remove collisions and distortions, yielding a spatially coherent trajectory. Our method does not require training, attains a fast runtime around 0.6 seconds, and outperforms baselines based on LLMs, VLMs, and scene graph matching. We further showcase applications in virtual co-presence, multi-trajectory transfer, camera transfer, and human-to-robot motion transfer, which indicates the broad applicability of our work to AR/VR and robotics.

Energy-Efficient Quadruped Locomotion with Compliant Feet

Medium 2605.14411
Pramod Pal (1), Shishir Kolathaya (2), Ashitava Ghosal (1 and 3) ((1) Indian Institute of Science Bangalore India, (2) Robert Bosch Centre for Cyber Physical Systems Bangalore India, (3) Ahmedabad University Ahmedabad India)
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：通过强化学习控制器整合足部柔顺性，发现适当刚度的弹簧可降低四足机器人约 17% 的能耗。
🎯研究动机

传统四足机器人使用刚性足部虽控制简单，但无法吸收冲击和利用弹性储能，导致运动能耗高。

❓解决问题

如何通过足部柔顺性设计降低四足机器人运动能耗。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将足部柔顺性（不同刚度弹簧）集成到强化学习运动控制器中，训练多个策略并交叉评估能耗。

📊实验结果

在仿真中训练 8 种不同弹簧刚度的策略，并在实物四足机器人上验证，中间刚度弹簧能耗比极硬或极软弹簧低约 17%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在强化学习运动控制器中系统研究足部柔顺性对四足机器人能耗的影响。
  • 通过仿真和实物实验证明适当刚度弹簧可降低约 17% 能耗。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了弹簧刚度单一参数，未考虑其他柔顺性设计。
  • 实验仅在平坦地面进行，未涉及复杂地形。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Quadruped robots are often designed with rigid feet to simplify control and maintain stable contact during locomotion. While this approach is straightforward, it limits the ability of the legs to absorb impact forces and reuse stored elastic energy, leading to higher energy expenditure during locomotion. To explore whether compliant feet can provide an advantage, we integrate foot compliance into a reinforcement learning (RL) locomotion controller and study its effect on walking efficiency. In simulation, we train eight policies corresponding to eight different spring stiffness values and then cross-evaluate their performance by measuring mechanical energy consumed per meter traveled. In experiments done on a developed quadruped, the energy consumption for the intermediate stiffness spring is lower by ~ 17% when compared to a very stiff or a very flexible spring incorporated in the feet, with similar trends appearing in the simulation results. These results indicate that selecting an appropriate foot compliance can improve locomotion efficiency without destabilizing the robot during motion.

TeachAnything: A Multimodal Crowdsourcing Platform for Training Embodied AI Agents in Symmetrical Reality

Medium 2605.14556
Zidong Liu, Rongkai Liu, Yue Li, Zhenliang Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出面向对称现实的众包演示平台 TeachAnything，通过三阶段多模态演示范式收集多样化数据以训练具身智能体。
🎯研究动机

对称现实（SR）要求智能体具备类人智能，需要更丰富多样的人类引导数据，但现有数据收集方法在多样性、规模和物理一致性上存在不足。

❓解决问题

如何高效收集跨场景、跨任务、跨形态的多样化多模态演示数据，以支持对称现实中具身智能体的训练。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出三阶段演示范式（整合多模态演示信号），并基于此开发云端众包演示平台 TeachAnything，通过物理仿真统一虚拟与物理交互，支持多样场景、任务和形态的数据收集。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出三阶段多模态演示范式，为对称现实中的智能体训练提供结构化指导。
  • 开发 TeachAnything 平台，实现云端众包、物理仿真驱动的多样化演示数据收集。
⚠️方法局限
  • 平台依赖众包质量，可能引入噪声或低质量数据。
  • 物理仿真的真实性与实际物理世界可能存在差距。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Symmetrical Reality (SR) is emerging as a future trend for human-agent coexistence, placing higher demands on agents to acquire human-like intelligence. It calls for richer and more diverse human guidance. We introduce a three-stage demonstration paradigm integrating multimodal demonstration signals. Building on this paradigm, we developed TeachAnything, a cloud-based, crowdsourcing-oriented demonstration platform with physics simulation capable of collecting diverse demonstration data across varied scenes, tasks, and embodiments. By unifying virtual and physical interactions through both methodological design and physics simulation, the system serves as a practical foundation for developing embodied agents aligned with Symmetrical Reality.

操作 (Manipulation) 4 篇

CreFlow: Corrective Reflow for Sparse-Reward Embodied Video Diffusion RL

High 2605.14274
Zhenyang Ni, Yijiang Li, Ruochen Jiao, Simon Sinong Zhan, Sipeng Chen, Zhenfei Yin, Minshuo Chen, Philip Torr et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 CreFlow 框架，通过组合约束奖励和矫正回流损失优化视频扩散模型的强化学习后训练，提升具身操作任务的成功率。
🎯研究动机

现有视频生成模型在具身操作中可能违反物理约束，而视频强化学习奖励通常基于低层视觉指标，缺乏对组合任务规范的逻辑验证。

❓解决问题

如何为具身视频生成模型的后训练设计符合组合任务规范的奖励，并有效利用高维视频生成中的奖励信号进行强化学习优化。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CreFlow 框架，包括：1) 基于线性时序逻辑的组合约束奖励模型，自动将任务需求转化为约束，提供忠实奖励和局部错误信息；2) 信用感知的 NFT 损失，将 RL 更新限制在奖励相关区域；3) 矫正回流损失，利用组内正样本作为矫正方向估计，稳定加速训练。

📊实验结果

在八个双臂操作任务上，CreFlow 的奖励判断比现有方法更符合人类和模拟器成功标签，下游执行成功率提升 23.8 个百分点。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出组合约束奖励模型，用于后训练视频生成模型，提供忠实奖励和局部错误信息。
  • 提出 CreFlow 在线 RL 框架，包含信用感知 NFT 损失和矫正回流损失，有效提升高维视频生成质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖任务规范的线性时序逻辑表达，对复杂任务建模有限。
  • 实验仅在模拟环境中验证，真实机器人部署效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Video generation models trained on heterogeneous data with likelihood-surrogate objectives can produce visually plausible rollouts that violate physical constraints in embodied manipulation. Although reinforcement-learning post-training offers a natural route to adapting VGMs, existing video-RL rewards often reduce each rollout to a low-level visual metric, whereas manipulation video evaluation requires logic-based verification of whether the rollout satisfies a compositional task specification. To fill this gap, we introduce a compositional constraint-based reward model for post-training embodied video generation models, which automatically formulates task requirements as a composition of Linear Temporal Logic constraints, providing faithful rewards and localized error information in generated videos. To achieve effective improvement in high-dimensional video generation using these reward signals, we further propose CreFlow, a novel online RL framework with two key designs: i) a credit-aware NFT loss that confines the RL update to reward-relevant regions, preventing perturbations to unrelated regions during post-training; and ii) a corrective reflow loss that leverages within-group positive samples as an explicit estimate of the correction direction, stabilizing and accelerating training. Experiments show that CreFlow yields reward judgments better aligned with human and simulator success labels than existing methods and improves downstream execution success by 23.8 percentage points across eight bimanual manipulation tasks.

IntentVLA: Short-Horizon Intent Modeling for Aliased Robot Manipulation

High 2605.14712
Shijie Lian, Bin Yu, Xiaopeng Lin, Zhaolong Shen, Laurence Tianruo Yang, Yurun Jin, Haishan Liu, Changti Wu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：IntentVLA 通过建模短期意图解决机器人操作中的观测歧义问题，提升执行稳定性。
🎯研究动机

机器人模仿数据常是多模态的，相似的视觉 - 语言观测可能对应不同的动作序列，因为人类演示者具有不同的短期意图、任务阶段或近期上下文。现有 VLA 策略仅依赖当前观测和指令，在部分可观测性下可能在不同重规划步骤中重新采样不同意图，导致块间冲突和不稳定执行。

❓解决问题

解决现有 VLA 策略因忽略历史上下文导致的观测歧义和动作块间冲突问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，现有帧条件 VLA 策略在部分可观测环境下，相邻重规划步骤可能重新采样不同意图，导致块间冲突和不稳定执行。

🛠️主要方法

提出 IntentVLA，一种历史条件 VLA 框架，将近期视觉观测编码为紧凑的短期意图表示，并用其条件化动作块生成。同时引入 AliasBench，一个包含 12 个任务的歧义感知基准。

📊实验结果

在 AliasBench、SimplerEnv、LIBERO 和 RoboCasa 上评估，IntentVLA 提升了滚动稳定性并优于强 VLA 基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 IntentVLA 框架，通过建模短期意图解决观测歧义问题。
  • 引入 AliasBench 基准，用于隔离和评估短期观测歧义。
  • 在多个基准上验证了 IntentVLA 在滚动稳定性和性能上的提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的历史观测数据。
  • 短期意图表示的可解释性有待进一步研究。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Robot imitation data are often multimodal: similar visual-language observations may be followed by different action chunks because human demonstrators act with different short-horizon intents, task phases, or recent context. Existing frame-conditioned VLA policies infer each chunk from the current observation and instruction alone, so under partial observability they may resample different intents across adjacent replanning steps, leading to inter-chunk conflict and unstable execution. We introduce IntentVLA, a history-conditioned VLA framework that encodes recent visual observations into a compact short-horizon intent representation and uses it to condition chunk generation. We further introduce AliasBench, a 12-task ambiguity-aware benchmark on RoboTwin2 with matched training data and evaluation environments that isolate short-horizon observation aliasing. Across AliasBench, SimplerEnv, LIBERO, and RoboCasa, IntentVLA improves rollout stability and outperforms strong VLA baselines

Slot-MPC: Goal-Conditioned Model Predictive Control with Object-Centric Representations

High 2605.14937
Jonathan Spieler, Angel Villar-Corrales, Sven Behnke
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：Slot-MPC 利用目标中心表示和可微世界模型实现高效模型预测控制，提升机器人操作任务的泛化性和规划效率。
🎯研究动机

现有目标中心世界模型和强化学习方法通常学习固定反应策略，难以泛化到新场景；而模型预测控制（MPC）虽能在线规划，但传统采样方法计算成本高。

❓解决问题

如何利用目标中心表示构建可微世界模型，实现高效且泛化的在线动作规划。

🔎现象分析

在离线设置且状态 - 动作覆盖有限时，基于梯度的 MPC 优于无梯度的采样 MPC。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Slot-MPC 框架：使用视觉编码器学习基于槽（slot）的目标中心表示，学习动作条件的目标中心动力学模型，并通过可微模型进行梯度优化 MPC 实现动作规划。

📊实验结果

在模拟机器人操作任务上评估，与无目标中心世界模型基线对比，Slot-MPC 在任务性能和规划效率上均有提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Slot-MPC，将目标中心表示与可微 MPC 结合，实现高效在线规划。
  • 实验证明目标中心表示提供了强归纳偏置，提升任务性能和规划效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在模拟环境中验证，未涉及真实机器人场景。
  • 依赖离线数据集，在线学习或探索场景未探讨。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Predictive world models enable agents to model scene dynamics and reason about the consequences of their actions. Inspired by human perception, object-centric world models capture scene dynamics using object-level representations, which can be used for downstream applications such as action planning. However, most object-centric world models and reinforcement learning (RL) approaches learn reactive policies that are fixed at inference time, limiting generalization to novel situations. We propose Slot-MPC, an object-centric world modeling framework that enables planning through Model Predictive Control (MPC). Slot-MPC leverages vision encoders to learn slot-based representations, which encode individual objects in the scene, and uses these structured representations to learn an action-conditioned object-centric dynamics model. At inference time, the learned dynamics model enables action planning via MPC, allowing agents to adapt to previously unseen situations. Since the learned world model is differentiable, we can use gradient-based MPC to directly optimize actions, which is computationally more efficient than relying on gradient-free, sampling-based MPC methods. Experiments on simulated robotic manipulation tasks show that Slot-MPC improves both task performance and planning efficiency compared to non-object-centric world model baselines. In the considered offline setting with limited state-action coverage, we find that gradient-based MPC performs better than gradient-free, sampling-based MPC. Our results demonstrate that explicitly structured, object-centric representations provide a strong inductive bias for controllable and generalizable decision-making. Code and additional results are available at this https URL .

WarmPrior: Straightening Flow-Matching Policies with Temporal Priors

High 2605.13959
Sinjae Kang, Chanyoung Kim, Kaixin Wang, Li Zhao, Kimin Lee
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：将标准高斯先验替换为基于近期动作历史的 WarmPrior，可显著提升机器人操作任务的成功率。
🎯研究动机

基于扩散和流匹配的生成策略已成为视觉运动机器人控制的主流范式，但标准高斯源分布可能不是最优选择，限制了策略性能。

❓解决问题

生成策略中源分布的选择对性能的影响被忽视，标准高斯分布导致概率路径弯曲，影响采样效率和成功率。

🔎现象分析

WarmPrior 使概率路径显著变直，类似于 Rectified Flow 中最优传输耦合的效果，从而提升性能。

🛠️主要方法

提出 WarmPrior，一种基于近期可用动作历史构建的简单时间先验，替代标准高斯源分布用于流匹配策略。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现源分布是生成机器人控制中重要且未充分探索的设计维度
  • 提出 WarmPrior，一种简单有效的时间先验，可提升操作任务成功率
  • 将 WarmPrior 扩展到先验空间强化学习，改善样本效率和最终性能
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖动作历史的可用性和质量
  • 在复杂长时任务中的泛化性有待验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generative policies based on diffusion and flow matching have become a dominant paradigm for visuomotor robotic control. We show that replacing the standard Gaussian source distribution with WarmPrior, a simple temporally grounded prior constructed from readily available recent action history, consistently improves success rates on robotic manipulation tasks. We trace this gain to markedly straighter probability paths, echoing the effect of optimal-transport couplings in Rectified Flow. Beyond standard behavior cloning, WarmPrior also reshapes the exploration distribution in prior-space reinforcement learning, improving both sample efficiency and final performance. Collectively, these results identify the source distribution as an important and underexplored design axis in generative robot control.

视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 4 篇

Before the Body Moves: Learning Anticipatory Joint Intent for Language-Conditioned Humanoid Control

High 2605.14417
Haozhe Jia, Honglei Jin, Yuan Zhang, Youcheng Fan, Shaofeng Liang, Lei Wang, Shuxu Jin, Kuimou Yu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 DAJI 框架，通过预测性关节意图接口实现语言引导的人形机器人全身控制。
🎯研究动机

自然语言是人形机器人直观的交互方式，但现有方法缺乏对未来物理状态变化的显式预测，导致控制反应滞后。

❓解决问题

如何让语言条件的人形机器人控制既能执行当前动作，又能提前预测即将发生的接触变化、重心转移等物理过渡。

🔎现象分析

现有方法要么生成运动学参考后由低层跟踪器被动修复，要么使用隐式策略无法显式编码未来接触变化。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DAJI 分层框架，包含 DAJI-Act（通过学生驱动 rollout 蒸馏未来感知教师到扩散动作策略）和 DAJI-Flow（从语言和意图历史自回归生成未来意图块）。

📊实验结果

在 HumanML3D 风格生成上达到 94.42% rollout 成功率，在 BABEL 上达到 0.152 子序列 FID。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出动力学对齐的关节意图（DAJI）接口，显式编码未来物理过渡。
  • 设计 DAJI-Act 和 DAJI-Flow 实现从语言到闭环控制的预测性生成。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量语言标注数据。
  • 未提及在真实机器人上的迁移效果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Natural language is an intuitive interface for humanoid robots, yet streaming whole-body control requires control representations that are executable now and anticipatory of future physical transitions. Existing language-conditioned humanoid systems typically generate kinematic references that a low-level tracker must repair reactively, or use latent/action policies whose outputs do not explicitly encode upcoming contact changes, support transfers, and balance preparation. We propose \textbf{DAJI} (\emph{Dynamics-Aligned Joint Intent}), a hierarchical framework that learns an anticipatory joint-intent interface between language generation and closed-loop control. DAJI-Act distills a future-aware teacher into a deployable diffusion action policy through student-driven rollouts, while DAJI-Flow autoregressively generates future intent chunks from language and intent history. Experiments show that DAJI achieves strong results in anticipatory latent learning, single-instruction generation, and streaming instruction following, reaching 94.42\% rollout success on HumanML3D-style generation and 0.152 subsequence FID on BABEL.

Evo-Depth: A Lightweight Depth-Enhanced Vision-Language-Action Model

High 2605.14950
Tao Lin, Yuxin Du, Jiting Liu, Nuobei Zhu, Yunhe Li, Yuqian Fu, Yinxinyu Chen, Hongyi Cai et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Evo-Depth 提出轻量级深度增强 VLA 框架，无需额外传感器即可提升机器人操作的空间理解能力。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLA 模型缺乏深度信息，导致空间理解不足；引入 3D 输入会增加复杂性和成本，而隐式 3D 建模依赖大模型，部署效率低。

❓解决问题

如何在无需额外传感器或大模型的前提下，高效增强 VLA 模型的空间感知能力以提升机器人操作性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Evo-Depth 框架，包含轻量级隐式深度编码模块从多视图 RGB 提取深度特征，通过空间增强模块进行深度感知调制，并采用渐进对齐训练策略将深度增强表示与动作学习对齐。

📊实验结果

在四个仿真基准和真实世界实验中，Evo-Depth 以 0.9B 参数取得最高平均成功率，且模型最小、GPU 内存最低、推理频率最高。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出轻量级深度增强 VLA 框架，无需额外传感器即可提升空间操作能力。
  • 设计隐式深度编码模块和空间增强模块，实现高效空间 - 语义增强。
  • 引入渐进对齐训练策略，有效融合深度特征与动作学习。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对多视图 RGB 输入质量敏感。
  • 隐式深度编码在极端光照或纹理缺失场景下可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-Language-Action models have emerged as a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation by unifying perception, language grounding, and action generation. However, they often struggle in scenarios requiring precise spatial understanding, as current VLA models primarily rely on 2D visual representations that lack depth information and detailed spatial relationships. While recent approaches incorporate explicit 3D inputs such as depth maps or point clouds to address this issue, they often increase system complexity, require additional sensors, and remain vulnerable to sensing noise and reconstruction errors. Another line of work explores implicit 3D-aware spatial modeling directly from RGB observations without extra sensors, but it often relies on large geometry foundation models, resulting in higher training and deployment costs. To address these challenges, we propose Evo-Depth, a lightweight depth-enhanced VLA framework that enhances spatially grounded manipulation without relying on additional sensing hardware or compromising deployment efficiency. Evo-Depth employs a lightweight Implicit Depth Encoding Module to extract compact depth features from multi-view RGB images. These features are incorporated into vision-language representations through a Spatial Enhancement Module via depth-aware modulation, enabling efficient spatial-semantic enhancement. A Progressive Alignment Training strategy is further introduced to align the resulting depth-enhanced representations with downstream action learning. With only 0.9B parameters, Evo-Depth achieves superior performance across four simulation benchmarks. In real-world experiments, Evo-Depth attains the highest average success rate while also exhibiting the smallest model size, lowest GPU memory usage, and highest inference frequency among compared methods.

Pelican-Unified 1.0: A Unified Embodied Intelligence Model for Understanding, Reasoning, Imagination and Action

High 2605.15153
Yi Zhang, Yinda Chen, Che Liu, Zeyuan Ding, Jin Xu, Shilong Zou, Junwei Liao, Jiayu Hu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：首个统一具身智能基础模型，用单一 VLM 同时实现理解、推理、想象与动作。
🎯研究动机

现有具身智能模型通常将理解、推理、想象和动作分离为独立专家系统，缺乏统一框架，导致协同效率低、部署复杂。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个单一模型同时具备场景理解、任务推理、未来预测和动作执行能力，且不牺牲各子任务性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用单一 VLM 作为统一理解与推理模块，输出隐变量；统一未来生成器（UFG）基于该隐变量联合生成未来视频和动作；语言、视频、动作损失共同反向传播优化共享表示。

📊实验结果

在八个 VLM 基准上平均 64.7（同规模最佳），WorldArena 上 66.03（排名第一），RoboTwin 上 93.5（动作方法中第二高）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个统一具身智能基础模型 Pelican-Unified 1.0，将理解、推理、想象和动作集成于单一模型。
  • 设计统一未来生成器（UFG），在单一去噪过程中联合生成未来视频和动作。
  • 实验证明统一范式在保持专家级性能的同时实现多任务协同。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂长时任务泛化能力有限。
  • 统一模型训练计算成本较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present Pelican-Unified 1.0, the first embodied foundation model trained according to the principle of unification. Pelican-Unified 1.0 uses a single VLM as a unified understanding module, mapping scenes, instructions, visual contexts, and action histories into a shared semantic space. The same VLM also serves as a unified reasoning module, autoregressively producing task-, action-, and future-oriented chains of thought in a single forward pass and projecting the final hidden state into a dense latent variable. A Unified Future Generator (UFG) then conditions on this latent variable and jointly generates future videos and future actions through two modality-specific output heads within the same denoising process. The language, video, and action losses are all backpropagated into the shared representation, enabling the model to jointly optimize understanding, reasoning, imagination, and action during training, rather than training three isolated expert systems. Experiments demonstrate that unification does not imply compromise. With a single checkpoint, Pelican-Unified 1.0 achieves strong performance across all three capabilities: 64.7 on eight VLM benchmarks, the best among comparable-scale models; 66.03 on WorldArena, ranking first; and 93.5 on RoboTwin, the second-best average among compared action methods. These results show that the unified paradigm succeeds in preserving specialist strength while bringing understanding, reasoning, imagination, and action into one model.

MAPLE: Latent Multi-Agent Play for End-to-End Autonomous Driving

High 2605.14201
Rajeev Yasarla, Deepti Hegde, Hsin-Pai Cheng, Shizhong Han, Yunxiao Shi, Meysam Sadeghigooghari, Hanno Ackermann, Litian Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 MAPLE 框架，在 VLA 模型隐空间中进行多智能体闭环训练，实现端到端自动驾驶 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLA 模型在闭环评估中脆弱，因为传统模仿学习框架无法充分建模反应式环境，且现有闭环监督方法缺乏可扩展性。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖外部模拟器的情况下，实现可扩展的闭环多智能体训练，提升端到端自动驾驶的鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

MAPLE 包含两阶段训练：1) 基于真实轨迹的隐空间展开监督微调；2) 使用全局和智能体特定奖励的强化学习，并引入多样性奖励以生成日志数据中不存在的规划行为。

📊实验结果

在 Bench2Drive 上取得 SOTA 驾驶性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MAPLE 框架，在 VLA 模型隐空间中进行反应式多智能体闭环训练。
  • 设计两阶段训练流程，结合监督微调和强化学习，无需外部模拟器。
  • 引入多样性奖励，鼓励模型生成多样化的规划行为。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的真实轨迹数据。
  • 多样性奖励的有效性可能受场景复杂度影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-language-action (VLA) models are effective as end-to-end motion planners, but can be brittle when evaluated in closed-loop settings due to being trained under traditional imitation learning framework. Existing closed-loop supervision approaches lack scalability and fail to completely model a reactive environment. We propose MAPLE, a novel framework for reactive, multi-agent rollout of a dynamic driving scenario in the latent space of the VLA model. The ego vehicle and nearby traffic agents are independently controlled over multi-step horizons, while being reactive to other agents in the scene, enabling closed-loop training. MAPLE consists of two training stages: (1) supervised fine-tuning on the latent rollouts based on ground-truth trajectories, followed by (2) reinforcement learning with global and agent -specific rewards that encourage safety, progress, and interaction realism. We further propose diversity rewards that encourage the model to generate planning behaviors that may not be present in logged driving data. Notably, our closed-loop training framework is scalable and does not require external simulators, which can be computationally expensive to run and have limited visual fidelity to the real-world. MAPLE achieves state-of-the-art driving performance on Bench2Drive and demonstrates scalable, closed-loop multi-agent play for robust E2E autonomous driving systems.

任务规划 3 篇

When Robots Do the Chores: A Benchmark and Agent for Long-Horizon Household Task Execution

High 2605.14504
Zilin Zhu, Longteng Guo, Yanghong Mei, Bowen Pang, Zongxun Zhang, Xingjian He, Ruyi Ji, Jing Liu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出长时域家务任务基准 LongAct 和 VLM 驱动智能体 HoloMind，揭示现有模型在长程规划上的严重不足。
🎯研究动机

现有具身 AI 基准多聚焦短时域导航或操作，且依赖固定任务类别，忽视了长时域家务任务所需的高层规划与持续推理能力。

❓解决问题

如何评估和提升具身智能体在自由形式指令下的长时域家务任务规划能力。

🔎现象分析

即使顶级模型（GPT-5、Qwen3-VL）在 LongAct 上仅达到 59% 目标完成率和 16% 完全任务成功率，表明长时域规划是当前具身智能体的主要瓶颈。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LongAct 基准（抽象低层控制，聚焦高层认知）和 HoloMind 智能体（含 DAG 长时域分层规划器、多模态空间记忆、情景记忆和全局评论家）。

📊实验结果

在 LongAct 上使用 GPT-5 和 Qwen3-VL 模型进行实验，HoloMind 显著提升长时域性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LongAct 基准，用于评估长时域家务任务的高层规划能力。
  • 提出 HoloMind 智能体，通过分层规划与记忆机制显著提升长时域性能并降低对模型规模的依赖。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及跨领域泛化能力。
  • 可能依赖高质量 VLM 模型，低资源场景下效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Long-horizon household tasks demand robust high-level planning and sustained reasoning capabilities, which are largely overlooked by existing embodied AI benchmarks that emphasize short-horizon navigation or manipulation and rely on fixed task categories. We introduce LongAct, a benchmark designed to evaluate planning-level autonomy in long-horizon household tasks specified through free-form instructions. By abstracting away embodiment-specific low-level control, LongAct isolates high-level cognitive capabilities such as instruction understanding, dependency management, memory maintenance, and adaptive planning. We further propose HoloMind, a VLM-driven agent with a DAG-based long-horizon hierarchical planner, a Multimodal Spatial Memory for persistent world modeling, an Episodic Memory for experience reuse, and a global Critic for reflective supervision. Experiments with GPT-5 and Qwen3-VL models show that HoloMind substantially improves long-horizon performance while reducing reliance on model scale. Even top models achieve only 59% goal completion and 16% full-task success, underscoring the difficulty of LongAct and the need for stronger long-horizon planning in embodied agents.

SPIN: Structural LLM Planning via Iterative Navigation for Industrial Tasks

High 2605.14051
Yusuke Ozaki, Dhaval Patel
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：SPIN 通过 DAG 规划与前缀执行控制，提升工业 LLM 规划的结构有效性和效率。
🎯研究动机

工业 LLM agent 系统常将规划与执行分离，但 LLM 规划器常生成结构无效或过长的流程，导致脆弱失败和额外工具 /API 成本。

❓解决问题

解决 LLM 规划器生成的结构无效或冗余工作流问题，减少不必要的执行步骤和工具调用。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合验证的有向无环图（DAG）规划与基于前缀的执行控制：通过 _validate_plan_text 和修复提示强制 DAG 约束，生成可执行计划；增量评估 DAG 前缀，当前前缀足以回答查询时停止执行。

📊实验结果

在 AssetOpsBench 的 261 个场景中，SPIN 将执行任务从 1061 减至 623，Accomplished 从 0.638 提升至 0.706，每次运行工具调用从 11.81 降至 6.82。在 MCP Bench 上，对 GPT OSS1 和 Llama 4 Maverick 均提升了规划、基础和依赖相关分数。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SPIN，一种即插即用的规划包装器，通过 DAG 验证和前缀执行控制提升规划有效性。
  • 在 AssetOpsBench 和 MCP Bench 上验证了减少任务数、提升完成率和降低工具调用的效果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 DAG 结构的可表达性，对于非 DAG 结构的工作流可能不适用。
  • 修复提示可能无法处理所有无效计划，极端情况下可能仍需人工干预。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Industrial LLM agent systems often separate planning from execution, yet LLM planners frequently produce structurally invalid or unnecessarily long workflows, leading to brittle failures and avoidable tool and API cost. We propose \texttt{SPIN}, a planning wrapper that combines validated Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) planning with prefix based execution control. \texttt{SPIN} enforces a strict DAG contract through \texttt{\_validate\_plan\_text} and repair prompting, producing executable plans before downstream execution, and then evaluates DAG prefixes incrementally to stop when the current prefix is sufficient to answer the query. On AssetOpsBench, across 261 scenarios, \texttt{SPIN} reduces executed tasks from 1061 to 623 and improves \emph{Accomplished} from 0.638 to 0.706, while reducing tool calls from 11.81 to 6.82 per run. On MCP Bench, the same wrapper improves planning, grounding, and dependency related scores for both GPT OSS1 and Llama 4 Maverick.

IFPV: An Integrated Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Operational Planning and High-Fidelity Plan Verification

Medium 2605.14851
Zhigao Huang, Zhengqing Hu, Dong Chen, Shaohan Zhang, Zhao Jin, Bo Zhang, Han Wu, Mingliang Xu
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：提出多智能体框架 IFPV，通过分层生成与对抗验证提升作战规划可行性。
🎯研究动机

现代战场环境复杂多变，传统作战规划生成方法存在不可行性，验证方法存在不充分性，亟需集成生成与验证的框架。

❓解决问题

作战规划生成与验证中，生成方案不可行且验证不够严格，难以揭示潜在漏洞。

🔎现象分析

单步 LLM 规划基线成功率低、成本高；传统基于规则的验证器抑制率低，区分度不足。

🛠️主要方法

IFPV 框架包含多视角分层智能体（MPHA）用于生成作战规划，以及对抗认知仿真引擎（ACSE）用于高保真对抗验证。MPHA 通过 Pathfinder、Analyst 和 Planner 智能体协作将指挥官意图分解为可执行的多平台战术动作序列；ACSE 引入配备定制世界模型的对手，预测关键平台未来演化并对候选计划进行动态对抗。

📊实验结果

在非对称作战战术模拟器（ACTS）中进行仿真实验，与单步 LLM 规划基线相比，IFPV 将任务成功率提升 19.4%，作战成本降低 41.7%；与传统基于规则的验证器相比，ACSE 将平均抑制率提升 31.8%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出集成生成与验证的多智能体框架 IFPV，解决规划不可行与验证不充分问题。
  • 设计 MPHA 实现分层协作规划生成，ACSE 实现高保真对抗验证，显著提升任务成功率和验证严格性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在特定模拟器（ACTS）中进行，泛化性未知。
  • 框架依赖定制世界模型，构建成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)
