Operational plan generation and verification are critical for modern complex and rapidly changing battlefield environments, yet traditional generation and verification methods still respectively face the challenges of generation infeasibility and verification insufficiency. To alleviate these limitations, we propose an Integrated Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Operational Planning and High-Fidelity Plan Verification (IFPV). IFPV consists of two tightly coupled modules: Multi-Perspective Hierarchical Agents (MPHA) for generative operational planning and an Adversarial Cognitive Simulation Engine (ACSE) for high-fidelity adversarial plan verification. MPHA decomposes commander intent into executable multi-platform tactical action sequences through the collaboration of Pathfinder, Analyst, and Planner agents. ACSE introduces an opponent equipped with a customized world model, which predicts the future evolution of mission-critical platforms and conducts dynamic counteractions against candidate plans. Simulation experiments in the Asymmetric Combat Tactic Simulator (ACTS) show that IFPV improves mission success by 19.4% and reduces operational cost by 41.7% compared with a single-step large language model (LLM) planning baseline. Compared with a traditional rule-based validator, ACSE increases the average suppression rate by 31.8%, indicating that the proposed verification environment is stricter and more discriminative in revealing the latent vulnerabilities of candidate plans. The code for IFPV can be found at this https URL .

GUI/Web/Mobile Agent 1 篇

ClawForge: Generating Executable Interactive Benchmarks for Command-Line Agents

High 2605.14133
Yuxiang Lai, Peng Xia, Haonian Ji, Kaiwen Xiong, Kaide Zeng, Jiaqi Liu, Fang Wu, Jike Zhong et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 ClawForge 框架，生成可执行命令行 Agent 基准，揭示现有模型在状态冲突下的严重性能瓶颈。
🎯研究动机

现有交互式 Agent 基准在可扩展构建与真实工作流评估之间存在矛盾：手工任务扩展成本高，静态提示评估无法捕捉持久状态下的失败，且多数基准从干净状态初始化，未系统测试 Agent 处理预存、过时或冲突工件的能力。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个可扩展、可复现的基准，系统评估命令行 Agent 在持久工作流中处理状态冲突的能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ClawForge 框架，通过编译场景模板、接地槽位、初始化状态、参考轨迹和验证器生成可复现的任务规范，并基于归一化最终状态和可观测副作用（而非精确轨迹匹配）逐步评估 Agent。

📊实验结果

在 ClawForge-Bench 上评估 7 个前沿模型，最佳模型严格准确率仅 45.3%，错误状态替换率低于 17%，模型间最大分离度（17% 至 90%）由是否在行动前检查现有状态驱动。部分信用和步骤效率分析显示许多失败是接近命中而非早期崩溃，且模型在状态冲突下表现出不同失败风格。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ClawForge 框架，支持生成可执行、可复现的命令行 Agent 基准，覆盖状态冲突场景。
  • 构建 ClawForge-Bench（17 个场景，6 种能力类别），并评估 7 个前沿模型，揭示严重性能差距和不同失败模式。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖命令行环境，可能不适用于其他交互类型。
  • 场景数量有限（17 个），可能未涵盖所有状态冲突类型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Interactive agent benchmarks face a tension between scalable construction and realistic workflow evaluation. Hand-authored tasks are expensive to extend and revise, while static prompt evaluation misses failures that only appear when agents operate over persistent state. Existing interactive benchmarks have advanced agent evaluation significantly, but most initialize tasks from clean state and do not systematically test how agents handle pre-existing partial, stale, or conflicting artifacts. We present \textbf{ClawForge}, a generator-backed benchmark framework for executable command-line workflows under state conflict. The framework compiles scenario templates, grounded slots, initialized state, reference trajectories, and validators into reproducible task specifications, and evaluates agents step by step over persistent workflow surfaces using normalized end state and observable side effects rather than exact trajectory matching. We instantiate this framework as the ClawForge-Bench (17 scenarios, 6 ability categories). Results across seven frontier models show that the best model reaches only 45.3% strict accuracy, wrong-state replacement remains below 17\% for all models, and the widest model separation (17% to 90%) is driven by whether agents inspect existing state before acting. Partial-credit and step-efficiency analyses further reveal that many failures are near-miss closures rather than early breakdowns, and that models exhibit qualitatively different failure styles under state conflict.

仿真到现实 1 篇

Coding Agent Is Good As World Simulator

High 2605.14398
Hongyu Wang, Jingquan Wang, Bocheng Zou, Radu Serban, Dan Negrut
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出通过代码生成构建物理仿真世界模型的智能体框架，优于视频基模型。
🎯研究动机

现有基于视频的世界模型虽能生成视觉上合理的动态，但未显式施加物理约束，导致生成的视频滚动在物理上不真实，存在不稳定接触、形状扭曲或运动不一致等问题。

❓解决问题

如何构建物理上可信的交互式仿真环境，使生成的世界模型既满足自然语言指令又符合物理规律。

🔎现象分析

视频基世界模型因从视频推断动态并以隐状态表示，无法显式保证物理约束，导致生成内容物理不真实。

🛠️主要方法

提出智能体框架，包含规划、代码生成、视觉审查和物理分析四个智能体，通过迭代生成和修正可执行仿真代码来构建物理基世界模型。

📊实验结果

实验结果表明，该框架在物理准确性、指令忠实度和视觉质量上优于先进视频基模型，并可用于驾驶仿真和具身机器人任务。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种通过代码生成构建物理基世界模型的智能体框架，显式施加物理约束。
  • 在物理准确性、指令忠实度和视觉质量上超越先进视频基模型，适用于驾驶仿真和具身机器人任务。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖仿真引擎的物理精度，复杂场景下代码生成可能出错。
  • 多智能体迭代可能增加计算开销和延迟。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

World models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for building interactive simulation environments, with recent video-based approaches demonstrating impressive progress in generating visually plausible dynamics. However, because these models typically infer dynamics from video and represent them in latent states, they do not explicitly enforce physical constraints. As a result, the generated video rollouts are not physically plausible, exhibiting unstable contacts, distorted shapes, or inconsistent motion. In this paper, we present an agentic framework constructing physics-based world models through executable simulation code. The framework coordinates planning, code generation, visual review, and physics analysis agents. The planning agent converts the natural language prompt into a structured scene plan, the code agent implements it as executable simulation code, and the visual review agent provide visual feedback while the physics analysis agent checks physical consistency. The code is iteratively revised based on the feedback until the simulation matches the prompt reqirements and physical constraints. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms advanced video-based models in physical accuracy, instruction fidelity and visual quality, which could be applied to various scenarios including driving simulation and embodied robot tasks.

导航 1 篇

Learning Direct Control Policies with Flow Matching for Autonomous Driving

High 2605.14832
Marcello Ceresini, Federico Pirazzoli, Andrea Bertogalli, Lorenzo Cipelli, Filippo D'Addeo, Anthony Dell'Eva, Alessandro Paolo Capasso, Alberto Broggi
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出基于流匹配的自动驾驶规划器，直接输出控制轨迹，在未见场景中展现泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

自动驾驶需要低延迟、可实时闭环重规划的规划器，现有方法在分布外场景中泛化能力不足。

❓解决问题

如何学习一个直接输出可执行控制轨迹的规划器，并能在训练分布外可靠泛化。

🔎现象分析

BEV 表示提供几何中心视角，对分布偏移不敏感；流匹配学习平滑向量场，在分布偏移下性能退化平缓。

🛠️主要方法

基于流匹配的规划器，以 BEV 栅格为条件，通过少量 ODE 积分步生成加速度和曲率控制序列。

📊实验结果

在 2D 交通模拟器收集的城市场景上训练，在闭环中评估了分布内和分布外环境（多车道高速、未见城市场景），结果显示模型可靠泛化。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于流匹配的自动驾驶规划器，直接输出控制轨迹。
  • 在真实城市场景训练，并在分布内和分布外环境中验证了泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在模拟器数据上训练，未在真实车辆上验证。
  • 可能对极端动态场景（如行人突然横穿）的泛化能力未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present a flow-matching planner for autonomous driving that directly outputs actionable control trajectories defined by acceleration and curvature profiles. The model is conditioned on a bird's-eye-view (BEV) raster of the surrounding scene and generates control sequences in a small number of Ordinary Differential Equations (ODE) integration steps, enabling low-latency inference suitable for real-time closed-loop re-planning. We train exclusively on urban scenarios (real urban city streets, intersections and roundabouts of the city of Parma, Italy) collected from a 2D traffic simulator with reactive agents, and evaluate in closed-loop on both in-distribution and markedly out-of-distribution environments, including multi-lane highways and unseen urban scenarios. Our results show that the model generalizes reliably to these unseen conditions, maintaining stable closed-loop control and successfully completing scenarios that differ substantially from the training distribution. We attribute this to the BEV representation, which provides a geometry-centric view of the scene that is inherently less sensitive to distributional shifts, and to the flow-matching formulation, which learns a smooth vector field that degrades gracefully under distribution shift. We provide video demonstrations of closed-loop behavior at this https URL .

应用: 物理科学 8 篇 · 5 个细分

材料科学 2 篇

CrystalReasoner: Reasoning and RL for Property-Conditioned Crystal Structure Generation

High 2605.14344
Yuyang Wu, Stefano Falletta, Delia McGrath, Sherry Yang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：CrystalReasoner 通过引入物理先验作为思考令牌并结合强化学习，实现了从自然语言指令生成有效、稳定且满足特定属性的晶体结构。
🎯研究动机

现有基于 LLM 的晶体结构生成模型缺乏原子级精度，而扩散方法难以整合高级科学知识，导致生成的结构常无效、不稳定或缺乏所需属性。

❓解决问题

如何生成既满足物理有效性、化学一致性和热力学稳定性，又能根据自然语言指令控制特定属性（如空间群、弹性模量）的晶体结构。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CrystalReasoner 框架，在生成原子坐标前引入物理先验（晶体对称性、局域配位环境、预测物理性质）作为思考令牌，并使用多目标密集奖励函数的强化学习对齐生成结果与物理有效性、化学一致性和热力学稳定性。针对属性条件任务设计专用奖励函数。

📊实验结果

实验表明，与先前工作及无思考轨迹或 RL 的基线相比，CrystalReasoner 在多种指标上表现更优，将 S.U.N. 比率提升三倍，并在属性条件生成上取得更好性能。模型还展现出自适应推理能力，推理长度随原子数增加而增长。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将物理先验作为思考令牌的 LLM 框架，弥合自然语言与 3D 结构之间的鸿沟。
  • 采用多目标密集奖励函数的强化学习，提升生成结构的物理有效性、化学一致性和热力学稳定性。
  • 在属性条件生成任务上设计专用奖励函数，实现离散约束和连续属性的可控生成。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量物理先验知识，对未知或复杂晶体系统的泛化能力有待验证。
  • 强化学习训练可能对奖励函数设计敏感，需要领域专家调参。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generative modeling has emerged as a promising approach for crystal structure discovery. However, existing LLM-based generative models struggle with low-level atomic precision, while diffusion-based methods fall short in integrating high-level scientific knowledge. As a result, generated structures are often invalid, unstable, or do not possess desirable properties. To address this gap, we propose CrystalReasoner (\method), an end-to-end LLM framework that generates crystal structures from natural language instructions through reasoning and alignment. \method introduces physical priors as thinking tokens, which include crystallographic symmetry, local coordination environments and predicted physical properties before generating atomic coordinates. This bridges the gap between natural language and 3D structures. \method then employs reinforcement learning (RL) with a multi-objective, dense reward function to align generation with physical validity, chemical consistency, and thermodynamic stability. For property-conditioned tasks, we design task-specific reward functions and train specialized models for discrete constraints (e.g., space group) and continuous properties (e.g., elasticity, thermal expansion). Empirical results demonstrate that compared to prior works and baselines without thinking traces or RL, \method obtains better performance on diverse metrics, triples S.U.N. ratio, and achieves better performance for property conditioned generation. \method also exhibits adaptive reasoning, increasing reasoning lengths as the number of atoms increases. Our work demonstrates the potential of leveraging thinking traces and RL for generating valid, stable, and property-conditioned crystal structures. Please see our work at this https URL .

Agentic Design of Compositional Descriptors via Autoresearch for Materials Science Applications

Medium 2605.14671
Matteo Cobelli, Stefano Sanvito
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 Automat 框架，让 LLM 驱动的编码代理自动设计材料科学中的成分描述符，提升预测性能。
🎯研究动机

材料科学中手动设计特征描述符耗时且依赖领域知识，自动化的模型选择和超参数优化已较成熟，但自动设计输入描述符仍具挑战。

❓解决问题

如何让 AI 代理自动生成并优化用于材料性质预测的成分描述符，避免手动特征工程。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

Automat 框架：基于 LLM 的编码代理（使用 OpenAI Codex/GPT-5.5）迭代提出、实现、评估和精炼仅从化学式推导的描述符，通过随机森林工作流进行性能评估。

📊实验结果

在无机材料实验带隙和铁磁化合物居里温度两个任务上，与分数成分、Magpie 及组合基线对比，Automat 取得改进。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Automat 框架，实现描述符的自动化设计，超越模型选择和超参数优化。
  • 在带隙和居里温度预测任务上，Automat 优于分数成分、Magpie 等基线，且描述符具有化学可解释性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 描述符冗余
  • 对贪婪特征扩展敏感
  • 需要显式复杂度控制、描述符剪枝和更复杂的搜索策略
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autoresearch offers a flexible paradigm for automating scientific tasks, in which an AI agent proposes, implements, evaluates, and refines candidate solutions against a quantitative objective. Here, we use composition-based materials-property prediction to test whether such agents can perform a task beyond model selection and hyperparameter optimization: the design of input descriptors. We introduce Automat, an autoresearch framework where a coding agent based on a large language model generates composition-only descriptors for chemical compounds and evaluates them using a random forest workflow. The agent is restricted to information derivable from chemical formulas and iteratively proposes, implements, and tests chemically motivated descriptor strategies. We apply Automat, with OpenAI Codex using GPT-5.5 as the coding agent, to the prediction of experimental band gaps in inorganic materials and Curie temperatures in ferromagnetic compounds. In both tasks, Automat improves over fractional-composition, Magpie, and combined fractional-composition/Magpie baselines, while producing descriptor families that are chemically interpretable. These results provide a demonstration that autoresearch agents can generate competitive, task-specific materials descriptors without manual feature engineering during the run. They also reveal current limitations, including descriptor redundancy, sensitivity to greedy feature expansion, and the need for explicit complexity control, descriptor pruning, and more sophisticated search strategies.

物理/分子动力学 2 篇

Deciphering Neural Reparameterized Full-Waveform Inversion with Neural Sensitivity Kernel and Wave Tangent Kernel

Medium 2605.14370
Ruihua Chen, Yisi Luo, Bangyu Wu, Xile Zhao, Deyu Meng
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：通过神经敏感核和波切向核理论揭示神经重参数化全波形反演的收敛机制，并提出改进方法。
🎯研究动机

全波形反演（FWI）对初始模型和波场数据质量要求高，神经重参数化 FWI（NeurFWI）虽降低依赖但高分辨率收敛慢，其理论机制尚不明确，亟需理论分析以指导改进。

❓解决问题

NeurFWI 收敛行为背后的理论机制不清晰，导致难以系统性地提升其收敛速度和反演性能。

🔎现象分析

NeurFWI 收敛慢且高分辨率成分收敛滞后，神经表示引入的 NTK 对敏感核和切向核产生自适应调制，导致频谱滤波、梯度波数调制和波频偏置等效应。

🛠️主要方法

建立神经敏感核（NSK）和波切向核（WTK）理论框架，分析 NeurFWI 收敛行为与核特征结构的关系，并据此设计具有定制特征结构的增强 NeurFWI 方法。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出 NSK 和 WTK 理论框架，揭示 NeurFWI 收敛机制与核特征结构的关系。
  • 基于理论洞察提出增强 NeurFWI 方法，提升反演性能和效率，并在地震勘探和医学成像中验证。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析可能依赖于特定假设，如网络结构或数据分布。
  • 增强方法的泛化性需在更多场景下验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Full-waveform inversion (FWI) estimates unknown parameters in the wave equation from limited boundary measurements. Recent advances in neural reparameterized FWI (NeurFWI) demonstrate that representing the parameters using a neural network can reduce the reliance on the high-quality initial model and wavefield data, at the cost of slow high-resolution convergence. However, its underlying theoretical mechanism remains unclear. In this study, we establish the neural sensitivity kernel (NSK) and the wave tangent kernel (WTK) to analyze their convergence behavior from both model and data domains. These theoretical frameworks show that the neural tangent kernel (NTK) induced by neural representation adaptively modulates the original sensitivity and wave tangent kernels. This modulation leads to several key outcomes, i.e., the spectral filtering effect, the gradient wavenumber modulation, and the wave frequency bias, connecting the convergence behavior of NeurFWI with the eigen-structures of NSK and WTK. Building on these insights, we propose several enhanced NeurFWI methods with tailored eigen-structures in NSK and WTK to improve inversion performances and efficiency. We numerically validate these theoretical claims and the proposed methods in seismic exploration, and firstly extend their application to medical imaging.

Eradicating Negative Transfer in Multi-Physics Foundation Models via Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Routing

Medium 2605.15179
Ellwil Sharma, Arastu Sharma
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 Shodh-MoE 稀疏专家路由架构，解决多物理场基础模型中的负迁移问题。
🎯研究动机

科学机器学习向通用基础模型扩展时，不同偏微分方程体系联合训练会导致梯度冲突、优化不稳定和可塑性损失，即负迁移问题。

❓解决问题

多物理场（如宽带明渠流体动力学与边界主导多孔介质流）对单一密集参数路径提出不相容的谱与几何需求，导致负迁移。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

Shodh-MoE：稀疏激活的潜在 Transformer 架构，包含物理信息自编码器（Helmholtz 速度参数化）、Top-1 软语义路由器将局部潜在块分配给专家子网络，实现不同物理机制的专用参数路径。

📊实验结果

在混合三维物理张量上进行 20,000 步分布式预训练，路由遥测显示领域自动分叉，潜在验证 MSE 分别为 2.46e-5 和 9.76e-6，解码物理 MSE 分别为 2.48e-6 和 1.76e-6。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出稀疏专家路由机制缓解多物理场干扰，实现领域自动分叉。
  • 保证精确质量守恒，在 128^3 网格上达到~2.8e-10 的物理可验证速度散度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的 PDE 体系。
  • 稀疏路由的泛化能力未在更多物理场景中验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Scaling Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) toward universal foundation models is bottlenecked by negative transfer: the simultaneous co-training of disparate partial differential equation (PDE) regimes can induce gradient conflict, unstable optimization, and plasticity loss in dense neural operators. In particular, broadband open-channel fluid dynamics and boundary-dominated porous media flows impose incompatible spectral and geometric demands on a single dense parameter path. We introduce Shodh-MoE, a sparse-activated latent transformer architecture for multi-physics transport. Shodh-MoE operates on compressed 16^3 physical latents produced by a physics-informed autoencoder with an intra-tokenizer Helmholtz-style velocity parameterization, restricting decoded states to divergence-free velocity manifolds. The model guarantees exact mass conservation, achieving a physically verifiable velocity divergence of ~2.8 x 10^-10 (evaluated post-hoc in FP64) on 128^3 grids. A Top-1 soft-semantic router dynamically assigns localized latent patches to expert subnetworks, enabling specialized parameter paths for distinct physical mechanisms while preserving shared experts for universal symmetries. In a 20,000-step distributed pretraining run over mixed three-dimensional physical tensors, routing telemetry shows autonomous domain bifurcation: held-out validation tokens from the open-channel domain route exclusively to Expert 0, while porous-media tokens route exclusively to Expert 1. The model converges simultaneously across both regimes, achieving latent validation MSEs of 2.46 x 10^-5 and 9.76 x 10^-6, and decoded physical MSEs of 2.48 x 10^-6 and 1.76 x 10^-6. These results support sparse expert routing as a practical architectural mechanism for mitigating multi-physics interference in universal neural operators.

生物/蛋白质/药物 2 篇

GenCircuit-RL: Reinforcement Learning from Hierarchical Verification for Genetic Circuit Design

Medium 2605.14215
Noah Flynn
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：用分层验证奖励的强化学习框架生成遗传电路代码，提升功能推理任务成功率 14-16 个百分点。
🎯研究动机

遗传电路设计仍依赖专家手动过程，效率低且难以自动化，现有方法缺乏对电路功能正确性的系统验证。

❓解决问题

如何通过代码生成自动设计遗传电路，并确保生成电路在语法、语义和功能上的正确性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GenCircuit-RL，基于分层验证奖励的强化学习框架，将正确性分解为五个层次（从代码执行到任务特定拓扑检查），并采用四阶段课程学习逐步从代码生成过渡到功能推理。

📊实验结果

在 SynBio-Reason 基准上，分层验证奖励相比二元奖励在功能推理任务上提升 14-16 个百分点，课程学习对强设计性能至关重要。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GenCircuit-RL，利用分层验证奖励和课程学习进行遗传电路设计。
  • 构建 SynBio-Reason 基准，包含 4,753 个电路和六种规范电路类型，支持分布外评估。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 pysbol3 和 SBOL 形式化表示，泛化到其他表示需调整。
  • 基准电路类型有限，可能未覆盖所有实际设计场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Genetic circuit design remains a laborious, expert-driven process despite decades of progress in synthetic biology. We study this problem through code generation: models produce Python code in pysbol3 to construct genetic circuits in the Synthetic Biology Open Language (SBOL), a formal representation that supports automated verification. We introduce GenCircuit-RL, a reinforcement learning framework built around hierarchical verification rewards that decompose correctness into five levels, from code execution to task-specific topological checks, and a four-stage curriculum that shifts optimization pressure from code generation to functional reasoning. We also introduce SynBio-Reason, a benchmark of 4,753 circuits spanning six canonical circuit types and nine tasks from code repair to de novo design, with held-out biological parts for out-of-distribution evaluation. Hierarchical verification improves task success on functional reasoning tasks by 14 to 16 percentage points over binary rewards, and curriculum learning is required for strong design performance. The resulting models generate topologically correct circuits, generalize to novel biological parts, and rediscover canonical designs from the synthetic biology literature.

AIM-DDI: A Model-Agnostic Multimodal Integration Module for Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction

Medium 2605.14327
Yerin Park, Sangseon Lee
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出模型无关的多模态融合模块 AIM-DDI，提升药物相互作用预测中未见药物泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

药物相互作用预测中，未见药物泛化是关键挑战；现有多模态模型融合机制与特定预测架构绑定，难以复用。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个与预测架构无关的多模态融合模块，以提升未见药物对的 DDI 预测性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

AIM-DDI 将异质模态信息表示为共享隐空间中的 token，通过统一融合模块建模跨模态依赖，实现模型无关的多模态集成。

📊实验结果

在多种 DDI 预测架构和 DrugBank 数据集上评估，摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出架构无关的多模态融合模块 AIM-DDI，可集成结构、化学和语义信号。
  • 在多种 DDI 模型和 DrugBank 设置下验证了 AIM-DDI 的通用性和有效性，尤其在双未见药物设置下提升显著。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的多模态数据。
  • 融合模块的复杂度可能影响训练效率。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction is a critical task in computational biomedicine, as adverse interactions between co-administered drugs can cause severe side effects and clinical risks. A key challenge is unseen-drug generalization, where interactions must be predicted for drugs not observed during training. Although multimodal DDI models exploit diverse drug-related information, their fusion mechanisms are often tied to specific prediction architectures, limiting their reuse across models. To address this, we propose AIM-DDI, an architecture-independent multimodal integration module that represents heterogeneous modality information as tokens in a shared latent space. By modeling dependencies across modality tokens through a unified fusion module, AIM-DDI enables model-agnostic integration of structural, chemical, and semantic drug signals across different DDI prediction architectures. Extensive evaluations across diverse DDI models and DrugBank-based settings show that AIM-DDI consistently improves prediction performance, with the strongest gains under the most challenging both-unseen setting where neither drug in a test pair is observed during training. These results suggest that treating multimodal integration as a reusable module, rather than a model-specific fusion component, is an effective strategy for robust unseen-drug DDI prediction.

其他 1 篇

Beyond AI as Assistants: Toward Autonomous Discovery in Cosmology

Medium 2605.14791
Licong Xu, Thomas Borrett
arXiv PDF astro-ph.IM
TL;DR：提出两种 AI 智能体系统（CMBEvolve 和 CosmoEvolve），推动宇宙学从辅助工具迈向自主科学发现。
🎯研究动机

当前 AI 在科学领域主要作为辅助工具，缺乏自主发现能力；宇宙学中存在大量需要自动化探索的复杂任务，现有方法难以兼顾定量优化与开放研究。

❓解决问题

如何设计 AI 智能体系统，使其既能处理具有明确量化目标的宇宙学任务，又能应对开放式的科学工作流。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出两个互补系统：CMBEvolve 通过 LLM 引导的代码进化和树搜索处理定量任务；CosmoEvolve 通过虚拟多智能体研究实验室处理开放式科学工作流。

📊实验结果

在弱引力透镜异常检测中，CMBEvolve 通过代码进化迭代提升基准分数；CosmoEvolve 在 ACT DR6 数据分析中识别出非平凡的对依赖和尺度依赖行为，并生成分析级诊断。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CMBEvolve 系统，利用 LLM 代码进化和树搜索优化宇宙学定量任务。
  • 提出 CosmoEvolve 系统，构建虚拟多智能体实验室实现开放式科学发现。
  • 在弱引力透镜异常检测和 ACT DR6 数据分析中展示初步效果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅提供初步演示，缺乏大规模系统性评估。
  • 系统在开放研究中的泛化能力尚未充分验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) agents are pushing AI beyond tools toward autonomous scientific discovery. We discuss two complementary agentic systems for cosmology: \texttt{CMBEvolve}, which targets tasks with explicit quantitative objectives through LLM-guided code evolution and tree search, and \texttt{CosmoEvolve}, which targets open-ended scientific workflows through a virtual multi-agent research laboratory. As preliminary demonstrations, we apply \texttt{CMBEvolve} to out-of-distribution detection in weak-lensing maps, where it iteratively improves the benchmark score through code evolution, and \texttt{CosmoEvolve} to autonomous ACT DR6 data analysis, where it identifies non-trivial pair- and scale-dependent behaviour and produces analysis-grade diagnostics. These examples show how cosmology can provide both controlled benchmark tasks and realistic open-ended research problems for the development of AI scientist systems.

气候/地球科学 1 篇

A plug-and-play generative framework for multi-satellite precipitation estimation

Medium 2605.14426
Yunfan Yang, Haofei Sun, Xiuyu Sun, Wei Han, Xiaoze Xu, Xingtao Song, Jun Li, Zhiqiu Gao et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：PRISMA 是一个即插即用的生成式框架，通过无条件降水先验和传感器特定条件分支实现多卫星降水估计，支持新传感器灵活接入。
🎯研究动机

可靠降水监测对减灾、水资源管理和农业决策至关重要，多源卫星观测是主要手段，但传统方法计算效率低，深度学习方法缺乏灵活性，无法在不重新训练完整模型的情况下接入新传感器。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个计算高效且能灵活扩展新传感器的多源卫星降水估计框架。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

PRISMA 框架：学习 IMERG Final 场上的无条件降水先验，并通过独立训练的传感器特定条件分支进行约束，实现即插即用，无需重新训练生成骨干网络。

📊实验结果

在 FY-4B AGRI 红外和 GPM GMI 微波观测上评估，与仅红外估计相比，CSI 提升高达 40.3%，RMSE 降低 22.6%，平均推理时间约 37 秒；独立雨量计验证和中国台风案例研究进一步确认了性能提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PRISMA，一个即插即用的生成式多传感器降水估计框架，支持新观测源灵活接入。
  • 在 FY-4B AGRI 红外和 GPM GMI 微波观测上验证，CSI 提升高达 40.3%，RMSE 降低 22.6%，台风案例中风暴核心 MAE 降低 42.3%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 IMERG Final 先验的质量，在无 IMERG 区域泛化性未知。
  • 推理时间约 37 秒，对于实时应用可能仍需优化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reliable precipitation monitoring is essential for disaster risk reduction, water resources management, and agricultural decision-making. Multi-source satellite observations, particularly the combination of geostationary infrared and passive microwave measurements, have become a primary means of precipitation detection. Traditional multi-source satellite precipitation estimation methods remain computationally inefficient, and many deep learning methods lack the flexibility to incorporate new sensors without retraining the full model. Here we introduce PRISMA (Precipitation Inference from Satellite Modalities via generAtive modeling), a plug-and-play latent generative framework for multi-sensor precipitation estimation. PRISMA learns an unconditional precipitation prior from IMERG Final fields and constrains it through independently trained, sensor-specific conditional branches, allowing new observation sources to be incorporated without retraining the generative backbone. Applied to FY-4B AGRI infrared and GPM GMI microwave observations, PRISMA improves Critical Success Index by up to 40.3% and reduces root-mean-square error by 22.6% relative to infrared-only estimation within microwave swaths, while also improving probabilistic skill and maintaining an average inference time of about 37 s. Independent rain-gauge validation across China confirms consistent gains, and typhoon case studies show that microwave conditioning restores eyewall and spiral rainband structures, reducing storm-core mean absolute error by up to 42.3%. PRISMA thus provides an extensible and efficient framework for multi-sensor precipitation estimation.

可解释 AI 6 篇 · 3 个细分

机制可解释性 4 篇

SliceGraph: Mapping Process Isomers in Multi-Run Chain-of-Thought Reasoning

High 2605.14619
Kang Chen, Junjie Nian, Yixin Cao, Yugang Jiang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：SliceGraph 通过互 KNN 构建 CoT 推理轨迹的图结构，发现同答案正确轨迹存在多种过程异构体，揭示最终答案聚合忽略的丰富过程几何。
🎯研究动机

多轮链式思维推理通常只聚合最终答案，丢弃了采样轨迹在中间计算中如何共享、分裂和重组的结构信息，缺乏对推理过程几何的测量工具。

❓解决问题

如何建模和量化多轮 CoT 推理中轨迹之间的过程结构（如共享、分裂、重组），并揭示最终答案聚合所忽略的异构推理路径。

🔎现象分析

在 85.5% 的问题 - 模型单元中，相同答案的正确 CoT 分裂为多个过程家族；76.6% 的轨迹对跨家族；成功区域常分裂为不连通的高价值核心，路线家族在这些核心足迹上特化。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SliceGraph，通过互 KNN 基于稀疏激活键的 Jaccard 相似性构建 CoT 切片的图结构，并利用双连通分量和过程家族分析推理过程几何。

📊实验结果

在三个 4B/8B 模型上的数学和科学基准测试中，对 954 个问题 - 模型单元进行盲注标注，并进行了表征消融、跨架构复制和跨尺度复制实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SliceGraph，一种后验图构建方法，用于揭示多轮 CoT 推理的过程几何。
  • 发现并定义了过程异构体：相同答案但过程家族不同的正确轨迹。
  • 通过标签种子奖励场和类型状态转移分析，展示了过程家族的特化行为。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖于稀疏激活键的 Jaccard 相似性，可能对模型架构敏感。
  • 过程家族的划分可能受 kNN 参数影响，需要进一步调优。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-run chain-of-thought reasoning is usually collapsed to final-answer aggregates, which discard howsampled trajectories share, split, and rejoin through intermediate computation. We propose SliceGraph, a post-hoc problem-model-cell graph built by mutual-kNN over sparse activation-key Jaccard similarity between CoT slices, and treat it as a measurement object for process geometry rather than as a decoding program. Across sampled CoT ensembles from three primary 4B/8B models on math and science benchmarks, blinded annotation supports SliceGraph biconnected components as shared reasoning-state units and process families as within-family strategy-coherent route units. In 85.5% of 954 problem-model cells, correct CoTs sharing the same normalized answer split into multiple process families; among cells with at least two such runs, 76.6% of run pairs are cross-family on average. We call such same-answer, family-divergent correct trajectories process isomers. A label-seeded reward field provides a separate value-landscape layer: success-associated regions often split into disconnected high-value cores, and route families specialize over these core footprints rather than merely duplicating one another. A typed-state transition analysis further shows that process families navigate the same atlas with distinct transition kernels under matched null controls. Representation ablations, a cross-architecture replication, and two cross-scale replications support the robustness of the route-family scaffold, showing that final-answer aggregation overlooks this structured multi-route process geometry.

Why Retrieval-Augmented Generation Fails: A Graph Perspective

High 2605.14192
Kai Guo, Xinnan Dai, Zhibo Zhang, Nuohan Lin, Shenglai Zeng, Jie Ren, Haoyu Han, Jiliang Tang
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：从图视角揭示 RAG 失败原因，通过归因图分析证据流结构差异，并提出基于图的错误检测与干预方法。
🎯研究动机

RAG 虽广泛应用但仍常产生错误答案，其失败原因缺乏深入理解，现有研究未从模型内部机制层面分析证据如何影响生成。

❓解决问题

理解 RAG 系统为何在拥有外部信息时仍失败，并基于此开发错误检测与干预方法。

🔎现象分析

正确预测与失败预测在归因图拓扑上存在一致的结构差异：正确预测具有更深推理路径、更分散的证据流和更结构化的局部连接模式，而失败预测则表现出浅层、碎片化且过度集中的证据流。

🛠️主要方法

使用电路追踪构建归因图，建模检索证据、中间激活和生成 token 之间的信息流；基于图拓扑特征开发错误检测框架；通过强化问题约束的证据接地进行目标干预。

📊实验结果

在多个问答基准上观察结构差异，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次从图视角对 RAG 失败进行模型内部研究，揭示正确与失败预测的归因图结构差异。
  • 提出基于归因图拓扑特征的错误检测框架。
  • 展示归因图可用于目标干预，通过重塑内部路由减少错误。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的问答任务或模型架构。
  • 归因图构建的计算成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a powerful and widely used approach for improving large language models by grounding generation in retrieved evidence. However, RAG systems still produce incorrect answers in many cases. Why RAG fails despite having access to external information remains poorly understood. We present a model-internal study of retrieval-augmented generation that examines how retrieved evidence influences answer generation. Using circuit tracing, we construct attribution graphs that model the flow of information through transformer layers during decoding. These graphs represent interactions among retrieved context, intermediate model activations, and generated tokens, providing a graph, circuit-level view of how external evidence is integrated into the model's reasoning process across multiple question answering benchmarks, we observe consistent structural differences: correct predictions exhibit deeper reasoning paths, more distributed evidence flow, and a more structured pattern of local connectivity, while failed predictions show shallower, fragmented, and overly concentrated evidence flow. Building on these findings, we develop a graph-based error detection framework that uses attribution-graph topology features. Furthermore, we show that attribution graphs enable targeted interventions. By reinforcing question-constrained evidence grounding, we reshape internal routing so that answer generation remains guided by the question, leading to more effective integration of retrieved information and fewer errors.

Dynamics of the Transformer Residual Stream: Coupling Spectral Geometry to Network Topology

Medium 2605.14258
Jesseba Fernando, Grigori Guitchounts
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：LLM 残差流中雅可比矩阵的谱几何呈现从非正态旋转层到近对称层的单调梯度，并伴随低秩瓶颈，且与图社区拓扑耦合。
🎯研究动机

理解大型语言模型中计算如何逐层传播是核心问题，但现有分析依赖标量摘要或近似线性化，未能揭示训练后 LLM 的完整谱几何。

❓解决问题

揭示训练后 LLM 残差流中雅可比矩阵的谱几何结构及其与网络拓扑的关系。

🔎现象分析

训练在深度方向上安装了一个单调谱梯度：从非正态、旋转主导的早期层到近对称的后期层，同时存在累积低秩瓶颈，将扰动压缩到残差流有效维度的一小部分。这种梯度与维度坍缩是学习得到的而非架构固有的，移除结构化非正态性后基本消失。图社区的拓扑位置预测雅可比矩阵是放大还是抑制它们，耦合符号由局部算子类型决定，初始化时不存在此关系。

🛠️主要方法

对三个生产级 LLM 进行完整雅可比矩阵特征分解，分析谱几何，并结合图社区拓扑分析耦合关系。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在多个生产级 LLM 上完成完整雅可比特征分解，揭示了训练后残差流中单调谱梯度和低秩瓶颈。
  • 发现谱几何与图社区拓扑之间的耦合关系，且该关系是学习得到的。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅分析了三个生产级 LLM，可能不适用于所有架构。
  • 未探讨谱几何与下游任务性能的直接关联。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models are remarkably capable, yet how computation propagates through their layers remains poorly understood. A growing line of work treats depth as discrete time and the residual stream as a dynamical system, where each layer's nonlinear update has a local linear description. However, previous analyses have relied on scalar summaries or approximate linearizations, leaving the full spectral geometry of trained LLMs unknown. We perform full Jacobian eigendecomposition across three production--scale LLMs and show that training installs a monotonic spectral gradient through depth -- from non-normal, rotation-dominated early layers to near--symmetric late layers -- together with a cumulative low-rank bottleneck that funnels perturbations into a small fraction of the residual stream's effective dimensions. Our experiments reveal that this gradient and the dimensional collapse are learned rather than architectural, and is largely dissolved when structured non-normality is removed. We further show that the topological positioning of graph communities predicts whether the Jacobian amplifies or suppresses them, with the sign of the coupling determined by the local operator type, a relationship absent at initialization. These results map a learned spectral geometry in LLMs that links perturbation propagation and compression to the network's functional topology.

TAPIOCA: Why Task- Aware Pruning Improves OOD model Capability

Medium 2605.14738
Krish Sharma, Omar Naim, Soumadeep Saha, Nicholas Asher
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：任务感知剪枝通过移除放大 OOD 几何失真的层来提升 OOD 性能，但对 ID 数据无益。
🎯研究动机

任务感知层剪枝被证明能提升特定任务性能，但其改进发生的条件和原因尚不明确，理解其机制有助于设计更有效的剪枝策略。

❓解决问题

探究任务感知剪枝何时以及为何能提升模型性能，特别是其对分布外（OOD）数据的影响机制。

🔎现象分析

OOD 输入会导致层范数和成对距离分布偏离 ID 分布，形成扭曲的任务适应几何；任务感知剪枝通过移除放大这种扭曲的层，使 OOD 表征向 ID 分布对齐。

🛠️主要方法

通过控制多项式回归和大语言模型实验，分析剪枝对 ID/OOD 性能的影响；利用层范数和成对距离剖面刻画几何特征；通过残差缩放干预提供因果证据。

📊实验结果

在控制多项式回归任务和多种规模的大语言模型上进行实验，通过分布偏移和残差缩放干预验证因果性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现任务感知剪枝对 ID 数据无益但持续提升 OOD 精度。
  • 提出几何解释：剪枝移除放大 OOD 几何失真的层，使 OOD 表征重新对齐任务适应几何。
  • 通过控制分布偏移和残差缩放干预提供因果证据，并在不同规模模型上验证一致性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了多项式回归和 LLM 场景，其他架构或任务可能不适用。
  • 几何解释依赖于层范数和成对距离，可能无法捕捉所有失真模式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent work has promoted task-aware layer pruning as a way to improve model performance on particular tasks, as shown by TALE. In this paper, we investigate when such improvements occur and why. We show first that, across controlled polynomial regression tasks and large language models, such pruning yields no benefit on in-distribution (ID) data but consistently improves out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy. We further show empirically that OOD inputs induce layerwise norm and pairwise-distance profiles that deviate from the corresponding ID profiles. This leads to a geometric explanation of task-aware pruning: each task induces a task-adapted geometry, characterized empirically by the representation profiles observed on ID inputs. OOD inputs can introduce a distorted version of the task-adapted geometry. Task-aware pruning identifies layers that create or amplify this distortion; by removing them, it shifts OOD representational norms and pairwise distances toward those observed on the adapted distribution. This realigns OOD inputs with the model's task-adapted geometry and improves performance. We provide causal evidence through controlled distribution shifts and residual-scaling interventions, and demonstrate consistent behavior across model scales.

归因与因果 1 篇

How to Evaluate and Refine your CAM

Medium 2605.14641
Luca Domeniconi, Alessandra Stramiglio, Michele Lombardi, Samuele Salti
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出合成数据集和 ARCC 指标用于评估 CAM，并引入 RefineCAM 生成高分辨率归因图。
🎯研究动机

CAM 被广泛用于 CNN 解释，但缺乏真实归因导致评估困难，且现有方法生成低分辨率归因图限制了解释的实用性。

❓解决问题

如何可靠评估 CAM 方法并生成高分辨率归因图。

🔎现象分析

现有 CAM 评估指标缺乏真实标签，难以验证其可靠性；常用 CAM 方法产生低分辨率归因图。

🛠️主要方法

构建带真实归因的合成数据集，提出 ARCC 复合指标；提出 RefineCAM 通过聚合多层 CAM 生成高分辨率归因图。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入带真实归因的合成数据集，用于严格比较 CAM 评估指标。
  • 提出 ARCC 指标，更可靠地识别忠实解释。
  • 提出 RefineCAM 方法，生成高分辨率归因图。
⚠️方法局限
  • 合成数据集可能无法完全代表真实场景。
  • ARCC 指标可能依赖特定假设。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Class attribution maps (CAMs) provide local explanations for the decisions of convolutional neural networks. While widely used in practice, the evaluation of CAMs remains challenging due to the lack of ground-truth explanations, making it difficult to evaluate the soundness of existing metrics. Independently, most commonly used CAM methods produce low-resolution attribution maps, which limits their usefulness for detailed interpretability. To address the evaluation challenge, we introduce a synthetic dataset with ground-truth attributions that enables a rigorous comparison of CAM evaluation metrics. Using this dataset, we analyze existing metrics and propose ARCC, a new composite metric that more reliably identifies faithful explanations. To address the low resolution issue, we introduce RefineCAM, a method that produces high-resolution attribution maps by aggregating CAMs across multiple network layers. Our results show that RefineCAM consistently outperforms existing methods according to the proposed evaluation.

探针与表征分析 1 篇

Your CLIP has 164 dimensions of noise: Exploring the embeddings covariance eigenspectrum of contrastively pretrained vision-language transformers

High 2605.14893
Jakub Grzywaczewski, Dawid Płudowski, Przemysław Biecek
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：VLM 共享潜空间存在大量非语义噪声，通过协方差谱分解可分离并剪除噪声维度而不损害下游性能。
🎯研究动机

对比预训练的视觉 - 语言模型（VLM）虽作为强大特征提取器，但其共享潜空间存在结构异常，并积累了大量非语义、多模态噪声，影响表征的纯净性和可解释性。

❓解决问题

如何识别并分离 VLM 共享潜空间中的语义信号与非语义噪声，并验证噪声维度的可剪除性。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到噪声几何结构在不同数据子集间呈现强子群不变性，且剪除这些共享噪声维度对下游任务性能无害甚至有益。

🛠️主要方法

对 VLM 的协方差矩阵进行谱分解，将潜空间分解为多模态语义信号分量和共享噪声子空间。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了 VLM 潜空间中存在大量由架构级噪声主导的维度，而非仅任务相关语义。
  • 提出通过谱分解分离语义信号与噪声，并证明剪除噪声维度可保持或提升下游性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法可能依赖于特定 VLM 架构，泛化性需验证。
  • 噪声维度的剪除策略可能对某些任务有细微影响，需更全面评估。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Contrastively pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) serve as powerful feature extractors. Yet, their shared latent spaces are prone to structural anomalies and act as repositories for non-semantic, multi-modal noise. To address this phenomenon, we employ spectral decomposition of covariance matrices to decompose the VLM latent space into a multi-modal semantic signal component and a shared noise subspace. We observe that this noise geometry exhibits strong subgroup invariance across distinct data subsets. Crucially, pruning these shared noise dimensions is mainly harmless, preserving or actively improving downstream task performance. By isolating true semantic signals from artifactual noise, this work provides new mechanistic insights into the representational structure of modern VLMs, suggesting that a substantial fraction of their latent geometry is governed by shared, architecture-level noise rather than task-relevant semantics alone.

应用: 神经/认知科学 6 篇 · 3 个细分

脑信号/脑解码 3 篇

Bridging Brain and Semantics: A Hierarchical Framework for Semantically Enhanced fMRI-to-Video Reconstruction

High 2605.14569
Yujie Wei, Chenglong Ma, Jianxiong Gao, Chenhui Wang, Shiwei Zhang, Biao Gong, Shuai Tan, Hangjie Yuan et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 CineNeuron 分层框架，通过语义增强和记忆融合提升 fMRI 到视频重建的质量。
🎯研究动机

当前 fMRI 到视频重建方法受限于噪声信号与视频内容之间的语义鸿沟，现有语义嵌入不完整，无法捕捉动作等视频特有线索，也缺乏先验知识整合。

❓解决问题

如何从 fMRI 信号中重建高质量视频，弥合噪声信号与丰富视频内容之间的语义差距。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出当前方法依赖不完整的语义嵌入，既不能捕获视频特有线索（如动作），也不能整合先验知识，导致重建效果受限。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CineNeuron 分层框架，包含两个协同阶段：1) 自底向上的语义丰富阶段，将 fMRI 信号映射到捕捉文本语义、图像内容、动作概念和物体类别的丰富嵌入空间；2) 自顶向下的记忆整合阶段，利用 Mixture-of-Memories 方法动态选择先前数据中的相关记忆并与 fMRI 嵌入融合以优化重建。

📊实验结果

在两个 fMRI 到视频重建基准上，CineNeuron 在多个指标上超越现有最先进方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CineNeuron 分层框架，受人类大脑双通路处理机制启发，实现语义增强的 fMRI 到视频重建。
  • 设计自底向上语义丰富阶段，全面捕获多种语义信息；提出 Mixture-of-Memories 方法，动态整合先验记忆以提升重建质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模 fMRI 数据训练，数据获取成本高。
  • 记忆整合阶段的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reconstructing dynamic visual experiences as videos from functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is pivotal for advancing the understanding of neural processes. However, current fMRI-to-video reconstruction methods are hindered by a semantic gap between noisy fMRI signals and the rich content of videos, stemming from a reliance on incomplete semantic embeddings that neither capture video-specific cues (e.g., actions) nor integrate prior knowledge. To this end, we draw inspiration from the dual-pathway processing mechanism in human brain and introduce CineNeuron, a novel hierarchical framework for semantically enhanced video reconstruction from fMRI signals with two synergistic stages. First, a bottom-up semantic enrichment stage maps fMRI signals to a rich embedding space that comprehensively captures textual semantics, image contents, action concepts, and object categories. Second, a top-down memory integration stage utilizes the proposed Mixture-of-Memories method to dynamically select relevant "memories" from previously seen data and fuse them with the fMRI embedding to refine the video reconstruction. Extensive experimental results on two fMRI-to-video benchmarks demonstrate that CineNeuron surpasses state-of-the-art methods across various metrics.

REALM: Retrospective Encoder Alignment for LFP Modeling

High 2605.14867
Peicheng Wu, Zhenyu Bu, Runze Ma, Lin Du
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 REALM 框架，通过回顾式蒸馏将非因果 LFP 模型转化为因果模型，实现高效实时行为解码。
🎯研究动机

尖峰信号高采样率导致功耗和带宽瓶颈，而 LFP 虽具有长期稳定性和低能耗优势，但解码精度较低且现有方法多为非因果架构，不适合实时部署。

❓解决问题

如何利用 LFP 信号实现高精度、低资源消耗的因果行为解码模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

先预训练双向 Mamba-2 教师模型（掩码自编码），再通过表示对齐和任务监督联合目标蒸馏为紧凑因果学生模型。

📊实验结果

在行为解码任务上，REALM 一致优于现有因果和非因果 LFP 方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 REALM 回顾式蒸馏框架，首次实现因果 LFP 解码且性能优于非因果方法。
  • 在参数减少 2 倍、训练时间减少 10 倍的同时提升解码性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练教师模型的质量。
  • 未在多种脑区或更大规模数据上验证泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Spike activity has been the dominant neural signal for behavior decoding due to its high spatial and temporal resolution. However, as brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) move toward high channel counts and wireless operation, the high sampling frequency of spike signals becomes a bottleneck due to high power and bandwidth requirements. Local field potentials (LFPs) represent a different spatial-temporal scale of brain activity compared to spikes, offering key advantages including improved long-term stability, reduced energy consumption, and lower bandwidth requirement. Despite these benefits, LFP-based decoding models typically show reduced accuracy and often rely on non-causal architectures that are unsuitable for real-time deployment. To address these challenges, we propose REALM: a retrospective distillation framework that enables causal LFP decoding. Inspired by offline-to-online distillation strategies in speech recognition, REALM transfers representational knowledge from a pretrained multi-session bidirectional LFP model to a causal version for real-time deployment. We first pretrain a bidirectional Mamba-2 teacher model using a masked autoencoding objective. We then distill this teacher model into a compact student model via a combined objective of representation alignment and task supervision. REALM consistently outperforms both causal and non-causal LFP-based SOTA methods for behavior decoding. Notably, our REALM improves decoding performance while achieving a $2\times$ reduction in parameter count and a $10\times$ reduction in training time. These results demonstrate that retrospective distillation effectively bridges the gap between offline and real-time neural decoding. REALM shows that LFP-only models can achieve competitive decoding performance without reliance on spike signals, offering a practical and scalable alternative for next-generation wireless implantable BCIs.

Network-Aware Bilinear Tokenization for Brain Functional Connectivity Representation Learning

Medium 2605.14048
Leo Milecki, Qingyu Hu, Bahram Jafrasteh, Mert R. Sabuncu, Qingyu Zhao
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出网络感知双线性分词方法 NERVE，用于脑功能连接的自监督表征学习，通过双线性分解嵌入网络块，提升跨队列预测稳定性。
🎯研究动机

现有 MAE 方法将 FC 矩阵视为同质元素，忽略了大脑网络的大规模模块化组织，导致表征缺乏结构先验。

❓解决问题

如何将 FC 矩阵分词以对齐大脑网络的固有模块化组织，并处理网络对定义的非均匀尺寸 FC 块。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

NERVE 框架：将 FC 矩阵划分为网络内和网络间连接块，通过结构化双线性分解嵌入这些块，保持网络身份并降低参数复杂度。

📊实验结果

在 ABCD、PNC 和 CCNP 三个队列上进行行为和精神病预测评估，包括跨队列评估和消融研究。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出网络感知的 FC 分词策略，利用双线性分解处理非均匀 FC 块。
  • 在三个大规模发育队列上验证，相比结构无关的 MAE 和图自监督基线，表征更稳定、可迁移。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定脑图谱划分。
  • 双线性分解的线性缩放假设可能限制对更复杂网络交互的建模。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Masked autoencoders (MAEs) have recently shown promise for self-supervised representation learning of resting-state brain functional connectivity (FC). However, a fundamental question remains unresolved: how should FC matrices be tokenized to align with the intrinsic modular organization of large-scale brain networks? Existing approaches typically adopt region-centric or graph-based schemes that treat FC as structurally homogeneous elements and overlook the large-scale network brain organization. We introduce NERVE (Network-Aware Representations of Brain Functional Connectivity via Bilinear Tokenization), a self-supervised learning framework that redefines FC tokenization by partitioning FC matrices into patches of intra- and inter-network connectivity blocks. Unlike image-based MAE, where fixed-size patches share a common tokenizer, FC patches defined by network pairs are heterogeneous in size and correspond to distinct functional roles. To resolve this problem, NERVE embeds FC patches through a novel structured bilinear factorization. This formulation preserves network identity and reduces parameter complexity from quadratic to linear scaling in the number of networks. We evaluate NERVE across three large-scale developmental cohorts (ABCD, PNC, and CCNP) for behavior and psychopathology prediction. Compared to structurally agnostic MAE variants and graph-based self-supervised baselines, the proposed network-aware formulation yields more stable and transferable representations, particularly in cross-cohort evaluation. Ablation studies confirm that the proposed bilinear network embedding and anatomically grounded parcellation are critical for performance. These findings highlight the importance of incorporating domain-specific structural priors into self-supervised learning for functional connectomics.

认知建模 2 篇

Characterizing the visual representation of objects from the child's view

Medium 2605.14990
Jane Yang, Tarun Sepuri, Alvin Wei Ming Tan, Khai Loong Aw, Michael C. Frank, Bria Long
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：婴儿视角下的物体类别视觉经验高度倾斜、多变且非典型，但超类别结构反而更强。
🎯研究动机

儿童早期通过日常经验获取物体类别表征，但我们对这些学习输入的统计特性知之甚少，理解这些特性有助于构建更鲁棒和高效的视觉学习模型。

❓解决问题

分析婴儿第一人称视频中物体类别的视觉经验分布、变异性及结构特性。

🔎现象分析

儿童物体类别暴露高度倾斜（少数类别主导）；类别样本高度可变（非典型角度、杂乱场景、部分遮挡）；许多类别（尤其是动物）常以图像形式出现；尽管存在变异性，检测到的类别在超类别内（如动物、食物）的聚类比规范照片更强。

🛠️主要方法

使用 BabyView 数据集（31 名参与者，868 小时，5-36 个月）的第一人称视频，通过监督目标检测模型从超过 300 万帧中提取常见物体类别，并分析其分布、变异性及嵌入空间中的聚类结构。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 量化了婴儿视觉经验中物体类别的长尾分布和高变异性，并发现非典型视角和遮挡的普遍性。
  • 揭示了尽管样本非典型，但超类别结构（如动物、食物）在婴儿视觉经验中比规范照片更强，且该模式在自监督视觉和多模态模型嵌入中复现。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用单一数据集（BabyView），可能无法完全代表不同文化或环境的婴儿视觉经验。
  • 依赖监督目标检测模型，可能引入标注偏差或遗漏未标注类别。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Children acquire object category representations from their everyday experiences in the first few years of life. What do the inputs to this learning process look like? We analyzed first-person videos of young children's visual experience at home from the BabyView dataset ($N$ = 31 participants, 868 hours, ages 5--36 months), using a supervised object detection model to extract common object categories from more than 3 million frames. We found that children's object category exposure was highly skewed: a few categories (e.g., cups, chairs) dominated children's visual experiences while most categories appeared rarely, replicating previous findings from a more restricted set of contexts. Category exemplars were highly variable: children encountered objects from unusual angles, in highly cluttered scenes, and partially occluded views; many categories (especially animals) were most frequently viewed as depictions. Surprisingly, despite this variability, detected categories (e.g., giraffes, apples) showed stronger groupings within superordinate categories (e.g., animals, food) relative to groupings derived from canonical photographs of these categories. We found this same pattern when using high-dimensional embeddings from both self-supervised visual and multimodal models; this effect was also recapitulated in densely sampled data from individual children. Understanding the robustness and efficiency of visual category learning will require the development of models that can exploit strong superordinate structure and learn from non-canonical, sparse, and variable exemplars.

Modeling Bounded Rationality in Drug Shortage Pharmacists Using Attention-Guided Dynamic Decomposition

Low 2605.14111
Yaniv Eliyahu Amiri, Noah Chicoine, Jacqueline Griffin, Stacy Marsella
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：通过注意力引导的动态分解建模药剂师在药品短缺中的有限理性决策。
🎯研究动机

药剂师在药品短缺时面临高风险决策，但认知资源有限，需要高效分配注意力。

❓解决问题

如何建模药剂师在不确定性、时间压力和患者风险下的有限理性决策过程。

🔎现象分析

药剂师仅关注少量最紧急的药品，将认知努力集中在最紧迫的案例上。

🛠️主要方法

提出注意力引导的动态分解框架，将药品分为高成本推理子集和低成本监控子集，并开发专家代理和学习代理。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化了有限理性、注意力引导的决策框架，动态分解药品子集。
  • 通过模拟实验证明注意力引导规划能在不完全状态推理下实现稳定决策。
⚠️方法局限
  • 模拟场景可能无法完全反映真实医院环境的复杂性。
  • 注意力权重的获取依赖药剂师访谈，可能引入主观偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Hospital pharmacists make high-stakes decisions to mitigate drug shortages under uncertainty, time pressure, and patient risk. Interviews revealed that pharmacists focus attention on a small subset of drugs, limiting cognitive effort to the most urgent cases. Motivated by these findings, we formalize a bounded-rational, attention-guided decision framework that dynamically decomposes drugs into a subset for high-cost reasoning and a complementary subset for low-cost monitoring. We develop two agents: an Expert Agent that applies attention weights derived from pharmacist interviews, and a Learner Agent that adapts attention allocation over time through experience. Across simulated scenarios spanning short to long horizons, we show that attention-guided planning supports stable decision-making without complete state reasoning. These results suggest that a primary decision is not what action to take, but where to allocate cognitive effort, and that attention-guided, satisficing strategies can reduce problem complexity while maintaining stable performance.

神经网络与大脑对齐 1 篇

Do Language Models Align with Brains? Prediction Scores Are Not Enough

Medium 2605.14025
Xiao Jia
arXiv PDF q-bio.NC
TL;DR：语言模型与大脑的神经预测分数不足以证明对齐，L-PACT 框架通过多维度审计发现所有表面对齐证据均可被控制变量解释。
🎯研究动机

现有研究常用神经预测分数声称语言模型与大脑对齐，但缺乏严格审计，可能导致虚假结论。

❓解决问题

验证语言模型是否真正与大脑对齐，并评估预测分数作为证据的充分性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出预测分数在严格审计下被控制变量解释。

🛠️主要方法

提出 L-PACT 框架，包含预测性、关系性、机制剥离和可靠性边界四类证据审计，并集成决策。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了分析集规模（414 预测控制行等）和审计流程。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 L-PACT 审计框架，系统评估模型 - 大脑对齐证据
  • 通过大规模控制实验证明现有语言模型表示未通过对齐门控
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对特定语言模型和神经数据集
  • 未探讨不同模型架构或训练策略的影响
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Brain-language model comparisons often interpret neural prediction scores as evidence that model representations capture brain-relevant language computation. We asked whether language models align with brains, and whether prediction scores are enough to support that claim, using L-PACT, a source-audited framework that evaluates predictive, relational, mechanism-stripping, and reliability-bounded evidence. Across primary naturalistic language neural datasets and derived language-model representations, L-PACT compared real model features with nuisance baselines and severe controls, tested whether model-to-brain profiles reproduced brain-to-brain patterns, recomputed held-out scores after mechanism stripping, and normalized evidence against brain-brain ceilings. The locked analysis set contains 414 predictive-control rows, 2304 relational profile rows, 4320 mechanism-stripping rows, 420 brain-brain ceiling rows, and 146 integrated decision rows. Assay-sensitivity checks showed that brain-brain reliability, brain-as-model run-to-run relational profiles, independent low-level neural and WAV-derived acoustic-envelope gates, and a deterministic implanted-signal simulation can produce positive evidence when expected. Nevertheless, no real model row passed the predictive, relational, mechanism-stripping, or operational Turing-bounded reliability gates; all 146 integrated rows were control-explained. Less stringent single-criterion rules would have counted raw positive predictive, relational, stripping-delta, and ceiling-normalized effects, but L-PACT downgraded them because controls explained the apparent evidence. In the analyzed derived artifact set, the tested language-model representations do not satisfy L-PACT alignment gates; apparent positives are converted into an auditable control-explained taxonomy rather than treated as structural alignment.

神经符号/混合 AI 3 篇 · 2 个细分

符号推理 + 神经网络 2 篇

Bridging Legal Interpretation and Formal Logic: Faithfulness, Assumption, and the Future of AI Legal Reasoning

Medium 2605.14049
Olivia Peiyu Wang, Leilani H. Gilpin
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出神经符号方法结合 LLM 与形式验证，提升法律推理的忠实性与可信度。
🎯研究动机

法律领域对推理的严谨性要求极高，而当前 LLM 系统存在系统性推断超出源文本支持的问题，导致结论不可靠，增加人工验证负担。

❓解决问题

LLM 在法律推理中产生假设性结论，缺乏逻辑忠实性，无法满足法律实践对可问责性的要求。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 LLM 不仅会幻觉事实，更会系统性地进行超出源文本支持的推断，将假设性结论呈现为逻辑推导结果。

🛠️主要方法

神经符号方法：结合 LLM 的表达能力与形式验证的严谨性，实现忠实且可信的 AI 法律推理。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将形式逻辑与 LLM 结合的神经符号框架，解决法律推理中的忠实性问题。
  • 为 AI 法律推理提供可验证、可问责的解决方案，减少人工验证负担。
⚠️方法局限
  • 神经符号方法的可扩展性可能受限于形式化表示的复杂度。
  • 实际法律场景中的歧义性和开放性可能难以完全形式化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The growing adoption of large language models in legal practice brings both significant promise and serious risk. Legal professionals stand to benefit from AI that can reason over contracts, draft documents, and analyze sources at scale, yet the high-stakes nature of legal work demands a level of rigor that current AI systems do not provide. The central problem is not simply that LLMs hallucinate facts and references; it is that they systematically draw inferences that go beyond what the source text actually supports, presenting assumption-laden conclusions as if they were logically grounded. This proposal presents a neuro-symbolic approach to legal AI that combines the expressive power of large language models with the rigor of formal verification, aiming to make AI-assisted legal reasoning both capable and trustworthy, thus reducing the burden of manual verification without sacrificing the accountability that legal practice demands.

On Strong Equivalence Notions in Logic Programming and Abstract Argumentation

Low 2605.14721
Giovanni Buraglio, Wolfgang Dvorak, Stefan Woltran
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种新的逻辑程序强等价概念，使其在翻译为抽象论证框架时保持等价性。
🎯研究动机

逻辑程序和抽象论证框架在静态设置下语义等价，但在动态上下文中由于更新概念不同导致强等价性不成立，这阻碍了两种形式化之间的可靠翻译和替换。

❓解决问题

解决逻辑程序与抽象论证框架之间在动态上下文中强等价性不兼容的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出逻辑程序与抽象论证框架在静态设置下等价，但动态上下文中由于更新概念不同，强等价性无法保持。

🛠️主要方法

引入一种新的逻辑程序强等价概念，使其在翻译为 Dung 风格和 claim-augmented 论证框架时保持强等价性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了逻辑程序与抽象论证框架在动态上下文中强等价性不兼容的现象。
  • 提出了一种新的逻辑程序强等价概念，恢复了两种形式化之间的兼容性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类别的逻辑程序和论证框架。
  • 新概念的实用性和计算复杂性尚未评估。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Strong equivalence between knowledge bases ensures the possibility of replacing one with the other without affecting reasoning outcomes, in any given context. This makes it a crucial property in nonmonotonic formalisms. In particular, the fields of logic programming and abstract argumentation provide primary examples in which this property has been subject to vast investigations. However, while (classes of) logic programs and abstract argumentation frameworks are known to be semantically equivalent in static settings, this alignment breaks in dynamic contexts due to differing notions of update. As a result, strong equivalence does not always carry over from one formalism to the other. In this paper, we carefully investigate this discrepancy and introduce a new notion of strong equivalence for logic programs. Our approach preserves strong equivalence under translation between certain classes of logic programs and both Dung-style and claim-augmented argumentation frameworks, thus restoring compatibility across these formalisms.

形式化验证 1 篇

Precise Verification of Transformers through ReLU-Catalyzed Abstraction Refinement

Medium 2605.14294
Hengjie Liu, Zhenya Zhang, Jianjun Zhao
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：通过 ReLU 催化抽象精炼，实现 Transformer 的高精度形式化验证。
🎯研究动机

Transformer 在安全关键场景中广泛应用，但其自注意力层中的点积运算导致形式化验证极其困难，现有过近似方法虽高效但精度不足，易产生误报。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲过多效率的前提下，提高 Transformer 形式化验证的精度。

🔎现象分析

现有过近似方法通过构造凸约束来限定输出范围，但引入显著近似误差，导致频繁误报。

🛠️主要方法

利用 ReLU 表示点积的精确但非线性边界，结合 ReLU 凸松弛技术推导精确边界，并将基于规则和基于优化的两种经典方法扩展到 Transformer 场景。

📊实验结果

在两种数据集（情感分析）上的不同模型架构和鲁棒性属性上评估，与最先进基线方法比较，结果表明在大多数验证任务中精度显著提升，效率可接受。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种新颖的 ReLU 用法，用于表示点积的精确非线性边界，从而利用 ReLU 凸松弛技术获得精确边界。
  • 将两种经典验证方法（基于规则和基于优化）扩展到 Transformer，形成两个高效且精确的验证框架。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于基于 ReLU 激活函数的 Transformer。
  • 效率与精度之间的权衡可能在某些任务中仍不理想。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Formal verification of transformers has become increasingly important due to their widespread deployment in safety-critical applications. Compared to classic neural networks, the inferences of transformers involve highly complex computations, such as dot products in self-attention layers, rendering their verification extremely difficult. Existing approaches explored over-approximation methods by constructing convex constraints to bound the output ranges of transformers, which can achieve high efficiency. However, they may sacrifice verification precision, and consequently introduce significant approximation error that leads to frequent occurrences of false alarms. In this paper, we propose a transformer verification approach that can achieve improved precision. At the core of our approach is a novel usage of ReLU, by which we represent a precise but non-linear bound for dot products such that we can further exploit the rich body of literature for convex relaxation of ReLU to derive precise bounds. We extend two classic approaches to the context of transformers, a rule-based one and an optimization-based one, resulting in two new frameworks for efficient and precise verification. We evaluate our approaches on different model architectures and robustness properties derived from two datasets about sentiment analysis, and compare with the state-of-the-art baseline approach. Compared to the baseline, our approach can achieve significant precision improvement for most of the verification tasks with acceptable compromise of efficiency, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach.

优化 2 篇 · 1 个细分

优化器设计 2 篇

Turning Stale Gradients into Stable Gradients: Coherent Coordinate Descent with Implicit Landscape Smoothing for Lightweight Zeroth-Order Optimization

Medium 2605.14373
Chen Liang, Xiatao Sun, Qian Wang, Daniel Rakita
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 Coherent Coordinate Descent (CoCD)，一种确定性、样本高效且预算感知的零阶优化器，通过利用历史梯度实现每步 O(1) 查询复杂度，并发现大步长有限差分具有隐式平滑效应。
🎯研究动机

零阶优化在无法反向传播的场景（如内存受限的端侧学习、黑盒优化）中至关重要，但现有方法面临样本效率低（如标准有限差分）或随机估计方差高（如随机子空间方法）的困境。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种确定性、样本高效且稳定的零阶优化方法，避免随机估计的高方差，同时保持低查询复杂度。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，较大的有限差分步长可以通过降低有效光滑常数来隐式平滑优化景观，从而提高收敛稳定性；此外，历史（陈旧）梯度可转化为计算资产。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Coherent Coordinate Descent (CoCD)，一种确定性零阶优化器，通过梯度相干性概念，将 CoCD 等价于带“热启动”的块循环坐标下降 (BCCD)，利用历史梯度实现每步 O(1) 查询复杂度。

📊实验结果

在 MLP、CNN 和 ResNet（最多 270k 参数）上进行了实验，比较了 CoCD 与 BCCD 及随机 ZO 方法的样本效率、收敛损失 / 准确率和稳定性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化梯度相干性概念，并证明 CoCD 等价于带热启动的 BCCD，将历史梯度从负担转化为资产。
  • 推导误差界，揭示大步长有限差分的隐式平滑效应，提高收敛稳定性。
  • 在 MLP、CNN、ResNet 上实验验证 CoCD 在样本效率和收敛损失 / 准确率上显著优于 BCCD，且比随机 ZO 方法更稳定。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法可能对问题结构（如坐标可分性）有一定依赖。
  • 理论分析可能仅适用于光滑或近似光滑的目标函数。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Zeroth-Order (ZO) optimization is pivotal for scenarios where backpropagation is unavailable, such as memory-constrained on-device learning and black-box optimization. However, existing methods face a stark trade-off: they are either sample-inefficient (e.g., standard finite differences) or suffer from high variance due to randomized estimation (e.g., random subspace methods). In this work, we propose Coherent Coordinate Descent (CoCD), a deterministic, sample-efficient, and budget-aware ZO optimizer. Theoretically, we formalize the notion of gradient coherence and demonstrate that CoCD is equivalent to Block Cyclic Coordinate Descent (BCCD) with ``warm starts,'' effectively converting historical (stale) gradients from a liability into a computational asset. This mechanism enables $O(1)$ query complexity per step while maintaining global descent directions. Furthermore, we derive error bounds revealing a counter-intuitive insight: larger finite-difference step sizes can induce an implicit smoothing effect on the optimization landscape by reducing the effective smoothness constant, thereby improving convergence stability. Experiments on MLP, CNN, and ResNet architectures (up to 270k parameters) demonstrate that CoCD significantly outperforms BCCD in terms of sample efficiency and convergence loss/accuracy, and exhibits superior stability over randomized ZO methods. Our results suggest that deterministic, structure-aware updates offer a superior alternative to randomization for lightweight ZO optimization.

Novel Dynamic Batch-Sensitive Adam Optimiser for Vehicular Accident Injury Severity Prediction

Medium 2605.15083
Daniel Asare Kyei, Alimatu Saadia-Yussiff, Maame G. Asante-Mensah, Abdul Lateef-Yussiff, Charles Roland Haruna, Derry Emmanuel
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出动态批量敏感 Adam 优化器(DBS-Adam)，通过梯度范数和损失指数移动平均计算批次难度分数动态调整学习率，在车辆事故伤害严重度预测中提升不平衡序列数据上的训练稳定性和收敛速度。
🎯研究动机

常用优化器在处理不平衡和序列数据集时难以捕捉少数类模式，影响模型效率和收敛速度，需要针对此类数据特点的优化方法。

❓解决问题

解决现有优化器在不平衡序列数据上训练不稳定、收敛慢以及少数类学习能力不足的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DBS-Adam 优化器，利用梯度范数和批次损失的指数移动平均计算批次难度分数，动态缩放学习率：对困难批次增加更新，对简单批次减少更新。

📊实验结果

在车辆事故伤害严重度预测数据集上，使用 Bi-LSTM 网络，通过四种实验配置比较基线模型和替代架构，与 AMSGrad、AdamW、AdaBound 进行对比，基于五个随机种子，统计检验显示精度提升显著(p=0.020)。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DBS-Adam 优化器，动态调整学习率以应对不平衡序列数据。
  • 在车辆事故伤害严重度预测任务中，结合 Bi-LSTM、SMOTE-ENN 和 Focal Loss，实现 95.22% 测试准确率，并显著优于 AMSGrad、AdamW、AdaBound 等优化器。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在单一车辆事故数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 未讨论 DBS-Adam 在其他类型不平衡序列数据上的表现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The choice of optimiser is important in deep learning, as it strongly influences model efficiency and speed of convergence. However, many commonly used optimisers encounter difficulties when applied to imbalanced and sequential datasets, limiting their ability to capture patterns of minority classes. In this study, we propose Dynamic Batch-Sensitive Adam (DBS-Adam), an optimiser that dynamically scales the learning rate using a batch difficulty score derived from exponential moving averages of gradient norms and batch loss. DBS-Adam improves training stability and accelerates convergence by increasing updates for difficult batches and reducing them for easier ones. We evaluate DBS-Adam by integrating it with Bi-Directional LSTM networks for accident injury severity prediction, addressing class imbalance through SMOTE-ENN resampling and Focal Loss. Four experimental configurations compare baseline Bi-LSTM models and alternative architectures to assess optimiser impact. Rigorous comparison against state-of-the-art optimisers (AMSGrad, AdamW, AdaBound) across five random seeds demonstrated DBS-Adam's competitive performance with statistically significant precision improvements (p=0.020). Results indicate that DBS-Adam outperforms standard optimisation approaches, achieving 95.22% test accuracy, 96.11% precision, 95.28% recall, 95.39% F1-score, and a test loss of 0.0086. The proposed framework enables effective real-time accident severity classification for targeted emergency response and road safety interventions, demonstrating the value of DBS-Adam for learning from imbalanced sequential data.

表征学习 2 篇 · 1 个细分

自监督学习 2 篇

Beyond Instance-Level Self-Supervision in 3D Multi-Modal Medical Imaging

High 2605.14654
Tan Pan, Shuhao Mei, Yixuan Sun, Kaiyu Guo, Chen Jiang, Zhaorui Tan, Mengzhu Li, Limei Han et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用跨实例拓扑一致性作为自监督信号，提升 3D 多模态医学影像的预训练效果。
🎯研究动机

现有自监督预训练方法将每个个体视为孤立实例，未能充分利用解剖结构在不同个体间保持空间关系一致性的特点，导致表示学习不够鲁棒。

❓解决问题

如何利用跨实例的拓扑一致性来改进 3D 多模态医学影像的自监督预训练。

🔎现象分析

解剖结构在不同个体间保持一致的拓扑关系（如丘脑位于基底节内侧），但现有方法未利用这一特性。

🛠️主要方法

提出两种对齐机制：实例内对齐使用跨模态三元组目标保持局部邻域拓扑；实例间对齐通过伪对应控制部分邻域对齐，防止拓扑坍塌。

📊实验结果

在 7 个下游多模态任务上验证，分割任务平均提升 1.1%，分类任务平均提升 5.94%，且在测试时缺失模态时鲁棒性显著更好。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将跨实例拓扑一致性作为自监督信号用于 3D 多模态医学影像预训练。
  • 提出实例内和实例间两种对齐机制，有效处理多模态和跨实例的变异性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 伪对应的质量可能影响实例间对齐效果。
  • 方法可能对特定解剖结构或模态组合敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Self-supervised pre-training methods in medical imaging typically treat each individual as an isolated instance, learning representations through augmentation-based objectives or masked reconstruction. They often do not adequately capitalize on a key characteristic of physiological features: anatomical structures maintain consistent spatial relationships across individuals (instances), such as the thalamus being medial to the basal ganglia, regardless of variations in brain size, shape, or pathology. We propose leveraging this cross-instance topological consistency as a supervisory signal. The challenge arises from the inherent variability in medical imaging, which can differ significantly across instances and modalities. To tackle this, we focus on two alignment regimes. (i) Intra-instance: with pixel-level correspondences available, a cross-modal triplet objective explicitly preserves local neighborhood topology. (ii) Inter-instance: without such supervision, we derive pseudo-correspondences to control partial neighborhood alignment and prevent topology collapse across modalities. We validate our approach across 7 downstream multi-modal tasks, achieving average improvements of 1.1% and 5.94% in segmentation and classification tasks, respectively, and demonstrating significantly better robustness when modalities are missing at test time.

Unsupervised learning of acquisition variability in structural connectomes via hybrid latent space modeling

Medium 2605.13933
Gaurav Rudravaram, Lianrui Zuo, Karthik Ramadass, Elyssa McMaster, Jongyeon Yoon, Aravind R. Krishnan, Adam M. Saunders, Chenyu Gao et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 Joint-VAE，通过架构退火实现无监督分离 dMRI 结构连接组中的采集变异与生物变异。
🎯研究动机

dMRI 数据中不同站点、扫描仪和协议带来的采集差异会干扰结构连接组分析，现有方法要么将所有变异视为连续（如 VAE），要么需要手动调参来平衡离散与连续隐变量，缺乏自动化的无监督方案。

❓解决问题

如何无监督地学习结构连接组中的采集变异，并将其与生物变异分离，同时避免手动调节离散 / 连续隐变量的容量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Joint-VAE，在编码器输出后引入架构退火（architectural annealing），自适应平衡离散和连续隐变量，无需手动调参。

📊实验结果

在 N=7,416 的结构连接组数据集上，与标准 VAE、PCA+k-means、仅损失退火的混合模型对比，Joint-VAE 在站点聚类上取得更高 ARI（0.53, p<0.05）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无监督框架，通过架构退火自动分离 dMRI 结构连接组中的采集变异与生物变异。
  • 构建了一个包含 7,416 个结构连接组的大规模数据集，涵盖年龄 2-102 岁、13 项研究、25 种采集参数组合。
  • 实验表明架构退火比基于损失的退火和标准 VAE、PCA+k-means 等基线在捕捉站点差异上更有效（ARI=0.53, p<0.05）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了 dMRI 结构连接图数据，未在其他模态或数据类型上测试。
  • 数据集虽大但可能仍存在未覆盖的采集变异类型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Acquisition differences across sites, scanners, and protocols in dMRI introduce variability that complicates structural connectome analysis. This motivates deep learning models that can represent high-dimensional connectomes in a low-dimensional space while explicitly separating acquisition-related effects from biological variation. Conventional dimensionality reduction methods model all variance as continuous, so acquisition effects often get absorbed into a continuous latent space. Recent hybrid latent-space models combine discrete and continuous components to address this, but typically require manual capacity tuning to ensure the discrete component captures the intended variability. We introduce an unsupervised framework that removes this manual tuning by architecturally annealing encoder outputs before decoding, allowing the model to adaptively balance discrete and continuous latent variables during training. To evaluate it, we curated a dataset of N=7,416 structural connectomes derived from dMRI, spanning ages 2 to 102 and 13 studies with 25 unique acquisition-parameter combinations. Of these, 5,900 are cognitively unimpaired, 877 have mild cognitive impairment (MCI), and 639 have Alzheimer's disease (AD). We compare against a standard VAE, PCA with k-means clustering, and hybrid models that anneal only through the loss function. Our architectural annealing produces stronger site learning (ARI=0.53, p<0.05) than these baselines. Results show that a hybrid continuous-discrete latent space, with architectural rather than loss-based annealing, provides a useful unsupervised mechanism for capturing acquisition variability in dMRI: by jointly modeling smooth and categorical structure, the Joint-VAE recovers clusters aligned with scanner and protocol differences.

基础设施/软硬件 1 篇 · 1 个细分

库与工具 1 篇

In-IDE Toolkit for Developers of AI-Based Features

Medium 2605.14612
Yaroslav Sokolov, Yury Khudyakov, Lenar Sharipov, Andrei Gasparian, Parth Tiwary, Artem Trofimov
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：JetBrains IDE 的 AI Toolkit 插件将 LLM 追踪与评估集成到 Run/Debug 循环中，降低非 ML 工程师使用 AI 功能的门槛。
🎯研究动机

基于 LLM 和 Agent 的 AI 功能难以测试、调试和复现，尤其对没有 ML 背景的软件工程师而言，现有工具缺乏 IDE 原生支持，导致开发效率低、实践不规范。

❓解决问题

如何为产品型软件工程师提供 IDE 原生的 AI 可观测性和评估工具，降低 AI 功能开发中的测试、调试和评估门槛。

🔎现象分析

混合方法研究发现从业者三个一致需求：评估需常规化可重复、执行时暴露追踪、最小化设置和上下文切换。

🛠️主要方法

开发 JetBrains IDE 插件 AI Toolkit，包含运行触发的追踪捕获、分层检查、一键添加数据集、单元测试式评估等功能。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告早期信号：Run 提示转化率高、追踪用户持续使用、流失率低。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 IDE 原生 AI 可观测性工作流，将追踪和评估嵌入 Run/Debug 循环
  • 通过混合方法研究总结从业者三个核心需求，并据此设计工具
  • 在 PyCharm 中发布并报告早期采用数据，显示低流失率和持续使用
⚠️方法局限
  • 早期数据仅来自 PyCharm，可能不适用于其他 IDE 或语言
  • 未提供定量评估效果（如缺陷发现率、开发时间节省）
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI-enabled features built on LLMs and agentic workflows are difficult to test, debug, and reproduce, especially for product-focused software engineers without a machine learning background. We present the AI Toolkit plugin for JetBrains IDEs, which brings tracing and evaluation directly into the Run/Debug loop. A mixed methods study with practitioners presents three consistent needs: (1) make evaluation regular and repeatable, (2) expose traces at the moment of execution, and (3) minimize setup and context switching. Guided by these needs, the AI Toolkit introduces an IDE-native workflow: run-triggered trace capture; immediate, hierarchical inspection; one-click "Add to Dataset" from traces; and unit-test-like evaluations with pluggable metrics. The first release in PyCharm shows promising early signals - strong conversion when promoted at Run, sustained usage among those who capture traces, and low churn - suggesting that IDE-native observability lowers activation energy and helps developers adopt disciplined practices. We detail the design and implementation of the AI Agents Debugger and AI Evaluation, report initial adoption telemetry, and outline next steps to broaden framework coverage and scale evaluations. Together, these results indicate that integrating AI observability and evaluation into everyday IDE workflows can make modern AI development accessible to non-ML specialists while preserving software-engineering practices.

时间序列与动力系统 1 篇 · 1 个细分

动力系统建模 1 篇

Wavelet-Based Observables for Koopman Analysis: An Extended Dynamic Mode Decomposition Framework

Medium 2605.14224
Cankat Tilki, Serkan Gugercin
arXiv PDF math.NA
TL;DR：将小波变换与扩展动态模态分解结合，提出基于小波可观测量的 Koopman 分析方法。
🎯研究动机

Koopman 算子理论为非线性动力系统分析提供了线性框架，但传统可观测函数（如径向基函数）在捕捉多尺度动态特征时存在局限，小波变换具有多分辨率特性，有望提升 Koopman 分析的表达能力。

❓解决问题

如何构造小波基可观测函数，使其成为 Koopman 半群的特征函数，并实现数值逼近。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于连续小波变换的动态模态分解算法（cWDMD），将小波可观测函数与扩展动态模态分解（EDMD）结合，推导 Koopman 半群及其预解式的闭式表达式。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明在紧致前向不变集上的连续函数 Banach 空间中，小波可观测函数是 Koopman 半群的特征函数。
  • 给出 Koopman 半群及其预解式在小波可观测函数下的闭式表达式。
  • 提出 cWDMD 算法，将小波可观测函数与 EDMD 结合进行数值逼近。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析限于紧致前向不变集上的连续函数空间，实际系统可能不满足该条件。
  • 数值验证仅基于两个示例，泛化能力有待进一步检验。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present an in-depth analysis of the Koopman semigroup via wavelet transform. Towards this goal, we start by introducing the wavelet-based observables and show that they are eigenfunctions of the Koopman semigroup when this semigroup is considered over the Banach space of continuous functions on a compact forward-invariant set endowed with the supremum norm. We then construct closed-form expressions of the action of the Koopman semigroup and its resolvent in terms of these observables. To approximate the action of Koopman semigroup numerically, we combine Extended Dynamic Mode Decomposition (EDMD) with the proposed wavelet-based observables leading to the Wavelet Dynamic Mode Decomposition via Continuous Wavelet Transform (cWDMD) algorithm. We validate our theoretical results on two numerical examples.

没有匹配当前筛选条件的论文。
